title: Seeing Without Eyes: 4D Human-Scene Understanding from Wearable IMUs
summary: Understanding human activities and their surrounding environments typically relies on visual perception, yet cameras pose persistent challenges in privacy, safety, energy efficiency, and scalability. We explore an alternative: 4D perception without vision. Its goal is to reconstruct human motion and 3D scene layouts purely from everyday wearable sensors. For this we introduce IMU-to-4D, a framework that repurposes large language models for non-visual spatiotemporal understanding of human-scene dynamics. IMU-to-4D uses data from a few inertial sensors from earbuds, watches, or smartphones and predicts detailed 4D human motion together with coarse scene structure. Experiments across diverse human-scene datasets show that IMU-to-4D yields more coherent and temporally stable results than SoTA cascaded pipelines, suggesting wearable motion sensors alone can support rich 4D understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMU-to-4D框架，利用可穿戴惯性传感器（耳塞、手表、智能手机等）的数据，结合大语言模型，实现无需视觉的4D人体运动重建与场景结构感知，在多个数据集上优于现有级联方法。
AI.motivation: 传统基于视觉的人体活动感知存在隐私、安全、能耗和可扩展性方面的挑战，因此探索一种无需视觉、仅依靠日常生活中可穿戴传感器进行4D感知的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出IMU-to-4D框架，利用来自耳塞、手表或智能手机等设备的少量惯性传感器数据，重新利用大语言模型进行非视觉的时空理解，预测详细的4D人体运动及粗略的场景结构。
AI.result: 在多种人-场景数据集上的实验结果表明，IMU-to-4D生成的4D感知结果比现有的级联流程更连贯且时间上更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 仅依靠可穿戴运动传感器即可支持丰富的4D理解，为隐私友好、低能耗的人体活动感知提供了新的技术路径。

title: Context Unrolling in Omni Models
summary: We present Omni, a unified multimodal model natively trained on diverse modalities, including text, images, videos, 3D geometry, and hidden representations. We find that such training enables Context Unrolling, where the model explicitly reasons across multiple modal representations before producing predictions. This process enables the model to aggregate complementary information across heterogeneous modalities, facilitating a more faithful approximation of the shared multimodal knowledge manifold and improving downstream reasoning fidelity. As a result, Omni achieves strong performance on both multimodal generation and understanding benchmarks, while demonstrating advanced multimodal reasoning capabilities, including in-context generation of text, image, video, and 3D geometry.

AI.tldr: Omni是一个统一的多模态模型，原生训练于文本、图像、视频、3D几何和隐藏表示等多种模态。通过上下文展开（Context Unrolling）机制，模型在生成预测前跨多种模态表示进行显式推理，聚合互补信息以更好地逼近共享多模态知识流形，从而在生成和理解基准上取得强性能，并展示出高级多模态推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型通常针对单一模态或有限模态组合进行训练，缺乏原生统一处理多种异构模态（如文本、图像、视频、3D几何等）的能力，导致跨模态信息聚合不充分，限制了多模态知识流形的逼近精度和下游推理的保真度。
AI.method: 提出Context Unrolling机制：模型在生成预测之前，显式地在多种模态表示之间进行推理，通过跨模态信息聚合来逼近共享的多模态知识流形，从而提升推理保真度。
AI.result: 在多模态生成和理解基准上取得强性能，展示了包括文本、图像、视频和3D几何的上下文生成能力以及高级多模态推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 原生统一训练多种模态并结合Context Unrolling机制，能够有效提升模型的多模态推理能力和生成质量，为构建通用多模态模型提供可行路径。

title: Vista4D: Video Reshooting with 4D Point Clouds
comment: 24 pages, 20 figures, CVPR 2026, see project page at https://eyeline-labs.github.io/Vista4D
summary: We present Vista4D, a robust and flexible video reshooting framework that grounds the input video and target cameras in a 4D point cloud. Specifically, given an input video, our method re-synthesizes the scene with the same dynamics from a different camera trajectory and viewpoint. Existing video reshooting methods often struggle with depth estimation artifacts of real-world dynamic videos, while also failing to preserve content appearance and failing to maintain precise camera control for challenging new trajectories. We build a 4D-grounded point cloud representation with static pixel segmentation and 4D reconstruction to explicitly preserve seen content and provide rich camera signals, and we train with reconstructed multiview dynamic data for robustness against point cloud artifacts during real-world inference. Our results demonstrate improved 4D consistency, camera control, and visual quality compared to state-of-the-art baselines under a variety of videos and camera paths. Moreover, our method generalizes to real-world applications such as dynamic scene expansion and 4D scene recomposition. See our project page for results, code, and models: https://eyeline-labs.github.io/Vista4D

AI.tldr: Vista4D 提出了一种基于4D点云的视频重摄框架，通过静态像素分割和4D重建构建4D点云表示，实现从不同相机轨迹和视角对输入视频进行场景重新合成，在4D一致性、相机控制和视觉质量上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频重摄方法在处理真实世界动态视频时存在深度估计伪影、无法保持内容外观以及难以对新相机轨迹进行精确控制的问题。
AI.method: 构建4D点云表示：通过静态像素分割和4D重建显式保留已见内容并提供丰富的相机信号；使用重建的多视角动态数据进行训练，以增强对真实世界推理中点云伪影的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多种视频和相机路径下，相比现有最先进基线方法，在4D一致性、相机控制和视觉质量上均得到提升，并能泛化到动态场景扩展和4D场景重组等实际应用。
AI.conclusion: Vista4D 是一个鲁棒且灵活的视频重摄框架，通过4D点云表示有效解决了现有方法的局限性，具有良好的泛化能力和实际应用价值。

title: Directional Confusions Reveal Divergent Inductive Biases Through Rate-Distortion Geometry in Human and Machine Vision
summary: Humans and modern vision models can reach similar classification accuracy while making systematically different kinds of mistakes - differing not in how often they err, but in who gets mistaken for whom, and in which direction. We show that these directional confusions reveal distinct inductive biases that are invisible to accuracy alone. Using matched human and deep vision model responses on a natural-image categorization task under 12 perturbation types, we quantify asymmetry in confusion matrices and link it to generalization geometry through a Rate-Distortion (RD) framework, summarized by three geometric signatures (slope (beta), curvature (kappa)) and efficiency (AUC). We find that humans exhibit broad but weak asymmetries, whereas deep vision models show sparser, stronger directional collapses. Robustness training reduces global asymmetry but fails to recover the human-like breadth-strength profile of graded similarity. Mechanistic simulations further show that different asymmetry organizations shift the RD frontier in opposite directions, even when matched for performance. Together, these results position directional confusions and RD geometry as compact, interpretable signatures of inductive bias under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: 本文发现人类和深度视觉模型在分类准确率相近的情况下，会产生系统性不同的方向性混淆错误。通过引入率失真（Rate-Distortion）框架的三个几何特征（斜率β、曲率κ和效率AUC），揭示了混淆矩阵的不对称性可以反映不同的归纳偏好。人类表现出广泛而微弱的不对称性，而深度模型则呈现稀疏、强烈的方向性坍缩。鲁棒性训练能降低整体不对称性，但无法恢复人类式的渐进相似性特征。
AI.motivation: 传统上仅用分类准确率评估模型与人类的差异，但准确率相同的模型可能具有截然不同的错误模式（即混淆方向）。作者希望揭示这些方向性混淆所蕴含的归纳偏好，并建立一套可量化的几何框架来描述这些差异。
AI.method: 在12种扰动类型下的自然图像分类任务中，匹配收集人类和深度视觉模型的分类响应，构建混淆矩阵并量化其不对称性。通过率失真（Rate-Distortion）框架提取三个几何签名：斜率β、曲率κ和效率AUC。同时进行机制性仿真，模拟不同不对称性组织对RD前沿的影响。
AI.result: 人类表现出广泛但微弱的不对称性，深度视觉模型则呈现稀疏且强烈的方向性坍缩。鲁棒性训练可以降低全局不对称性，但无法复现人类那种广度-强度渐进相似性分布。不同不对称性组织在性能匹配时会使RD前沿向相反方向移动。
AI.conclusion: 方向性混淆和率失真几何可以作为紧凑、可解释的归纳偏好签名，用于在分布偏移下表征模型与人类的差异。

title: Addressing Image Authenticity When Cameras Use Generative AI
comment: To appear in CVPR 2026 Workshop on Authenticity and Provenance in the Age of Generative AI
summary: The ability of generative AI (GenAI) methods to photorealistically alter camera images has raised awareness about the authenticity of images shared online. Interestingly, images captured directly by our cameras are considered authentic and faithful. However, with the increasing integration of deep-learning modules into cameras' capture-time hardware -- namely, the image signal processor (ISP) -- there is now a potential for hallucinated content in images directly output by our cameras. Hallucinated capture-time image content is typically benign, such as enhanced edges or texture, but in certain operations, such as AI-based digital zoom or low-light image enhancement, hallucinations can potentially alter the semantics and interpretation of the image content. As a result, users may not realize that the content in their camera images is not authentic. This paper addresses this issue by enabling users to recover the 'unhallucinated' version of the camera image to avoid misinterpretation of the image content. Our approach works by optimizing an image-specific multi-layer perceptron (MLP) decoder together with a modality-specific encoder so that, given the camera image, we can recover the image before hallucinated content was added. The encoder and MLP are self-contained and can be applied post-capture to the image without requiring access to the camera ISP. Moreover, the encoder and MLP decoder require only 180 KB of storage and can be readily saved as metadata within standard image formats such as JPEG and HEIC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种方法，让用户能够从相机直接输出的图像中恢复出“未幻觉”版本，以避免因相机内部AI图像信号处理器（ISP）引入的幻觉内容导致对图像语义的误解。该方法通过优化一个针对特定图像的MLP解码器与模态特定编码器，无需访问相机ISP即可在拍摄后恢复原始图像，且仅需180KB存储空间，可嵌入JPEG/HEIC等标准图像格式的元数据中。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习模块（如AI数字变焦、低光照增强）集成到相机的图像信号处理器（ISP）中，相机直接输出的图像可能包含被篡改或幻觉（hallucinated）的内容，这些内容可能改变图像的语义和解读，而用户往往意识不到图像并非真实可信。现有研究多关注生成式AI篡改图像，但忽略了相机内部ISP带来的“原生幻觉”问题。
AI.method: 该方法通过联合优化一个图像特定的多层感知机（MLP）解码器和一个模态特定的编码器，使得给定相机输出图像后，编码器能提取特征，MLP解码器能逆向映射回“未幻觉”的原始图像内容。整个过程不需要访问相机的ISP硬件，且编码器与MLP解码器仅需180KB存储，可作为元数据嵌入标准图像格式中。
AI.result: 编码器和MLP解码器仅需180KB存储空间，可嵌入JPEG和HEIC等标准图像格式的元数据中，实现拍摄后离线恢复“未幻觉”版本。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统地解决了相机内部ISP引入的幻觉内容问题，提出了一种轻量级、无需硬件访问的后处理方案，能够恢复图像的原始真实内容，帮助用户避免对图像语义的误解。

title: Grounding Video Reasoning in Physical Signals
comment: Benchmark for Grounding Video Reasoning in Physical Signals
summary: Physical video understanding requires more than naming an event correctly. A model can answer a question about pouring, sliding, or collision from textual regularities while still failing to localize the event in time or space. We introduce a grounded benchmark for physical video understanding that extends the what--when--where evaluation structure of V-STaR to four video sources, six physics domains, three prompt families (physics, vstar_like, and neutral_rstr), and four input conditions (original, shuffled, ablated, and frame-masked). The benchmark contains 1,560 base video clips from SSV2, YouCook2, HoloAssist, and Roundabout-TAU. Each clip is first converted into a shared grounded event record, and the three query families are derived from that record. Temporal and spatial targets are shared across prompt families, while the non-physics families use deterministic family-appropriate semantic a_what targets derived from the same record. Across models and prompt families, physics remains the strongest regime overall, vstar_like is the clearest non-physics semantic comparison, and neutral_rstr behaves as a harder templated control. Prompt-family robustness is selective rather than universal, perturbation gains cluster in weak original cases, and spatial grounding is the weakest across settings. These results suggest that video Q&A reasoning benchmarks shall report physically grounded, prompt-aware, and perturbation-aware diagnostics alongside aggregate accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个物理视频理解的接地基准，扩展了V-STaR的what-when-where评估结构，涵盖4个视频源、6个物理域、3种提示族和4种输入条件，共1560个视频片段。研究发现物理提示族表现最强，空间接地最弱，提示族鲁棒性具有选择性而非普遍性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解模型虽能正确回答物理事件问题（如倾倒、滑动、碰撞），但可能仅依赖文本规律，无法在时间或空间上准确定位事件。现有基准缺乏对物理事件时空定位能力的细粒度评估。
AI.method: 构建接地基准，扩展V-STaR的what-when-where评估结构，包含SSV2、YouCook2、HoloAssist、Roundabout-TAU四个视频源的1560个片段，覆盖6个物理域。每个片段转换为共享的接地事件记录，衍生出三种提示族（physics、vstar_like、neutral_rstr）和四种输入条件（原始、打乱、消融、帧掩码），时间与空间目标跨提示族共享。
AI.result: 物理提示族整体表现最强；vstar_like是非物理语义对比中最清晰的；neutral_rstr作为更难的模板化对照。提示族鲁棒性是选择性而非普遍性的；扰动增益集中在原本较弱的案例上；空间接地是所有设置中最薄弱的环节。
AI.conclusion: 视频问答推理基准应在聚合准确率之外，额外报告物理接地、提示感知和扰动感知的诊断指标。

title: Divide-then-Diagnose: Weaving Clinician-Inspired Contexts for Ultra-Long Capsule Endoscopy Videos
summary: Capsule endoscopy (CE) enables non-invasive gastrointestinal screening, but current CE research remains largely limited to frame-level classification and detection, leaving video-level analysis underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce and formally define a new task, diagnosis-driven CE video summarization, which requires extracting key evidence frames that covers clinically meaningful findings and making accurate diagnoses from those evidence frames. This setting is challenging because diagnostically relevant events are extremely sparse and can be overwhelmed by tens of thousands of redundant normal frames, while individual observations are often ambiguous due to motion blur, debris, specular highlights, and rapid viewpoint changes. To facilitate research in this direction, we introduce VideoCAP, the first CE dataset with diagnosis-driven annotations derived from real clinical reports. VideoCAP comprises 240 full-length videos and provides realistic supervision for both key evidence frame extraction and diagnosis. To address this task, we further propose DiCE, a clinician-inspired framework that mirrors the standard CE reading workflow. DiCE first performs efficient candidate screening over the raw video, then uses a Context Weaver to organize candidates into coherent diagnostic contexts that preserve distinct lesion events, and an Evidence Converger to aggregate multi-frame evidence within each context into robust clip-level judgments. Experiments show that DiCE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, producing concise and clinically reliable diagnostic summaries. These results highlight diagnosis-driven contextual reasoning as a promising paradigm for ultra-long CE video summarization.

AI.tldr: 本文首次定义并研究了诊断驱动的胶囊内镜视频摘要任务，构建了首个包含真实临床标注的VideoCAP数据集（240个全长视频），并提出受临床医生启发的DiCE框架，通过候选筛选、上下文组织和证据聚合三个步骤，在超长视频中提取关键证据帧并进行诊断，实验表明该方法优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 现有胶囊内镜研究局限于帧级分类和检测，缺乏视频级分析；诊断相关的关键事件在数万帧冗余正常帧中极其稀疏，且单帧观察常因运动模糊、 debris、镜面高光和视角快速变化而模糊不清。
AI.method: 提出DiCE框架，模拟临床医生阅片流程：1) 候选筛选模块对原始视频进行高效筛选；2) 上下文编织器（Context Weaver）将候选帧组织成连贯的诊断上下文，保留不同病变事件；3) 证据聚合器（Evidence Converger）在每个上下文内聚合多帧证据，形成稳健的片段级判断。
AI.result: DiCE在VideoCAP数据集上持续优于现有最先进方法，能够生成简洁且临床可靠的诊断摘要。
AI.conclusion: 诊断驱动的上下文推理是超长胶囊内镜视频摘要的一种有前景的新范式。

title: Multiscale Super Resolution without Image Priors
summary: We address the ambiguities in the super-resolution problem under translation. We demonstrate that combinations of low-resolution images at different scales can be used to make the super-resolution problem well posed. Such differences in scale can be achieved using sensors with different pixel sizes (as demonstrated here) or by varying the effective pixel size through changes in optical magnification (e.g., using a zoom lens). We show that images acquired with pairwise coprime pixel sizes lead to a system with a stable inverse, and furthermore, that super-resolution images can be reconstructed efficiently using Fourier domain techniques or iterative least squares methods. Our mathematical analysis provides an expression for the expected error of the least squares reconstruction for large signals assuming i.i.d. noise that elucidates the noise-resolution tradeoff. These results are validated through both one- and two-dimensional experiments that leverage charge-coupled device (CCD) hardware binning to explore reconstructions over a large range of effective pixel sizes. Finally, two-dimensional reconstructions for a series of targets are used to demonstrate the advantages of multiscale super-resolution, and implications of these results for common imaging systems are discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，利用不同像素尺寸（如互质像素大小）获取的多尺度低分辨率图像，可以将超分辨率问题转化为适定问题，并通过傅里叶域技术或迭代最小二乘法高效重建，同时分析了噪声-分辨率的权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 解决超分辨率问题在平移变换下的歧义性（ill-posedness），即单一低分辨率图像无法唯一确定高分辨率图像的问题。
AI.method: 采用成对互质的像素尺寸采集多尺度低分辨率图像，构建具有稳定逆变换的线性系统；利用傅里叶域技术或迭代最小二乘法进行高效重建；通过CCD硬件binning实现大范围有效像素尺寸的实验验证。
AI.result: 提出了一种针对大信号且噪声i.i.d.假设下最小二乘重建期望误差的解析表达式，阐明了噪声与分辨率之间的权衡关系；一维和二维实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度超分辨率方法能够在保持系统稳定的前提下实现高分辨率重建，对实际成像系统具有重要指导意义。

title: TEMA: Anchor the Image, Follow the Text for Multi-Modification Composed Image Retrieval
summary: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) is an important image retrieval paradigm that enables users to retrieve a target image using a multimodal query that consists of a reference image and modification text. Although research on CIR has made significant progress, prevailing setups still rely simple modification texts that typically cover only a limited range of salient changes, which induces two limitations highly relevant to practical applications, namely Insufficient Entity Coverage and Clause-Entity Misalignment. In order to address these issues and bring CIR closer to real-world use, we construct two instruction-rich multi-modification datasets, M-FashionIQ and M-CIRR. In addition, we propose TEMA, the Text-oriented Entity Mapping Architecture, which is the first CIR framework designed for multi-modification while also accommodating simple modifications. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that TEMA's superiority in both original and multi-modification scenarios, while maintaining an optimal balance between retrieval accuracy and computational efficiency. Our codes and constructed multi-modification dataset (M-FashionIQ and M-CIRR) are available at https://github.com/lee-zixu/ACL26-TEMA/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TEMA架构，首个面向多修改场景的组合图像检索框架，并构建了两个多修改数据集M-FashionIQ和M-CIRR，解决现有CIR方法中实体覆盖不足和子句-实体对齐问题，在四个基准数据集上验证了优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有CIR方法依赖简单修改文本，仅覆盖有限范围显著变化，存在两个实际问题：实体覆盖不足（Insufficient Entity Coverage）和子句-实体误对齐（Clause-Entity Misalignment），亟需向真实场景靠近。
AI.method: 构建两个指令丰富的多修改数据集M-FashionIQ和M-CIRR；提出TEMA（Text-oriented Entity Mapping Architecture），首个同时支持多修改和简单修改的CIR框架。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上，TEMA在原始场景和多修改场景均表现优越，并在检索精度与计算效率之间达到最优平衡。
AI.conclusion: TEMA有效解决了现有CIR方法的局限性，贴近真实应用场景，代码和数据集已开源。

title: SyMTRS: Benchmark Multi-Task Synthetic Dataset for Depth, Domain Adaptation and Super-Resolution in Aerial Imagery
summary: Recent advances in deep learning for remote sensing rely heavily on large annotated datasets, yet acquiring high-quality ground truth for geometric, radiometric, and multi-domain tasks remains costly and often infeasible. In particular, the lack of accurate depth annotations, controlled illumination variations, and multi-scale paired imagery limits progress in monocular depth estimation, domain adaptation, and super-resolution for aerial scenes. We present SyMTRS, a large-scale synthetic dataset generated using a high-fidelity urban simulation pipeline. The dataset provides high-resolution RGB aerial imagery (2048 x 2048), pixel-perfect depth maps, night-time counterparts for domain adaptation, and aligned low-resolution variants for super-resolution at x2, x4, and x8 scales. Unlike existing remote sensing datasets that focus on a single task or modality, SyMTRS is designed as a unified multi-task benchmark enabling joint research in geometric understanding, cross-domain robustness, and resolution enhancement. We describe the dataset generation process, its statistical properties, and its positioning relative to existing benchmarks. SyMTRS aims to bridge critical gaps in remote sensing research by enabling controlled experiments with perfect geometric ground truth and consistent multi-domain supervision. The results obtained in this work can be reproduced from this Github repository: https://github.com/safouaneelg/SyMTRS.

AI.tldr: SyMTRS是一个大规模合成遥感数据集，通过高保真城市模拟管道生成，提供高分辨率RGB图像、像素级深度图、夜间图像和多尺度低分辨率变体，旨在作为统一的多任务基准，支持几何理解、域适应和超分辨率等联合研究。
AI.motivation: 遥感领域依赖大量标注数据，但获取高质量的几何、辐射和多域标注成本高昂且常不可行，尤其是深度标注、光照变化和多尺度配对图像的缺乏限制了单目深度估计、域适应和超分辨率等任务的进展。
AI.method: 使用高保真城市模拟管道生成合成数据集，提供2048x2048高分辨率RGB航拍图像、像素完美深度图、夜间域适应对应图像以及x2/x4/x8倍对齐低分辨率变体。
AI.result: 生成了统一的多任务基准数据集，具备完美的几何真值和一致的多域监督，弥补了现有遥感数据集单一任务/模态的不足。
AI.conclusion: SyMTRS通过提供受控实验环境与完美几何真值，填补了遥感研究中几何理解、跨域鲁棒性和分辨率增强方面的关键空白。

title: From Codebooks to VLMs: Evaluating Automated Visual Discourse Analysis for Climate Change on Social Media
summary: Social media platforms have become primary arenas for climate communication, generating millions of images and posts that - if systematically analysed - can reveal which communication strategies mobilise public concern and which fall flat. We aim to facilitate such research by analysing how computer vision methods can be used for social media discourse analysis. This analysis includes application-based taxonomy design, model selection, prompt engineering, and validation. We benchmark six promptable vision-language models and 15 zero-shot CLIP-like models on two datasets from X (formerly Twitter) - a 1,038-image expert-annotated set and a larger corpus of over 1.2 million images, with 50,000 labels manually validated - spanning five annotation dimensions: animal content, climate change consequences, climate action, image setting, and image type. Among the models benchmarked, Gemini-3.1-flash-lite outperforms all others across all super-categories and both datasets, while the gap to open-weight models of moderate size remains relatively small. Beyond instance-level metrics, we advocate for distributional evaluation: VLM predictions can reliably recover population level trends even when per-image accuracy is moderate, making them a viable starting point for discourse analysis at scale. We find that chain-of-thought reasoning reduces rather than improves performance, and that annotation dimension specific prompt design improves performance. We release tweet IDs and labels along with our code at https://github.com/KathPra/Codebooks2VLMs.git.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了视觉语言模型（VLMs）在社交媒体气候传播图像分析中的表现，发现Gemini-3.1-flash-lite在所有基准测试中表现最优，链式思维推理会降低性能，而基于分布的评价方法即使逐图精度中等也能可靠恢复总体趋势。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体已成为气候传播的主要阵地，产生海量图像和帖子，系统分析这些内容可以揭示哪些传播策略能有效激发公众关注。因此，本文旨在探索如何利用计算机视觉方法进行社交媒体话语分析，以促进此类研究。
AI.method: 方法包括应用型分类法设计、模型选择、提示工程和验证。具体对6个可提示视觉语言模型（VLMs）和15个零样本CLIP类模型进行基准测试，使用来自X平台的两个数据集（1,038张专家标注图像和超过120万张图像的大规模语料库，其中50,000个标签经过人工验证），涵盖五个标注维度：动物内容、气候变化后果、气候行动、图像场景和图像类型。
AI.result: Gemini-3.1-flash-lite在所有超类别和两个数据集上均优于其他模型；链式思维推理（chain-of-thought reasoning）反而降低性能；针对标注维度的特定提示设计可提升性能；在分布级评估中，VLM预测即使逐图精度中等，也能可靠恢复总体趋势。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言模型可作为大规模气候传播话语分析的可行起点，特别是采用分布级评估方法时；开放权重的中等规模模型与最佳闭源模型之间的差距相对较小；建议在提示工程中避免链式思维推理，采用维度特定的提示设计。

title: Reshoot-Anything: A Self-Supervised Model for In-the-Wild Video Reshooting
summary: Precise camera control for reshooting dynamic videos is bottlenecked by the severe scarcity of paired multi-view data for non-rigid scenes. We overcome this limitation with a highly scalable self-supervised framework capable of leveraging internet-scale monocular videos. Our core contribution is the generation of pseudo multi-view training triplets, consisting of a source video, a geometric anchor, and a target video. We achieve this by extracting distinct smooth random-walk crop trajectories from a single input video to serve as the source and target views. The anchor is synthetically generated by forward-warping the first frame of the source with a dense tracking field, which effectively simulates the distorted point-cloud inputs expected at inference. Because our independent cropping strategy introduces spatial misalignment and artificial occlusions, the model cannot simply copy information from the current source frame. Instead, it is forced to implicitly learn 4D spatiotemporal structures by actively routing and re-projecting missing high-fidelity textures across distinct times and viewpoints from the source video to reconstruct the target. At inference, our minimally adapted diffusion transformer utilizes a 4D point-cloud derived anchor to achieve state-of-the-art temporal consistency, robust camera control, and high-fidelity novel view synthesis on complex dynamic scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种自监督框架，通过从互联网规模单目视频中生成伪多视图训练三元组（源视频、几何锚点、目标视频），利用4D点云锚点实现动态场景的精确相机控制和高质量新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因缺乏非刚性场景的配对多视图数据而受限，无法实现精确的相机控制。
AI.method: 1) 从单输入视频提取平滑随机游走裁剪轨迹作为源和目标视图；2) 通过前向扭曲源视频第一帧生成几何锚点；3) 独立裁剪策略迫使模型学习4D时空结构，跨不同时间和视点重构目标视图；4) 推理时使用4D点云锚点在扩散transformer中实现新视角合成。
AI.result: 在复杂动态场景上实现了最先进的时间一致性、鲁棒相机控制和高保真新视角合成。
AI.conclusion: 自监督框架有效利用互联网级单目视频突破数据瓶颈，无需配对多视图数据即可实现动态场景的精确相机重拍控制。

title: Back to Source: Open-Set Continual Test-Time Adaptation via Domain Compensation
summary: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) aims to mitigate distributional shifts between training and test domains during inference time. However, existing TTA methods fall short in the realistic scenario where models face both continually changing domains and the simultaneous emergence of unknown semantic classes, a challenging setting we term Open-set Continual Test-Time Adaptation (OCTTA). The coupling of domain and semantic shifts often collapses the feature space, severely degrading both classification and out-of-distribution detection. To tackle this, we propose DOmain COmpensation (DOCO), a lightweight and effective framework that robustly performs domain adaptation and OOD detection in a synergistic, closed loop. DOCO first performs dynamic, adaptation-conditioned sample splitting to separate likely ID from OOD samples. Then, using only the ID samples, it learns a domain compensation prompt by aligning feature statistics with the source domain, guided by a structural preservation regularizer that prevents semantic distortion. This learned prompt is then propagated to the OOD samples within the same batch, effectively isolating their semantic novelty for more reliable detection. Extensive experiments on multiple challenging benchmarks demonstrate that DOCO outperforms prior CTTA and OSTTA methods, establishing a new state-of-the-art for the demanding OCTTA setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DOCO框架，通过域补偿提示和结构保持正则化，解决开放集连续测试时适应（OCTTA）中域偏移与语义未知类同时出现的问题，实现域适应与OOD检测的协同闭环，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有TTA方法无法应对测试时域连续变化且同时出现未知语义类的现实场景（称为OCTTA），域偏移与语义偏移的耦合会导致特征空间坍缩，降低分类和OOD检测性能。
AI.method: 提出DOCO框架：1）动态、适应条件驱动的样本分割，分离似然ID与OOD样本；2）仅用ID样本学习域补偿提示，通过特征统计对齐源域，并采用结构保持正则化防止语义失真；3）将学到的提示传播到同批次OOD样本，隔离其语义新颖性以提升检测可靠性。
AI.result: 在多个挑战性基准上的大量实验表明，DOCO优于先前的CTTA和OSTTA方法，在OCTTA设置下建立了新的SOTA。
AI.conclusion: DOCO通过域适应与OOD检测的协同闭环设计，有效解决了OCTTA中域偏移与语义偏移耦合导致的特征坍缩问题，验证了轻量级框架在复杂动态场景下的有效性。

title: Interpretable facial dynamics as behavioral and perceptual traces of deepfakes
comment: Main paper: 19 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. SI Appendix: 11 pages, 3 figures, 6 tables
summary: Deepfake detection research has largely converged on deep learning approaches that, despite strong benchmark performance, offer limited insight into what distinguishes real from manipulated facial behavior. This study presents an interpretable alternative grounded in bio-behavioral features of facial dynamics and evaluates how computational detection strategies relate to human perceptual judgments. We identify core low-dimensional patterns of facial movement, from which temporal features characterizing spatiotemporal structure were derived. Traditional machine learning classifiers trained on these features achieved modest but significant above-chance deepfake classification, driven by higher-order temporal irregularities that were more pronounced in manipulated than real facial dynamics. Notably, detection was substantially more accurate for videos containing emotive expressions than those without. An emotional valence classification analysis further indicated that emotive signals are systematically degraded in deepfakes, explaining the differential impact of emotive dynamics on detection. Furthermore, we provide an additional and often overlooked dimension of explainability by assessing the relationship between model decisions and human perceptual detection. Model and human judgments converged for emotive but diverged for non-emotive videos, and even where outputs aligned, underlying detection strategies differed. These findings demonstrate that face-swapped deepfakes carry a measurable behavioral fingerprint, most salient during emotional expression. Additionally, model-human comparisons suggest that interpretable computational features and human perception may offer complementary rather than redundant routes to detection.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出一种基于面部行为动力学的可解释深度伪造检测方法，通过提取低维面部运动特征，发现深度伪造在情感表达时存在更高阶的时间不规则性，且模型与人类感知在情感视频上判断一致但在非情感视频上存在差异，表明两者可互补。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法多依赖深度学习黑箱模型，虽然基准性能强，但缺乏对真实与伪造面部行为差异的可解释性理解。
AI.method: 基于生物行为特征的面部动力学分析，提取低维面部运动模式的时间特征，使用传统机器学习分类器进行分类，并比较模型决策与人类感知判断。
AI.result: 传统分类器实现显著高于随机水平的深度伪造分类；包含情感表情的视频检测准确率远高于无表情视频；情感效价分析表明深度伪造中情感信号系统性退化；模型与人类判断在情感视频上一致，在非情感视频上存在分歧。
AI.conclusion: 换脸深度伪造存在可测量的行为指纹，在情感表达时最为显著；可解释计算特征与人类感知可能是互补而非冗余的检测途径。

title: Ramen: Robust Test-Time Adaptation of Vision-Language Models with Active Sample Selection
summary: Pretrained vision-language models such as CLIP exhibit strong zero-shot generalization but remain sensitive to distribution shifts. Test-time adaptation adapts models during inference without access to source data or target labels, offering a practical way to handle such shifts. However, existing methods typically assume that test samples come from a single, consistent domain, while in practice, test data often include samples from mixed domains with distinct characteristics. Consequently, their performance degrades under mixed-domain settings. To address this, we present Ramen, a framework for robust test-time adaptation through active sample selection. For each incoming test sample, Ramen retrieves a customized batch of relevant samples from previously seen data based on two criteria: domain consistency, which ensures that adaptation focuses on data from similar domains, and prediction balance, which mitigates adaptation bias caused by skewed predictions. To improve efficiency, Ramen employs an embedding-gradient cache that stores the embeddings and sample-level gradients of past test images. The stored embeddings are used to retrieve relevant samples, and the corresponding gradients are aggregated for model updates, eliminating the need for any additional forward or backward passes. Our theoretical analysis provides insight into why the proposed adaptation mechanism is effective under mixed-domain shifts. Experiments on multiple image corruption and domain-shift benchmarks demonstrate that Ramen achieves strong and consistent performance, offering robust and efficient adaptation in complex mixed-domain scenarios. Our code is available at https://github.com/baowenxuan/Ramen .

AI.tldr: Ramen是一个针对混合域分布偏移的鲁棒测试时自适应框架，通过基于域一致性和预测平衡的主动样本选择，以及嵌入-梯度缓存机制，在无需额外前向/反向传播的情况下实现高效且鲁棒的测试时自适应。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时自适应方法假设测试样本来自单一一致域，但实际测试数据常包含来自多个混合域的样本，导致现有方法在混合域场景下性能下降。
AI.method: Ramen框架包含三个核心组件：1）主动样本选择：基于域一致性（确保自适应聚焦于相似域数据）和预测平衡（缓解偏斜预测导致的自适应偏差）两个标准，为每个测试样本从历史数据中检索定制化批次；2）嵌入-梯度缓存：存储历史测试图像的嵌入和样本级梯度，用嵌入检索相关样本，用梯度聚合进行模型更新，避免额外前向/反向传播；3）理论分析证明了该机制在混合域偏移下的有效性。
AI.result: 在多个图像损坏和域偏移基准测试上，Ramen实现了强且一致的性能，在复杂混合域场景中提供了鲁棒且高效的自适应。
AI.conclusion: Ramen通过主动样本选择策略有效解决了混合域分布偏移下的测试时自适应问题，其嵌入-梯度缓存机制显著提升了效率，理论和实验共同验证了方法的有效性。

title: Unlocking the Power of Critical Factors for 3D Visual Geometry Estimation
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. GitHub Page: https://github.com/aim-uofa/CARVE
summary: Feed-forward visual geometry estimation has recently made rapid progress. However, an important gap remains: multi-frame models usually produce better cross-frame consistency, yet they often underperform strong per-frame methods on single-frame accuracy. This observation motivates our systematic investigation into the critical factors driving model performance through rigorous ablation studies, which reveals several key insights: 1) Scaling up data diversity and quality unlocks further performance gains even in state-of-the-art visual geometry estimation methods; 2) Commonly adopted confidence-aware loss and gradient-based loss mechanisms may unintentionally hinder performance; 3) Joint supervision through both per-sequence and per-frame alignment improves results, while local region alignment surprisingly degrades performance. Furthermore, we introduce two enhancements to integrate the advantages of optimization-based methods and high-resolution inputs: a consistency loss function that enforces alignment between depth maps, camera parameters, and point maps, and an efficient architectural design that leverages high-resolution information. We integrate these designs into CARVE, a resolution-enhanced model for feed-forward visual geometry estimation. Experiments on point cloud reconstruction, video depth estimation, and camera pose/intrinsic estimation show that CARVE achieves strong and robust performance across diverse benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了前馈视觉几何估计中的关键因素，发现数据多样性、损失函数设计和多视角一致性监督对性能有重要影响。在此基础上提出CARVE模型，通过一致性损失和高分辨率架构设计，在点云重建、视频深度估计和相机位姿/内参估计等任务上实现了强健的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈视觉几何估计方法中，多帧模型虽能产生更好的跨帧一致性，但在单帧精度上常不如强单帧方法。这一差距促使作者系统探究影响模型性能的关键因素，并寻求融合两类方法优势的改进方案。
AI.method: 通过消融实验系统分析了数据多样性、置信度感知损失、梯度损失、联合监督策略等因素的影响。提出两种增强：1) 一致性损失函数，强制对齐深度图、相机参数和点图；2) 高效架构设计以利用高分辨率信息。集成这些设计得到CARVE模型。
AI.result: 在点云重建、视频深度估计和相机位姿/内参估计等多个基准上，CARVE实现了强健且优异的性能。
AI.conclusion: 数据多样性与质量对性能提升至关重要；常用的置信度感知损失和梯度损失可能反噬性能；局部区域对齐反而降低效果；而联合序列级与帧级对齐的监督策略、以及融合优化方法和高分辨率输入的设计，能有效提升前馈视觉几何估计的鲁棒性和精度。

title: StyleID: A Perception-Aware Dataset and Metric for Stylization-Agnostic Facial Identity Recognition
comment: SIGGRAPH 2026 / ACM TOG. Project page at https://kwanyun.github.io/StyleID_page/
summary: Creative face stylization aims to render portraits in diverse visual idioms such as cartoons, sketches, and paintings while retaining recognizable identity. However, current identity encoders, which are typically trained and calibrated on natural photographs, exhibit severe brittleness under stylization. They often mistake changes in texture or color palette for identity drift or fail to detect geometric exaggerations. This reveals the lack of a style-agnostic framework to evaluate and supervise identity consistency across varying styles and strengths. To address this gap, we introduce StyleID, a human perception-aware dataset and evaluation framework for facial identity under stylization. StyleID comprises two datasets: (i) StyleBench-H, a benchmark that captures human same-different verification judgments across diffusion- and flow-matching-based stylization at multiple style strengths, and (ii) StyleBench-S, a supervision set derived from psychometric recognition-strength curves obtained through controlled two-alternative forced-choice (2AFC) experiments. Leveraging StyleBench-S, we fine-tune existing semantic encoders to align their similarity orderings with human perception across styles and strengths. Experiments demonstrate that our calibrated models yield significantly higher correlation with human judgments and enhanced robustness for out-of-domain, artist drawn portraits. All of our datasets, code, and pretrained models are publicly available at https://kwanyun.github.io/StyleID_page/

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyleID，一个基于人类感知的面部风格化身份一致性评估数据集与框架，通过收集人类判断和2AFC实验数据，微调编码器使其排序与人类感知对齐，显著提升跨风格的身份保持鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有身份编码器在自然照片上训练，对风格化（如卡通、素描、绘画）极为脆弱，常将纹理或色彩变化误判为身份漂移，且无法检测几何夸张，缺乏风格无关的身份一致性评估与监督框架。
AI.method: 构建StyleID双数据集：StyleBench-H（人类同异判断基准）和StyleBench-S（基于2AFC心理物理实验的识别强度曲线监督集），利用StyleBench-S微调语义编码器，使其相似度排序与人类跨风格感知对齐。
AI.result: 校准后的模型与人类判断的相关性显著提高，对域外艺术家绘制的肖像具有更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 基于人类感知的监督数据可以有效解决身份编码器在风格化下的脆弱性问题，为风格化人脸身份保持提供了更可靠的评估与训练范式。

title: WorldMark: A Unified Benchmark Suite for Interactive Video World Models
summary: Interactive video generation models such as Genie, YUME, HY-World, and Matrix-Game are advancing rapidly, yet every model is evaluated on its own benchmark with private scenes and trajectories, making fair cross-model comparison impossible. Existing public benchmarks offer useful metrics such as trajectory error, aesthetic scores, and VLM-based judgments, but none supplies the standardized test conditions -- identical scenes, identical action sequences, and a unified control interface -- needed to make those metrics comparable across models with heterogeneous inputs. We introduce WorldMark, the first benchmark that provides such a common playing field for interactive Image-to-Video world models. WorldMark contributes: (1) a unified action-mapping layer that translates a shared WASD-style action vocabulary into each model's native control format, enabling apples-to-apples comparison across six major models on identical scenes and trajectories; (2) a hierarchical test suite of 500 evaluation cases covering first- and third-person viewpoints, photorealistic and stylized scenes, and three difficulty tiers from Easy to Hard spanning 20-60s; and (3) a modular evaluation toolkit for Visual Quality, Control Alignment, and World Consistency, designed so that researchers can reuse our standardized inputs while plugging in their own metrics as the field evolves. We will release all data, evaluation code, and model outputs to facilitate future research. Beyond offline metrics, we launch World Model Arena (warena.ai), an online platform where anyone can pit leading world models against each other in side-by-side battles and watch the live leaderboard.

AI.tldr: WorldMark是首个为交互式图像到视频世界模型提供统一评估基准的平台，通过标准化场景、动作序列和控制接口，实现了跨模型的公平比较，并配套在线竞技平台。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式视频生成模型（如Genie、YUME等）发展迅速，但各模型使用私有场景和轨迹进行评测，缺乏标准化测试条件（相同场景、相同动作序列、统一控制接口），导致跨模型公平比较无法进行。
AI.method: (1) 统一动作映射层：将共享的WASD风格动作词汇转换为各模型原生控制格式；(2) 层次化测试套件：500个评测案例，覆盖第一/第三人称视角、真实/风格化场景、三个难度等级（Easy到Hard，时长20-60秒）；(3) 模块化评估工具包：评估视觉质量、控制对齐和世界一致性，支持研究者复用标准化输入并接入自定义指标。
AI.result: 构建了WorldMark基准与World Model Arena在线平台，可对六个主流模型在相同场景和轨迹上进行苹果对苹果的比较，并支持在线实时排行榜。
AI.conclusion: WorldMark为交互式世界模型提供了首个标准化测评平台，解决了跨模型不可比的核心问题，并将开源所有数据、评估代码和模型输出，推动领域发展。

title: From Research Question to Scientific Workflow: Leveraging Agentic AI for Science Automation
summary: Scientific workflow systems automate execution -- scheduling, fault tolerance, resource management -- but not the semantic translation that precedes it. Scientists still manually convert research questions into workflow specifications, a task requiring both domain knowledge and infrastructure expertise. We propose an agentic architecture that closes this gap through three layers: an LLM interprets natural language into structured intents (semantic layer); validated generators produce reproducible workflow DAGs (deterministic layer); and domain experts author ``Skills'': markdown documents encoding vocabulary mappings, parameter constraints, and optimization strategies (knowledge layer). This decomposition confines LLM non-determinism to intent extraction: identical intents always yield identical workflows. We implement and evaluate the architecture on the 1000 Genomes population genetics workflow and Hyperflow WMS running on Kubernetes. In an ablation study on 150 queries, Skills raise full-match intent accuracy from 44% to 83%; skill-driven deferred workflow generation reduces data transfer by 92\%; and the end-to-end pipeline completes queries on Kubernetes with LLM overhead below 15 seconds and cost under $0.001 per query.

AI.tldr: 提出一种三层智能体架构，通过LLM将自然语言转化为结构化意图，再由确定性生成器产生可复现的工作流DAG，辅以领域专家编写的"技能"文档约束参数和优化策略。在1000 Genomes流程上评估，意图匹配准确率从44%提升至83%，数据传输减少92%，端到端查询延迟低于15秒、成本低于$0.001/次。
AI.motivation: 科学工作流系统自动化了执行层面的调度、容错和资源管理，但未覆盖语义翻译环节——科学家仍需手动将研究问题转化为工作流规范，这同时需要领域知识和基础设施专长，效率低下且容易出错。
AI.method: 提出一种三层智能体架构：(1) 语义层——LLM将自然语言解析为结构化意图；(2) 确定性层——经验证的生成器将意图转化为可复现的工作流DAG；(3) 知识层——领域专家编写"Skills"Markdown文档，编码词汇映射、参数约束和优化策略。该分解将LLM的非确定性限制在意图提取阶段，相同意图始终产生相同工作流。
AI.result: 在150条查询的消融实验中：Skills将完全匹配的意图准确率从44%提升至83%；基于Skill的延迟工作流生成减少92%的数据传输；端到端流水线在Kubernetes上完成查询，LLM开销低于15秒，每次查询成本低于$0.001。
AI.conclusion: 通过将非确定性严格限定在意图提取层，结合领域专家知识的确定性生成，能够高效、低成本地将自然语言研究问题自动转化为可复现的科学工作流，显著降低科学家使用工作流系统的门槛。

title: Sapiens2
summary: We present Sapiens2, a model family of high-resolution transformers for human-centric vision focused on generalization, versatility, and high-fidelity outputs. Our model sizes range from 0.4 to 5 billion parameters, with native 1K resolution and hierarchical variants that support 4K. Sapiens2 substantially improves over its predecessor in both pretraining and post-training. First, to learn features that capture low-level details (for dense prediction) and high-level semantics (for zero-shot or few-label settings), we combine masked image reconstruction with self-distilled contrastive objectives. Our evaluations show that this unified pretraining objective is better suited for a wider range of downstream tasks. Second, along the data axis, we pretrain on a curated dataset of 1 billion high-quality human images and improve the quality and quantity of task annotations. Third, architecturally, we incorporate advances from frontier models that enable longer training schedules with improved stability. Our 4K models adopt windowed attention to reason over longer spatial context and are pretrained with 2K output resolution. Sapiens2 sets a new state-of-the-art and improves over the first generation on pose (+4 mAP), body-part segmentation (+24.3 mIoU), normal estimation (45.6% lower angular error) and extends to new tasks such as pointmap and albedo estimation. Code: https://github.com/facebookresearch/sapiens2

AI.tldr: Sapiens2 是一个用于以人为中心的视觉任务的0.4B-5B参数高分辨率Transformer模型家族，通过结合掩码图像重建与自蒸馏对比目标的统一预训练、10亿高质量人类图像数据集、以及窗口注意力等架构改进，在姿态估计、身体部位分割、法线估计等任务上达到SOTA，并扩展至点图和反照率估计新任务。
AI.motivation: 为了在以人为中心的视觉任务中同时实现良好的泛化性、多任务适用性和高保真输出，解决前代Sapiens在捕捉低层细节（用于密集预测）和高层语义（用于零样本/少样本设置）方面的不足。
AI.method: 1) 提出统一预训练目标：结合掩码图像重建与自蒸馏对比学习，同时学习低层细节和高层语义；2) 数据方面：使用10亿高质量人类图像进行预训练并改进任务标注质量与数量；3) 架构方面：引入窗口注意力机制支持更长空间上下文推理，4K模型以2K输出分辨率预训练，同时采用提升训练稳定性的前沿架构改进。
AI.result: 在姿态估计任务上+4 mAP，身体部位分割+24.3 mIoU，法线估计角度误差降低45.6%，并扩展到点图估计和反照率估计等新任务，均达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: Sapiens2通过统一预训练目标、大规模高质量数据以及架构创新，在以人为中心的视觉任务上显著超越前代，验证了结合重建与对比学习的预训练策略对多种下游任务的有效性。

title: A Scale-Adaptive Framework for Joint Spatiotemporal Super-Resolution with Diffusion Models
summary: Deep-learning video super-resolution has progressed rapidly, but climate applications typically super-resolve (increase resolution) either space or time, and joint spatiotemporal models are often designed for a single pair of super-resolution (SR) factors (upscaling spatial and temporal ratio between the low-resolution sequence and the high-resolution sequence), limiting transfer across spatial resolutions and temporal cadences (frame rates). We present a scale-adaptive framework that reuses the same architecture across factors by decomposing spatiotemporal SR into a deterministic prediction of the conditional mean, with attention, and a residual conditional diffusion model, with an optional mass-conservation (same precipitation amount in inputs and outputs) transform to preserve aggregated totals. Assuming that larger SR factors primarily increase underdetermination (hence required context and residual uncertainty) rather than changing the conditional-mean structure, scale adaptivity is achieved by retuning three factor-dependent hyperparameters before retraining: the diffusion noise schedule amplitude beta (larger for larger factors to increase diversity), the temporal context length L (set to maintain comparable attention horizons across cadences) and optionally a third, the mass-conservation function f (tapered to limit the amplification of extremes for large factors). Demonstrated on reanalysis precipitation over France (Comephore), the same architecture spans super-resolution factors from 1 to 25 in space and 1 to 6 in time, yielding a reusable architecture and tuning recipe for joint spatiotemporal super-resolution across scales.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种尺度自适应的联合时空超分辨率框架，通过将时空超分辨率分解为条件均值预测（含注意力机制）和残差条件扩散模型，并依赖三个因子相关超参数（噪声调度幅度、时间上下文长度、质量守恒函数）的重新调优而非重新训练，实现了同一架构跨空间因子1-25、时间因子1-6的尺度泛化，在法国降水再分析数据上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习的视频超分辨率方法在气候应用中通常只对空间或时间单维度进行超分辨率，而联合时空模型往往针对单一超分辨率因子对设计，难以跨空间分辨率和时间帧率迁移，缺乏可复用的通用架构。
AI.method: 将联合时空超分辨率分解为两个组件：1) 带注意力机制的确定性条件均值预测；2) 残差条件扩散模型（可选配质量守恒变换以保持输入输出总降水量一致）。尺度自适应通过调整三个因子相关的超参数实现：扩散噪声调度幅度β（大因子取大值以增加多样性）、时间上下文长度L（维持跨帧率的注意力视野）、质量守恒函数f（对大因子进行渐缩处理以限制极端值放大）。
AI.result: 在法国Comephore降水再分析数据上，同一架构覆盖空间超分辨率因子1-25和时间超分辨率因子1-6，验证了跨尺度的可复用架构和调优方法。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种可复用的联合时空超分辨率架构和调优方案，能够在不重新训练的情况下通过调整少量超参数实现跨不同尺度的时空超分辨率，适用于气候应用中的降水数据。

title: GiVA: Gradient-Informed Bases for Vector-Based Adaptation
summary: As model sizes continue to grow, parameter-efficient fine-tuning has emerged as a powerful alternative to full fine-tuning. While LoRA is widely adopted among these methods, recent research has explored vector-based adaptation methods due to their extreme parameter efficiency. However, these methods typically require substantially higher ranks than LoRA to match its performance, leading to increased training costs. This work introduces GiVA, a gradient-based initialization strategy for vector-based adaptation. It achieves training times comparable to LoRA and maintains the extreme parameter efficiency of vector-based adaptation. We evaluate GiVA across diverse benchmarks, including natural language understanding, natural language generation, and image classification. Experiments show that our approach consistently outperforms or achieves performance competitive with existing vector-based adaptation methods and LoRA while reducing rank requirements by a factor of eight ($8\times$).

AI.tldr: GiVA提出了一种基于梯度的初始化策略用于向量适配方法，在保持极端参数效率的同时，将训练时间降至与LoRA相当，并将所需秩降低8倍。
AI.motivation: 现有向量适配方法虽然参数效率极高，但需要比LoRA高得多的秩才能匹配其性能，导致训练成本增加。作者旨在解决向量适配方法的高秩需求问题。
AI.method: 提出GiVA（Gradient-based Initialization for Vector-based Adaptation），一种基于梯度的初始化策略，用于向量适配方法。
AI.result: 在自然语言理解、自然语言生成和图像分类等多个基准测试中，GiVA一致优于或与现有向量适配方法及LoRA性能相当，同时将秩需求降低8倍。
AI.conclusion: GiVA成功实现了向量适配方法的极端参数效率与LoRA级别训练时间的兼顾，显著降低了秩要求。

title: DualSplat: Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting via Pseudo-Mask Bootstrapping from Reconstruction Failures
comment: 10 pages,6 figures, accepted to Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference 2026
summary: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieves real-time photorealistic rendering, its performance degrades significantly when training images contain transient objects that violate multi-view consistency. Existing methods face a circular dependency: accurate transient detection requires a well-reconstructed static scene, while clean reconstruction itself depends on reliable transient masks. We address this challenge with DualSplat, a Failure-to-Prior framework that converts first-pass reconstruction failures into explicit priors for a second reconstruction stage. We observe that transients, which appear in only a subset of views, often manifest as incomplete fragments during conservative initial training. We exploit these failures to construct object-level pseudo-masks by combining photometric residuals, feature mismatches, and SAM2 instance boundaries. These pseudo-masks then guide a clean second-pass 3DGS optimization, while a lightweight MLP refines them online by gradually shifting from prior supervision to self-consistency. Experiments on RobustNeRF and NeRF On-the-go show that DualSplat outperforms existing baselines, demonstrating particularly clear advantages in transient-heavy scenes and transient regions.

AI.tldr: DualSplat提出一种"失败到先验"框架，通过将首次重建失败（瞬态物体导致的碎片化渲染）转化为显式先验（结合光度残差、特征不匹配和SAM2实例边界的物体级伪掩码），引导第二次干净重建，并使用轻量级MLP在线优化掩码，在RobustNeRF和NeRF On-the-go数据集上超越现有方法，尤其在瞬态密集场景中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 3DGS在包含瞬态物体的训练图像中性能严重下降，而现有方法面临循环依赖问题：准确检测瞬态物体需要良好的静态场景重建，但干净重建本身又依赖于可靠的瞬态掩码。
AI.method: 两阶段"Failure-to-Prior"框架：第一阶段进行保守训练，利用瞬态物体在少部分视图中出现的特性，通过光度残差、特征不匹配和SAM2实例边界构建物体级伪掩码；第二阶段利用伪掩码引导干净的3DGS优化，同时使用轻量级MLP在线优化掩码，从先验监督逐渐过渡到自一致性。
AI.result: 在RobustNeRF和NeRF On-the-go数据集上，DualSplat超越现有基线方法，在瞬态密集场景和瞬态区域中表现出明显优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过将重建失败转化为显式先验，有效解决了瞬态物体导致的3DGS性能退化问题，打破了瞬态检测与干净重建之间的循环依赖。

title: VistaBot: View-Robust Robot Manipulation via Spatiotemporal-Aware View Synthesis
comment: This paper has been accepted to ICRA 2026
summary: Recently, end-to-end robotic manipulation models have gained significant attention for their generalizability and scalability. However, they often suffer from limited robustness to camera viewpoint changes when training with a fixed camera. In this paper, we propose VistaBot, a novel framework that integrates feed-forward geometric models with video diffusion models to achieve view-robust closed-loop manipulation without requiring camera calibration at test time. Our approach consists of three key components: 4D geometry estimation, view synthesis latent extraction, and latent action learning. VistaBot is integrated into both action-chunking (ACT) and diffusion-based ($π_0$) policies and evaluated across simulation and real-world tasks. We further introduce the View Generalization Score (VGS) as a new metric for comprehensive evaluation of cross-view generalization. Results show that VistaBot improves VGS by 2.79$\times$ and 2.63$\times$ over ACT and $π_0$, respectively, while also achieving high-quality novel view synthesis. Our contributions include a geometry-aware synthesis model, a latent action planner, a new benchmark metric, and extensive validation across diverse environments. The code and models will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: VistaBot是一个结合前馈几何模型与视频扩散模型的框架，用于实现无需测试时相机标定的视角鲁棒闭环操作，在ACT和π₀策略上分别提升了2.79倍和2.63倍的视图泛化分数（VGS）。
AI.motivation: 端到端机器人操作模型在固定相机训练时对相机视角变化缺乏鲁棒性，现有方法难以在测试时无需标定即可泛化到新视角。
AI.method: 提出VistaBot框架，包含三个关键组件：4D几何估计、视角合成潜在特征提取和潜在动作学习。将其集成到ACT和π₀策略中，并提出新的评估指标VGS。
AI.result: VistaBot在VGS指标上相比ACT提升2.79倍，相比π₀提升2.63倍，同时实现了高质量的新视角合成。
AI.conclusion: VistaBot通过几何感知的合成模型和潜在动作规划器，有效提升了跨视角泛化能力，代码和模型将开源。

title: DCMorph: Face Morphing via Dual-Stream Cross-Attention Diffusion
summary: Advancing face morphing attack techniques is crucial to anticipate evolving threats and develop robust defensive mechanisms for identity verification systems. This work introduces DCMorph, a dual-stream diffusion-based morphing framework that simultaneously operates at both identity conditioning and latent space levels. Unlike image-level methods suffering from blending artifacts or GAN-based approaches with limited reconstruction fidelity, DCMorph leverages identity-conditioned latent diffusion models through two mechanisms: (1) decoupled cross-attention interpolation that injects identity-specific features from both source faces into the denoising process, enabling explicit dual-identity conditioning absent in existing diffusion-based methods, and (2) DDIM inversion with spherical interpolation between inverted latent representations from both source faces, providing geometrically consistent initial latent representation that preserves structural attributes. Vulnerability analyses across four state-of-the-art face recognition systems demonstrate that DCMorph achieves the highest attack success rates compared to existing methods at both operational thresholds, while remaining challenging to detect by current morphing attack detection solutions.

AI.tldr: DCMorph是一种基于双流扩散的人脸变形攻击框架，通过解耦交叉注意力插值和DDIM反演球面插值两种机制，在身份条件化和潜在空间层面同时操作，实现了比现有方法更高的攻击成功率，且难以被当前检测方案识别。
AI.motivation: 推进人脸变形攻击技术对于预判不断演变的威胁并为身份验证系统开发鲁棒的防御机制至关重要。
AI.method: 提出DCMorph框架，包含两个核心机制：(1) 解耦交叉注意力插值，将来自两个源人脸的身份特定特征注入去噪过程；(2) DDIM反演与球面插值，在两个源人脸的逆向潜在表示之间进行几何一致的初始潜在表示构建。
AI.result: 在四个最先进的人脸识别系统上的漏洞分析表明，DCMorph在两种操作阈值下均实现了比现有方法最高的攻击成功率，且难以被当前的变形攻击检测方案发现。
AI.conclusion: DCMorph通过双流扩散机制有效克服了图像级方法的混合伪影和GAN方法的重建保真度限制，为人脸变形攻击提供了更强大的手段，同时也凸显了现有防御系统的脆弱性。

title: TingIS: Real-time Risk Event Discovery from Noisy Customer Incidents at Enterprise Scale
summary: Real-time detection and mitigation of technical anomalies are critical for large-scale cloud-native services, where even minutes of downtime can result in massive financial losses and diminished user trust. While customer incidents serve as a vital signal for discovering risks missed by monitoring, extracting actionable intelligence from this data remains challenging due to extreme noise, high throughput, and semantic complexity of diverse business lines. In this paper, we present TingIS, an end-to-end system designed for enterprise-grade incident discovery. At the core of TingIS is a multi-stage event linking engine that synergizes efficient indexing techniques with Large Language Models (LLMs) to make informed decisions on event merging, enabling the stable extraction of actionable incidents from just a handful of diverse user descriptions. This engine is complemented by a cascaded routing mechanism for precise business attribution and a multi-dimensional noise reduction pipeline that integrates domain knowledge, statistical patterns, and behavioral filtering. Deployed in a production environment handling a peak throughput of over 2,000 messages per minute and 300,000 messages per day, TingIS achieves a P90 alert latency of 3.5 minutes and a 95\% discovery rate for high-priority incidents. Benchmarks constructed from real-world data demonstrate that TingIS significantly outperforms baseline methods in routing accuracy, clustering quality, and Signal-to-Noise Ratio.

AI.tldr: TingIS是一个端到端的事件发现系统，专为企业级云原生服务的实时技术异常检测与缓解设计。其核心是多阶段事件链接引擎，结合高效索引与LLM决策事件合并，辅以级联路由机制和噪声降维管道。在生产环境中（峰值2000+条/分钟，日均30万条）实现P90告警延迟3.5分钟，高优先级事件95%发现率。
AI.motivation: 云原生服务中实时检测并缓解技术异常至关重要，分钟级停机即造成巨大经济损失和信任下降。客户事件是发现监控遗漏风险的关键信号，但从中提取可操作情报面临极端噪声、高吞吐量、多业务线语义复杂等挑战。
AI.method: TingIS包含三大组件：(1)多阶段事件链接引擎，协同高效索引技术与LLM进行事件合并决策；(2)级联路由机制实现精确业务归因；(3)多维噪声降维管道，整合领域知识、统计模式和行为过滤。
AI.result: 生产环境峰值吞吐超2000条/分钟、日均30万条消息；P90告警延迟3.5分钟；高优先级事件95%发现率；在路由精度、聚类质量和信噪比上显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TingIS有效解决了大规模云原生服务中从海量嘈杂客户事件中提取可操作事件信息的难题，通过多阶段LLM驱动的事件链接与多维度噪声过滤，实现了低延迟、高发现率的生产级事件发现系统。

title: Task-Driven Co-Design of Heterogeneous Multi-Robot Systems
summary: Designing multi-agent robotic systems requires reasoning across tightly coupled decisions spanning heterogeneous domains, including robot design, fleet composition, and planning. Much effort has been devoted to isolated improvements in these domains, whereas system-level co-design considering trade-offs and task requirements remains underexplored. In this work, we present a formal and compositional framework for the task-driven co-design of heterogeneous multi-robot systems. Building on a monotone co-design theory, we introduce general abstractions of robots, fleets, planners, executors, and evaluators as interconnected design problems with well-defined interfaces that are agnostic to both implementations and tasks. This structure enables efficient joint optimization of robot design, fleet composition, and planning under task-specific performance constraints. A series of case studies demonstrates the capabilities of the framework. Various component models can be seamlessly incorporated, including new robot types, task profiles, and probabilistic sensing objectives, while non-obvious design alternatives are systematically uncovered with optimality guarantees. The results highlight the flexibility, scalability, and interpretability of the proposed approach, and illustrate how formal co-design enables principled reasoning about complex heterogeneous multi-robot systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于单调协同设计理论的正式组合框架，用于异构多机器人系统的任务驱动协同设计，能够联合优化机器人设计、编队组成和规划，并在任务性能约束下保证最优性。
AI.motivation: 多机器人系统设计涉及机器人设计、编队组成和规划等多个异构领域中的紧密耦合决策，现有研究大多孤立地改进单个领域，缺乏系统级协同设计来权衡各领域间的相互依赖关系和任务需求。
AI.method: 基于单调协同设计理论，将机器人、编队、规划器、执行器和评估器抽象为具有明确定义接口的互联设计问题，这些接口对具体实现和任务均不可知，从而支持高效的联合优化。
AI.result: 通过系列案例研究展示了框架的能力：能够无缝集成不同的组件模型（新机器人类型、任务配置文件、概率感知目标等），系统性地发现非直观的设计替代方案，并保证最优性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有灵活性、可扩展性和可解释性，能够对复杂异构多机器人系统进行形式化的协同设计推理，实现原则性的系统级优化。

title: Fine-Tuning Regimes Define Distinct Continual Learning Problems
summary: Continual learning (CL) studies how models acquire tasks sequentially while retaining previously learned knowledge. Despite substantial progress in benchmarking CL methods, comparative evaluations typically keep the fine-tuning regime fixed. In this paper, we argue that the fine-tuning regime, defined by the trainable parameter subspace, is itself a key evaluation variable. We formalize adaptation regimes as projected optimization over fixed trainable subspaces, showing that changing the trainable depth alters the effective update signal through which both current task fitting and knowledge preservation operate. This analysis motivates the hypothesis that method comparisons need not be invariant across regimes. We test this hypothesis in task incremental CL, five trainable depth regimes, and four standard methods: online EWC, LwF, SI, and GEM. Across five benchmark datasets, namely MNIST, Fashion MNIST, KMNIST, QMNIST, and CIFAR-100, and across 11 task orders per dataset, we find that the relative ranking of methods is not consistently preserved across regimes. We further show that deeper adaptation regimes are associated with larger update magnitudes, higher forgetting, and a stronger relationship between the two. These results show that comparative conclusions in CL can depend strongly on the chosen fine-tuning regime, motivating regime-aware evaluation protocols that treat trainable depth as an explicit experimental factor.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了持续学习中的微调机制（即可训练参数子空间）本身是一个关键评估变量，方法间的相对排名在不同微调深度下并不一致，更深的微调导致更大更新幅度、更高遗忘率及二者间更强关联，因此需要将可训练深度作为显式实验因素的评估协议。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法的比较评估通常固定微调机制，但作者认为微调机制本身（可训练参数子空间）是一个关键变量，方法比较的结果可能在不同机制下不一致。
AI.method: 将适应机制形式化为固定可训练子空间上的投影优化；在任务增量CL下，测试五种可训练深度机制和四种标准方法（online EWC、LwF、SI、GEM），在五个数据集（MNIST、Fashion MNIST、KMNIST、QMNIST、CIFAR-100）和每个数据集11种任务顺序上进行实验。
AI.result: 方法相对排名在不同微调机制下不一致；更深的适应机制与更大的更新幅度、更高的遗忘率以及二者间更强的关联相关。
AI.conclusion: 持续学习中的比较结论可能严重依赖于所选的微调机制，需要机制感知的评估协议，将可训练深度作为显式实验因素。

title: A Multimodal Text- and Graph-Based Approach for Open-Domain Event Extraction from Documents
summary: Event extraction is essential for event understanding and analysis. It supports tasks such as document summarization and decision-making in emergency scenarios. However, existing event extraction approaches have limitations: (1) closed-domain algorithms are restricted to predefined event types and thus rarely generalize to unseen types and (2) open-domain event extraction algorithms, capable of handling unconstrained event types, have largely overlooked the potential of large language models (LLMs) despite their advanced abilities. Additionally, they do not explicitly model document-level contextual, structural, and semantic reasoning, which are crucial for effective event extraction but remain challenging for LLMs due to lost-in-the-middle phenomenon and attention dilution. To address these limitations, we propose multimodal open-domain event extraction, MODEE , a novel approach for open-domain event extraction that combines graph-based learning with text-based representation from LLMs to model document-level reasoning. Empirical evaluations on large datasets demonstrate that MODEE outperforms state-of-the-art open-domain event extraction approaches and can be generalized to closed-domain event extraction, where it outperforms existing algorithms.

AI.tldr: MODEE是一种结合图学习与大语言模型文本表示的多模态开放域事件抽取方法，通过建模文档级上下文、结构和语义推理，在开放域和封闭域事件抽取任务上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有事件抽取方法存在两个主要局限：(1) 封闭域算法受限于预定义事件类型，难以泛化到未见类型；(2) 开放域算法未充分利用大语言模型（LLM）的先进能力，且未显式建模文档级的上下文、结构和语义推理，LLM因"中间丢失"现象和注意力稀释而难以处理这些问题。
AI.method: 提出MODEE（多模态开放域事件抽取），将基于图的表示学习与LLM的文本表示相结合，以建模文档级推理过程。
AI.result: 在大型数据集上的实证评估表明，MODEE在开放域事件抽取上优于最先进方法，并可泛化到封闭域事件抽取，同样超越现有算法。
AI.conclusion: MODEE有效解决了开放域事件抽取中文档级推理的挑战，验证了图学习与LLM结合在多模态事件抽取中的优越性。

title: Hi-WM: Human-in-the-World-Model for Scalable Robot Post-Training
summary: Post-training is essential for turning pretrained generalist robot policies into reliable task-specific controllers, but existing human-in-the-loop pipelines remain tied to physical execution: each correction requires robot time, scene setup, resets, and operator supervision in the real world. Meanwhile, action-conditioned world models have been studied mainly for imagination, synthetic data generation, and policy evaluation. We propose \textbf{Human-in-the-World-Model (Hi-WM)}, a post-training framework that uses a learned world model as a reusable corrective substrate for failure-targeted policy improvement. A policy is first rolled out in closed loop inside the world model; when the rollout becomes incorrect or failure-prone, a human intervenes directly in the model to provide short corrective actions. Hi-WM caches intermediate states and supports rollback and branching, allowing a single failure state to be reused for multiple corrective continuations and yielding dense supervision around behaviors that the base policy handles poorly. The resulting corrective trajectories are then added back to the training set for post-training. We evaluate Hi-WM on three real-world manipulation tasks spanning both rigid and deformable object interaction, and on two policy backbones. Hi-WM improves real-world success by 37.9 points on average over the base policy and by 19.0 points over a world-model closed-loop baseline, while world-model evaluation correlates strongly with real-world performance (r = 0.953). These results suggest that world models can serve not only as generators or evaluators, but also as effective corrective substrates for scalable robot post-training.

AI.tldr: Hi-WM提出了一种利用世界模型作为可复用纠正基座的后训练框架，允许人类在世界模型内部直接干预策略失败轨迹，通过回滚和分支生成密集纠正数据，显著提升真实世界任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人后训练依赖物理执行，每次纠错都需要机器人时间、场景搭建、重置和操作员监督，成本高昂且难以扩展。本文旨在将世界模型从仅用于想象和评估的角色，转变为可复用的纠正基座，实现可扩展的后训练。
AI.method: Hi-WM包含三个关键步骤：(1) 策略在世界模型内闭环展开；(2) 当展开出现错误或失败时，人类直接在模型中提供短纠正动作；(3) 系统缓存中间状态并支持回滚和分支，使单个失败状态可被多次复用生成不同纠正延续，产生密集监督信号，最终将纠正轨迹加入训练集进行后训练。
AI.result: 在三个真实世界操作任务（涵盖刚体和可变形物体）和两个策略主干上，Hi-WM相比基础策略平均提升37.9个百分点的真实世界成功率，相比世界模型闭环基线提升19.0个百分点。世界模型评估与真实世界性能强相关（r=0.953）。
AI.conclusion: 世界模型不仅可以作为生成器或评估器，还可以作为有效的纠正基座，实现可扩展的机器人后训练，减少对物理执行环境的依赖。

title: The Sample Complexity of Multicalibration
summary:
We study the minimax sample complexity of multicalibration in the batch setting. A learner observes $n$ i.i.d. samples from an unknown distribution and must output a (possibly randomized) predictor whose population multicalibration error, measured by Expected Calibration Error (ECE), is at most $\varepsilon$ with respect to a given family of groups. For every fixed $κ> 0$, in the regime $|G|\le \varepsilon^{-κ}$, we prove that $\widetildeΘ(\varepsilon^{-3})$ samples are necessary and sufficient, up to polylogarithmic factors. The lower bound holds even for randomized predictors, and the upper bound is realized by a randomized predictor obtained via an online-to-batch reduction. This separates the sample complexity of multicalibration from that of marginal calibration, which scales as $\widetildeΘ(\varepsilon^{-2})$, and shows that mean-ECE multicalibration is as difficult in the batch setting as it is in the online setting, in contrast to marginal calibration which is strictly more difficult in the online setting. In contrast we observe that for $κ= 0$, the sample complexity of multicalibration remains $\widetildeΘ(\varepsilon^{-2})$ exhibiting a sharp threshold phenomenon.
  More generally, we establish matching upper and lower bounds, up to polylogarithmic factors, for a weighted $L_p$ multicalibration metric for all $1 \le p \le 2$, with optimal exponent $3/p$. We also extend the lower-bound template to a regular class of elicitable properties, and combine it with the online upper bounds of Hu et al. (2025) to obtain matching bounds for calibrating properties including expectiles and bounded-density quantiles.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了批量设置下多校准（multicalibration）的极小极大样本复杂度。对于固定κ>0且|G|≤ε^{-κ}的群族，证明了Θ̃(ε^{-3})的样本是必要且充分的（对数因子内），将多校准与边际校准（样本复杂度Θ̃(ε^{-2)）区分开来。对于更一般的加权L_p多校准度量（1≤p≤2），建立了匹配的上下界，最优指数为3/p。还将下界模板扩展到可引发的属性类，对expectiles和有界密度分位数等校准属性获得了匹配的界。
AI.motivation: 多校准是算法公平性和预测校准中的重要概念，但其在批量设置下的样本复杂度尚不明确。本文旨在严格刻画多校准的极小极大样本复杂度，理解其与边际校准的差异，并建立更一般化的理论框架。
AI.method: 通过在线到批量（online-to-batch）约简构造上界；利用信息论下界技术建立匹配的样本复杂度下界，包括对随机化预测器的下界。将分析扩展到加权L_p多校准度量（1≤p≤2），并构造可引发属性类的下界模板。
AI.result: 当κ>0时，多校准的样本复杂度为Θ̃(ε^{-3})，与边际校准的Θ̃(ε^{-2})不同；当κ=0时，仍为Θ̃(ε^{-2})，呈现阈值现象。对于加权L_p度量，最优指数为3/p。对expectiles和有界密度分位数等属性也获得了匹配的界。
AI.conclusion: 多校正在批量设置下的样本复杂度严格高于边际校准，且与在线设置下的复杂度一致，表明其本质上比边际校准更难。本文建立了多校准样本复杂度的完整理论刻画，并推广到更一般的可校准属性类。

title: A Case Study in Recovery of Drones using Discrete-Event Systems
comment: Accepted for publication at WODES 2026; final version will appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: Discrete-event systems and supervisory control theory provide a rigorous framework for specifying correct-by-construction behavior. However, their practical application to swarm robotics remains largely underexplored. In this paper, we investigate a topological recovery method based on discrete-event-systems within a swarm robotics context. We propose a hybrid architecture that combines a high-level discrete event systems supervisor with a low-level continuous controller, allowing lost drones to safely recover from fault or attack events and re-enter a controlled region. The method is demonstrated using ten simulated UAVs in the py-bullet-drones framework. We show recovery performance across four distinct scenarios, each with varying initial state estimates. Additionally, we introduce a secondary recovery supervisor that manages the regrouping process for a drone after it has re-entered the operational region.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于离散事件系统的拓扑恢复方法，用于无人机编队在故障或攻击事件后的安全恢复与重新编组。通过混合架构（高层离散事件系统监督器+底层连续控制器），在py-bullet-drones框架中使用10架模拟无人机验证了四种场景下的恢复性能。
AI.motivation: 离散事件系统和监督控制理论为行为正确性提供了严格框架，但在群体机器人领域的实际应用尚不充分，特别是在无人机编队遭遇故障或攻击后的安全恢复问题亟待解决。
AI.method: 提出一种混合架构：高层采用离散事件系统监督器进行离散逻辑决策，底层使用连续控制器执行物理运动控制；并引入二次恢复监督器负责无人机重新进入操作区域后的重新编组过程。
AI.result: 在py-bullet-drones框架中使用10架模拟无人机，在四种不同初始状态估计的场景下展示了恢复性能。
AI.conclusion: 该拓扑恢复方法能够有效处理无人机在故障或攻击事件后的安全恢复与重新编队，为离散事件系统在群体机器人领域的实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: A Compact Peristaltic Pump Based on Magneto-Elastic Hysteresis with Single Pneumatic Control
summary: Pumping fluids is fundamental to a wide range of industrial, environmental, and biomedical applications. Among various pumping mechanisms, peristaltic pumps enable efficient and safe fluid transport by deforming an elastic tube without direct contact with the working fluid. Although previous studies have introduced mechanical, pneumatic, or magnetic actuations to drive membrane deformation, these approaches often lead to complex pump architectures and control schemes. In this study, we present a soft membrane pump that achieves peristaltic motion through a single pneumatic input combined with an embedded passive magnet. The actuation mechanism and system dynamics were analyzed and simplified through modeling. Numerical simulations were conducted to predict the internal fluid flow, and the magneto-elastic hysteresis behavior observed in the simulations was successfully validated by experiments with a proof-of-concept prototype.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种软膜泵，通过单一气动输入结合嵌入式被动磁铁实现蠕动运动，简化了传统泵的复杂结构和控制方案。
AI.motivation: 现有蠕动泵依赖机械、气动或磁驱动方式驱动膜变形，导致泵结构复杂、控制方案繁琐，需要一种更简洁的驱动方案。
AI.method: 采用单一气动输入结合嵌入式被动磁铁驱动软膜变形，通过建模仿真分析驱动机制和系统动力学，并利用概念验证样机进行实验验证。
AI.result: 数值仿真成功预测了内部流体流动及磁弹滞回行为，且仿真结果通过实验得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种结构简化的软膜蠕动泵方案，通过气-磁耦合驱动实现有效的流体传输，具有在工业、环境及生物医学领域的应用潜力。

title: Low-Rank Adaptation Redux for Large Models
summary: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) has emerged as the de facto standard for parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) of foundation models, enabling the adaptation of billion-parameter networks with minimal computational and memory overhead. Despite its empirical success and rapid proliferation of variants, it remains elusive which architectural choices, optimization techniques, and deployment constraints should guide practical method selection. This overview revisits LoRA through the lens of signal processing (SP), bridging modern adapter designs with classical low-rank modeling tools and inverse problems, as well as highlighting how SP principles can inform principled advances of fine-tuning approaches. Rather than providing a comprehensive enumeration and empirical comparisons of LoRA variants, emphasis is placed on the technical mechanisms underpinning these approaches to justify their effectiveness. These advances are categorized into three complementary axes: architectural design, efficient optimization, and pertinent applications. The first axis builds on singular value decomposition (SVD)-based factorization, rank-augmentation constructions, and cross-layer tensorization, while the second axis deals with initialization, alternating solvers, gauge-invariant optimization, and parameterization-aware methods. Beyond fine-tuning, emerging applications of LoRA are accounted across the entire lifecycle of large models, ranging from pre- and post-training to serving/deployment. Finally, open research directions are outlined at the confluence of SP and deep learning to catalyze a bidirectional frontier: classical SP tools provide a principled vocabulary for designing principled PEFT methods, while the unique challenges facing modern deep learning, especially the overwhelming scale and prohibitive overhead, also offer new research lines benefiting the SP community in return.

AI.tldr: 本文从信号处理视角重新审视低秩适配（LoRA），将其与经典低秩建模工具和逆问题联系起来，从架构设计、高效优化和应用三个维度系统梳理了LoRA变体的技术机制，并展望了信号处理与深度学习双向融合的开放研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管LoRA已成为参数高效微调的事实标准，但关于架构选择、优化技术和部署约束如何指导方法选择仍不明确，缺乏一个统一的理论视角来理解其有效性的根本原因。
AI.method: 从信号处理视角出发，将LoRA与经典低秩建模工具和逆问题相联系，沿三个互补轴展开分析：(1) 基于SVD分解、秩增强构造和跨层张量化的架构设计；(2) 初始化、交替求解器、规范不变优化和参数化感知方法的高效优化；(3) 涵盖预训练、后训练到推理部署的完整生命周期应用。
AI.result: 建立了信号处理与LoRA变体之间的理论桥梁，阐明了经典低秩建模工具如何为设计原则性的PEFT方法提供理论词汇，同时指出现代深度学习的大规模挑战也为信号处理领域提供了新的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 信号处理与深度学习之间存在双向促进的前沿：经典信号处理工具为设计原则性的参数高效微调方法提供理论基础，而现代深度学习面临的大规模和高昂开销挑战也为信号处理领域带来新的研究机遇。

title: Transient Turn Injection: Exposing Stateless Multi-Turn Vulnerabilities in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into sensitive workflows, raising the stakes for adversarial robustness and safety. This paper introduces Transient Turn Injection(TTI), a new multi-turn attack technique that systematically exploits stateless moderation by distributing adversarial intent across isolated interactions. TTI leverages automated attacker agents powered by large language models to iteratively test and evade policy enforcement in both commercial and open-source LLMs, marking a departure from conventional jailbreak approaches that typically depend on maintaining persistent conversational context. Our extensive evaluation across state-of-the-art models-including those from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Meta, and prominent open-source alternatives-uncovers significant variations in resilience to TTI attacks, with only select architectures exhibiting substantial inherent robustness. Our automated blackbox evaluation framework also uncovers previously unknown model specific vulnerabilities and attack surface patterns, especially within medical and high stakes domains. We further compare TTI against established adversarial prompting methods and detail practical mitigation strategies, such as session level context aggregation and deep alignment approaches. Our study underscores the urgent need for holistic, context aware defenses and continuous adversarial testing to future proof LLM deployments against evolving multi-turn threats.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"瞬态轮次注入"(TTI)的新型多轮攻击技术，通过利用无状态审核机制，将对抗性意图分布在不同交互轮次中，从而系统性地绕过LLM的安全策略。实验评估了包括OpenAI、Anthropic、Google Gemini、Meta及开源模型在内的多种先进模型，发现只有少数架构具有显著的固有鲁棒性。研究还揭示了特定领域的漏洞，并提出了会话级上下文聚合和深度对齐等缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型被集成到敏感工作流中，其对抗鲁棒性和安全性日益重要。现有越狱攻击通常依赖维持持续性对话上下文，而本文旨在探索利用无状态审核机制的多轮攻击新范式，以揭示现有安全防御的盲区。
AI.method: TTI攻击技术：利用由LLM驱动的自动化攻击智能体，在隔离的多轮交互中迭代测试并规避策略执行。通过将对抗意图分散到无状态的独立轮次中，绕过基于上下文的审核机制。采用黑盒评估框架对多个商业和开源模型进行系统性测试。
AI.result: 不同模型对TTI攻击的防御能力差异显著，仅少数架构表现出固有鲁棒性；发现模型特定漏洞和攻击面模式，尤其在医疗等高风险领域；TTI相比传统对抗提示方法具有更高隐蔽性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 需要整体性的、上下文感知的防御机制和持续的对抗性测试来保障LLM部署安全。会话级上下文聚合和深度对齐是有效的缓解策略。研究强调了面对不断演化的多轮威胁时，建立主动防御体系的紧迫性。

title: Deep kernel video approximation for unsupervised action segmentation
summary: This work focuses on per-video unsupervised action segmentation, which is of interest to applications where storing large datasets is either not possible, or nor permitted. We propose to segment videos by learning in deep kernel space, to approximate the underlying frame distribution, as closely as possible. To define this closeness metric between the original video distribution and its approximation, we rely on maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) which is a geometry-preserving metric in distribution space, and thus gives more reliable estimates. Moreover, unlike the commonly used optimal transport metric, MMD is both easier to optimize, and faster. We choose to use neural tangent kernels (NTKs) to define the kernel space where MMD operates, because of their improved descriptive power as opposed to fixed kernels. And, also, because NTKs sidestep the trivial solution, when jointly learning the inputs (video approximation) and the kernel function. Finally, we show competitive results when compared to state-of-the-art per-video methods, on six standard benchmarks. Additionally, our method has higher F1 scores than prior agglomerative work, when the number of segments is unknown.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度核空间的最大均值差异（MMD）与神经正切核（NTK）相结合的单视频无监督动作分割方法，在六个标准基准上取得了竞争性结果，且在未知片段数时F1分数优于现有聚合方法。
AI.motivation: 解决在无法存储大规模数据集的场景下，单视频无监督动作分割的需求，避免对大型训练集的依赖。
AI.method: 在深度核空间中学习视频帧分布的近似表示，利用MMD作为分布空间的几何保持度量来评估原始分布与近似分布之间的差异；选择神经正切核（NTK）定义核空间以增强描述能力并规避平凡解；联合学习视频近似与核函数。
AI.result: 在六个标准基准上取得了与现有单视频方法相竞争的结果；在未知片段数量的设定下，F1分数高于先前的聚合方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于MMD与NTK的深度核学习方法在单视频无监督动作分割中有效，兼顾了优化效率与分割性能，尤其适用于数据集受限的应用场景。

title: Bounding the Black Box: A Statistical Certification Framework for AI Risk Regulation
summary:
Artificial intelligence now decides who receives a loan, who is flagged for criminal investigation, and whether an autonomous vehicle brakes in time. Governments have responded: the EU AI Act, the NIST Risk Management Framework, and the Council of Europe Convention all demand that high-risk systems demonstrate safety before deployment. Yet beneath this regulatory consensus lies a critical vacuum: none specifies what ``acceptable risk'' means in quantitative terms, and none provides a technical method for verifying that a deployed system actually meets such a threshold. The regulatory architecture is in place; the verification instrument is not.
  This gap is not theoretical. As the EU AI Act moves into full enforcement, developers face mandatory conformity assessments without established methodologies for producing quantitative safety evidence - and the systems most in need of oversight are opaque statistical inference engines that resist white-box scrutiny.
  This paper provides the missing instrument. Drawing on the aviation certification paradigm, we propose a two-stage framework that transforms AI risk regulation into engineering practice. In Stage One, a competent authority formally fixes an acceptable failure probability $δ$ and an operational input domain $\varepsilon$ - a normative act with direct civil liability implications. In Stage Two, the RoMA and gRoMA statistical verification tools compute a definitive, auditable upper bound on the system's true failure rate, requiring no access to model internals and scaling to arbitrary architectures. We demonstrate how this certificate satisfies existing regulatory obligations, shifts accountability upstream to developers, and integrates with the legal frameworks that exist today.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有AI监管法规（如欧盟AI法案、NIST风险管理框架等）均未明确定义“可接受风险”的量化标准及验证方法。作者借鉴航空认证范式，提出两阶段框架：第一阶段由主管机构设定可接受的故障概率δ和运行输入域ε；第二阶段利用RoMA和gRoMA统计验证工具计算系统真实故障率的可审计上界，无需访问模型内部结构。该框架将AI风险监管转化为工程实践，明确了开发者的法律责任。
AI.motivation: 现有AI监管法规要求高风险系统部署前证明安全性，但均未提供“可接受风险”的量化定义，也未给出验证系统是否达到该阈值的技术方法，形成“监管架构已建立，验证工具缺失”的真空状态。
AI.method: 借鉴航空认证范式，提出两阶段框架：Stage 1由主管机构正式设定可接受故障概率δ和运行输入域ε；Stage 2使用RoMA和gRoMA统计验证工具计算系统真实故障率的可审计上界，无需访问模型内部结构，可扩展至任意架构。
AI.result: 提出了一个完整的、可操作的AI系统安全验证框架，能够生成满足现有监管义务的量化安全证据，将责任上游转移至开发者，并与现有法律框架整合。
AI.conclusion: 填补了AI监管中定量安全验证的技术空白，为高风险AI系统的合规评估提供了工程化方法，使监管要求从原则性声明转变为可执行的技术标准。

title: SLAM as a Stochastic Control Problem with Partial Information: Optimal Solutions and Rigorous Approximations
summary: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a foundational state estimation problem in robotics in which a robot accurately constructs a map of its environment while also localizing itself within this construction. We study the active SLAM problem through the lens of optimal stochastic control, thereby recasting it as a decision-making problem under partial information. After reviewing several commonly studied models, we present a general stochastic control formulation of active SLAM together with a rigorous treatment of motion, sensing, and map representation. We introduce a new exploration stage cost that encodes the geometry of the state when evaluating information-gathering actions. This formulation, constructed as a nonstandard partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP), is then analyzed to derive rigorously justified approximate solutions that are near-optimal. To enable this analysis, the associated regularity conditions are studied under general assumptions that apply to a wide range of robotics applications. For a particular case, we conduct an extensive numerical study in which standard learning algorithms are used to learn near-optimal policies.

AI.tldr: 本文从最优随机控制视角研究主动SLAM问题，将其重新构造为部分信息下的决策问题，提出了一种非标准POMDP框架，并推导了近似最优解。
AI.motivation: 将主动SLAM问题形式化为一个严格的最优随机控制问题，以数学上严谨的方式处理运动、感知和地图表示，并推导出理论上可证明的近似最优解。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的探索阶段代价函数，用于在评估信息采集动作时编码状态几何结构；将问题构造为非标准的部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），并在一般性假设下研究正则性条件，推导近似最优解。
AI.result: 在一般性假设下推导了严格证实的近似最优解，并通过数值实验验证了标准学习算法能够学习到近似最优策略。
AI.conclusion: 主动SLAM问题可通过随机控制理论进行严谨建模，所提出的POMDP框架及代价函数设计能够产生理论上可证明的近似最优解，并在实际场景中具有广泛适用性。

title: Component-Based Out-of-Distribution Detection
summary: Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection requires sensitivity to subtle shifts without overreacting to natural In-Distribution (ID) diversity. However, from the viewpoint of detection granularity, global representation inevitably suppress local OOD cues, while patch-based methods are unstable due to entangled spurious-correlation and noise. And neither them is effective in detecting compositional OODs composed of valid ID components. Inspired by recognition-by-components theory, we present a training-free Component-Based OOD Detection (CoOD) framework that addresses the existing limitations by decomposing inputs into functional components. To instantiate CoOD, we derive Component Shift Score (CSS) to detect local appearance shifts, and Compositional Consistency Score (CCS) to identify cross-component compositional inconsistencies. Empirically, CoOD achieves consistent improvements on both coarse- and fine-grained OOD detection.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于组件的OOD检测框架CoOD，通过将输入分解为功能组件，利用组件偏移分数(CSS)检测局部外观变化，利用组合一致性分数(CCS)识别跨组件的组合不一致性，在粗粒度和细粒度OOD检测上都取得了一致改进。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法存在粒度问题：全局表示会抑制局部OOD线索，而基于补丁的方法因纠缠了伪相关和噪声而不稳定，且两者都无法有效检测由有效ID组件组成的组合型OOD。
AI.method: 基于识别-by-组件理论，提出无训练的CoOD框架。具体包括：1) 组件偏移分数(CSS)用于检测局部外观偏移；2) 组合一致性分数(CCS)用于识别跨组件的组合不一致性。
AI.result: 在粗粒度和细粒度OOD检测任务上均取得了一致改进。
AI.conclusion: 通过将输入分解为功能组件，CoOD能够同时捕捉局部外观偏移和跨组件组合不一致性，从而有效克服了现有方法在检测粒度上的局限性。

title: Attention-based multiple instance learning for predominant growth pattern prediction in lung adenocarcinoma wsi using foundation models
summary: Lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD) grading depends on accurately identifying growth patterns, which are indicators of prognosis and can influence treatment decisions. Common deep learning approaches to determine the predominant pattern rely on patch-level classification or segmentation, requiring extensive annotations. This study proposes an attention-based multiple instance learning (ABMIL) framework to predict the predominant LUAD growth pattern at the whole slide level to reduce annotation burden. Our approach integrates pretrained pathology foundation models as patch encoders, used either frozen or fine-tuned on annotated patches, to extract discriminative features that are aggregated through attention mechanisms. Experiments show that fine-tuned encoders improve performance, with Prov-GigaPath achieving the highest agreement (\k{appa} = 0.699) under ABMIL. Compared to simple patch-aggregation baselines, ABMIL yields more robust predictions by leveraging slide-level supervision and spatial attention. Future work will extend this framework to estimate the full distribution of growth patterns and validate performance on external cohorts.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出基于注意力机制的多实例学习（ABMIL）框架，利用预训练的病理基础模型作为补丁编码器，在全切片级别预测肺腺癌（LUAD）的主要生长模式，以减少标注负担。实验表明，微调编码器可提升性能，其中Prov-GigaPath结合ABMIL达到最高一致性（κ=0.699），优于简单补丁聚合基线。
AI.motivation: 肺腺癌分级依赖于准确识别生长模式，但传统深度学习方法需要大量像素级标注。本文旨在通过弱监督学习降低标注成本，同时保持预测性能。
AI.method: 采用注意力机制的多实例学习（ABMIL）框架，集成预训练的病理基础模型（Prov-GigaPath等）作为补丁编码器，可冻结或微调，通过注意力机制聚合特征实现全切片级别的生长模式预测。
AI.result: 微调编码器提升性能，Prov-GigaPath结合ABMIL达到κ=0.699的最高一致性；ABMIL相比简单补丁聚合基线产生更鲁棒的预测。
AI.conclusion: ABMIL框架能有效降低标注负担并准确预测LUAD主要生长模式；未来工作将扩展至完整生长模式分布估计及外部验证。

title: Locating acts of mechanistic reasoning in student team conversations with mechanistic machine learning
