summary: STEM education researchers are often interested in identifying moments of students' mechanistic reasoning for deeper analysis, but have limited capacity to search through many team conversation transcripts to find segments with a high concentration of such reasoning. We offer a solution in the form of an interpretable machine learning model that outputs time-varying probabilities that individual students are engaging in acts of mechanistic reasoning, leveraging evidence from their own utterances as well as contributions from the rest of the group. Using the toolkit of intentionally-designed probabilistic models, we introduce a specific inductive bias that steers the probabilistic dynamics toward desired, domain-aligned behavior. Experiments compare trained models with and without the inductive bias components, investigating whether their presence improves the desired model behavior on transcripts involving never-before-seen students and a novel discussion context. Our results show that the inductive bias improves generalization -- supporting the claim that interpretability is built into the model for this task rather than imposed post hoc. We conclude with practical recommendations for STEM education researchers seeking to adopt the tool and for ML researchers aiming to extend the model's design. Overall, we hope this work encourages the development of mechanistically interpretable models that are understandable and controllable for both end users and model designers in STEM education research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的机器学习模型，用于从团队对话中自动检测学生进行机械推理的时刻。该模型利用概率建模引入归纳偏置，引导模型朝向符合领域需求的行为。实验表明，归纳偏置提高了模型在未见过的学生和新讨论情境下的泛化能力，证明可解释性已内建于模型而非事后添加。最后为STEM教育研究者和ML研究者提供了实践建议。
AI.motivation: STEM教育研究者常需识别学生进行机械推理的关键时刻以进行深入分析，但手动从大量团队对话转录中搜索包含此类推理的高密度片段能力有限，亟需自动化工具辅助。
AI.method: 构建了一个可解释的机器学习模型，输出个体学生进行机械推理的时变概率。模型利用学生自身话语及小组其他成员的贡献作为证据，通过有意识设计的概率模型引入特定的归纳偏置，引导概率动态朝向领域对齐的期望行为。
AI.result: 实验对比了包含与不包含归纳偏置组件的训练模型，结果表明归纳偏置在涉及未见过的学生和新讨论情境的转录上改善了模型的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 归纳偏置的引入使得可解释性内建于模型而非事后施加；为STEM教育研究者提供了采用该工具的实用建议，也为ML研究者扩展模型设计提供了方向。鼓励开发可理解、可控制的机械可解释模型。

title: Seeing Isn't Believing: Uncovering Blind Spots in Evaluator Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used to evaluate outputs of other models, for image-to-text (I2T) tasks such as visual question answering, and text-to-image (T2I) generation tasks. Despite this growing reliance, the reliability of these Evaluator VLMs remains under explored. In this work, we systematically evaluate the reliability of Evaluator VLMs across both I2T and T2I tasks. We introduce targeted perturbations that degrade output quality along key error dimensions, including object hallucinations, spatial reasoning, factual grounding, and visual fidelity. These perturbations test whether Evaluator VLMs can reliably account for these quality degrading errors in their evaluations. Using a comprehensive benchmark of over 4000 perturbed instances spanning 40 perturbation dimensions, we evaluate 4 prominent VLMs using single-answer scoring, pairwise comparison, and reference-guided paradigms. Our findings reveal that current VLM evaluators exhibit substantial blind spots: they often fail to detect perturbed outputs - in some cases exceeding 50%, struggle particularly with fine-grained compositional and spatial errors, and are often insensitive to hallucinated content that contradicts the input image. Pairwise comparison proves more reliable, though failure rates persist. These results highlight the unreliable nature of current Evaluator VLMs and urge caution in their deployment for benchmarking and development decisions. Code and data have been made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了大型视觉语言模型（VLM）作为评估器时的可靠性，发现在评估图像到文本和文本到图像任务中，当前VLM评估器存在显著盲点，对超过50%的降质输出未能检测，尤其在细粒度组合性、空间错误和幻觉内容方面表现脆弱。
AI.motivation: 尽管VLM被广泛用于评估其他模型的输出，但其作为评估器本身的可靠性尚未被充分探索，本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 作者引入了40种扰动维度、超过4000个扰动实例，涵盖物体幻觉、空间推理、事实基础、视觉保真度等关键错误维度，采用单答案评分、两两比较和参考引导三种评估范式，对4个主流VLM进行系统评估。
AI.result: 当前VLM评估器存在严重盲点：对扰动输出的漏检率有时超过50%；在细粒度组合性和空间错误上表现尤其差；对与输入图像矛盾的幻觉内容不敏感。两两比较范式相对更可靠，但失败率仍然存在。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果揭示了当前评估型VLM的不可靠性，警示在将其用于基准测试和开发决策时需保持谨慎。

title: Alignment has a Fantasia Problem
summary: Modern AI assistants are trained to follow instructions, implicitly assuming that users can clearly articulate their goals and the kind of assistance they need. Decades of behavioral research, however, show that people often engage with AI systems before their goals are fully formed. When AI systems treat prompts as complete expressions of intent, they can appear to be useful or convenient, but not necessarily aligned with the users' needs. We call these failures Fantasia interactions. We argue that Fantasia interactions demand a rethinking of alignment research: rather than treating users as rational oracles, AI should provide cognitive support by actively helping users form and refine their intent through time. This requires an interdisciplinary approach that bridges machine learning, interface design, and behavioral science. We synthesize insights from these fields to characterize the mechanisms and failures of Fantasia interactions. We then show why existing interventions are insufficient, and propose a research agenda for designing and evaluating AI systems that better help humans navigate uncertainty in their tasks.

AI.tldr: 现代AI助手默认用户能清晰表达目标，但行为研究表明用户常在目标未成形时与AI交互，导致表面有用但实际不匹配需求的"Fantasia交互"失败。本文提出AI应主动帮助用户形成和完善意图，而非简单执行指令，并给出了跨学科的研究议程。
AI.motivation: 行为研究已反复证明人们常在目标未完全形成时就与AI系统交互，但当前AI对齐研究默认用户是"理性预言家"（能清晰表达意图），这导致了表面有用但实际不匹配用户需求的交互失败。作者旨在揭示这一矛盾并推动对齐研究的范式转变。
AI.method: 综合机器学习、界面设计和行为科学的跨学科视角，通过理论综合和机制分析，先刻画Fantasia交互的机制与失败模式，再论证现有干预措施的不足，最后提出面向未来的研究议程。
AI.result: 识别出"Fantasia交互"这一关键失败模式：AI看似有用但不一定与用户真实需求对齐；指出现有对齐方法（如RLHF、提示工程）不足以解决目标模糊性问题；提出了一个整合认知支持和逐步意图澄清的研究议程。
AI.conclusion: AI对齐研究需要从"用户是理性预言家"转向将AI视为认知支持工具，主动帮助用户通过时间逐步形成和完善意图。这需要机器学习、界面设计和行为科学的深度交叉合作。

title: X2-N: A Transformable Wheel-legged Humanoid Robot with Dual-mode Locomotion and Manipulation
summary:
Wheel-legged robots combine the efficiency of wheeled locomotion with the versatility of legged systems, enabling rapid traversal over both continuous and discrete terrains. However, conventional designs typically employ fixed wheels as feet and limited degrees of freedom (DoFs) at the hips, resulting in reduced stability and mobility during legged locomotion compared to humanoids with flat feet. In addition, most existing platforms lack a full upper body with arms, which limits their ability to perform dexterous manipulation tasks.
  In this letter, we present X2-N, a high-DoF transformable robot with dual-mode locomotion and manipulation. X2-N can operate in both humanoid and wheel-legged forms and transform seamlessly between them through joint reconfiguration. We further propose a reinforcement learning (RL)-based whole-body control framework tailored to this morphology, enabling unified control across hybrid locomotion, transformation, and manipulation. We validate X2-N in a range of challenging locomotion and manipulation tasks, including dynamic skating-like motion, stair climbing and package delivery. Results demonstrate high locomotion efficiency, strong terrain adaptability, and stable loco-manipulation performance of X2-N, highlighting its potential for real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了X2-N，一种高自由度可变形机器人，能在人形和轮腿两种形态间无缝切换，并基于强化学习实现了混合 locomotion、变形和操作的统一全身控制框架，在动态滑行、爬楼梯和包裹递送等任务中验证了其高效性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有轮腿机器人通常采用固定轮子作为足部、髋部自由度有限，导致腿部运动时的稳定性和机动性不如具有平足的人形机器人；同时大多数平台缺少完整上肢和手臂，限制了灵巧操作能力。
AI.method: 设计X2-N高自由度可变形机器人，支持人形与轮腿两种模式及关节重构下的无缝变形；提出基于强化学习的全身控制框架，实现混合 locomotion、变形与操作的统一控制。
AI.result: 在动态滑行、爬楼梯和包裹递送等任务中验证了X2-N的高 locomotion 效率、强地形适应性和稳定的 loco-manipulation 性能。
AI.conclusion: X2-N展现了在实际场景中部署的潜力，证明了高自由度可变形设计结合强化学习全身控制能够有效提升轮腿机器人的移动效率和操作能力。

title: Gmd: Gaussian mixture descriptor for pair matching of 3D fragments
comment: 24 pages, 10 figures. Published in Multimedia Systems
summary: In the automatic reassembly of fragments acquired using laser scanners to reconstruct objects, a crucial step is the matching of fractured surfaces. In this paper, we propose a novel local descriptor that uses the Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) to fit the distribution of points, allowing for the description and matching of fractured surfaces of fragments. Our method involves dividing a local surface patch into concave and convex regions for estimating the k value of GMM. Then the final Gaussian Mixture Descriptor (GMD) of the fractured surface is formed by merging the regional GMDs. To measure the similarities between GMDs for determining adjacent fragments, we employ the L2 distance and align the fragments using Random Sample Consensus (RANSAC) and Iterative Closest Point (ICP). The extensive experiments on real-scanned public datasets and Terracotta datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach; furthermore, the comparisons with several existing methods also validate the advantage of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于高斯混合模型(GMM)的局部描述符(GMD)，通过将局部曲面片划分为凹凸区域来拟合点云分布，用于碎片断裂面的匹配与自动重组。在真实扫描数据集和兵马俑数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 激光扫描碎片自动重组中，断裂面的匹配是关键步骤，需要一种有效的局部描述符来实现精确匹配。
AI.method: 将局部曲面片划分为凹凸区域，分别估计GMM的k值；合并区域GMD形成断裂面的最终高斯混合描述符(GMD)；采用L2距离衡量GMD相似度，使用RANSAC和ICP进行碎片对齐。
AI.result: 在真实扫描公开数据集和兵马俑数据集上的实验证明了方法的有效性；与现有方法的比较也验证了所提方法的优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的GMD描述符能有效描述和匹配碎片断裂面，在真实数据集上表现优于已有方法。

title: MISTY: High-Throughput Motion Planning via Mixer-based Single-step Drifting
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
summary: Multi-modal trajectory generation is essential for safe autonomous driving, yet existing diffusion-based planners suffer from high inference latency due to iterative neural function evaluations. This paper presents MISTY (Mixer-based Inference for Single-step Trajectory-drifting Yield), a high-throughput generative motion planner that achieves state-of-the-art closed-loop performance with pure single-step inference. MISTY integrates a vectorized Sub-Graph encoder to capture environment context, a Variational Autoencoder to structure expert trajectories into a compact 32-dimensional latent manifold, and an ultra-lightweight MLP-Mixer decoder to eliminate quadratic attention complexity. Importantly, we introduce a latent-space drifting loss that shifts the complex distribution evolution entirely to the training phase. By formulating explicit attractive and repulsive forces, this mechanism empowers the model to synthesize novel, proactive maneuvers, such as active overtaking, that are virtually absent from the raw expert demonstrations. Extensive evaluations on the nuPlan benchmark demonstrate that MISTY achieves state-of-the-art results on the challenging Test14-hard split, with comprehensive scores of 80.32 and 82.21 in non-reactive and reactive settings, respectively. Operating at over 99 FPS with an end-to-end latency of 10.1 ms, MISTY offers an order-of-magnitude speedup over iterative diffusion planners while while achieving significantly robust generation.

AI.tldr: MISTY提出了一种基于MLP-Mixer和单步推理的高吞吐量生成式运动规划器，通过潜空间漂移损失将复杂分布演化转移到训练阶段，在nuPlan基准上实现了SOTA性能（Test14-hard: 80.32非反应式/82.21反应式），推理速度超过99 FPS（10.1 ms），比迭代扩散规划器快一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的规划器因迭代式神经函数评估导致推理延迟过高，难以满足自动驾驶对实时性的严格要求。
AI.method: 集成矢量化子图编码器（捕获取景上下文）、变分自编码器（将专家轨迹压缩至32维潜空间）和超轻量MLP-Mixer解码器（消除二次注意力复杂度），并提出潜空间漂移损失，通过显式吸引力和排斥力将分布演化转移到训练阶段。
AI.result: 在nuPlan Test14-hard上达到80.32（非反应式）和82.21（反应式）综合得分，推理速度99+ FPS，端到端延迟10.1 ms。
AI.conclusion: MISTY通过单步推理实现了与迭代扩散规划器相当的生成质量，同时推理速度提升一个数量级，验证了将复杂分布演化转移到训练阶段的有效性。

title: Beyond Expected Information Gain: Stable Bayesian Optimal Experimental Design with Integral Probability Metrics and Plug-and-Play Extensions
summary: Bayesian Optimal Experimental Design (BOED) provides a rigorous framework for decision-making tasks in which data acquisition is often the critical bottleneck, especially in resource-constrained settings. Traditionally, BOED typically selects designs by maximizing expected information gain (EIG), commonly defined through the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence. However, classical evaluation of EIG often involves challenging nested expectations, and even advanced variational methods leave the underlying log-density-ratio objective unchanged. As a result, support mismatch, tail underestimation, and rare-event sensitivity remain intrinsic concerns for KL-based BOED. To address these fundamental bottlenecks, we introduce an IPM-based BOED framework that replaces density-based divergences with integral probability metrics (IPMs), including the Wasserstein distance, Maximum Mean Discrepancy, and Energy Distance, resulting in a highly flexible plug-and-play BOED framework. We establish theoretical guarantees showing that IPM-based utilities provide stronger geometry-aware stability under surrogate-model error and prior misspecification than classical EIG-based utilities. We also validate the proposed framework empirically, demonstrating that IPM-based designs yield highly concentrated credible sets. Furthermore, by extending the same sample-based BOED template in a plug-and-play manner to geometry-aware discrepancies beyond the IPM class, illustrated by a neural optimal transport estimator, we achieve accurate optimal designs in high-dimensional settings where conventional nested Monte Carlo estimators and advanced variational methods fail.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于积分概率度量（IPM）的贝叶斯最优实验设计（BOED）框架，替代传统基于KL散度的期望信息增益（EIG）方法，解决了支持不匹配、尾部低估和罕见事件敏感性等根本性问题，并通过理论证明和实验验证了其几何感知稳定性与高维适用性。
AI.motivation: 传统BOED依赖KL散度定义的EIG存在嵌套期望计算困难、支持不匹配、尾部低估及罕见事件敏感性等固有瓶颈，亟需一种更稳定、几何感知更强的替代框架。
AI.method: 提出IPM-BOED框架，用积分概率度量（Wasserstein距离、最大均值差异、能量距离）替代密度散度，并扩展至神经最优传输估计器等几何感知差异度量，实现即插即用的灵活设计。
AI.result: 理论证明IPM度量在替代模型误差和先验错误设定下具有更强几何感知稳定性；实验验证IPM设计产生高度集中的可信集，并在高维场景下优于传统嵌套蒙特卡洛和高级变分方法。
AI.conclusion: IPM-based BOED框架有效克服KL-based方法的固有缺陷，提供更稳健且适用于高维的贝叶斯最优实验设计方案。

title: DiffNR: Diffusion-Enhanced Neural Representation Optimization for Sparse-View 3D Tomographic Reconstruction
comment: Accepted to AAAI 2026. Project page: https://ooonesevennn.github.io/DiffNR/
summary: Neural representations (NRs), such as neural fields and 3D Gaussians, effectively model volumetric data in computed tomography (CT) but suffer from severe artifacts under sparse-view settings. To address this, we propose DiffNR, a novel framework that enhances NR optimization with diffusion priors. At its core is SliceFixer, a single-step diffusion model designed to correct artifacts in degraded slices. We integrate specialized conditioning layers into the network and develop tailored data curation strategies to support model finetuning. During reconstruction, SliceFixer periodically generates pseudo-reference volumes, providing auxiliary 3D perceptual supervision to fix underconstrained regions. Compared to prior methods that embed CT solvers into time-consuming iterative denoising, our repair-and-augment strategy avoids frequent diffusion model queries, leading to better runtime performance. Extensive experiments show that DiffNR improves PSNR by 3.99 dB on average, generalizes well across domains, and maintains efficient optimization.

AI.tldr: DiffNR提出利用扩散先验增强神经表示在稀疏视角CT重建中的优化，通过单步扩散模型SliceFixer周期性修复伪影并生成伪参考体素，避免耗时的迭代去噪，在提升PSNR的同时保持高效优化。
AI.motivation: 神经表示（如神经场和3D高斯）在稀疏视角CT中建模体积数据时存在严重伪影，现有方法将CT求解器嵌入迭代去噪过程过于耗时，亟需一种高效的修复增强策略。
AI.method: 提出DiffNR框架，核心为单步扩散模型SliceFixer，通过专门的条件层和定制数据策略微调；重建过程中周期性利用SliceFixer生成伪参考体素，提供辅助3D感知监督以修复欠约束区域。
AI.result: 平均PSNR提升3.99 dB，跨域泛化表现良好，且保持高效优化（避免频繁扩散模型查询）。
AI.conclusion: "修复-增强"策略相比将CT求解器嵌入迭代去噪的方法，在稀疏视角CT重建中取得了更优的性能与效率平衡。

title: Ufil: A Unified Framework for Infrastructure-based Localization
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, this work was submitted to IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC) 2026
summary: Infrastructure-based localization enhances road safety and traffic management by providing state estimates of road users. Development is hindered by fragmented, application-specific stacks that tightly couple perception, tracking, and middleware. We introduce Ufil, a Unified Framework for Infrastructure-Based Localization with a standardized object model and reusable multi-object tracking components. Ufil offers interfaces and reference implementations for prediction, detection, association, state update, and track management, allowing researchers to improve components without reimplementing the pipeline. Ufil is open-source C++/ROS 2 software with documentation and executable examples. We demonstrate Ufil by integrating three heterogeneous data sources into a single localization pipeline combining (i) vehicle onboard units broadcasting ETSI ITS-G5 Cooperative Awareness Messages, (ii) a lidar-based roadside sensor node, and (iii) an in-road sensitive surface layer. The pipeline runs unchanged in the CARLA simulator and a small-scale CAV testbed, demonstrating Ufil's scale-independent execution model. In a three-lane highway scenario with 423 and 355 vehicles in simulation and testbed, respectively, the fused system achieves lane-level lateral accuracy with mean lateral position RMSEs of 0.31 m in CARLA and 0.29 m in the CPM Lab, and mean absolute orientation errors around 2.2°. Median end-to-end latencies from sensing to fused output remain below 100 ms across all modalities in both environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ufil，一个面向基础设施定位的统一框架，提供标准化对象模型和可复用的多目标跟踪组件，支持异构数据源融合，并在仿真和实验平台上实现车道级定位精度（横向RMSE约0.3m）和低于100ms的端到端延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有基础设施定位系统存在碎片化问题，应用特定的感知-跟踪-中间件堆栈紧耦合，阻碍了开发效率和组件复用。
AI.method: Ufil框架：标准化对象模型 + 可复用多目标跟踪组件（预测、检测、关联、状态更新、轨迹管理），提供接口与参考实现；集成三种异构数据源（ITS-G5 CAM、激光雷达路面节点、路面感应层），构建统一定位流水线；支持CARLA仿真器与小规模CAV测试床的无修改运行。
AI.result: 在三车道高速公路场景（仿真423辆、测试床355辆）中，融合系统实现：横向位置RMSE 0.31m（CARLA）/0.29m（CPM Lab），平均绝对朝向误差约2.2°，各模态中位端到端延迟均低于100ms。
AI.conclusion: Ufil通过统一框架解决了基础设施定位的碎片化问题，实现了跨仿真与真实场景的通用执行模型，验证了异构融合的可行性与实时性。

title: VFM$^{4}$SDG: Unveiling the Power of VFMs for Single-Domain Generalized Object Detection
summary: In real-world scenarios, continual changes in weather, illumination, and imaging conditions cause significant domain shifts, leading detectors trained on a single source domain to degrade severely in unseen environments. Existing single-domain generalized object detection (SDGOD) methods mainly rely on data augmentation or domain-invariant representation learning, but pay limited attention to detector mechanisms, leaving clear limitations under complex domain shifts. Through analytical experiments, we find that performance degradation is dominated by increasing missed detections, which fundamentally arises from reduced cross-domain stability of the detector: object-background and inter-instance relations become less stable in the encoding stage, while semantic-spatial alignment of query representations also becomes harder to maintain in the decoding stage. To this end, we propose VFM$^{4}$SDG, a dual-prior learning framework for SDGOD, which introduces a frozen vision foundation model (VFM) as a transferable cross-domain stability prior into detector representation learning and query modeling. In the encoding stage, we propose Cross-domain Stable Relational Prior Distillation to enhance the robustness of object-background and inter-instance relational modeling. In the decoding stage, we propose Semantic-Contextual Prior-based Query Enhancement, which injects category-level semantic prototypes and global visual context into queries to improve their semantic recognition and spatial localization stability in unseen domains. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method consistently outperforms existing SOTA methods on standard SDGOD benchmarks and two mainstream DETR-based detectors, demonstrating its effectiveness, robustness, and generality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VFM⁴SDG，一种基于冻结视觉基础模型（VFM）的双先验学习框架，通过编码阶段的跨域稳定关系先验蒸馏和解码阶段的语义-上下文先验查询增强，显著提升单域广义目标检测在复杂域偏移下的性能，在多个基准和DETR检测器上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有单域广义目标检测（SDGOD）方法主要依赖数据增强或域不变表示学习，但忽视检测器机制本身，在复杂域偏移下存在漏检率上升的问题，本质原因是检测器在编码阶段的物体-背景和实例间关系稳定性下降，以及在解码阶段查询表示的语义-空间对齐难以维持。
AI.method: 提出VFM⁴SDG双先验学习框架：1) 编码阶段：跨域稳定关系先验蒸馏（Cross-domain Stable Relational Prior Distillation），利用冻结VFM增强物体-背景和实例间关系建模的鲁棒性；2) 解码阶段：语义-上下文先验查询增强（Semantic-Contextual Prior-based Query Enhancement），注入类别级语义原型和全局视觉上下文以提升查询在未见域中的语义识别和空间定位稳定性。
AI.result: 在标准SDGOD基准测试和两种主流DETR检测器上的大量实验表明，该方法一致优于现有SOTA方法，验证了其有效性、鲁棒性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入冻结VFM作为可迁移的跨域稳定性先验，分别从编码和解码两个阶段提升检测器的跨域稳定性，有效解决了复杂域偏移下的漏检问题，为SDGOD提供了新范式。

title: Probably Approximately Consensus: On the Learning Theory of Finding Common Ground
comment: Accepted to the Social Choice and Learning Algorithms Workshop at IJCAI 2025
summary: A primary goal of online deliberation platforms is to identify ideas that are broadly agreeable to a community of users through their expressed preferences. Yet, consensus elicitation should ideally extend beyond the specific statements provided by users and should incorporate the relative salience of particular topics. We address this issue by modelling consensus as an interval in a one-dimensional opinion space derived from potentially high-dimensional data via embedding and dimensionality reduction. We define an objective that maximizes expected agreement within a hypothesis interval where the expectation is over an underlying distribution of issues, implicitly taking into account their salience. We propose an efficient Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM) algorithm and establish PAC-learning guarantees. Our initial experiments demonstrate the performance of our algorithm and examine more efficient approaches to identifying optimal consensus regions. We find that through selectively querying users on an existing sample of statements, we can reduce the number of queries needed to a practical number.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线讨论平台上的共识区间模型，通过嵌入和降维将高维意见数据映射到一维空间，并基于ERM算法学习最优共识区间，同时通过选择性查询减少用户交互成本。
AI.motivation: 现有在线讨论平台的共识获取方法局限于用户对具体陈述的偏好表达，未能考虑意见空间中的主题相对显著性（salience），需要一种能够从潜在意见分布中泛化共识的方法。
AI.method: 将共识建模为一维意见空间中的假设区间，通过嵌入和降维从高维数据映射得到；定义最大化区间内期望一致性的目标函数，隐式纳入议题分布显著性；提出高效的经验风险最小化（ERM）算法，并建立PAC可学习性保证；通过选择性查询用户对已有陈述样本的意见来减少查询次数。
AI.result: 初始实验验证了所提算法的性能；发现通过选择性查询可以在将查询次数降低到实际可行范围的同时保持共识区间的质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在线讨论平台提供了一种兼顾主题显著性和泛化能力的共识区间估计框架，具有理论保证和实际可行性。

title: On the algebra of Koopman eigenfunctions and on some of their infinities
summary: For continuous-time dynamical systems with reversible trajectories, the nowhere-vanishing eigenfunctions of the Koopman operator of the system form a multiplicative group. Here, we exploit this property to accelerate the systematic numerical computation of the eigenspaces of the operator. Given a small set of (so-called ``principal'') eigenfunctions that are approximated conventionally, we can obtain a much larger set by constructing polynomials of the principal eigenfunctions. This enriches the set, and thus allows us to more accurately represent application-specific observables. Often, eigenfunctions exhibit localized singularities (e.g. in simple, one-dimensional problems with multiple steady states) or extended ones (e.g. in simple, two-dimensional problems possessing a limit cycle, or a separatrix); we discuss eigenfunction matching/continuation across such singularities. By handling eigenfunction singularities and enabling their continuation, our approach supports learning consistent global representations from locally sampled data. This is particularly relevant for multistable systems and applications with sparse or fragmented measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Koopman算子本征函数的乘法群性质，通过构建主本征函数的多项式来高效生成更多本征函数，并处理本征函数奇异性以实现全局一致表示，适用于多稳态系统和稀疏测量场景。
AI.motivation: 连续时间动力系统中Koopman算子的本征函数构成乘法群，但直接数值计算所有本征函数成本高昂。作者希望利用群性质，从少量已计算的主本征函数出发，通过多项式构造快速扩展本征函数集，同时解决本征函数奇异性的匹配与延拓问题。
AI.method: 1) 利用Koopman算子本征函数的乘法群性质，将少量"主"本征函数通过多项式组合生成大量新本征函数；2) 分析本征函数奇异性（如局部奇点或扩展奇异性），提出匹配/延拓方法跨越这些奇点；3) 从局部采样数据学习全局一致表示。
AI.result: 该方法能显著扩展本征函数集，提高应用相关观测量的表示精度；能够处理具有多稳态的一维问题（局部奇点）和含极限环或分隔线的二维问题（扩展奇异性），实现奇点处的本征函数匹配与延拓。
AI.conclusion: 通过本征函数的代数构造和奇异性处理，可从局部稀疏数据获得全局一致的Koopman表示，特别适用于多稳态系统和碎片化测量应用。

title: Frozen LLMs as Map-Aware Spatio-Temporal Reasoners for Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated strong reasoning capabilities and attracted increasing research attention in the field of autonomous driving (AD). However, safe application of LLMs on AD perception and prediction still requires a thorough understanding of both the dynamic traffic agents and the static road infrastructure. To this end, this study introduces a framework to evaluate the capability of LLMs in understanding the behaviors of dynamic traffic agents and the topology of road networks. The framework leverages frozen LLMs as the reasoning engine, employing a traffic encoder to extract spatial-level scene features from observed trajectories of agents, while a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) encodes the local high-definition (HD) maps. To assess the intrinsic reasoning ability of LLMs, the extracted scene features are then transformed into LLM-compatible tokens via a reprogramming adapter. By residing the prediction burden with the LLMs, a simpler linear decoder is applied to output future trajectories. The framework enables a quantitative analysis of the influence of multi-modal information, especially the impact of map semantics on trajectory prediction accuracy, and allows seamless integration of frozen LLMs with minimal adaptation, thereby demonstrating strong generalizability across diverse LLM architectures and providing a unified platform for model evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个评估LLM在自动驾驶感知与预测中理解动态交通智能体和道路拓扑能力的框架，通过冻结LLM作为推理引擎，利用交通编码器和CNN处理轨迹与地图信息，经重编程适配器转化为LLM兼容令牌，由线性解码器输出未来轨迹，实现多模态信息影响分析与跨架构泛化。
AI.motivation: LLM在自动驾驶中展现潜力，但其在感知和预测任务中的安全应用仍需深入理解动态交通智能体行为与静态道路基础设施，现有研究缺乏系统的评估框架。
AI.method: 框架以冻结LLM为推理引擎，使用交通编码器提取智能体轨迹的空间级场景特征，轻量级CNN编码高清地图；通过重编程适配器将场景特征转化为LLM兼容令牌；采用简单线性解码器输出未来轨迹，实现多模态信息融合与定量分析。
AI.result: 框架实现了对多模态信息（尤其是地图语义）对轨迹预测精度影响的定量分析；支持冻结LLM的即插即用，只需最小化适配；在多种LLM架构上展现出强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为评估LLM在自动驾驶感知与预测中的推理能力提供了统一平台，验证了冻结LLM结合轻量适配器在轨迹预测任务中的有效性，并揭示了地图语义信息对预测精度的重要影响。

title: Quotient-Space Diffusion Models
comment: ICLR 2026 Oral Presentation; 40 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables
summary: Diffusion-based generative models have reformed generative AI, and have enabled new capabilities in the science domain, for example, generating 3D structures of molecules. Due to the intrinsic problem structure of certain tasks, there is often a symmetry in the system, which identifies objects that can be converted by a group action as equivalent, hence the target distribution is essentially defined on the quotient space with respect to the group. In this work, we establish a formal framework for diffusion modeling on a general quotient space, and apply it to molecular structure generation which follows the special Euclidean group $\text{SE}(3)$ symmetry. The framework reduces the necessity of learning the component corresponding to the group action, hence simplifies learning difficulty over conventional group-equivariant diffusion models, and the sampler guarantees recovering the target distribution, while heuristic alignment strategies lack proper samplers. The arguments are empirically validated on structure generation for small molecules and proteins, indicating that the principled quotient-space diffusion model provides a new framework that outperforms previous symmetry treatments.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了商空间扩散建模的形式化框架，并将其应用于具有SE(3)对称性的分子结构生成。该框架通过减少对群作用对应分量的学习需求，降低了学习难度，且采样器能保证恢复目标分布。在小分子和蛋白质结构生成上的实验表明，该商空间扩散模型优于先前的对称性处理方法。
AI.motivation: 许多科学任务中的目标分布本质上定义在商空间上（即相对于群作用的等价类空间），但现有扩散模型未充分利用这一结构特性，导致学习效率低下。
AI.method: 建立了商空间扩散建模的形式化框架，将群作用对应的分量从学习目标中剥离，简化了学习任务；设计了可保证恢复目标分布的采样器。
AI.result: 在小分子和蛋白质结构生成任务中，商空间扩散模型优于传统的群等变扩散模型及启发式对齐策略。
AI.conclusion: 为具有对称性的生成任务提供了更高效、更严谨的扩散建模新框架。

title: From Noise to Intent: Anchoring Generative VLA Policies with Residual Bridges
summary: Bridging high-level semantic understanding with low-level physical control remains a persistent challenge in embodied intelligence, stemming from the fundamental spatiotemporal scale mismatch between cognition and action. Existing generative VLA policies typically adopt a "Generation-from-Noise" paradigm, which disregards this disparity, leading to representation inefficiency and weak condition alignment during optimization. In this work, we propose ResVLA, an architecture that shifts the paradigm to "Refinement-from-Intent." Recognizing that robotic motion naturally decomposes into global intent and local dynamics, ResVLA utilizes spectral analysis to decouple control into a deterministic low-frequency anchor and a stochastic high-frequency residual. By anchoring the generative process on the predicted intent, our model focuses strictly on refining local dynamics via a residual diffusion bridge. Extensive simulation experiments show that ResVLA achieves competitive performance, strong robustness to language and robot embodiment perturbations, and faster convergence than standard generative baselines. It also demonstrates strong performance in real-world robot experiments.

AI.tldr: ResVLA提出了一种"从意图精炼"的新范式，通过频谱分析将机器人控制解耦为确定性低频锚点和随机高频残差，利用残差扩散桥专注于局部动态精炼，从而弥合高层语义理解与低层物理控制之间的时空尺度差异。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式VLA策略采用"从噪声生成"范式，忽略了认知与动作之间根本性的时空尺度不匹配，导致优化过程中表征效率低下和条件对齐弱。
AI.method: ResVLA基于"从意图精炼"范式，利用频谱分析将机器人运动解耦为全局意图（确定性低频锚点）和局部动态（随机高频残差），通过残差扩散桥在预测意图上锚定生成过程，仅专注于精炼局部动态。
AI.result: 大规模仿真实验表明ResVLA在性能上具有竞争力，对语言和机器人本体扰动具有强鲁棒性，且收敛速度优于标准生成式基线。真实世界机器人实验也展示了其强大性能。
AI.conclusion: ResVLA通过将生成范式从"从噪声生成"转向"从意图精炼"，有效解决了认知-动作时空尺度不匹配问题，为具身智能中的视觉-语言-动作策略提供了一种高效鲁棒的新架构。

title: Rethinking Cross-Domain Evaluation for Face Forgery Detection with Semantic Fine-grained Alignment and Mixture-of-Experts
comment: The source code is available at https://github.com/Yuhan-Luo/Semantic-Fine-grained-Alignment-and-Mixture-of-Experts
summary: Nowadays, visual data forgery detection plays an increasingly important role in social and economic security with the rapid development of generative models. Existing face forgery detectors still can't achieve satisfactory performance because of poor generalization ability across datasets. The key factor that led to this phenomenon is the lack of suitable metrics: the commonly used cross-dataset AUC metric fails to reveal an important issue where detection scores may shift significantly across data domains. To explicitly evaluate cross-domain score comparability, we propose \textbf{Cross-AUC}, an evaluation metric that can compute AUC across dataset pairs by contrasting real samples from one dataset with fake samples from another (and vice versa). It is interesting to find that evaluating representative detectors under the Cross-AUC metric reveals substantial performance drops, exposing an overlooked robustness problem. Besides, we also propose the novel framework \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{F}ine-grained \textbf{A}lignment and \textbf{M}ixture-of-Experts (\textbf{SFAM}), consisting of a patch-level image-text alignment module that enhances CLIP's sensitivity to manipulation artifacts, and the facial region mixture-of-experts module, which routes features from different facial regions to specialized experts for region-aware forgery analysis. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments on the public datasets prove that the proposed method achieves superior performance compared with the state-of-the-art methods with various suitable metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cross-AUC指标来评估跨域分数可比性问题，并设计SFAM框架（包含补丁级图像-文本对齐模块和面部区域混合专家模块）以提升人脸伪造检测的泛化能力，在多个数据集上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有面部伪造检测器跨数据集泛化能力差，主要原因是缺乏合适的评估指标——常用的跨数据集AUC无法揭示检测分数在不同数据域之间可能发生显著偏移的问题。
AI.method: 提出Cross-AUC评估指标，通过跨数据集配对（一个数据集的真实样本与另一个数据集的伪造样本对比）计算AUC；提出SFAM框架，包含补丁级图像-文本对齐模块（增强CLIP对篡改伪影的敏感性）和面部区域混合专家模块（将不同面部区域的特征路由到专门专家进行区域感知伪造分析）。
AI.result: Cross-AUC指标下代表性检测器性能显著下降，暴露了被忽视的鲁棒性问题；SFAM在多个公开数据集上的定性和定量实验均优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: Cross-AUC是评估跨域分数可比性的有效指标，SFAM框架通过语义对齐和区域专家协同显著提升了伪造检测的泛化性能。

title: A Replicable Robotics Awareness Method Using LLM-Enabled Robotics Interaction: Evidence from a Corporate Challenge
comment: 10 pages, 8 Figures, to be submitted for journal per-review
summary: Large language models are increasingly being explored as interfaces between humans and robotic systems, yet there remains limited evidence on how such technologies can be used not only for interaction, but also as a structured means of introducing robotics to non-specialist users in real organizational settings. This paper introduces and evaluates a challenge-based method for robotics awareness, implemented through an LLM-enabled humanoid robot activity conducted with employees of AD Ports Group in the United Arab Emirates. In the event, participants engaged with a humanoid robot in a logistics-inspired task environment using voice commands interpreted through an LLM-based control framework. The activity was designed as a team-based, role-driven experience intended to expose participants to embodied AI and human-robot collaboration without requiring prior robotics expertise. To evaluate the approach, a post-event survey remained open for 16 days and collected 102 responses. Results indicate strong overall reception, with high satisfaction (8.46/10), increased interest in robotics and AI (4.47/5), and improved understanding of emerging forms of human-robot collaboration (4.45/5). Participants who interacted directly with the robot also reported natural interaction (4.37/5) and a strong sense that interaction became easier as the activity progressed (4.74/5). At the same time, lower ratings for reliability and predictability point to important technical and design challenges for future iterations. The findings suggest that challenge-based, LLM-enabled humanoid interaction can serve as a promising and replicable method for robotics awareness in industrial and operational environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了一种基于挑战的机器人意识提升方法，通过LLM驱动的人形机器人在AD Ports Group员工中开展物流主题团队活动。102份问卷显示高满意度(8.46/10)，显著提升了参与者对机器人/AI的兴趣(4.47/5)和人机协作理解(4.45/5)，直接交互者报告自然交互(4.37/5)且随活动进行交互变易(4.74/5)，但可靠性和可预测性评分较低指出了技术改进方向。
AI.motivation: 探索LLM不仅作为人机交互接口，更作为结构化手段向非专业用户在真实组织环境中引入机器人技术的方法，填补该领域有限证据的空白。
AI.method: 在AD Ports Group开展基于挑战的机器人意识活动，采用LLM驱动的人形机器人，参与者以团队角色扮演形式通过语音指令在物流模拟场景中与机器人协作，随后进行为期16天的后测问卷调查(N=102)。
AI.result: 整体满意度8.46/10；机器人/AI兴趣提升4.47/5；人机协作理解提升4.45/5；直接交互者自然度4.37/5；交互随活动推进易用性4.74/5；可靠性和可预测性评分较低。
AI.conclusion: 基于挑战的LLM驱动人形机器人交互是一种有前景且可复制的工业运营环境中机器人意识提升方法，但需在可靠性和可预测性方面进行技术改进。

title: ID-Eraser: Proactive Defense Against Face Swapping via Identity Perturbation
summary: Deepfake technologies have rapidly advanced with modern generative AI, and face swapping in particular poses serious threats to privacy and digital security. Existing proactive defenses mostly rely on pixel-level perturbations, which are ineffective against contemporary swapping models that extract robust high-level identity embeddings. We propose ID-Eraser, a feature-space proactive defense that removes identifiable facial information to prevent malicious face swapping. By injecting learnable perturbations into identity embeddings and reconstructing natural-looking protection images through a Face Revive Generator (FRG), ID-Eraser produces visually realistic results for humans while rendering the protected identities unusable for Deepfake models. Experiments show that ID-Eraser substantially disrupts identity recognition across diverse face recognition and swapping systems under strict black-box settings, achieving the lowest Top-1 accuracy (0.30) with the best FID (1.64) and LPIPS (0.020). Compared with swaps generated from clean inputs, the identity similarity of protected swaps drops sharply to an average of 0.504 across five representative face swapping models. ID-Eraser further demonstrates strong cross-dataset generalization, robustness to common distortions, and practical effectiveness on commercial APIs, reducing Tencent API similarity from 0.76 to 0.36.

AI.tldr: ID-Eraser是一种特征空间主动防御方法，通过向身份嵌入注入可学习扰动并利用Face Revive Generator重构自然图像，有效阻止恶意人脸交换，在多个模型和商业API上显著降低身份相似度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于像素级扰动的主动防御方法对现代人脸交换模型（提取鲁棒的高维身份嵌入）无效，亟需新的防御范式来保护人脸隐私和数字安全。
AI.method: 提出ID-Eraser，在特征空间向身份嵌入注入可学习扰动，再通过Face Revive Generator (FRG)将扰动后的嵌入重建为视觉自然的保护图像，实现对人脸识别和交换系统的双重防御。
AI.result: 黑盒设置下Top-1准确率仅0.30，FID为1.64，LPIPS为0.020；五个人脸交换模型上保护后身份相似度平均降至0.504；Tencent API相似度从0.76降至0.36；具备跨数据集泛化能力和对常见失真的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ID-Eraser在特征空间的防御思路优于传统像素级方法，显著破坏身份识别与交换，兼顾视觉质量与实用性，在商业API上也有良好表现。

title: Learning to Communicate: Toward End-to-End Optimization of Multi-Agent Language Systems
summary: Multi-agent systems built on large language models have shown strong performance on complex reasoning tasks, yet most work focuses on agent roles and orchestration while treating inter-agent communication as a fixed interface. Latent communication through internal representations such as key-value caches offers a promising alternative to text-based protocols, but existing approaches do not jointly optimize communication with multi-agent reasoning. Therefore we propose DiffMAS, a training framework that treats latent communication as a learnable component of multi-agent systems. DiffMAS performs parameter-efficient supervised training over multi-agent latent trajectories, enabling agents to jointly learn how information should be encoded and interpreted across interactions. Experiments on mathematical reasoning, scientific QA, code generation, and commonsense benchmarks show that DiffMAS consistently improves reasoning accuracy and decoding stability over single-agent inference, text-based multi-agent systems, and prior latent communication methods, achieving 26.7% on AIME24, 20.2% on GPQA-Diamond, and consistent gains across reasoning benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出DiffMAS框架，将多智能体间的潜在通信（key-value缓存）作为可学习组件，通过参数高效监督训练联合优化通信与推理，在数学推理、科学问答、代码生成等任务上超越单智能体、文本多智能体及现有潜在通信方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统将智能体间通信视为固定接口（如文本协议），未将通信过程与多智能体推理进行联合优化，缺乏对潜在表示通信的可学习性支持。
AI.method: 提出DiffMAS训练框架，将潜在通信（key-value缓存中的内部表示）作为多智能体系统的可学习组件，对多智能体潜在轨迹进行参数高效监督训练，使智能体联合学习信息的编码与解读方式。
AI.result: 在AIME24达到26.7%，在GPQA-Diamond达到20.2%，在数学推理、科学QA、代码生成和常识基准上持续优于单智能体推理、基于文本的多智能体系统以及先前的潜在通信方法。
AI.conclusion: 将潜在通信作为可学习组件进行联合优化能有效提升多智能体系统的推理准确率和解码稳定性。

title: A Deployable Embodied Vision-Language Navigation System with Hierarchical Cognition and Context-Aware Exploration
summary: Bridging the gap between embodied intelligence and embedded deployment remains a key challenge in intelligent robotic systems, where perception, reasoning, and planning must operate under strict constraints on computation, memory, energy, and real-time execution. In vision-language navigation (VLN), existing approaches often face a fundamental trade-off between strong reasoning capabilities and efficient deployment on real-world platforms. In this paper, we present a deployable embodied VLN system that achieves both high efficiency and robust high-level reasoning on real-world robotic platforms. To achieve this, we decouple the system into three asynchronous modules: a real-time perception module for continuous environment sensing, a memory integration module for spatial-semantic aggregation, and a reasoning module for high-level decision making. We incrementally construct a cognitive memory graph to encode scene information, which is further decomposed into subgraphs to enable reasoning with a vision-language model (VLM). To further improve navigation efficiency and accuracy, we also leverage the cognitive memory graph to formulate the exploration problem as a context-aware Weighted Traveling Repairman Problem (WTRP), which minimizes the weighted waiting time of viewpoints. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world robotic platforms demonstrate improved navigation success and efficiency over existing VLN approaches, while maintaining real-time performance on resource-constrained hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可部署的具身视觉-语言导航（VLN）系统，通过将系统解耦为实时感知、记忆集成和推理三个异步模块，并构建认知记忆图来编码场景信息，同时将探索问题建模为上下文感知的加权旅行维修问题（WTRP），在资源受限硬件上实现了高效的实时导航与强推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLN方法在强推理能力与实际平台高效部署之间存在根本性权衡，亟需一种既能实现强高层推理又能高效部署在真实机器人平台上的具身导航系统。
AI.method: 将系统解耦为三个异步模块：1）实时感知模块用于连续环境感知；2）记忆集成模块用于空间-语义聚合，增量构建认知记忆图并分解为子图以支持VLM推理；3）推理模块用于高层决策。导航探索问题被建模为上下文感知的加权旅行维修问题（WTRP），以最小化视点的加权等待时间。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实机器人平台上的大量实验表明，该方法在导航成功率和效率上优于现有VLN方法，同时在资源受限硬件上保持了实时性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过异步解耦架构和认知记忆图驱动的WTRP优化，该工作弥合了具身智能与嵌入式部署之间的差距，为在计算资源受限的真实平台上实现高效且具备强推理能力的VLN系统提供了可行方案。

title: An effective variant of the Hartigan $k$-means algorithm
summary: The k-means problem is perhaps the classical clustering problem and often synonymous with Lloyd's algorithm (1957). It has become clear that Hartigan's algorithm (1975) gives better results in almost all cases, Telgarsky-Vattani note a typical improvement of $5\%$ -- $10\%$. We point out that a very minor variation of Hartigan's method leads to another $2\%$ -- $5\%$ improvement; the improvement tends to become larger when either dimension or $k$ increase.

AI.tldr: 本文指出在Hartigan算法基础上进行微小改动，可使k-means聚类结果再提升2%-5%，且在高维或大k值时提升更明显。
AI.motivation: 尽管Hartigan算法在k-means聚类中已显著优于经典的Lloyd算法（提升5%-10%），但仍有进一步优化的空间，本文旨在探索通过微小改进获得额外增益。
AI.method: 对Hartigan算法进行极微小的变体修改，具体改动未在摘要中详述，但强调改动幅度很小。
AI.result: 相比Hartigan算法，新方法额外提升2%-5%的聚类效果，且当维度或聚类数k增加时，提升幅度趋于更大。
AI.conclusion: 通过对Hartigan算法的微小修改，可以进一步改善k-means聚类性能，且在高维或大k场景下收益更显著。

title: Do MLLMs Understand Pointing? Benchmarking and Enhancing Referential Reasoning in Egocentric Vision
summary: Egocentric AI agents, such as smart glasses, rely on pointing gestures to resolve referential ambiguities in natural language commands. However, despite advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), current systems often fail to precisely ground the spatial semantics of pointing. Instead, they rely on spurious correlations with visual proximity or object saliency, a phenomenon we term "Referential Hallucination." To address this gap, we introduce EgoPoint-Bench, a comprehensive question-answering benchmark designed to evaluate and enhance multimodal pointing reasoning in egocentric views. Comprising over 11k high-fidelity simulated and real-world samples, the benchmark spans five evaluation dimensions and three levels of referential complexity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that while state-of-the-art proprietary and open-source models struggle with egocentric pointing, models fine-tuned on our synthetic data achieve significant performance gains and robust sim-to-real generalization. This work highlights the importance of spatially aware supervision and offers a scalable path toward precise egocentric AI assistants. Project page: https://guyyyug.github.io/EgoPoint-Bench/

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoPoint-Bench基准，用于评估多模态大模型在自我中心视角下的指向手势理解能力。通过超过11000个高质量模拟与真实样本，发现现有模型存在"指代幻觉"问题，即依赖视觉邻近性或物体显著性而非精确的空间语义。基于合成数据微调的模型在指向推理上获得显著提升并展现出良好的模拟到真实泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在自我中心视角下无法精确理解指向手势的空间语义，而是依赖视觉邻近性或物体显著性的虚假相关性（即"指代幻觉"），缺乏评估和解决该问题的系统性基准。
AI.method: 构建EgoPoint-Bench基准，包含超过11k个高保真模拟与真实样本，覆盖五个评估维度和三个指代复杂度级别；通过合成数据对模型进行微调训练。
AI.result: 当前最先进的闭源与开源模型在自我中心指向任务上表现不佳；基于合成数据微调后的模型取得显著性能提升，并展现出鲁棒的模拟到真实泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 空间感知监督对于精确的自我中心AI助手至关重要，合成数据提供了一条可扩展的解决方案路径。

title: Inferring High-Level Events from Timestamped Data: Complexity and Medical Applications
comment: This is the full version (with appendix) of a paper appearing at the 23rd International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning (KR 2026)
summary: In this paper, we develop a novel logic-based approach to detecting high-level temporally extended events from timestamped data and background knowledge. Our framework employs logical rules to capture existence and termination conditions for simple temporal events and to combine these into meta-events. In the medical domain, for example, disease episodes and therapies are inferred from timestamped clinical observations, such as diagnoses and drug administrations stored in patient records, and can be further combined into higher-level disease events. As some incorrect events might be inferred, we use constraints to identify incompatible combinations of events and propose a repair mechanism to select preferred consistent sets of events. While reasoning in the full framework is intractable, we identify relevant restrictions that ensure polynomial-time data complexity. Our prototype system implements core components of the approach using answer set programming. An evaluation on a lung cancer use case supports the interest of the approach, both in terms of computational feasibility and positive alignment of our results with medical expert opinions. While strongly motivated by the needs of the healthcare domain, our framework is purposely generic, enabling its reuse in other areas.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于逻辑的新方法，用于从时间戳数据和背景知识中检测高层时序事件。该方法通过逻辑规则捕获简单时间事件的存在与终止条件，并将其组合成元事件。使用约束识别不兼容事件组合，并通过修复机制选择一致的事件集。在肺癌案例上的评估证明了方法的计算可行性和与医学专家意见的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从带时间戳的观测数据（如电子病历中的诊断和用药记录）中自动推断高层时序事件（如疾病发作、治疗方案），且当推断出错误事件时缺乏有效的冲突检测与修复机制。
AI.method: 采用逻辑规则定义简单时间事件的存在和终止条件，并通过规则组合为元事件；利用约束识别不兼容事件组合，引入修复机制选择偏好一致集；通过识别相关限制确保多项式时间数据复杂度；基于回答集编程（ASP）实现原型系统。
AI.result: 在肺癌案例上的评估表明该方法在计算效率上可行，且推断结果与医学专家意见具有高度一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法虽受医疗领域需求驱动，但框架设计具有通用性，可复用于其他领域。

title: RPG: Robust Policy Gating for Smooth Multi-Skill Transitions in Humanoid Fighting
summary: Humanoid robots have demonstrated impressive motor skills in a wide range of tasks, yet whole-body control for humanlike long-time, dynamic fighting remains particularly challenging due to the stringent requirements on agility and stability. While imitation learning enables robots to execute human-like fighting skills, existing approaches often rely on switching among multiple single-skill policies or employing a general policy to imitate input reference motions. These strategies suffer from instability when transitioning between skills, as the mismatch of initial and terminal states across skills or reference motions introduces out-of-domain disturbances, resulting in unsmooth or unstable behaviors. In this work, we propose RPG, a hybrid expert policy framework, for smooth and stable humanoid multi-skills transition. Our approach incorporates motion transition randomization and temporal randomization to train a unified policy that generates agile fighting actions with stability and smoothness during skill transitions. Furthermore, we design a control pipeline that integrates walking/running locomotion with fighting skills, allowing humanlike long-time combat of arbitrary duration that can be seamlessly interrupted or transit action policies at any time. Extensive experiments in simulation demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework, and real-world deployment on the Unitree G1 humanoid robot further validates its robustness and applicability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RPG混合专家策略框架，通过运动过渡随机化和时间随机化训练统一策略，实现人形机器人在长时间动态格斗中多技能平滑稳定过渡，并在仿真和Unitree G1实物机器人上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有人形机器人格斗技能学习方法（多单技能策略切换或通用策略模仿参考运动）在技能过渡时存在初始/终端状态不匹配导致的域外扰动，产生不稳定、不平滑行为，难以满足长时间动态格斗对敏捷性和稳定性的严苛要求。
AI.method: 提出RPG混合专家策略框架，包含运动过渡随机化（Motion Transition Randomization）和时间随机化（Temporal Randomization）来训练统一策略；并设计了将行走/奔跑运动与格斗技能集成的控制管线，支持任意时长、可随时中断或切换策略的长时间战斗。
AI.result: 仿真实验证明了框架的有效性，在Unitree G1人形机器人上的真实世界部署验证了其鲁棒性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: RPG框架通过随机化训练策略实现了人形机器人多技能间的平滑稳定过渡，为人形机器人长时间动态格斗提供了可行方案。

title: Compliance Moral Hazard and the Backfiring Mandate
summary: Competing firms that serve shared customer populations face a fundamental information aggregation problem: each firm holds fragmented signals about risky customers, but individual incentives impede efficient collective detection. We develop a mechanism design framework for decentralized risk analytics, grounded in anti-money laundering in banking networks. Three strategic frictions distinguish our setting: compliance moral hazard, adversarial adaptation, and information destruction through intervention. A temporal value assignment (TVA) mechanism, which credits institutions using a strictly proper scoring rule on discounted verified outcomes, implements truthful reporting as a Bayes--Nash equilibrium (uniquely optimal at each edge) in large federations. Embedding TVA in a banking competition model, we show competitive pressure amplifies compliance moral hazard and poorly designed mandates can reduce welfare below autarky, a ``backfiring'' result with direct policy implications. In simulation using a synthetic AML benchmark, TVA achieves substantially higher welfare than autarky or mandated sharing without incentive design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对去中心化风险分析（以银行反洗钱为背景）的机制设计框架，通过时间价值赋值（TVA）机制实现诚实报告均衡，并揭示了不当机制设计可能降低福利的政策陷阱。
AI.motivation: 竞争性服务共享客户群的企业面临信息聚合困境：每个企业持有碎片化风险信号，但个体激励阻碍高效集体检测。本文旨在设计激励机制以解决这一根本性信息聚合问题。
AI.method: 提出了时间价值赋值（TVA）机制——基于严格适当评分规则对折现已验证结果进行信用赋值，实现了大型联邦中每条边唯一最优的贝叶斯-纳什均衡诚实报告。并在银行竞争模型中嵌入TVA进行理论分析，结合合成AML基准进行仿真验证。
AI.result: TVA机制在大型联邦中实现了诚实报告的贝叶斯-纳什均衡；竞争压力会放大合规道德风险；设计不当的强制共享机制可能使福利低于无共享状态（"适得其反"效应）；合成数据仿真中TVA福利显著高于无共享或缺乏激励设计的强制共享方案。
AI.conclusion: 去中心化风险分析需要精心设计激励机制才能有效聚合信息，TVA机制提供了理论可行且实践有效的解决方案，政策制定者需警惕不当设计的负福利后果。

title: Instance-level Visual Active Tracking with Occlusion-Aware Planning
summary: Visual Active Tracking (VAT) aims to control cameras to follow a target in 3D space, which is critical for applications like drone navigation and security surveillance. However, it faces two key bottlenecks in real-world deployment: confusion from visually similar distractors caused by insufficient instance-level discrimination and severe failure under occlusions due to the absence of active planning. To address these, we propose OA-VAT, a unified pipeline with three complementary modules. First, a training-free Instance-Aware Offline Prototype Initialization aggregates multi-view augmented features via DINOv3 to construct discriminative instance prototypes, mitigating distractor confusion. Second, an Online Prototype Enhancement Tracker enhances prototypes online and integrates a confidence-aware Kalman filter for stable tracking under appearance and motion changes. Third, an Occlusion-Aware Trajectory Planner, trained on our new Planning-20k dataset, uses conditional diffusion to generate obstacle-avoiding paths for occlusion recovery. Experiments demonstrate OA-VAT achieves 0.93 average SR on UnrealCV (+2.2% vs. SOTA TrackVLA), 90.8% average CAR on real-world datasets (+12.1% vs. SOTA GC-VAT), and 81.6% TSR on a DJI Tello drone. Running at 35 FPS on an RTX 3090, it delivers robust, real-time performance for practical deployment.

AI.tldr: OA-VAT是一个针对视觉主动跟踪任务的统一框架，通过实例感知原型初始化、在线原型增强跟踪器和遮挡感知轨迹规划器三个模块，分别解决视觉混淆、跟踪漂移和遮挡失败问题，在多个数据集和真实无人机上实现了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉主动跟踪(VAT)在无人机导航和安全监控等应用中至关重要，但现有方法面临两大瓶颈：1) 视觉相似干扰物导致实例级判别不足；2) 遮挡场景下因缺乏主动规划导致跟踪失败。现有方法难以同时解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出OA-VAT统一框架，包含三个互补模块：1) 无训练的实例感知离线原型初始化，利用DINOv3聚合多视图增强特征构建判别性实例原型；2) 在线原型增强跟踪器，在线更新原型并集成置信度感知卡尔曼滤波器；3) 遮挡感知轨迹规划器，基于新构建的Planning-20k数据集训练条件扩散模型生成避障路径。
AI.result: 在UnrealCV上平均SR达0.93（比SOTA TrackVLA高2.2%），在真实数据集上平均CAR达90.8%（比SOTA GC-VA高12.1%），在DJI Tello无人机上TSR达81.6%，在RTX 3090上运行速度35 FPS。
AI.conclusion: OA-VAT通过统一的模块化设计同时解决了干扰物混淆和遮挡问题，在仿真和真实场景中均取得优异性能，且具备实时推理能力，适合实际部署。

title: Who Defines "Best"? Towards Interactive, User-Defined Evaluation of LLM Leaderboards
comment: Accepted to the 2026 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT 2026)
summary: LLM leaderboards are widely used to compare models and guide deployment decisions. However, leaderboard rankings are shaped by evaluation priorities set by benchmark designers, rather than by the diverse goals and constraints of actual users and organizations. A single aggregate score often obscures how models behave across different prompt types and compositions. In this work, we conduct an in-depth analysis of the dataset used in the LMArena (formerly Chatbot Arena) benchmark and investigate this evaluation challenge by designing an interactive visualization interface as a design probe. Our analysis reveals that the dataset is heavily skewed toward certain topics, that model rankings vary across prompt slices, and that preference-based judgments are used in ways that blur their intended scope. Building on this analysis, we introduce a visualization interface that allows users to define their own evaluation priorities by selecting and weighting prompt slices and to explore how rankings change accordingly. A qualitative study suggests that this interactive approach improves transparency and supports more context-specific model evaluation, pointing toward alternative ways to design and use LLM leaderboards.

AI.tldr: 本文分析发现LMArena基准数据集存在主题偏差、模型排名随提示词切片变化、偏好判断使用范围模糊等问题，并设计了一个交互式可视化界面，让用户自定义评估优先级，从而提升透明度和支持更符合实际场景的模型评估。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM排行榜由基准设计者的评估优先级决定，而非反映用户和组织的多样化需求与约束，单一聚合分数掩盖了模型在不同提示类型和组合下的表现差异。
AI.method: 对LMArena数据集进行深入分析（主题分布、提示词切片排名变化、偏好判断使用范围），并设计了一个交互式可视化界面作为设计探针，允许用户选择和加权提示词切片来定义自己的评估优先级，观察排名变化。
AI.result: 数据集严重偏向某些主题；模型排名在不同提示词切片间存在差异；偏好判断的使用方式模糊了其预期范围。定性研究表明交互式方法提升了透明度，支持更符合具体场景的模型评估。
AI.conclusion: 当前的LLM排行榜存在结构性偏差，需要向用户可定制的交互式评估方式转变，以更好地服务于实际部署决策。

title: Learn Weightlessness: Imitate Non-Self-Stabilizing Motions on Humanoid Robot
summary: The integration of imitation and reinforcement learning has enabled remarkable advances in humanoid whole-body control, facilitating diverse human-like behaviors. However, research on environment-dependent motions remains limited. Existing methods typically enforce rigid trajectory tracking while neglecting physical interactions with the environment. We observe that humans naturally exploit a "weightless" state during non-self-stabilizing (NSS) motions--selectively relaxing specific joints to allow passive body--environment contact, thereby stabilizing the body and completing the motion. Inspired by this biological mechanism, we design a weightlessness-state auto-labeling strategy for dataset annotation; and we propose the Weightlessness Mechanism (WM), a method that dynamically determines which joints to relax and to what level, together enabling effective environmental interaction while executing target motions. We evaluate our approach on 3 representative NSS tasks: sitting on chairs of varying heights, lying down on beds with different inclinations, and leaning against walls via shoulder or elbow. Extensive experiments in simulation and on the Unitree G1 robot demonstrate that our WM method, trained on single-action demonstrations without any task-specific tuning, achieves strong generalization across diverse environmental configurations while maintaining motion stability. Our work bridges the gap between precise trajectory tracking and adaptive environmental interaction, offering a biologically-inspired solution for contact-rich humanoid control.

AI.tldr: 受人类在非自稳定运动中选择性放松关节利用"失重状态"的启发，本文提出失重状态自动标注策略和失重机制（WM），使机器人能够根据环境动态决定放松哪些关节及程度，在3类NSS任务（不同高度椅子坐下、不同倾斜度床躺下、靠墙）中实现强泛化且无需任务调参。
AI.motivation: 现有仿人机器人控制方法在处理环境依赖型运动时，通常强制刚性轨迹追踪而忽略物理交互，限制了机器人在接触丰富环境中的适应性。受人类在NSS运动中利用"失重状态"选择性放松关节的生物学机制启发，旨在弥合精确轨迹追踪与环境自适应交互之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 设计了一种失重状态自动标注策略用于数据集标注；提出失重机制（WM），该方法能动态决定哪些关节需要放松以及放松到何种程度，从而在执行目标运动时实现有效的环境交互。
AI.result: 在3类NSS任务（不同高度椅子坐下、不同倾斜度床躺下、肩/肘靠墙）上，使用单一动作示教训练且无需任务特化调参，在仿真和Unitree G1实体机器人上均展现出跨多样环境配置的强泛化能力，同时保持运动稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作弥合了精确轨迹追踪与环境自适应交互之间的差距，为接触丰富的仿人机器人控制提供了一种受生物学启发的解决方案。

title: PrismaDV: Automated Task-Aware Data Unit Test Generation
summary:
Data is a central resource for modern enterprises, and data validation is essential for ensuring the reliability of downstream applications. However, existing automated data unit testing frameworks are largely task-agnostic: they validate datasets without considering the semantics and requirements of the code that consumes the data.
  We present PrismaDV, a compound AI system that analyzes downstream task code together with dataset profiles to identify data access patterns, infer implicit data assumptions, and generate task-aware executable data unit tests. To further adapt the data unit tests over time to specific datasets and downstream tasks, we propose "Selective Informative Feedback for Task Adaptation" (SIFTA), a prompt-optimization framework that leverages the scarce outcomes from the execution of data unit tests and downstream tasks. We evaluate PrismaDV on two new benchmarks spanning 60 tasks across five datasets, where it consistently outperforms both task-agnostic and task-aware baselines in generating unit tests that reflect the end-to-end impact of data errors. Furthermore, we show that with SIFTA, we can automatically learn prompts for PrismaDV's modules that outperform prompts written by hand or generated from a generic prompt optimizer. We publicly release our benchmarks and prototype implementation.

AI.tldr: PrismaDV是一个复合AI系统，通过分析下游任务代码和数据集概况，生成任务感知的可执行数据单元测试；同时提出SIFTA框架，利用数据单元测试和下游任务的执行结果进行提示优化，自动学习优于手动或通用优化器生成的提示。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化数据单元测试框架是任务无关的，它们在验证数据集时没有考虑消费数据的代码的语义和需求，导致无法有效反映数据错误对下游应用的端到端影响。
AI.method: 提出PrismaDV复合AI系统：分析下游任务代码和数据集概况，识别数据访问模式，推断隐式数据假设，生成任务感知的可执行数据单元测试。同时提出SIFTA（Selective Informative Feedback for Task Adaptation）提示优化框架，利用数据单元测试和下游任务执行的稀缺结果来自适应地优化提示。
AI.result: 在两个新基准测试（涵盖5个数据集的60个任务）上，PrismaDV在生成反映数据错误端到端影响的单元测试方面，一致优于任务无关和任务感知的基线方法。SIFTA能够自动学习PrismaDV模块的提示，优于手动编写或通用提示优化器生成的提示。
AI.conclusion: 任务感知的数据单元测试对数据质量保障至关重要，PrismaDV结合SIFTA框架能够有效生成适配特定数据集和下游任务的单元测试，且具备自动提示优化能力。

title: VARestorer: One-Step VAR Distillation for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
comment: Accepted in ICLR 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/EternalEvan/VARestorer
summary: Recent advancements in visual autoregressive models (VAR) have demonstrated their effectiveness in image generation, highlighting their potential for real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR). However, adapting VAR for ISR presents critical challenges. The next-scale prediction mechanism, constrained by causal attention, fails to fully exploit global low-quality (LQ) context, resulting in blurry and inconsistent high-quality (HQ) outputs. Additionally, error accumulation in the iterative prediction severely degrades coherence in ISR task. To address these issues, we propose VARestorer, a simple yet effective distillation framework that transforms a pre-trained text-to-image VAR model into a one-step ISR model. By leveraging distribution matching, our method eliminates the need for iterative refinement, significantly reducing error propagation and inference time. Furthermore, we introduce pyramid image conditioning with cross-scale attention, which enables bidirectional scale-wise interactions and fully utilizes the input image information while adapting to the autoregressive mechanism. This prevents later LQ tokens from being overlooked in the transformer. By fine-tuning only 1.2\% of the model parameters through parameter-efficient adapters, our method maintains the expressive power of the original VAR model while significantly enhancing efficiency. Extensive experiments show that VARestorer achieves state-of-the-art performance with 72.32 MUSIQ and 0.7669 CLIPIQA on DIV2K dataset, while accelerating inference by 10 times compared to conventional VAR inference.

AI.tldr: VARestorer通过分布匹配蒸馏和金字塔图像条件机制，将预训练的文本到图像VAR模型转化为一步式图像超分辨率模型，在DIV2K数据集上达到SOTA性能（72.32 MUSIQ, 0.7669 CLIPIQA），同时推理速度提升10倍。
AI.motivation: 现有VAR模型在图像超分辨率任务中存在两个关键问题：1）因果注意力机制下的下一尺度预测无法充分利用全局低质量上下文信息，导致输出模糊且不一致；2）迭代预测中的误差累积严重破坏超分辨率任务的连贯性。
AI.method: 提出VARestorer蒸馏框架：1）利用分布匹配消除迭代精炼过程，将VAR模型转化为一步式ISR模型；2）提出金字塔图像条件与跨尺度注意力机制，实现双向尺度间交互，充分使用输入图像信息；3）仅微调1.2%的参数（参数高效适配器），保持原始模型表达能力。
AI.result: 在DIV2K数据集上达到72.32 MUSIQ和0.7669 CLIPIQA的SOTA性能，相比传统VAR推理加速10倍。
AI.conclusion: VARestorer有效解决了VAR模型在ISR任务中的局限性，证明了通过蒸馏和条件机制可以将生成式模型高效适配到图像超分辨率任务中。

title: Thinking with Reasoning Skills: Fewer Tokens, More Accuracy
comment: 10 pages, The 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics -- Industry Track
summary: Reasoning LLMs often spend substantial tokens on long intermediate reasoning traces (e.g., chain-of-thought) when solving new problems. We propose to summarize and store reusable reasoning skills distilled from extensive deliberation and trial-and-error exploration, and to retrieve these skills at inference time to guide future reasoning. Unlike the prevailing \emph{reasoning from scratch} paradigm, our approach first recalls relevant skills for each query, helping the model avoid redundant detours and focus on effective solution paths. We evaluate our method on coding and mathematical reasoning tasks, and find that it significantly reduces reasoning tokens while improving overall performance. The resulting lower per-request cost indicates strong practical and economic potential for real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过总结和存储可复用的推理技能（从大量试错和深思熟虑中提炼），并在推理时检索这些技能来指导未来推理，从而减少长思维链带来的冗余token消耗。在编码和数学推理任务上，该方法显著减少了推理token数量并提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 推理LLM在解决新问题时往往生成冗长的中间推理轨迹（如思维链），消耗大量token，效率低下。
AI.method: 从推理过程中的深思熟虑和试错探索中提炼出可复用的推理技能，将其总结并存储为技能库；在推理时，根据当前查询检索相关技能，指导模型生成更高效的解决方案，而非从头开始推理。
AI.result: 在编码和数学推理任务上，该方法显著减少了推理token数量，同时提升了整体性能，降低了每次请求的推理成本。
AI.conclusion: 这种"技能检索+推理"范式相比传统的"从头推理"范式，具有更高的推理效率和经济效益，适合实际部署。

title: PREVENT-JACK: Context Steering for Swarms of Long Heavy Articulated Vehicles
comment: 32 pages, 7 figures, 4 videos; submitted to the Swarm Robotics collection of the Nature Portfolio Journal Robotics (NPJ Robot)
summary: In this paper, we aim to extend the traditional point-mass-like robot representation in swarm robotics and instead study a swarm of long Heavy Articulated Vehicles (HAVs). HAVs are kinematically constrained, elongated, and articulated, introducing unique challenges. Local, decentralized coordination of these vehicles is motivated by many real-world applications. Our approach, Prevent-Jack, introduces the sparsely covered context steering framework in robotics. It fuses six local behaviors, providing guarantees against jackknifing and collisions at the cost of potential dead- and livelocks, tested for vehicles with up to ten trailers. We highlight the importance of the Evade Attraction behavior for deadlock prevention using a parameter study, and use 15,000 simulations to evaluate the swarm performance. Our extensive experiments and the results show that both the dead- and livelocks occur more frequently in larger swarms and denser scenarios, affecting a peak average of 27%/31% of vehicles. We observe that larger swarms exhibit increased waiting, while smaller swarms show increased evasion.

AI.tldr: 本文研究重型铰接式车辆（HAV）群集，提出Prevent-Jack方法，采用稀疏覆盖上下文转向框架融合六种局部行为，防止折刀和碰撞，但可能产生死锁/活锁。通过15000次仿真评估，发现死锁/活锁在较大群集和密集场景中更常见，影响峰值达27%/31%的车辆。
AI.motivation: 传统群机器人研究将机器人视为质点，忽略了车辆的动力学约束和铰接结构。本文旨在将研究扩展至长型重型铰接式车辆（HAV）群集，解决其运动学约束带来的独特挑战，并探索现实应用中的局部去中心化协调方法。
AI.method: 提出了Prevent-Jack方法，引入稀疏覆盖上下文转向框架，融合六种局部行为（包括关键的Evade Attraction行为），提供防折刀和碰撞保证，但可能以死锁和活锁为代价。通过参数研究和15000次仿真评估群集性能。
AI.result: 死锁和活锁在较大群集和密集场景中更频繁发生，峰值影响27%（死锁）和31%（活锁）的车辆。较大群集表现出更多等待行为，较小群集则表现出更多规避行为。Evade Attraction行为对死锁预防至关重要。
AI.conclusion: Prevent-Jack方法能在HAV群集中防止折刀和碰撞，但死锁/活锁是权衡代价。群集规模和场景密度显著影响死锁/活锁发生率，不同群集规模表现出的行为策略存在差异。

title: Transferable Physics-Informed Representations via Closed-Form Head Adaptation
summary: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have garnered significant interest for their potential in solving partial differential equations (PDEs) that govern a wide range of physical phenomena. By incorporating physical laws into the learning process, PINN models have demonstrated the ability to learn physical outcomes reasonably well. However, current PINN approaches struggle to predict or solve new PDEs effectively when there is a lack of training examples, indicating they do not generalize well to unseen problem instances. In this paper, we present a transferable learning approach for PINNs premised on a fast Pseudoinverse PINN framework (Pi-PINN). Pi-PINN learns a transferable physics-informed representation in a shared embedding space and enables rapid solving of both known and unknown PDE instances via closed-form head adaptation using a least-squares-optimal pseudoinverse under PDE constraints. We further investigate the synergies between data-driven multi-task learning loss and physics-informed loss, providing insights into the design of more performant PINNs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of Pi-PINN on various PDE problems, including Poisson's equation, Helmholtz equation, and Burgers' equation, achieving fast and accurate physics-informed solutions without requiring any data for unseen instances. Pi-PINN can produce predictions 100-1000 times faster than a typical PINN, while producing predictions with 10-100 times lower relative error than a typical data-driven model even with only two training samples. Overall, our findings highlight the potential of transferable representations with closed-form head adaptation to enhance the efficiency and generalization of PINNs across PDE families and scientific and engineering applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pi-PINN框架，通过可迁移的物理信息表示和闭式伪逆头部适配，实现快速、准确且无需数据即可求解未见过的PDE实例，速度比典型PINN快100-1000倍，误差比典型数据驱动模型低10-100倍。
AI.motivation: 现有PINN方法在缺乏训练样本时难以有效预测或求解新的PDE，泛化能力差，无法推广到未见过的实例。
AI.method: 基于快速伪逆PINN框架（Pi-PINN），学习共享嵌入空间中的可迁移物理信息表示，并通过最小二乘最优伪逆在PDE约束下进行闭式头部适配，同时结合数据驱动的多任务学习损失与物理信息损失。
AI.result: 在泊松方程、亥姆霍兹方程和伯格斯方程上取得优异效果；预测速度比典型PINN快100-1000倍；即使仅用两个训练样本，相对误差也比典型数据驱动模型低10-100倍。
AI.conclusion: 可迁移表示与闭式头部适配能够显著提升PINN在PDE族上的效率和泛化能力，具有广泛的科学与工程应用潜力。

title: 2L-LSH: A Locality-Sensitive Hash Function-Based Method For Rapid Point Cloud Indexing
comment: 13 pages, 13 figures. Published in The Computer Journal
summary: The development of 3D scanning technology has enabled the acquisition of massive point cloud models with diverse structures and large scales, thereby presenting significant challenges in point cloud processing. Fast neighboring points search is one of the most common problems, which is frequently used in model reconstruction, classification, retrieval and feature visualization. Hash function is well known for its high-speed and accurate performance in searching high-dimensional data, which is also the core of the proposed 2L-LSH. Specifically, the 2L-LSH algorithm adopts a two-step hash function strategy, in which the popular step divides the bounding box of the point cloud model and the second step constructs a generalized table-based data structure. The proposed 2L-LSH offers a highly efficient and accurate solution for fast neighboring points search in large-scale 3D point cloud models, making it a promising technique for various applications in the field. The proposed algorithm is compared with the well-known methods including Kd-tree and Octree; the obtained results demonstrated that the proposed method outperforms Kd-tree and Octree in terms of speed, i.e. the time consumption of kNN search can be 51.111% and 94.159% lower than Kd-tree and Octree, respectively. And the RN search time can be 54.519% and 41.840% lower than Kd-tree and Octree, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于两级哈希函数（2L-LSH）的快速邻域点搜索算法，用于大规模3D点云处理。该方法首先划分点云包围盒，再构建基于广义表的数据结构。实验表明，在kNN搜索中速度比Kd-tree和Octree分别快51.111%和94.159%，在RN搜索中分别快54.519%和41.840%。
AI.motivation: 3D扫描技术发展使得点云模型规模庞大、结构多样，而快速邻域点搜索是模型重建、分类、检索和特征可视化等任务中的常见问题，现有方法效率不足。
AI.method: 提出2L-LSH算法，采用两步哈希函数策略：第一步划分点云模型的包围盒，第二步构建基于广义表的数据结构，利用哈希函数的高维数据高速准确搜索能力实现快速邻域点查找。
AI.result: 与Kd-tree和Octree相比，2L-LSH在kNN搜索中时间消耗分别降低51.111%和94.159%，在RN搜索中时间消耗分别降低54.519%和41.840%。
AI.conclusion: 2L-LSH为大规模3D点云模型的快速邻域点搜索提供了一种高效准确的解决方案，在速度上显著优于Kd-tree和Octree，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Why are all LLMs Obsessed with Japanese Culture? On the Hidden Cultural and Regional Biases of LLMs
summary: LLMs have been showing limitations when it comes to cultural coverage and competence, and in some cases show regional biases such as amplifying Western and Anglocentric viewpoints. While there have been works analysing the cultural capabilities of LLMs, there has not been specific work on highlighting LLM regional preferences when it comes to cultural-related questions. In this work, we propose a new dataset based on a comprehensive taxonomy of Culture-Related Open Questions (CROQ). The results show that, contrary to previous cultural bias work, LLMs show a clear tendency towards countries such as Japan. Moveover, our results show that when prompting in languages such as English or other high-resource ones, LLMs tend to provide more diverse outputs and show less inclinations towards answering questions highlighting countries for which the input language is an official language. Finally, we also investigate at which point of LLM training this cultural bias emerges, with our results suggesting that the first clear signs appear after supervised fine-tuning, and not during pre-training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出文化相关开放问题（CROQ）数据集，发现LLM在文化问题上表现出对日本等国的明显偏好，且这种文化偏好在监督微调阶段而非预训练阶段显现。
AI.motivation: 现有研究关注LLM的文化能力，但缺乏专门针对LLM在文化相关问题上的地区偏好分析。
AI.method: 基于全面的文化相关开放问题（CROQ）分类体系构建新数据集，分析LLM在不同语言提示下对各国文化的输出倾向，并追踪训练各阶段的文化偏好变化。
AI.result: LLM表现出对日本的明显文化偏好；英语等高资源语言提示下输出更多样化，且对提示语言为官方语言的国家倾向减弱；文化偏好在监督微调后首次明显出现，而非预训练阶段。
AI.conclusion: LLM存在区域文化偏好（偏向日本），且该偏好主要源于监督微调阶段，提示语言选择会影响文化输出的多样性。

title: FingerViP: Learning Real-World Dexterous Manipulation with Fingertip Visual Perception
summary: The current practice of dexterous manipulation generally relies on a single wrist-mounted view, which is often occluded and limits performance on tasks requiring multi-view perception. In this work, we present FingerViP, a learning system that utilizes a visuomotor policy with fingertip visual perception for dexterous manipulation. Specifically, we design a vision-enhanced fingertip module with an embedded miniature camera and install the modules on each finger of a multi-fingered hand. The fingertip cameras substantially improve visual perception by providing comprehensive, multi-view feedback of both the hand and its surrounding environment. Building on the integrated fingertip modules, we develop a diffusion-based whole-body visuomotor policy conditioned on a third-view camera and multi-view fingertip vision, which effectively learns complex manipulation skills directly from human demonstrations. To improve view-proprioception alignment and contact awareness, each fingertip visual feature is augmented with its corresponding camera pose encoding and per-finger joint-current encoding. We validate the effectiveness of the multi-view fingertip vision and demonstrate the robustness and adaptability of FingerViP on various challenging real-world tasks, including pressing buttons inside a confined box, retrieving sticks from an unstable support, retrieving objects behind an occluding curtain, and performing long-horizon cabinet opening and object retrieval, achieving an overall success rate of 80.8%. All hardware designs and code will be fully open-sourced.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FingerViP，一种利用指尖视觉感知的灵巧操作学习系统。通过在每根手指上嵌入微型摄像头获取多视角反馈，并基于扩散模型构建全身视觉运动策略，在多种复杂真实世界任务中达到80.8%的整体成功率。
AI.motivation: 当前灵巧操作通常依赖单个腕部摄像头视角，容易受到遮挡，限制了需要多视角感知的任务性能。
AI.method: 设计增强视觉的指尖模块（嵌入微型摄像头），安装在多指手的每根手指上；构建基于扩散模型的全身视觉运动策略，以第三视角摄像头和多视角指尖视觉为条件；每个指尖视觉特征增强对应的相机位姿编码和每指关节电流编码，以改善视角-本体感知对齐和接触感知。
AI.result: 在按压密闭盒内按钮、从不稳定支撑中取回棍子、从遮挡窗帘后取回物体、长时程开柜取物等挑战性真实世界任务中达到80.8%的整体成功率。
AI.conclusion: 多视角指尖视觉能有效提升灵巧操作在复杂场景下的鲁棒性和适应性，硬件和代码将完全开源。

title: UHR-DETR: Efficient End-to-End Small Object Detection for Ultra-High-Resolution Remote Sensing Imagery
summary: Ultra-High-Resolution (UHR) imagery has become essential for modern remote sensing, offering unprecedented spatial coverage. However, detecting small objects in such vast scenes presents a critical dilemma: retaining the original resolution for small objects causes prohibitive memory bottlenecks. Conversely, conventional compromises like image downsampling or patch cropping either erase small objects or destroy context. To break this dilemma, we propose UHR-DETR, an efficient end-to-end transformer-based detector designed for UHR imagery. First, we introduce a Coverage-Maximizing Sparse Encoder that dynamically allocates finite computational resources to informative high-resolution regions, ensuring maximum object coverage with minimal spatial redundancy. Second, we design a Global-Local Decoupled Decoder. By integrating macroscopic scene awareness with microscopic object details, this module resolves semantic ambiguities and prevents scene fragmentation. Extensive experiments on the UHR imagery datasets (e.g., STAR and SODA-A) demonstrate the superiority of UHR-DETR under strict hardware constraints (e.g., a single 24GB RTX 3090). It achieves a 2.8\% mAP improvement while delivering a 10$\times$ inference speedup compared to standard sliding-window baselines on the STAR dataset. Our codes and models will be available at https://github.com/Li-JingFang/UHR-DETR.

AI.tldr: UHR-DETR是一种专为超高分辨率遥感图像设计的端到端Transformer检测器，通过覆盖最大化稀疏编码器和全局-局部解耦解码器，在单张24GB RTX 3090上实现2.8% mAP提升和10倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: 超高分辨率图像中检测小目标面临两难困境：保留原始分辨率会导致显存瓶颈，而下采样或裁剪则会丢失小目标或破坏上下文信息。现有方法无法同时解决计算效率与检测精度之间的矛盾。
AI.method: 1) 覆盖最大化稀疏编码器：动态分配有限计算资源到信息丰富的高分辨率区域，最大化目标覆盖同时最小化空间冗余；2) 全局-局部解耦解码器：融合宏观场景感知与微观目标细节，解决语义模糊并防止场景碎片化。
AI.result: 在STAR和SODA-A数据集上，UHR-DETR在严格硬件约束（单张24GB RTX 3090）下，相比标准滑动窗口基线，mAP提升2.8%，推理速度提升10倍。
AI.conclusion: UHR-DETR有效打破了UHR图像中分辨率保持与计算效率之间的困境，为超高分辨率遥感图像的小目标检测提供了一种高效且实用的解决方案。

title: StructMem: Structured Memory for Long-Horizon Behavior in LLMs
summary: Long-term conversational agents need memory systems that capture relationships between events, not merely isolated facts, to support temporal reasoning and multi-hop question answering. Current approaches face a fundamental trade-off: flat memory is efficient but fails to model relational structure, while graph-based memory enables structured reasoning at the cost of expensive and fragile construction. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{StructMem}, a structure-enriched hierarchical memory framework that preserves event-level bindings and induces cross-event connections. By temporally anchoring dual perspectives and performing periodic semantic consolidation, StructMem improves temporal reasoning and multi-hop performance on \texttt{LoCoMo}, while substantially reducing token usage, API calls, and runtime compared to prior memory systems, see https://github.com/zjunlp/LightMem .

AI.tldr: 提出StructMem，一种结构增强的层次化记忆框架，通过保留事件级绑定和诱导跨事件连接，在提升长程对话智能体时序推理和多跳问答性能的同时，显著降低token使用量、API调用次数和运行时间。
AI.motivation: 现有长程对话记忆系统面临根本性权衡：扁平记忆高效但无法建模关系结构，图记忆支持结构化推理但构建昂贵且脆弱。因此需要一种既能捕捉事件间关系又能保持效率的记忆框架。
AI.method: 提出StructMem层次化记忆框架，包含事件级绑定保留和跨事件连接诱导机制，通过时间锚定双视角和周期性语义整合来实现。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo基准上，StructMem在时序推理和多跳问答任务上取得更好性能，同时相比现有记忆系统大幅降低token使用量、API调用次数和运行时间。
AI.conclusion: 结构增强的层次化记忆能够有效平衡表达能力和效率，为长程对话智能体提供更实用的记忆方案。

title: Reasoning About Traversability: Language-Guided Off-Road 3D Trajectory Planning
summary: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) enable high-level semantic reasoning for end-to-end autonomous driving, particularly in unstructured environments, existing off-road datasets suffer from language annotations that are weakly aligned with vehicle actions and terrain geometry. To address this misalignment, we propose a language refinement framework that restructures annotations into action-aligned pairs, enabling a VLM to generate refined scene descriptions and 3D future trajectories directly from a single image. To further encourage terrain-aware planning, we introduce a preference optimization strategy that constructs geometry-aware hard negatives and explicitly penalizes trajectories inconsistent with local elevation profiles. Furthermore, we propose off-road-specific metrics to quantify traversability compliance and elevation consistency, addressing the limitations of conventional on-road evaluation. Experiments on the ORAD-3D benchmark demonstrate that our approach reduces average trajectory error from 1.01m to 0.97m, improves traversability compliance from 0.621 to 0.644, and decreases elevation inconsistency from 0.428 to 0.322, highlighting the efficacy of action-aligned supervision and terrain-aware optimization for robust off-road driving.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语言精细化框架，通过将离路数据集中的语言标注重构为与车辆动作对齐的形式，并引入偏好优化策略以增强地形感知规划，从而显著提升了离路场景下自动驾驶的轨迹精度、可通行性合规性和高程一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有离路数据集的语言标注与车辆动作和地形几何属性弱对齐，导致视觉-语言模型无法有效理解离路场景并进行合理的轨迹规划。
AI.method: 1) 提出语言精细化框架，将标注重构为动作对齐对，使VLM能直接从单张图像生成场景描述和3D未来轨迹；2) 引入偏好优化策略，构建几何感知硬负样本，显式惩罚与局部高程轮廓不一致的轨迹；3) 提出离路专属评估指标（可通行性合规性、高程一致性）。
AI.result: 在ORAD-3D基准上，平均轨迹误差从1.01m降至0.97m，可通行性合规性从0.621提升至0.644，高程不一致性从0.428降至0.322。
AI.conclusion: 动作对齐监督和地形感知优化对于鲁棒的离路驾驶任务有效，所提方法在多项指标上均优于现有方法。

title: Pre-process for segmentation task with nonlinear diffusion filters
summary:
This paper deals with the case of using nonlinear diffusion filters to obtain piecewise constant images as a previous process for segmentation techniques.
  We first show an intrinsic formulation for the nonlinear diffusion equation to provide some design conditions on the diffusion filters. According to this theoretical framework, we propose a new family of diffusivities; they are obtained from nonlinear diffusion techniques and are related with backward diffusion. Their goal is to split the image in closed contours with a homogenized grey intensity inside and with no blurred edges.
  We also prove that our filters satisfy the well-posedness semi-discrete and full discrete scale-space requirements. This shows that by using semi-implicit schemes, a forward nonlinear diffusion equation is solved, instead of a backward nonlinear diffusion equation, connecting with an edge-preserving process. Under the conditions established for the diffusivity and using a stopping criterion for the diffusion time, we get piecewise constant images with a low computational effort.
  Finally, we test our filter with real images and we illustrate the effects of our diffusivity function as a method to get piecewise constant images.
  The code is available at https://github.com/cplatero/NonlinearDiffusion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非线性扩散滤波的保边分段常数图像生成方法，通过设计新型扩散函数族并结合半隐式格式求解前向扩散方程，实现了低计算成本下的图像分段常数化，为后续分割提供预处理。
AI.motivation: 现有非线性扩散滤波器在获得分段常数图像时存在边缘模糊问题，需要一种既能保持边缘又能实现区域内灰度均匀化的滤波方法，以更好地服务于图像分割任务。
AI.method: (1) 给出非线性扩散方程的内蕴形式，提出扩散函数的设计条件；(2) 基于上述理论框架，设计一种与反向扩散相关的新型扩散函数族；(3) 通过半隐式格式求解前向非线性扩散方程，替代反向扩散过程，实现保边效果；(4) 建立半离散和全离散尺度空间适定性证明；(5) 采用扩散时间停止准则以降低计算成本。
AI.result: 所提滤波器满足半离散和全离散尺度空间的适定性要求；在真实图像上验证了该扩散函数族能有效生成分段常数图像，且无边缘模糊；计算效率较高。代码开源在GitHub。
AI.conclusion: 基于内蕴形式设计的新型非线性扩散函数族，结合半隐式格式，能在低计算开销下获得保边的分段常数图像，是一种有效的图像分割预处理方法。

title: CorridorVLA: Explicit Spatial Constraints for Generative Action Heads via Sparse Anchors
summary: Vision--Language--Action (VLA) models often use intermediate representations to connect multimodal inputs with continuous control, yet spatial guidance is often injected implicitly through latent features. We propose $CorridorVLA$, which predicts sparse spatial anchors as incremental physical changes (e.g., $Δ$-positions) and uses them to impose an explicit tolerance region in the training objective for action generation. The anchors define a corridor that guides a flow-matching action head: trajectories whose implied spatial evolution falls outside it receive corrective gradients, while minor deviations from contacts and execution noise are permitted. On the more challenging LIBERO-Plus benchmark, CorridorVLA yields consistent gains across both SmolVLA and GR00T, improving success rate by $3.4\%$--$12.4\%$ over the corresponding baselines; notably, our GR00T-Corr variant reaches a success rate of $83.21\%$. These results indicate that action-aligned physical cues can provide direct and interpretable constraints for generative action policies, complementing spatial guidance encoded in visual or latent forms. Code is available at https://github.com/corridorVLA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CorridorVLA，通过预测稀疏空间锚点（如Δ-位置）作为增量物理变化，并在训练目标中施加显式容差区域（走廊）来引导流匹配动作头生成动作。在LIBERO-Plus基准上，相较于SmolVLA和GR00T基线，成功率提升3.4%~12.4%，GR00T-Corr变体达到83.21%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型通常通过潜在特征隐式注入空间引导，缺乏显式且可解释的物理约束，导致动作生成不够精确。本文旨在通过显式的空间锚点和容差区域来提供直接、可解释的动作约束。
AI.method: 提出CorridorVLA：1) 预测稀疏空间锚点作为增量物理变化（Δ-位置）；2) 在训练目标中定义显式容差区域（走廊）；3) 流匹配动作头生成动作轨迹，若轨迹的空间演化超出走廊则接收校正梯度，同时允许接触和执行噪声的小偏差。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-Plus基准上，CorridorVLA在SmolVLA和GR00T上均获得一致提升，成功率提升3.4%~12.4%；GR00T-Corr变体达到83.21%的成功率。
AI.conclusion: 与动作对齐的物理线索可以为生成式动作策略提供直接且可解释的约束，补充以视觉或潜在形式编码的空间引导。

title: S1-VL: Scientific Multimodal Reasoning Model with Thinking-with-Images
