HiTPro begins with an efficient Temporal-aware Feature Encoder that first extracts discriminative frame-level features and then aggregates them into a robust tracklet-level representation. Building upon these features, HiTPro first constructs reliable intra-camera prototypes via Intra-Camera Tracklet Prototyping by aggregating features from temporally partitioned sub-tracklets. Through Hierarchical Cross-Prototype Alignment, we perform a two-stage positive mining process: progressing from within-modality associations to cross-modality matching, enhanced by Dynamic Threshold Strategy and Soft Weight Assignment. Finally, {Hierarchical Contrastive Learning} progressively optimizes feature-prototype alignment across three levels: intra-camera discrimination, cross-camera same-modality consistency, and cross-modality invariance. Extensive experiments on HITSZ-VCM and BUPTCampus demonstrate that HiTPro achieves state-of-the-art performance under fully unsupervised settings, significantly outperforming adapted baselines and establishes a strong baseline for future research.

AI.tldr: 提出HiTPro框架，一种无需身份标签的无监督视频可见光-红外行人重识别方法，通过层次化时间原型构建与跨模态对齐，在基准数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频VI-ReID方法局限于有监督学习，依赖昂贵的身份标注；而无监督视频VI-ReID问题尚未被充分探索，但其在实际全天候监控部署中具有重要意义。
AI.method: 1) 时间感知特征编码器提取帧级特征并聚合为片段级表征；2) 通过时间分区子片段构建相机内原型；3) 层次化跨原型对齐：从模态内到跨模态的两阶段正样本挖掘，结合动态阈值策略与软权重分配；4) 层次化对比学习：在相机内判别、跨相机同模态一致性和跨模态不变性三个层面优化特征-原型对齐。
AI.result: 在HITSZ-VCM和BUPTCampus数据集上，HiTPro在完全无监督设置下达到SOTA性能，显著优于适配的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HiTPro建立了无监督视频VI-ReID的强基线，证明了无需显式硬伪标签分配即可实现有效的跨模态原型学习。

title: Process Supervision via Verbal Critique Improves Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Inference-time scaling for LLM reasoning has focused on three axes: chain depth, sample breadth, and learned step-scorers (PRMs). We introduce a fourth axis, granularity of external verbal supervision, via Verbal Process Supervision (VPS), a training-free framework that uses structured natural-language critique from a stronger supervisor to guide an iterative generate-critique-refine loop up to a round budget R. Across GPQA Diamond, AIME 2025, and LiveCodeBench V6 (covering both closed and open models), VPS yields three key results. First, on GPQA Diamond, GPT-5.4 (High) | GPT-5.4 (Low) reaches 94.9% at R=4, surpassing the 94.1% state of the art without gradient updates. Second, on AIME 2025, VPS enables strong weak-actor rescue, boosting scores from 11.7-26.7% to 63.3-90.0% (up to +63.3 points). Third, at matched compute, VPS outperforms Reflexion by +8.5 to +12.1 points and Self-Consistency@5 by +5.0 pp (GPQA) and +8.3 pp (LiveCodeBench), isolating critique granularity as the key driver. Performance scales with the supervisor-actor capability gap (Pearson r=0.90) and degrades when errors are not linguistically expressible (e.g., code synthesis), motivating hybrid verbal-executable methods. These results establish critique granularity as a new axis of inference-time scaling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出**言语过程监督（VPS）**，一种无训练框架，通过结构化自然语言批评（来自强监督者）引导迭代生成-批评-改进循环，将外部言语监督的粒度作为推理时间扩展的第四轴。在GPQA Diamond、AIME 2025和LiveCodeBench V6上，VPS显著提升性能，超越现有最优方法，且性能与监督者-智能体能力差距正相关（r=0.90）。
AI.motivation: 现有推理时间扩展聚焦于链深度、样本宽度和学习步骤评分器（PRM）三个维度，但缺乏对**外部言语监督粒度**这一维度的系统探索。作者旨在通过引入言语过程监督（VPS）填补这一空白，研究细粒度自然语言批评对推理性能的影响。
AI.method: VPS是一种无训练框架，利用强监督者生成结构化自然语言批评，在迭代的生成-批评-改进循环中指导弱推理模型，循环轮次由预算R控制。其核心创新是将监督粒度从标量奖励或二元反馈提升为结构化言语批评。
AI.result: 1) GPQA Diamond上，GPT-5.4 (High)|GPT-5.4 (Low)在R=4时达94.9%，超越SOTA 94.1%；2) AIME 2025上，VPS将弱模型得分从11.7-26.7%提升至63.3-90.0%（最高+63.3点）；3) 同等计算量下，VPS优于Reflexion（+8.5至+12.1点）和Self-Consistency@5（GPQA +5.0pp, LiveCodeBench +8.3pp）；4) 性能与监督者-智能体能力差距正相关（r=0.90），且当错误不可言语表达时（如代码合成）性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 批评粒度作为推理时间扩展的新轴具有独立且显著的贡献，VPS框架有效利用强监督者的言语批评指导弱模型推理，性能提升与能力差距正相关。未来需探索混合言语-可执行方法以应对代码合成等场景。

title: Visual-Tactile Peg-in-Hole Assembly Learning from Peg-out-of-Hole Disassembly
summary: Peg-in-hole (PiH) assembly is a fundamental yet challenging robotic manipulation task. While reinforcement learning (RL) has shown promise in tackling such tasks, it requires extensive exploration. In this paper, we propose a novel visual-tactile skill learning framework for the PiH task that leverages its inverse task, i.e., peg-out-of-hole (PooH) disassembly, to facilitate PiH learning. Compared to PiH, PooH is inherently easier as it only needs to overcome existing friction without precise alignment, making data collection more efficient. To this end, we formulate both PooH and PiH as Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) in a unified environment with shared visual-tactile observation space. A visual-tactile PooH policy is first trained; its trajectories, containing kinematic, visual and tactile information, are temporally reversed and action-randomized to provide expert data for PiH. In the policy learning, visual sensing facilitates the peg-hole approach, while tactile measurements compensate for peg-hole misalignment. Experiments across diverse peg-hole geometries show that the visual-tactile policy attains 6.4% lower contact forces than its single-modality counterparts, and that our framework achieves average success rates of 87.5% on seen objects and 77.1% on unseen objects, outperforming direct RL methods that train PiH policies from scratch by 18.1% in success rate. Demos, code, and datasets are available at https://sites.google.com/view/pooh2pih.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用逆向任务（拔销出孔，PooH）辅助正向任务（销孔装配，PiH）学习的视觉-触觉技能框架。通过时间反转PooH轨迹并添加动作随机化为PiH生成专家数据，结合视觉引导接近与触觉补偿位错，在多种几何形状下实现87.5%可见物体和77.1%未见物体装配成功率，较直接强化学习方法提升18.1%。
AI.motivation: 销孔装配（PiH）是机器人操作中基础但具挑战性的任务，强化学习虽有效但需要大量探索。作者利用逆向任务PooH（拔销出孔）天然更易学习的特点，将其作为PiH学习的引导源，以提高数据效率和装配成功率。
AI.method: 1) 将PooH和PiH统一建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），共享视觉-触觉观测空间；2) 先训练视觉-触觉PooH策略；3) 将PooH轨迹进行时间反转并添加动作随机化，生成PiH的专家数据；4) 视觉感知用于引导销-孔接近，触觉感知用于补偿位错。
AI.result: 1) 视觉-触觉策略较单模态策略接触力降低6.4%；2) 在可见物体上平均成功率达87.5%，未见物体上达77.1%；3) 相比直接强化学习方法，成功率提升18.1%。
AI.conclusion: 利用逆向任务（PooH）辅助正向任务（PiH）学习的框架有效可行，多模态感知（视觉+触觉）优于单模态，方法在泛化至未见物体上表现良好。

title: Using ASP(Q) to Handle Inconsistent Prioritized Data
comment: This is an extended version of a paper appearing at the 23rd International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning (KR 2026). 21 pages
summary: We explore the use of answer set programming (ASP) and its extension with quantifiers, ASP(Q), for inconsistency-tolerant querying of prioritized data, where a priority relation between conflicting facts is exploited to define three notions of optimal repairs (Pareto-, globally- and completion-optimal). We consider the variants of three well-known semantics (AR, brave and IAR) that use these optimal repairs, and for which query answering is in the first or second level of the polynomial hierarchy for a large class of logical theories. Notably, this paper presents the first implementation of globally-optimal repair-based semantics, as well as the first implementation of the grounded semantics, which is a tractable under-approximation of all these optimal repair-based semantics. Our experimental evaluation sheds light on the feasibility of computing answers under globally-optimal repair semantics and the impact of adopting different semantics, approximations, and encodings.

AI.tldr: 本文利用回答集编程(ASP)及其量化扩展ASP(Q)，实现基于优先关系的不一致容忍查询。定义了三种最优修复（Pareto最优、全局最优和完备最优），并研究了AR、brave和IAR三种语义变体。首次实现了基于全局最优修复的语义和基础语义（可处理下近似），并通过实验评估了其可行性及不同语义、近似和编码的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有不一致容忍查询方法缺乏对优先级数据的有效处理，且全局最优修复语义缺乏具体实现。本文旨在利用ASP(Q)的表达能力填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用ASP及其量化扩展ASP(Q)对优先数据进行建模，定义Pareto最优、全局最优和完备最优三种修复概念，并在AR、brave和IAR三种语义下进行查询回答。提出基础语义作为可处理的下近似，并首次实现全局最优修复语义。
AI.result: 对于一大类逻辑理论，查询回答处于多项式层级的第一或第二层。实验评估表明全局最优修复语义的查询计算具有可行性，并揭示了不同语义、近似和编码的影响。
AI.conclusion: ASP(Q)能有效支持不一致容忍优先数据查询，且全局最优修复语义的实现是可行的，基础语义为实际应用提供了可处理的近似方案。

title: A Kinematic Framework for Evaluating Pinch Configurations in Robotic Hand Design without Object or Contact Models
comment: This manuscript has been submitted for possible publication
summary: Evaluating the pinch capability of a robotic hand is important for understanding its functional dexterity. However, many existing grasp evaluation methods rely on object geometry or contact force models, which limits their applicability during the early stages of robotic hand design. This study proposes a kinematic evaluation method for analyzing pinch configurations of robotic hands based on interactions between fingertip workspaces. First, the reachable workspace of each fingertip is computed from the joint configurations of the fingers. Then, feasible pinch configurations are detected by evaluating the relationships between fingertip pairs. Since the proposed method does not require information about object geometry or contact force models, the pinch capability of a robotic hand can be evaluated solely based on its kinematic structure. In addition, analyses are performed on four different kinematic structures of the hand to investigate their impact on the pinch configurations. The proposed evaluation framework can serve as a useful tool for comparing different robotic hand designs and analyzing pinch capability during the design stage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于指尖工作空间交互的运动学评估方法，用于在无需物体几何或接触力模型的情况下，分析机器人手的捏合能力，并比较不同运动学结构对捏合配置的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有抓取评估方法大多依赖物体几何或接触力模型，限制了其在机器人手设计早期阶段的适用性，因此需要一种仅基于运动学结构的捏合能力评估方法。
AI.method: 首先计算每个指尖在关节配置下的可达工作空间，然后通过评估指尖对之间的空间关系来检测可行的捏合配置，无需物体几何或接触力信息。
AI.result: 该方法能够在设计阶段仅基于运动学结构评估机器人手的捏合能力，并对四种不同的手部运动学结构进行了分析，展示了其对捏合配置的影响。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的评估框架可作为比较不同机器人手设计、分析设计阶段捏合能力的有效工具。

title: PLAS-Net: Pixel-Level Area Segmentation for UAV-Based Beach Litter Monitoring
summary: Accurate quantification of the physical exposure area of beach litter, rather than simple item counts, is essential for credible ecological risk assessment of marine debris. However, automated UAV-based monitoring predominantly relies on bounding-box detection, which systematically overestimates the planar area of irregular litter objects. To address this geometric limitation, we develop PLAS-Net (Pixel-level Litter Area Segmentor), an instance segmentation framework that extracts pixel-accurate physical footprints of coastal debris. Evaluated on UAV imagery from a monsoon-driven pocket beach in Koh Tao, Thailand, PLAS-Net achieves a mAP_50 of 58.7% with higher precision than eleven baseline models, demonstrating improved mask fidelity under complex coastal conditions. To illustrate how the accuracy of the masking affects the conclusions of environmental analysis, we conducted three downstream demonstrations: (i) power-law fitting of normalized plastic density (NPD) to characterize fragmentation dynamics; (ii) area-weighted ecological risk index (ERI) to map spatial pollution hotspots; and (iii) source composition analysis revealing the abundance-area paradox: fishing gear constitutes a small proportion of the total number of items, but has the largest physical area per unit item. Pixel-level area extraction can provide more valuable information for coastal monitoring compared to methods based solely on counting.

AI.tldr: 提出PLAS-Net实例分割框架，从无人机影像中提取海滩垃圾的像素级物理面积，取代传统的边界框检测方法。在泰国龟岛海滩数据上达到58.7% mAP_50，并通过三个下游分析证明了像素级面积提取相比单纯计数能提供更准确的生态风险评估信息。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机监测使用边界框检测会系统性地高估不规则垃圾物体的平面面积，导致生态风险评估不准确。需要用像素级分割来精确量化海滩垃圾的物理暴露面积。
AI.method: 提出PLAS-Net（像素级垃圾区域分割器），一种实例分割框架，从无人机影像中提取海滩垃圾的像素级物理足迹。在泰国龟岛季风驱动型口袋海滩的无人机影像上进行评估，并与11个基线模型对比。
AI.result: PLAS-Net达到58.7% mAP_50，精度高于11个基线模型。三个下游分析显示：(i) 归一化塑料密度(NPD)的幂律拟合表征碎裂动力学；(ii) 面积加权的生态风险指数(ERI)绘制污染热点；(iii) 源成分分析揭示了丰度-面积悖论：渔具数量占比小但单位物品物理面积最大。
AI.conclusion: 像素级面积提取相比单纯计数方法能为海岸监测提供更有价值的信息，对生态风险评估至关重要。

title: Verifying Machine Learning Interpretability Requirements through Provenance
summary: Machine Learning (ML) Engineering is a growing field that necessitates an increase in the rigor of ML development. It draws many ideas from software engineering and more specifically, from requirements engineering. Existing literature on ML Engineering defines quality models and Non-Functional Requirements (NFRs) specific to ML, in particular interpretability being one such NFR. However, a major challenge occurs in verifying ML NFRs, including interpretability. Although existing literature defines interpretability in terms of ML, it remains an immeasurable requirement, making it impossible to definitively confirm whether a model meets its interpretability requirement. This paper shows how ML provenance can be used to verify ML interpretability requirements. This work provides an approach for how ML engineers can save various types of model and data provenance to make the model's behavior transparent and interpretable. Saving this data forms the basis of quantifiable Functional Requirements (FRs) whose verification in turn verifies the interpretability NFR. Ultimately, this paper contributes a method to verify interpretability NFRs for ML models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用机器学习溯源性（ML provenance）来验证ML模型的可解释性非功能需求，通过将不可度量的可解释性需求转化为可量化的功能需求，实现可解释性的验证。
AI.motivation: ML工程中，可解释性作为重要的非功能需求（NFR），但在现有文献中仍是不可度量的需求，无法确定模型是否满足可解释性要求。作者旨在解决可解释性NFR的验证难题。
AI.method: 利用机器学习溯源性（ML provenance），通过保存模型和数据溯源信息（包括模型行为和数据处理的各类元数据），使模型行为透明化。将这些溯源数据转化为可量化的功能需求（FRs），通过验证这些FRs来间接验证可解释性NFR。
AI.result: 提出了一种基于ML溯源验证可解释性NFR的方法框架，将不可度量的可解释性要求转化为可验证的功能需求集合。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献了验证ML模型可解释性NFR的具体方法，弥补了ML工程中非功能需求验证的空白，为ML工程师提供了一种可操作的验证途径。

title: The First Challenge on Remote Sensing Infrared Image Super-Resolution at NTIRE 2026: Benchmark Results and Method Overview
summary: This paper presents the NTIRE 2026 Remote Sensing Infrared Image Super-Resolution (x4) Challenge, one of the associated challenges of NTIRE 2026. The challenge aims to recover high-resolution (HR) infrared images from low-resolution (LR) inputs generated through bicubic downsampling with a x4 scaling factor. The objective is to develop effective models or solutions that achieve state-of-the-art performance for infrared image SR in remote sensing scenarios. To reflect the characteristics of infrared data and practical application needs, the challenge adopts a single-track setting. A total of 115 participants registered for the competition, with 13 teams submitting valid entries. This report summarizes the challenge design, dataset, evaluation protocol, main results, and the representative methods of each team. The challenge serves as a benchmark to advance research in infrared image super-resolution and promote the development of effective solutions for real-world remote sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文总结了NTIRE 2026遥感红外图像超分辨率（x4）挑战赛，该比赛基于双三次下采样生成的LR输入恢复HR红外图像，采用单赛道设置，共115人注册、13支队伍提交有效结果，报告概述了挑战设计、数据集、评估协议、主要结果及代表性方法。
AI.motivation: 遥感红外图像超分辨率在实际应用中具有重要意义，但现有研究尚不充分。举办此次挑战赛旨在推动该领域发展，为红外图像SR建立统一基准，促进面向真实遥感应用的有效解决方案的开发。
AI.method: 采用单赛道（single-track）设置，所有参赛队伍在统一数据集上进行x4倍双三次下采样超分辨率任务，通过标准化评估协议比较各团队方法的性能。
AI.result: 115名参与者注册，13支队伍提交了有效参赛结果。报告汇总了各团队的代表性方法及最终排名。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛为遥感红外图像超分辨率领域提供了重要的基准平台，有助于推动该方向的研究进展，并为实际遥感应用中的红外图像处理提供有效方案。

title: DryRUN: On the Role of Public Tests in LLM-Driven Code Generation
summary: Multi-agent frameworks are widely used in autonomous code generation and have applications in complex algorithmic problem-solving. Recent work has addressed the challenge of generating functionally correct code by incorporating simulation-driven planning and debugging, where language models trace execution steps to verify logic. However, these approaches depend on human-provided public test cases to ground the debugging and simulation loop. Manually authoring comprehensive input-output examples is a labor-intensive bottleneck in the software development lifecycle. Because ground-truth input-output examples are rarely available prior to implementation in real-world software engineering, this dependency restricts methods to curated competitive programming benchmarks. Furthermore, we identify that reliance on these public tests induces an ``overconfidence gap,'' causing frameworks to overfit to simplistic examples and fail on hidden evaluations. In contrast, we observe that external sample inputs are not strictly necessary for code generation. We demonstrate that large language models can autonomously generate valid inputs and simulate execution traces to self-correct. Consequently, we develop DryRUN, a framework that eliminates the need for ground-truth samples by allowing the LLM to iteratively plan, autonomously generate its own inputs and simulate execution, mitigating algorithmic overconfidence. Evaluations on the LiveCodeBench v6 dataset (post-March 2025) demonstrate that DryRUN matches performance against CodeSIM, a state-of-the-art and public-test-dependent framework, while operating entirely without public test cases or external execution feedback while reducing output token consumption.

AI.tldr: DryRUN是一个无需人工提供测试用例的自主代码生成框架，通过让大语言模型自主生成输入并模拟执行轨迹来自我纠正，消除了对公开测试用例的依赖，在LiveCodeBench v6数据集上达到了与依赖测试用例的SOTA方法CodeSIM相当的性能，同时减少了输出token消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模拟驱动的代码生成框架依赖人工提供的公开测试用例来指导调试和模拟循环，而人工编写全面的输入输出示例是软件开发流程中的劳动密集型瓶颈；且真实场景中地面真值输入输出示例在实现前几乎不可用，导致方法局限于精选的竞赛编程基准；此外，对公开测试的依赖会导致"过度自信差距"，使框架过度拟合简单示例而在隐藏评测上失败。
AI.method: DryRUN框架让LLM自主生成有效输入并模拟执行轨迹来自我纠正，无需地面真值样本。具体通过迭代规划、自主生成输入、模拟执行三个步骤，消除对公开测试用例和外部执行反馈的依赖。
AI.result: 在LiveCodeBench v6数据集（2025年3月后）上的评估显示，DryRUN在完全不使用公开测试用例或外部执行反馈的情况下，性能与依赖公开测试的SOTA框架CodeSIM相当，同时减少了输出token消耗。
AI.conclusion: 外部样本输入并非代码生成的必要条件，LLM可以自主生成有效输入并模拟执行轨迹来实现自我纠正，从而消除对人工测试用例的依赖并缓解过度自信问题。

title: Kinematic Optimization of Phalanx Length Ratios in Robotic Hands Using Potential Dexterity
comment: This manuscript has been submitted for possible publication
summary: In the design stage of robotic hands, it is not straightforward to quantitatively evaluate the effect of phalanx length ratios on dexterity without defining specific objects or manipulation tasks. Therefore, this study presents a framework for optimizing the phalanx length ratios of a five-finger robotic hand based on potential dexterity within a kinematic structure. The proposed method employs global manipulability, workspace volume, overlap workspace volume, and fingertip sensitivity as evaluation metrics, and identifies optimal design configurations using a weighted objective function under given constraints. The reachable workspace is discretized using a voxel-based representation, and joint motions are discretized at uniform intervals for evaluation. The optimization is performed over design sets for both the thumb and the other fingers, and design combinations that do not generate overlap workspace are excluded. The results show that each phalanx does not contribute equally to the overall dexterity, and the factors influencing each phalanx are identified. In addition, it is observed that the selection of weighting coefficients does not necessarily lead to the direct maximization of individual performance metrics, due to the non-uniform distribution of evaluation measures within the design space. The proposed framework provides a systematic approach to analyze the trade-offs among reachability, dexterity, and controllability, and can serve as a practical guideline for the kinematic design of multi-fingered robotic hands.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于潜在灵巧性的五指机器人手指指节长度比优化框架，采用全局可操作性、工作空间体积、重叠工作空间体积和指尖灵敏度作为评估指标，通过加权目标函数在约束条件下寻找最优设计配置。
AI.motivation: 在机器人手的设计阶段，不定义具体对象或操作任务时，难以定量评估指节长度比对灵巧性的影响。
AI.method: 采用体素化表示离散可达工作空间，均匀间隔离散化关节运动；以全局可操作性、工作空间体积、重叠工作空间体积和指尖灵敏度为评估指标；通过加权目标函数优化拇指及其他手指的设计组合，排除不产生重叠工作空间的设计。
AI.result: 各指节对整体灵巧性的贡献不同，且各指节的影响因素被识别；加权系数的选择并不必然导致单项性能指标的直接最大化，原因是评估指标在设计空间内分布不均匀。
AI.conclusion: 该框架系统分析了可达性、灵巧性和可控性之间的权衡，可为多指机器人手的运动学设计提供实用指导。

title: A Kernel Nonconformity Score for Multivariate Conformal Prediction
summary: Multivariate conformal prediction requires nonconformity scores that compress residual vectors into scalars while preserving certain implicit geometric structure of the residual distribution. We introduce a Multivariate Kernel Score (MKS) that produces prediction regions that explicitly adapt to this geometry. We show that the proposed score resembles the Gaussian process posterior variance, unifying Bayesian uncertainty quantification with the coverage guarantees of frequentist-type. Moreover, the MKS can be decomposed into an anisotropic Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) that interpolates between kernel density estimation and covariance-weighted distance. We prove finite-sample coverage guarantees and establish convergence rates that depend on the effective rank of the kernel-based covariance operator rather than the ambient dimension, enabling dimension-free adaptation. On regression tasks, the MKS reduces the volume of prediction region significantly, compared to ellipsoidal baselines while maintaining nominal coverage, with larger gains at higher dimensions and tighter coverage levels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多变量核评分（MKS）方法，通过将残差向量压缩为标量同时保留几何结构，实现自适应预测区域构建，兼具贝叶斯不确定性量化与频率学派覆盖保证，在回归任务中显著减小预测区域体积。
AI.motivation: 多变量共形预测需要将残差向量压缩为标量的非一致评分，同时保留残差分布中隐含的几何结构，现有方法在此方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出多变量核评分（MKS），其类似于高斯过程后验方差，可分解为各向异性的最大均值差异（MMD），在核密度估计与协方差加权距离之间插值。
AI.result: 在回归任务中，与椭球基线方法相比，MKS在保持名义覆盖率的条件下显著减小预测区域体积，在高维和更紧的覆盖率水平下增益更大；证明了有限样本覆盖保证，收敛速率取决于核协方差算子的有效秩而非环境维度。
AI.conclusion: MKS实现了维度自适应，将贝叶斯不确定性量化与频率学派覆盖保证统一，为多变量共形预测提供了几何自适应的高效方法。

title: Occupancy Reward Shaping: Improving Credit Assignment for Offline Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning
summary:
The temporal lag between actions and their long-term consequences makes credit assignment a challenge when learning goal-directed behaviors from data. Generative world models capture the distribution of future states an agent may visit, indicating that they have captured temporal information. How can that temporal information be extracted to perform credit assignment? In this paper, we formalize how the temporal information stored in world models encodes the underlying geometry of the world. Leveraging optimal transport, we extract this geometry from a learned model of the occupancy measure into a reward function that captures goal-reaching information. Our resulting method, Occupancy Reward Shaping, largely mitigates the problem of credit assignment in sparse reward settings. ORS provably does not alter the optimal policy, yet empirically improves performance by 2.2x across 13 diverse long-horizon locomotion and manipulation tasks. Moreover, we demonstrate the effectiveness of ORS in the real world for controlling nuclear fusion on 3 Tokamak control tasks.
  Code: https://github.com/aravindvenu7/occupancy_reward_shaping; Website: https://aravindvenu7.github.io/website/ors/

AI.tldr: 本文提出Occupancy Reward Shaping (ORS)方法，通过最优传输从生成式世界模型的占用量度中提取时间几何信息，将其转化为奖励函数，从而在稀疏奖励场景中缓解信用分配问题。ORS在13个长时域任务上平均提升2.2倍性能，并在核聚变托卡马克控制任务中验证了其真实世界有效性。
AI.motivation: 在强化学习中，动作与其长期后果之间的时间延迟导致信用分配困难，特别是在稀疏奖励设定下。已有世界模型虽然捕获了未来状态分布（即时间信息），但如何提取这些时间信息以进行有效的信用分配仍是一个未解决的问题。
AI.method: 本文首先形式化世界模型中存储的时间信息如何编码世界的底层几何结构。然后利用最优传输（Optimal Transport）从学习到的占用量度（occupancy measure）模型中提取该几何结构，并将其转化为捕捉目标到达信息的奖励函数。由此提出的Occupancy Reward Shaping (ORS)方法在理论上不改变最优策略。
AI.result: 在13个多样化的长时域 locomotion 和 manipulation 任务上，ORS相比基准方法平均提升2.2倍性能。此外，在3个托卡马克（Tokamak）核聚变控制真实世界任务上也验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: ORS通过从世界模型中提取时间几何信息来重塑奖励，有效缓解了稀疏奖励下的信用分配问题，并展示了从仿真到真实世界（核聚变控制）的迁移能力。

title: Exploring the Role of Synthetic Data Augmentation in Controllable Human-Centric Video Generation
summary: Controllable human video generation aims to produce realistic videos of humans with explicitly guided motions and appearances,serving as a foundation for digital humans, animation, and embodied AI.However, the scarcity of largescale, diverse, and privacy safe human video datasets poses a major bottleneck, especially for rare identities and complex actions.Synthetic data provides a scalable and controllable alternative,yet its actual contribution to generative modeling remains underexplored due to the persistent Sim2Real gap.In this work,we systematically investigate the impact of synthetic data on controllable human video generation. We propose a diffusion-based framework that enables fine-grained control over appearance and motion while providing a unfied testbed to analyze how synthetic data interacts with real world data during training. Through extensive experiments, we reveal the complementary roles of synthetic and real data and demonstrate possible methods for efficiently selecting synthetic samples to enhance motion realism,temporal consistency,and identity preservation.Our study offers the first comprehensive exploration of synthetic data's role in human-centric video synthesis and provides practical insights for building data-efficient and generalizable generative models.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了合成数据在可控人体视频生成中的作用，提出了一种基于扩散模型的框架，能够在统一测试平台下分析合成数据与真实数据的互补关系，并通过实验证明合成数据可以有效提升运动真实性、时间一致性和身份保持能力。
AI.motivation: 大规模、多样化且隐私安全的人体视频数据集稀缺，尤其是针对罕见身份和复杂动作，严重制约了可控人体视频生成的发展。合成数据虽然可扩展且可控，但其对生成建模的实际贡献因Sim2Real gap而未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出基于扩散模型的框架，实现对外观和运动的细粒度控制；在该统一测试平台上，系统分析合成数据与真实数据在训练过程中的交互作用，并探索高效选择合成样本以提升生成质量的方法。
AI.result: 实验揭示了合成数据与真实数据在可控人体视频生成中的互补关系；展示了通过高效选择合成样本，可以在运动真实性、时间一致性和身份保持方面取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次全面探索了合成数据在人体视频合成中的作用，为构建数据高效且具有泛化能力的生成模型提供了实用见解。

title: A Metamorphic Testing Approach to Diagnosing Memorization in LLM-Based Program Repair
summary: LLM-based automated program repair (APR) techniques have shown promising results in reducing debugging costs. However, prior results can be affected by data leakage: large language models (LLMs) may memorize bug fixes when evaluation benchmarks overlap with their pretraining data, leading to inflated performance estimates. In this paper, we investigate whether we can better reveal data leakage by combining metamorphic testing (MT) with negative log-likelihood (NLL), which has been used in prior work as a proxy for memorization. We construct variant benchmarks by applying semantics-preserving transformations to two widely used datasets, Defects4J and GitBug-Java. Using these benchmarks, we evaluate the repair success rates of seven LLMs on both original and transformed versions, and analyze the relationship between performance degradation and NLL. Our results show that all evaluated state-of-the-art LLMs exhibit substantial drops in patch generation success rates on transformed benchmarks, ranging from -4.1% for GPT-4o to -15.98% for Llama-3.1. Furthermore, we find that this degradation strongly correlates with NLL on the original benchmarks, suggesting that models perform better on instances they are more likely to have memorized. These findings show that combining MT with NLL provides stronger and more reliable evidence of data leakage, while metamorphic testing alone can help mitigate its effects in LLM-based APR evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将蜕变测试（MT）与负对数似然（NLL）相结合的方法，以更可靠地检测LLM在自动程序修复中的数据泄漏问题。实验发现，在语义保持变换后的基准测试上，七种LLM的补丁生成成功率显著下降（-4.1%至-15.98%），且下降程度与NLL高度相关，表明模型更可能在记忆过的实例上表现更好。MT单独使用即可缓解数据泄漏的影响，而与NLL结合则能提供更强有力的泄漏证据。
AI.motivation: LLM在自动程序修复中性能评估可能因数据泄漏（模型在预训练中已记忆评估基准中的bug修复）而被高估，需要更可靠的检测方法来揭示这种泄漏。
AI.method: 对Defects4J和GitBug-Java两个基准数据集应用语义保持变换构建变体基准，评估七种LLM在原始与变换版本上的修复成功率，并分析性能下降与NLL之间的相关性。
AI.result: 所有模型在变换基准上补丁生成成功率显著下降（GPT-4o下降-4.1%，Llama-3.1下降-15.98%），且性能下降程度与NLL呈现强相关性。
AI.conclusion: MT与NLL结合可提供更强更可靠的数据泄漏证据，而MT自身也能帮助缓解LLM-based APR评估中数据泄漏的影响。

title: Passive Variable Impedance For Shared Control
comment: submitted for publication at the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
summary: Shared Control methods often use impedance control to track target poses in a robotic manipulator. The guidance behavior of such controllers is shaped by the used stiffness gains, which can be varying over time to achieve an adaptive guiding. When multiple target poses are tracked at the same time with varying importance, the corresponding output wrenches have to be arbitrated with weightings changing over time. In this work, we study the stabilization of both variable stiffness in impedance control as well as the arbitration of different controllers through a scaled addition of their output wrenches, reformulating both into a holistic framework. We identify passivity violations in the closed loop system and provide methods to passivate the system. The resulting approach can be used to stabilize standard impedance controllers, allowing for the development of novel and flexible shared control methods. We do not constrain the design of stiffness matrices or arbitration factors; both can be matrix-valued including off-diagonal elements and change arbitrarily over time. The proposed methods are furthermore validated in simulation as well as in real robot experiments on different systems, proving their effectiveness and showcasing different behaviors which can be utilized depending on the requirements of the shared control approach.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了共享控制中变刚度阻抗控制与多控制器输出力矩仲裁的稳定性问题，提出了一种统一的无源化方法，能够在刚度矩阵和仲裁因子任意时变（包括矩阵值和非对角元素）的情况下保证系统稳定，并通过仿真和真实机器人实验验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 共享控制方法常使用阻抗控制跟踪目标位姿，而引导行为由时变刚度塑造；当同时跟踪多个目标位姿且重要性变化时，需要对输出力矩进行时变加权仲裁。现有方法存在闭环系统无源性违例的问题，亟需一种能够稳定化变刚度和变权重仲裁的统一框架。
AI.method: 将变刚度阻抗控制与多控制器输出力矩的缩放加法仲裁重新表述为一个统一的框架；识别闭环系统中的无源性违例现象；提出无源化方法来稳定系统；不对刚度矩阵或仲裁因子的设计施加约束，允许其任意时变且包含矩阵值和非对角元素。
AI.result: 在仿真和不同系统的真实机器人实验中验证了所提方法的有效性，展示了可根据共享控制需求灵活配置的多种行为。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的无源化方法能够稳定标准的阻抗控制器，支持开发新型且灵活的共享控制方法。

title: Temporal Difference Calibration in Sequential Tasks: Application to Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Recent advances in vision-language-action (VLA) models for robotics have highlighted the importance of reliable uncertainty quantification in sequential tasks. However, assessing and improving calibration in such settings remains mostly unexplored, especially when only partial trajectories are observed. In this work, we formulate sequential calibration for episodic tasks, where task-success confidence is produced along an episode, while success is determined at the end of it. We introduce a sequential extension of the Brier score and show that, for binary outcomes, its risk minimizer coincides with the VLA policy's value function. This connection bridges uncertainty calibration and reinforcement learning, enabling the use of temporal-difference (TD) value estimation as a principled calibration mechanism over time. We empirically show that TD calibration improves performance relative to the state-of-the-art on simulated and real-robot data. Interestingly, we show that when calibrated using TD, the VLA's single-step action probabilities can yield competitive uncertainty estimates, in contrast to recent findings that employed different calibration techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的时序校准方法，将Brier得分扩展至序贯设置，证明了其风险最小化器等价于VLA策略的价值函数，从而建立了不确定性校准与强化学习之间的联系，并利用时序差分（TD）价值估计作为校准机制。实验表明，TD校准在模拟和真实机器人数据上均优于现有方法，且经TD校准后，VLA的单步动作概率可产生具有竞争力的不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 在机器人VLA模型中，不确定性量化对于序贯任务的可靠性至关重要，但现有工作对校准问题的研究不足，尤其是在仅观察到部分轨迹的情况下，缺乏有效的时序校准方法。
AI.method: 1) 针对情节性任务提出了序贯Brier得分扩展；2) 证明了在二元结果下，该得分风险最小化器等价于VLA策略的价值函数；3) 利用时序差分（TD）价值估计作为校准机制；4) 在模拟和真实机器人数据上进行实验验证。
AI.result: TD校准在模拟和真实机器人数据上均优于现有最先进方法；经TD校准后，VLA的单步动作概率能产生具有竞争力的不确定性估计，这与先前采用不同校准技术的研究发现形成对比。
AI.conclusion: 时序差分价值估计可以作为一种原则性的时序校准机制，有效桥接了不确定性校准与强化学习，为VLA模型在机器人序贯任务中的可靠性提供了理论支撑和实践验证。

title: Hybrid Deep Learning Approach for Coupled Demand Forecasting and Supply Chain Optimization
comment: The paper is accepted in the Computers, Materials & Continua journal
summary: Supply chain resilience and efficiency are vital in industries characterized by volatile demand and uncertain supply, such as textiles and personal protective equipment (PPE). Traditional forecasting and optimization approaches often operate in isolation, limiting their real-world effectiveness. This paper proposes a Hybrid AI Framework for Demand-Supply Forecasting and Optimization (HAF-DS), which integrates a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM)-based demand forecasting module with a mixed integer linear programming (MILP) optimization layer. The LSTM captures temporal and contextual demand dependencies, while the optimization layer prescribes cost-efficient replenishment and allocation decisions. The framework jointly minimizes forecasting error and operational cost through embedding-based feature representation and recurrent neural architectures. Experiments on textile sales and supply chain datasets show significant performance gains over statistical and deep learning baselines. On the combined dataset, HAF-DS reduced Mean Absolute Error (MAE) from 15.04 to 12.83 (14.7%), Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) from 19.53 to 17.11 (12.4%), and Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) from 9.5% to 8.1%. Inventory cost decreased by 5.4%, stockouts by 27.5%, and service level rose from 95.5% to 97.8%. These results confirm that coupling predictive forecasting with prescriptive optimization enhances both accuracy and efficiency, providing a scalable and adaptable solution for modern textile and PPE supply chains.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种混合AI框架（HAF-DS），将LSTM需求预测与MILP优化相结合，在纺织品和PPE供应链中同时降低预测误差（MAE降低14.7%，RMSE降低12.4%）和运营成本（库存成本降低5.4%，缺货减少27.5%，服务水平提升至97.8%）。
AI.motivation: 传统预测与优化方法往往孤立运行，在需求波动大、供应不确定的行业（如纺织品和PPE）中效果有限，亟需一种集成预测与优化的端到端框架来提升供应链韧性和效率。
AI.method: 提出HAF-DS混合AI框架：前端采用LSTM捕捉需求的时间依赖和上下文特征，后端通过MILP进行补货与分配决策优化，利用嵌入特征表示和循环神经架构联合最小化预测误差与运营成本。
AI.result: 在纺织品与PPE组合数据集上，HAF-DS将MAE从15.04降至12.83（-14.7%），RMSE从19.53降至17.11（-12.4%），MAPE从9.5%降至8.1%；库存成本降低5.4%，缺货减少27.5%，服务水平从95.5%提升至97.8%。
AI.conclusion: 将预测性（LSTM）与规定性优化（MILP）相结合能够同时提升预测精度和运营效率，为现代纺织品和PPE供应链提供了可扩展、适应性强的解决方案。

title: AttDiff-GAN: A Hybrid Diffusion-GAN Framework for Facial Attribute Editing
summary: Facial attribute editing aims to modify target attributes while preserving attribute-irrelevant content and overall image fidelity. Existing GAN-based methods provide favorable controllability, but often suffer from weak alignment between style codes and attribute semantics. Diffusion-based methods can synthesize highly realistic images; however, their editing precision is limited by the entanglement of semantic directions among different attributes. In this paper, we propose AttDiff-GAN, a hybrid framework that combines GAN-based attribute manipulation with diffusion-based image generation. A key challenge in such integration lies in the inconsistency between one-step adversarial learning and multi-step diffusion denoising, which makes effective optimization difficult. To address this issue, we decouple attribute editing from image synthesis by introducing a feature-level adversarial learning scheme to learn explicit attribute manipulation, and then using the manipulated features to guide the diffusion process for image generation, while also removing the reliance on semantic direction-based editing. Moreover, we enhance style-attribute alignment by introducing PriorMapper, which incorporates facial priors into style generation, and RefineExtractor, which captures global semantic relationships through a Transformer for more precise style extraction. Experimental results on CelebA-HQ show that the proposed method achieves more accurate facial attribute editing and better preservation of non-target attributes than state-of-the-art methods in both qualitative and quantitative evaluations.

AI.tldr: 提出了AttDiff-GAN混合框架，通过解耦属性编辑与图像合成，结合GAN的显式属性操控和扩散模型的高质量生成，并引入PriorMapper和RefineExtractor增强风格-属性对齐，在CelebA-HQ上取得了更精确的面部属性编辑效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GAN的方法在属性编辑中提供了良好的可控性，但风格编码与属性语义之间对齐较弱；基于扩散的方法能生成高度逼真的图像，但由于不同属性间语义方向纠缠，编辑精度受限。为结合两者优势，需解决单步对抗学习与多步扩散去噪之间的不一致性导致的优化困难。
AI.method: 提出AttDiff-GAN混合框架：(1) 通过特征级对抗学习解耦属性编辑与图像合成，先学习显式属性操控，再用操控后的特征引导扩散过程生成图像，摆脱对语义方向编辑的依赖；(2) 引入PriorMapper，将面部先验融入风格生成；(3) 引入RefineExtractor，利用Transformer捕获全局语义关系以实现更精确的风格提取。
AI.result: 在CelebA-HQ数据集上的定性和定量评估表明，该方法相比现有最先进方法实现了更精确的面部属性编辑和更好的非目标属性保持。
AI.conclusion: AttDiff-GAN通过解耦策略和先验增强模块有效融合了GAN与扩散模型的优势，解决了风格-属性对齐不足和语义方向纠缠问题，提升了面部属性编辑的精度和图像保真度。

title: MOMO: A framework for seamless physical, verbal, and graphical robot skill learning and adaptation
summary: Industrial robot applications require increasingly flexible systems that non-expert users can easily adapt for varying tasks and environments. However, different adaptations benefit from different interaction modalities. We present an interactive framework that enables robot skill adaptation through three complementary modalities: kinesthetic touch for precise spatial corrections, natural language for high-level semantic modifications, and a graphical web interface for visualizing geometric relations and trajectories, inspecting and adjusting parameters, and editing via-points by drag-and-drop. The framework integrates five components: energy-based human-intention detection, a tool-based LLM architecture (where the LLM selects and parameterizes predefined functions rather than generating code) for safe natural language adaptation, Kernelized Movement Primitives (KMPs) for motion encoding, probabilistic Virtual Fixtures for guided demonstration recording, and ergodic control for surface finishing. We demonstrate that this tool-based LLM architecture generalizes skill adaptation from KMPs to ergodic control, enabling voice-commanded surface finishing. Validation on a 7-DoF torque-controlled robot at the Automatica 2025 trade fair demonstrates the practical applicability of our approach in industrial settings.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种三模态交互框架（动觉示教、自然语言、图形界面），通过工具化LLM架构实现工业机器人技能的安全自适应调整，并在2025年Automática展会验证其工业实用性。
AI.motivation: 工业机器人需要非专家用户能灵活适配不同任务和环境的系统，但不同适配场景受益于不同交互模态，现有方法缺乏多模态整合与安全保障。
AI.method: 三模态交互框架：1）动觉示教实现精确空间修正；2）基于工具化LLM架构（LLM选择并参数化预定义函数而非生成代码）的自然语言高维语义修改；3）图形Web界面可视化几何关系与轨迹、参数调整、拖拽编辑途径点。集成5个组件：基于能量的人体意图检测、工具化LLM架构、核化运动基元（KMP）、概率虚拟夹具、遍历控制。
AI.result: 工具化LLM架构将技能适配从KMP泛化到遍历控制，实现了语音指令驱动的表面加工；2025年Automática展会上7自由度力矩控制机器人验证了实际工业适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过三种互补交互模态结合工具化LLM架构，为工业机器人技能适配提供了安全、灵活且实用的多模态解决方案。

title: ImageHD: Energy-Efficient On-Device Continual Learning of Visual Representations via Hyperdimensional Computing
summary:
On-device continual learning (CL) is critical for edge AI systems operating on non-stationary data streams, but most existing methods rely on backpropagation or exemplar-heavy classifiers, incurring substantial compute, memory, and latency overheads. Hyperdimensional computing (HDC) offers a lightweight alternative through fast, non-iterative online updates. Combined with a compact convolutional neural network (CNN) feature extractor, HDC enables efficient on-device adaptation with strong visual representations. However, prior HDC-based CL systems often depend on multi-tier memory hierarchies and complex cluster management, limiting deployability on resource-constrained hardware.
  We present ImageHD, an FPGA accelerator for on-device continual learning of visual data based on HDC. ImageHD targets streaming CL under strict latency and on-chip memory constraints, avoiding costly iterative optimization. At the algorithmic level, we introduce a hardware-aware CL method that bounds class exemplars through a unified exemplar memory and a hardware-efficient cluster merging strategy, while incorporating a quantized CNN front-end to reduce deployment overhead without sacrificing accuracy. At the system level, ImageHD is implemented as a streaming dataflow architecture on the AMD Zynq ZCU104 FPGA, integrating HDC encoding, similarity search, and bounded cluster management using word-packed binary hypervectors for massively parallel bitwise computation within tight on-chip resource budgets. On CORe50, ImageHD achieves up to 40.4x (4.84x) speedup and 383x (105.1x) energy efficiency over optimized CPU (GPU) baselines, demonstrating the practicality of HDC-enabled continual learning for real-time edge AI.

AI.tldr: ImageHD是一个基于超维计算(HDC)的FPGA加速器，用于设备上的视觉数据持续学习。通过在AMD Zynq ZCU104 FPGA上实现流式数据流架构，结合量化CNN前端和硬件感知的聚类合并策略，在CORe50数据集上相比优化后的CPU(GPU)基线实现了最高40.4倍(4.84倍)加速和383倍(105.1倍)能效提升。
AI.motivation: 现有设备上持续学习方法依赖反向传播或大量样本的分类器，导致计算、内存和延迟开销巨大；而基于HDC的持续学习系统又依赖多级存储层次和复杂簇管理，在资源受限硬件上部署困难。因此需要一种轻量、高效、可部署的持续学习加速方案。
AI.method: 算法层面：提出硬件感知的持续学习方法，通过统一样本存储器限制类别样本数量，采用硬件高效的簇合并策略，并引入量化CNN前端降低部署开销。系统层面：在AMD Zynq ZCU104 FPGA上实现流式数据流架构，集成HDC编码、相似性搜索和有界簇管理，使用字打包二进制超向量在芯片资源预算内进行大规模并行位运算。
AI.result: 在CORe50数据集上，ImageHD相比优化后的CPU基线实现最高40.4倍加速和383倍能效提升，相比优化后的GPU基线实现4.84倍加速和105.1倍能效提升。
AI.conclusion: ImageHD证明了基于HDC的持续学习在实时边缘AI中的实用性，为资源严格受限设备上的流式持续学习提供了高效可行的FPGA加速方案。

title: VTouch++: A Multimodal Dataset with Vision-Based Tactile Enhancement for Bimanual Manipulation
summary: Embodied intelligence has advanced rapidly in recent years; however, bimanual manipulation-especially in contact-rich tasks remains challenging. This is largely due to the lack of datasets with rich physical interaction signals, systematic task organization, and sufficient scale. To address these limitations, we introduce the VTOUCH dataset. It leverages vision based tactile sensing to provide high-fidelity physical interaction signals, adopts a matrix-style task design to enable systematic learning, and employs automated data collection pipelines covering real-world, demand-driven scenarios to ensure scalability. To further validate the effectiveness of the dataset, we conduct extensive quantitative experiments on cross-modal retrieval as well as real-robot evaluation. Finally, we demonstrate real-world performance through generalizable inference across multiple robots, policies, and tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VTOUCH数据集，利用视觉触觉传感提供高保真物理交互信号，采用矩阵式任务设计和自动化数据收集管线，以解决双臂操作中接触密集任务的挑战。通过跨模态检索和真实机器人实验验证了数据集的有效性。
AI.motivation: 双臂操作尤其是接触密集任务仍具挑战性，主要缺乏具有丰富物理交互信号、系统化任务组织和足够规模的数据集。
AI.method: 构建VTOUCH数据集：基于视觉触觉传感获取高保真物理交互信号；采用矩阵式任务设计实现系统化学习；通过覆盖真实世界需求驱动场景的自动化数据收集管线确保可扩展性。
AI.result: 在跨模态检索和真实机器人评估中进行了广泛定量实验，并在多个机器人、策略和任务上展示了可泛化的推理性能。
AI.conclusion: VTOUCH数据集有效解决了接触密集双臂操作中数据不足的问题，为触觉-视觉融合的具身智能研究提供了有力支撑。

title: Generalizing Numerical Reasoning in Table Data through Operation Sketches and Self-Supervised Learning
comment: Accepted to TACL. This is a pre-MIT Press publication version
summary: Numerical reasoning over expert-domain tables often exhibits high in-domain accuracy but limited robustness to domain shift. Models trained with supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on specific datasets tend to rely on header-operation shortcuts rather than structural reasoning. We introduce TaNOS, a continual pre-training framework comprising three components: (i) header anonymization to reduce lexical memorization, (ii) operation sketches that provide minimal structural cues, and (iii) self-supervised pretraining that constructs correctness-guaranteed program-question pairs from given tables in a program-first manner. By decoupling domain semantics and numerical operation structure, TaNOS improves the transferability of numerical reasoning. Applied to an 8B instruction-tuned model, TaNOS achieves 80.13% execution accuracy on FinQA with only 10% train data, outperforming SFT baseline (73.97%) with full train data and proprietary models such as GPT-5, Gemini-2.5-Pro. Furthermore, in the domain-shift experiments, TaNOS displays nearly-negligible cross-domain gap (<2pp) when standard SFT shows over 10pp gap. These results suggest that structural guidance with operation sketches, header-agnostic representations, and correctness-guaranteed self-supervision can improve the robustness of numerical reasoning across diverse expert-domain tables.

AI.tldr: TaNOS 是一个持续预训练框架，通过头部匿名化、操作草图和自监督预训练三组件，解耦领域语义与数值操作结构，提升了专家领域表格数值推理的跨领域迁移能力和鲁棒性。在 FinQA 上仅用10%训练数据即达到80.13%执行准确率，超越完整数据训练的 SFT 基线和 GPT-5 等闭源模型，且跨领域差距小于2pp。
AI.motivation: 现有数值推理模型在领域内准确率高，但面对领域迁移时鲁棒性差。基于SFT的模型倾向于依赖表头-操作捷径而非真正的结构推理，导致跨领域泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出TaNOS框架，包含三个组件：(i) 头部匿名化——减少词汇记忆；(ii) 操作草图——提供最小结构线索；(iii) 自监督预训练——以程序优先方式从表格中构造正确性有保证的程序-问题对，实现领域语义与数值操作结构的解耦。
AI.result: 在8B指令微调模型上，FinQA数据集仅用10%训练数据即达80.13%执行准确率，超过用完整数据训练的SFT基线（73.97%）及GPT-5、Gemini-2.5-Pro等闭源模型。领域迁移实验中，TaNOS的跨领域差距<2pp，而标准SFT差距>10pp。
AI.conclusion: 操作草图的结构引导、头部无关的表征以及正确性有保证的自监督学习能够有效提升数值推理在多样化专家领域表格上的鲁棒性和迁移能力。

title: LatRef-Diff: Latent and Reference-Guided Diffusion for Facial Attribute Editing and Style Manipulation
summary: Facial attribute editing and style manipulation are crucial for applications like virtual avatars and photo editing. However, achieving precise control over facial attributes without altering unrelated features is challenging due to the complexity of facial structures and the strong correlations between attributes. While conditional GANs have shown progress, they are limited by accuracy issues and training instability. Diffusion models, though promising, face challenges in style manipulation due to the limited expressiveness of semantic directions. In this paper, we propose LatRef-Diff, a novel diffusion-based framework that addresses these limitations. We replace the traditional semantic directions in diffusion models with style codes and propose two methods for generating them: latent and reference guidance. Based on these style codes, we design a style modulation module that integrates them into the target image, enabling both random and customized style manipulation. This module incorporates learnable vectors, cross-attention mechanisms, and a hierarchical design to improve accuracy and image quality. Additionally, to enhance training stability while eliminating the need for paired images (e.g., before and after editing), we propose a forward-backward consistency training strategy. This strategy first removes the target attribute approximately using image-specific semantic directions and then restores it via style modulation, guided by perceptual and classification losses. Extensive experiments on CelebA-HQ demonstrate that LatRef-Diff achieves state-of-the-art performance in both qualitative and quantitative evaluations. Ablation studies validate the effectiveness of our model's design choices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LatRef-Diff框架，用风格码替代扩散模型中的语义方向，结合潜在引导和参考引导两种风格码生成方式、风格调制模块以及前向-后向一致性训练策略，实现精准的面部属性编辑和风格操控，在CelebA-HQ上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有条件GAN存在精度和训练不稳定问题，扩散模型在风格操控中因语义方向表达能力有限而面临挑战，且难以在不改变无关特征的前提下实现属性编辑的精确控制。
AI.method: 提出LatRef-Diff框架：(1) 用风格码替代传统语义方向，提出潜在引导和参考引导两种生成方式；(2) 设计风格调制模块，集成可学习向量、交叉注意力机制和层次化设计；(3) 提出前向-后向一致性训练策略，先利用图像特定语义方向移除目标属性，再通过风格调制恢复属性，由感知损失和分类损失引导，无需配对图像。
AI.result: 在CelebA-HQ数据集上的定性和定量实验均达到SOTA性能，消融研究验证了各设计选择的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LatRef-Diff通过风格码替代语义方向、风格调制模块和前向-后向一致性训练，有效解决了面部属性编辑和风格操控中的精度、稳定性和配对数据依赖问题。

title: Engaged AI Governance: Addressing the Last Mile Challenge Through Internal Expert Collaboration
summary: Under the EU AI Act, translating AI governance requirements into software development practice remains challenging. While AI governance frameworks exist at industry and organizational levels, empirical evidence of team-level implementation is scarce. We address this "Last Mile" Challenge through insider action research embedded within an AI startup. We present a legal-text-to-action pipeline that translates EU AI Act requirements into actionable strategies through internal expert collaboration by extracting requirements from legal text, engaging practitioners in assessment and ideation, and prioritizing implementation through collective evaluation. Our analysis reveals three patterns in how practitioners perceive regulatory requirements: convergence (compliance aligns with development priorities), existing practice (current work already satisfies requirements), and disconnection (requirements perceived as administrative overhead). Based on these patterns, we discuss when governance might be treated genuinely or performatively. Practitioners prioritize requirements that serve end-users or their own development needs, but view verification-oriented requirements as box-ticking exercises. This distinction suggests a translation challenge: regulatory requirements risk superficial treatment unless practitioners understand how compliance serves system quality and user protection. Expert collaboration offers a practical mechanism for transforming governance from external imposition to shared ownership and making previously invisible governance work visible and collective.

AI.tldr: 本文通过内部行动研究，提出了一条将欧盟AI法案法律文本转化为开发团队可执行策略的流水线，揭示了从业者对监管要求的三种感知模式（趋同、已有实践、脱节），并指出合规要求若不被理解则容易沦为表面文章，而专家协作可将治理从外部强加转变为集体共担。
AI.motivation: 解决AI治理要求在软件开发团队层面落地的"最后一公里"挑战——现有AI治理框架多停留在行业和组织层面，缺乏团队级实施的实证证据。
AI.method: 基于AI初创企业的内部行动研究（insider action research），构建了一条"法律文本到行动"的流水线：从法律文本提取要求→邀请实践者参与评估与构思→通过集体评估确定实施优先级。
AI.result: 归纳出三种从业者对监管要求的感知模式：趋同（合规与开发目标一致）、已有实践（当前工作已满足要求）、脱节（要求被视为行政负担）。从业者优先采纳有利于终端用户或自身开发需求的要求，而将验证导向的要求视为勾选框式的表面工作。
AI.conclusion: 监管要求若不被从业者理解其对系统质量和用户保护的价值，就容易沦为形式主义；专家协作能帮助将治理从外部强加转变为集体所有权，并使此前隐性的治理工作变得可见、可共享。

title: Lexicographic Minimum-Violation Motion Planning using Signal Temporal Logic
comment: Submitted to the IEEE Open Journal of Intelligent Transportation Systems (under review)
summary: Motion planning for autonomous vehicles often requires satisfying multiple conditionally conflicting specifications. In situations where not all specifications can be met simultaneously, minimum-violation motion planning maintains system operation by minimizing violations of specifications in accordance with their priorities. Signal temporal logic (STL) provides a formal language for rigorously defining these specifications and enables the quantitative evaluation of their violations. However, a total ordering of specifications yields a lexicographic optimization problem, which is typically computationally expensive to solve using standard methods. We address this problem by transforming the multi-objective lexicographic optimization problem into a single-objective scalar optimization problem using non-uniform quantization and bit-shifting. Specifically, we extend a deterministic model predictive path integral (MPPI) solver to efficiently solve optimization problems without quadratic input cost. Additionally, a novel predicate-robustness measure that combines spatial and temporal violations is introduced. Our results show that the proposed method offers an interpretable and scalable solution for lexicographic STL minimum-violation motion planning within a single-objective solver framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将词序信号时序逻辑（STL）最小违规运动规划问题转化为单目标标量优化问题的方法，通过非均匀量化和位移技术扩展了确定性模型预测路径积分（MPPI）求解器，并引入了一种结合空间和时间违规的新型谓词-鲁棒性度量。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶运动规划常需满足多个条件性冲突的规约，当无法同时满足所有规约时，最小违规运动规划按优先级最小化违规。但规约的全序排列导致词序优化问题，使用标准方法求解计算成本高昂。
AI.method: 将多目标词序优化问题通过非均匀量化和位移技术转化为单目标标量优化问题；扩展确定性MPPI求解器以高效求解无二次输入成本的优化问题；提出一种结合空间和时间违规的新型谓词-鲁棒性度量。
AI.result: 所提出方法在单目标求解器框架内为词序STL最小违规运动规划提供了可解释且可扩展的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够在不依赖传统词序优化计算负担的情况下，有效处理多优先级规约下的运动规划问题，具有可解释性和可扩展性。

title: Measure Twice, Click Once: Co-evolving Proposer and Visual Critic via Reinforcement Learning for GUI Grounding
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) grounding requires mapping natural language instructions to precise pixel coordinates. However, due to visually homogeneous elements and dense layouts, models typically grasp semantic intent yet struggle with achieving precise localization. While scaling sampling attempts (Pass@k) reveals potential gains, static self-consistency strategies derived from geometric clustering often yield limited improvements, as the model's predictions tend to be spatially dispersed. In this paper, we propose replacing static consistency strategies with a learnable selection mechanism that selects the optimal target by critiquing its own proposals rendered on the screenshot. Given the significant disparity between the model's grounding and critiquing capabilities, we propose a co-evolving Propose-then-Critic framework. To jointly optimize these, we introduce a maturity-aware adaptive co-evolutionary reinforcement learning paradigm. This approach dynamically balances the training objectives of proposer and critic, where the diversity of the proposer's outputs enhances critic robustness, while the critic's maturing discrimination capability conversely unlocks the proposer's potential for extensive spatial exploration, fostering the mutual reinforcement and co-evolution of both capabilities, thereby ensuring generalizability to adapt to diverse and complex interface layouts. Extensive experiments over 6 benchmarks show that our method significantly enhances both grounding accuracy and critic reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可学习的"提议-批评"协同进化框架，通过成熟度感知的自适应强化学习动态平衡提议器与批评器的训练，以解决GUI grounding中自然语言指令到像素坐标的精准定位难题，在6个基准上显著提升了定位精度与批评可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI grounding方法虽能理解语义意图，但因界面元素视觉同质、布局密集，难以实现精确像素定位。静态自一致性策略（如几何聚类）效果有限，模型预测呈空间分散状态，亟需一种更有效的选择机制。
AI.method: 提出Propose-then-Critic框架：(1) 用可学习的选择机制替代静态一致性策略，通过批评器对提议器生成的候选框进行渲染后评估；(2) 引入成熟度感知的自适应协同进化强化学习，动态平衡提议器（多样化输出）与批评器（判别能力提升）的训练目标，实现两者互促共进。
AI.result: 在6个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法显著提升了grounding准确率和批评器的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 可学习的批评选择机制优于静态自一致性策略；提议器输出多样性可增强批评器鲁棒性，批评器的成熟判别能力反过来释放提议器的空间探索潜力，两者协同进化提高了模型对多样化复杂界面布局的泛化能力。

title: Unbiased Prevalence Estimation with Multicalibrated LLMs
summary: Estimating the prevalence of a category in a population using imperfect measurement devices (diagnostic tests, classifiers, or large language models) is fundamental to science, public health, and online trust and safety. Standard approaches correct for known device error rates but assume these rates remain stable across populations. We show this assumption fails under covariate shift and that multicalibration, which enforces calibration conditional on the input features rather than just on average, is sufficient for unbiased prevalence estimation under such shift. Standard calibration and quantification methods fail to provide this guarantee. Our work connects recent theoretical work on fairness to a longstanding measurement problem spanning nearly all academic disciplines. A simulation confirms that standard methods exhibit bias growing with shift magnitude, while a multicalibrated estimator maintains near-zero bias. While we focus the discussion mostly on LLMs, our theoretical results apply to any classification model. Two empirical applications -- estimating employment prevalence across U.S. states using the American Community Survey, and classifying political texts across four countries using an LLM -- demonstrate that multicalibration substantially reduces bias in practice, while highlighting that calibration data should cover the key feature dimensions along which target populations may differ.

AI.tldr: 本文证明多校准（multicalibration）能在协变量偏移下实现无偏的类别 prevalence 估计，而标准校准和量化方法则会失效。通过模拟和两项实证研究（美国各州就业率估计、跨国政治文本分类）验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 标准 prevalence 估计方法假设测量设备的错误率在不同人群中保持稳定，但这一假设在协变量偏移（covariate shift）下不再成立。作者旨在解决这一长期存在于多个学科的根本性测量问题。
AI.method: 理论上证明多校准（对输入特征的逐层校准而非仅平均校准）足以在协变量偏移下提供无偏的 prevalence 估计；通过模拟实验和两项实证应用（美国社区调查的就业率估计、LLM 跨国政治文本分类）进行验证。
AI.result: 模拟显示标准方法偏差随偏移幅度增大而增长，而多校准估计器保持近零偏差；两项实证研究表明多校准在实践中大幅降低了偏差，同时发现校准数据应覆盖目标人群的关键特征维度。
AI.conclusion: 多校准为解决协变量偏移下的 prevalence 估计问题提供了理论保证和实用方法，将公平性领域的理论成果与跨学科的经典测量问题联系起来。校准数据需覆盖目标人群的关键特征维度。

title: OVPD: A Virtual-Physical Fusion Testing Dataset of OnSite Auton-omous Driving Challenge
summary: The rapid iteration of autonomous driving algorithms has created a growing demand for high-fidelity, replayable, and diagnosable testing data. However, many public datasets lack real vehicle dynamics feedback and closed-loop interaction with surrounding traffic and road infrastructure, limiting their ability to reflect deployment readiness. To address this gap, we present OVPD (OnSite Virtual-Physical Dataset), a virtual-physical fusion testing dataset released from the 2025 OnSite Autonomous Driving Challenge. Centered on real-vehicle-in-the-loop testing, OVPD integrates virtual background traffic with vehicle-infrastructure perception to build controllable and interactive closed-loop test environments on a proving ground. The dataset contains 20 testing clips from 20 teams over a scenario chain of 15 atomic scenarios, totaling nearly 3 hours of multi-modal data, including vehicle trajectories and states, control commands, and digital-twin-rendered surround-view observations. OVPD supports long-tail planning and decision-making validation, open-loop or platform-enabled closed-loop evaluation, and comprehensive assessment across safety, efficiency, comfort, rule compliance, and traffic impact, providing actionable evidence for failure diagnosis and iterative improvement. The dataset is available via: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Yuhang253820/Onsite_OPVD

AI.tldr: OVPD是一个虚实融合的自动驾驶测试数据集，包含20支队伍在15个原子场景链上的近3小时多模态数据，支持闭环交互测试与多维度评估。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集缺乏真实车辆动力学反馈和与周围交通及道路设施的闭环交互能力，难以反映自动驾驶算法的部署就绪状态，亟需高保真、可回放、可诊断的测试数据。
AI.method: 以实车在环测试为核心，将虚拟背景交通与车路感知融合，在试车场构建可控、可交互的闭环测试环境。数据集包含20个测试片段，覆盖15个原子场景链，采集车辆轨迹、状态、控制命令及数字孪生环视观测等多模态数据。
AI.result: 产出近3小时的多模态数据集，支持长尾规划决策验证、开环或平台使能的闭环评估，以及安全、效率、舒适性、规则合规性和交通影响等综合评估。
AI.conclusion: OVPD为自动驾驶算法的失败诊断和迭代改进提供了可操作的证据，弥补了虚实融合测试数据的空白。

title: Cross-Domain Data Selection and Augmentation for Automatic Compliance Detection
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. 11th Special Session on Intelligent Data Mining, 2025 IEEE International Conference on Big Data
summary: Automating the detection of regulatory compliance remains a challenging task due to the complexity and variability of legal texts. Models trained on one regulation often fail to generalise to others. This limitation underscores the need for principled methods to improve cross-domain transfer. We study data selection as a strategy to mitigate negative transfer in compliance detection framed as a natural language inference (NLI) task. Specifically, we evaluate four approaches for selecting augmentation data from a larger source domain: random sampling, Moore-Lewis's cross-entropy difference, importance weighting, and embedding-based retrieval. We systematically vary the proportion of selected data to analyse its effect on cross-domain adaptation. Our findings demonstrate that targeted data selection substantially reduces negative transfer, offering a practical path toward scalable and reliable compliance automation across heterogeneous regulations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在法规合规检测（NLI任务）中，通过数据选择策略（随机采样、交叉熵差异、重要性加权、嵌入检索）来减少负迁移，实验表明定向数据选择能显著提升跨领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 法律文本复杂多变，基于某一法规训练的模型难以泛化到其他法规，现有方法缺乏有效的跨领域迁移策略，亟需 principled 的方法来提升跨域转移效果。
AI.method: 将合规检测构建为自然语言推理（NLI）任务，从大规模源域中选择增强数据，比较四种数据选择方法：随机采样、Moore-Lewis交叉熵差异、重要性加权、基于嵌入的检索，并系统变化所选数据比例以分析其对跨域适应的影响。
AI.result: 定向数据选择能显著减少负迁移，不同选择方法和数据比例对跨域适应效果有显著影响，为跨异构法规的合规自动化提供了可行路径。
AI.conclusion: 数据选择是一种实用且有效的跨域合规检测策略，能够缓解负迁移问题，推动可扩展且可靠的合规自动化系统构建。

title: SpaCeFormer: Fast Proposal-Free Open-Vocabulary 3D Instance Segmentation
summary: Open-vocabulary 3D instance segmentation is a core capability for robotics and AR/VR, but prior methods trade one bottleneck for another: multi-stage 2D+3D pipelines aggregate foundation-model outputs at hundreds of seconds per scene, while pseudo-labeled end-to-end approaches rely on fragmented masks and external region proposals. We present SpaCeFormer, a proposal-free space-curve transformer that runs at 0.14 seconds per scene, 2-3 orders of magnitude faster than multi-stage 2D+3D pipelines. We pair it with SpaCeFormer-3M, the largest open-vocabulary 3D instance segmentation dataset (3.0M multi-view-consistent captions over 604K instances from 7.4K scenes) built through multi-view mask clustering and multi-view VLM captioning; it reaches 21x higher mask recall than prior single-view pipelines (54.3% vs 2.5% at IoU > 0.5). SpaCeFormer combines spatial window attention with Morton-curve serialization for spatially coherent features, and uses a RoPE-enhanced decoder to predict instance masks directly from learned queries without external proposals. On ScanNet200 we achieve 11.1 zero-shot mAP, a 2.8x improvement over the prior best proposal-free method; on ScanNet++ and Replica, we reach 22.9 and 24.1 mAP, surpassing all prior methods including those using multi-view 2D inputs.

AI.tldr: 提出SpaCeFormer，一种基于空间曲线Transformer的无提案开放词汇3D实例分割方法，推理速度达0.14秒/场景（比现有方法快2-3个数量级）；同时构建SpaCeFormer-3M数据集（300万标注，覆盖604K实例），在ScanNet200上零样本mAP达11.1（提升2.8倍），ScanNet++和Replica上分别达22.9和24.1 mAP，超越所有先前方法。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇3D实例分割方法存在性能瓶颈：多阶段2D+3D管线推理速度极慢（数百秒/场景），而伪标签端到端方法依赖碎片化掩码和外部区域提议，限制了分割质量与效率。
AI.method: 1) 提出SpaCeFormer：结合空间窗口注意力与Morton曲线序列化获取空间连贯特征，采用RoPE增强解码器直接从学习查询预测实例掩码（无外部提议）；2) 构建SpaCeFormer-3M数据集：通过多视图掩码聚类和多视图VLM描述生成300万多视角一致的标注（掩码召回率21倍于单视图管线）。
AI.result: 推理速度0.14秒/场景（比多阶段2D+3D管线快2-3个数量级）；SpaCeFormer-3M数据集掩码召回率54.3%（单视图仅2.5%）；ScanNet200零样本mAP 11.1（2.8x提升），ScanNet++ 22.9 mAP，Replica 24.1 mAP，超越所有先前方法包括使用多视图2D输入的方法。
AI.conclusion: SpaCeFormer实现了开放词汇3D实例分割在速度与精度上的双重突破，其无提案设计与大规模数据集构建为高效3D视觉感知提供了新范式。

title: Dynamical Priors as a Training Objective in Reinforcement Learning
comment: Supplementary material can be accessed here: https://github.com/drsukeshs/esd-rl
summary: Standard reinforcement learning (RL) optimizes policies for reward but imposes few constraints on how decisions evolve over time. As a result, policies may achieve high performance while exhibiting temporally incoherent behavior such as abrupt confidence shifts, oscillations, or degenerate inactivity. We introduce Dynamical Prior Reinforcement Learning (DP-RL), a training framework that augments policy gradient learning with an auxiliary loss derived from external state dynamics that implement evidence accumulation and hysteresis. Without modifying the reward, environment, or policy architecture, this prior shapes the temporal evolution of action probabilities during learning. Across three minimal environments, we show that dynamical priors systematically alter decision trajectories in task-dependent ways, promoting temporally structured behavior that cannot be explained by generic smoothing. These results demonstrate that training objectives alone can control the temporal geometry of decision-making in RL agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态先验强化学习（DP-RL），通过引入基于证据累积和滞后的外部状态动力学辅助损失来塑造策略梯度学习中动作概率的时间演化，在不修改奖励、环境或策略架构的情况下，促进智能体产生时间上连贯的决策行为。
AI.motivation: 标准RL优化奖励但缺乏对决策时间演化的约束，导致策略可能出现置信度突变、震荡或退化性静止等时间不连贯行为。
AI.method: 在策略梯度学习中引入基于证据累积和滞后效应的外部状态动力学辅助损失，作为训练目标的一部分来塑造动作概率的时间演化过程。
AI.result: 在三个最小化环境中，动态先验以任务依赖的方式系统性地改变了决策轨迹，促进了无法用通用平滑解释的时间结构化行为。
AI.conclusion: 仅通过训练目标即可控制RL智能体决策的时间几何特性，无需修改奖励、环境或策略架构。

title: Sparse Forcing: Native Trainable Sparse Attention for Real-time Autoregressive Diffusion Video Generation
summary: We introduce Sparse Forcing, a training-and-inference paradigm for autoregressive video diffusion models that improves long-horizon generation quality while reducing decoding latency. Sparse Forcing is motivated by an empirical observation in autoregressive diffusion rollouts: attention concentrates on a persistent subset of salient visual blocks, forming an implicit spatiotemporal memory in the KV cache, and exhibits a locally structured block-sparse pattern within sliding windows. Building on this observation, we propose a trainable native sparsity mechanism that learns to compress, preserve, and update these persistent blocks while restricting computation within each local window to a dynamically selected local neighborhood. To make the approach practical at scale for both training and inference, we further propose Persistent Block-Sparse Attention (PBSA), an efficient GPU kernel that accelerates sparse attention and memory updates for low-latency, memory-efficient decoding. Experiments show that Sparse Forcing improves the VBench score by +0.26 over Self-Forcing on 5-second text-to-video generation while delivering a 1.11-1.17x decoding speedup and 42% lower peak KV-cache footprint. The gains are more pronounced on longer-horizon rollouts, delivering improved visual quality with +0.68 and +2.74 VBench improvements, and 1.22x and 1.27x speedups on 20-second and 1-minute generations, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sparse Forcing，一种针对自回归视频扩散模型的训练-推断范式，通过利用注意力中的块稀疏模式，在降低解码延迟的同时提升长时视频生成质量。核心组件Persistent Block-Sparse Attention (PBSA) GPU内核实现了高效的稀疏注意力和内存更新，在5秒、20秒和1分钟视频生成上分别取得了1.11-1.27x的解码加速、42%的KV缓存峰值占用降低以及最高+2.74的VBench评分提升。
AI.motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型在长时生成中面临两个挑战：生成质量随步长增加而退化，以及自回归解码带来的高延迟。作者观察到自回归扩散推理中注意力集中在少数显著视觉块上，形成隐式时空记忆且呈现局部结构化块稀疏模式，因此希望利用这一特性同时提升质量和效率。
AI.method: 提出Sparse Forcing范式，包含：(1) 可训练的原生稀疏机制，学习压缩、保留和更新KV缓存中的持久块；(2) 在每个局部窗口内动态选择局部邻域进行计算；(3) Persistent Block-Sparse Attention (PBSA) GPU内核，加速稀疏注意力和内存更新，实现低延迟、低内存的解码。
AI.result: 5秒文本到视频生成：VBench评分相比Self-Forcing提升+0.26，解码速度提升1.11-1.17x，峰值KV缓存占用降低42%。20秒生成：VBench提升+0.68，1.22x加速。1分钟生成：VBench提升+2.74，1.27x加速。
AI.conclusion: Sparse Forcing在长时视频生成中同时提升了质量和效率，且优势随生成长度增加而更加显著，验证了利用自回归扩散模型中注意力稀疏模式的有效性。

title: Pre-trained LLMs Meet Sequential Recommenders: Efficient User-Centric Knowledge Distillation
comment: Accepted to ECIR 2026. 7 pages. This version of the contribution has been accepted for publication, after peer review but is not the Version of Record and does not reflect post-acceptance improvements, or any corrections. The Version of Record is available online at: http://dx.doi.org/10.1007/978-3-032-21300-6_42
summary: Sequential recommender systems have achieved significant success in modeling temporal user behavior but remain limited in capturing rich user semantics beyond interaction patterns. Large Language Models (LLMs) present opportunities to enhance user understanding with their reasoning capabilities, yet existing integration approaches create prohibitive inference costs in real time. To address these limitations, we present a novel knowledge distillation method that utilizes textual user profile generated by pre-trained LLMs into sequential recommenders without requiring LLM inference at serving time. The resulting approach maintains the inference efficiency of traditional sequential models while requiring neither architectural modifications nor LLM fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种知识蒸馏方法，将预训练LLM生成的文本用户画像知识注入序列推荐模型，在不增加推理成本、不修改架构或不微调LLM的前提下，提升用户语义理解能力。
AI.motivation: 序列推荐系统虽在建模时序行为上表现优异，但难以捕获交互模式之外丰富的用户语义信息；LLM虽有推理能力但实时推理成本过高，现有集成方法在服务时产生难以承受的推理开销。
AI.method: 利用预训练LLM生成文本形式的用户画像，通过知识蒸馏将这些语义知识注入序列推荐模型，服务时无需LLM推理，无需架构修改或LLM微调。
AI.result: 在保持传统序列模型推理效率的同时，提升了用户语义理解能力，且无需额外架构改动或LLM微调开销。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏能有效将LLM的语义知识迁移至序列推荐模型，在不牺牲推理效率的前提下增强用户建模能力，为LLM与推荐系统的实用化融合提供了一种低成本的解决方案。

title: Conditional anomaly detection with soft harmonic functions
comment: Published at IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM 2011). 10.1109/ICDM.2011.40
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of conditional anomaly detection that aims to identify data instances with an unusual response or a class label. We develop a new non-parametric approach for conditional anomaly detection based on the soft harmonic solution, with which we estimate the confidence of the label to detect anomalous mislabeling. We further regularize the solution to avoid the detection of isolated examples and examples on the boundary of the distribution support. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method on several synthetic and UCI ML datasets in detecting unusual labels when compared to several baseline approaches. We also evaluate the performance of our method on a real-world electronic health record dataset where we seek to identify unusual patient-management decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于软调和解的非参数条件异常检测方法，通过估计标签置信度来识别异常标注，并在合成数据、UCI数据集及真实电子健康记录数据上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有条件异常检测方法在处理异常标签（如误标注）时存在局限，尤其在边界样本和孤立样本的识别上表现不佳，需要一种更鲁棒的非参数方法。
AI.method: 基于软调和解（soft harmonic solution）的非参数方法，估计标签置信度以检测异常误标注，并通过正则化避免孤立样本和分布支持边界上的样本被误检。
AI.result: 在合成数据集、UCI ML基准数据集上，该方法在检测异常标签方面优于多种基线方法；在真实电子健康记录数据集的异常患者管理决策识别任务中也展现了良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于软调和解的条件异常检测方法能有效识别异常标签，且通过正则化策略提升了在边界和孤立样本上的鲁棒性，适用于医疗决策等实际场景。

title: ARFBench: Benchmarking Time Series Question Answering Ability for Software Incident Response
summary: Time series question-answering (TSQA), in which we ask natural language questions to infer and reason about properties of time series, is a promising yet underexplored capability of foundation models. In this work, we present ARFBench, a TSQA benchmark that evaluates the understanding of multimodal foundation models (FMs) on time series anomalies prevalent in software incident data. ARFBench consists of 750 questions across 142 time series and 5.38M data points from 63 production incidents sourced exclusively from internal telemetry at Datadog. We evaluate leading proprietary and open-source LLMs, VLMs, and time series FMs and observe that frontier VLMs perform markedly better than existing baselines; the leading model (GPT-5) achieves a 62.7% accuracy and 51.9% F1. We next demonstrate the promise of specialized multimodal approaches. We develop a novel TSFM + VLM hybrid prototype which we post-train on a small set of synthetic and real data that yields comparable overall F1 and accuracy with frontier models. Lastly, we find models and human domain experts exhibit complementary strengths. We define a model-expert oracle, a best-of-2 oracle selector over model and expert answers, yielding 82.8% F1 and 87.2% accuracy and establishing a new superhuman frontier for future TSQA models. The benchmark is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Datadog/ARFBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ARFBench，一个用于评估多模态基础模型在时间序列异常理解上的问答基准，包含750个问题、142个时间序列、538万数据点。实验发现前沿VLM优于现有基线（GPT-5达62.7%准确率、51.9% F1），提出的TSFM+VLM混合原型经少量训练后可达到相近性能。模型与领域专家存在互补优势，最佳选择器（模型-专家oracle）可达82.8% F1和87.2%准确率，建立新的超人基准。
AI.motivation: 时间序列问答（TSQA）是基础模型一个有前景但未被充分探索的能力，尤其是在软件异常数据领域的多模态理解方面缺乏系统评估基准。
AI.method: 构建ARFBench基准（750个问题、142个时间序列、63个生产事故），评估多种多模态基础模型（LLM、VLM、时间序列FM），并提出TSFM+VLM混合原型模型，使用少量合成和真实数据进行后训练。
AI.result: 前沿VLM表现最佳（GPT-5：62.7%准确率、51.9% F1）；提出的混合原型可接近前沿模型性能；模型与专家oracle达到82.8% F1和87.2%准确率。
AI.conclusion: ARFBench为TSQA提供了标准化评估基准，揭示了当前模型与专家能力的互补性，为未来研究方向指明了道路。

title: Benefits of Low-Cost Bio-Inspiration in the Age of Overparametrization
summary: While Central Pattern Generators (CPGs) and Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLP) are widely used paradigms in robot control, few systematic studies have been performed on the relative merits of large parameter spaces. In contexts where input and output spaces are small and performance is bounded, having more parameters to optimize may actively hinder the learning process instead of empowering it. To empirically measure this, we submit a given robot morphology, with limited proprioceptive capabilities, to controller optimization under two bio-inspired paradigms (CPGs and MLPs) with evolutionary- and reinforcement- trainer protocols. By varying parameter spaces across multiple reward functions, we observe that shallow MLPs and densely connected CPGs result in better performance when compared to deeper MLPs or Actor-Critic architectures. To account for the relationship between said performance and the number of parameters, we introduce a Parameter Impact metric which demonstrates that the additional parameters required by the reinforcement technique do not translate into better performance, thus favouring evolutionary strategies.

AI.tldr: 在机器人控制中，当输入输出空间小且性能有界时，更大的参数空间会阻碍而非促进学习。实验表明，浅层MLP和密集连接CPG优于深层MLP或Actor-Critic架构，且强化学习所需的额外参数并未带来性能提升，进化策略更具优势。
AI.motivation: CPG和MLP在机器人控制中广泛应用，但少有系统性研究探讨大参数空间在小输入输出空间和有限性能场景下的相对优劣，尤其是更多参数是否可能反而阻碍学习过程。
AI.method: 对具有有限本体感知能力的固定机器人形态，在两种生物启发范式（CPG和MLP）下，分别采用进化策略和强化学习两种训练协议进行控制器优化。通过变化参数空间和多种奖励函数进行实验比较，并引入参数影响度（Parameter Impact）指标量化参数与性能的关系。
AI.result: 浅层MLP和密集连接CPG在性能上优于深层MLP或Actor-Critic架构；强化学习引入的额外参数并未转化为更好的性能，进化策略在此场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 在小输入输出空间和性能有界的情境下，增加参数不仅无益反而有害；进化策略相比强化学习更适合此类场景，参数影响度指标有效揭示了参数数量与性能之间的非正相关关系。

title: A Probabilistic Framework for Improving Dense Object Detection in Underwater Image Data via Annealing-Based Data Augmentation
summary: Object detection models typically perform well on images captured in controlled environments with stable lighting, water clarity, and viewpoint, but their performance degrades substantially in real-world underwater settings characterized by high variability and frequent occlusions. In this work, we address these challenges by introducing a novel data augmentation framework designed to improve robustness in dense and unconstrained underwater scenes. Using the DeepFish dataset, which contains images of fish in natural environments, we first generate bounding box annotations from provided segmentation masks to construct a custom detection dataset. We then propose a pseudo-simulated annealing-based augmentation algorithm, inspired by the copy-paste strategy of Deng et al. [1], to synthesize realistic crowded fish scenarios. Our approach improves spatial diversity and object density during training, enabling better generalization to complex scenes. Experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms a baseline YOLOv10 model, particularly on a challenging test set of manually annotated images collected from live-stream footage in the Florida Keys. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of our augmentation strategy for improving detection performance in dense, real-world underwater environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪模拟退火的复制-粘贴数据增强框架，利用DeepFish数据集生成检测标注，通过合成密集鱼群场景提升YOLOv10在复杂水下环境中的目标检测鲁棒性，在佛罗里达基斯直播视频测试集上显著优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测模型在受控环境中表现良好，但在光照多变、水体浑浊、视角变化且遮挡频繁的真实水下场景中性能严重下降。亟需一种能提升模型在密集、无约束水下环境中鲁棒性的方法。
AI.method: 基于DeepFish数据集，从分割掩码生成边界框标注构建检测数据集；提出伪模拟退火增强算法（受Deng等人复制-粘贴策略启发），通过合成逼真的拥挤鱼群场景，增加训练数据的空间多样性和目标密度，改善模型对复杂场景的泛化能力。
AI.result: 该方法在YOLOv10基线模型上显著提升了检测性能，尤其在包含佛罗里达基斯直播视频手动标注图像的挑战性测试集上表现突出，验证了增强策略在密集、真实水下环境中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的伪模拟退火增强框架能有效提升水下目标检测在密集、无约束场景中的鲁棒性，为实际水下监测应用提供了可行的数据增强方案。

title: Bimanual Robot Manipulation via Multi-Agent In-Context Learning
summary: Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful reasoning engines for embodied control. In particular, In-Context Learning (ICL) enables off-the-shelf, text-only LLMs to predict robot actions without any task-specific training while preserving their generalization capabilities. Applying ICL to bimanual manipulation remains challenging, as the high-dimensional joint action space and tight inter-arm coordination constraints rapidly overwhelm standard context windows. To address this, we introduce BiCICLe (Bimanual Coordinated In-Context Learning), the first framework that enables standard LLMs to perform few-shot bimanual manipulation without fine-tuning. BiCICLe frames bimanual control as a multi-agent leader-follower problem, decoupling the action space into sequential, conditioned single-arm predictions. This naturally extends to Arms' Debate, an iterative refinement process, and to the introduction of a third LLM-as-Judge to evaluate and select the most plausible coordinated trajectories. Evaluated on 13 tasks from the TWIN benchmark, BiCICLe achieves up to 71.1% average success rate, outperforming the best training-free baseline by 6.7 percentage points and surpassing most supervised methods. We further demonstrate strong few-shot generalization on novel tasks.

AI.tldr: BiCICLe是一个无需微调即可让标准LLM通过少样本上下文学习完成双臂协调操作的框架，将双臂控制分解为多智能体主从问题，并引入双臂辩论和LLM裁判机制，在TWIN基准上达到71.1%的平均成功率，超越多数训练-free和监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM通过上下文学习（ICL）可以无需任务特定训练即预测机器人动作，但在双臂操作场景中，高维联合动作空间和紧密的臂间协调约束超出了标准LLM的上下文窗口能力，亟需一种无需微调即可处理双臂协调控制的方法。
AI.method: 将双臂控制建模为多智能体领导者-跟随者问题，解耦动作空间为顺序的、条件化的单臂预测；进一步提出"双臂辩论"（Arms' Debate）作为迭代精炼过程，并引入第三个LLM作为裁判（LLM-as-Judge）来评估和选择最合理的协调轨迹。
AI.result: 在TWIN基准的13个任务上，BiCICLe取得了高达71.1%的平均成功率，比最佳无训练基线高出6.7个百分点，并超越了大多数有监督方法；在新任务上展现了强大的少样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: BiCICLe首次证明标准LLM无需微调即可通过ICL有效解决双臂协调操作问题，其多智能体分解、辩论精炼和裁判评估机制为LLM驱动的复杂机器人控制提供了新范式。

title: SpatiO: Adaptive Test-Time Orchestration of Vision-Language Agents for Spatial Reasoning
summary: Understanding visual scenes requires not only recognizing objects but also reasoning about their spatial relationships. Unlike general vision-language tasks, spatial reasoning requires integrating multiple inductive biases, such as 2D appearance cues, depth signals, and geometric constraints, whose reliability varies across contexts. This suggests that effective spatial reasoning requires \emph{spatial adaptability}: the ability to flexibly coordinate different reasoning strategies depending on the input. However, most existing approaches rely on a single reasoning pipeline that implicitly learns a fixed spatial prior, limiting their ability to adapt under distribution changes. Multi-agent systems offer a promising alternative by aggregating diverse reasoning trajectories, but prior attempts in spatial reasoning primarily employ homogeneous agents, restricting the diversity of inductive biases they can leverage. In this work, we introduce \textbf{\textsc{SpatiO}}, a heterogeneous multi-agent framework for spatial reasoning that coordinates multiple vision-language specialists with complementary inductive biases. To enable effective collaboration, we propose \textbf{Test-Time Orchestration (TTO)}, an optimization mechanism that dynamically evaluates and reweights agents based on their observed reliability during inference, without modifying model parameters. Extensive experiments on diverse spatial reasoning benchmarks, including 3DSRBench, STVQA-7k, CV-Bench, and Omni3D-Bench, demonstrate that \textsc{SpatiO} consistently improves spatial reasoning performance over both closed-source and open-source baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出SpatiO，一个异构多智能体框架，通过测试时编排机制动态协调多个具有互补归纳偏见的视觉语言专家，在多种空间推理基准上持续提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有空间推理方法通常依赖固定推理流程，隐式学习单一空间先验，难以适应分布变化；多智能体系统虽能聚合多样化推理轨迹，但先前尝试主要使用同质智能体，限制了可利用的归纳偏见多样性。
AI.method: 提出SpatiO异构多智能体框架，协调多个具有互补归纳偏见的视觉语言专家；并提出测试时编排（TTO）机制，在推理过程中动态评估并重新加权智能体，无需修改模型参数。
AI.result: 在3DSRBench、STVQA-7k、CV-Bench、Omni3D-Bench等多个空间推理基准上，SpatiO持续优于闭源和开源基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 异构多智能体协作与测试时动态编排能够有效提升空间推理的适应性，为处理分布变化下的空间理解任务提供了可行方案。

title: A Vision-Language-Action Model for Adaptive Ultrasound-Guided Needle Insertion and Needle Tracking
summary: Ultrasound (US)-guided needle insertion is a critical yet challenging procedure due to dynamic imaging conditions and difficulties in needle visualization. Many methods have been proposed for automated needle insertion, but they often rely on hand-crafted pipelines with modular controllers, whose performance degrades in challenging cases. In this paper, a Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model is proposed for adaptive and automated US-guided needle insertion and tracking on a robotic ultrasound (RUS) system. This framework provides a unified approach to needle tracking and needle insertion control, enabling real-time, dynamically adaptive adjustment of insertion based on the obtained needle position and environment awareness. To achieve real-time and end-to-end tracking, a Cross-Depth Fusion (CDF) tracking head is proposed, integrating shallow positional and deep semantic features from the large-scale vision backbone. To adapt the pretrained vision backbone for tracking tasks, a Tracking-Conditioning (TraCon) register is introduced for parameter-efficient feature conditioning. After needle tracking, an uncertainty-aware control policy and an asynchronous VLA pipeline are presented for adaptive needle insertion control, ensuring timely decision-making for improved safety and outcomes. Extensive experiments on both needle tracking and insertion show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art trackers and manual operation, achieving higher tracking accuracy, improved insertion success rates, and reduced procedure time, highlighting promising directions for RUS-based intelligent intervention.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型的机器人超声引导下自适应针插入与跟踪框架，通过跨深度融合跟踪头、跟踪条件寄存器及不确定性感知控制策略，在针跟踪和插入任务上均超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 超声引导下针插入手术因成像条件动态变化和针可视化困难而具有挑战性，现有自动化方法依赖手工设计的模块化控制器，性能在复杂场景下退化严重。
AI.method: 1) 提出Cross-Depth Fusion (CDF)跟踪头，融合浅层位置特征与深层语义特征实现端到端实时跟踪；2) 引入Tracking-Conditioning (TraCon)寄存器对预训练视觉骨干进行参数高效特征调节；3) 设计不确定性感知控制策略与异步VLA管线实现自适应针插入控制。
AI.result: 在针跟踪和插入任务上的大量实验表明，该方法在跟踪精度、插入成功率及手术时间上均一致优于现有最佳跟踪器和人工操作。
AI.conclusion: 该VLA模型为机器人超声系统下智能干预提供了统一且高效的解决方案，展现了在智能介入治疗中的良好前景。

title: A single algorithm for both restless and rested rotting bandits
summary: In many application domains (e.g., recommender systems, intelligent tutoring systems), the rewards associated to the actions tend to decrease over time. This decay is either caused by the actions executed in the past (e.g., a user may get bored when songs of the same genre are recommended over and over) or by an external factor (e.g., content becomes outdated). These two situations can be modeled as specific instances of the rested and restless bandit settings, where arms are rotting (i.e., their value decrease over time). These problems were thought to be significantly different, since Levine et al. (2017) showed that state-of-the-art algorithms for restless bandit perform poorly in the rested rotting setting.
