  We formalize this design through a two-layer game framework: (1) a cooperative game among experts capturing super-additive value from diverse perspectives, and (2) an adversarial verification game modeling quality assurance incentives.
  Experiments on 262 real samples from the NIST Juliet Test Suite across 14 CWE types, with balanced vulnerable and benign classes, demonstrate that our approach achieves a 77.2% F1 score with 62.9% precision and 100% recall at $0.002 per sample - outperforming both a single-expert LLM baseline (F1 71.4%) and Cppcheck static analysis (MCC 0). The adversarial verifier significantly improves precision (+10.3 percentage points, p < 1e-6, McNemar's test) by filtering false positives, while parallel execution achieves a 3.0x speedup.
  Our work demonstrates that game-theoretic design principles can guide effective heterogeneous multi-agent architectures for cost-sensitive software engineering tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于博弈论启发的异构多智能体架构"3+1"，结合三个云端LLM专家（DeepSeek-V3）与一个本地轻量验证器（Qwen3-8B），在NIST Juliet测试集上以$0.002/样本的成本实现77.2% F1分数和100%召回率，显著优于单专家基线（F1 71.4%）和Cppcheck静态分析（MCC 0）。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化代码漏洞检测方法在检测精度与计算成本之间存在根本性权衡，亟需一种既能保持高精度又能控制成本的方法。
AI.method: 提出"3+1"异构多智能体架构：(1)三个云端DeepSeek-V3专家分别从代码结构、安全模式和调试逻辑三个互补视角并行分析代码；(2)本地Qwen3-8B验证器进行对抗性验证，过滤假阳性。通过双层博弈框架形式化设计：专家间的合作博弈和对抗验证博弈。
AI.result: 在262个真实NIST Juliet样本（14种CWE类型）上，F1分数77.2%，精确率62.9%，召回率100%，每个样本成本$0.002。相比单专家基线（F1 71.4%）和Cppcheck（MCC 0）显著提升。对抗验证器使精确率提升10.3个百分点（p<1e-6），并行执行实现3.0倍加速。
AI.conclusion: 博弈论设计原则能够有效指导面向成本敏感型软件工程任务的异构多智能体架构设计，在保证高召回率的同时兼顾精度与成本。

title: CSC: Turning the Adversary's Poison against Itself
summary: Poisoning-based backdoor attacks pose significant threats to deep neural networks by embedding triggers in training data, causing models to misclassify triggered inputs as adversary-specified labels while maintaining performance on clean data. Existing poison restraint-based defenses often suffer from inadequate detection against specific attack variants and compromise model utility through unlearning methods that lead to accuracy degradation. This paper conducts a comprehensive analysis of backdoor attack dynamics during model training, revealing that poisoned samples form isolated clusters in latent space early on, with triggers acting as dominant features distinct from benign ones. Leveraging these insights, we propose Cluster Segregation Concealment (CSC), a novel poison suppression defense. CSC first trains a deep neural network via standard supervised learning while segregating poisoned samples through feature extraction from early epochs, DBSCAN clustering, and identification of anomalous clusters based on class diversity and density metrics. In the concealment stage, identified poisoned samples are relabeled to a virtual class, and the model's classifier is fine-tuned using cross-entropy loss to replace the backdoor association with a benign virtual linkage, preserving overall accuracy. CSC was evaluated on four benchmark datasets against twelve poisoning-based attacks, CSC outperforms nine state-of-the-art defenses by reducing average attack success rates to near zero with minimal clean accuracy loss. Contributions include robust backdoor patterns identification, an effective concealment mechanism, and superior empirical validation, advancing trustworthy artificial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cluster Segregation Concealment (CSC)方法，通过早期特征提取、DBSCAN聚类识别异常簇，并将中毒样本重标为虚拟类以消除后门关联，在四个数据集上对十二种投毒攻击实现接近零的攻击成功率，同时保持干净准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于毒物抑制的防御方法对特定攻击变体检测不足，且通过遗忘机制会损害模型效用导致准确率下降，亟需一种既能有效抑制后门攻击又不牺牲模型性能的防御方法。
AI.method: CSC包含两个阶段：1) 隔离阶段：通过早期epoch特征提取、DBSCAN聚类及基于类别多样性和密度度量的异常簇识别，将中毒样本分离；2) 隐藏阶段：将识别出的中毒样本重标为虚拟类，使用交叉熵损失微调分类器，用良性虚拟关联替代后门关联。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上针对十二种投毒攻击的评估中，CSC优于九种最先进防御方法，将平均攻击成功率降至接近零，且干净准确率损失极小。
AI.conclusion: CSC通过鲁棒的后门模式识别和有效的隐藏机制，在抵御投毒后门攻击方面取得了优越性能，推动了可信人工智能的发展。

title: Radar Odometry Subject to High Tilt Dynamics of Subarctic Environments
summary: Rotating FMCW radar odometry methods often assume flat ground conditions. While this assumption is sufficient in many scenarios, including urban environments or flat mining setups, the highly dynamic terrain of subarctic environments poses a challenge to standard feature extraction and state estimation techniques. This paper benchmarks three existing radar odometry methods under demanding conditions, exhibiting up to 13° in pitch and 4° in roll difference between consecutive scans, with absolute pitch and roll reaching 30° and 8°, respectively. Furthermore, we propose a novel radar-inertial odometry method utilizing tilt-proximity submap search and a hard threshold for vertical displacement between scan points and the estimated axis of rotation. Experimental results demonstrate a state-of-the-art performance of our method on an urban baseline and a 0.3% improvement over the second-best comparative method on a 2-kilometer-long dynamic trajectory. Finally, we analyze the performance of the four evaluated methods on a complex radar sequence characterized by high lateral slip and a steep ditch traversal.

AI.tldr: 本文针对亚北极地区动态地形对旋转FMCW雷达里程计的挑战，基准测试了三种现有方法，并提出了一种新的雷达-惯性里程计方法，利用倾斜邻近子图搜索和垂直位移硬阈值，在动态轨迹上实现了0.3%的提升。
AI.motivation: 现有旋转FMCW雷达里程计方法通常假设平坦地面，这在城市或平坦矿区可行，但亚北极地区高度动态的地形对特征提取和状态估计构成挑战，因此需要针对此类场景进行基准测试并提出更鲁棒的方法。
AI.method: 提出一种新的雷达-惯性里程计方法，采用倾斜邻近子图搜索（tilt-proximity submap search）以及扫描点与估计旋转轴之间垂直位移的硬阈值策略。
AI.result: 在动态轨迹上，所提方法比第二优的对比方法提升0.3%；在复杂雷达序列（高侧滑和陡峭沟渠穿越）上进行了性能分析。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的雷达-惯性里程计方法在动态亚北极地形下达到了最先进性能，验证了倾斜邻近子图搜索和垂直位移硬阈值策略的有效性。

title: CLT-Optimal Parameter Error Bounds for Linear System Identification
summary: There has been remarkable progress over the past decade in establishing finite-sample, non-asymptotic bounds on recovering unknown system parameters from observed system behavior. Surprisingly, however, we show that the current state-of-the-art bounds do not accurately capture the statistical complexity of system identification, even in the most fundamental setting of estimating a discrete-time linear dynamical system (LDS) via ordinary least-squares regression (OLS). Specifically, we utilize asymptotic normality to identify classes of problem instances for which current bounds overstate the squared parameter error, in both spectral and Frobenius norm, by a factor of the state-dimension of the system. Informed by this discrepancy, we then sharpen the OLS parameter error bounds via a novel second-order decomposition of the parameter error, where crucially the lower-order term is a matrix-valued martingale that we show correctly captures the CLT scaling. From our analysis we obtain finite-sample bounds for both (i) stable systems and (ii) the many-trajectories setting that match the instance-specific optimal rates up to constant factors in Frobenius norm, and polylogarithmic state-dimension factors in spectral norm.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有有限样本系统辨识边界未能准确刻画统计复杂度，在普通最小二乘估计线性动力系统的设定中，现有边界将参数误差高估了状态维度量级。作者通过二阶分解（关键为矩阵值鞅项）改进了OLS参数误差界，在稳定系统和多轨迹设定下获得了与实例特定最优速率匹配的有限样本界。
AI.motivation: 现有关于系统辨识的有限样本、非渐近边界虽然在过去十年取得了显著进展，但作者发现这些边界未能准确反映系统辨识的统计复杂度，即使在最基本的离散时间线性动力系统（LDS）通过普通最小二乘（OLS）回归进行估计的设定下也是如此。具体来说，当前最优边界在谱范数和Frobenius范数下将平方参数误差高估了状态维度量级。
AI.method: 利用渐近正态性识别出当前边界高估参数误差的问题实例类别；提出一种新颖的二阶参数误差分解方法，其中低阶项是一个矩阵值鞅，能够正确捕捉中心极限定理（CLT）的缩放行为。
AI.result: 在稳定系统设定和多轨迹设定下，获得了在Frobenius范数下与实例特定最优速率匹配（仅差常数因子）、在谱范数下仅差多对数状态维度因子的有限样本界。
AI.conclusion: 通过二阶分解修正了现有OLS参数误差界的高估问题，得到了更紧且与最优速率匹配的有限样本保证。

title: Linear Image Generation by Synthesizing Exposure Brackets
summary: The life of a photo begins with photons striking the sensor, whose signals are passed through a sophisticated image signal processing (ISP) pipeline to produce a display-referred image. However, such images are no longer faithful to the incident light, being compressed in dynamic range and stylized by subjective preferences. In contrast, RAW images record direct sensor signals before non-linear tone mapping. After camera response curve correction and demosaicing, they can be converted into linear images, which are scene-referred representations that directly reflect true irradiance and are invariant to sensor-specific factors. Since image sensors have better dynamic range and bit depth, linear images contain richer information than display-referred ones, leaving users more room for editing during post-processing. Despite this advantage, current generative models mainly synthesize display-referred images, which inherently limits downstream editing. In this paper, we address the task of text-to-linear-image generation: synthesizing a high-quality, scene-referred linear image that preserves full dynamic range, conditioned on a text prompt, for professional post-processing. Generating linear images is challenging, as pre-trained VAEs in latent diffusion models struggle to simultaneously preserve extreme highlights and shadows due to the higher dynamic range and bit depth. To this end, we represent a linear image as a sequence of exposure brackets, each capturing a specific portion of the dynamic range, and propose a DiT-based flow-matching architecture for text-conditioned exposure bracket generation. We further demonstrate downstream applications including text-guided linear image editing and structure-conditioned generation via ControlNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于DiT的流匹配架构，通过将线性图像表示为曝光包围序列，实现文本到线性图像的生成，保留全动态范围用于专业后期处理。
AI.motivation: 当前生成模型主要合成显示参考图像，其动态范围被压缩且经过主观风格化处理，限制了后期编辑空间。线性图像作为场景参考表示，能真实反映辐照度并保留更丰富的动态范围和位深度，但现有VAE在潜扩散模型中难以同时保留极端高光和阴影信息。
AI.method: 将线性图像表示为一系列曝光包围（exposure brackets），每个包围捕获动态范围的特定部分；提出基于DiT（Diffusion Transformer）的流匹配架构，用于文本条件下的曝光包围生成。
AI.result: 成功实现了文本到线性图像的生成，保留了全动态范围，并展示了文本引导的线性图像编辑和基于ControlNet的结构条件生成等下游应用。
AI.conclusion: 线性图像生成对于专业后期处理具有重要意义，通过曝光包围表示和DiT流匹配架构可以有效解决高动态范围和位深度带来的生成挑战。

title: SemanticAgent: A Semantics-Aware Framework for Text-to-SQL Data Synthesis
summary: Existing text-to-SQL synthesis pipelines still conflate executability with semantic validity: syntactic checks and execution-based validation can retain queries that execute successfully while violating database semantics. To address these limitations, we propose SemanticAgent, a semantic-aware synthesis framework. SemanticAgent organizes synthesis around three specialized modules: an analyzer, a synthesizer, and a verifier. Through a three-stage protocol of semantic analysis, stepwise synthesis, and diagnostic refinement, SemanticAgent transforms execution-based validation alone into a traceable reasoning process. Our framework generates synthetic data that consistently outperforms prior synthesis methods under semantic-quality evaluation, leading to stronger downstream fine-tuning performance, especially on semantically demanding benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出SemanticAgent框架，通过语义分析、逐步合成和诊断精炼三阶段协议，将执行验证转化为可追踪的推理过程，解决Text-to-SQL中可执行性与语义有效性混淆的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL合成流程混淆了可执行性与语义有效性，语法检查和基于执行的验证可能会保留执行成功但违反数据库语义的查询。
AI.method: 提出SemanticAgent框架，包含三个专用模块：分析器、合成器和验证器，通过语义分析、逐步合成和诊断精炼的三阶段协议，将基于执行的验证转化为可追踪的推理过程。
AI.result: 生成的合成数据在语义质量评估中持续优于先前的合成方法，在下游微调性能上表现更强，尤其是在语义要求高的基准测试上。
AI.conclusion: SemanticAgent通过语义感知的合成框架有效解决了可执行性与语义有效性的冲突，提升了合成数据质量和下游微调性能。

title: SL(C)AMma: Simultaneous Localisation, (Calibration) and Mapping With a Magnetometer Array
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, python implementation available at https://github.com/Tedridge/SL-C-AMma, experimental data available at https://hendeby.gitlab-pages.liu.se/research/magdata/
summary: Indoor localisation techniques suffer from attenuated Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) signals and from the accumulation of unbounded drift by integration of proprioceptive sensors. Magnetic field-based Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM) reduces drift through loop closures by revisiting previously seen locations, but extended exploration of unseen areas remains challenging. Recently, magnetometer arrays have demonstrated significant benefits over single magnetometers, as they can directly estimate the odometry. However, inconsistencies between magnetometer measurements negatively affect odometry estimates and complicate loop closure detection. We propose two filtering algorithms: The first focuses on magnetic field-based SLAM using a magnetometer array (SLAMma). The second extends this to jointly estimate the magnetometer calibration parameters (SLCAMma). We demonstrate, using Monte Carlo simulations, that the calibration parameters can be accurately estimated when there is sufficient orientation excitation, and that magnetometers achieve inter-sensor measurement consistency regardless of the type of motion. Experimental validation on ten datasets confirms these results, and we demonstrate that in cases where single magnetometer SLAM fails, SLAMma and SLCAMma provide good trajectory estimates with, more than 80% drift reduction compared to integration of proprioceptive sensors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于磁传感器阵列的SLAM滤波算法（SLAMma和SLCAMma），可有效减少漂移（相比纯自主传感器积分减少80%以上），并通过蒙特卡洛仿真和十组实验数据集验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 室内定位中GNSS信号衰减，自主传感器积分导致无界漂移累积；基于单磁力计的SLAM虽能通过闭环减少漂移，但在未知区域探索时仍面临挑战；磁力计阵列虽能直接估计里程计，但传感器间测量不一致性影响估计精度和闭环检测。
AI.method: 提出两种滤波算法：SLAMma（基于磁传感器阵列的磁场SLAM）和SLCAMma（联合估计磁力计校准参数的扩展版本）。通过蒙特卡洛仿真和十组实验数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛仿真表明，在充分的方向激励下可准确估计校准参数；无论运动类型如何，磁力计阵列均可实现传感器间测量一致性。实验验证显示，在单磁力计SLAM失败的场景下，SLAMma和SLCAMma仍能提供良好的轨迹估计，相比自主传感器积分减少80%以上的漂移。
AI.conclusion: 磁传感器阵列结合所提滤波算法可有效解决室内定位中的漂移累积问题，联合校准参数估计进一步提升了系统的鲁棒性和实用性。

title: Thinking Like a Botanist: Challenging Multimodal Language Models with Intent-Driven Chain-of-Inquiry
summary: Vision evaluations are typically done through multi-step processes. In most contemporary fields, experts analyze images using structured, evidence-based adaptive questioning. In plant pathology, botanists inspect leaf images, identify visual cues, infer diagnostic intent, and probe further with targeted questions that adapt to species, symptoms, and severity. This structured probing is crucial for accurate disease diagnosis and treatment formulation. Yet current vision-language models are evaluated on single-turn question answering. To address this gap, we introduce PlantInquiryVQA, a benchmark for studying multi-step, intent-driven visual reasoning in botanical diagnosis. We formalize a Chain of Inquiry framework modeling diagnostic trajectories as ordered question-answer sequences conditioned on grounded visual cues and explicit epistemic intent. We release a dataset of 24,950 expert-curated plant images and 138,068 question-answer pairs annotated with visual grounding, severity labels, and domain-specific reasoning templates. Evaluations on top-tier Multimodal Large Language Models reveal that while they describe visual symptoms adequately, they struggle with safe clinical reasoning and accurate diagnosis. Importantly, structured question-guided inquiry significantly improves diagnostic correctness, reduces hallucination, and increases reasoning efficiency. We hope PlantInquiryVQA serves as a foundational benchmark in advancing research to train diagnostic agents to reason like expert botanists rather than static classifiers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PlantInquiryVQA基准，用于评估视觉语言模型在多步骤、意图驱动的植物病害诊断中的推理能力。通过链式查询框架和包含24,950张图片、138,068个问答对的数据集，发现顶级多模态大模型虽能描述症状，但在安全临床推理和准确诊断上表现不佳，而结构化查询引导能显著提升诊断正确率、减少幻觉并提高推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型仅在单轮问答上评估，缺乏对多步骤、意图驱动的视觉推理能力的评测。植物病理学诊断需要专家基于视觉线索进行结构化、自适应的追问，这一过程在现有基准中被忽视。
AI.method: 提出Chain of Inquiry框架，将诊断轨迹建模为基于视觉线索和显式认知意图的有序问答序列；构建包含24,950张专家筛选的植物图像和138,068个问答对的数据集，标注视觉定位、严重程度标签和领域推理模板。
AI.result: 顶级多模态大模型能描述视觉症状，但在安全临床推理和准确诊断上表现不足；结构化查询引导可显著提升诊断正确率、减少幻觉并提高推理效率。
AI.conclusion: PlantInquiryVQA可作为推动诊断智能体像植物专家而非静态分类器一样推理的基础基准。

title: UniT: Toward a Unified Physical Language for Human-to-Humanoid Policy Learning and World Modeling
summary: Scaling humanoid foundation models is bottlenecked by the scarcity of robotic data. While massive egocentric human data offers a scalable alternative, bridging the cross-embodiment chasm remains a fundamental challenge due to kinematic mismatches. We introduce UniT (Unified Latent Action Tokenizer via Visual Anchoring), a framework that establishes a unified physical language for human-to-humanoid transfer. Grounded in the philosophy that heterogeneous kinematics share universal visual consequences, UniT employs a tri-branch cross-reconstruction mechanism: actions predict vision to anchor kinematics to physical outcomes, while vision reconstructs actions to filter out irrelevant visual confounders. Concurrently, a fusion branch synergies these purified modalities into a shared discrete latent space of embodiment-agnostic physical intents. We validate UniT across two paradigms: 1) Policy Learning (VLA-UniT): By predicting these unified tokens, it effectively leverages diverse human data to achieve state-of-the-art data efficiency and robust out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization on both humanoid simulation benchmark and real-world deployments, notably demonstrating zero-shot task transfer. 2) World Modeling (WM-UniT): By aligning cross-embodiment dynamics via unified tokens as conditions, it realizes direct human-to-humanoid action transfer. This alignment ensures that human data seamlessly translates into enhanced action controllability for humanoid video generation. Ultimately, by inducing a highly aligned cross-embodiment representation (empirically verified by t-SNE visualizations revealing the convergence of human and humanoid features into a shared manifold), UniT offers a scalable path to distill vast human knowledge into general-purpose humanoid capabilities.

AI.tldr: UniT通过视觉锚定的统一潜在动作分词器，将人类数据转化为与具体形态无关的物理意图，实现从人类到人形机器人的跨形态知识迁移，在策略学习和世界建模两个范式下均取得了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人基础模型受限于机器人数据的稀缺性，而海量人类第一人称数据虽可作为替代，但跨形态运动学差异构成根本性挑战。因此，需要一种统一框架弥合人类与人形机器人之间的具身鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出UniT框架，包含三分支交叉重构机制：(1) 动作预测视觉分支，将动作锚定到物理结果；(2) 视觉重构动作分支，过滤视觉干扰；(3) 融合分支将纯化后的模态对齐到共享离散潜在空间。支持策略学习(VLA-UniT)和世界建模(WM-UniT)两种范式。
AI.result: 在策略学习范式中，实现了SOTA数据效率和鲁棒OOD泛化，展示了零样本任务迁移能力。在世界建模范式中，实现了直接的人到人形机器人动作迁移，提升了人形机器人视频生成的动作可控性。t-SNE可视化验证了人类与人形机器人特征在共享流形上收敛。
AI.conclusion: UniT通过跨形态对齐表征为将海量人类知识蒸馏为通用人形机器人能力提供了一条可扩展的路径。

title: Calibeating Prediction-Powered Inference
summary: We study semisupervised mean estimation with a small labeled sample, a large unlabeled sample, and a black-box prediction model whose output may be miscalibrated. A standard approach in this setting is augmented inverse-probability weighting (AIPW) [Robins et al., 1994], which protects against prediction-model misspecification but can be inefficient when the prediction score is poorly aligned with the outcome scale. We introduce Calibrated Prediction-Powered Inference, which post-hoc calibrates the prediction score on the labeled sample before using it for semisupervised estimation. This simple step requires no retraining and can improve the original score both as a predictor of the outcome and as a regression adjustment for semisupervised inference. We study both linear and isotonic calibration. For isotonic calibration, we establish first-order optimality guarantees: isotonic post-processing can improve predictive accuracy and estimator efficiency relative to the original score and simpler post-processing rules, while no further post-processing of the fitted isotonic score yields additional first-order gains. For linear calibration, we show first-order equivalence to PPI++. We also clarify the relationship among existing estimators, showing that the original PPI estimator is a special case of AIPW and can be inefficient when the prediction model is accurate, while PPI++ is AIPW with empirical efficiency maximization [Rubin et al., 2008]. In simulations and real-data experiments, our calibrated estimators often outperform PPI and are competitive with, or outperform, AIPW and PPI++. We provide an accompanying Python package, ppi_aipw, at https://larsvanderlaan.github.io/ppi-aipw/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出校准预测驱动推断（Calibrated Prediction-Powered Inference）方法，通过在小标注样本上对黑箱预测模型进行事后校准（保序或线性校准），然后用于半监督均值估计。该方法无需重新训练，在预测精度和估计效率上均优于原始预测分，且与AIPW和PPI++方法具有理论联系。保序校准具有一阶最优性保证。
AI.motivation: 标准半监督均值估计方法（如AIPW）虽能抵御预测模型设定错误，但当预测分与结果变量尺度对齐不佳时效率较低。现有PPI方法也存在类似问题。因此需要一种能提升预测分与结果对齐程度、从而提高估计效率的简单后处理方法。
AI.method: 在小标注样本上对黑箱预测模型的输出进行事后校准（线性校准或保序校准），然后将校准后的预测分用于半监督均值估计（AIPW框架）。保序校准通过非参数单调变换优化预测分与结果的对齐；线性校准则通过线性变换实现类似效果。
AI.result: 保序校准具有一阶最优性：其预测精度和估计效率无法通过进一步后处理来提升。线性校准在理论上与PPI++一阶等价。实验表明校准估计器通常优于PPI，与AIPW和PPI++相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种简单有效的半监督均值估计改进方法——事后校准预测分，无需重新训练即可提升效率。理论上厘清了PPI、PPI++、AIPW之间的关系（PPI是AIPW特例，PPI++是经验效率最大化的AIPW），并提供了开源Python包。

title: PanGuide3D: Cohort-Robust Pancreas Tumor Segmentation via Probabilistic Pancreas Conditioning and a Transformer Bottleneck
summary: Pancreatic tumor segmentation in contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) is clinically important yet technically challenging: lesions are often small, heterogeneous, and easily confused with surrounding soft tissue, and models that perform well on one cohort frequently degrade under cohort shift. Our goal is to improve cross-cohort generalization while keeping the model architecture simple, efficient, and practical for 3D CT segmentation. We introduce PanGuide3D, a cohort-robust architecture with a shared 3D encoder, a pancreas decoder that predicts a probabilistic pancreas map, and a tumor decoder that is explicitly conditioned on this pancreas probability at multiple scales via differentiable soft gating. To capture long-range context under distribution shift, we further add a lightweight Transformer bottleneck in the U-Net bottleneck representation. We evaluate cohort transfer by training on the PanTS (Pancreatic Tumor Segmentation) cohort and testing both in-cohort (PanTS) and out-of-cohort on MSD (Medical Segmentation Decathlon) Task07 Pancreas, using matched preprocessing and training protocols across strong baselines. We collect voxel-level segmentation metrics, patient-level tumor detection, subgroup analyses by tumor size and anatomical location, volume-conditioned performance analyses, and calibration measurements to assess reliability. Across the evaluated models, PanGuide3D achieves the best overall tumor performance and shows improved cross-cohort generalization, particularly for small tumors and challenging anatomical locations, while reducing anatomically implausible false positives. These findings support probabilistic anatomical conditioning as a practical strategy for improving cross-cohort robustness in an end-to-end model and suggest potential utility for contouring support, treatment planning, and multi-institutional studies.

AI.tldr: PanGuide3D是一个基于U-Net的3D胰腺肿瘤分割架构，通过共享编码器、概率性胰腺解剖图条件化门控机制和轻量Transformer瓶颈层，在保持模型简练高效的同时，提升了跨队列泛化能力，尤其在小肿瘤和困难解剖区域表现优异。
AI.motivation: 胰腺肿瘤在增强CT中分割具有临床重要性但技术挑战大：病灶小、异质性强、易与周围软组织混淆，且模型在不同数据队列间泛化能力差。目标是在保持架构简单高效实用的前提下，提升跨队列泛化性能。
AI.method: 提出PanGuide3D架构：共享3D编码器；胰腺解码器生成概率性胰腺图；肿瘤解码器通过可微软门控机制在多个尺度上显式条件化于胰腺概率；在U-Net瓶颈处添加轻量Transformer瓶颈以捕获分布偏移下的长程上下文。
AI.result: 在PanTS队列内测试和跨队列（MSD Task07）测试中，PanGuide3D在体素级分割指标、患者级肿瘤检测、亚组分析（按肿瘤大小和解剖位置）、体积条件性能分析及校准度量上均达到最佳整体肿瘤分割性能，跨队列泛化提升显著，尤其对小肿瘤和困难解剖位置，且减少了解剖上不合理的假阳性。
AI.conclusion: 概率性解剖条件化是一种实用的端到端跨队列鲁棒性改进策略，有望用于轮廓勾画辅助、治疗计划和多中心研究。

title: VLA Foundry: A Unified Framework for Training Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: We present VLA Foundry, an open-source framework that unifies LLM, VLM, and VLA training in a single codebase. Most open-source VLA efforts specialize on the action training stage, often stitching together incompatible pretraining pipelines. VLA Foundry instead provides a shared training stack with end-to-end control, from language pretraining to action-expert fine-tuning. VLA Foundry supports both from-scratch training and pretrained backbones from Hugging Face. To demonstrate the utility of our framework, we train and release two types of models: the first trained fully from scratch through our LLM-->VLM-->VLA pipeline and the second built on the pretrained Qwen3-VL backbone. We evaluate closed-loop policy performance of both models on LBM Eval, an open-data, open-source simulator. We also contribute usability improvements to the simulator and the STEP analysis tools for easier public use. In the nominal evaluation setting, our fully-open from-scratch model is on par with our prior closed-source work and substituting in the Qwen3-VL backbone leads to a strong multi-task table top manipulation policy outperforming our baseline by a wide margin. The VLA Foundry codebase is available at https://github.com/TRI-ML/vla_foundry and all multi-task model weights are released on https://huggingface.co/collections/TRI-ML/vla-foundry. Additional qualitative videos are available on the project website https://tri-ml.github.io/vla_foundry.

AI.tldr: VLA Foundry 是一个开源框架，在单一代码库中统一了 LLM、VLM 和 VLA 的训练流程，支持从零训练和基于 Hugging Face 预训练骨干的微调，并发布了两种模型，在 LBM Eval 模拟器上的评估表明其性能优于基线。
AI.motivation: 现有开源 VLA 工作通常仅专注于动作训练阶段，且拼接不兼容的预训练流程，缺乏端到端的统一训练框架。
AI.method: 提出 VLA Foundry 统一框架，提供从语言预训练到动作专家微调的共享训练栈，支持从零训练和 Hugging Face 预训练骨干；训练了从零训练模型和基于 Qwen3-VL 骨干的模型；改进了 LBM Eval 模拟器和 STEP 分析工具。
AI.result: 从零训练的模型与先前闭源工作持平，基于 Qwen3-VL 骨干的模型在多任务桌面操作策略上大幅超越基线。
AI.conclusion: VLA Foundry 提供了一个高效、统一的 VLA 训练框架，验证了端到端训练流程的有效性，并开源了代码和模型权重以促进社区发展。

title: Hyperloop Transformers
summary: LLM architecture research generally aims to maximize model quality subject to fixed compute/latency budgets. However, many applications of interest such as edge and on-device deployment are further constrained by the model's memory footprint, thus motivating parameter-efficient architectures for language modeling. This paper describes a simple architecture that improves the parameter-efficiency of LLMs. Our architecture makes use of looped Transformers as a core primitive, which reuse Transformer layers across depth and are thus more parameter-efficient than ordinary (depth-matched) Transformers. We organize the looped Transformer into three blocks--begin, middle, and end blocks--where each block itself consists of multiple Transformer layers, and only the middle block is applied recurrently across depth. We augment the looped middle block with hyper-connections (Xie et al., 2026), which expand the residual stream into matrix-valued residual streams. Hyper-connections are applied only after each loop, and therefore add minimal new parameters and compute cost. Across various model scales, we find that our Hyper-Connected Looped Transformer (Hyperloop Transformer) is able to outperform depth-matched Transformer and mHC Transformer baselines despite using approximately 50% fewer parameters. The outperformance persists through post-training weight quantization, thus positioning Hyperloop Transformers as an attractive architecture for memory-efficient language modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hyperloop Transformer架构，通过循环Transformer层（仅中间块循环）和超连接（Hyper-connections）技术，在参数量减少约50%的情况下，性能超越同等深度的标准Transformer和mHC Transformer基线模型，且优势在量化后依然保持。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM架构研究主要关注在固定计算/延迟预算下最大化模型质量，但边缘和端侧部署场景还受限于内存占用，因此需要参数高效的架构设计。
AI.method: 将循环Transformer组织为三块结构（开始块、中间块、结束块），仅中间块循环复用；在每次循环后引入超连接（Hyper-connections），将残差流扩展为矩阵值残差流，以极少的参数和计算开销提升表现。
AI.result: 在多种模型规模下，Hyperloop Transformer使用约50%更少的参数，性能超越深度匹配的标准Transformer和mHC Transformer基线；该优势在权重量化后仍持续存在。
AI.conclusion: Hyperloop Transformer是一种有吸引力的内存高效语言建模架构，适合内存受限的边缘和端侧部署场景。

title: DeVI: Physics-based Dexterous Human-Object Interaction via Synthetic Video Imitation
summary: Recent advances in video generative models enable the synthesis of realistic human-object interaction videos across a wide range of scenarios and object categories, including complex dexterous manipulations that are difficult to capture with motion capture systems. While the rich interaction knowledge embedded in these synthetic videos holds strong potential for motion planning in dexterous robotic manipulation, their limited physical fidelity and purely 2D nature make them difficult to use directly as imitation targets in physics-based character control. We present DeVI (Dexterous Video Imitation), a novel framework that leverages text-conditioned synthetic videos to enable physically plausible dexterous agent control for interacting with unseen target objects. To overcome the imprecision of generative 2D cues, we introduce a hybrid tracking reward that integrates 3D human tracking with robust 2D object tracking. Unlike methods relying on high-quality 3D kinematic demonstrations, DeVI requires only the generated video, enabling zero-shot generalization across diverse objects and interaction types. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DeVI outperforms existing approaches that imitate 3D human-object interaction demonstrations, particularly in modeling dexterous hand-object interactions. We further validate the effectiveness of DeVI in multi-object scenes and text-driven action diversity, showcasing the advantage of using video as an HOI-aware motion planner.

AI.tldr: DeVI是一种利用文本条件合成视频实现物理合理的灵巧智能体控制框架，通过混合跟踪奖励克服生成式2D线索的不精确性，无需高质量3D运动学演示即可实现零样本泛化，在灵巧手-物体交互建模上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 视频生成模型可合成逼真的人-物体交互视频，包含丰富的灵巧操作知识，但受限于物理保真度低和纯2D性质，难以直接用于物理角色控制。现有方法依赖高质量3D运动学演示，获取成本高。因此需要一种能利用合成视频实现物理合理灵巧控制的框架。
AI.method: 提出DeVI框架，核心是混合跟踪奖励：结合3D人体跟踪与鲁棒的2D物体跟踪，以克服生成式2D线索的不精确性。仅需生成视频作为输入，无需3D运动学演示，实现零样本泛化。
AI.result: 实验表明DeVI在灵巧手-物体交互建模上优于现有模仿3D人-物交互演示的方法，并在多物体场景和文本驱动的动作多样性上进一步验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: DeVI展示了将视频作为HOI感知运动规划器的优势，为无需昂贵3D数据即可实现物理合理的灵巧操作控制提供了可行方案。

title: Mask World Model: Predicting What Matters for Robust Robot Policy Learning
summary: World models derived from large-scale video generative pre-training have emerged as a promising paradigm for generalist robot policy learning. However, standard approaches often focus on high-fidelity RGB video prediction, this can result in overfitting to irrelevant factors, such as dynamic backgrounds and illumination changes. These distractions reduce the model's ability to generalize, ultimately leading to unreliable and fragile control policies. To address this, we introduce the Mask World Model (MWM), which leverages video diffusion architectures to predict the evolution of semantic masks instead of pixels. This shift imposes a geometric information bottleneck, forcing the model to capture essential physical dynamics and contact relations while filtering out visual noise. We seamlessly integrate this mask dynamics backbone with a diffusion-based policy head to enable robust end-to-end control. Extensive evaluations demonstrate the superiority of MWM on the LIBERO and RLBench simulation benchmarks, significantly outperforming the state-of-the-art RGB-based world models. Furthermore, real-world experiments and robustness evaluation (via random token pruning) reveal that MWM exhibits superior generalization capabilities and robust resilience to texture information loss.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mask World Model (MWM)，通过预测语义掩码而非RGB像素的视频扩散架构，实现机器人策略学习的鲁棒泛化，在LIBERO和RLBench基准上显著优于现有RGB世界模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视频生成预训练的世界模型过度关注高保真RGB视频预测，容易过拟合动态背景和光照变化等无关因素，导致策略泛化能力差、控制策略不可靠且脆弱。
AI.method: MWM利用视频扩散架构预测语义掩码的动态演化，通过几何信息瓶颈过滤视觉噪声、捕获关键物理动态和接触关系，并集成扩散策略头实现端到端控制。
AI.result: 在LIBERO和RLBench仿真基准上显著超越最先进的RGB世界模型；真实世界实验和随机token剪枝鲁棒性评估表明MWM具有优越的泛化能力和对纹理信息丢失的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 从预测像素转向预测语义掩码的世界模型能有效提升机器人策略学习的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为通用机器人策略学习提供了新范式。

title: Improving Performance in Classification Tasks with LCEN and the Weighted Focal Differentiable MCC Loss
summary: The LASSO-Clip-EN (LCEN) algorithm was previously introduced for nonlinear, interpretable feature selection and machine learning. However, its design and use was limited to regression tasks. In this work, we create a modified version of the LCEN algorithm that is suitable for classification tasks and maintains its desirable properties, such as interpretability. This modified LCEN algorithm is evaluated on four widely used binary and multiclass classification datasets. In these experiments, LCEN is compared against 10 other model types and consistently reaches high test-set macro F$_1$ score and Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC) metrics, higher than that of the majority of investigated models. LCEN models for classification remain sparse, eliminating an average of 56% of all input features in the experiments performed. Furthermore, LCEN-selected features are used to retrain all models using the same data, leading to statistically significant performance improvements in three of the experiments and insignificant differences in the fourth when compared to using all features or other feature selection methods. Simultaneously, the weighted focal differentiable MCC (diffMCC) loss function is evaluated on the same datasets. Models trained with the diffMCC loss function are always the best-performing methods in these experiments, and reach test-set macro F$_1$ scores that are, on average, 4.9% higher and MCCs that are 8.5% higher than those obtained by models trained with the weighted cross-entropy loss. These results highlight the performance of LCEN as a feature selection and machine learning algorithm also for classification tasks, and how the diffMCC loss function can train very accurate models, surpassing the weighted cross-entropy loss in the tasks investigated.

AI.tldr: 本文针对分类任务改进了LASSO-Clip-EN (LCEN)算法，使其具备非线性可解释特征选择与机器学习能力。在四个二分类/多分类数据集上与10种模型对比，LCEN在macro F1和MCC指标上优于多数模型，平均消除56%特征。用LCEN选择特征重新训练模型，在三个实验中显著提升性能。同时，diffMCC损失函数训练的模型比加权交叉熵在F1上平均高4.9%，MCC高8.5%。
AI.motivation: 原LCEN算法仅适用于回归任务，缺乏面向分类任务的非线性可解释特征选择与机器学习方法。
AI.method: 对LCEN算法进行修改使其适配分类任务，并在四个二分类/多分类数据集上对比10种模型进行评估；同时引入加权焦点可微MCC (diffMCC)损失函数进行对比实验。
AI.result: LCEN在macro F1和MCC上优于多数对比模型，平均消除56%输入特征；使用LCEN选择特征重新训练在三个实验中显著提升性能。diffMCC损失函数在所有数据集上均为最优，F1平均提升4.9%，MCC平均提升8.5%。
AI.conclusion: LCEN可有效应用于分类任务，兼具特征选择与机器学习能力；diffMCC损失函数训练的模型准确度显著优于加权交叉熵损失。

title: FedSIR: Spectral Client Identification and Relabeling for Federated Learning with Noisy Labels
comment: Accepted at the 5th Workshop on Federated Learning for Computer Vision (FedVision), CVPR 2026. Sina Gholami and Abdulmoneam Ali contributed equally
summary:
Federated learning (FL) enables collaborative model training without sharing raw data; however, the presence of noisy labels across distributed clients can severely degrade the learning performance. In this paper, we propose FedSIR, a multi-stage framework for robust FL under noisy labels. Different from existing approaches that mainly rely on designing noise-tolerant loss functions or exploiting loss dynamics during training, our method leverages the spectral structure of client feature representations to identify and mitigate label noise.
  Our framework consists of three key components. First, we identify clean and noisy clients by analyzing the spectral consistency of class-wise feature subspaces with minimal communication overhead. Second, clean clients provide spectral references that enable noisy clients to relabel potentially corrupted samples using both dominant class directions and residual subspaces. Third, we employ a noise-aware training strategy that integrates logit-adjusted loss, knowledge distillation, and distance-aware aggregation to further stabilize federated optimization. Extensive experiments on standard FL benchmarks demonstrate that FedSIR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods for FL with noisy labels. The code is available at https://github.com/sinagh72/FedSIR.

AI.tldr: FedSIR提出了一种基于特征谱结构的多阶段联邦学习框架，通过分析客户端特征子空间的谱一致性来识别噪声标签，并结合谱参考重标记、噪声感知训练等策略，在联邦学习噪声标签场景下显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中分布式客户端的噪声标签会严重降低模型性能，现有方法主要依赖设计噪声容忍损失函数或利用训练过程中的损失动态，但这些方法在异构和高度噪声场景下效果有限。
AI.method: 三阶段框架：(1) 通过分析类级特征子空间的谱一致性识别干净/噪声客户端；(2) 利用干净客户端的谱参考，结合主类方向和残差子空间对噪声样本重标记；(3) 采用噪声感知训练策略，整合logit-adjusted损失、知识蒸馏和距离感知聚合。
AI.result: 在标准FL基准测试上，FedSIR一致优于联邦学习噪声标签场景下的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于特征谱结构的方法是应对联邦学习噪声标签问题的有效新范式，代码已开源。

title: Conjecture and Inquiry: Quantifying Software Performance Requirements via Interactive Retrieval-Augmented Preference Elicitation
summary: Since software performance requirements are documented in natural language, quantifying them into mathematical forms is essential for software engineering. Yet, the vagueness in performance requirements and uncertainty of human cognition have caused highly uncertain ambiguity in the interpretations, rendering their automated quantification an unaddressed and challenging problem. In this paper, we formalize the problem and propose IRAP, an approach that quantifies performance requirements into mathematical functions via interactive retrieval-augmented preference elicitation. IRAP differs from the others in that it explicitly derives from problem-specific knowledge to retrieve and reason the preferences, which also guides the progressive interaction with stakeholders, while reducing the cognitive overhead. Experiment results against 10 state-of-the-art methods on four real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of IRAP on all cases with up to 40x improvements under as few as five rounds of interactions.

AI.tldr: IRAP是一种通过交互式检索增强偏好引导的方法，将自然语言描述的性能需求自动量化为数学函数，在10个SOTA方法和4个真实数据集上表现优异，仅需5轮交互即可实现高达40倍的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 软件性能需求以自然语言文档记录，需量化为数学形式以用于软件工程。然而，性能需求中的模糊性和人类认知的不确定性导致高度不确定的歧义，使得自动化量化成为一个尚未解决且极具挑战的问题。
AI.method: IRAP通过交互式检索增强偏好引导（retrieval-augmented preference elicitation）来量化性能需求。它从问题特定知识中显式推导、检索和推理偏好，并以此指导与利益相关者的渐进式交互，同时降低认知负担。
AI.result: 在4个真实数据集上对10种SOTA方法的实验表明，IRAP在所有案例中均表现优越，仅需5轮交互即可实现高达40倍的改进。
AI.conclusion: IRAP能够有效解决性能需求量化中的模糊性问题，通过交互式检索增强偏好引导实现了高效、自动化的量化，显著优于现有方法。

title: Learning Hybrid-Control Policies for High-Precision In-Contact Manipulation Under Uncertainty
summary: Reinforcement learning-based control policies have been frequently demonstrated to be more effective than analytical techniques for many manipulation tasks. Commonly, these methods learn neural control policies that predict end-effector pose changes directly from observed state information. For tasks like inserting delicate connectors which induce force constraints, pose-based policies have limited explicit control over force and rely on carefully tuned low-level controllers to avoid executing damaging actions. In this work, we present hybrid position-force control policies that learn to dynamically select when to use force or position control in each control dimension. To improve learning efficiency of these policies, we introduce Mode-Aware Training for Contact Handling (MATCH) which adjusts policy action probabilities to explicitly mirror the mode selection behavior in hybrid control. We validate MATCH's learned policy effectiveness using fragile peg-in-hole tasks under extreme localization uncertainty. We find MATCH substantially outperforms pose-control policies -- solving these tasks with up to 10% higher success rates and 5x fewer peg breaks than pose-only policies under common types of state estimation error. MATCH also demonstrates data efficiency equal to pose-control policies, despite learning in a larger and more complex action space. In over 1600 sim-to-real experiments, we find MATCH succeeds twice as often as pose policies in high noise settings (33% vs.~68%) and applies ~30% less force on average compared to variable impedance policies on a Franka FR3 in laboratory conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出混合位置-力控制策略MATCH，通过学习在控制维度上动态选择力或位置控制，在脆弱插针任务中相比纯位姿策略成功率提高10%、断针减少5倍，并在模拟到现实实验中力施加减少30%。
AI.motivation: 基于强化学习的位姿控制策略在涉及力约束的精密插接任务中缺乏对力的显式控制，依赖精心调参的低层控制器以避免破坏性动作，因此需要一种能显式学习力与位置混合控制策略的方法。
AI.method: 提出混合位置-力控制策略，通过Mode-Aware Training for Contact Handling (MATCH) 调整策略动作概率以显式反映混合控制中的模式选择行为，从而提升学习效率。
AI.result: 在极端定位不确定性的脆弱插针任务中，MATCH相比纯位姿策略成功率提高10%、断针减少5倍；数据效率与位姿策略相当；在1600+次模拟到现实实验中，高噪声场景成功率从33%提升至68%，平均施力比可变阻抗策略减少约30%。
AI.conclusion: 混合位置-力控制策略MATCH在力约束精密操作任务中显著优于纯位姿控制和可变阻抗策略，兼具高成功率和低破坏力，且数据效率良好。

title: CAP: Controllable Alignment Prompting for Unlearning in LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) trained on unfiltered corpora inherently risk retaining sensitive information, necessitating selective knowledge unlearning for regulatory compliance and ethical safety. However, existing parameter-modifying methods face fundamental limitations: high computational costs, uncontrollable forgetting boundaries, and strict dependency on model weight access. These constraints render them impractical for closed-source models, yet current non-invasive alternatives remain unsystematic and reliant on empirical experience. To address these challenges, we propose the Controllable Alignment Prompting for Unlearning (CAP) framework, an end-to-end prompt-driven unlearning paradigm. CAP decouples unlearning into a learnable prompt optimization process via reinforcement learning, where a prompt generator collaborates with the LLM to suppress target knowledge while preserving general capabilities selectively. This approach enables reversible knowledge restoration through prompt revocation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CAP achieves precise, controllable unlearning without updating model parameters, establishing a dynamic alignment mechanism that overcomes the transferability limitations of prior methods.

AI.tldr: 提出CAP框架，通过强化学习优化可学习提示词，在不修改模型参数的情况下实现对特定知识的可控遗忘，并支持逆向恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有参数修改型遗忘方法计算成本高、遗忘边界不可控、依赖模型权重访问，不适用于闭源模型；非侵入式方法缺乏系统性，依赖经验。
AI.method: 将遗忘任务解耦为基于强化学习的可学习提示优化过程，提示生成器与LLM协作压制目标知识同时保持通用能力，通过撤销提示实现知识恢复。
AI.result: 实验证明CAP无需更新模型参数即可实现精确、可控的知识遗忘，建立了超越先前方法可迁移性限制的动态对齐机制。
AI.conclusion: CAP作为一种端到端的提示驱动遗忘范式，实现了对闭源模型也适用的可控知识遗忘，并支持可逆的知识恢复。

title: Global Offshore Wind Infrastructure: Deployment and Operational Dynamics from Dense Sentinel-1 Time Series
summary: The offshore wind energy sector is expanding rapidly, increasing the need for independent, high-temporal-resolution monitoring of infrastructure deployment and operation at global scale. While Earth Observation based offshore wind infrastructure mapping has matured for spatial localization, existing open datasets lack temporally dense and semantically fine-grained information on construction and operational dynamics. We introduce a global Sentinel-1 synthetic aperture radar (SAR) time series data corpus that resolves deployment and operational phases of offshore wind infrastructure from 2016Q1 to 2025Q1. Building on an updated object detection workflow, we compile 15,606 time series at detected infrastructure locations, with overall 14,840,637 events as analysis-ready 1D SAR backscatter profiles, one profile per Sentinel-1 acquisition and location. To enable direct use and benchmarking, we release (i) the analysis ready 1D SAR profiles, (ii) event-level baseline semantic labels generated by a rule-based classifier, and (iii) an expert-annotated benchmark dataset of 553 time series with 328,657 event labels. The baseline classifier achieves a macro F1 score of 0.84 in event-wise evaluation and an area under the collapsed edit similarity-quality threshold curve (AUC) of 0.785, indicating temporal coherence. We demonstrate that the resulting corpus supports global-scale analyses of deployment dynamics, the identification of differences in regional deployment patterns, vessel interactions, and operational events, and provides a reference for developing and comparing time series classification methods for offshore wind infrastructure monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个基于 Sentinel-1 SAR 时序数据的全球海上风电基础设施监测数据集（2016Q1-2025Q1），包含15,606条时序、14,840,637个事件标签，并提供规则基线分类器（macro F1=0.84, AUC=0.785）及专家标注基准数据集，支持全球部署动态分析、区域模式识别及时间序列分类方法对比。
AI.motivation: 海上风电快速扩张需要独立、高时间分辨率的全球基础设施监测，但现有开放数据集缺乏时间密集且语义细粒度的施工与运营动态信息。
AI.method: 基于 Sentinel-1 SAR 影像，更新目标检测工作流，在检测到的基础设施位置提取1D SAR后向散射时间序列（15,606条时序，14,840,637个事件），结合规则分类器生成基线语义标签，并构建专家标注基准数据集（553条时序，328,657个事件标签）。
AI.result: 规则基线分类器在事件级评估中 macro F1=0.84，时间一致性评估中 AUC=0.785。
AI.conclusion: 该数据语料库支持全球尺度部署动态分析、区域部署模式差异识别、船舶交互及运行事件监测，并为海上风电基础设施监测的时间序列分类方法开发与比较提供参考基准。

title: VLAA-GUI: Knowing When to Stop, Recover, and Search, A Modular Framework for GUI Automation
comment: The first two authors contribute equally
summary: Autonomous GUI agents face two fundamental challenges: early stopping, where agents prematurely declare success without verifiable evidence, and repetitive loops, where agents cycle through the same failing actions without recovery. We present VLAA-GUI, a modular GUI agentic framework built around three integrated components that guide the system on when to Stop, Recover, and Search. First, a mandatory Completeness Verifier enforces UI-observable success criteria and verification at every finish step -- with an agent-level verifier that cross-examines completion claims with decision rules, rejecting those lacking direct visual evidence. Second, a mandatory Loop Breaker provides multi-tier filtering: switching interaction mode after repeated failures, forcing strategy changes after persistent screen-state recurrence, and binding reflection signals to strategy shifts. Third, an on-demand Search Agent searches online for unfamiliar workflows by directly querying a capable LLM with search ability, returning results as plain text. We additionally integrate a Coding Agent for code-intensive actions and a Grounding Agent for precise action grounding, both invoked on demand when required. We evaluate VLAA-GUI across five top-tier backbones, including Opus 4.5, 4.6 and Gemini 3.1 Pro, on two benchmarks with Linux and Windows tasks, achieving top performance on both (77.5% on OSWorld and 61.0% on WindowsAgentArena). Notably, three of the five backbones surpass human performance (72.4%) on OSWorld in a single pass. Ablation studies show that all three proposed components consistently improve a strong backbone, while a weaker backbone benefits more from these tools when the step budget is sufficient. Further analysis also shows that the Loop Breaker nearly halves wasted steps for loop-prone models.

AI.tldr: VLAA-GUI是一个模块化GUI智能体框架，通过三个核心组件（Completeness Verifier、Loop Breaker、Search Agent）解决自主GUI智能体的早期停止和重复循环问题，在OSWorld和WindowsAgentArena基准测试中达到SOTA性能（77.5%和61.0%），其中三个骨干模型在OSWorld上单次运行超越人类表现（72.4%）。
AI.motivation: 解决自主GUI智能体面临的两个根本性挑战：早期停止（智能体在缺乏可验证证据的情况下过早宣布成功）和重复循环（智能体反复执行相同失败动作而无法恢复）。
AI.method: 提出VLAA-GUI模块化框架，包含三个集成组件：1) Completeness Verifier（完整性验证器）：在每个完成步骤强制执行UI可观察的成功标准验证，通过智能体级验证器交叉检查完成声明与决策规则；2) Loop Breaker（循环断路器）：提供多层过滤机制，包括重复失败后切换交互模式、持续屏幕状态重复后强制策略变更、将反思信号绑定到策略转变；3) Search Agent（搜索智能体）：按需调用具备搜索能力的LLM在线查询不熟悉的工作流程。此外还集成了Coding Agent（代码智能体）和Grounding Agent（定位智能体）。
AI.result: 在5个顶级骨干模型（包括Opus 4.5、4.6和Gemini 3.1 Pro）上评估，在Linux和Windows任务的两个基准测试中达到最优性能：OSWorld上77.5%，WindowsAgentArena上61.0%。三个骨干模型在OSWorld上单次运行超越人类表现（72.4%）。消融实验表明三个组件均能持续改进强骨干模型，弱骨干模型在步骤预算充足时受益更大。Loop Breaker对易循环模型几乎减半了浪费的步骤。
AI.conclusion: VLAA-GUI框架通过强制性验证、循环检测与恢复机制以及按需搜索能力，有效解决了GUI智能体的核心缺陷，为构建更可靠的自主GUI智能体提供了系统性的解决方案。

title: Multi-Cycle Spatio-Temporal Adaptation in Human-Robot Teaming
summary: Effective human-robot teaming is crucial for the practical deployment of robots in human workspaces. However, optimizing joint human-robot plans remains a challenge due to the difficulty of modeling individualized human capabilities and preferences. While prior research has leveraged the multi-cycle structure of domains like manufacturing to learn an individual's tendencies and adapt plans over repeated interactions, these techniques typically consider task-level and motion-level adaptation in isolation. Task-level methods optimize allocation and scheduling but often ignore spatial interference in close-proximity scenarios; conversely, motion-level methods focus on collision avoidance while ignoring the broader task context. This paper introduces RAPIDDS, a framework that unifies these approaches by modeling an individual's spatial behavior (motion paths) and temporal behavior (time required to complete tasks) over multiple cycles. RAPIDDS then jointly adapts task schedules and steers diffusion models of robot motions to maximize efficiency and minimize proximity accounting for these individualized models. We demonstrate the importance of this dual adaptation through an ablation study in simulation and a physical robot scenario using a 7-DOF robot arm. Finally, we present a user study (n=32) showing significant plan improvement compared to non-adaptive systems across both objective metrics, such as efficiency and proximity, and subjective measures, including fluency and user preference. See this paper's companion video at: https://youtu.be/55Q3lq1fINs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAPIDDS框架，通过结合个体化空间行为（运动路径）和时间行为（任务完成时间）建模，在多周期人机协作中联合优化任务调度和机器人运动生成，显著提升效率和安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将任务级调度与运动级规划分离处理：任务级方法忽略空间干扰，运动级方法忽视任务上下文，二者无法协同优化，导致人机协作效率低下。
AI.method: RAPIDDS框架首先在多个工作周期中学习个体的空间行为（运动路径）和时间行为（任务耗时），然后联合调整任务调度并利用扩散模型引导机器人运动生成，以同时最大化效率和最小化人机间距。
AI.result: 通过仿真消融实验、7自由度机械臂实物实验以及32名受试者的用户研究，证明了该方法在客观指标（效率、接近度）和主观指标（流畅性、用户偏好）上均显著优于非自适应系统。
AI.conclusion: 统一任务级与运动级的个体化自适应方法对于实现高效、安全的人机协作至关重要，RAPIDDS为此提供了有效可行的框架。

title: Learning Dynamic Representations and Policies from Multimodal Clinical Time-Series with Informative Missingness
summary: Multimodal clinical records contain structured measurements and clinical notes recorded over time, offering rich temporal information about the evolution of patient health. Yet these observations are sparse, and whether they are recorded depends on the patient's latent condition. Observation patterns also differ across modalities, as structured measurements and clinical notes arise under distinct recording processes. While prior work has developed methods that accommodate missingness in clinical time series, how to extract and use the information carried by the observation process itself remains underexplored. We therefore propose a patient representation learning framework for multimodal clinical time series that explicitly leverages informative missingness. The framework combines (1) a multimodal encoder that captures signals from structured and textual data together with their observation patterns, (2) a Bayesian filtering module that updates a latent patient state over time from observed multimodal signals, and (3) downstream modules for offline treatment policy learning and patient outcome prediction based on the learned patient state. We evaluate the framework on ICU sepsis cohorts from MIMIC-III, MIMIC-IV, and eICU. It improves both offline treatment policy learning and adverse outcome prediction, achieving FQE 0.679 versus 0.528 for clinician behavior and AUROC 0.886 for post-72-hour mortality prediction on MIMIC-III.

AI.tldr: 提出一个多模态临床时间序列的患者表征学习框架，通过显式利用信息性缺失来学习患者潜在状态，并应用于离线治疗策略学习和不良结局预测。
AI.motivation: 多模态临床记录虽然包含丰富的时间信息，但观测稀疏且记录与否取决于患者潜在状态，不同模态（结构化测量与临床笔记）的记录过程各异。现有方法虽能处理临床时间序列中的缺失，但如何提取和利用观测过程本身携带的信息仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 框架包含三个模块：(1) 多模态编码器，从结构化和文本数据及其观测模式中捕获信号；(2) 贝叶斯滤波模块，根据观测到的多模态信号随时间更新潜在患者状态；(3) 下游模块，用于基于学习到的患者状态进行离线治疗策略学习和患者结局预测。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-III、MIMIC-IV和eICU的ICU脓毒症队列上评估，离线治疗策略学习FQE达0.679（对比临床医生行为的0.528），MIMIC-III上72小时死亡率预测AUROC达0.886。
AI.conclusion: 显式利用信息性缺失的多模态患者表征学习框架在治疗策略学习和不良结局预测上均优于现有方法。

title: Adapting TrOCR for Printed Tigrinya Text Recognition: Word-Aware Loss Weighting for Cross-Script Transfer Learning
comment: Code and models available at https://github.com/YoHa2024NKU/Tigrinya_TrOCR_Printed Pre-trained models: https://huggingface.co/Yonatanhaile2026/tigrinya-trocrprinted, https://huggingface.co/Yonatanhaile2026/tigrinya-trocrhandwritten
summary: Transformer-based OCR models have shown strong performance on Latin and CJK scripts, but their application to African syllabic writing systems remains limited. We present the first adaptation of TrOCR for printed Tigrinya using the Ge'ez script. Starting from a pre-trained model, we extend the byte-level BPE tokenizer to cover 230 Ge'ez characters and introduce Word-Aware Loss Weighting to resolve systematic word-boundary failures that arise when applying Latin-centric BPE conventions to a new script. The unmodified model produces no usable output on Ge'ez text. After adaptation, the TrOCR-Printed variant achieves 0.22% Character Error Rate and 97.20% exact match accuracy on a held-out test set of 5,000 synthetic images from the GLOCR dataset. An ablation study confirms that Word-Aware Loss Weighting is the critical component, reducing CER by two orders of magnitude compared to vocabulary extension alone. The full pipeline trains in under three hours on a single 8 GB consumer GPU. All code, model weights, and evaluation scripts are publicly released.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将TrOCR模型适配于提格利尼亚语的吉兹文字印刷体识别。通过扩展BPE词表至230个吉兹字符并引入词感知损失加权，解决了拉丁中心分词规则导致的分词边界失败问题。在5000张合成测试图像上实现0.22% CER和97.20%精确匹配率，完整训练在三小时内完成。
AI.motivation: 非洲音节文字（如吉兹文）在Transformer-based OCR模型中尚未得到有效应用，现有拉丁和CJK优化的模型无法直接处理这些文字系统。
AI.method: 1）扩展TrOCR的byte-level BPE分词器覆盖230个吉兹字符；2）提出Word-Aware Loss Weighting（词感知损失加权）以校正拉丁分词惯例对新文字造成的系统性词边界错误；3）在GLOCR数据集的5000张合成印刷体图像上微调。
AI.result: TrOCR-Printed变体在测试集上达到0.22%字符错误率（CER）和97.20%精确匹配准确率。消融实验表明词感知损失加权是核心组件，单独使用可将CER降低两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 通过词表扩展和损失加权策略，成功将TrOCR适配于吉兹文字，验证了拉丁中心OCR模型迁移至非拉丁音节文字的可行性，且训练效率高（单GPU三小时内完成）。

title: Time, Causality, and Observability Failures in Distributed AI Inference Systems
comment: 17 pages, 6 figures. Produced as part of the Unified Intelligent Infrastructure workstream at the Open Compute Project (OCP)
summary: Distributed AI inference pipelines rely heavily on timestamp-based observability to understand system behavior. This work demonstrates that even small clock skew between nodes can cause observability to become causally incorrect while the system itself remains functionally correct and performant. We present controlled experiments on a multi-node AI inference pipeline, where clock skew is introduced at a single stage. Results show that no violations are observed under synchronized conditions and up to 3 ms skew, while clear causality violations emerge by 5 ms. Despite this, system throughput and output correctness remain largely unaffected. We further observe that violation behavior is not strictly static. In longer runs, negative span rates may stabilize or decrease over time, indicating that effective skew evolves due to relative clock drift between nodes. Experiments were conducted using Kafka and ZeroMQ transports, with consistent results across both. Aeron is under active exploration but is not yet included in the completed validation set. These findings suggest that observability correctness depends not only on system functionality but also on precise time alignment, and that timing must be treated as a first-class concern in distributed AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文证明分布式AI推理管线中即使毫秒级时钟偏差也会导致基于时间戳的可观测性出现因果错误，而系统功能和性能不受影响。
AI.motivation: 分布式AI推理管线依赖时间戳可观测性理解系统行为，但时钟偏差对观测正确性的影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 在多节点AI推理管线中引入单级时钟偏差（0-5ms），使用Kafka和ZeroMQ传输，通过受控实验观测因果违背情况。
AI.result: 同步及≤3ms偏差无违例，5ms出现因果违例；吞吐量和输出正确性基本不受影响；负span率在长时间运行中可能稳定或下降，表明有效偏差因时钟漂移动态演化。
AI.conclusion: 可观测性正确性不仅依赖系统功能，还需精确时间对齐，时间应作为分布式AI系统的一等关注点。

title: SafetyALFRED: Evaluating Safety-Conscious Planning of Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models are increasingly adopted as autonomous agents in interactive environments, yet their ability to proactively address safety hazards remains insufficient. We introduce SafetyALFRED, built upon the embodied agent benchmark ALFRED, augmented with six categories of real-world kitchen hazards. While existing safety evaluations focus on hazard recognition through disembodied question answering (QA) settings, we evaluate eleven state-of-the-art models from the Qwen, Gemma, and Gemini families on not only hazard recognition, but also active risk mitigation through embodied planning. Our experimental results reveal a significant alignment gap: while models can accurately recognize hazards in QA settings, average mitigation success rates for these hazards are low in comparison. Our findings demonstrate that static evaluations through QA are insufficient for physical safety, thus we advocate for a paradigm shift toward benchmarks that prioritize corrective actions in embodied contexts. We open-source our code and dataset under https://github.com/sled-group/SafetyALFRED.git

AI.tldr: 论文提出SafetyALFRED基准，在ALFRED基础上增加六类厨房安全隐患，评估多模态大模型在危险识别（QA）和主动风险缓解（具身规划）两方面的表现，发现模型在QA设置中识别准确但在具身规划中缓解成功率低，表明静态评估不足以衡量物理安全，倡导向具身纠正行动基准范式转变。
AI.motivation: 现有安全评估主要关注通过非具身问答（QA）设置进行危险识别，而多模态大模型作为自主智能体在交互环境中缺乏主动应对安全隐患的能力，需要更全面的安全评估范式。
AI.method: 基于ALFRED具身智能体基准构建SafetyALFRED，增加六类真实世界厨房安全隐患；评估Qwen、Gemma、Gemini系列共11个SOTA模型在危险识别（QA）和主动风险缓解（具身规划）两方面的表现。
AI.result: 模型在QA危险识别中表现准确，但平均风险缓解成功率显著低于识别率，存在明显的对齐差距。
AI.conclusion: 静态QA评估不足以衡量物理安全，应转向以具身上下文中纠正行动为重点的基准范式。

title: OMIBench: Benchmarking Olympiad-Level Multi-Image Reasoning in Large Vision-Language Model
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have made substantial advances in reasoning tasks at the Olympiad level. Nevertheless, current Olympiad-level multimodal reasoning benchmarks for these models often emphasize single-image analysis and fail to exploit contextual information across multiple images. We present OMIBench, a benchmark designed to evaluate Olympiad-level reasoning when the required evidence is distributed over multiple images. It contains problems from biology, chemistry, mathematics, and physics Olympiads, together with manually annotated rationales and evaluation protocols for both exact and semantic answer matching. Across extensive experiments on OMIBench, we observe meaningful performance gaps in existing models. Even the strongest LVLMs, such as Gemini-3-Pro, attain only about 50% on the benchmark. These results position OMIBench as a focused resources for studying and improving multi-image reasoning in LVLMs.

AI.tldr: OMIBench是一个评估大型视觉语言模型在多图像场景下进行奥林匹克级别推理的基准测试，包含生物、化学、数学和物理奥林匹克题目及人工标注的推理过程和评估协议。实验表明，即使最强模型（如Gemini-3-Pro）也仅能达到约50%的准确率，揭示了现有模型在多图像推理方面的显著性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有奥林匹克级多模态推理基准通常侧重于单图像分析，未能利用跨多图像的上下文信息，因此需要构建一个专门评估多图像推理能力的基准。
AI.method: 构建OMIBench基准，包含来自生物、化学、数学和物理奥林匹克的题目，每道题所需证据分布在多张图像上，并配有手动标注的推理过程和精确匹配与语义匹配两种评估协议。
AI.result: 现有LVLMs在OMIBench上存在显著性能差距，最强模型Gemini-3-Pro仅达到约50%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: OMIBench可作为研究和提升LVLMs多图像推理能力的聚焦资源。

title: ReaGeo: Reasoning-Enhanced End-to-End Geocoding with LLMs
comment: 12 pages, 8 figures, submitted to ACM SIGSPATIAL 2024 (under review)
summary: This paper proposes ReaGeo, an end-to-end geocoding framework based on large language models, designed to overcome the limitations of traditional multi-stage approaches that rely on text or vector similarity retrieval over geographic databases, including workflow complexity, error propagation, and heavy dependence on structured geographic knowledge bases. The method converts geographic coordinates into geohash sequences, reformulating the coordinate prediction task as a text generation problem, and introduces a Chain-of-Thought mechanism to enhance the model's reasoning over spatial relationships. Furthermore, reinforcement learning with a distance-deviation-based reward is applied to optimize the generation accuracy. Comprehensive experiments show that ReaGeo can accurately handle explicit address queries in single-point predictions and effectively resolve vague relative location queries. In addition, the model demonstrates strong predictive capability for non-point geometric regions, highlighting its versatility and generalization ability in geocoding tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出ReaGeo，一种基于大语言模型的端到端地理编码框架，通过将坐标预测转化为文本生成任务（使用geohash序列），结合思维链推理和基于距离偏差的强化学习优化，有效处理显式地址查询、模糊相对位置查询以及非点状几何区域预测，克服了传统多阶段方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 克服传统多阶段地理编码方法存在的流程复杂、错误传播以及高度依赖结构化地理知识库等局限性。
AI.method: 1) 将地理坐标转换为geohash序列，将坐标预测重新定义为文本生成问题；2) 引入思维链机制增强模型对空间关系的推理能力；3) 采用基于距离偏差奖励的强化学习优化生成精度。
AI.result: 在单点预测中能准确处理显式地址查询，有效解决模糊相对位置查询，并对非点状几何区域展现出强大的预测能力。
AI.conclusion: ReaGeo是一个通用性强、泛化能力好的端到端地理编码框架，能够处理多种地理编码任务。

title: Autonomous UAV Pipeline Near-proximity Inspection via Disturbance-Aware Predictive Visual Servoing
summary: Reliable pipeline inspection is critical to safe energy transportation, but is constrained by long distances, complex terrain, and risks to human inspectors. Unmanned aerial vehicles provide a flexible sensing platform, yet reliable autonomous inspection remains challenging. This paper presents an autonomous quadrotor near-proximity pipeline inspection framework for three-dimensional scenarios based on image-based visual servoing model predictive control (VMPC). A unified predictive model couples quadrotor dynamics with image feature kinematics, enabling direct image-space prediction within the control loop. To address low-rate visual updates, measurement noise, and environmental uncertainties, an extended-state Kalman filtering scheme with image feature prediction (ESKF-PRE) is developed, and the estimated lumped disturbances are incorporated into the VMPC prediction model, yielding the ESKF-PRE-VMPC framework. A terrain-adaptive velocity design is introduced to maintain the desired cruising speed while generating vertical velocity references over unknown terrain slopes without prior terrain information. The framework is validated in high-fidelity Gazebo simulations and real-world experiments. In real-world tests, the proposed method reduces RMSE by 52.63% and 75.04% in pipeline orientation and lateral deviation in the image, respectively, for straight-pipeline inspection without wind, and successfully completes both wind-disturbance and bend-pipeline tasks where baseline method fails. An open-source nano quadrotor is modified for indoor experimentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像视觉伺服模型预测控制（VMPC）的自主四旋翼近距管道检测框架，结合扩展状态卡尔曼滤波与图像特征预测（ESKF-PRE），实现三维场景下的鲁棒管道检测，在仿真和实物实验中显著降低了图像误差，并成功完成了存在风扰和弯管的任务。
AI.motivation: 管道检测对于安全能源运输至关重要，但受限于长距离、复杂地形及人工检测风险。无人机提供了灵活感知平台，但实现可靠自主检测仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出基于图像视觉伺服模型预测控制（VMPC）的自主四旋翼近距管道检测框架；构建统一预测模型耦合四旋翼动力学与图像特征运动学；设计扩展状态卡尔曼滤波与图像特征预测（ESKF-PRE）以应对低帧率视觉更新、测量噪声和环境不确定性；将估计的集总扰动纳入VMPC预测模型；引入地形自适应速度设计，在无需先验地形信息情况下生成垂直速度参考。
AI.result: 在高保真Gazebo仿真和实物实验中验证：实物实验中，直管无风条件下图像中的管道方向和横向偏差RMSE分别降低52.63%和75.04%；成功完成基线方法失败的风扰和弯管任务。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的ESKF-PRE-VMPC框架能有效提升管道检测的鲁棒性和精度，在存在风扰和管道弯曲等挑战性场景中仍能稳定工作。

title: LEXIS: LatEnt ProXimal Interaction Signatures for 3D HOI from an Image
comment: 26 pages, 11 figures, 4 tables. Project page: https://anticdimi.github.io/lexis
summary: Reconstructing 3D Human-Object Interaction from an RGB image is essential for perceptive systems. Yet, this remains challenging as it requires capturing the subtle physical coupling between the body and objects. While current methods rely on sparse, binary contact cues, these fail to model the continuous proximity and dense spatial relationships that characterize natural interactions. We address this limitation via InterFields, a representation that encodes dense, continuous proximity across the entire body and object surfaces. However, inferring these fields from single images is inherently ill-posed. To tackle this, our intuition is that interaction patterns are characteristically structured by the action and object geometry. We capture this structure in LEXIS, a novel discrete manifold of interaction signatures learned via a VQ-VAE. We then develop LEXIS-Flow, a diffusion framework that leverages LEXIS signatures to estimate human and object meshes alongside their InterFields. Notably, these InterFields help in a guided refinement that ensures physically-plausible, proximity-aware reconstructions without requiring post-hoc optimization. Evaluation on Open3DHOI and BEHAVE shows that LEXIS-Flow significantly outperforms existing SotA baselines in reconstruction, contact, and proximity quality. Our approach not only improves generalization but also yields reconstructions perceived as more realistic, moving us closer to holistic 3D scene understanding. Code & models will be public at https://anticdimi.github.io/lexis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEXIS-Flow框架，通过VQ-VAE学习交互签名离散流形（LEXIS），结合扩散模型与密集连续近距场（InterFields），从单张RGB图像重建3D人体-物体交互，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖稀疏、二元的接触线索，无法建模自然交互中连续近距和密集空间关系，导致人体与物体之间的物理耦合重建不准确。
AI.method: 提出InterFields编码全身与物体表面的密集连续近距场；通过VQ-VAE学习交互签名的离散流形LEXIS；构建LEXIS-Flow扩散框架，利用LEXIS签名联合估计人体/物体网格及InterFields，并通过InterFields引导细化实现物理合理的重建。
AI.result: 在Open3DHOI和BEHAVE数据集上，LEXIS-Flow在重建质量、接触准确性和近距场质量上显著超越现有SOTA方法，且无需后处理优化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提升了泛化能力，生成了更真实的3D交互重建，推动了对场景的全面理解。

title: LiveVLN: Breaking the Stop-and-Go Loop in Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Recent navigation systems achieve strong benchmark results, yet real-world deployment often remains visibly stop-and-go. This bottleneck arises because the sense-inference-execution loop is still blocking: after each new observation, the controller must wait for sensing, transmission, and inference before motion can continue. Reducing action-generation cost alone therefore does not remove redundant waiting. To address this issue, we present LiveVLN, a training-free framework for more continuous embodied navigation by augmenting pretrained VLM navigators with multi-step action continuation. Instead of pausing for each full sense-and-inference round, LiveVLN overlaps execution with the processing of newly arrived observations, allowing refreshed future actions to be handed off before the current executable prefix is exhausted. This design keeps actions continuously available during motion, reducing idle waiting and enabling smoother online execution. The framework operates at runtime and can be integrated with compatible pretrained VLM navigators. Across R2R and RxR, LiveVLN preserves benchmark performance while reducing waiting time and improving action availability. In real-world deployments, it cuts average episode waiting time by up to $77.7\%$ and shortens wall-clock episode time by $12.6\%$ on StreamVLN and $19.6\%$ on NaVIDA, yielding more coherent execution during deployment. Code is available at https://github.com/NIneeeeeem/LiveVLN.

AI.tldr: LiveVLN是一个无需训练的计算框架，通过将动作执行与观测处理重叠（多步动作延续），减少视觉-语言导航系统中因感知-推理-执行阻塞导致的等待时间，在保持基准性能的同时，平均等待时间降低77.7%，实际部署时长缩短12.6%-19.6%。
AI.motivation: 现有导航系统在基准测试中表现优异，但实际部署中仍存在明显的“走走停停”现象，根源在于感知-推理-执行循环是阻塞式的——每次新观测到来后，控制器必须等待感知、传输和推理完成才能继续运动，仅降低动作生成成本无法消除冗余等待。
AI.method: 提出LiveVLN，一个无需训练的训练无关框架，通过多步动作延续增强预训练VLM导航器。其核心思想是将动作执行与新到达观测的处理过程重叠进行：在当前可执行动作前缀耗尽之前，将更新后的未来动作提前移交，使动作在运动过程中持续可用，减少空闲等待。
AI.result: 在R2R和RxR基准测试上保持原有性能；实际部署中，StreamVLN上平均等待时间降低77.7%，墙钟时间缩短12.6%；NaVIDA上墙钟时间缩短19.6%，执行更加连贯。
AI.conclusion: LiveVLN通过运行时框架设计有效缓解了导航系统中感知-推理-执行的阻塞问题，无需重新训练即可集成到现有VLM导航器中，显著提升在线执行平滑度和实际部署效率。

title: The Recurrent Transformer: Greater Effective Depth and Efficient Decoding
summary: Transformers process tokens in parallel but are temporally shallow: at position $t$, each layer attends to key-value pairs computed based on the previous layer, yielding a depth capped by the number of layers. Recurrent models offer unbounded temporal depth but suffer from optimization instability and historically underutilize modern accelerators. We introduce the Recurrent Transformer, a simple architectural change where each layer attends to key-value pairs computed off its own activations, yielding layerwise recurrent memory while preserving standard autoregressive decoding cost. We show that the architecture can emulate both (i) a conventional Transformer and (ii) token-to-token recurrent updates under mild assumptions, while avoiding optimization instability. Naively, prefill/training appears bandwidth-bound with effective arithmetic intensity near $1$ because keys and values are revealed sequentially; we give an exact tiling-based algorithm that preserves the mathematical computation while reducing HBM traffic from $Θ(N^2)$ to $Θ(N\log N)$, increasing effective arithmetic intensity to $Θ(N/\log N)$ for sequence length $N$. On 150M and 300M parameter C4 pretraining, Recurrent Transformers improve cross-entropy over a parameter-matched Transformer baseline and achieve the improvement with fewer layers (fixed parameters), suggesting that recurrence can trade depth for width, thus reducing KV cache memory footprint and inference latency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Recurrent Transformer，通过让每层注意力关注自身激活计算出的键值对，实现层间循环记忆。该方法在保持标准自回归解码成本的同时，利用基于tiling的算法将HBM流量从Θ(N²)降至Θ(N log N)，在150M和300M参数规模上优于参数匹配的Transformer基线。
AI.motivation: 标准Transformer在时间维度上较浅（深度受层数限制），而循环模型虽具有无限时间深度但存在优化不稳定和加速器利用不足的问题。作者旨在结合两者优势，设计一种兼具Transformer高效并行计算与循环模型深度记忆能力的架构。
AI.method: 提出Recurrent Transformer架构：每层注意力层关注基于自身激活（而非前一层）计算出的键值对，形成层间循环记忆。解码时保持标准自回归成本。针对预训练/推理中KV序列顺序暴露导致的带宽瓶颈，设计了一种基于tiling的精确算法，将HBM流量从Θ(N²)降至Θ(N log N)，算术强度从接近1提升至Θ(N/log N)。
AI.result: 在150M和300M参数规模的C4预训练任务上，Recurrent Transformer在固定参数量的情况下使用更少层数即超越了参数匹配的Transformer基线，降低了交叉熵损失。
AI.conclusion: 循环性可以用深度换取宽度，从而减少KV缓存内存占用和推理延迟，为Transformer架构提供了一种有效的改进方向。

title: GenerativeMPC: VLM-RAG-guided Whole-Body MPC with Virtual Impedance for Bimanual Mobile Manipulation
summary: Bimanual mobile manipulation requires a seamless integration between high-level semantic reasoning and safe, compliant physical interaction - a challenge that end-to-end models approach opaquely and classical controllers lack the context to address. This paper presents GenerativeMPC, a hierarchical cyber-physical framework that explicitly bridges semantic scene understanding with physical control parameters for bimanual mobile manipulators. The system utilizes a Vision-Language Model with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (VLM-RAG) to translate visual and linguistic context into grounded control constraints, specifically outputting dynamic velocity limits and safety margins for a Whole-Body Model Predictive Controller (MPC). Simultaneously, the VLM-RAG module modulates virtual stiffness and damping gains for a unified impedance-admittance controller, enabling context-aware compliance during human-robot interaction. Our framework leverages an experience-driven vector database to ensure consistent parameter grounding without retraining. Experimental results in MuJoCo, IsaacSim, and on a physical bimanual platform confirm a 60% speed reduction near humans and safe, socially-aware navigation and manipulation through semantic-to-physical parameter grounding. This work advances the field of human-centric cybernetics by grounding large-scale cognitive models into predictable, high-frequency physical control loops.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GenerativeMPC，一个分层式信息物理框架，通过VLM-RAG将语义理解转化为物理控制参数（速度限制、安全边界、阻抗导纳增益），实现双手机器人在人机交互中的安全、合规操作，并在仿真和实物平台上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 端到端模型缺乏可解释性，而传统控制器缺乏语义上下文，现有方法难以有效桥接高层语义推理与安全、柔顺的物理交互，特别是在双手机器人操作场景中。
AI.method: 采用分层式信息物理框架GenerativeMPC，包含：(1) VLM-RAG模块将视觉和语言上下文转化为动态速度限制和安全边界，输入给全身模型预测控制器(MPC)；(2) VLM-RAG同时调节虚拟刚度和阻尼增益，实现统一的阻抗-导纳控制；(3) 经验驱动的向量数据库确保一致的参数接地，无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo、IsaacSim和实物双手机器人平台上验证，靠近人类时速度降低60%，实现了安全、社交感知的导航和操作。
AI.conclusion: 通过将大规模认知模型接地到可预测的高频物理控制回路，推进了以人为中心的信息物理系统领域发展。

title: The Feedback Hamiltonian is the Score Function: A Diffusion-Model Framework for Quantum Trajectory Reversal
summary:
In continuously monitored quantum systems, the feedback protocol of García-Pintos, Liu, and Gorshkov reshapes the arrow of time: a Hamiltonian $H_{\mathrm{meas}} = r A / τ$ applied with gain $X$ tilts the distribution of measurement trajectories, with $X < -2$ producing statistically time-reversed outcomes. Why this specific Hamiltonian achieves reversal, and how the mechanism relates to score-based diffusion models in machine learning, has remained unexplained.
  We compute the functional derivative of the log path probability of the quantum trajectory distribution directly in density-matrix space. Combining Girsanov's theorem applied to the measurement record, Fréchet differentiation on the Banach space of trace-class operators, and Kähler geometry on the pure-state projective manifold, we prove that $δ\log P_F / δρ= r A / τ= H_{\mathrm{meas}}$. The García-Pintos feedback Hamiltonian is the score function of the quantum trajectory distribution -- exactly the object Anderson's reverse-time diffusion theorem requires for trajectory reversal. The identification extends to multi-qubit systems with independent measurement channels, where the score is a sum of local operators.
  Two consequences follow. First, the feedback gain $X$ generates a continuous one-parameter family of path measures (for feedback-active Hamiltonians with $[H, A] \neq 0$), with $X = -2$ recovering the backward process in leading-order linearization -- a structure absent from classical diffusion, where reversal is binary. Second, the score identification enables machine learning (ML) score estimation methods -- denoising score matching, sliced score matching -- to replace the analytic formula when its idealizations (unit efficiency, zero delay, Gaussian noise) fail in real experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文证明 García-Pintos 反馈哈密顿量 $H_{\mathrm{meas}} = r A / τ$ 等价于量子轨迹分布的对数路径概率的得分函数（score function），建立了量子反馈控制与基于得分的扩散模型（score-based diffusion models）之间的理论联系。该识别统一解释了为何特定 Hamiltonian 能实现时间反演，并允许在理想条件失效时用机器学习得分估计方法替代解析公式。
AI.motivation: 解释 García-Pintos 反馈协议为何能重塑量子系统的时间箭头，以及该机制与机器学习中基于得分的扩散模型之间的深层联系。此前这两个领域间缺乏统一的理论框架。
AI.method: 在密度矩阵空间中直接计算量子轨迹分布的对数路径概率的泛函导数。结合 Girsanov 定理（应用于测量记录）、Fréchet 微分（在迹类算子的 Banach 空间上）以及纯态投影流形上的 Kähler 几何，证明 $\delta \log P_F / \delta ρ = r A / τ = H_{\mathrm{meas}}$。
AI.result: (1) 证明了 García-Pintos 反馈 Hamiltonian 就是量子轨迹分布的得分函数，即 Anderson 逆时扩散定理所需的精确对象；(2) 反馈增益 $X$ 生成连续的单参数路径测度族（对 $[H, A] \neq 0$ 的反馈活性 Hamiltonian），$X=-2$ 在线性化主导阶恢复逆向过程——这与经典扩散中二进制反转的结构不同；(3) 建立了得分识别，允许在实验条件不理想时使用 ML 得分估计方法（去噪得分匹配、切片得分匹配）替代解析公式。
AI.conclusion: 量子反馈控制中的时间反演机制本质上是得分函数的连续参数化，与基于得分的扩散模型在数学上同构。这一发现不仅统一了两个领域，还为实际实验中克服理想化条件限制提供了可操作的机器学习替代方案。

title: GeoRect4D: Geometry-Compatible Generative Rectification for Dynamic Sparse-View 3D Reconstruction
summary: Reconstructing dynamic 3D scenes from sparse multi-view videos is highly ill-posed, often leading to geometric collapse, trajectory drift, and floating artifacts. Recent attempts introduce generative priors to hallucinate missing content, yet naive integration frequently causes structural drift and temporal inconsistency due to the mismatch between stochastic 2D generation and deterministic 3D geometry. In this paper, we propose GeoRect4D, a novel unified framework for sparse-view dynamic reconstruction that couples explicit 3D consistency with generative refinement via a closed-loop optimization process. Specifically, GeoRect4D introduces a degradation-aware feedback mechanism that incorporates a robust anchor-based dynamic 3DGS substrate with a single-step diffusion rectifier to hallucinate high-fidelity details. This rectifier utilizes a structural locking mechanism and spatiotemporal coordinated attention, effectively preserving physical plausibility while restoring missing content. Furthermore, we present a progressive optimization strategy that employs stochastic geometric purification to eliminate floaters and generative distillation to infuse texture details into the explicit representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GeoRect4D achieves state-of-the-art performance in reconstruction fidelity, perceptual quality, and spatiotemporal consistency across multiple datasets.

AI.tldr: GeoRect4D提出了一种闭环优化框架，将显式3D一致性与生成式精炼相结合，通过退化感知反馈机制、锚点动态3DGS基底、单步扩散修正器（含结构锁定机制和时空协调注意力）以及渐进优化策略（随机几何净化+生成蒸馏），从稀疏多视角视频中重建动态3D场景，在多个数据集上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 稀疏多视角视频重建动态3D场景存在高度病态性，易导致几何崩塌、轨迹漂移和浮动伪影。现有方法引入生成式先验来填补缺失内容，但随机2D生成与确定性3D几何之间的不匹配常引发结构漂移和时间不一致性。
AI.method: 1）退化感知反馈机制；2）基于锚点的动态3DGS基底结合单步扩散修正器；3）修正器包含结构锁定机制和时空协调注意力；4）渐进优化策略，包括随机几何净化（消除漂浮物）和生成蒸馏（注入纹理细节）。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，GeoRect4D在重建保真度、感知质量和时空一致性方面均达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 显式3D一致性与生成式精炼通过闭环优化可有效协同，解决稀疏视图动态重建中的几何和时序问题。

title: Evaluating AI Meeting Summaries with a Reusable Cross-Domain Pipeline
comment: AI Application Feature Quality Evaluation (28 pages total)
summary:
We present a reusable evaluation pipeline for generative AI applications, instantiated for AI meeting summaries and released with a public artifact package derived from a Dataset Pipeline. The system separates reusable orchestration from task-specific semantics across five stages: source intake, structured reference construction, candidate generation, structured scoring, and reporting. Unlike standalone claim scorers, it treats both ground truth and evaluator outputs as typed, persisted artifacts, enabling aggregation, issue analysis, and statistical testing.
  We benchmark the offline loop on a typed dataset of 114 meetings spanning city_council, private_data, and whitehouse_press_briefings, producing 340 meeting-model pairs and 680 judge runs across gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-5-mini, and gpt-5.1. Under this protocol, gpt-4.1-mini achieves the highest mean accuracy (0.583), while gpt-5.1 leads in completeness (0.886) and coverage (0.942). Paired sign tests with Holm correction show no significant accuracy winner but confirm significant retention gains for gpt-5.1.
  A typed DeepEval contrastive baseline preserves retention ordering but reports higher holistic accuracy, suggesting that reference-based scoring may overlook unsupported-specifics errors captured by claim-grounded evaluation. Typed analysis identifies whitehouse_press_briefings as an accuracy-challenging domain with frequent unsupported specifics. A deployment follow-up shows gpt-5.4 outperforming gpt-4.1 across all metrics, with statistically robust gains on retention metrics under the same protocol. The system benchmarks the offline loop and documents, but does not quantitatively evaluate, the online feedback-to-evaluation path.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个可复用的生成式AI评估流水线，实例化用于会议摘要评估，包含五阶段编排。在114个会议数据集上对多个GPT模型进行基准测试，发现gpt-4.1-mini准确率最高(0.583)，gpt-5.1在完整性和覆盖率上领先。通过类型化分析识别出特定领域挑战，并验证了在线部署中gpt-5.4优于gpt-4.1。
AI.motivation: 现有评估系统多为独立的claim评分器，缺乏可复用的编排框架；且未将ground truth和评估器输出视为类型化、可持久化的工件，难以进行聚合分析、问题溯源和统计检验。
AI.method: 构建五阶段评估流水线：源数据摄入、结构化参考构建、候选生成、结构化评分、报告生成。在114个会议(涵盖三种领域)的标记数据集上，对多个GPT模型进行离线基准测试，采用配对符号检验与Holm校正进行统计比较，并与DeepEval对比基线进行对照。
AI.result: gpt-4.1-mini获得最高平均准确率(0.583)，gpt-5.1在完整性(0.886)和覆盖率(0.942)上领先。统计检验显示准确率无显著胜者，但gpt-5.1在保留指标上有显著提升。DeepEval基线保留了保留指标排序但报告了更高的整体准确率。白宫新闻发布会是最具挑战性的领域。在线部署中gpt-5.4全面优于gpt-4.1。
AI.conclusion: 该流水线实现了评估编排与任务语义的分离，类型化工件设计支持深入的统计分析和问题溯源。基于claim的评估比基于参考的评分更能捕获"无依据具体信息"错误。未对在线反馈-评估路径进行定量评估，留作未来工作。

title: Assessing VLM-Driven Semantic-Affordance Inference for Non-Humanoid Robot Morphologies
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in understanding human-object interactions, but their application to robotic systems with non-humanoid morphologies remains largely unexplored. This work investigates whether VLMs can effectively infer affordances for robots with fundamentally different embodiments than humans, addressing a critical gap in the deployment of these models for diverse robotic applications. We introduce a novel hybrid dataset that combines annotated real-world robotic affordance-object relations with VLM-generated synthetic scenarios, and perform an empirical analysis of VLM performance across multiple object categories and robot morphologies, revealing significant variations in affordance inference capabilities. Our experiments demonstrate that while VLMs show promising generalisation to non-humanoid robot forms, their performance is notably inconsistent across different object domains. Critically, we identify a consistent pattern of low false positive rates but high false negative rates across all morphologies and object categories, indicating that VLMs tend toward conservative affordance predictions. Our analysis reveals that this pattern is particularly pronounced for novel tool use scenarios and unconventional object manipulations, suggesting that effective integration of VLMs in robotic systems requires complementary approaches to mitigate over-conservative behaviour while preserving the inherent safety benefits of low false positive rates.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了视觉语言模型（VLM）在非人形机器人形态下的可操作性（affordance）推理能力，发现VLM虽能泛化到非人形机器人，但存在高假阴性率（保守预测）的问题，尤其在新型工具使用和非传统物体操作场景中更为明显。
AI.motivation: VLM在理解人-物交互方面表现出色，但将其应用于形态与人类显著不同的机器人系统（如非人形机器人）的可操作性推理尚未被充分探索，存在关键研究空白。
AI.method: 构建了一个混合数据集，包含标注的真实世界机器人可操作性-物体关系与VLM生成的合成场景；对VLM在多个物体类别和机器人形态上的可操作性推理能力进行了实证分析。
AI.result: VLM对非人形机器人形态展现出有前景的泛化能力，但跨不同物体领域性能不一致；在所有形态和物体类别中，一致观察到低假阳性率但高假阴性率的模式，表明VLM倾向于保守的可操作性预测，该模式在新型工具使用和非传统物体操作中尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: 将VLM有效集成到机器人系统中需要补充性方法来缓解过度保守的行为，同时保留低假阳性率带来的固有安全性优势。

title: Refining Covariance Matrix Estimation in Stochastic Gradient Descent Through Bias Reduction
summary: We study online inference and asymptotic covariance estimation for the stochastic gradient descent (SGD) algorithm. While classical methods (such as plug-in and batch-means estimators) are available, they either require inaccessible second-order (Hessian) information or suffer from slow convergence.
