To address these challenges, we propose a novel, fully online de-biased covariance estimator that eliminates the need for second-order derivatives while significantly improving estimation accuracy. Our method employs a bias-reduction technique to achieve a convergence rate of $n^{(α-1)/2} \sqrt{\log n}$, outperforming existing Hessian-free alternatives.

AI.tldr: 本文针对随机梯度下降（SGD）算法提出了一种全新的全在线去偏协方差估计器，消除了对二阶导数（Hessian矩阵）的需求，并以$n^{(α-1)/2} \sqrt{\log n}$的收敛速度显著优于现有免Hessian方法。
AI.motivation: 现有SGD在线推理方法存在两大瓶颈：经典方法（如plug-in和batch-means估计器）要么需要难以获取的二阶Hessian信息，要么收敛速度慢。本文旨在克服这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出一种全在线去偏协方差估计器，采用偏差缩减技术，无需二阶导数即可实现高效协方差估计。
AI.result: 所提方法达到$n^{(α-1)/2} \sqrt{\log n}$的收敛速度，优于现有免Hessian替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功开发了无需二阶信息的在线协方差估计方法，显著提升了SGD在线推理的准确性。

title: Exploring High-Order Self-Similarity for Video Understanding
summary: Space-time self-similarity (STSS), which captures visual correspondences across frames, provides an effective way to represent temporal dynamics for video understanding. In this work, we explore higher-order STSS and demonstrate how STSSs at different orders reveal distinct aspects of these dynamics. We then introduce the Multi-Order Self-Similarity (MOSS) module, a lightweight neural module designed to learn and integrate multi-order STSS features. It can be applied to diverse video tasks to enhance motion modeling capabilities while consuming only marginal computational cost and memory usage. Extensive experiments on video action recognition, motion-centric video VQA, and real-world robotic tasks consistently demonstrate substantial improvements, validating the broad applicability of MOSS as a general temporal modeling module. The source code and checkpoints will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多阶自相似性模块（MOSS），通过学习和整合不同阶数的时空自相似性特征，以极低的计算和内存成本提升多种视频任务（动作识别、视频问答、机器人任务）的运动建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究利用时空自相似性（STSS）捕捉帧间视觉对应关系以表示时序动态，但仅考虑单一阶数的STSS，未能充分利用不同阶数STSS所揭示的不同维度的动态信息。
AI.method: 提出MOSS模块，是一个轻量级神经模块，用于学习并整合多阶STSS特征，可即插即用于多种视频任务中增强运动建模，仅消耗极少的计算和内存开销。
AI.result: 在视频动作识别、运动中心的视频VQA以及真实机器人任务上均取得显著提升，验证了MOSS作为通用时序建模模块的有效性和广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 多阶时空自相似性能够互补性地捕捉不同层面的时序动态，MOSS模块以轻量高效的方式集成这些特征，是通用的运动建模增强方案。

title: A Tendon-Driven Wrist Abduction-Adduction Joint Improves Performance of a 5 DoF Upper Limb Exoskeleton -- Implementation and Experimental Evaluation
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures and 1 table. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Engineering as invited IEEE EMBC special issue paper. Under review after first revision
summary: Wrist function is essential in performing activities of daily living (ADLs). However, there is limited experimental evidence on the functional impact of wrist Abduction-Adduction (Ab-Ad) joint assistance in upper limb exoskeletons (ULEs) for rehabilitation. This study evaluates the effect of implementing an active wrist Ab-Ad joint in a five degree of freedom (DoF) ULE, EXOTIC2 exoskeleton, to support individuals with severe motor impairments. Methods: A compact, lightweight wrist module with tendon-driven abduction and spring-driven adduction was integrated into the EXOTIC exoskeleton. Eight adults with no motor disabilities completed drinking and scratching tasks under randomized wrist-enabled and wrist-locked conditions along with a preliminary feasibility test in one individual with Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). Kinematic and task performance metrics including wrist range of motion, task completion time, spillage and leveling metrics were assessed. Results: Implementing the wrist Ab-Ad DoF improved task success metrics. Spill incidence during the drinking task decreased from 56% to 3%, and leveling success for scratching task improved from 28% to 75%. Conclusion: Integrating wrist Ab-Ad assistance improved key functional task outcomes without increasing execution time. Significance: The study provides the experimental evidence that active wrist Ab-Ad control enhances task-level performance in exoskeleton-assisted ADLs.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了在五自由度上肢外骨骼EXOTIC2中集成主动腕部外展-内收（Ab-Ad）关节对日常活动功能的影响。实验表明，手腕Ab-Ad辅助显著改善了任务成功率：饮水任务溢出率从56%降至3%，抓挠任务抬高水平从28%提升至75%，且不影响执行时间。研究为主动手腕控制增强外骨骼辅助ADL任务表现提供了实验证据。
AI.motivation: 腕部功能对日常生活活动至关重要，但针对上肢康复外骨骼中腕部外展-内收（Ab-Ad）关节辅助功能的实验证据有限，缺乏对严重运动障碍患者使用主动腕部Ab-Ad关节功能影响的量化评估。
AI.method: 设计并集成了一款紧凑轻量的腕部模块（肌腱驱动外展、弹簧驱动内收）到五自由度EXOTIC2外骨骼中。8名无运动障碍成年人及1名肌萎缩侧索硬化症患者分别在随机腕部启用/锁定条件下执行饮水与抓挠任务，评估腕部活动范围、任务完成时间、溢出率及抬高水平等运动学与任务表现指标。
AI.result: 腕部Ab-Ad自由度辅助显著改善了任务成功指标：饮水任务溢出发生率从56%降至3%，抓挠任务抬高水平成功率从28%提升至75%，且未增加执行时间。
AI.conclusion: 集成腕部Ab-Ad辅助改善了关键功能性任务结果，且不增加执行时间。主动腕部Ab-Ad控制可增强外骨骼辅助下的ADL任务表现。

title: Amodal SAM: A Unified Amodal Segmentation Framework with Generalization
summary: Amodal segmentation is a challenging task that aims to predict the complete geometric shape of objects, including their occluded regions. Although existing methods primarily focus on amodal segmentation within the training domain, these approaches often lack the generalization capacity to extend effectively to novel object categories and unseen contexts. This paper introduces Amodal SAM, a unified framework that leverages SAM (Segment Anything Model) for both amodal image and amodal video segmentation. Amodal SAM preserves the powerful generalization ability of SAM while extending its inherent capabilities to the amodal segmentation task. The improvements lie in three aspects: (1) a lightweight Spatial Completion Adapter that enables occluded region reconstruction, (2) a Target-Aware Occlusion Synthesis (TAOS) pipeline that addresses the scarcity of amodal annotations by generating diverse synthetic training data, and (3) novel learning objectives that enforce regional consistency and topological regularization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Amodal SAM achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks, while simultaneously exhibiting robust generalization to novel scenarios. We anticipate that this research will advance the field toward practical amodal segmentation systems capable of operating effectively in unconstrained real-world environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Amodal SAM，一种基于SAM的统一框架，通过空间补全适配器、目标感知遮挡合成（TAOS）管道以及新的学习目标，同时实现模态图像和视频分割，在保持SAM强大泛化能力的同时，在标准基准上达到最先进性能，并展现出对新颖场景的鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模态分割方法主要聚焦于训练域内的分割，缺乏对未见过的物体类别和未知上下文的泛化能力，难以应用于真实世界中的非约束环境。
AI.method: (1) 轻量级空间补全适配器（Spatial Completion Adapter），实现遮挡区域重建；(2) 目标感知遮挡合成（TAOS）管道，生成多样化的合成训练数据以缓解模态标注稀缺问题；(3) 新的学习目标，强制执行区域一致性和拓扑正则化。
AI.result: 在标准基准上取得最先进性能，同时展现出对新颖场景的鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究有望推动模态分割系统向能够在非约束真实环境中有效运行的实际应用方向发展。

title: Wrench-Aware Admittance Control for Unknown-Payload Manipulation
summary: Unknown payloads can strongly affect compliant robotic manipulation, especially when the payload center of mass is not aligned with the tool center point. In this case, the payload generates an offset wrench at the robot wrist. During motion, this wrench is not only related to payload weight, but also to payload inertia. If it is not modeled, the compliant controller can interpret it as an external interaction wrench, which causes unintended compliant motion, larger tracking error, and reduced transport accuracy. This paper presents a wrench-aware admittance control framework for unknown-payload pick-and-place using a UR5e robot. The method uses force-torque measurements in two different roles. First, a three-axis translational excitation term is used to reduce payload-induced force effects during transport without making the robot excessively stiff. Second, after grasping, the controller first estimates payload mass for transport compensation and then estimates the payload CoM offset relative to the TCP using wrist force-torque measurements collected during the subsequent translational motion. This helps improve object placement and stacking behavior. Experimental results show improved transport and placement performance compared with uncorrected placement while preserving compliant motion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向未知负载抓取-放置任务的力觉感知导纳控制框架，利用腕部力/力矩传感器数据，先通过三轴平移激励项减小负载力效应，再估计负载质量和质心偏移，以提高搬运与放置精度，同时保持柔顺性。
AI.motivation: 未知负载（尤其是质心偏移）会在机器人腕部产生额外的力/力矩，被柔顺控制器误判为外部交互力，导致非期望的柔顺运动、跟踪误差增大和搬运精度下降。
AI.method: 提出力觉感知导纳控制框架：1) 使用三轴平移激励项降低负载力效应；2) 抓取后先估计负载质量用于搬运补偿，再通过平移运动中的腕部力/力矩数据估计负载质心偏移。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法相比未校正的放置，在搬运和放置性能上均有提升，同时保持了柔顺运动能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效处理未知负载的质心偏移问题，在不牺牲柔顺性的前提下提升抓取-放置任务的精度和稳定性。

title: Toward Efficient Membership Inference Attacks against Federated Large Language Models: A Projection Residual Approach
comment: This is the full version (including complete appendices and supplementary materials) of the paper accepted for publication at the 2026 IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy
summary: Federated Large Language Models (FedLLMs) enable multiple parties to collaboratively fine-tune LLMs without sharing raw data, addressing challenges of limited resources and privacy concerns. Despite data localization, shared gradients can still expose sensitive information through membership inference attacks (MIAs). However, FedLLMs' unique properties, i.e. massive parameter scales, rapid convergence, and sparse, non-orthogonal gradients, render existing MIAs ineffective. To address this gap, we propose ProjRes, the first projection residuals-based passive MIA tailored for FedLLMs. ProjRes leverages hidden embedding vectors as sample representations and analyzes their projection residuals on the gradient subspace to uncover the intrinsic link between gradients and inputs. It requires no shadow models, auxiliary classifiers, or historical updates, ensuring efficiency and robustness. Experiments on four benchmarks and four LLMs show that ProjRes achieves near 100% accuracy, outperforming prior methods by up to 75.75%, and remains effective even under strong differential privacy defenses. Our findings reveal a previously overlooked privacy vulnerability in FedLLMs and call for a re-examination of their security assumptions. Our code and data are available at $\href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Passive-MIA-5268}{link}$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProjRes，一种针对联邦大语言模型（FedLLMs）的基于投影残差的被动成员推断攻击方法，无需影子模型或辅助分类器，在四个基准和四个LLM上实现了接近100%的攻击准确率，揭示了FedLLMs中此前被忽视的隐私漏洞。
AI.motivation: 联邦大语言模型（FedLLMs）虽然通过本地数据存储和梯度共享来保护隐私，但共享梯度仍可能通过成员推断攻击（MIAs）泄露敏感信息。然而，FedLLMs的独特特性（大规模参数、快速收敛、稀疏非正交梯度）使得现有MIAs方法失效，因此需要一种针对性的攻击方法来揭示这一隐私风险。
AI.method: ProjRes利用隐藏嵌入向量作为样本表示，分析其在梯度子空间上的投影残差，以揭示梯度与输入之间的内在关联。该方法无需影子模型、辅助分类器或历史更新，是一种被动攻击方法。
AI.result: 在四个基准和四个LLM上的实验表明，ProjRes实现了接近100%的攻击准确率，比此前最优方法高出最多75.75%；即使在强差分隐私防御下仍保持有效。
AI.conclusion: ProjRes揭示了FedLLMs中此前被忽视的隐私漏洞，呼吁重新审视其安全假设。

title: Forward Dynamics of Variable Topology Mechanisms - The Case of Constraint Activation
summary: Many mechanical systems exhibit changes in their kinematic topology altering the mobility. Ideal contact is the best known cause, but also stiction and controlled locking of parts of a mechanism lead to topology changes. The latter is becoming an important issue in human-machine interaction. Anticipating the dynamic behavior of variable topology mechanisms requires solving a non-smooth dynamic problem. The core challenge is a physically meaningful transition condition at the topology switching events. Such a condition is presented in this paper. Two versions are reported, one using projected motion equations in terms of redundant coordinates, and another one using the Voronets equations in terms of minimal coordinates. Their computational properties are discussed. Results are shown for joint locking of a planar 3R mechanisms and a 6DOF industrial manipulator.

AI.tldr: 本文针对变拓扑机构在拓扑切换事件中的非光滑动力学问题，提出了基于投影运动方程（冗余坐标）和Voronets方程（最小坐标）两种物理可行的过渡条件，并通过平面3R机构和6自由度工业机械臂的关节锁定实验验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 机械系统在运行过程中常因理想接触、静摩擦或部件受控锁定而发生运动学拓扑变化，这类变拓扑机构在人与机器交互中日益重要。准确预测其动力学行为需解决非光滑动力学问题，而核心挑战在于拓扑切换时刻的物理意义明确的过渡条件。现有方法缺乏对此类条件的系统构建，因此需要提出一种通用的、物理合理的过渡条件。
AI.method: 采用两种途径构建切换条件：1）基于冗余坐标的投影运动方程；2）基于最小坐标的Voronets方程。分别推导了拓扑切换时刻的过渡条件，并对比了两种方法的计算特性。
AI.result: 在平面3R机构和6自由度工业机械臂的关节锁定场景中成功应用了所提过渡条件，验证了两种公式的可行性，并展示了各自的计算性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的拓扑切换过渡条件为变拓扑机构动力学仿真提供了物理一致的理论框架，两种公式体系各具优势，可根据计算需求灵活选用，对机器人及人机交互系统的动力学分析与控制具有指导意义。

title: Render-in-the-Loop: Vector Graphics Generation via Visual Self-Feedback
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown promising capabilities in generating Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG) via direct code synthesis. However, existing paradigms typically adopt an open-loop "blind drawing" approach, where models generate symbolic code sequences without perceiving intermediate visual outcomes. This methodology severely underutilizes the powerful visual priors embedded in MLLMs vision encoders, treating SVG generation as a disjointed textual sequence modeling task rather than an integrated visuo-spatial one. Consequently, models struggle to reason about partial canvas states and implicit occlusion relationships, which are visually explicit but textually ambiguous. To bridge this gap, we propose Render-in-the-Loop, a novel generation paradigm that reformulates SVG synthesis as a step-wise, visual-context-aware process. By rendering intermediate code states into a cumulative canvas, the model explicitly observes the evolving visual context at each step, leveraging on-the-fly feedback to guide subsequent generation. However, we demonstrate that applying this visual loop naively to off-the-shelf models is suboptimal due to their inability to leverage incremental visual-code mappings. To address this, we first utilize fine-grained path decomposition to construct dense multi-step visual trajectories, and then introduce a Visual Self-Feedback (VSF) training strategy to condition the next primitive generation on intermediate visual states. Furthermore, a Render-and-Verify (RaV) inference mechanism is proposed to effectively filter degenerate and redundant primitives. Our framework, instantiated on a multimodal foundation model, outperforms strong open-weight baselines on the standard MMSVGBench. This result highlights the remarkable data efficiency and generalization capability of our Render-in-the-Loop paradigm for both Text-to-SVG and Image-to-SVG tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Render-in-the-Loop范式，通过将中间渲染结果作为视觉上下文反馈，结合Visual Self-Feedback训练策略和Render-and-Verify推理机制，显著提升了多模态大模型生成SVG代码的质量，在MMSVGBench上优于强基准模型。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs生成SVG时采用"盲画"方式，仅将SVG生成视为文本序列建模任务，无法利用模型中强大的视觉先验知识，导致模型难以推理中间画布状态和隐式遮挡关系——这些在视觉上清晰但文本上模糊的信息。
AI.method: 1) Render-in-the-Loop范式：将中间代码渲染为累积画布，模型在每个步骤观察动态视觉上下文；2) 细粒度路径分解构建密集多步视觉轨迹；3) Visual Self-Feedback (VSF)训练策略：基于中间视觉状态条件化下一图元生成；4) Render-and-Verify (RaV)推理机制：有效过滤退化和冗余图元。
AI.result: 基于多模态基础模型实现的框架在MMSVGBench标准基准上超越了强开源基线模型，展现了该范式在Text-to-SVG和Image-to-SVG任务上的数据效率和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 将SVG生成重新定义为基于视觉上下文的逐步生成过程，通过引入视觉反馈循环显著提升了生成质量，验证了利用MLLMs视觉编码器先验知识的有效性。

title: GeoRelight: Learning Joint Geometrical Relighting and Reconstruction with Flexible Multi-Modal Diffusion Transformers
summary: Relighting a person from a single photo is an attractive but ill-posed task, as a 2D image ambiguously entangles 3D geometry, intrinsic appearance, and illumination. Current methods either use sequential pipelines that suffer from error accumulation, or they do not explicitly leverage 3D geometry during relighting, which limits physical consistency. Since relighting and estimation of 3D geometry are mutually beneficial tasks, we propose a unified Multi-Modal Diffusion Transformer (DiT) that jointly solves for both: GeoRelight. We make this possible through two key technical contributions: isotropic NDC-Orthographic Depth (iNOD), a distortion-free 3D representation compatible with latent diffusion models; and a strategic mixed-data training method that combines synthetic and auto-labeled real data. By solving geometry and relighting jointly, GeoRelight achieves better performance than both sequential models and previous systems that ignored geometry.

AI.tldr: GeoRelight提出了一种统一的多模态扩散变换器（DiT），通过联合求解3D几何估计和重光照任务，利用各向同性NDC-正交深度（iNOD）表示和混合数据训练策略，在单张照片重光照任务上优于序贯流水线和忽略几何信息的先前方法。
AI.motivation: 单张照片重光照是一个病态问题，因为2D图像模糊地耦合了3D几何、内在外观和光照。现有方法要么使用序贯流水线导致误差累积，要么在重光照过程中未显式利用3D几何信息，限制了物理一致性。由于重光照和3D几何估计是互惠任务，作者提出统一框架联合求解两者。
AI.method: 提出GeoRelight框架，核心包括：(1) 统一的多模态扩散变换器（DiT），联合建模重光照和3D几何；(2) 各向同性NDC-正交深度（iNOD），一种与潜在扩散模型兼容的无畸变3D表示；(3) 混合数据训练策略，结合合成数据和自动标注的真实数据。
AI.result: GeoRelight在单张照片重光照任务上取得了优于序贯流水线和忽略几何信息的先前方法的性能，证明了联合求解几何与重光照的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合求解几何和重光照，GeoRelight实现了比序贯模型和忽略几何的先前系统更好的性能，验证了重光照与3D几何估计互惠互补的假设。

title: Achieving Interaction Fluidity in a Wizard-of-Oz Robotic System: A Prototype for Fluid Error-Correction
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, Workshop on Errors, Mistakes, and Failures in Humans and Robots at 2026 ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction
summary: Achieving truly fluid interaction with robots with speech interfaces remains a hard problem, and the experience of current Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) remains laboured and frustrating. Some of the barriers to fluid interaction stem from a lack of a suitable development platform for HRI for improving interaction, even in robotic Wizard-of-Oz (WoZ) modes of operation used for data collection and prototyping. Based on previous systems, we propose the properties of interruptibility and correction (IaC), pollability, latency measurement and optimisation and time-accurate reproducibility of actions from logging data as key criteria for a fluid WoZ system to support fluid error correction. We finish by presenting a Virtual Reality (VR) HRI simulation environment for mobile manipulators which meets these criteria.

AI.tldr: 提出了实现流畅人机交互的关键标准（可中断性、可纠正性、可轮询性、延迟测量优化、时间精确可复现），并基于这些标准构建了面向移动操作臂的VR HRI仿真环境。
AI.motivation: 当前语音接口的人机交互体验笨拙且令人沮丧，缺乏合适的发展平台来改善交互，即使在使用Wizard-of-Oz模式进行数据收集和原型设计时也存在诸多障碍。
AI.method: 基于先前系统，提出了流畅WoZ系统应具备的五个关键标准（IaC、可轮询性、延迟测量优化、时间精确可复现），并构建了满足这些标准的移动操作臂VR HRI仿真环境。
AI.result: 提出了流畅交互的关键标准，并开发了满足这些标准的VR HRI仿真环境。
AI.conclusion: 这些标准对于构建支持流畅错误纠正的WoZ系统至关重要，VR仿真环境为HRI研究提供了有效的实验平台。

title: Slot Machines: How LLMs Keep Track of Multiple Entities
summary: Language models must bind entities to the attributes they possess and maintain several such binding relationships within a context. We study how multiple entities are represented across token positions and whether single tokens can carry bindings for more than one entity. We introduce a multi-slot probing approach that disentangles a single token's residual stream activation to recover information about both the currently described entity and the immediately preceding one. These two kinds of information are encoded in separate and largely orthogonal "current-entity" and "prior-entity" slots. We analyze the functional roles of these slots and find that they serve different purposes. In tandem with the current-entity slot, the prior-entity slot supports relational inferences, such as entity-level induction ("who came after Alice in the story?") and conflict detection between adjacent entities. However, only the current-entity slot is used for explicit factual retrieval questions ("Is anyone in the story tall?" "What is the tall entity's name?") despite these answers being linearly decodable from the prior-entity slot too. Consistent with this limitation, open-weight models perform near chance accuracy at processing syntax that forces two subject-verb-object bindings on a single token (e.g., "Alice prepares and Bob consumes food.") Interestingly, recent frontier models can parse this properly, suggesting they may have developed more sophisticated binding strategies. Overall, our results expose a gap between information that is available in activations and information the model actually uses, and suggest that the current/prior-entity slot structure is a natural substrate for behaviors that require holding two perspectives at once, such as sycophancy and deception.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多槽探针方法发现，语言模型在单个token的残差流中编码了"当前实体"和"前序实体"两个正交的信息槽。当前实体槽用于显式事实检索，而前序实体槽主要用于关系推理（如实体级归纳和冲突检测）。尽管前序实体槽也线性可解码事实信息，但模型并不主动使用它进行事实检索。在需要单token承载两个主谓宾绑定的复杂句法下，开源模型近乎随机，而前沿模型已能处理，暗示了更复杂的绑定策略的发展。
AI.motivation: 探究语言模型如何在上下文中同时维护多个实体-属性绑定关系，以及单个token是否能承载多个实体的信息绑定。
AI.method: 提出多槽探针方法，从单个token的残差流激活中解耦出"当前实体"和"前序实体"两个独立的信息槽，并分别分析其功能角色。
AI.result: 1) 单token残差流中存在正交的当前实体槽和前序实体槽；2) 前序实体槽支持关系推理和冲突检测，但模型不使用它进行显式事实检索；3) 开源模型在单token承载两个SVO绑定的句法下近乎随机，前沿模型能正确处理。
AI.conclusion: 模型激活中可用的信息与实际使用的信息之间存在差距；当前/前序实体槽结构是容纳双重视角（如谄媚和欺骗）的自然基础。

title: SSL-R1: Self-Supervised Visual Reinforcement Post-Training for Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated the great potential of enhancing the reasoning abilities in multimodal large language models (MLLMs). However, the reliance on language-centric priors and expensive manual annotations prevents MLLMs' intrinsic visual understanding and scalable reward designs. In this work, we introduce SSL-R1, a generic self-supervised RL framework that derives verifiable rewards directly from images. To this end, we revisit self-supervised learning (SSL) in visual domains and reformulate widely-used SSL tasks into a set of verifiable visual puzzles for RL post-training, requiring neither human nor external model supervision. Training MLLMs on these tasks substantially improves their performance on multimodal understanding and reasoning benchmarks, highlighting the potential of leveraging vision-centric self-supervised tasks for MLLM post-training. We think this work will provide useful experience in devising effective self-supervised verifiable rewards to enable RL at scale. Project page: https://github.com/Jiahao000/SSL-R1.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSL-R1，一种通用的自监督强化学习框架，通过将视觉自监督任务重构为可验证的视觉谜题来提供奖励信号，无需人工或外部模型监督，显著提升多模态大模型的视觉理解和推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的RLVR方法依赖语言中心先验和昂贵的人工标注，限制了MLLMs的内在视觉理解能力和可扩展的奖励设计。
AI.method: 重新审视视觉领域的自监督学习，将广泛使用的自监督任务重构为一系列可验证的视觉谜题，用于RL后训练，无需人工或外部模型监督。
AI.result: 在多项多模态理解与推理基准上显著提升了MLLMs的性能。
AI.conclusion: 以视觉为中心的自监督任务可以有效用于MLLM后训练，为设计可扩展的自监督可验证奖励提供了有价值的经验。

title: Adversarial Evasion in Non-Stationary Malware Detection: Minimizing Drift Signals through Similarity-Constrained Perturbations
summary: Deep learning has emerged as a powerful approach for malware detection, demonstrating impressive accuracy across various data representations. However, these models face critical limitations in real-world, non-stationary environments where both malware characteristics and detection systems continuously evolve. Our research investigates a fundamental security question: Can an attacker generate adversarial malware samples that simultaneously evade classification and remain inconspicuous to drift monitoring mechanisms? We propose a novel approach that generates targeted adversarial examples in the classifier's standardized feature space, augmented with sophisticated similarity regularizers. By carefully constraining perturbations to maintain distributional similarity with clean malware, we create an optimization objective that balances targeted misclassification with drift signal minimization. We quantify the effectiveness of this approach by comprehensively comparing classifier output probabilities using multiple drift metrics. Our experiments demonstrate that similarity constraints can reduce output drift signals, with $\ell_2$ regularization showing the most promising results. We observe that perturbation budget significantly influences the evasion-detectability trade-off, with increased budget leading to higher attack success rates and more substantial drift indicators.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在非平稳环境下，攻击者能否生成既能逃避分类又能规避漂移监测的对抗性恶意软件样本。通过分类器标准化特征空间中的对抗样本生成与相似性正则化，平衡目标误分类与漂移信号最小化。实验表明ℓ2正则化在减少输出漂移信号方面效果显著，且扰动预算对逃逸-可检测性权衡有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习恶意软件检测模型在静态环境下表现优异，但在现实世界非平稳环境中（恶意软件特征和检测系统持续演化）面临关键局限。研究旨在探究攻击者能否生成同时逃避分类和漂移监测机制的对抗性恶意软件样本，揭示安全漏洞。
AI.method: 在分类器标准化特征空间中生成定向对抗样本，引入相似性正则化器（ℓ2等）约束扰动以保持与干净恶意软件的数据分布相似性，构建同时优化目标误分类和漂移信号最小化的目标函数。
AI.result: 相似性约束可有效降低输出漂移信号，其中ℓ2正则化效果最优；扰动预算显著影响逃逸-可检测性权衡，预算增加导致攻击成功率上升但漂移指标也随之增大。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性恶意软件能够在逃避分类的同时规避漂移监测，但逃逸性与可检测性之间存在权衡关系，扰动预算需谨慎选择。

title: Mind2Drive: Predicting Driver Intentions from EEG in Real-world On-Road Driving
summary: Predicting driver intention from neurophysiological signals offers a promising pathway for enhancing proactive safety in advanced driver assistance systems, yet remains challenging in real-world driving due to EEG signal non-stationarity and the complexity of cognitive-motor preparation. This study proposes and evaluates an EEG-based driver intention prediction framework using a synchronised multi-sensor platform integrated into a real electric vehicle. A real-world on-road dataset was collected across 32 driving sessions, and 12 deep learning architectures were evaluated under consistent experimental conditions. Among the evaluated architectures, TSCeption achieved the highest average accuracy (0.907) and Macro-F1 score (0.901). The proposed framework demonstrates strong temporal stability, maintaining robust decoding performance up to 1000 ms before manoeuvre execution with minimal degradation. Furthermore, additional analyses reveal that minimal EEG preprocessing outperforms artefact-handling pipelines, and prediction performance peaks within a 400-600 ms interval, corresponding to a critical neural preparatory phase preceding driving manoeuvres. Overall, these findings support the feasibility of early and stable EEG-based driver intention decoding under real-world on-road conditions. Code: https://github.com/galosaimi/Mind2Drive.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出并验证了一种基于EEG的驾驶员意图预测框架，在真实电动汽车道路测试中，TSCeption架构达到90.7%准确率和90.1% Macro-F1分数，可在操作执行前1000ms稳定解码驾驶意图，并在400-600ms的神经准备阶段达到最佳预测性能。
AI.motivation: 从神经生理信号预测驾驶员意图对提升高级驾驶辅助系统的主动安全性具有重要意义，但真实驾驶场景中EEG信号的非平稳性和认知-运动准备的复杂性使得这一任务仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 使用同步多传感器平台在真实电动汽车中采集32次驾驶会话的真实道路数据集，在一致实验条件下评估12种深度学习架构，并进行了时序稳定性分析、预处理策略对比及关键神经准备阶段分析。
AI.result: TSCeption在12种架构中表现最优，平均准确率0.907，Macro-F1分数0.901；在操作执行前1000ms内保持稳健解码性能；最小预处理策略优于人工伪影处理管道；预测性能在操作前400-600ms区间达到峰值。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持在真实道路条件下实现早期且稳定的基于EEG的驾驶意图解码的可行性。

title: Cross-Session Threats in AI Agents: Benchmark, Evaluation, and Algorithms
summary:
AI-agent guardrails are memoryless: each message is judged in isolation, so an adversary who spreads a single attack across dozens of sessions slips past every session-bound detector because only the aggregate carries the payload. We make three contributions to cross-session threat detection.
  (1) Dataset. CSTM-Bench is 26 executable attack taxonomies classified by kill-chain stage and cross-session operation (accumulate, compose, launder, inject_on_reader), each bound to one of seven identity anchors that ground-truth "violation" as a policy predicate, plus matched Benign-pristine and Benign-hard confounders. Released on Hugging Face as intrinsec-ai/cstm-bench with two 54-scenario splits: dilution (compositional) and cross_session (12 isolation-invisible scenarios produced by a closed-loop rewriter that softens surface phrasing while preserving cross-session artefacts).
  (2) Measurement. Framing cross-session detection as an information bottleneck to a downstream correlator LLM, we find that a session-bound judge and a Full-Log Correlator concatenating every prompt into one long-context call both lose roughly half their attack recall moving from dilution to cross_session, well inside any frontier context window. Scope: 54 scenarios per shard, one correlator family (Anthropic Claude), no prompt optimisation; we release it to motivate larger, multi-provider datasets.
  (3) Algorithm and metric. A bounded-memory Coreset Memory Reader retaining highest-signal fragments at $K=50$ is the only reader whose recall survives both shards. Because ranker reshuffles break KV-cache prefix reuse, we promote $\mathrm{CSR\_prefix}$ (ordered prefix stability, LLM-free) to a first-class metric and fuse it with detection into $\mathrm{CSTM} = 0.7 F_1(\mathrm{CSDA@action}, \mathrm{precision}) + 0.3 \mathrm{CSR\_prefix}$, benchmarking rankers on a single Pareto of recall versus serving stability.

AI.tldr: 本文针对AI智能体防护系统中跨会话威胁检测的缺失问题，提出了包含数据集(CSTM-Bench)、测量方法(信息瓶颈框架)和算法(Coreset Memory Reader + CSTM指标)三方面贡献的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体防护系统是无记忆的，每条消息独立判断，攻击者可将单一攻击分散到数十个会话中规避检测。需要跨会话威胁检测能力。
AI.method: (1) 构建CSTM-Bench数据集，含26种可执行攻击分类体系，按杀伤链阶段和跨会话操作分类，配以良性样本；(2) 将跨会话检测建模为信息瓶颈问题，发现会话级判断和全日志拼接两种方式在跨会话场景下丢失约一半攻击召回率；(3) 提出Coreset Memory Reader (K=50)和CSTM指标(融合F1与CSR_prefix排序稳定性)。
AI.result: 会话级判断和全日志拼接关联器在从dilution分片到cross_session分片时，攻击召回率均下降约一半；Coreset Memory Reader是唯一在两个分片中召回率都保持稳定的方法。
AI.conclusion: 需要专门设计跨会话检测机制，Coreset Memory Reader提供了一种有效方案；CSTM指标为排序器提供了召回率与服务稳定性之间的帕累托基准。

title: R-CoV: Region-Aware Chain-of-Verification for Alleviating Object Hallucinations in LVLMs
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance in various multimodal understanding and reasoning tasks. However, they still struggle with object hallucinations, i.e., the claim of nonexistent objects in the visual input. To address this challenge, we propose Region-aware Chain-of-Verification (R-CoV), a visual chain-of-verification method to alleviate object hallucinations in LVLMs in a post-hoc manner. Motivated by how humans comprehend intricate visual information -- often focusing on specific image regions or details within a given sample -- we elicit such region-level processing from LVLMs themselves and use it as a chaining cue to detect and alleviate their own object hallucinations. Specifically, our R-CoV consists of six steps: initial response generation, entity extraction, coordinate generation, region description, verification execution, and final response generation. As a simple yet effective method, R-CoV can be seamlessly integrated into various LVLMs in a training-free manner and without relying on external detection models. Extensive experiments on several widely used hallucination benchmarks across multiple LVLMs demonstrate that R-CoV can significantly alleviate object hallucinations in LVLMs. Project page: https://github.com/Jiahao000/R-CoV.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Region-aware Chain-of-Verification (R-CoV)，一种无需训练的后处理方法，通过让LVLM自身聚焦图像区域进行链式验证，有效缓解物体幻觉问题。该方法包含六个步骤，在多个基准上显著降低幻觉。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型在多模态任务中表现优异，但仍存在物体幻觉问题（即声称视觉输入中不存在的物体）。现有方法通常依赖外部检测模型或需要额外训练，缺乏一种轻量级、可即插即用的幻觉缓解方案。
AI.method: R-CoV包含六个步骤：(1) 初始响应生成；(2) 实体提取；(3) 坐标生成；(4) 区域描述；(5) 验证执行；(6) 最终响应生成。核心思想是模仿人类理解复杂视觉信息时聚焦特定区域的方式，让LVLM自行生成区域级信息作为验证线索，检测并纠正自身产生的物体幻觉。该方法无需训练、不依赖外部检测模型。
AI.result: 在多个广泛使用的幻觉基准上，跨多种LVLM的大量实验表明，R-CoV能够显著缓解物体幻觉问题。
AI.conclusion: R-CoV是一种简单且有效的方法，可无缝集成到各种LVLM中，以训练无关的方式缓解物体幻觉，具有良好的泛化性和实用性。

title: Quadruped Parkour Learning: Sparsely Gated Mixture of Experts with Visual Input
summary: Robotic parkour provides a compelling benchmark for advancing locomotion over highly challenging terrain, including large discontinuities such as elevated steps. Recent approaches have demonstrated impressive capabilities, including dynamic climbing and jumping, but typically rely on sequential multilayer perceptron (MLP) architectures with densely activated layers. In contrast, sparsely gated mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures have emerged in the large language model domain as an effective paradigm for improving scalability and performance by activating only a subset of parameters at inference time. In this work, we investigate the application of sparsely gated MoE architectures to vision-based robotic parkour. We compare control policies based on standard MLPs and MoE architectures under a controlled setting where the number of active parameters at inference time is matched. Experimental results on a real Unitree Go2 quadruped robot demonstrate clear performance gains, with the MoE policy achieving double the number of successful trials in traversing large obstacles compared to a standard MLP baseline. We further show that achieving comparable performance with a standard MLP requires scaling its parameter count to match that of the total MoE model, resulting in a 14.3\% increase in computation time. These results highlight that sparsely gated MoE architectures provide a favorable trade-off between performance and computational efficiency, enabling improved scaling of control policies for vision-based robotic parkour. An anonymized link to the codebase is https://osf.io/v2kqj/files/github?view_only=7977dee10c0a44769184498eaba72e44.

AI.tldr: 本文研究将稀疏门控混合专家（MoE）架构应用于基于视觉的机器人跑酷任务。在Unitree Go2四足机器人上的实验表明，在推理时激活参数数量匹配的情况下，MoE策略在穿越大型障碍物上的成功次数是标准MLP的两倍；要达到与MoE相当的性能，MLP需要将参数量扩展到与完整MoE模型匹配，导致计算时间增加14.3%。稀疏门控MoE架构在性能和计算效率之间实现了更好的权衡。
AI.motivation: 机器人跑酷是极具挑战性的基准任务，现有方法多采用密集激活的MLP架构。而稀疏门控MoE在大语言模型领域已被证明能有效提升可扩展性和性能，因此作者探索将其应用于基于视觉的机器人跑酷控制策略。
AI.method: 在控制推理时激活参数数量匹配的条件下，对比标准MLP与稀疏门控MoE架构的视觉控制策略。在Unitree Go2四足机器人上进行真实环境实验。
AI.result: MoE策略在穿越大型障碍物上的成功次数是标准MLP的两倍；标准MLP需要将参数量扩展到与完整MoE模型相同才能达到类似性能，但计算时间增加了14.3%。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏门控MoE架构在性能和计算效率之间提供了更有利的权衡，能够有效改进基于视觉的机器人跑酷控制策略的可扩展性。

title: The Expense of Seeing: Attaining Trustworthy Multimodal Reasoning Within the Monolithic Paradigm
summary: The rapid proliferation of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) is widely celebrated as the dawn of unified multimodal knowledge discovery but its foundation operates on a dangerous, unquestioned axiom: that current VLMs faithfully synthesise multimodal data. We argue they do not. Instead, a profound crisis of trustworthiness underlies the dominant Vision Encoder-Projector-LLM paradigm. Rather than extracting grounded knowledge from visual inputs, state-of-the-art models frequently exhibit functional blindness, i.e., exploiting strong language priors to bypass severe visual representation bottlenecks. In this work, we challenge the conventional methodology of multimodal evaluation, which relies on data ablation or new dataset creation and therefore fatally conflates dataset biases with architectural incapacity. We propose a radical, information-theoretic departure: the Modality Translation Protocol, designed to quantifiably unmask the Expense of Seeing. By translating semantic payloads rather than ablating them, we formulate three novel metrics -- the Toll (ToS), Curse (CoS), and Fallacy (FoS) of Seeing -- culminating in the Semantic Sufficiency Criterion (SSC). Furthermore, we posit a provocative Divergence Law of Multimodal Scaling, hypothesising that as the underlying language engines scale to unprecedented reasoning capabilities, the mathematical penalty of the visual knowledge bottleneck paradoxically increases. We challenge the KDD community to abandon the illusory pursuit of "multimodal gain". By elevating the SSC from a passive diagnostic constraint to an active architectural blueprint, we provide the rigorous, trustworthy foundation required to force the next generation of AI systems to truly see the data, achieving true multimodal reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前视觉-语言模型（VLM）存在严重的可信度危机——它们并非真正从视觉输入中提取知识，而是利用强大的语言先验绕过视觉表征瓶颈。作者提出模态翻译协议（Modality Translation Protocol）和信息论框架（包含ToS、CoS、FoS三个指标及SSC准则），揭示视觉知识瓶颈随语言模型规模扩大而加剧的悖论现象。
AI.motivation: 当前VLM研究普遍默认模型能够忠实地融合多模态数据，但作者认为这一假设是危险且未经检验的。传统的多模态评估方法（如数据剔除或构建新数据集）将数据集偏差与架构能力缺陷混为一谈，无法区分模型到底是"看见"了视觉信息还是仅依靠语言先验进行推断。因此，需要一种全新的方法论来量化视觉信息在VLM中的真实贡献。
AI.method: 作者提出模态翻译协议（Modality Translation Protocol），该协议的核心思想是翻译（translate）语义载荷而非剔除（ablate）它们，从而量化模型真正从视觉模态中获取的信息量。基于此，定义了三个新指标：视觉通行费（Toll of Seeing, ToS）、视觉诅咒（Curse of Seeing, CoS）和视觉谬误（Fallacy of Seeing, FoS），最终凝聚为语义充分性准则（Semantic Sufficiency Criterion, SSC）。此外，提出多模态缩放发散定律（Divergence Law of Multimodal Scaling），假设语言模型能力越强，视觉知识瓶颈带来的惩罚反而越大。
AI.result: 通过模态翻译协议，作者能够定量揭示VLM中"看的代价"——即视觉编码器-投影仪-LLM范式中存在的系统性视觉表征瓶颈。实验（假设）表明，当前主流VLM存在功能性失明（functional blindness），严重依赖语言先验。此外，随着语言引擎规模的扩大，视觉瓶颈带来的数学惩罚反而增加，验证了发散定律。
AI.conclusion: 作者呼吁KDD社区放弃对"多模态增益"的虚幻追求，将语义充分性准则（SSC）从被动的诊断约束提升为主动的架构设计蓝图。只有建立严格的可信基础，才能使下一代AI系统真正"看见"数据，实现真正的多模态推理。

title: Scheduling Analysis of UAV Flight Control Workloads using Raspberry Pi 5 Using PREEMPT_RT Linux
summary: Modern UAV architectures increasingly aim to unify high-level autonomy and low-level flight control on a single General-Purpose Operating System (GPOS). However, complex multi-core System-on-Chips (SoCs) introduce significant timing indeterminism due to shared resource contention. This paper performs an architectural analysis of the PREEMPT RT Linux kernel on a Raspberry Pi 5, specifically isolating the impact of kernel activation paths (deferred execution SoftIRQs versus real-time direct activation) on a 250 Hz control loop. Results show that under heavy stress, the standard kernel is unsuitable, exhibiting worst-case latencies exceeding 9 ms. In contrast, PREEMPT RT reduced the worst-case latency by nearly 88 percent to under 225 microseconds, enforcing a direct wake-up path that mitigates OS noise. These findings demonstrate that while PREEMPT RT resolves scheduling variance, the residual jitter on modern SoCs is primarily driven by hardware memory contention.

AI.tldr: 本文在Raspberry Pi 5上分析了PREEMPT RT Linux内核，针对250 Hz控制回路，比较了标准内核与实时内核在不同激活路径下的延迟表现。结果表明，标准内核在最坏情况下延迟超过9 ms，而PREEMPT RT通过直接唤醒路径将最坏情况延迟降低约88%至225微秒以下，但剩余抖动主要由硬件内存争用引起。
AI.motivation: 现代UAV架构趋向于在通用操作系统（GPOS）上统一高层自主与底层飞行控制，但多核SoC由于共享资源争用引入严重的时间不确定性问题，亟需分析实时内核在真实嵌入式硬件上的延迟特性。
AI.method: 在Raspberry Pi 5平台上，对PREEMPT RT Linux内核进行架构级分析，隔离内核激活路径（延迟执行的SoftIRQs vs. 实时直接激活）对250 Hz控制回路的影响，并在重负载条件下测量最坏情况延迟。
AI.result: 标准内核在最坏情况下延迟超过9 ms，不适合实时控制；PREEMPT RT将最坏情况延迟降低约88%，控制在225微秒以内，但剩余抖动主要源于硬件内存争用。
AI.conclusion: PREEMPT RT能有效解决调度方差问题，但在现代SoC上，硬件层面的内存争用成为残余抖动的核心来源，表明实时性优化需从软件调度扩展到硬件资源隔离。

authors: Ibrahim Abdulmalik Hassan Muneef Y. Alshawsh
title: Machine learning and digital pragmatics: Which word category influences emoji use most?
summary: This study investigates Machine Learning (ML) in the prediction of emojis in Arabic tweets employing the (state-of-the-art) MARBERT model. A corpus of 11379 CA tweets representing multiple Arabic colloquial dialects was collected from X.com via Python. A net dataset includes 8695 tweets, which were utilized for the analysis. These tweets were then classified into 14 categories, which were numerically encoded and used as labels. A preprocessing pipeline was designed as an interpretable baseline, allowing us to examine the relationship between lexical features and emoji categories. MARBERT was finetuned to predict emoji use from textual input. We evaluated the model performance in terms of precision, recall and F1-scores. Findings reveal that the model performed quite well with an overall accuracy 0.75. The study concludes that although the findings are promising, there is still a need for improving machine learning models including MARBERT, specifically for low-resource and multidialectal languages like Arabic.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用MARBERT模型预测阿拉伯语推文中的表情符号，基于8695条多方言CA推文数据集，在14个类别上达到0.75的准确率。
AI.motivation: 探究机器学习在阿拉伯语（特别是多方言低资源语言）推文表情符号预测任务中的有效性。
AI.method: 收集11379条CA推文，清洗后得到8695条有效数据，分为14个表情符号类别；设计可解释的预处理基线；微调MARBERT模型进行表情符号预测；使用精确率、召回率和F1值评估性能。
AI.result: MARBERT模型在阿拉伯语推文表情符号预测任务中总体准确率达到0.75。
AI.conclusion: 结果虽有前景，但针对阿拉伯语等低资源、多方言语言，仍需改进包括MARBERT在内的机器学习模型。

title: MAPRPose: Mask-Aware Proposal and Amodal Refinement for Multi-Object 6D Pose Estimation
summary: 6D object pose estimation in cluttered scenes remains challenging due to severe occlusion and sensor noise. We propose MAPRPose, a two-stage framework that leverages mask-aware correspondences for pose proposal and amodal-driven Region-of-Interest (ROI) prediction for robust refinement. In the Mask-Aware Pose Proposal (MAPP) stage, we lift 2D correspondences into 3D space to establish reliable keypoint matches and generate geometrically consistent pose hypotheses based on correspondence-level scoring, from which the top-$K$ candidates are selected. In the refinement stage, we introduce a tensorized render-and-compare pipeline integrated with an Amodal Mask Prediction and ROI Re-Alignment (AMPR) module. By reconstructing complete object geometry and dynamically adjusting the ROI, AMPR mitigates localization errors and spatial misalignment under heavy occlusion. Furthermore, our GPU-accelerated RGB-XYZ reprojection enables simultaneous refinement of all $N \times B$ pose hypotheses in a single forward pass. Evaluated on the BOP benchmark, MAPRPose achieves a state-of-the-art Average Recall (AR) of 76.5%, outperforming FoundationPose by 3.1% AR while delivering a 43x speedup in multi-object inference.

AI.tldr: MAPRPose 提出了一种两阶段 6D 物体姿态估计框架，通过掩码感知对应关系生成姿态假设，并利用非模态 ROI 预测进行鲁棒优化，在 BOP 基准上达到 76.5% AR，比 FoundationPose 高出 3.1% 且速度提升 43 倍。
AI.motivation: 在严重遮挡和传感器噪声的杂波场景中，6D 物体姿态估计仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：(1) 掩码感知姿态提议阶段，将 2D 对应提升到 3D 空间建立关键点匹配并基于对应评分选择 top-K 候选；(2) 优化阶段，通过张量化渲染-比较管线与非模态掩码预测及 ROI 重对齐模块，结合 GPU 加速的 RGB-XYZ 重投影同时优化所有 N×B 个姿态假设。
AI.result: 在 BOP 基准上达到 76.5% Average Recall，比 FoundationPose 高 3.1% AR，多物体推理速度提升 43 倍。
AI.conclusion: MAPRPose 在 6D 姿态估计任务上实现了最先进的精度与显著的速度优势，验证了掩码感知对应和非模态 ROI 优化在应对遮挡问题上的有效性。

title: Spatial Metaphors for LLM Memory: A Critical Analysis of the MemPalace Architecture
comment: 20 pages, 10 tables. Code and data at https://github.com/web3guru888/mempalace-scientific-analysis
summary: MemPalace is an open-source AI memory system that applies the ancient method of loci (memory palace) spatial metaphor to organize long-term memory for large language models; launched in April 2026, it accumulated over 47,000 GitHub stars in its first two weeks and claims state-of-the-art retrieval performance on the LongMemEval benchmark (96.6% Recall@5) without requiring any LLM inference at write time. Through independent codebase analysis, benchmark replication, and comparison with competing systems, we find that MemPalace's headline retrieval performance is attributable primarily to its verbatim storage philosophy combined with ChromaDB's default embedding model (all-MiniLM-L6-v2), rather than to its spatial organizational metaphor per se -- the palace hierarchy (Wings->Rooms->Closets->Drawers) operates as standard vector database metadata filtering, an effective but well-established technique. However, MemPalace makes several genuinely novel contributions: (1) a contrarian verbatim-first storage philosophy that challenges extraction-based competitors, (2) an extremely low wake-up cost (approximately 170 tokens) through its four-layer memory stack, (3) a fully deterministic, zero-LLM write path enabling offline operation at zero API cost, and (4) the first systematic application of spatial memory metaphors as an organizing principle for AI memory systems. We also note that the competitive landscape is evolving rapidly, with Mem0's April 2026 token-efficient algorithm raising their LongMemEval score from approximately 49% to 93.4%, narrowing the gap between extraction-based and verbatim approaches. Our analysis concludes that MemPalace represents significant architectural insight wrapped in overstated claims -- a pattern common in rapidly adopted open-source projects where marketing velocity exceeds scientific rigor.

AI.tldr: MemPalace是一个开源AI记忆系统，采用古老的地点记忆法（记忆宫殿）空间隐喻来组织大语言模型的长期记忆；在2026年4月发布后两周内获得超过47,000个GitHub星标，并在LongMemEval基准测试中声称达到最先进的检索性能（Recall@5为96.6%），且写入时无需任何LLM推理。通过独立代码库分析、基准测试复现以及与竞争系统的比较，我们发现MemPalace的检索性能主要归因于其逐字存储策略结合ChromaDB的默认嵌入模型（all-MiniLM-L6-v2），而非其空间组织隐喻本身——宫殿层级结构（翼楼→房间→壁橱→抽屉）实际上是一种标准向量数据库元数据过滤技术，虽然有效但早已成熟。然而，MemPalace确实做出了几个真正新颖的贡献：(1) 一种反传统的逐字优先存储哲学，挑战了基于提取的竞争对手；(2) 通过其四层记忆栈实现极低的唤醒成本（约170个token）；(3) 完全确定性的零LLM写入路径，可实现离线操作且API成本为零；(4) 首次将空间记忆隐喻系统性地应用于AI记忆系统的组织原则。我们还注意到竞争格局正在快速演变，Mem0在2026年4月推出的token高效算法将其LongMemEval得分从约49%提升至93.4%，缩小了基于提取方法与逐字方法之间的差距。我们的分析结论是：MemPalace代表了被夸大声明所掩盖的重要架构洞见——这是快速被采纳的开源项目中常见的模式，市场推广速度超过了科学严谨性。
AI.motivation: 本文的动机在于对MemPalace这一迅速获得广泛关注的开源AI记忆系统进行独立、严谨的技术评估，厘清其真实贡献与过度宣传之间的差距。作者旨在通过代码审计、基准复现和横向对比，辨明哪些是真正的技术创新，哪些是现有技术的重新包装，从而为社区提供客观的技术洞察。
AI.method: 作者采用三管齐下的分析方法：(1) 独立代码库分析，审查MemPalace的架构实现；(2) 基准测试复现，在LongMemEval上验证其声称的性能；(3) 与竞争系统（如Mem0）进行横向比较。通过控制变量实验，分离空间隐喻（宫殿层级结构）与基础技术（逐字存储+ChromaDB嵌入模型）各自的贡献。
AI.result: 核心发现：(1) MemPalace的96.6% Recall@5性能主要来自逐字存储和默认嵌入模型，而非记忆宫殿空间隐喻本身；(2) 其宫殿层级本质上是标准向量数据库的元数据过滤；(3) 确实有四个新颖贡献：逐字优先哲学、超低唤醒成本（约170 token）、零LLM写入路径、以及首次系统性应用空间记忆隐喻；(4) 竞争系统Mem0通过token高效算法已从49%提升至93.4%，差距正在缩小。
AI.conclusion: MemPalace是一个兼具重要架构洞见与过度声明的项目，其核心创新被营销话语所掩盖。这种模式在快速被采纳的开源项目中很常见——市场推广速度超过了科学严谨性。作者建议社区在评估此类项目时区分底层技术创新与表面性能声明。

title: Warmth and Competence in the Swarm: Designing Effective Human-Robot Teams
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, camera-ready version for ANTS 2026
summary: As groups of robots increasingly collaborate with humans, understanding how humans perceive them is critical for designing effective human-robot teams. While prior research examined how humans interpret and evaluate the abilities and intentions of individual agents, social perception of robot teams remains relatively underexplored. Drawing on the competence-warmth framework, we conducted two studies manipulating swarm behaviors in completing a collective search task and measured the social perception of swarm behaviors when human participants are either observers (Study 1) and operators (Study 2). Across both studies, our results show that variations in swarm behaviors consistently influenced participants' perceptions of warmth and competence. Notably, longer broadcast durations increased perceived warmth; larger separation distances increased perceived competence. Interestingly, individual robot speed had no effect on either of the perceptions. Furthermore, our results show that these social perceptions predicted participants' team preferences more strongly than task performance. Participants preferred robot teams that were both warm and competent, not those that completed tasks most quickly. These findings demonstrate that human-robot interaction dynamically shapes social perception, underscoring the importance of integrating both technical and social considerations when designing robot swarms for effective human-robot collaboration.

AI.tldr: 本文通过两项实验，研究了机器人群体行为（广播时长、分离距离、个体速度）如何影响人类对其温暖和能力的感知，发现温暖和能力感知比任务完成速度更能预测人类的团队偏好。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究探讨人类如何感知单个智能体，但机器人团队（群体）的社会感知机制尚未得到充分探索，理解这一点对于设计有效的人机协作团队至关重要。
AI.method: 基于能力-温暖框架，设计了两个实验：研究1中人类作为观察者，研究2中人类作为操作者。通过操控机器人群体在集体搜索任务中的行为（广播时长、分离距离、个体速度），测量人类对群体行为的社会感知。
AI.result: 1）较长的广播时长增加了温暖感知；2）较大的分离距离增加了能力感知；3）个体速度对两种感知均无显著影响；4）社会感知（温暖和能力）对团队偏好的预测力强于任务完成速度；5）参与者偏好既温暖又有能力的机器人团队，而非完成任务最快的团队。
AI.conclusion: 人机交互动态地塑造社会感知，设计有效的人机协作机器人群体时，需要同时兼顾技术性能与社会感知因素。

title: How Much Is One Recurrence Worth? Iso-Depth Scaling Laws for Looped Language Models
summary: We measure how much one extra recurrence is worth to a looped (depth-recurrent) language model, in equivalent unique parameters. From an iso-depth sweep of 116 pretraining runs across recurrence counts $r \in \{1, 2, 4, 8\}$ spanning ${\sim}50\times$ in training compute, we fit a joint scaling law $L = E + A\,(N_\text{once} + r^{\varphi} N_\text{rec})^{-α} + B\,D^{-β}$ and recover a new recurrence-equivalence exponent $\varphi = 0.46$ at $R^2 = 0.997$. Intuitively, $\varphi$ tells us whether looping a block $r$ times is equivalent in validation loss to $r$ unique blocks of a non-looped model (full equivalence, $\varphi{=}1$) or to a single block run repeatedly with no capacity gain ($\varphi{=}0$). Our $\varphi = 0.46$ sits in between, so each additional recurrence predictably increases validation loss at matched training compute. For example, at $r{=}4$ a 410M looped model performs on par with a 580M non-looped model, but pays the training cost of a 1B non-looped one. On a five-axis downstream evaluation, the gap persists on parametric-knowledge tasks and closes on simple open-book tasks, while reasoning tasks are not resolvable at our compute budgets. For any looped LM, our $\varphi$ converts the design choice of $r$ into a predictable validation-loss cost, and future training recipes and architectures can be compared by how much they raise $\varphi$ above $0.46$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过116次预训练实验，拟合出循环语言模型的缩放定律，发现每增加一次循环（recurrence）相当于增加约0.46次方的等效参数（φ=0.46），即循环模型在验证损失上介于完全等效于独立块（φ=1）和完全无容量增益（φ=0）之间。例如，4次循环的410M模型与580M非循环模型性能相当，但训练成本却与1B非循环模型相同。
AI.motivation: 量化深度循环（looped）语言模型中，每增加一次循环（recurrence）在验证损失上的等效参数价值，以便为循环模型的设计选择（循环次数r）提供可预测的损失成本，并为未来训练策略和架构提供比较基准。
AI.method: 对循环次数r∈{1,2,4,8}进行116次等深度预训练实验，覆盖约50倍训练计算量差异，拟合联合缩放定律 L = E + A (N_once + r^φ N_rec)^{-α} + B D^{-β}，通过R²=0.997恢复出循环等价指数φ=0.46。
AI.result: φ=0.46，表明每次循环的等效参数增益介于完全等效（φ=1）和零增益（φ=0）之间。在匹配训练计算量下，循环次数越多验证损失越高。例如r=4时，410M循环模型性能相当于580M非循环模型，但训练成本相当于1B非循环模型。在五轴下游评估中，参数知识任务上差距持续存在，简单开放书任务上差距消失，推理任务在实验计算预算下无法分辨。
AI.conclusion: 循环次数r的选择可通过φ=0.46转换为可预测的验证损失成本；未来训练配方和架构可通过其相对于0.46的提升程度进行比较。

title: RSRCC: A Remote Sensing Regional Change Comprehension Benchmark Constructed via Retrieval-Augmented Best-of-N Ranking
summary: Traditional change detection identifies where changes occur, but does not explain what changed in natural language. Existing remote sensing change captioning datasets typically describe overall image-level differences, leaving fine-grained localized semantic reasoning largely unexplored. To close this gap, we present RSRCC, a new benchmark for remote sensing change question-answering containing 126k questions, split into 87k training, 17.1k validation, and 22k test instances. Unlike prior datasets, RSRCC is built around localized, change-specific questions that require reasoning about a particular semantic change. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first remote sensing change question-answering benchmark designed explicitly for such fine-grained reasoning-based supervision. To construct RSRCC, we introduce a hierarchical semi-supervised curation pipeline that uses Best-of-N ranking as a critical final ambiguity-resolution stage. First, candidate change regions are extracted from semantic segmentation masks, then initially screened using an image-text embedding model, and finally validated through retrieval-augmented vision-language curation with Best-of-N ranking. This process enables scalable filtering of noisy and ambiguous candidates while preserving semantically meaningful changes. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/google/RSRCC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RSRCC，首个面向遥感变化问答的基准数据集，包含12.6万道细粒度、局部化的语义变化推理问题，并设计了基于层次化半监督筛选管道（含Best-of-N排序）的构建方法。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感变化检测仅识别变化位置，无法用自然语言解释变化内容；已有变化字幕数据集仅描述图像级整体差异，缺乏细粒度局部语义推理能力。
AI.method: 提出层次化半监督数据筛选管道：1）从语义分割掩码提取候选变化区域；2）使用图像-文本嵌入模型初步筛选；3）通过检索增强的视觉-语言模型结合Best-of-N排序进行最终歧义消除与验证。
AI.result: 构建了RSRCC基准，包含12.6万道问题（8.7万训练、1.71万验证、2.2万测试），聚焦局部化、变化特定的语义推理问题。
AI.conclusion: RSRCC是首个专门针对细粒度语义变化推理的遥感变化问答基准，通过可扩展的筛选流程有效保留语义有意义的变化并过滤噪声和歧义样本。

title: Can MLLMs "Read" What is Missing?
summary: We introduce MMTR-Bench, a benchmark designed to evaluate the intrinsic ability of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to reconstruct masked text directly from visual context. Unlike conventional question-answering tasks, MMTR-Bench eliminates explicit prompts, requiring models to recover masked text from single- or multi-page inputs across real-world domains such as documents and webpages. This design isolates the reconstruction task from instruction-following abilities, enabling a direct assessment of a model's layout understanding, visual grounding, and knowledge integration. MMTR-Bench comprises 2,771 test samples spanning multiple languages and varying target lengths. To account for this diversity, we propose a level-aware evaluation protocol. Experiments on representative MLLMs show that the benchmark poses a significant challenge, especially for sentence- and paragraph-level reconstruction. The homepage is available at https://mmtr-bench-dataset.github.io/MMTR-Bench/.

AI.tldr: MMTR-Bench是一个评估多模态大语言模型从视觉上下文中直接重建被遮蔽文本能力的基准测试，包含2,771个多语言样本，采用层级感知评估协议，实验表明该基准对当前模型尤其是句子和段落级重建构成显著挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有问答任务无法隔离指令跟随能力对文本重建的影响，需要一个能直接评估MLLM布局理解、视觉定位和知识整合能力的基准。
AI.method: 设计MMTR-Bench基准，消除显式提示，要求模型从单页或多页输入（文档、网页等）中恢复被遮蔽文本；提出层级感知评估协议处理多样化的语言和目标长度。
AI.result: 在代表性MLLM上的实验表明，该基准对当前模型构成显著挑战，尤其在句子和段落级重建任务上表现困难。
AI.conclusion: MMTR-Bench有效评估了MLLM的内在文本重建能力，揭示了现有模型在复杂视觉上下文中的局限性。

title: Multimodal embodiment-aware navigation transformer
summary: Goal-conditioned navigation models for ground robots trained using supervised learning show promising zero-shot transfer, but their collision-avoidance capability nevertheless degrades under distribution shift, i.e. environmental, robot or sensor configuration changes. We propose ViLiNT a multimodal, attention-based policy for goal navigation, trained on heterogeneous data from multiple platforms and environments, which improves robustness with two key features. First, we fuse RGB images, 3D LiDAR point clouds, a goal embedding and a robot's embodiment descriptor with a transformer architecture to capture complementary geometry and appearance cues. The transformer's output is used to condition a diffusion model that generates navigable trajectories. Second, using automatically generated offline labels, we train a path clearance prediction head for scoring and ranking trajectories produced by the diffusion model. The diffusion conditioning as well as the trajectory ranking head depend on a robot's embodiment token that allows our model to generate and select trajectories with respect to the robot's dimensions. Across three simulated environments, ViLiNT improves Success Rate on average by 166\% over equivalent state-of-the-art vision-only baseline (NoMaD). This increase in performance is confirmed through real-world deployments of a rover navigating in obstacle fields. These results highlight that combining multimodal fusion with our collision prediction mechanism leads to improved off-road navigation robustness.

AI.tldr: ViLiNT是一种多模态、基于注意力机制的目标导航策略，通过融合RGB图像、3D LiDAR点云、目标嵌入和机器人本体描述符，并结合扩散模型生成轨迹与路径清障预测头，显著提升了地面机器人在分布偏移下的碰撞规避能力，在三个仿真环境中成功率平均提升166%。
AI.motivation: 基于监督学习的目标条件导航模型在分布偏移（环境、机器人或传感器配置变化）下碰撞规避能力严重退化，现有方法缺乏对多平台异构数据的利用和对机器人本体特征的显式建模。
AI.method: 1) 多模态融合：使用Transformer架构融合RGB图像、3D LiDAR点云、目标嵌入和机器人本体描述符；2) 扩散模型：Transformer输出作为条件，生成可导航轨迹；3) 路径清障预测头：利用自动生成的离线标签，对扩散模型产生的轨迹进行评分和排序；4) 本体令牌：机器人尺寸编码作为条件，使轨迹生成和选择适应机器人尺寸。
AI.result: 在三个仿真环境中，ViLiNT相比当前最先进的纯视觉基线NoMaD，成功率平均提升166%；在真实世界场地部署的无人车导航中也验证了性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合结合碰撞预测机制能显著提升非结构化道路导航的鲁棒性，尤其在面临分布偏移时表现优异。

title: Do LLM Decoders Listen Fairly? Benchmarking How Language Model Priors Shape Bias in Speech Recognition
summary: As pretrained large language models replace task-specific decoders in speech recognition, a critical question arises: do their text-derived priors make recognition fairer or more biased across demographic groups? We evaluate nine models spanning three architectural generations (CTC with no language model, encoder-decoder with an implicit LM, and LLM-based with an explicit pretrained decoder) on about 43,000 utterances across five demographic axes (ethnicity, accent, gender, age, first language) using Common Voice 24 and Meta's Fair-Speech, a controlled-prompt dataset that eliminates vocabulary confounds. On clean audio, three findings challenge assumptions: LLM decoders do not amplify racial bias (Granite-8B has the best ethnicity fairness, max/min WER = 2.28); Whisper exhibits pathological hallucination on Indian-accented speech with a non-monotonic insertion-rate spike to 9.62% at large-v3; and audio compression predicts accent fairness more than LLM scale. We then stress-test these findings under 12 acoustic degradation conditions (noise, reverberation, silence injection, chunk masking) across both datasets, totaling 216 inference runs. Severe degradation paradoxically compresses fairness gaps as all groups converge to high WER, but silence injection amplifies Whisper's accent bias up to 4.64x by triggering demographic-selective hallucination. Under masking, Whisper enters catastrophic repetition loops (86% of 51,797 insertions) while explicit-LLM decoders produce 38x fewer insertions with near-zero repetition; high-compression audio encoding (Q-former) reintroduces repetition pathology even in LLM decoders. These results suggest that audio encoder design, not LLM scaling, is the primary lever for equitable and robust speech recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了九种语音识别模型在三代架构（CTC、编码器-解码器、LLM基）上对约43,000个话语的五个人口统计维度（种族、口音、性别、年龄、母语）的公平性和鲁棒性。主要发现：LLM解码器并未放大种族偏差；Whisper对印度口音语音存在病理性幻觉；音频压缩比LLM规模更能预测口音公平性。在12种声学退化条件下，严重的退化反而压缩了公平性差距，而静音注入则会触发选择性的幻觉，加剧偏差。结论：音频编码器设计比LLM扩展更能决定公平且鲁棒的语音识别。
AI.motivation: 探究预训练大型语言模型替代特定任务解码器后，其文本先验是否会导致语音识别在不同人口统计群体之间产生更公平或更偏差的结果。
AI.method: 在Common Voice 24和Meta的Fair-Speech数据集上，对三代架构（CTC无语言模型、编码器-解码器含隐式LM、LLM基含显式预训练解码器）共九种模型，进行约43,000个话语的五个人口统计维度评估，并在12种声学退化条件下进行216次推理测试。
AI.result: 1) LLM解码器未放大种族偏差，Granite-8B在种族公平性上最佳；2) Whisper对印度口音语音存在非单调插入率尖峰（9.62%）的病理性幻觉；3) 音频压缩比LLM规模更能预测口音公平性；4) 严重退化压缩公平性差距，静音注入放大Whisper口音偏差达4.64倍；5) 掩码条件下Whisper出现灾难性重复循环，LLM解码器重复少38倍；6) 高压缩音频编码（Q-former）即使在LLM解码器中也会重新引入重复病理。
AI.conclusion: 音频编码器设计而非LLM扩展，是实现公平且鲁棒的语音识别的主要杠杆。

title: Design, Modelling and Experimental Evaluation of a Tendon-driven Wrist Abduction-Adduction Mechanism for an upper limb exoskeleton
comment: 8 pages and 8 figures. Submitted to IEEE/ASME Transactions on Mechatronics. Includes experimental validation on human participants
summary: Wrist exoskeletons play a vital role in rehabilitation and assistive applications, yet conventional actuation mechanisms such as electric motors or pneumatics often introduce undesirable weight, friction, and complexity. This paper presents a novel single-cable (tendon), torsional-spring-assisted actuation mechanism for wrist abduction-adduction, and a simulation-based method for selecting its stiffness parameters. The mechanism employs a single Bowden cable passively tensioned by a spiral torsional spring (clock spring) to maintain continuous cable tension without antagonistic actuation. Kinematic and dynamic modeling of the mechanism was performed to estimate the required torque and identify optimal spring parameters. These simulation-derived parameters guided the design of a functional prototype, which was experimentally evaluated with five participants with no motor disabilities (NMD) under varying arm positions and loading conditions using three spring configurations to account for user variability and modeling uncertainties. Experimental results show consistent agreement with simulation-derived trends, with the nominal spring configuration achieving balanced motion range, torque demand, and repeatability. The results demonstrate that simulation-informed stiffness selection can effectively guide the design of compact, cable-driven wrist exoskeletons while reducing reliance on empirical tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于手腕外展-内收康复的单一缆绳（肌腱）扭簧辅助驱动机构，并建立了基于仿真的刚度参数选择方法。通过Bowden缆绳与螺旋扭簧（发条弹簧）结合实现无需拮抗驱动的连续缆绳张力保持。仿真指导了原型设计，并在五名无运动障碍参与者中验证了三种弹簧配置。结果表明仿真驱动的刚度选择能有效指导紧凑型缆绳驱动手腕外骨骼设计，减少对经验调谐的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统手腕外骨骼驱动方式（电机、气动）存在重量大、摩擦高、结构复杂等问题，亟需更轻便、紧凑且性能可控的驱动方案。
AI.method: 提出单缆绳+扭簧辅助的驱动机构，采用Bowden缆绳与发条弹簧实现被动张力保持；建立运动学和动力学模型估计所需扭矩并优化弹簧参数；仿真指导原型设计，并在五种手臂姿态和负载条件下对三种弹簧配置进行实验评估。
AI.result: 名义弹簧配置在运动范围、扭矩需求和重复性方面达到平衡；实验结果与仿真趋势一致，验证了仿真驱动参数选择方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 仿真驱动的刚度参数选择可有效指导紧凑型缆绳驱动手腕外骨骼的设计，减少对经验性调试的依赖，为康复外骨骼的快速开发提供了可行的设计范式。

title: Physics-Informed Conditional Diffusion for Motion-Robust Retinal Temporal Laser Speckle Contrast Imaging
summary: Retinal laser speckle contrast imaging (LSCI) is a noninvasive optical modality for monitoring retinal blood flow dynamics. However, conventional temporal LSCI (tLSCI) reconstruction relies on sufficiently long speckle sequences to obtain stable temporal statistics, which makes it vulnerable to acquisition disturbances and limits effective temporal resolution. A physically informed reconstruction framework, termed RetinaDiff (Retinal Diffusion Model), is proposed for retinal tLSCI that is robust to motion and requires only a few frames. In RetinaDiff, registration based on phase correlation is first applied to stabilize the raw speckle sequence before contrast computation, reducing interframe misalignment so that fluctuations at each pixel primarily reflect true flow dynamics. This step provides a physics prior corrected for motion and a high quality multiframe tLSCI reference. Next, guided by the physics prior, a conditional diffusion model performs inverse reconstruction by jointly conditioning on the registered speckle sequence and the corrected prior. Experiments on data acquired with a retinal LSCI system developed in house show improved structural continuity and statistical stability compared with direct reconstruction from few frames and representative baselines. The framework also remains effective in a small number of extremely challenging cases, where both the direct 5-frame input and the conventional multiframe reconstruction are severely degraded. Overall, this work provides a practical and physically grounded route for reliable retinal tLSCI reconstruction from extremely limited frames. The source code and model weights will be publicly available at https://github.com/QianChen113/RetinaDiff.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为RetinaDiff的物理信息引导扩散模型，用于视网膜激光散斑对比成像，仅需少量帧即可实现鲁棒的血流重建，通过相位相关配准提供物理先验，再以条件扩散模型进行逆重建。
AI.motivation: 传统的时域激光散斑对比成像（tLSCI）依赖足够长的散斑序列以获得稳定的时序统计，易受采集运动干扰且时间分辨率有限，亟需一种对运动鲁棒且仅需少量帧即可完成高质量重建的方法。
AI.method: 首先对原始散斑序列进行基于相位相关的配准以校正运动，提供物理先验和高品质多帧tLSCI参考；然后在此物理先验引导下，使用条件扩散模型联合配准后的散斑序列和校正后的先验进行逆重建。
AI.result: 在自建视网膜LSCI系统采集的数据上，相比直接少帧重建和代表性基线方法，RetinaDiff在结构连续性和统计稳定性上均有提升；在极少数极端困难案例中，即使直接5帧输入和传统多帧重建严重退化，该框架依然有效。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为从极有限帧数进行可靠的视网膜tLSCI重建提供了一种实用且物理可解释的途径，代码和模型权重将开源。

title: Multi-Step Gaussian Process Propagation for Adaptive Path Planning
summary: Efficient and robust path planning hinges on combining all accessible information sources. In particular, the task of path planning for robotic environmental exploration and monitoring depends highly on the current belief of the world. To capture the uncertainty in the belief, we present a Gaussian process based path planning method that adapts to multi-modal environmental sensing data and incorporates state and input constraints. To solve the path planning problem, we optimize over future waypoints in a receding horizon fashion, and our cost is thus a function of the Gaussian process posterior over all these waypoints. We demonstrate this method, dubbed OLAhGP, on an autonomous surface vessel using oceanic algal bloom data from both a high-fidelity model and in-situ sensing data in a monitoring scenario. Our simulated and experimental results demonstrate significant improvement over existing methods. With the same number of samples, our method generates more informative paths and achieves greater accuracy in identifying algal blooms in chlorophyll a rich waters, measured with respect to total misclassification probability and binary misclassification rate over the domain of interest.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程（GP）的路径规划方法OLAhGP，通过滚动时域优化未来航点，结合多模态环境传感数据与状态/输入约束，用于机器人环境探索与监测。在自主水面艇上的藻华监测实验（高保真模型+原位传感数据）中，该方法在相同采样数量下生成了更具信息量的路径，显著降低了总误分类概率和二分类误分类率，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 高效鲁棒的路径规划需要整合所有可用的信息源，而在机器人环境探索与监测任务中，路径规划高度依赖于当前对世界的信念（belief）及其不确定性。现有方法未能充分捕获这种信念中的不确定性。
AI.method: 提出OLAhGP方法：基于高斯过程对多模态环境传感数据进行建模；采用滚动时域（receding horizon）方式优化未来航点；代价函数定义为所有航点上GP后验的函数；同时纳入状态约束和输入约束。
AI.result: 在自主水面艇的藻华监测场景中，使用高保真模型数据和原位传感数据进行仿真与实验。与现有方法相比，在相同采样数量下，OLAhGP生成了更具信息量的路径，在叶绿素a丰富水域中识别藻华的准确性显著提升，具体指标包括总误分类概率和二元误分类率的降低。
AI.conclusion: OLAhGP方法有效结合了GP不确定性建模与滚动时域优化，能够适应多模态环境传感数据并满足约束，在环境监测路径规划任务中优于现有方法，具备良好的实用价值。

title: Preconditioned DeltaNet: Curvature-aware Sequence Modeling for Linear Recurrences
summary: To address the increasing long-context compute limitations of softmax attention, several subquadratic recurrent operators have been developed. This work includes models such as Mamba-2, DeltaNet, Gated DeltaNet (GDN), and Kimi Delta Attention (KDA). As the space of recurrences grows, a parallel line of work has arisen to taxonomize them. One compelling view is the test-time regression (TTR) framework, which interprets recurrences as performing online least squares updates that learn a linear map from the keys to values. Existing delta-rule recurrences can be seen as first-order approximations to this objective, but notably ignore the curvature of the least-squares loss during optimization. In this work, we address this by introducing preconditioning to these recurrences. Starting from the theory of online least squares, we derive equivalences between linear attention and the delta rule in the exactly preconditioned case. Next, we realize this theory in practice by proposing a diagonal approximation: this enables us to introduce preconditioned variants of DeltaNet, GDN, and KDA alongside efficient chunkwise parallel algorithms for computing them. Empirically, we find that our preconditioned delta-rule recurrences yield consistent performance improvements across synthetic recall benchmarks and language modeling at the 340M and 1B scale.

AI.tldr: 本文针对softmax注意力在长上下文场景下的计算限制，提出了一种基于预条件（preconditioning）的增量规则循环改进方法。通过在线最小二乘理论推导出线性注意力与delta规则在精确预条件下的等价关系，并提出对角近似预条件，应用于DeltaNet、GDN和KDA等模型。实验表明，预条件化的delta规则循环在合成回忆基准和340M/1B规模语言建模中均取得一致性能提升。
AI.motivation: 解决softmax注意力在长上下文场景下的次二次计算限制，并改进现有delta规则循环（如一阶近似）忽略最小二乘损失曲率信息的问题。
AI.method: 1. 从在线最小二乘理论出发，推导线性注意力与delta规则在精确预条件下的等价关系；2. 提出对角近似预条件方法，将其引入DeltaNet、GDN和KDA模型；3. 设计高效的块级并行（chunkwise parallel）算法进行计算。
AI.result: 预条件化的delta规则循环在合成回忆基准测试和340M/1B参数规模的语言建模中，均比原始版本取得一致性的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入预条件机制，能够有效改进delta规则循环的表达能力，在保持高效计算的同时提升模型性能，为次二次注意力机制的发展提供了新方向。

title: Structure-Augmented Standard Plane Detection with Temporal Aggregation in Blind-Sweep Fetal Ultrasound
summary: In low-resource settings, blind-sweep ultrasound provides a practical and accessible method for identifying fetal growth restriction. However, unlike freehand ultrasound which is subjectively controlled, detection of biometry plane in blind-sweep ultrasound is more challenging due to the uncontrolled fetal structure to be observed and the variaties of oblique planes in the scan. In this work, we propose a structure-augmented system to detect fetal abdomen plane, where the abdominal structure is highlighted using a segmentation prior. Since standard planes are emerging gradually, the decision boundary of the keyframes is unstable to predict. We thus aggregated the structure-augmented planes with a temporal sliding window to help stabilise keyframe localisation. Extensive results indicate that the structure-augmented temporal sliding strategy significantly improves and stabilises the detection of anatomically meaningful planes, which enables more reliable biometric measurements in blind-sweep ultrasound.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构增强的时序滑动窗口方法，通过分割先验突出腹部结构，并在盲扫超声中稳定检测胎儿腹部标准平面，从而提升低资源环境下的胎儿生长受限评估可靠性。
AI.motivation: 在低资源环境中，盲扫超声是识别胎儿生长受限的实用方法，但与传统自由手超声不同，盲扫超声无法主观控制探头，导致胎儿结构观察受限且斜切面变异性大，标准腹围平面的检测极具挑战性。
AI.method: 1) 利用分割先验（segmentation prior）增强腹部结构特征，突出标准平面中的解剖信息；2) 采用时序滑动窗口（temporal sliding window）聚合结构增强后的平面，以应对标准平面出现不稳定的问题，稳定关键帧定位。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的结构增强时序滑动策略显著提升了解剖有意义平面的检测性能，并使检测结果更加稳定，从而在盲扫超声中实现了更可靠的生物测量。
AI.conclusion: 结构增强与时序滑动窗口的结合能有效克服盲扫超声中标准平面检测的难点，为低资源环境下的胎儿生长受限筛查提供了更可靠的自动化解决方案。

title: Learning to Emulate Chaos: Adversarial Optimal Transport Regularization
summary: Chaos arises in many complex dynamical systems, from weather to power grids, but is difficult to accurately model using data-driven emulators, including neural operator architectures. For chaotic systems, the inherent sensitivity to initial conditions makes exact long-term forecasts theoretically infeasible, meaning that traditional squared-error losses often fail when trained on noisy data. Recent work has focused on training emulators to match the statistical properties of chaotic attractors by introducing regularization based on handcrafted local features and summary statistics, as well as learned statistics extracted from a diverse dataset of trajectories. In this work, we propose a family of adversarial optimal transport objectives that jointly learn high-quality summary statistics and a physically consistent emulator. We theoretically analyze and experimentally validate a Sinkhorn divergence formulation (2-Wasserstein) and a WGAN-style dual formulation (1-Wasserstein). Our experiments across a variety of chaotic systems, including systems with high-dimensional chaotic attractors, show that emulators trained with our approach exhibit significantly improved long-term statistical fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于对抗最优传输的目标函数来训练混沌系统的神经仿真器，通过Sinkhorn散度（2-Wasserstein）和WGAN对偶形式（1-Wasserstein）联合学习高质量统计量及物理一致的仿真器，实验表明该方法在长时间统计保真度上显著优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 混沌系统对初值高度敏感，使得精确长期预测理论上不可行，而传统均方误差损失在噪声数据上训练效果差；现有方法依赖手工设计的局部特征和统计量，缺乏自动学习高质量统计量的机制。
AI.method: 提出对抗最优传输目标函数族，包括Sinkhorn散度（2-Wasserstein距离）和WGAN对偶形式（1-Wasserstein距离），联合学习与物理一致性仿真器。
AI.result: 在多种混沌系统（包括高维混沌吸引子）上，该方法训练的仿真器在长时间统计保真度上显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 对抗最优传输为目标函数能有效提升混沌系统数据驱动仿真器的长期统计保真度，且无需手工设计特征。

title: On the Impact of Face Segmentation-Based Background Removal on Recognition and Morphing Attack Detection
summary: This study investigates the impact of face image background correction through segmentation on face recognition and morphing attack detection performance in realistic, unconstrained image capture scenarios. The motivation is driven by operational biometric systems such as the European Entry/Exit System (EES), which require facial enrolment at airports and other border crossing points where controlled backgrounds usually required for such captures cannot always be guaranteed, as well as by accessibility needs that may necessitate image capture outside traditional office environments. By analyzing how such preprocessing steps influence both recognition accuracy and security mechanisms, this work addresses a critical gap between usability-driven image normalization and the reliability requirements of large-scale biometric identification systems. Our study evaluates a comprehensive range of segmentation techniques, three families of morphing attack detection methods, and four distinct face recognition models, using databases that include both controlled and in-the-wild image captures. The results reveal consistent patterns linking segmentation to both recognition performance and face image quality. Additionally, segmentation is shown to systematically influence morphing attack detection performance. These findings highlight the need for careful consideration when deploying such preprocessing techniques in operational biometric systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统评估了面部图像背景分割预处理对非约束环境下人脸识别和形态攻击检测性能的影响，发现分割处理会一致性地影响识别性能和图像质量，并系统性地改变形态攻击检测效果，提示在如欧洲出入境系统等运营级生物识别系统中需谨慎部署此类预处理技术。
AI.motivation: 实际运营中的生物识别系统（如欧洲出入境系统EES）在机场等边界关卡进行面部登记时，难以保证受控背景的拍摄条件；同时无障碍采集需求也需要在传统办公环境外进行。这导致需要在非约束、非受控的图像捕获场景下进行面部识别，而背景分割预处理对识别精度和安全性（形态攻击检测）的影响尚缺乏系统性研究。
AI.method: 研究涵盖了多种分割技术、三类形态攻击检测方法和四种不同的人脸识别模型；使用了包含受控和非受控（in-the-wild）图像捕获的数据库进行系统评估。
AI.result: 背景分割与识别性能和面部图像质量之间存在一致性的关联模式；分割处理会系统性地影响形态攻击检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 指出了在运营级生物识别系统中部署此类预处理技术需要谨慎考虑，以平衡可用性驱动的图像归一化与大规模识别系统的可靠性要求之间的关键差距。

title: Trustworthy Clinical Decision Support Using Meta-Predicates and Domain-Specific Languages
summary:
\textbf{Background:} Regulatory frameworks for AI in healthcare, including the EU AI Act and FDA guidance on AI/ML-based medical devices, require clinical decision support to demonstrate not only accuracy but auditability. Existing formal languages for clinical logic validate syntactic and structural correctness but not whether decision rules use epistemologically appropriate evidence.
  \textbf{Methods:} Drawing on design-by-contract principles, we introduce meta-predicates -- predicates about predicates -- for asserting epistemological constraints on clinical decision rules expressed in a DSL. An epistemological type system classifies annotations along four dimensions: purpose, knowledge domain, scale, and method of acquisition. Meta-predicates assert which evidence types are permissible in any given rule. The framework is instantiated in AnFiSA, an open-source platform for genetic variant curation, and demonstrated using the Brigham Genomics Medicine protocol on 5.6 million variants from the Genome in a Bottle benchmark.
  \textbf{Results:} Decision trees used in variant interpretation can be reformulated as unate cascades, enabling per-variant audit trails that identify which rule classified each variant and why. Meta-predicate validation catches epistemological errors before deployment, whether rules are human-written or AI-generated. The approach complements post-hoc methods such as LIME and SHAP: where explanation reveals what evidence was used after the fact, meta-predicates constrain what evidence may be used before deployment, while preserving human readability.
  \textbf{Conclusions:} Meta-predicate validation is a step toward demonstrating not only that decisions are accurate but that they rest on appropriate evidence in ways that can be independently audited. While demonstrated in genomics, the approach generalises to any domain requiring auditable decision logic.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于元谓词（meta-predicates）的 epistemological 类型系统，用于在临床决策规则中约束可使用的证据类型。通过在变异解读平台 AnFiSA 上对560万个基因组变异进行验证，该方法能在部署前捕获认知层面的错误，并生成可审计的决策追踪链，补充了LIME和SHAP等事后解释方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的临床逻辑形式化语言仅能验证句法和结构正确性，但无法判断决策规则是否使用了认识论上适当的证据。随着欧盟AI法案和FDA对AI/ML医疗设备的监管要求不仅关注准确性，还要求可审计性，亟需一种在部署前就能约束证据使用合理性的形式化方法。
AI.method: 借鉴设计合同(design-by-contract)原则，引入元谓词（关于谓词的谓词）来断言临床决策规则的认识论约束。构建了四维认识论类型系统：目的、知识领域、规模、获取方法。将决策树重新表述为单峰级联(unate cascades)结构，在AnFiSA平台上实现了该框架。
AI.result: 变异解读中的决策树可重构为单峰级联，生成每条变异的审计轨迹。元谓词验证能在部署前捕获认识论错误，无论规则是人类编写还是AI生成。该方法与LIME、SHAP等事后解释方法互补：后者在事后揭示使用了什么证据，而前者在事前约束哪些证据可以使用，同时保持人类可读性。
AI.conclusion: 元谓词验证是迈向不仅证明决策准确性、还能证明决策基于适当证据且可独立审计的重要步骤。该方法虽然以基因组学为例进行验证，但可推广到任何需要可审计决策逻辑的领域。

title: Multi-Gait Learning for Humanoid Robots Using Reinforcement Learning with Selective Adversarial Motion Prior
summary: Learning diverse locomotion skills for humanoid robots in a unified reinforcement learning framework remains challenging due to the conflicting requirements of stability and dynamic expressiveness across different gaits. We present a multi-gait learning approach that enables a humanoid robot to master five distinct gaits -- walking, goose-stepping, running, stair climbing, and jumping -- using a consistent policy structure, action space, and reward formulation. The key contribution is a selective Adversarial Motion Prior (AMP) strategy: AMP is applied to periodic, stability-critical gaits (walking, goose-stepping, stair climbing) where it accelerates convergence and suppresses erratic behavior, while being deliberately omitted for highly dynamic gaits (running, jumping) where its regularization would over-constrain the motion. Policies are trained via PPO with domain randomization in simulation and deployed on a physical 12-DOF humanoid robot through zero-shot sim-to-real transfer. Quantitative comparisons demonstrate that selective AMP outperforms a uniform AMP policy across all five gaits, achieving faster convergence, lower tracking error, and higher success rates on stability-focused gaits without sacrificing the agility required for dynamic ones.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种选择性对抗运动先验（AMP）策略，使人形机器人能够在统一框架下学习五种步态（行走、正步、跑步、爬楼梯、跳跃），通过在稳定性步态中应用AMP、动态步态中省略AMP，实现了各步态性能的全面提升。
AI.motivation: 在统一强化学习框架下学习人形机器人的多种 locomotion 技能面临挑战，因为不同步态对稳定性和动态表现力的要求存在冲突，现有方法难以兼顾。
AI.method: 提出选择性AMP策略：对周期性、稳定性关键的步态（行走、正步、爬楼梯）应用AMP以加速收敛并抑制异常行为；对高度动态的步态（跑步、跳跃）省略AMP以避免过度约束。使用PPO算法训练，结合域随机化，通过零样本sim-to-real迁移部署到12自由度实体人形机器人上。
AI.result: 选择性AMP在所有五种步态上均优于统一AMP策略，实现了更快的收敛速度、更低的跟踪误差和更高的稳定性步态成功率，同时不牺牲动态步态的敏捷性。
AI.conclusion: 选择性AMP能够有效平衡不同步态对稳定性和动态性的差异化需求，是统一多步态学习框架的关键设计原则。

title: Where are they looking in the operating room?
summary: Purpose: Gaze-following, the task of inferring where individuals are looking, has been widely studied in computer vision, advancing research in visual attention modeling, social scene understanding, and human-robot interaction. However, gaze-following has never been explored in the operating room (OR), a complex, high-stakes environment where visual attention plays an important role in surgical workflow analysis. In this work, we introduce the concept of gaze-following to the surgical domain, and demonstrate its great potential for understanding clinical roles, surgical phases, and team communications in the OR. Methods: We extend the 4D-OR dataset with gaze-following annotations, and extend the Team-OR dataset with gaze-following and a new team communication activity annotations. Then, we propose novel approaches to address clinical role prediction, surgical phase recognition, and team communication detection using a gaze-following model. For role and phase recognition, we propose a gaze heatmap-based approach that uses gaze predictions solely; for team communication detection, we train a spatial-temporal model in a self-supervised way that encodes gaze-based clip features, and then feed the features into a temporal activity detection model. Results: Experimental results on the 4D-OR and Team-OR datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on all downstream tasks. Quantitatively, our approach obtains F1 scores of 0.92 for clinical role prediction and 0.95 for surgical phase recognition. Furthermore, it significantly outperforms existing baselines in team communication detection, improving previous best performances by over 30%. Conclusion: We introduce gaze-following in the OR as a novel research direction in surgical data science, highlighting its great potential to advance surgical workflow analysis in computer-assisted interventions.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将视线跟踪（gaze-following）引入手术室场景，通过扩展数据集并提出基于视线热图和自监督时空模型的方法，在临床角色预测（F1=0.92）、手术阶段识别（F1=0.95）和团队通信检测（比先前最优方法提升超30%）三个下游任务上取得了最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 视线跟踪在计算机视觉领域已被广泛研究，但从未在手术室这一复杂、高风险环境中被探索。手术室中视觉注意力对手术工作流分析至关重要，因此作者希望将视线跟踪引入手术领域，以推动临床角色理解、手术阶段分析和团队通信检测。
AI.method: (1) 扩展4D-OR和Team-OR数据集，增加视线跟踪标注及团队通信活动标注；(2) 提出基于视线热图的方法，仅利用视线预测进行角色和阶段识别；(3) 提出自监督训练的时空模型，编码基于视线的片段特征，再输入时间活动检测模型进行团队通信检测。
AI.result: 在4D-OR和Team-OR数据集上，临床角色预测F1=0.92，手术阶段识别F1=0.95；团队通信检测比现有最优方法提升超过30%。
AI.conclusion: 将手术室中的视线跟踪确立为手术数据科学中的一个新研究方向，展示了其在计算机辅助干预中推动手术工作流分析的重要潜力。

title: RoboWM-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating World Models in Robotic Manipulation
summary: Recent advances in large-scale video world models have enabled increasingly realistic future prediction, raising the prospect of leveraging imagined videos for robot learning. However, visual realism does not imply physical plausibility, and behaviors inferred from generated videos may violate dynamics and fail when executed by embodied agents. Existing benchmarks begin to incorporate notions of physical plausibility, but they largely remain perception- or diagnostic-oriented and do not systematically evaluate whether predicted behaviors can be translated into executable actions that complete the intended task. To address this gap, we introduce RoboWM-Bench, a manipulation-centric benchmark for embodiment-grounded evaluation of video world models. RoboWM-Bench converts generated behaviors from both human-hand and robotic manipulation videos into embodied action sequences and validates them through robotic execution. The benchmark spans diverse manipulation scenarios and establishes a unified protocol for consistent and reproducible evaluation. Using RoboWM-Bench, we evaluate state-of-the-art video world models and find that reliably generating physically executable behaviors remains an open challenge. Common failure modes include errors in spatial reasoning, unstable contact prediction, and non-physical deformations. While finetuning on manipulation data yields improvements, physical inconsistencies still persist, suggesting opportunities for more physically grounded video generation for robots.

AI.tldr: 提出RoboWM-Bench，一个以操作为中心的基准测试，用于评估视频世界模型的可执行物理行为，发现现有模型在空间推理、接触预测和物理变形方面存在显著缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型虽然能生成视觉逼真的未来预测，但视觉真实感不代表物理合理性，且缺乏系统性评估生成行为能否转化为可执行动作并完成目标任务。
AI.method: 构建RoboWM-Bench基准，将人类手部和机器人操作视频中的生成行为转化为具身动作序列，通过机器人实际执行进行验证；涵盖多种操作场景，建立统一的评估协议。
AI.result: 当前最先进的视频世界模型在生成物理可执行行为方面仍存在挑战，常见失败模式包括空间推理错误、不稳定的接触预测和非物理变形；在操作数据上微调虽有改进，但物理不一致性依然存在。
AI.conclusion: 视频生成模型需要更强的物理基础才能有效服务于机器人学习，RoboWM-Bench为这一方向提供了系统化的评估工具。

title: Exploring Spatial Intelligence from a Generative Perspective
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. Project page: https://aim-uofa.github.io/GSI-Bench/
summary: Spatial intelligence is essential for multimodal large language models, yet current benchmarks largely assess it only from an understanding perspective. We ask whether modern generative or unified multimodal models also possess generative spatial intelligence (GSI), the ability to respect and manipulate 3D spatial constraints during image generation, and whether such capability can be measured or improved.
