We introduce GSI-Bench, the first benchmark designed to quantify GSI through spatially grounded image editing. It consists of two complementary components: GSI-Real, a high-quality real-world dataset built via a 3D-prior-guided generation and filtering pipeline, and GSI-Syn, a large-scale synthetic benchmark with controllable spatial operations and fully automated labeling. Together with a unified evaluation protocol, GSI-Bench enables scalable, model-agnostic assessment of spatial compliance and editing fidelity. Experiments show that fine-tuning unified multimodal models on GSI-Syn yields substantial gains on both synthetic and real tasks and, strikingly, also improves downstream spatial understanding. This provides the first clear evidence that generative training can tangibly strengthen spatial reasoning, establishing a new pathway for advancing spatial intelligence in multimodal models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GSI-Bench基准，首次量化评估多模态大模型的生成式空间智能（GSI），通过空间约束下的图像编辑任务进行测试。实验表明，在合成数据上微调统一多模态模型不仅能提升生成任务的空间合规性，还能显著增强下游空间理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要从理解视角评估多模态大模型的空间智能，忽略了生成视角。作者希望探究现代生成式/统一多模态模型是否具备生成式空间智能（GSI），以及如何量化和提升这种能力。
AI.method: 构建GSI-Bench基准，包含两个互补部分：GSI-Real（基于3D先验引导的生成与过滤管道构建的高质量真实世界数据集）和GSI-Syn（大规模合成基准，支持可控空间操作与全自动标注）。采用统一的评估协议，从空间合规性和编辑保真度两个维度进行模型无关的评估。
AI.result: 在GSI-Syn上微调统一多模态模型，在合成和真实任务上均取得显著提升；更重要的是，这种生成式训练还能切实改善下游空间理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 首次明确证明生成式训练能够实质性增强空间推理能力，为推进多模态模型的空间智能开辟了新路径。

title: Robustness Analysis of POMDP Policies to Observation Perturbations
summary: Policies for Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) are often designed using a nominal system model. In practice, this model can deviate from the true system during deployment due to factors such as calibration drift or sensor degradation, leading to unexpected performance degradation. This work studies policy robustness against deviations in the POMDP observation model. We introduce the Policy Observation Robustness Problem: to determine the maximum tolerable deviation in a POMDP's observation model that guarantees the policy's value remains above a specified threshold. We analyze two variants: the sticky variant, where deviations are dependent on state and actions, and the non-sticky variant, where they can be history-dependent. We show that the Policy Observation Robustness Problem can be formulated as a bi-level optimization problem in which the inner optimization is monotonic in the size of the observation deviation. This enables efficient solutions using root-finding algorithms in the outer optimization. For the non-sticky variant, we show that when policies are represented with finite-state controllers (FSCs) it is sufficient to consider observations which depend on nodes in the FSC rather than full histories. We present Robust Interval Search, an algorithm with soundness and convergence guarantees, for both the sticky and non-sticky variants. We show this algorithm has polynomial time complexity in the non-sticky variant and at most exponential time complexity in the sticky variant. We provide experimental results validating and demonstrating the scalability of implementations of Robust Interval Search to POMDP problems with tens of thousands of states. We also provide case studies from robotics and operations research which demonstrate the practical utility of the problem and algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）中策略对观测模型偏差的鲁棒性问题，提出了策略观测鲁棒性问题，并设计了具有收敛保证的鲁棒区间搜索算法，可用于保证策略价值在观测偏差下仍高于指定阈值。
AI.motivation: 实际部署中，POMDP的标称模型会因校准漂移或传感器退化等因素偏离真实系统，导致策略性能意外下降。现有研究缺乏对观测模型偏差的鲁棒性保证方法。
AI.method: 将策略观测鲁棒性问题建模为双层优化问题，利用内层优化关于观测偏差大小的单调性，在外层采用根查找算法。针对非粘性变种，证明有限状态控制器表示下只需考虑依赖于控制器节点的观测。提出Robust Interval Search算法，具备正确性和收敛性保证。
AI.result: 非粘性变种算法具有多项式时间复杂度，粘性变种最多为指数时间复杂度。实验验证了算法在数万个状态的POMDP问题上的可扩展性，并通过机器人学和运筹学案例展示了实际效用。
AI.conclusion: 本文为POMDP策略对观测模型偏差的鲁棒性分析提供了理论基础和高效算法，能够在保证策略性能的前提下量化可容忍的最大观测偏差。

title: Differentiable Satellite Constellation Configuration via Relaxed Coverage and Revisit Objectives
summary: Satellite constellation design requires optimizing orbital parameters across multiple satellites to maximize mission specific metrics. For many types of mission, it is desirable to maximize coverage and minimize revisit gaps over ground targets. Existing approaches to constellation design either restrict the design space to symmetric parametric families such as Walker constellations, or rely on metaheuristic methods that require significant compute and many iterations. Gradient-based optimization has been considered intractable due to the non-differentiability of coverage and revisit metrics, which involve binary visibility indicators and discrete max operations. We introduce four continuous relaxations: soft sigmoid visibility, noisy-OR multi-satellite aggregation, leaky integrator revisit gap tracking, and LogSumExp soft-maximum, which when composed with the $\partial$SGP4 differentiable orbit propagator, yield a fully differentiable pipeline from orbital elements to mission-level objectives. We show that this scheme can recover Walker-Delta geometry from irregular initializations, and discovers elliptical Molniya-like orbits with apogee dwell over extreme latitudes from only gradients. Compared to simulated annealing (SA), genetic algorithm (GA), and differential evolution (DE) baselines, our gradient-based method recovers Walker-equivalent geometry within ${\sim}750$ evaluations, whereas the three black-box baselines plateau at with significantly worse revisit even with roughly four times the evaluation budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过连续松弛（软Sigmoid可见性、噪声OR多卫星聚合、漏积分器重访间隔跟踪、LogSumExp软最大化）与可微分轨道传播器∂SGP4结合，构建从轨道要素到任务级目标的完全可微流水线，实现星座设计的梯度优化，相比模拟退火、遗传算法和差分进化等黑箱方法，在更少评估次数下恢复Walker几何并发现椭圆Molniya-like轨道。
AI.motivation: 现有星座设计方法要么局限于Walker等对称参数族，要么依赖需要大量计算和迭代的元启发式方法，而基于梯度的优化因覆盖和重访指标（涉及二元可见性指示器和离散最大值操作）不可微而被认为不可行。
AI.method: 引入四种连续松弛策略（软Sigmoid可见性、噪声OR多卫星聚合、漏积分器重访间隔跟踪、LogSumExp软最大化），与可微分轨道传播器∂SGP4组合，构建可微流水线，实现从轨道要素到任务目标的端到端梯度优化。
AI.result: 该方法能从非规则初始化恢复Walker-Delta几何，发现具有远地点停留特性的椭圆Molniya-like轨道；相比模拟退火、遗传算法和差分进化基线，在约750次评估内恢复Walker等价几何，而黑箱基线在四倍评估预算下仍明显更差。
AI.conclusion: 基于梯度的星座优化是可行且高效的，为星座设计提供了一种有别于传统参数族约束和昂贵元启发式方法的新范式。

title: Evian: Towards Explainable Visual Instruction-tuning Data Auditing
summary: The efficacy of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) is critically dependent on the quality of their training data, requiring a precise balance between visual fidelity and instruction-following capability. Existing datasets, however, are plagued by inconsistent quality, and current data filtering methods rely on coarse-grained scores that lack the granularity to identify nuanced semantic flaws like logical fallacies or factual errors. This creates a fundamental bottleneck in developing more reliable models. To address this, we make three core contributions. First, we construct a large-scale, 300K-sample benchmark by systematically injecting diverse, subtle defects to provide a challenging testbed for data auditing. Second, we introduce a novel "Decomposition-then-Evaluation" paradigm that breaks model responses into constituent cognitive components: visual description, subjective inference, and factual claim, enabling targeted analysis. Third, we instantiate this paradigm via EVIAN (Explainable Visual Instruction-tuning Data AuditiNg), an automated framework that evaluates these components along the orthogonal axes of Image-Text Consistency, Logical Coherence, and Factual Accuracy. Our empirical findings challenge the prevailing scale-centric paradigm: a model fine-tuned on a compact, high-quality subset curated by EVIAN consistently surpassed models trained on orders-of-magnitude larger datasets. We also reveal that dividing complex auditing into verifiable subtasks enables robust curation, and that Logical Coherence is the most critical factor in data quality evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVIAN框架，通过“分解-评估”范式将模型响应拆解为视觉描述、主观推理和事实声明三个认知组件，并沿图像-文本一致性、逻辑连贯性和事实准确性三个维度进行评估，实验表明基于该框架筛选的小规模高质量数据集训练出的模型性能显著优于使用大规模数据训练的模型，且逻辑连贯性是数据质量评估中最关键的因素。
AI.motivation: 现有大视觉语言模型(LVLM)的训练数据质量参差不齐，当前数据过滤方法依赖粗粒度评分，无法识别逻辑谬误或事实错误等细微语义缺陷，这成为开发更可靠模型的基本瓶颈。
AI.method: 1) 构建30万样本的大规模基准数据集，系统注入多种细微缺陷；2) 提出“分解-评估”范式，将模型响应拆解为视觉描述、主观推理和事实声明三个认知组件；3) 实例化为EVIAN框架，沿图像-文本一致性、逻辑连贯性和事实准确性三个正交维度进行评估。
AI.result: 基于EVIAN筛选的小规模高质量数据集微调的模型，性能持续超越在数量级更大数据集上训练的模型；逻辑连贯性是数据质量评估中最关键的因素；将复杂审计分解为可验证子任务能够实现稳健的数据筛选。
AI.conclusion: 挑战了当前以数据规模为中心的训练范式，证明数据质量而非数量才是提升LVLM性能的关键；分解式评估策略为数据审计提供了更有效的方法论。

title: Planning Beyond Text: Graph-based Reasoning for Complex Narrative Generation
comment: Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026
summary: While LLMs demonstrate remarkable fluency in narrative generation, existing methods struggle to maintain global narrative coherence, contextual logical consistency, and smooth character development, often producing monotonous scripts with structural fractures. To this end, we introduce PLOTTER, a framework that performs narrative planning on structural graph representations instead of the direct sequential text representations used in existing work. Specifically, PLOTTER executes the Evaluate-Plan-Revise cycle on the event graph and character graph. By diagnosing and repairing issues of the graph topology under rigorous logical constraints, the model optimizes the causality and narrative skeleton before complete context generation. Experiments demonstrate that PLOTTER significantly outperforms representative baselines across diverse narrative scenarios. These findings verify that planning narratives on structural graph representations-rather than directly on text-is crucial to enhance the long context reasoning of LLMs in complex narrative generation.

AI.tldr: PLOTTER是一个基于结构图表示（事件图和角色图）进行叙事规划（Evaluate-Plan-Revise循环）的框架，通过在图拓扑上诊断和修复逻辑问题来优化因果关系和叙事骨架，显著优于直接基于文本序列的叙事生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM叙事生成方法难以维持全局叙事连贯性、上下文逻辑一致性和流畅的角色发展，常产生结构断裂的单调脚本，亟需一种能增强长上下文推理能力的叙事规划方法。
AI.method: 提出PLOTTER框架，在事件图和角色图的结构化图表示上执行Evaluate-Plan-Revise循环，通过诊断和修复图拓扑问题并施加严格的逻辑约束，在完整上下文生成之前优化因果关系和叙事骨架。
AI.result: 在多种叙事场景下，PLOTTER显著优于代表性的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 在结构化图表示上规划叙事（而非直接在文本上规划）对于增强LLM在复杂叙事生成中的长上下文推理能力至关重要。

title: AeroBridge-TTA: Test-Time Adaptive Language-Conditioned Control for UAVs
summary:
Language-guided unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) often fail not from bad reasoning or perception, but from execution
  mismatch: the gap between a planned trajectory and the controller's ability to track it when the real dynamics differ
  from training (mass changes, drag shifts, actuator delay, wind). We propose AeroBridge-TTA, a language-conditioned
  control pipeline that targets this gap with test-time adaptation. It has three parts: a language encoder that maps the
  command into a subgoal, an adaptive policy conditioned on the subgoal and a learned latent, and a test-time
  adaptation (TTA) module that updates the latent online from observed transitions. On five language-conditioned UAV
  tasks under 13 mismatch conditions with the same domain randomization, AeroBridge-TTA ties a strong PPO-MLP baseline
  in-distribution and wins all 5 out-of-distribution (OOD) conditions, +22.0 pts on average (62.7% vs. 40.7%); the +8.5
  pt overall gain comes entirely from the OOD regime. A same-weights ablation that only changes the step size $α$
  shows the latent update itself is responsible for a $4.6\times$ OOD lift.

AI.tldr: 提出AeroBridge-TTA，一种通过测试时自适应（TTA）解决语言引导无人机因真实动力学与训练差异导致的执行不匹配问题的控制管道，在13种失配条件下，OOD性能平均提升22.0个百分点（62.7% vs. 40.7%），其中隐变量更新贡献了4.6倍的OOD提升。
AI.motivation: 语言引导无人机失败的主因并非推理或感知错误，而是执行不匹配——计划轨迹与控制器实际跟踪能力之间的差距，源于真实动力学（质量变化、阻力偏移、执行器延迟、风力等）与训练环境的差异。
AI.method: 提出三部分组成的AeroBridge-TTA：语言编码器将命令映射为子目标；以子目标和学习到的隐变量为条件的自适应策略；以及测试时自适应（TTA）模块，该模块根据在线观测的转移数据更新隐变量。
AI.result: 在5种语言引导无人机任务、13种失配条件下，AeroBridge-TTA在分布内任务上与强PPO-MLP基线持平，在全部5个OOD条件下获胜，平均提升22.0个百分点（62.7% vs. 40.7%）；总8.5个百分点的提升完全来自OOD场景；消融实验表明仅隐变量更新机制本身贡献了4.6倍的OOD性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过测试时自适应在线更新隐变量，AeroBridge-TTA有效弥合了训练与真实动力学之间的执行差距，尤其显著提升了OOD场景下的控制性能，验证了TTA机制在语言引导无人机控制中的关键作用。

title: Weighting What Matters: Boosting Sample Efficiency in Medical Report Generation via Token Reweighting
summary: Training vision-language models (VLMs) for medical report generation is often hindered by the scarcity of high-quality annotated data. This work evaluates the use of a weighted loss function to improve data efficiency. Compared to standard cross-entropy loss, which treats all token prediction errors equally, the reweighted loss shifts the focus to semantically salient tokens with outsized clinical importance. In experiments on ophthalmological report generation, we show that this simple method improves efficiency across multiple data scales, achieving similar report quality with up to ten times less training data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在医学报告生成中使用加权损失函数，通过聚焦临床重要语义标记，实现仅需十分之一训练数据即可达到传统方法相同报告质量的效果。
AI.motivation: 训练视觉-语言模型（VLMs）进行医学报告生成常因高质量标注数据稀缺而受限，需要提升数据利用效率。
AI.method: 采用加权损失函数替代标准交叉熵损失，使模型更关注具有临床重要性的语义显著标记（semantically salient tokens），而非平等对待所有标记预测错误。
AI.result: 在眼科报告生成实验中，该方法在多种数据规模下均提升了效率，仅需十分之一训练数据即可达到与传统方法相当的报告质量。
AI.conclusion: 简单的加权损失函数能有效提升医学报告生成中的数据效率，缓解高质量标注数据稀缺问题。

title: RefAerial: A Benchmark and Approach for Referring Detection in Aerial Images
summary: Referring detection refers to locate the target referred by natural languages, which has recently attracted growing research interests. However, existing datasets are limited to ground images with large object centered in relative small scenes. This paper introduces a large-scale challenging dataset for referring detection in aerial images, termed as RefAerial. It distinguishes from conventional ground referring detection datasets by 4 characteristics: (1) low but diverse object-to-scene ratios, (2) numerous targets and distractors, (3)complex and fine-grained referring descriptions, (4) diverse and broad scenes in the aerial view. We also develop a human-in-the-loop referring expansion and annotation engine (REA-Engine) for efficient semi-automated referring pair annotation. Besides, we observe that existing ground referring detection approaches exhibiting serious performance degradation on our aerial dataset since the intrinsic scale variety issue within or across aerial images. Therefore, we further propose a novel scale-comprehensive and sensitive (SCS) framework for referring detection in aerial images. It consists of a mixture-of-granularity (MoG) attention and a two-stage comprehensive-to-sensitive (CtS) decoding strategy. Specifically, the mixture-of-granularity attention is developed for scale-comprehensive target understanding. In addition, the two-stage comprehensive-to-sensitive decoding strategy is designed for coarse-to-fine referring target decoding. Eventually, the proposed SCS framework achieves remarkable performance on our aerial referring detection dataset and even promising performance boost on conventional ground referring detection datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向航拍图像的指代检测数据集RefAerial和尺度综合敏感框架SCS，解决了现有数据集局限于地面图像且目标尺度单一的问题，通过混合粒度注意力机制和两阶段解码策略实现了航拍与地面场景下的优异指代检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有指代检测数据集局限于地面图像，目标在相对小场景中占据较大比例，缺乏面向航拍视角的大规模、挑战性数据集。
AI.method: (1) 构建RefAerial数据集，具有低且多样的目标-场景比、众多目标和干扰物、复杂细粒度指代描述、多样广阔的航拍场景等特点；(2) 开发人机协同的指代扩展与标注引擎REA-Engine；(3) 提出尺度综合敏感(SCS)框架，包含混合粒度(MoG)注意力机制和两阶段综合到敏感(CtS)解码策略。
AI.result: SCS框架在RefAerial航拍指代检测数据集上取得显著性能，并在常规地面指代检测数据集上也实现了有前景的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 航拍指代检测面临独特的尺度多样性挑战，所提出的SCS框架通过多粒度注意力和由粗到细的解码策略有效解决了这一问题，具有良好的跨场景泛化能力。

title: RoomRecon: High-Quality Textured Room Layout Reconstruction on Mobile Devices
comment: 23 pages, including supplementary material. Accepted to the 2024 IEEE International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality (ISMAR). Best Paper Nominee
summary: Widespread RGB-Depth (RGB-D) sensors and advanced 3D reconstruction technologies facilitate the capture of indoor spaces, improving the fields of augmented reality (AR), virtual reality (VR), and extended reality (XR). Nevertheless, current technologies still face limitations, such as the inability to reflect minor scene changes without a complete recapture, the lack of semantic scene understanding, and various texturing challenges that affect the 3D model's visual quality. These issues affect the realism required for VR experiences and other applications such as in interior design and real estate. To address these challenges, we introduce RoomRecon, an interactive, real-time scanning and texturing pipeline for 3D room models. We propose a two-phase texturing pipeline that integrates AR-guided image capturing for texturing and generative AI models to improve texturing quality and provide better replicas of indoor spaces. Moreover, we suggest focusing only on permanent room elements such as walls, floors, and ceilings, to allow for easily customizable 3D models. We conduct experiments in a variety of indoor spaces to assess the texturing quality and speed of our method. The quantitative results and user study demonstrate that RoomRecon surpasses state-of-the-art methods in terms of texturing quality and on-device computation time.

AI.tldr: RoomRecon是一种交互式实时3D房间模型扫描与纹理管线，通过AR引导图像采集和生成式AI模型提升纹理质量，仅关注房间永久元素（墙壁、地板、天花板）以实现可定制化3D模型，在多个室内场景的定量评估和用户研究中纹理质量与计算速度均超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前RGB-D传感器和3D重建技术虽能捕获室内空间，但仍存在三大局限：无法反映微小场景变化（需完整重捕获）、缺乏语义场景理解、纹理挑战影响3D模型视觉质量。这些问题制约了VR体验及室内设计、房地产等应用的逼真度。
AI.method: 提出RoomRecon管线，包含：(1) 两阶段纹理管线——AR引导图像采集用于纹理，生成式AI模型提升纹理质量；(2) 仅关注永久房间元素（墙壁、地板、天花板）以支持模型轻松定制化；(3) 交互式实时扫描流程。
AI.result: 在多种室内空间的实验中，RoomRecon在纹理质量和设备端计算时间两方面均优于当前最先进方法，并通过用户研究验证了其优势。
AI.conclusion: RoomRecon有效解决了现有室内3D重建中场景变化反映、语义理解和纹理质量等关键问题，为AR/VR/XR应用提供了更逼真且可定制的室内3D模型解决方案。

title: DWTSumm: Discrete Wavelet Transform for Document Summarization
summary: Summarizing long, domain-specific documents with large language models (LLMs) remains challenging due to context limitations, information loss, and hallucinations, particularly in clinical and legal settings. We propose a Discrete Wavelet Transform (DWT)-based multi-resolution framework that treats text as a semantic signal and decomposes it into global (approximation) and local (detail) components. Applied to sentence- or word-level embeddings, DWT yields compact representations that preserve overall structure and critical domain-specific details, which are used directly as summaries or to guide LLM generation. Experiments on clinical and legal benchmarks demonstrate comparable ROUGE-L scores. Compared to a GPT-4o baseline, the DWT based summarization consistently improve semantic similarity and grounding, achieving gains of over 2% in BERTScore, more than 4\% in Semantic Fidelity, factual consistency in legal tasks, and large METEOR improvements indicative of preserved domain-specific semantics. Across multiple embedding models, Fidelity reaches up to 97%, suggesting that DWT acts as a semantic denoising mechanism that reduces hallucinations and strengthens factual grounding. Overall, DWT provides a lightweight, generalizable method for reliable long-document and domain-specific summarization with LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于离散小波变换(DWT)的多分辨率框架，将文本视为语义信号并分解为全局近似分量和局部细节分量，用于长文档和特定领域摘要生成。在临床和法律基准测试中，相比GPT-4o基线，该方法在BERTScore、语义保真度、事实一致性等指标上取得显著提升，最高语义保真度达97%，可有效减少幻觉并增强事实基础。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在长文档摘要和特定领域（如临床、法律）摘要中面临上下文长度限制、信息丢失和幻觉问题，需要轻量级、可泛化的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出基于离散小波变换(DWT)的多分辨率框架，将文本视为语义信号，对句子级或词级嵌入进行小波分解，得到全局近似分量（保留整体结构）和局部细节分量（保留关键领域细节），直接作为摘要或引导LLM生成。
AI.result: 在临床和法律基准测试中，相比GPT-4o基线，BERTScore提升超2%，语义保真度提升超4%，法律任务事实一致性显著提升，METEOR大幅改善；多个嵌入模型下语义保真度最高达97%。
AI.conclusion: DWT作为一种轻量级、可泛化的语义去噪机制，能够有效减少幻觉、增强事实基础，为长文档和特定领域摘要提供可靠方法。

title: AttentionBender: Manipulating Cross-Attention in Video Diffusion Transformers as a Creative Probe
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 2026 ACM Creativity and Cognition (C&C '26). 15 pages, 19 figures
summary: We present AttentionBender, a tool that manipulates cross-attention in Video Diffusion Transformers to help artists probe the internal mechanics of black-box video generation. While generative outputs are increasingly realistic, prompt-only control limits artists' ability to build intuition for the model's material process or to work beyond its default tendencies. Using an autobiographical research-through-design approach, we built on Network Bending to design AttentionBender, which applies 2D transforms (rotation, scaling, translation, etc.) to cross-attention maps to modulate generation. We assess AttentionBender by visualizing 4,500+ video generations across prompts, operations, and layer targets. Our results suggest that cross-attention is highly entangled: targeted manipulations often resist clean, localized control, producing distributed distortions and glitch aesthetics over linear edits. AttentionBender contributes a tool that functions both as an Explainable AI style probe of transformer attention mechanisms, and as a creative technique for producing novel aesthetics beyond the model's learned representational space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AttentionBender工具，通过操纵视频扩散变换器中的交叉注意力机制，帮助艺术家探索黑箱视频生成的内部机制。该工具对交叉注意力图应用2D变换（旋转、缩放、平移等），以调控生成过程。基于4500+视频生成实验发现交叉注意力高度纠缠，局部操作往往产生分布式失真和故障美学，而非线性可控的编辑效果。该工具兼具可解释AI探针和创造性美学生成技术的双重功能。
AI.motivation: 当前生成式视频输出虽日益逼真，但基于提示词的单一控制方式限制了艺术家对模型内部材料过程的理解，也无法超越模型的默认生成倾向进行创作。艺术家的直觉式创作需求与黑箱模型之间的鸿沟亟需弥合。
AI.method: 采用自传式研究-through-design方法，基于Network Bending技术设计AttentionBender。对视频扩散变换器中的交叉注意力图施加2D几何变换（旋转、缩放、平移等），通过改变注意力分布来调控视频生成结果。实验覆盖4500+视频生成，涉及不同提示词、操作类型和层目标。
AI.result: 交叉注意力机制高度纠缠：针对特定目标的操控难以实现干净、局部的控制，线性编辑往往产生分布式失真和故障美学效果。操控效果在层间和操作类型间表现出复杂的非线性相互作用。
AI.conclusion: AttentionBender兼具双重功能：作为可解释AI风格的探针，用于揭示变换器注意力机制的内部运作；同时作为一种创造性技术，能够生成超越模型已学表征空间的新颖美学效果。

title: Accelerating trajectory optimization with Sobolev-trained diffusion policies
summary: Trajectory Optimization (TO) solvers exploit known system dynamics to compute locally optimal trajectories through iterative improvements. A downside is that each new problem instance is solved independently; therefore, convergence speed and quality of the solution found depend on the initial trajectory proposed. To improve efficiency, a natural approach is to warm-start TO with initial guesses produced by a learned policy trained on trajectories previously generated by the solver. Diffusion-based policies have recently emerged as expressive imitation learning models, making them promising candidates for this role. Yet, a counterintuitive challenge comes from the local optimality of TO demonstrations: when a policy is rolled out, small non-optimal deviations may push it into situations not represented in the training data, triggering compounding errors over long horizons. In this work, we focus on learning-based warm-starting for gradient-based TO solvers that also provide feedback gains. Exploiting this specificity, we derive a first-order loss for Sobolev learning of diffusion-based policies using both trajectories and feedback gains. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that the resulting policy avoids compounding errors, and so can learn from very few trajectories to provide initial guesses reducing solving time by $2\times$ to $20 \times$. Incorporating first-order information enables predictions with fewer diffusion steps, reducing inference latency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用扩散策略结合一阶Sobolev损失函数进行轨迹优化的暖启动，通过引入反馈增益信息有效避免了复合误差，在仅需少量轨迹训练的情况下将求解时间减少了2到20倍。
AI.motivation: 传统轨迹优化求解器对每个新问题独立求解，收敛速度和解的质量高度依赖初始轨迹。虽然可以用学习策略进行暖启动，但扩散策略在 rollout 时因局部最优演示数据导致的小偏差会随时间累积产生复合误差。
AI.method: 针对基于梯度的轨迹优化求解器（同时提供反馈增益）的特性，提出一阶Sobolev损失函数用于扩散策略的学习，同时利用轨迹和反馈增益信息进行训练。
AI.result: 基于Sobolev学习的扩散策略能避免复合误差，仅需极少轨迹即可学习，将求解时间减少2到20倍；引入一阶信息还可用更少的扩散步骤进行预测，降低推理延迟。
AI.conclusion: 将反馈增益等一阶信息融入扩散策略的Sobolev学习有效提升了暖启动效果，解决了局部最优演示数据带来的复合误差问题。

title: From Image to Music Language: A Two-Stage Structure Decoding Approach for Complex Polyphonic OMR
summary: We propose a new approach for a practical two-stage Optical Music Recognition (OMR) pipeline, with a particular focus on its second stage. Given symbol and event candidates from the visual pipeline, we decode them into an editable, verifiable, and exportable score structure. We focus on complex polyphonic staff notation, especially piano scores, where voice separation and intra-measure timing are the main bottlenecks. Our approach formulates second-stage decoding as a structure decoding problem and uses topology recognition with probability-guided search (BeadSolver) as its core method. We also describe a data strategy that combines procedural generation with recognition-feedback annotations. The result is a practical decoding component for real OMR systems and a path to accumulate structured score data for future end-to-end, multimodal, and RL-style methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对复杂多声部钢琴乐谱的两阶段OMR流水线，重点解决第二阶段的结构解码问题，使用拓扑识别与概率引导搜索（BeadSolver）作为核心方法，并采用程序化生成与识别反馈注释相结合的数据策略。
AI.motivation: 现有OMR系统在处理复杂多声部钢琴乐谱时，声部分离和小节内时值分配成为主要瓶颈，第二阶段解码缺乏有效的结构化解码方法。
AI.method: 将第二阶段解码形式化为结构解码问题，核心方法为拓扑识别与概率引导搜索（BeadSolver），数据策略采用程序化生成与识别反馈注释相结合。
AI.result: 构建了实用的OMR系统解码组件，并为未来端到端、多模态和RL方法积累了结构化乐谱数据路径。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法有效解决了复杂多声部钢琴乐谱的OMR第二阶段解码瓶颈，为实际OMR系统提供了可行的解码方案，并为后续更先进的方法奠定了基础。

title: ReCAPA: Hierarchical Predictive Correction to Mitigate Cascading Failures
summary: Vision-Language-Action systems follow instructions to execute multi-step tasks in multimodal environments. Recent VLA approaches typically rely on post-hoc correction mechanisms or operate under fixed task decompositions and alignment schemes. However, once an intermediate step is mis-specified, local errors propagate through subsequent steps and eventually accumulate into cascading failures. To mitigate this compounding effect, we propose Predictive Alignment and Planning Architecture, a framework that uses prediction and contrast to adjust deviations across three levels: actions, subgoals, and trajectories. Semantic alignment is enforced at all levels using a Sinkhorn-based module and a Score-field module. The predictive correction and alignment jointly update the action generator during training, enabling it to adjust fine-grained steps to remain aligned with the overall intent. We further introduce two new metrics to quantify error propagation and recovery processes in tasks, capturing how mistakes spread and fade over long-horizon execution. Experiments show that ReCAPA achieves competitive results on embodied agent benchmarks such as VisualAgentBench, MineDojo, and AI2-THOR, outperforming strong proprietary and open-source Large Language Model baselines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出预测对齐与规划架构（ReCAPA），通过在动作、子目标和轨迹三个层面进行预测与对比来修正偏差，利用Sinkhorn和Score-field模块实现语义对齐，在训练中联合更新动作生成器以缓解长程任务中的错误累积问题，并在多个具身智能基准上取得领先结果。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA方法在处理多步骤任务时，中间步骤的错误会逐级传播并累积为级联故障，缺乏有效的预防性纠错机制。
AI.method: 提出ReCAPA框架，在动作、子目标和轨迹三个层面通过预测与对比进行调整偏差；使用Sinkhorn模块和Score-field模块实现各层级的语义对齐；预测性修正与对齐在训练中联合更新动作生成器。
AI.result: 在VisualAgentBench、MineDojo和AI2-THOR等具身智能基准上取得了有竞争力的结果，超越多个强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过多层级预测对齐与纠错能有效缓解长程任务中的错误传播问题，提升VLA系统的鲁棒性。

title: JEPAMatch: Geometric Representation Shaping for Semi-Supervised Learning
summary:
Semi-supervised learning has emerged as a powerful paradigm for leveraging large amounts of unlabeled data to improve the performance of machine learning models when labeled data are scarce. Among existing approaches, methods derived from FixMatch have achieved state-of-the-art results in image classification by combining weak and strong data augmentations with confidence-based pseudo-labeling. Despite their strong empirical performance, these methods typically struggle with two critical bottlenecks: majority classes tend to dominate the learning process, which is amplified by incorrect pseudo-labels, leading to biased models. Furthermore, noisy early pseudo-labels prevent the model from forming clear decision boundaries, requiring prolonged training to learn informative representation. In this paper, we introduce a paradigm shift from conventional logical output threshold base, toward an explicit shaping of geometric representations. Our approach is inspired by the recently proposed Latent-Euclidean Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (LeJEPA), a theoretically grounded framework asserting that meaningful representations should exhibit an isotropic Gaussian structure in latent space. Building on this principle, we propose a new training objective that combines the classical semi-supervised loss used in FlexMatch, an adaptive extension of FixMatch, with a latent-space regularization term derived from LeJEPA.
  Our proposed approach, encourages well-structured representations while preserving the advantages of pseudo-labeling strategies. Through extensive experiments on CIFAR-100, STL-10 and Tiny-ImageNet, we demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms existing baselines. In addition, our method significantly accelerates the convergence, drastically reducing the overall computational cost compared to standard FixMatch-based pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Latent-Euclidean Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (LeJEPA)的潜在空间正则化项引入FlexMatch框架，通过显式塑造几何表征（ isotropic Gaussian结构）来解决半监督学习中多数类主导和早期伪标签噪声问题，在CIFAR-100、STL-10和Tiny-ImageNet上取得优于基线方法的性能，并显著加速收敛、降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有FixMatch类半监督方法存在两个关键瓶颈：多数类主导学习过程（被错误伪标签放大）导致模型偏差，以及早期噪声伪标签阻碍模型形成清晰决策边界，需要长时间训练才能学习到有信息量的表征。
AI.method: 将FlexMatch的半监督损失与LeJEPA的潜在空间正则化项（鼓励各向同性高斯结构）相结合，从传统的逻辑输出阈值范式转向显式的几何表征塑造。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100、STL-10和Tiny-ImageNet上的实验表明，该方法一致优于现有基线，同时显著加速收敛，大幅降低总体计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法在保持伪标签策略优势的同时，鼓励结构化良好的表征，是一种从逻辑阈值向几何表征塑造的范式转变。

title: Strategic Polysemy in AI Discourse: A Philosophical Analysis of Language, Hype, and Power
comment: Accepted in the Ninth Annual ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (ACM FAccT) 2026
summary: This paper examines the strategic use of language in contemporary artificial intelligence (AI) discourse, focusing on the widespread adoption of metaphorical or colloquial terms like "hallucination", "chain-of-thought", "introspection", "language model", "alignment", and "agent". We argue that many such terms exhibit strategic polysemy: they sustain multiple interpretations simultaneously, combining narrow technical definitions with broader anthropomorphic or common-sense associations. In contemporary AI research and deployment contexts, this semantic flexibility produces significant institutional and discursive effects, shaping how AI systems are understood by researchers, policymakers, funders, and the public. To analyse this phenomenon, we introduce the concept of glosslighting: the practice of using technically redefined terms to evoke intuitive -- often anthropomorphic or misleading -- associations while preserving plausible deniability through restricted technical definitions. Glosslighting enables actors to benefit from the persuasive force of familiar language while maintaining the ability to retreat to narrower definitions when challenged. We argue that this practice contributes to AI hype cycles, facilitates the mobilisation of investment and institutional support, and influences public and policy perceptions of AI systems, while often deflecting epistemic and ethical scrutiny. By examining the linguistic dynamics of glosslighting and strategic polysemy, the paper highlights how language itself functions as a sociotechnical mechanism shaping the development and governance of AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"glosslighting"概念，分析AI话语中术语的策略性多义现象——如"幻觉"、"思维链"、"对齐"等词汇同时承载技术定义与拟人化联想，使研究者、政策制定者和公众对AI系统产生误导性理解，同时保留技术辩护空间。这种语言实践助长了AI炒作周期、影响投资和政策认知，并规避了认识论与伦理审查。
AI.motivation: 揭示AI话语中普遍存在的术语歧义现象并非偶然失误，而是一种策略性语言实践，它系统性地塑造了AI研究、投资、政策和公众认知，值得从语言、认知和社会学交叉视角加以分析。
AI.method: 提出"glosslighting"（光彩掩饰）这一分析概念，通过对"幻觉"、"思维链"、"内省"、"语言模型"、"对齐"、"智能体"等典型术语进行语用学和话语分析，论证其在技术精确定义与日常直觉联想之间的策略性摆动。
AI.result: 识别出AI话语中的策略性多义（strategic polysemy）模式；提出glosslighting作为描述该现象的操作性概念；阐明这种语言实践如何助长AI炒作、引导投资流向、影响政策制定，并削弱对AI系统的认识论和伦理问责。
AI.conclusion: 语言本身是塑造AI发展与治理的社会技术机制；glosslighting使AI受益者获得拟人化话语的说服力，同时保有技术性的免责空间；这种不对称的语义可及性（技术内行可切换定义，外行受困于直觉理解）构成了认识论不公，需要从话语治理角度加以应对。

title: EngramaBench: Evaluating Long-Term Conversational Memory with Structured Graph Retrieval
summary: Large language model assistants are increasingly expected to retain and reason over information accumulated across many sessions. We introduce EngramaBench, a benchmark for long-term conversational memory built around five personas, one hundred multi-session conversations, and one hundred fifty queries spanning factual recall, cross-space integration, temporal reasoning, adversarial abstention, and emergent synthesis. We evaluate Engrama, a graph-structured memory system, against GPT-4o full-context prompting and Mem0, an open-source vector-retrieval memory system. All three use the same answering model (GPT-4o), isolating the effect of memory architecture. GPT-4o full-context achieves the highest composite score (0.6186), while Engrama scores 0.5367 globally but is the only system to score higher than full-context prompting on cross-space reasoning (0.6532 vs. 0.6291, n=30). Mem0 is cheapest but substantially weaker (0.4809). Ablations reveal that the components driving Engrama's cross-space advantage trade off against global composite score, exposing a systems-level tension between structured memory specialization and aggregate optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EngramaBench基准，用于评估长程对话记忆，并比较了Engrama（图结构记忆系统）、GPT-4o全上下文提示和Mem0（向量检索记忆系统）三种记忆架构。GPT-4o全上下文获得最高综合得分（0.6186），Engrama在跨空间推理上超越全上下文（0.6532 vs 0.6291）但综合得分较低（0.5367），Mem0最便宜但性能最弱（0.4809）。消融实验揭示了结构化记忆专业化与全局优化之间的系统级权衡。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型助手需要跨会话积累和推理信息，但现有系统在长期会话记忆方面缺乏系统性的评估基准和架构对比研究。
AI.method: 提出了EngramaBench基准，包含5个角色、100个多会话对话和150个查询，覆盖事实回忆、跨空间整合、时间推理、对抗性回避和新兴综合五种能力。对比了Engrama（图结构记忆）、GPT-4o全上下文提示和Mem0（向量检索记忆）三种架构，统一使用GPT-4o作为回答模型。
AI.result: GPT-4o全上下文综合得分0.6186最高；Engrama综合得分0.5367，但在跨空间推理上超越全上下文（0.6532 vs 0.6291）；Mem0得分0.4809为最弱。消融实验揭示了跨空间优势与全局得分之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 结构化记忆系统（如Engrama）在特定推理任务上有优势，但会牺牲全局综合性能，存在系统级的设计权衡问题。

title: Gated Memory Policy
summary: Robotic manipulation tasks exhibit varying memory requirements, ranging from Markovian tasks that require no memory to non-Markovian tasks that depend on historical information spanning single or multiple interaction trials. Surprisingly, simply extending observation histories of a visuomotor policy often leads to a significant performance drop due to distribution shift and overfitting. To address these issues, we propose Gated Memory Policy (GMP), a visuomotor policy that learns both when to recall memory and what to recall. To learn when to recall memory, GMP employs a learned memory gate mechanism that selectively activates history context only when necessary, improving robustness and reactivity. To learn what to recall efficiently, GMP introduces a lightweight cross-attention module that constructs effective latent memory representations. To further enhance robustness, GMP injects diffusion noise into historical actions, mitigating sensitivity to noisy or inaccurate histories during both training and inference. On our proposed non-Markovian benchmark MemMimic, GMP achieves a 30.1% average success rate improvement over long-history baselines, while maintaining competitive performance on Markovian tasks in RoboMimic. All code, data and in-the-wild deployment instructions are available on our project website https://gated-memory-policy.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 提出门控记忆策略（GMP），通过门控机制和轻量级交叉注意力，解决视觉运动策略在长历史观测中的分布偏移和过拟合问题，在非马尔可夫任务上提升30.1%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 机器人操作任务存在不同记忆需求（马尔可夫/非马尔可夫），但简单扩展观测历史会导致性能显著下降，原因是分布偏移和过拟合。
AI.method: 1) 学习型记忆门控机制，选择性激活历史上下文；2) 轻量级交叉注意力模块构建有效潜在记忆表征；3) 向历史动作注入扩散噪声以增强对噪声/不准确历史的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在非马尔可夫基准MemMimic上，GMP相较于长历史基线提升30.1%平均成功率；在马尔可夫任务RoboMimic上保持竞争性性能。
AI.conclusion: 门控记忆机制能有效平衡记忆需求与鲁棒性，既能处理非马尔可夫依赖又不牺牲马尔可夫任务的性能。

title: Interpretable Quantile Regression by Optimal Decision Trees
summary: The field of machine learning is subject to an increasing interest in models that are not only accurate but also interpretable and robust, thus allowing their end users to understand and trust AI systems. This paper presents a novel method for learning a set of optimal quantile regression trees. The advantages of this method are that (1) it provides predictions about the complete conditional distribution of a target variable without prior assumptions on this distribution; (2) it provides predictions that are interpretable; (3) it learns a set of optimal quantile regression trees without compromising algorithmic efficiency compared to learning a single tree.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种学习最优分位数回归树集合的新方法，可在不牺牲算法效率的前提下，提供可解释的、无需先验假设的完整条件分布预测。
AI.motivation: 机器学习领域对既准确又可解释且鲁棒的模型需求日益增长，以使终端用户能够理解和信任AI系统。
AI.method: 提出一种学习最优分位数回归树集合的新方法，该方法在不牺牲算法效率（相比学习单棵树）的前提下，学习一组最优分位数回归树。
AI.result: 该方法能提供目标变量完整条件分布的预测，无需对该分布做先验假设；预测结果具有可解释性；与学习单棵树相比，算法效率未受影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法兼顾了预测的准确性、可解释性和鲁棒性，为构建可信任的AI系统提供了有效途径。

title: Random Walk on Point Clouds for Feature Detection
comment: 20 pages, 11 figures. Published in Information Sciences
summary: The points on the point clouds that can entirely outline the shape of the model are of critical importance, as they serve as the foundation for numerous point cloud processing tasks and are widely utilized in computer graphics and computer-aided design. This study introduces a novel method, RWoDSN, for extracting such feature points, incorporating considerations of sharp-to-smooth transitions, large-to-small scales, and textural-to-detailed features. We approach feature extraction as a two-stage context-dependent analysis problem. In the first stage, we propose a novel neighborhood descriptor, termed the Disk Sampling Neighborhood (DSN), which, unlike traditional spatially and geometrically invariant approaches, preserves a matrix structure while maintaining normal neighborhood relationships. In the second stage, a random walk is performed on the DSN (RWoDSN), yielding a graph-based DSN that simultaneously accounts for the spatial distribution, topological properties, and geometric characteristics of the local surface surrounding each point. This enables the effective extraction of feature points. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed RWoDSN method achieves a recall of 0.769-22% higher than the current state-of-the-art-alongside a precision of 0.784. Furthermore, it significantly outperforms several traditional and deep-learning techniques across eight evaluation metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RW0DSN方法，通过两阶段上下文分析（Disk Sampling Neighborhood邻域描述符 + 随机游走）提取点云中能完整勾勒模型形状的特征点，在召回率（0.769，提升22%）和精确率（0.784）上超越现有SOTA及多种传统/深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 点云中能够完整勾勒模型形状的特征点对众多点云处理任务至关重要，广泛应用于计算机图形学和计算机辅助设计，但现有方法在捕捉尖锐-平滑过渡、大-小尺度、纹理-细节特征方面存在不足。
AI.method: 将特征提取建模为两阶段上下文依赖分析问题：第一阶段提出Disk Sampling Neighborhood (DSN)邻域描述符，区别于传统空间和几何不变方法，在保持法向邻域关系的同时保留矩阵结构；第二阶段在DSN上执行随机游走(RWO0DSN)，生成基于图的DSN，同时考虑每个点周围局部表面的空间分布、拓扑属性和几何特征，从而有效提取特征点。
AI.result: RW0DSN方法召回率达0.769，相比当前SOTA提升22%；精确率达0.784；在八项评估指标上显著优于多种传统和深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: RW0DSN通过创新的DSN邻域描述符结合随机游走策略，在点云特征点提取任务上取得了显著优于现有方法的性能，验证了两阶段上下文分析框架的有效性。

title: Zero-Shot Detection of LLM-Generated Text via Implicit Reward Model
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across various tasks. However, their ability to generate human-like text has raised concerns about potential misuse. This underscores the need for reliable and effective methods to detect LLM-generated text. In this paper, we propose IRM, a novel zero-shot approach that leverages Implicit Reward Models for LLM-generated text detection. Such implicit reward models can be derived from publicly available instruction-tuned and base models. Previous reward-based method relies on preference construction and task-specific fine-tuning. In comparison, IRM requires neither preference collection nor additional training. We evaluate IRM on the DetectRL benchmark and demonstrate that IRM can achieve superior detection performance, outperforms existing zero-shot and supervised methods in LLM-generated text detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IRM方法，利用隐式奖励模型在零样本条件下检测LLM生成文本，无需偏好收集或额外训练，在DetectRL基准上表现优于现有零样本和监督方法。
AI.motivation: LLM生成文本的能力引发了潜在的滥用问题，因此需要可靠有效的检测方法来区分AI生成文本与人类文本。
AI.method: 提出IRM（隐式奖励模型）方法，从公开的指令微调模型和基础模型中提取隐式奖励模型，无需偏好收集和额外训练，实现零样本检测。
AI.result: 在DetectRL基准上，IRM在检测LLM生成文本方面取得了优越性能，超越了现有的零样本方法和监督方法。
AI.conclusion: IRM作为一种零样本方法，能够有效检测LLM生成文本，且相较于以往依赖偏好构建和任务特定微调的奖励方法，更具实用性和泛化能力。

title: Task-Adaptive Admittance Control for Human-Quadrotor Cooperative Load Transportation with Dynamic Cable-Length Regulation
comment: Preprint of accepted manuscript to be published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
summary: The collaboration between humans and robots is critical in many robotic applications, especially in those requiring physical human-robot interaction (pHRI). Previous research in pHRI has largely focused on robotic manipulators, employing impedance or admittance control to maintain operational safety. Conversely, research in human-quadrotor cooperative load transportation (CLT) is still in its infancy. This letter introduces a novel admittance controller designed for safe and effective human-quadrotor CLT using a quadrotor equipped with an actively-controlled winch. The proposed method accounts for the system's coupled dynamics, allowing the quadrotor and its cable to dynamically adapt to contact forces during CLT tasks, thereby enhancing responsiveness. We experimentally validated the task-adaptive capability of the controller across the entire CLT process, including in-place loading/unloading and load transporting tasks. To this end, we compared the system performances against a conventional approach, using both variable and fixed cable lengths under low- and high-stiffness conditions. Results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the conventional approach in terms of system responsiveness and motion smoothness, leading to improved CLT capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于人-四旋翼协同负载运输（CLT）的新型导纳控制器，通过主动控制绞盘实现安全有效的人机交互，在动态适应接触力方面优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有物理人机交互（pHRI）研究多集中于机械臂，而人-四旋翼协同负载运输（CLT）的研究尚处于起步阶段，缺乏针对该场景的安全有效控制方法。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的导纳控制器，考虑系统耦合动力学，使四旋翼及其缆绳在CLT任务中动态适应接触力；采用主动控制绞盘实现，并在整个CLT流程（原地装卸负载、负载运输）中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 与传统方法相比，所提出的方法在系统响应性和运动平滑性方面表现更优，在可变和固定缆绳长度、低刚度和高刚度条件下均提升了CLT能力。
AI.conclusion: 该导纳控制器能有效提升人-四旋翼协同负载运输的安全性和任务适应性，改善了系统响应性和运动平滑性，为空中机器人与人类协作提供了可行方案。

title: Video-ToC: Video Tree-of-Cue Reasoning
summary: Existing Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) struggle with complex video understanding, exhibiting limited reasoning capabilities and potential hallucinations. In particular, these methods tend to perform reasoning solely relying on the pretrained inherent reasoning rationales whilst lacking perception-aware adaptation to the input video content. To address this, we propose \textbf{Video-ToC}, a novel video reasoning framework that enhances video understanding through tree-of-cue reasoning. Specifically, our approach introduces three key innovations: (1) A tree-guided visual cue localization mechanism, which endows the model with enhanced fine-grained perceptual capabilities through structured reasoning patterns; (2) A reasoning-demand reward mechanism, which dynamically adjusts the reward value for reinforcement learning (RL) based on the estimation of reasoning demands, enabling on-demand incentives for more effective reasoning strategies; and (3) An automated annotation pipeline that constructs the Video-ToC-SFT-1k and Video-ToC-RL-2k datasets for supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and RL training, respectively. Extensive evaluations on six video understanding benchmarks and a video hallucination benchmark demonstrate the superiority of Video-ToC over baselines and recent methods. Code is available at https://github.com/qizhongtan/Video-ToC.

AI.tldr: Video-ToC 提出了一种基于树状线索推理的视频理解框架，通过树引导的视觉线索定位、推理需求奖励机制和自动化标注流程，显著提升了视频大语言模型在复杂视频理解任务中的推理能力和抗幻觉表现，在六个视频理解基准和一个视频幻觉基准上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频大语言模型在复杂视频理解中存在推理能力有限和容易产生幻觉的问题，其推理过程仅依赖预训练固有的推理模式，缺乏对输入视频内容的感知适应能力。
AI.method: (1) 树引导的视觉线索定位机制：通过结构化推理模式增强细粒度感知能力；(2) 推理需求奖励机制：基于推理需求估计动态调整强化学习的奖励值，实现按需激励；(3) 自动化标注流程：构建 Video-ToC-SFT-1k 和 Video-ToC-RL-2k 数据集分别用于监督微调和强化学习训练。
AI.result: 在六个视频理解基准和一个视频幻觉基准上的广泛评估表明，Video-ToC 在性能上优于基线方法和近期方法。
AI.conclusion: Video-ToC 通过树状线索推理框架有效增强了视频理解中的感知与推理能力，代码已开源。

title: Thrust Regulation Through Wing Linkage Modulation on the Aerobat Platform: Piezoelectric Slip-Stick Actuated Regulator Development
summary: Aerobat is a bat-inspired flapping-wing robot with a wing gait generate by the computational structure, a planar linkage of carbon fiber links driven by a single motor. This design minimizes weight but couples both wings to a shared input motor, eliminating independent thrust control and preventing asymmetric maneuvers. This thesis investigates thrust regulation by modifying the effective length of the first radius link $R_1$ in the computational structure. Static experiments using FDM-printed $R_1$ links at three lengths (28.58, 29.33, and 30.08 mm) across 3,4, and 5 Hz flapping frequencies demonstrated that a 1.5 mm length increase produced a 37% increase in peak lift force and shifted peak force timing within the downstroke. An additional experiment using a string-actuated regulator mechanism was performed. Further actuation methods were evaluated: sub-gram micro-servo and piezoelectric slip-stick. After both the string-tension and micro-servo actuation methods failed due to structural member compliance and motor fragility respectively, a TULA-50 piezoelectric slip-stick actuator was selected. Multiple force-amplifying mechanisms were prototyped, resulting in a direct-drive variable-length mechanism. This final mechanism was demonstrated in a preliminary bench-top test, though insufficient force output prevented dynamic testing during flapping. This work establishes linkage-length modulation via embedded slip-stick actuation as a viable approach to independent wing thrust control.

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过修改仿蝙蝠扑翼机器人Aerobat计算结构中的第一半径连杆R₁有效长度来调节推力。实验表明1.5mm长度增加使峰值升力提高37%，并评估了多种驱动方式，最终采用TULA-50压电滑移致动器实现直接驱动可变长度机构，为独立机翼推力控制提供了可行方案。
AI.motivation: Aerobat仿蝠扑翼机器人采用单电机驱动双向连杆机构，虽然减轻了重量但导致两翼耦合，无法独立控制推力，从而无法实现非对称机动。本研究旨在通过调节计算结构中连杆长度来实现独立推力控制。
AI.method: 静态实验采用FDM打印的三种长度R₁连杆（28.58、29.33、30.08 mm），在3、4、5 Hz扑翼频率下测试；随后设计了弦驱动调节机构；评估了亚克微伺服电机和压电滑移致动器两种驱动方式；最终采用TULA-50压电滑移致动器，经过多种力放大机构原型设计后实现直接驱动可变长度机构。
AI.result: 1.5 mm长度增加使峰值升力提高37%，并改变了峰值力在下冲程中的出现时序；弦张力和微伺服驱动方式分别因结构件柔顺性和电机脆弱性而失败；TULA-50压电滑移致动器驱动的直接驱动可变长度机构在初步台架测试中得到验证，但力输出不足以支持动态扑翼测试。
AI.conclusion: 通过嵌入式滑移致动实现连杆长度调节是独立机翼推力控制的可行途径，为后续实现非对称机动飞行奠定了基础。

title: DynamicRad: Content-Adaptive Sparse Attention for Long Video Diffusion
summary: Leveraging the natural spatiotemporal energy decay in video diffusion offers a path to efficiency, yet relying solely on rigid static masks risks losing critical long-range information in complex dynamics. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{DynamicRad}, a unified sparse-attention paradigm that grounds adaptive selection within a radial locality prior. DynamicRad introduces a \textbf{dual-mode} strategy: \textit{static-ratio} for speed-optimized execution and \textit{dynamic-threshold} for quality-first filtering. To ensure robustness without online search overhead, we integrate an offline Bayesian Optimization (BO) pipeline coupled with a \textbf{semantic motion router}. This lightweight projection module maps prompt embeddings to optimal sparsity regimes with \textbf{minimal runtime overhead}. Unlike online profiling methods, our offline BO optimizes attention reconstruction error (MSE) on a physics-based proxy task, ensuring rapid convergence. Experiments on HunyuanVideo and Wan2.1-14B demonstrate that DynamicRad pushes the efficiency--quality Pareto frontier, achieving \textbf{1.7$\times$--2.5$\times$ inference speedups} with \textbf{over 80\% effective sparsity}. In some long-sequence settings, the dynamic mode even matches or exceeds the dense baseline, while mask-aware LoRA further improves long-horizon coherence. Code is available at https://github.com/Adamlong3/DynamicRad.

AI.tldr: DynamicRad提出了一种基于径向局部先验的统一稀疏注意力范式，通过双模式策略（静态比例和动态阈值）和离线贝叶斯优化+语义运动路由器的组合，在视频扩散模型中实现高效稀疏注意力，在HunyuanVideo和Wan2.1-14B上取得1.7×–2.5×推理加速且保持80%以上有效稀疏率。
AI.motivation: 利用视频扩散中自然的时空能量衰减可以提高效率，但仅依赖刚性静态掩码会在复杂动态中丢失关键长程信息，需要一种更自适应的稀疏注意力机制。
AI.method: 提出DynamicRad，包含：1) 双模式策略（静态比例模式用于速度优化，动态阈值模式用于质量优先）；2) 离线贝叶斯优化（BO）优化注意力重建误差（MSE）；3) 语义运动路由器，将提示嵌入映射到最优稀疏区间，实现轻量级运行时预测。
AI.result: 在HunyuanVideo和Wan2.1-14B上实现1.7×–2.5×推理加速，超过80%有效稀疏率，动态模式在长序列设置中甚至匹配或超越密集基线，掩码感知LoRA进一步提升长程一致性。
AI.conclusion: DynamicRad通过离线优化和轻量级路由的结合，在不需要在线搜索开销的情况下，有效推动了视频扩散模型效率-质量的帕累托前沿。

title: SQLyzr: A Comprehensive Benchmark and Evaluation Platform for Text-to-SQL
summary: Text-to-SQL models have significantly improved with the adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs), leading to their increasing use in real-world applications. Although many benchmarks exist for evaluating the performance of text-to-SQL models, they often rely on a single aggregate score, lack evaluation under realistic settings, and provide limited insight into model behaviour across different query types. In this work, we present SQLyzr, a comprehensive benchmark and evaluation platform for text-to-SQL models. SQLyzr incorporates a diverse set of evaluation metrics that capture multiple aspects of generated queries, while enabling more realistic evaluation through workload alignment with real-world SQL usage patterns and database scaling. It further supports fine-grained query classification, error analysis, and workload augmentation, allowing users to better diagnose and improve text-to-SQL models. This demonstration showcases these capabilities through an interactive experience. Through SQLyzr's graphical interface, users can customize evaluation settings, analyze fine-grained reports, and explore additional features of the platform. We envision that SQLyzr facilitates the evaluation and iterative improvement of text-to-SQL models by addressing key limitations of existing benchmarks. The source code of SQLyzr is available at https://github.com/sepideh-abedini/SQLyzr.

AI.tldr: SQLyzr是一个面向Text-to-SQL模型的综合评估平台，通过多样化指标、真实工作负载对齐、细粒度查询分类与错误分析等功能，解决了现有基准测试单一评分、缺乏现实评估和洞察不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL基准测试存在三大局限：依赖单一聚合评分、缺乏现实场景下的评估（如工作负载对齐和数据库规模扩展）、对不同查询类型的行为洞察不足，亟需一个更全面、可定制的评估平台来支撑模型的诊断与迭代改进。
AI.method: SQLyzr设计为一个综合基准与评估平台，包含：(1) 多样化评估指标以捕获生成查询的多方面质量；(2) 通过工作负载与真实SQL使用模式对齐及数据库规模扩展实现更现实的评估；(3) 支持细粒度查询分类、错误分析和工作负载增强，帮助用户诊断和提升模型性能；(4) 提供图形化交互界面，支持自定义评估设置、分析细粒度报告及探索其他功能。
AI.result: 该演示展示了SQLyzr在交互式体验中的各项能力，用户可通过图形界面自定义评估设置、分析细粒度报告并探索平台的其他功能。
AI.conclusion: SQLyzr通过解决现有基准测试的关键局限性（单一评分、缺乏现实评估、洞察不足），有望促进Text-to-SQL模型的评估和迭代改进。

title: HALO: Hybrid Auto-encoded Locomotion with Learned Latent Dynamics, Poincaré Maps, and Regions of Attraction
summary: Reduced-order models are powerful for analyzing and controlling high-dimensional dynamical systems. Yet constructing these models for complex hybrid systems such as legged robots remains challenging. Classical approaches rely on hand-designed template models (e.g., LIP, SLIP), which, though insightful, only approximate the underlying dynamics. In contrast, data-driven methods can extract more accurate low-dimensional representations, but it remains unclear when stability and safety properties observed in the latent space meaningfully transfer back to the full-order system. To bridge this gap, we introduce HALO (Hybrid Auto-encoded Locomotion), a framework for learning latent reduced-order models of periodic hybrid dynamics directly from trajectory data. HALO employs an autoencoder to identify a low-dimensional latent state together with a learned latent Poincaré map that captures step-to-step locomotion dynamics. This enables Lyapunov analysis and the construction of an associated region of attraction in the latent space, both of which can be lifted back to the full-order state space through the decoder. Experiments on a simulated hopping robot and full-body humanoid locomotion demonstrate that HALO yields low-dimensional models that retain meaningful stability structure and predict full-order region-of-attraction boundaries.

AI.tldr: HALO是一个利用自动编码器从轨迹数据中学习周期性混合动力系统低维约化模型（含潜变量庞加莱映射）的框架，能够将潜空间中的Lyapunov分析和吸引域提升回全阶系统，在模拟弹跳机器人和人形机器人上验证了其保持稳定性结构的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有约化模型方法存在不足：经典模板模型（如LIP、SLIP）虽具洞察力但仅近似底层动力学；数据驱动方法能提取更准确的低维表示，但潜空间中的稳定性和安全性属性能否有意义地迁移回全阶系统尚不明确。作者希望弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 采用自动编码器识别低维潜变量状态，同时学习一个潜变量的庞加莱映射（Poincaré map）来捕捉步态间的周期性运动动力学。在潜空间中进行Lyapunov分析和吸引域构建，并通过解码器将潜空间结果提升回全阶状态空间。
AI.result: 在模拟弹跳机器人和全身人形机器人 locomotion 实验上，HALO能够产生保持有意义稳定性结构的低维模型，并能预测全阶系统的吸引域边界。
AI.conclusion: HALO成功构建了复杂混合动力系统（如腿式机器人）的低维约化模型，且这些模型的稳定性分析结果可以有效迁移至原系统，为数据驱动建模与经典稳定性分析的结合提供了可行方案。

title: MCAP: Deployment-Time Layer Profiling for Memory-Constrained LLM Inference
summary: Deploying large language models to heterogeneous hardware is often constrained by memory, not compute. We introduce MCAP (Monte Carlo Activation Profiling), a load-time per-layer importance estimator that enables dynamic precision and memory placement decisions on the target device. MCAP produces a lightweight per-layer signal that drives both precision dispatch (W4A8 vs. W4A16) and residency tier (GPU, RAM, SSD), allowing a single set of weights to operate across diverse memory budgets. Our system, NVE, achieves 1.5-1.8x higher decode throughput than llama.cpp Q4_0 on NVIDIA T4 and enables models to run in memory regimes previously infeasible without modifying weights.

AI.tldr: MCAP是一种蒙特卡洛激活重要性评估方法，能在加载时动态决定每层精度（W4A8/ W4A16）和内存层级（GPU/ RAM/ SSD），使大语言模型在异构硬件上实现1.5-1.8倍解码吞吐提升，并在原本不可行的内存预算下运行。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在异构硬件上部署时，瓶颈往往在于内存而非算力，需要一种轻量级方法在加载时自动评估每层的重要性，以指导精度和内存放置的决策。
AI.method: 提出MCAP（蒙特卡洛激活重要性评估），一种加载时每层重要性估计器，通过轻量级信号驱动精度调度（W4A8 vs. W4A16）和驻留层级（GPU/ RAM/ SSD）决策，使得同一套权重能自适应不同内存预算。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA T4上，相比llama.cpp Q4_0实现1.5-1.8倍解码吞吐提升，模型能在原本不可行的内存限制下运行。
AI.conclusion: MCAP + NVE系统有效解决了LLM在异构硬件上部署的内存瓶颈，无需修改权重即可动态适配不同内存预算，显著提升吞吐和适应性。

title: Align Generative Artificial Intelligence with Human Preferences: A Novel Large Language Model Fine-Tuning Method for Online Review Management
comment: Accepted to Information Systems Research (ISR). This is a preliminary version
summary: Online reviews have played a pivotal role in consumers' decision-making processes. Existing research has highlighted the significant impact of managerial review responses on customer relationship management and firm performance. However, a large portion of online reviews remains unaddressed due to the considerable human labor required to respond to the rapid growth of online reviews. While generative AI has achieved remarkable success in a range of tasks, they are general-purpose models and may not align well with domain-specific human preferences. To tailor these general generative AI models to domain-specific applications, finetuning is commonly employed. Nevertheless, several challenges persist in finetuning with domain-specific data, including hallucinations, difficulty in representing domain-specific human preferences, and over conservatism in offline policy optimization. To address these challenges, we propose a novel preference finetuning method to align an LLM with domain-specific human preferences for generating online review responses. Specifically, we first identify the source of hallucination and propose an effective context augmentation approach to mitigate the LLM hallucination. To represent human preferences, we propose a novel theory-driven preference finetuning approach that automatically constructs human preference pairs in the online review domain. Additionally, we propose a curriculum learning approach to further enhance preference finetuning. To overcome the challenge of over conservatism in existing offline preference finetuning method, we propose a novel density estimation-based support constraint method to relax the conservatism, and we mathematically prove its superior theoretical guarantees. Extensive evaluations substantiate the superiority of our proposed preference finetuning method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对在线评论回复生成领域的大语言模型偏好微调方法，通过上下文增强缓解幻觉、理论驱动的偏好对构建、课程学习优化以及基于密度估计的支持约束方法克服过度保守问题，在多项评估中表现优越。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已证实管理者对在线评论的回复能显著影响客户关系管理和企业绩效，但大量评论因人工成本高而未被回复。通用生成式AI模型在领域特定任务中与人类偏好存在偏差，而现有微调方法面临幻觉、领域偏好表示困难以及离线策略优化过度保守等挑战。
AI.method: 1) 识别幻觉来源并提出上下文增强方法缓解LLM幻觉；2) 提出理论驱动的偏好微调方法，自动构建在线评论领域的成对人类偏好对；3) 引入课程学习方法增强偏好微调效果；4) 提出基于密度估计的支持约束方法，以数学证明的方式放松离线偏好微调的过度保守性。
AI.result: 大量实验评估验证了所提出的偏好微调方法在生成在线评论回复任务上的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对领域特定人类偏好进行微调，可以有效提升通用大语言模型在在线评论回复生成任务中的表现，所提出的方法在缓解幻觉、表示偏好和克服过度保守方面均优于现有方法。

title: Feasibility of Indoor Frame-Wise Lidar Semantic Segmentation via Distillation from Visual Foundation Model
summary: Frame-wise semantic segmentation of indoor lidar scans is a fundamental step toward higher-level 3D scene understanding and mapping applications. However, acquiring frame-wise ground truth for training deep learning models is costly and time-consuming. This challenge is largely addressed, for imagery, by Visual Foundation Models (VFMs) which segment image frames. The same VFMs may be used to train a lidar scan frame segmentation model via a 2D-to-3D distillation pipeline. The success of such distillation has been shown for autonomous driving scenes, but not yet for indoor scenes. Here, we study the feasibility of repeating this success for indoor scenes, in a frame-wise distillation manner by coupling each lidar scan with a VFM-processed camera image. The evaluation is done using indoor SLAM datasets, where pseudo-labels are used for downstream evaluation. Also, a small manually annotated lidar dataset is provided for validation, as there are no other lidar frame-wise indoor datasets with semantics. Results show that the distilled model achieves up to 56% mIoU under pseudo-label evaluation and around 36% mIoU with real-label, demonstrating the feasibility of cross-modal distillation for indoor lidar semantic segmentation without manual annotations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用视觉基础模型（VFMs）通过2D到3D蒸馏管道，实现室内激光雷达扫描的帧级语义分割，无需人工标注。实验表明，蒸馏模型在伪标签评估下可达56% mIoU，在真实标签下约36% mIoU，证明了跨模态蒸馏在室内场景中的可行性。
AI.motivation: 室内激光雷达扫描的帧级语义分割是3D场景理解与建图的关键步骤，但获取逐帧标注数据成本高昂。为解决这一问题，作者探索将视觉基础模型（VFMs）通过2D-to-3D蒸馏管道应用于室内场景，以消除对大量人工标注的依赖。
AI.method: 采用2D-to-3D蒸馏管道，将每个激光雷达扫描与经VFMs处理的相机图像配对，以帧级蒸馏方式训练激光雷达扫描分割模型。使用室内SLAM数据集进行评估，伪标签用于下游评估，并提供少量人工标注的激光雷达数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 蒸馏模型在伪标签评估下达到56% mIoU，在真实标签评估下约为36% mIoU。
AI.conclusion: 证明了无需人工标注即可实现室内激光雷达语义分割的跨模态蒸馏是可行的。该方法填补了室内场景下激光雷达帧级语义分割数据集的空白，并为降低标注成本提供了有效途径。

title: SGD at the Edge of Stability: The Stochastic Sharpness Gap
summary:
When training neural networks with full-batch gradient descent (GD) and step size $η$, the largest eigenvalue of the Hessian -- the sharpness $S(\boldsymbolθ)$ -- rises to $2/η$ and hovers there, a phenomenon termed the Edge of Stability (EoS). \citet{damian2023selfstab} showed that this behavior is explained by a self-stabilization mechanism driven by third-order structure of the loss, and that GD implicitly follows projected gradient descent (PGD) on the constraint $ S(\boldsymbolθ)\leq 2/η$. For mini-batch stochastic gradient descent (SGD), the sharpness stabilizes below $2/η$, with the gap widening as the batch size decreases; yet no theoretical explanation exists for this suppression.
  We introduce stochastic self-stabilization, extending the self-stabilization framework to SGD. Our key insight is that gradient noise injects variance into the oscillatory dynamics along the top Hessian eigenvector, strengthening the cubic sharpness-reducing force and shifting the equilibrium below $2/η$. Following the approach of \citet{damian2023selfstab}, we define stochastic predicted dynamics relative to a moving projected gradient descent trajectory and prove a stochastic coupling theorem that bounds the deviation of SGD from these predictions. We derive a closed-form equilibrium sharpness gap: $ΔS = ηβσ_{\boldsymbol{u}}^{2}/(4α)$, where $α$ is the progressive sharpening rate, $β$ is the self-stabilization strength, and $σ_{ \boldsymbol{u}}^{2}$ is the gradient noise variance projected onto the top eigenvector. This formula predicts that smaller batch sizes yield flatter solutions and recovers GD when the batch equals the full dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出随机自稳定理论，将自稳定框架从全批量梯度下降(GD)扩展到小批量随机梯度下降(SGD)，解释SGD中尖锐度(stabilizes below 2/η)的现象。关键发现是梯度噪声沿顶部Hessian特征向量注入方差，增强三次尖锐度降低力，使平衡点低于2/η。推导出平衡尖锐度差距的闭式公式：ΔS = ηβσ_u²/(4α)，预测更小的批量大小产生更平坦的解。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已解释全批量GD中尖锐度稳定在2/η的边缘稳定性(EoS)现象，但对于小批量SGD中尖锐度稳定在2/η以下且随批量减小而间隙增大的现象缺乏理论解释。
AI.method: 提出随机自稳定理论，将梯度噪声视为沿顶部Hessian特征向量的方差注入，增强三次尖锐度降低力。定义相对于移动投影梯度下降轨迹的随机预测动力学，证明随机耦合定理来界定SGD与这些预测的偏差。
AI.result: 推导出平衡尖锐度差距的闭式公式：ΔS = ηβσ_u²/(4α)，其中α是渐进尖锐化率，β是自稳定强度，σ_u²是投影到顶部特征向量上的梯度噪声方差。该公式预测更小的批量大小产生更平坦的解，并在批量等于完整数据集时恢复GD结果。
AI.conclusion: 该理论成功将自稳定框架从GD扩展到SGD，为理解随机优化中的隐式正则化和平坦极小值选择提供了理论基础。

title: Fast-then-Fine: A Two-Stage Framework with Multi-Granular Representation for Cross-Modal Retrieval in Remote Sensing
summary: Remote sensing (RS) image-text retrieval plays a critical role in understanding massive RS imagery. However, the dense multi-object distribution and complex backgrounds in RS imagery make it difficult to simultaneously achieve fine-grained cross-modal alignment and efficient retrieval. Existing methods either rely on complex cross-modal interactions that lead to low retrieval efficiency, or depend on large-scale vision-language model pre-training, which requires massive data and computational resources. To address these issues, we propose a fast-then-fine (FTF) two-stage retrieval framework that decomposes retrieval into a text-agnostic recall stage for efficient candidate selection and a text-guided rerank stage for fine-grained alignment. Specifically, in the recall stage, text-agnostic coarse-grained representations are employed for efficient candidate selection; in the rerank stage, a parameter-free balanced text-guided interaction block enhances fine-grained alignment without introducing additional learnable parameters. Furthermore, an inter- and intra-modal loss is designed to jointly optimize cross-modal alignment across multi-granular representations. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that the FTF achieves competitive retrieval accuracy while significantly improving retrieval efficiency compared with existing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种"先粗后精"两阶段遥感图像-文本检索框架(FTF)，第一阶段使用文本无关粗粒度表征快速筛选候选，第二阶段通过无参数平衡文本引导交互块实现细粒度对齐，在保持检索精度的同时大幅提升效率。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像中密集多目标分布和复杂背景使得现有方法难以同时实现细粒度跨模态对齐与高效检索：基于复杂跨模态交互的方法检索效率低，依赖大规模视觉-语言预训练的方法需要海量数据和计算资源。
AI.method: 提出FTF两阶段检索框架：(1) 召回阶段：使用文本无关的粗粒度表征进行高效候选筛选；(2) 重排序阶段：采用无参数的平衡文本引导交互块实现细粒度对齐，不引入额外可学习参数。此外，设计跨模态和模态内损失函数联合优化多粒度表征的跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在公开基准数据集上的大量实验表明，FTF在达到与现有方法相竞争的检索精度的同时，显著提升了检索效率。
AI.conclusion: FTF通过解耦检索过程为两阶段，有效平衡了遥感图像-文本检索中细粒度对齐精度与检索效率之间的矛盾。

title: On Reasoning Behind Next Occupation Recommendation
summary: In this work, we develop a novel reasoning approach to enhance the performance of large language models (LLMs) in future occupation prediction. In this approach, a reason generator first derives a ``reason'' for a user using his/her past education and career history. The reason summarizes the user's preference and is used as the input of an occupation predictor to recommend the user's next occupation. This two-step occupation prediction approach is, however, non-trivial as LLMs are not aligned with career paths or the unobserved reasons behind each occupation decision. We therefore propose to fine-tune LLMs improving their reasoning and occupation prediction performance. We first derive high-quality oracle reasons, as measured by factuality, coherence and utility criteria, using a LLM-as-a-Judge. These oracle reasons are then used to fine-tune small LLMs to perform reason generation and next occupation prediction. Our extensive experiments show that: (a) our approach effectively enhances LLM's accuracy in next occupation prediction making them comparable to fully supervised methods and outperforming unsupervised methods; (b) a single LLM fine-tuned to perform reason generation and occupation prediction outperforms two LLMs fine-tuned to perform the tasks separately; and (c) the next occupation prediction accuracy depends on the quality of generated reasons. Our code is available at https://github.com/Sarasarahhhhh/job_prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的推理方法，通过生成用户职业偏好理由并微调小规模LLM，来提升大语言模型在职业预测任务中的表现，实验表明该方法可达到与全监督方法相当的效果。
AI.motivation: LLM在职业路径理解和职业决策背后的潜在理由方面存在对齐问题，导致其在未来职业预测任务中表现不佳，需要一种推理增强方法来提升预测性能。
AI.method: 采用两阶段推理方法：(1) 先用理由生成器根据用户教育背景和职业经历生成理由；(2) 再将理由输入职业预测器进行预测。通过LLM-as-a-Judge生成高质量oracle理由（基于事实性、连贯性和有用性），然后用这些理由微调小规模LLM进行理由生成和职业预测的联合训练。
AI.result: (a) 该方法使LLM在职业预测准确率上达到与全监督方法相当，且优于无监督方法；(b) 联合微调（单一模型同时做理由生成和预测）优于分离微调（两个模型分别执行两个任务）；(c) 预测准确率与生成理由的质量正相关。
AI.conclusion: 通过生成可解释的职业偏好理由并进行微调，能有效增强LLM在职业预测任务上的性能，证明了推理增强和理由质量对预测准确性的关键作用。

title: SynAgent: Generalizable Cooperative Humanoid Manipulation via Solo-to-Cooperative Agent Synergy
summary: Controllable cooperative humanoid manipulation is a fundamental yet challenging problem for embodied intelligence, due to severe data scarcity, complexities in multi-agent coordination, and limited generalization across objects. In this paper, we present SynAgent, a unified framework that enables scalable and physically plausible cooperative manipulation by leveraging Solo-to-Cooperative Agent Synergy to transfer skills from single-agent human-object interaction to multi-agent human-object-human scenarios. To maintain semantic integrity during motion transfer, we introduce an interaction-preserving retargeting method based on an Interact Mesh constructed via Delaunay tetrahedralization, which faithfully maintains spatial relationships among humans and objects. Building upon this refined data, we propose a single-agent pretraining and adaptation paradigm that bootstraps synergistic collaborative behaviors from abundant single-human data through decentralized training and multi-agent PPO. Finally, we develop a trajectory-conditioned generative policy using a conditional VAE, trained via multi-teacher distillation from motion imitation priors to achieve stable and controllable object-level trajectory execution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SynAgent significantly outperforms existing baselines in both cooperative imitation and trajectory-conditioned control, while generalizing across diverse object geometries. Codes and data will be available after publication. Project Page: http://yw0208.github.io/synagent

AI.tldr: SynAgent是一个统一框架，通过从单智能体人机交互到多智能体协作的技能迁移，实现了可扩展且物理合理的可控协作人形机器人操作，在多智能体协作模仿和轨迹条件控制上显著超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: 解决协作人形机器人操作中数据稀缺、多智能体协调复杂以及跨物体泛化能力有限等根本性挑战。
AI.method: 提出Solo-to-Cooperative Agent Synergy范式，包括：(1) 基于Delaunay四面体化的交互保持重定向方法(Interact Mesh)保持语义完整性；(2) 单智能体预训练与适应范式，通过分散训练和多智能体PPO从单人类数据引导协作行为；(3) 基于条件VAE的轨迹条件生成策略，通过多教师蒸馏从运动模仿先验中训练。
AI.result: 在协作模仿和轨迹条件控制任务上显著优于现有基线，且能泛化到不同物体几何形状。
AI.conclusion: SynAgent有效解决了协作人形操作中的数据稀缺和泛化问题，为实现可控的具身智能协作操作提供了统一框架。

title: Trust but Verify: Introducing DAVinCI -- A Framework for Dual Attribution and Verification in Claim Inference for Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable fluency and versatility across a wide range of NLP tasks, yet they remain prone to factual inaccuracies and hallucinations. This limitation poses significant risks in high-stakes domains such as healthcare, law, and scientific communication, where trust and verifiability are paramount. In this paper, we introduce DAVinCI - a Dual Attribution and Verification framework designed to enhance the factual reliability and interpretability of LLM outputs. DAVinCI operates in two stages: (i) it attributes generated claims to internal model components and external sources; (ii) it verifies each claim using entailment-based reasoning and confidence calibration. We evaluate DAVinCI across multiple datasets, including FEVER and CLIMATE-FEVER, and compare its performance against standard verification-only baselines. Our results show that DAVinCI significantly improves classification accuracy, attribution precision, recall, and F1-score by 5-20%. Through an extensive ablation study, we isolate the contributions of evidence span selection, recalibration thresholds, and retrieval quality. We also release a modular DAVinCI implementation that can be integrated into existing LLM pipelines. By bridging attribution and verification, DAVinCI offers a scalable path to auditable, trustworthy AI systems. This work contributes to the growing effort to make LLMs not only powerful but also accountable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DAVinCI框架，通过双阶段归因与验证机制，将LLM输出与内部组件和外部源关联，并基于蕴含推理和置信度校准进行事实核查，在FEVER等数据集上使分类准确率、归因精确率等指标提升5-20%。
AI.motivation: LLM虽具备出色的流畅性和通用性，但在医疗、法律、科学传播等高风险领域存在严重的事实性错误和幻觉问题，威胁到可信赖性和可验证性。
AI.method: DAVinCI采用两阶段框架：(i) 将生成的声明归因到内部模型组件和外部来源；(ii) 利用基于蕴含推理和置信度校准对每个声明进行验证。
AI.result: 在FEVER、CLIMATE-FEVER等多个数据集上，相较于标准仅验证基线，分类准确率、归因精确率、召回率和F1分数提升5-20%。消融实验分离了证据跨度选择、重新校准阈值和检索质量各自的贡献。
AI.conclusion: DAVinCI通过桥接归因与验证，为构建可审计、可信赖的AI系统提供了可扩展路径，使LLM不仅强大而且可问责。

title: OneVL: One-Step Latent Reasoning and Planning with Vision-Language Explanation
comment: Technical Report; 49 pages, 22 figures, 10 tables; Project Page at https://xiaomi-embodied-intelligence.github.io/OneVL
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has become a powerful driver of trajectory prediction in VLA-based autonomous driving, yet its autoregressive nature imposes a latency cost that is prohibitive for real-time deployment. Latent CoT methods attempt to close this gap by compressing reasoning into continuous hidden states, but consistently fall short of their explicit counterparts. We suggest that this is due to purely linguistic latent representations compressing a symbolic abstraction of the world, rather than the causal dynamics that actually govern driving. Thus, we present OneVL (One-step latent reasoning and planning with Vision-Language explanations), a unified VLA and World Model framework that routes reasoning through compact latent tokens supervised by dual auxiliary decoders. Alongside a language decoder that reconstructs text CoT, we introduce a visual world model decoder that predicts future-frame tokens, forcing the latent space to internalize the causal dynamics of road geometry, agent motion, and environmental change. A three-stage training pipeline progressively aligns these latents with trajectory, language, and visual objectives, ensuring stable joint optimization. At inference, the auxiliary decoders are discarded and all latent tokens are prefilled in a single parallel pass, matching the speed of answer-only prediction. Across four benchmarks, OneVL becomes the first latent CoT method to surpass explicit CoT, delivering state-of-the-art accuracy at answer-only latency, and providing direct evidence that tighter compression, when guided in both language and world-model supervision, produces more generalizable representations than verbose token-by-token reasoning. Project Page: https://xiaomi-embodied-intelligence.github.io/OneVL

AI.tldr: OneVL提出了一种统一VLA与世界模型的框架，通过双辅助解码器（语言解码器+视觉世界模型解码器）监督的紧凑潜在token，实现一步式潜在推理与规划。该方法在四个基准上首次超越显式CoT方法，达到回答式延迟下的SOTA精度。
AI.motivation: 自回归CoT推理的延迟过高，不适合自动驾驶实时部署；现有潜在CoT方法因潜在表示压缩的是符号化世界抽象而非因果动力学，性能不及显式CoT。
AI.method: 提出OneVL框架：1）引入视觉世界模型解码器预测未来帧token，强制潜在空间内化道路几何、智能体运动和环境变化的因果动力学；2）三阶段训练流水线逐步对齐潜在token与轨迹、语言和视觉目标；3）推理时丢弃辅助解码器，所有潜在token单次并行预填充，达到回答式预测的速度。
AI.result: 在四个基准上，OneVL成为首个超越显式CoT的潜在CoT方法，以回答式延迟达到SOTA精度。
AI.conclusion: 在语言和世界模型联合监督下进行更紧致的压缩，能产生比逐token显式推理更具泛化性的表示。

title: XEmbodied: A Foundation Model with Enhanced Geometric and Physical Cues for Large-Scale Embodied Environments
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models drive next-generation autonomous systems, but training them requires scalable, high-quality annotations from complex environments. Current cloud pipelines rely on generic vision-language models (VLMs) that lack geometric reasoning and domain semantics due to their 2D image-text pretraining. To address this mismatch, we propose XEmbodied, a cloud-side foundation model that endows VLMs with intrinsic 3D geometric awareness and interaction with physical cues (e.g., occupancy grids, 3D boxes). Instead of treating geometry as auxiliary input, XEmbodied integrates geometric representations via a structured 3D Adapter and distills physical signals into context tokens using an Efficient Image-Embodied Adapter. Through progressive domain curriculum and reinforcement learning post-training, XEmbodied preserves general capabilities while demonstrating robust performance across 18 public benchmarks. It significantly improves spatial reasoning, traffic semantics, embodied affordance, and out-of-distribution generalization for large-scale scenario mining and embodied VQA.

AI.tldr: XEmbodied是一个云侧基础模型，通过结构化3D适配器和高效图像-具身适配器，为VLM赋予内在3D几何感知和物理线索交互能力，在18个公开基准上展现出鲁棒性能，显著提升了空间推理、交通语义、具身可供性和分布外泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型训练依赖云端流水线，但通用VLM基于2D图文预训练，缺乏几何推理和领域语义能力，与复杂3D物理环境之间存在严重不匹配，限制了高质量标注的可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出XEmbodied，包含两个核心组件：(1) 结构化3D适配器(3D Adapter)集成几何表征；(2) 高效图像-具身适配器(Efficient Image-Embodied Adapter)将物理信号蒸馏为上下文令牌。通过渐进式领域课程学习和强化学习后训练来保留通用能力。
AI.result: 在18个公开基准上表现鲁棒，显著提升了空间推理、交通语义、具身可供性和分布外泛化能力，适用于大规模场景挖掘和具身VQA任务。
AI.conclusion: XEmbodied通过将3D几何感知和物理线索内化到VLM中，有效弥合了2D预训练与3D具身环境之间的差距，为VLA模型的云端标注提供了更匹配的解决方案。

title: Differentially Private Model Merging
summary: In machine learning applications, privacy requirements during inference or deployment time could change constantly due to varying policies, regulations, or user experience. In this work, we aim to generate a magnitude of models to satisfy any target differential privacy (DP) requirement without additional training steps, given a set of existing models trained on the same dataset with different privacy/utility tradeoffs. We propose two post processing techniques, namely random selection and linear combination, to output a final private model for any target privacy parameter. We provide privacy accounting of these approaches from the lens of R'enyi DP and privacy loss distributions for general problems. In a case study on private mean estimation, we fully characterize the privacy/utility results and theoretically establish the superiority of linear combination over random selection. Empirically, we validate our approach and analyses on several models and both synthetic and real-world datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种后处理技术（随机选择和线性组合），利用已有的一组在不同隐私/效用权衡下训练的模型，为任意目标差分隐私需求生成模型，而无需额外训练。通过Rényi DP和隐私损失分布进行隐私核算，并在私有均值估计案例中理论上证明线性组合优于随机选择。
AI.motivation: 在机器学习应用中，推理或部署时的隐私要求可能因政策、法规或用户体验的变化而不断变化，现有方法无法灵活地适应不同隐私需求而不重新训练模型。
AI.method: 提出两种后处理技术：随机选择和线性组合，利用已有的一组在相同数据集上以不同隐私/效用权衡训练的模型，为任意目标差分隐私参数生成最终私有模型，并通过Rényi DP和隐私损失分布进行隐私核算。
AI.result: 在私有均值估计案例中，完整刻画了隐私/效用结果，并从理论上证明线性组合优于随机选择。在合成数据和真实数据上的多个模型实验中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的后处理方法能够在无需额外训练的情况下，灵活满足变化的隐私需求，且线性组合在理论上和实证上均优于随机选择。

title: Doubly Saturated Ramsey Graphs: A Case Study in Computer-Assisted Mathematical Discovery
summary: Ramsey-good graphs are graphs that contain neither a clique of size $s$ nor an independent set of size $t$. We study doubly saturated Ramsey-good graphs, defined as Ramsey-good graphs in which the addition or removal of any edge necessarily creates an $s$-clique or a $t$-independent set. We present a method combining SAT solving with bespoke LLM-generated code to discover infinite families of such graphs, answering a question of Grinstead and Roberts from 1982. In addition, we use LLMs to generate and formalize correctness proofs in Lean. This case study highlights the potential of integrating automated reasoning, large language models, and formal verification to accelerate mathematical discovery. We argue that such tool-driven workflows will play an increasingly central role in experimental mathematics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将SAT求解与定制化LLM生成代码相结合，发现了无限族双饱和Ramsey-good图，解决了Grinstead和Roberts于1982年提出的问题，并利用LLM在Lean中生成和形式化正确性证明，展示了自动化推理、大语言模型和形式化验证在加速数学发现中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 解决Grinstead和Roberts在1982年提出的关于双饱和Ramsey-good图无限族的存在性问题，并探索将自动化推理、LLM和形式化验证集成到数学发现中的可行性。
AI.method: 结合SAT求解（布尔可满足性问题求解）与基于大语言模型生成的定制代码，发现并验证无限族双饱和Ramsey-good图；同时使用LLM生成正确性证明并在Lean定理证明器中进行形式化验证。
AI.result: 成功发现了无限族双饱和Ramsey-good图，并完成了对应的形式化正确性证明。
AI.conclusion: 该案例研究证明了自动化推理、大语言模型和形式化验证的集成可以有效加速数学发现，这类工具驱动的工作流程将在实验数学中发挥越来越核心的作用。

title: Safe Control using Learned Safety Filters and Adaptive Conformal Inference
summary: Safety filters have been shown to be effective tools to ensure the safety of control systems with unsafe nominal policies. To address scalability challenges in traditional synthesis methods, learning-based approaches have been proposed for designing safety filters for systems with high-dimensional state and control spaces. However, the inevitable errors in the decisions of these models raise concerns about their reliability and the safety guarantees they offer. This paper presents Adaptive Conformal Filtering (ACoFi), a method that combines learned Hamilton-Jacobi reachability-based safety filters with adaptive conformal inference. Under ACoFi, the filter dynamically adjusts its switching criteria based on the observed errors in its predictions of the safety of actions. The range of possible safety values of the nominal policy's output is used to quantify uncertainty in safety assessment. The filter switches from the nominal policy to the learned safe one when that range suggests it might be unsafe. We show that ACoFi guarantees that the rate of incorrectly quantifying uncertainty in the predicted safety of the nominal policy is asymptotically upper bounded by a user-defined parameter. This gives a soft safety guarantee rather than a hard safety guarantee. We evaluate ACoFi in a Dubins car simulation and a Safety Gymnasium environment, empirically demonstrating that it significantly outperforms the baseline method that uses a fixed switching threshold by achieving higher learned safety values and fewer safety violations, especially in out-of-distribution scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应共形滤波（ACoFi）方法，结合学习型Hamilton-Jacobi可达性安全滤波器与自适应共形推理，通过动态调整切换准则来保证对名义策略安全预测的不确定性量化错误率渐近有界，在Dubins车仿真和安全健身房环境中显著优于固定阈值基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统安全滤波器合成方法在高维状态和控制空间中面临可扩展性挑战，而基于学习的方法虽能解决可扩展性问题，但其决策中的不可避免误差引发了可靠性和安全保证方面的担忧。
AI.method: 将学习型Hamilton-Jacobi可达性安全滤波器与自适应共形推理相结合，利用名义策略输出的安全值范围量化不确定性，动态调整滤波器的切换准则，当安全值范围表明可能存在不安全时从名义策略切换到学习型安全策略。
AI.result: 在Dubins车仿真和Safety Gymnasium环境中，ACoFi显著优于使用固定切换阈值的基线方法，实现了更高的学习安全值和更少的安全违规，尤其在分布外场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: ACoFi提供了软安全保证（而非硬安全保证），即名义策略安全预测不确定性量化错误率被用户定义参数渐近上界约束，在保证计算可扩展性的同时提供了统计意义上的安全保证。

title: LaplacianFormer:Rethinking Linear Attention with Laplacian Kernel
summary: The quadratic complexity of softmax attention presents a major obstacle for scaling Transformers to high-resolution vision tasks. Existing linear attention variants often replace the softmax with Gaussian kernels to reduce complexity, but such approximations lack theoretical grounding and tend to oversuppress mid-range token interactions. We propose LaplacianFormer, a Transformer variant that employs a Laplacian kernel as a principled alternative to softmax, motivated by empirical observations and theoretical analysis. To address expressiveness degradation under low-rank approximations, we introduce a provably injective feature map that retains fine-grained token information. For efficient computation, we adopt a Nyström approximation of the kernel matrix and solve the resulting system using Newton--Schulz iteration, avoiding costly matrix inversion and SVD. We further develop custom CUDA implementations for both the kernel and solver, enabling high-throughput forward and backward passes suitable for edge deployment. Experiments on ImageNet show that LaplacianFormer achieves strong performance-efficiency trade-offs while improving attention expressiveness.

AI.tldr: LaplacianFormer提出用拉普拉斯核替代softmax注意力，结合可证明单射的特征映射和Nyström近似，实现线性复杂度的高效视觉Transformer。
AI.motivation: softmax注意力的二次复杂度阻碍了Transformer在高分辨率视觉任务中的扩展，现有线性注意力方法用高斯核近似softmax缺乏理论依据且会过度抑制中距离token交互。
AI.method: 1) 用拉普拉斯核替代softmax作为注意力机制；2) 设计可证明单射的特征映射以保持细粒度token信息；3) 采用Nyström近似核矩阵，用Newton-Schulz迭代求解避免矩阵求逆和SVD；4) 开发自定义CUDA实现支持高效前向和反向传播。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上实现了良好的性能-效率权衡，同时提升了注意力表达性。
AI.conclusion: 拉普拉斯核是一个有理论依据的softmax替代方案，能够实现线性复杂度注意力，在保持高效的同时提升表达性。

title: Using large language models for embodied planning introduces systematic safety risks
summary: Large language models are increasingly used as planners for robotic systems, yet how safely they plan remains an open question.
