To evaluate safe planning systematically, we introduce DESPITE, a benchmark of 12,279 tasks spanning physical and normative dangers with fully deterministic validation. Across 23 models, even near-perfect planning ability does not ensure safety: the best-planning model fails to produce a valid plan on only 0.4% of tasks but produces dangerous plans on 28.3%. Among 18 open-source models from 3B to 671B parameters, planning ability improves substantially with scale (0.4-99.3%) while safety awareness remains relatively flat (38-57%). We identify a multiplicative relationship between these two capacities, showing that larger models complete more tasks safely primarily through improved planning, not through better danger avoidance. Three proprietary reasoning models reach notably higher safety awareness (71-81%), while non-reasoning proprietary models and open-source reasoning models remain below 57%. As planning ability approaches saturation for frontier models, improving safety awareness becomes a central challenge for deploying language-model planners in robotic systems.

AI.tldr: DESPITE基准测试包含12,279个任务，评估23个语言模型在机器人规划中的安全性。研究发现即使规划能力近乎完美（仅0.4%任务失败），仍有28.3%任务产生危险计划；模型规模扩大显著提升规划能力（0.4-99.3%），但安全意识提升有限（38-57%）；安全意识与规划能力呈乘法关系，大模型主要通过更好的规划而非危险规避完成更多安全任务；专有推理模型安全意识最高（71-81%），其他模型低于57%。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型越来越多地被用作机器人系统的规划器，但其规划的安全性仍是一个开放问题，缺乏系统性评估方法。
AI.method: 构建DESPITE基准测试（12,279个任务），涵盖物理和规范性危险，采用完全确定性验证，评估23个模型（含18个开源模型，参数范围3B-671B）的规划能力与安全意识。
AI.result: 最佳规划模型仅0.4%任务无法生成有效规划，但28.3%任务产生危险计划；模型规模扩大使规划能力从0.4%提升至99.3%，安全意识仅从38%提升至57%；专有推理模型安全意识达71-81%，其他模型低于57%。
AI.conclusion: 规划能力与安全意识呈乘法关系，大模型主要通过改进规划而非危险规避提升安全完成任务的数量；对于前沿模型，规划能力趋近饱和，提升安全意识成为部署语言模型规划器的核心挑战。

title: Mitigating Hallucinations in Large Vision-Language Models without Performance Degradation
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) exhibit powerful generative capabilities but frequently produce hallucinations that compromise output reliability. Fine-tuning on annotated data devoid of hallucinations offers the most direct solution, while its high computational cost motivates recent representation-based methods, which focus on mitigating hallucinatory components within hidden representations. Though efficient, we empirically observe that these methods degrade general generation capacity due to incomplete extraction of hallucination components and non-selective parameter updates. To address these limitations, we propose MPD, a dual-stage framework for mitigating hallucinations without performance degradation. Specifically, our MPD relies on two essential factors: (1) semantic-aware component disentanglement to extract pure hallucination components, and (2) interpretable parameter updates that selectively modify parameters most relevant to hallucination. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MPD achieves state-of-the-art performance, reducing hallucinations by 23.4\% while maintaining 97.4\% of general generative capability as evaluated on LLaVA-Bench and MME, with no additional computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出MPD双阶段框架，通过语义感知组件解缠和可解释参数更新，在降低23.4%幻觉的同时保持97.4%的通用生成能力，且无额外计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有基于表示的方法虽能缓解LVLM幻觉，但因幻觉组件提取不完整和参数更新无选择性，导致通用生成能力下降。
AI.method: MPD双阶段框架：(1) 语义感知组件解缠，提取纯幻觉组件；(2) 可解释参数更新，选择性修改与幻觉最相关的参数。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-Bench和MME上，幻觉降低23.4%，通用生成能力保持97.4%，无额外计算开销。
AI.conclusion: MPD在不损害通用生成能力的前提下有效缓解LVLM幻觉，且计算效率高。

title: TAPO-Description Logic for Information Behavior: Refined OBoxes, Inference, and Categorical Semantics
comment: 23 pages, 2 figures. Substantially expanded version of arXiv:2602.17242; adds a guard-judgment layer, refined OBoxes, core inference rules, categorical semantics, sheaf-theoretic refinement, and a browsing-theory appendix
summary: This paper develops a refined version of TAPO-description logic for the analysis of information behavior. The framework is treated not as a single homogeneous object logic, but as a layered formalism consisting of a static descriptive layer (TBox/ABox), a procedural layer (PBox), and an oracle-sensitive layer (OBox). To make this architecture mathematically explicit, we introduce a metalevel guard-judgment layer governing procedural branching and iteration. On this basis we formulate a core inference system for TAPO-description logic, covering static TBox/ABox reasoning, guarded procedural transition in the PBox, and validated external import in the OBox. We then give a categorical semantics for the resulting framework and indicate its sheaf-theoretic refinement. The theory is illustrated by examples of information-seeking behavior, including simple search behavior and review-sensitive ordering behavior in a curry restaurant. The aim is to treat not only static knowledge representation but also hesitation, external consultation, and action-guiding update within a unified logical setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种TAPO-描述逻辑的精炼版本，通过分层形式化（静态层TBox/ABox、过程层PBox、Oracle敏感层OBox）并引入元层守卫-判断机制，构建了涵盖静态推理、守卫过程转换和验证性外部导入的核心推理系统，并给出了范畴语义和层论细化，以统一逻辑框架处理信息行为中的静态知识、犹豫、外部咨询和行动引导更新。
AI.motivation: 现有描述逻辑主要关注静态知识表示，难以统一处理信息行为中的动态过程（如犹豫、外部咨询、行动更新），因此需要一种更具表达力的分层逻辑框架来建模完整的信息行为。
AI.method: 将TAPO-描述逻辑重构为三层形式化（TBox/ABox静态层、PBox过程层、OBoxOracle敏感层），引入元层守卫-判断机制控制过程分支与迭代，建立核心推理系统，并给出范畴语义及层论细化。
AI.result: 构建了支持静态推理、守卫过程转换和验证性外部导入的统一推理系统，并通过信息搜索行为和咖喱餐厅中的排序行为等实例验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够在一个统一的逻辑设定下同时处理静态知识表示、犹豫、外部咨询和行动引导更新，拓展了描述逻辑在信息行为分析中的应用能力。

title: DAG-STL: A Hierarchical Framework for Zero-Shot Trajectory Planning under Signal Temporal Logic Specifications
summary: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is a powerful language for specifying temporally structured robotic tasks. Planning executable trajectories under STL constraints remains difficult when system dynamics and environment structure are not analytically available. Existing methods typically either assume explicit models or learn task-specific behaviors, limiting zero-shot generalization to unseen STL tasks. In this work, we study offline STL planning under unknown dynamics using only task-agnostic trajectory data. Our central design philosophy is to separate logical reasoning from trajectory realization. We instantiate this idea in DAG-STL, a hierarchical framework that converts long-horizon STL planning into three stages. It first decomposes an STL formula into reachability and invariance progress conditions linked by shared timing constraints. It then allocates timed waypoints using learned reachability-time estimates. Finally, it synthesizes trajectories between these waypoints with a diffusion-based generator. This decomposition--allocation--generation pipeline reduces global planning to shorter, better-supported subproblems. To bridge the gap between planning-level correctness and execution-level feasibility, we further introduce a rollout-free dynamic consistency metric, an anytime refinement search procedure for improving multiple allocation hypotheses under finite budgets, and a hierarchical online replanning mechanism for execution-time recovery. Experiments in Maze2D, OGBench AntMaze, and the Cube domain show that DAG-STL substantially outperforms direct robustness-guided diffusion on complex long-horizon STL tasks and generalizes across navigation and manipulation settings. In a custom environment with an optimization-based reference, DAG-STL recovers most model-solvable tasks while retaining a clear computational advantage over direct optimization based on the explicit system model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DAG-STL框架，通过将STL公式分解为可达性与不变性条件、分配带时间约束的航路点、以及使用扩散模型生成轨迹的三阶段流程，在仅依赖任务无关离线轨迹数据且无显式动力学模型的情况下，实现零样本泛化的长时间STL规划任务，在多个环境中显著优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有STL规划方法要么依赖显式系统模型，要么学习特定任务行为，无法零样本泛化到未见过的STL任务。研究旨在利用仅任务无关的轨迹数据，在未知动力学下实现离线STL规划，解决规划正确性与执行可行性之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出DAG-STL层级框架，核心思想是将逻辑推理与轨迹实现分离。具体包括三阶段：1) 分解阶段：将STL公式分解为可达性和不变性进展条件，通过共享时间约束链接；2) 分配阶段：利用学习的可达性-时间估计分配带时间戳的航路点；3) 生成阶段：使用基于扩散的生成器合成航路点间的轨迹。此外引入免rollout的动态一致性度量、任意时间细化搜索过程以及层级在线重规划机制。
AI.result: 在Maze2D、OGBench AntMaze和Cube域的实验表明，DAG-STL在复杂长时STL任务上显著优于直接鲁棒性引导的扩散方法，并能泛化到导航和操作场景。在自定义环境中，DAG-STL恢复了大部分基于优化可解的任务，同时相比显式模型的直接优化具有明显的计算优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解-分配-生成的流水线，将全局规划简化为更短、更易支持的子问题，有效弥合了规划层正确性与执行层可行性之间的差距，实现了零样本泛化的离线STL规划。

title: Closing the Domain Gap in Biomedical Imaging by In-Context Control Samples
summary: The central problem in biomedical imaging are batch effects: systematic technical variations unrelated to the biological signal of interest. These batch effects critically undermine experimental reproducibility and are the primary cause of failure of deep learning systems on new experimental batches, preventing their practical use in the real world. Despite years of research, no method has succeeded in closing this performance gap for deep learning models. We propose Control-Stabilized Adaptive Risk Minimization via Batch Normalization (CS-ARM-BN), a meta-learning adaptation method that exploits negative control samples. Such unperturbed reference images are present in every experimental batch by design and serve as stable context for adaptation. We validate our novel method on Mechanism-of-Action (MoA) classification, a crucial task for drug discovery, on the large-scale JUMP-CP dataset. The accuracy of standard ResNets drops from 0.939 $\pm$ 0.005, on the training domain, to 0.862 $\pm$ 0.060 on data from new experimental batches. Foundation models, even after Typical Variation Normalization, fail to close this gap. We are the first to show that meta-learning approaches close the domain gap by achieving 0.935 $\pm$ 0.018. If the new experimental batches exhibit strong domain shifts, such as being generated in a different lab, meta-learning approaches can be stabilized with control samples, which are always available in biomedical experiments. Our work shows that batch effects in bioimaging data can be effectively neutralized through principled in-context adaptation, which also makes them practically usable and efficient.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CS-ARM-BN方法，利用阴性对照样本进行元学习自适应，有效消除了生物医学成像中的批次效应，在JUMP-CP数据集上将跨批次分类准确率从0.862提升至0.935，首次证明元学习能够弥合领域差距。
AI.motivation: 生物医学成像中存在批次效应（系统性的技术变异），导致深度学习模型在新实验批次上性能大幅下降，严重阻碍了其实际应用。尽管多年研究，尚无方法能有效解决这一性能差距。
AI.method: 提出Control-Stabilized Adaptive Risk Minimization via Batch Normalization (CS-ARM-BN)，一种利用阴性对照样本（每个实验批次中均存在的未扰动参考图像）作为稳定上下文的元学习自适应方法。
AI.result: 在JUMP-CP数据集的MoA分类任务上，标准ResNet准确率从训练域的0.939下降到新批次的0.862；CS-ARM-BN达到0.935±0.018，几乎恢复至训练域水平。基础模型即使经过Typical Variation Normalization也无法弥合这一差距。
AI.conclusion: 通过基于阴性对照样本的原理性上下文自适应，可以有效中和生物成像数据中的批次效应，使深度学习模型在实际应用中变得可用且高效。

title: Building a Precise Video Language with Human-AI Oversight
summary: Video-language models (VLMs) learn to reason about the dynamic visual world through natural language. We introduce a suite of open datasets, benchmarks, and recipes for scalable oversight that enable precise video captioning. First, we define a structured specification for describing subjects, scenes, motion, spatial, and camera dynamics, grounded by hundreds of carefully defined visual primitives developed with professional video creators such as filmmakers. Next, to curate high-quality captions, we introduce CHAI (Critique-based Human-AI Oversight), a framework where trained experts critique and revise model-generated pre-captions into improved post-captions. This division of labor improves annotation accuracy and efficiency by offloading text generation to models, allowing humans to better focus on verification. Additionally, these critiques and preferences between pre- and post-captions provide rich supervision for improving open-source models (Qwen3-VL) on caption generation, reward modeling, and critique generation through SFT, DPO, and inference-time scaling. Our ablations show that critique quality in precision, recall, and constructiveness, ensured by our oversight framework, directly governs downstream performance. With modest expert supervision, the resulting model outperforms closed-source models such as Gemini-3.1-Pro. Finally, we apply our approach to re-caption large-scale professional videos (e.g., films, commercials, games) and fine-tune video generation models such as Wan to better follow detailed prompts of up to 400 words, achieving finer control over cinematography including camera motion, angle, lens, focus, point of view, and framing. Our results show that precise specification and human-AI oversight are key to professional-level video understanding and generation. Data and code are available on our project page: https://linzhiqiu.github.io/papers/chai/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CHAI（基于批评的人类-AI监督）框架，通过结构化视频描述规范和专业人工审核，实现高精度视频字幕生成，并显著提升视频理解与生成模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-语言模型缺乏精确描述视频中主体、场景、运动、空间和镜头动态细节的能力，且高质量视频标注数据稀缺，需要可扩展的监督方法来实现专业级别的视频字幕生成。
AI.method: 1) 定义结构化规范描述主体、场景、运动、空间和镜头动态，基于专业影视创作者定义的视觉基元；2) 提出CHAI框架，由训练有素的专家对模型生成的预字幕进行批评和修订，形成后字幕；3) 利用批评和偏好数据通过SFT、DPO和推理时缩放优化开源模型。
AI.result: CHAI框架在准确性和效率上优于传统方法；批评质量（精确率、召回率、建设性）直接影响下游性能；在适度专家监督下，模型性能超越Gemini-3.1-Pro等闭源模型；重新标注的大规模专业视频数据有效提升了视频生成模型对长达400词详细提示的遵循能力。
AI.conclusion: 精确的规范定义和人机协同监督是实现专业级别视频理解与生成的关键。

title: Enhancing Glass Surface Reconstruction via Depth Prior for Robot Navigation
summary: Indoor robot navigation is often compromised by glass surfaces, which severely corrupt depth sensor measurements. While foundation models like Depth Anything 3 provide excellent geometric priors, they lack an absolute metric scale. We propose a training-free framework that leverages depth foundation models as a structural prior, employing a robust local RANSAC-based alignment to fuse it with raw sensor depth. This naturally avoids contamination from erroneous glass measurements and recovers an accurate metric scale. Furthermore, we introduce \ti{GlassRecon}, a novel RGB-D dataset with geometrically derived ground truth for glass regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, especially under severe sensor depth corruption. The dataset and related code will be released at https://github.com/jarvisyjw/GlassRecon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的框架，利用深度基础模型（如Depth Anything 3）作为结构先验，结合鲁棒的局部RANSAC对齐与原始传感器深度融合，解决了玻璃表面对室内机器人导航中深度传感器测量的严重干扰问题，同时发布了带有几何真值的GlassRecon RGB-D数据集。
AI.motivation: 室内机器人导航中，玻璃表面会严重破坏深度传感器的测量数据，现有方法难以有效处理这一问题。
AI.method: 提出无需训练的框架，利用深度基础模型作为结构先验，通过鲁棒的局部RANSAC对齐将其与原始传感器深度融合，避免玻璃错误测量的污染并恢复绝对度量尺度。
AI.result: 在多种场景下，所提方法一致优于现有最先进基线方法，尤其在传感器深度严重损坏的情况下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效利用深度基础模型的几何先验，鲁棒处理玻璃区域的深度测量错误，为室内导航提供可靠度量深度。

title: Object Referring-Guided Scanpath Prediction with Perception-Enhanced Vision-Language Models
summary: Object Referring-guided Scanpath Prediction (ORSP) aims to predict the human attention scanpath when they search for a specific target object in a visual scene according to a linguistic description describing the object. Multimodal information fusion is a key point of ORSP. Therefore, we propose a novel model, ScanVLA, to first exploit a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to extract and fuse inherently aligned visual and linguistic feature representations from the input image and referring expression. Next, to enhance the ScanVLA's perception of fine-grained positional information, we not only propose a novel History Enhanced Scanpath Decoder (HESD) that directly takes historical fixations' position information as input to help predict a more reasonable position for the current fixation, but also adopt a frozen Segmentation LoRA as an auxiliary component to help localize the referred object more precisely, which improves the scanpath prediction task without incurring additional large computational and time costs. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that ScanVLA can significantly outperform existing scanpath prediction methods under object referring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ScanVLA模型，利用视觉-语言模型(VLM)提取对齐的多模态特征，并创新性地引入历史增强扫描路径解码器(HESD)和分割LoRA辅助模块，在物体指代引导的扫描路径预测(ORSP)任务上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: ORSP任务的核心难点在于多模态信息的有效融合，现有方法在视觉与语言特征的对齐和细粒度位置感知方面存在不足，亟需更优的融合方案。
AI.method: 1) 利用VLM提取图像与指代表达的固有对齐特征；2) 提出History Enhanced Scanpath Decoder (HESD)直接利用历史注视点位置信息预测当前注视点；3) 引入冻结的Segmentation LoRA作为辅助组件，精准定位指代目标，且不增加额外计算开销。
AI.result: 在物体指代引导的扫描路径预测任务上，ScanVLA显著优于所有现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于VLM的多模态融合结合位置增强模块（HESD）与分割辅助组件，是提升ORSP任务性能的有效途径，且不会带来显著的计算负担。

title: Multi-Agent Empowerment and Emergence of Complex Behavior in Groups
summary: Intrinsic motivations are receiving increasing attention, i.e. behavioral incentives that are not engineered, but emerge from the interaction of an agent with its surroundings. In this work we study the emergence of behaviors driven by one such incentive, empowerment, specifically in the context of more than one agent. We formulate a principled extension of empowerment to the multi-agent setting, and demonstrate its efficient calculation. We observe that this intrinsic motivation gives rise to characteristic modes of group-organization in two qualitatively distinct environments: a pair of agents coupled by a tendon, and a controllable Vicsek flock. This demonstrates the potential of intrinsic motivations such as empowerment to not just drive behavior for only individual agents but also higher levels of behavioral organization at scale.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多智能体系统中 empowerment（赋能）这一内在动机的延伸，提出了多智能体 empowerment 的规范化扩展和高效计算方法，并在腱耦合双智能体系统和可控 Vicsek 群集两个环境中观察到该动机自发产生了特征性的群体组织模式，证明了内在动机不仅驱动个体行为，也能促成更高层面的行为组织。
AI.motivation: 探索内在动机（特别是 empowerment）在多智能体环境中的行为涌现，验证其是否不仅能驱动个体行为，还能促成群体层面的行为组织。
AI.method: 提出了多智能体 empowerment 的规范化扩展，设计了高效计算方法；在腱耦合双智能体系统和可控 Vicsek 群集两个定性不同的环境中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在两个环境中均观察到 empowerment 驱动的内在动机自发产生了特征性的群体组织模式。
AI.conclusion: 内在动机（如 empowerment）不仅限于驱动个体行为，还能促进更高层次的群体行为组织，展现了其在多智能体系统中的潜力。

title: Will People Enjoy a Robot Trainer? A Case Study with Snoopie the Pacerbot
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. To appear at ICRA 2026
summary: The physicality of exercise makes the role of athletic trainers unique. Their physical presence allows them to guide a student through a motion, demonstrate an exercise, and give intuitive feedback. Robot quadrupeds are also embodied agents with robust agility and athleticism. In our work, we investigate whether a robot quadruped can serve as an effective and enjoyable personal trainer device. We focus on a case study of interval training for runners: a repetitive, long-horizon task where precision and consistency are important. To meet this challenge, we propose SNOOPIE, an autonomous robot quadruped pacer capable of running interval training exercises tailored to challenge a user's personal abilities. We conduct a set of user experiments that compare the robot trainer to a wearable trainer device--the Apple Watch--to investigate the benefits of a physical embodiment in exercise-based interactions. We demonstrate 60.6% better adherence to a pace schedule and were 45.9% more consistent across their running speeds with the quadruped trainer. Subjective results also showed that participants strongly preferred training with the robot over wearable devices across many qualitative axes, including its ease of use (+56.7%), enjoyability of the interaction (+60.6%), and helpfulness (+39.1%). Additional videos and visualizations can be found on our website: https://sites.google.com/view/snoopie

AI.tldr: 本研究提出SNOOPIE——一种自主四足机器人 pacing 系统，用于跑步间歇训练。与Apple Watch相比，机器人教练在配速遵循度上提升60.6%，速度一致性提高45.9%，并在易用性(+56.7%)、互动愉悦度(+60.6%)和帮助性(+39.1%)等主观维度上获得用户强烈偏好，证明了物理实体形态在运动训练中的优势。
AI.motivation: 探究机器人四足动物能否作为有效且愉悦的私人教练设备，验证物理实体在运动交互中的优势，填补可穿戴设备缺乏物理引导与直观反馈的空白。
AI.method: 以跑步间歇训练为案例，开发SNOOPIE自主四足机器人pacer系统，通过用户实验将其与Apple Watch进行对比，测量客观指标（配速遵循度、速度一致性）和主观指标（易用性、愉悦度、帮助性）。
AI.result: 机器人教练实现60.6%更好的配速遵循度，45.9%更高的速度一致性；主观评价中易用性提升56.7%，互动愉悦度提升60.6%，帮助性提升39.1%。
AI.conclusion: 四足机器人作为个人训练设备在效果和用户体验上均优于可穿戴设备，物理实体形态对运动训练交互具有显著价值。

title: Agentic AI for Personalized Physiotherapy: A Multi-Agent Framework for Generative Video Training and Real-Time Pose Correction
comment: 3 pages, 2 figures, submitted to ICDH IEEE conference
summary: At-home physiotherapy compliance remains critically low due to a lack of personalized supervision and dynamic feedback. Existing digital health solutions rely on static, pre-recorded video libraries or generic 3D avatars that fail to account for a patient's specific injury limitations or home environment. In this paper, we propose a novel Multi-Agent System (MAS) architecture that leverages Generative AI and computer vision to close the tele-rehabilitation loop. Our framework consists of four specialized micro-agents: a Clinical Extraction Agent that parses unstructured medical notes into kinematic constraints; a Video Synthesis Agent that utilizes foundational video generation models to create personalized, patient-specific exercise videos; a Vision Processing Agent for real-time pose estimation; and a Diagnostic Feedback Agent that issues corrective instructions. We present the system architecture, detail the prototype pipeline using Large Language Models and MediaPipe, and outline our clinical evaluation plan. This work demonstrates the feasibility of combining generative media with agentic autonomous decision-making to scale personalized patient care safely and effectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体系统（MAS）的远程康复框架，通过四个专业微智能体（临床提取、视频合成、视觉处理、诊断反馈）结合生成式AI和计算机视觉技术，实现个性化、动态的居家物理治疗监督，旨在解决现有方案缺乏个性化指导和实时反馈的问题。
AI.motivation: 居家物理治疗依从性极低，主要原因在于缺乏个性化监督和动态反馈；现有数字健康方案仅依赖静态预录视频或通用3D虚拟形象，无法适配患者的具体损伤限制和居家环境。
AI.method: 提出MAS架构，包含四个微智能体：(1) 临床提取智能体——解析非结构化医疗记录为运动学约束；(2) 视频合成智能体——利用基础视频生成模型创建个性化患者专属训练视频；(3) 视觉处理智能体——基于MediaPipe进行实时姿态估计；(4) 诊断反馈智能体——生成纠正性指导指令。
AI.result: 呈现了系统架构设计，详细描述了使用大语言模型和MediaPipe的原型管线，并概述了临床评估计划。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了将生成式媒体与自主智能体决策相结合以实现规模化、安全有效的个性化患者护理的可行性。

title: Relative State Estimation using Event-Based Propeller Sensing
summary: Autonomous swarms of multi-Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) system requires an accurate and fast relative state estimation. Although monocular frame-based camera methods perform well in ideal conditions, they are slow, suffer scale ambiguity, and often struggle in visually challenging conditions. The advent of event cameras addresses these challenging tasks by providing low latency, high dynamic range, and microsecond-level temporal resolution. This paper proposes a framework for relative state estimation for quadrotors using event-based propeller sensing. The propellers in the event stream are tracked by detection to extract the region-of-interests. The event streams in these regions are processed in temporal chunks to estimate per-propeller frequencies. These frequency measurements drive a kinematic state estimation module as a thrust input, while camera-derived position measurements provide the update step. Additionally, we use geometric primitives derived from event streams to estimate the orientation of the quadrotor by fitting an ellipse over a propeller and backprojecting it to recover body-frame tilt-axis. The existing event-based approaches for quadrotor state estimation use the propeller frequency in simulated flight sequences. Our approach estimates the propeller frequency under 3% error on a test dataset of five real-world outdoor flight sequences, providing a method for decentralized relative localization for multi-robot systems using event camera.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机和螺旋桨感知的多无人机相对状态估计框架，通过检测和跟踪事件流中的螺旋桨区域，估计螺旋桨频率以驱动运动学状态估计，并利用几何基元恢复无人机姿态，在真实室外飞行数据上实现了低于3%的频率估计误差。
AI.motivation: 传统单目相机在视觉条件恶劣时存在速度慢、尺度模糊等问题，而事件相机具有低延迟、高动态范围等优势，但目前事件相机方法仅用于仿真飞行序列，缺乏真实场景下的验证。
AI.method: 1) 通过检测跟踪事件流中的螺旋桨区域提取感兴趣区域；2) 对区域内的流进行时间分块处理以估计每桨频率；3) 频率测量作为推力输入驱动运动学状态估计，相机位置测量提供更新；4) 利用事件流的几何基元（椭圆拟合与反投影）恢复无人机体轴倾角。
AI.result: 在五个真实室外飞行序列的测试数据集上，螺旋桨频率估计误差低于3%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多机器人系统提供了一种去中心化相对定位方案，验证了事件相机在真实场景下的有效性。

title: Stream-CQSA: Avoiding Out-of-Memory in Attention Computation via Flexible Workload Scheduling
summary: The scalability of long-context large language models is fundamentally limited by the quadratic memory cost of exact self-attention, which often leads to out-of-memory (OOM) failures on modern hardware. Existing methods improve memory efficiency to near-linear complexity, while assuming that the full query, key, and value tensors fit in device memory. In this work, we remove this assumption by introducing CQS Divide, an operation derived from cyclic quorum sets (CQS) theory that decomposes attention into a set of independent subsequence computations whose recomposition yields exactly the same result as full-sequence attention. Exploiting this decomposition, we introduce Stream-CQSA, a memory-adaptive scheduling framework that partitions attention into subproblems that fit within arbitrary memory budgets. This recasts attention from a logically monolithic operation into a collection of schedulable tasks, enabling flexible execution across devices without inter-device communication. Experiments demonstrate predictable memory scaling and show that exact attention over billion-token sequences can be executed on a single GPU via streaming, without changing the underlying mathematical definition of attention or introducing approximation error.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CQS Divide操作和Stream-CQSA框架，通过循环商集理论将注意力分解为独立子序列计算，实现单GPU上对十亿token序列进行精确注意力的流式处理，解决了长上下文大模型因二次内存成本导致的OOM问题，且不引入近似误差。
AI.motivation: 长上下文大语言模型的扩展性受限于精确自注意力的二次方内存成本，现有方法虽将内存效率提升至近线性，但依然假设完整查询、键、值张量能放入设备内存，这一假设在实际长序列场景中往往不成立，导致OOM故障。
AI.method: 基于循环商集(CQS)理论推导出CQS Divide操作，将注意力分解为多个独立子序列计算，其重组结果与全序列注意力完全相同；进而提出Stream-CQSA框架，作为内存自适应调度方案，根据任意内存预算将注意力划分为可调度的子问题，实现无需设备间通信的灵活执行。
AI.result: 实验证明了可预测的内存扩展特性，在单GPU上通过流式方式成功执行了十亿token序列的精确注意力计算，未改变注意力的数学定义，且未引入任何近似误差。
AI.conclusion: CQS Divide和Stream-CQSA从根本上将注意力从逻辑上的单一操作转化为可调度任务集合，突破了设备内存限制，为长上下文LLM的高效扩展提供了新范式。

title: SignDATA: Data Pipeline for Sign Language Translation
summary: Sign-language datasets are difficult to preprocess consistently because they vary in annotation schema, clip timing, signer framing, and privacy constraints. Existing work usually reports downstream models, while the preprocessing pipeline that converts raw video into training-ready pose or video artifacts remains fragmented, backend-specific, and weakly documented. We present SignDATA, a config-driven preprocessing toolkit that standardizes heterogeneous sign-language corpora into comparable outputs for learning. The system supports two end-to-end recipes: a pose recipe that performs acquisition, manifesting, person localization, clipping, cropping, landmark extraction, normalization, and WebDataset export, and a video recipe that replaces pose extraction with signer-cropped video packaging. SignDATA exposes interchangeable MediaPipe and MMPose backends behind a common interface, typed job schemas, experiment-level overrides, and per-stage checkpointing with config- and manifest-aware hashes. We validate the toolkit through a research-oriented evaluation design centered on backend comparison, preprocessing ablations, and privacy-aware video generation on datasets. Our contribution is a reproducible preprocessing layer for sign-language research that makes extractor choice, normalization policy, and privacy tradeoffs explicit, configurable, and empirically comparable.Code is available at https://github.com/balaboom123/signdata-slt.

AI.tldr: SignDATA是一个配置驱动的预处理工具包，将异构手语语料库标准化为可比较的输出，支持姿态提取和视频处理两种端到端方案，通过可互换后端、类型化作业模式、实验级覆盖和可检查点机制，实现了可复现的手语研究预处理层。
AI.motivation: 手语数据集因标注模式、片段时序、签名者构图和隐私约束不同而难以一致预处理；现有工作通常关注下游模型，而将原始视频转换为训练就绪姿态或视频工件的预处理流程碎片化、后端特定且文档不足，缺乏标准化可复现的工具。
AI.method: 提出SignDATA，一个配置驱动的预处理工具包，支持两种端到端方案：(1) 姿态方案：获取、清单化、人体定位、剪辑、裁剪、地标提取、归一化和WebDataset导出；(2) 视频方案：用签名者裁剪视频打包替换姿态提取。系统暴露可互换的MediaPipe和MMPose后端，提供类型化作业模式、实验级覆盖和基于配置与清单感知哈希的逐阶段检查点。
AI.result: 通过研究导向的评估设计验证了工具包，包括后端比较、预处理消融实验和数据集上的隐私感知视频生成。
AI.conclusion: 贡献了一个可复现的手语研究预处理层，使提取器选择、归一化策略和隐私权衡变得显式、可配置且可经验比较。

title: Dialect vs Demographics: Quantifying LLM Bias from Implicit Linguistic Signals vs. Explicit User Profiles
comment: In The 2026 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '26), June 25--28, 2026, Montreal, Canada. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 32 pages
summary: As state-of-the-art Large Language Models (LLMs) have become ubiquitous, ensuring equitable performance across diverse demographics is critical. However, it remains unclear whether these disparities arise from the explicitly stated identity itself or from the way identity is signaled. In real-world interactions, users' identity is often conveyed implicitly through a complex combination of various socio-linguistic factors. This study disentangles these signals by employing a factorial design with over 24,000 responses from two open-weight LLMs (Gemma-3-12B and Qwen-3-VL-8B), comparing prompts with explicitly announced user profiles against implicit dialect signals (e.g., AAVE, Singlish) across various sensitive domains. Our results uncover a unique paradox in LLM safety where users achieve ``better'' performance by sounding like a demographic than by stating they belong to it. Explicit identity prompts activate aggressive safety filters, increasing refusal rates and reducing semantic similarity compared to our reference text for Black users. In contrast, implicit dialect cues trigger a powerful ``dialect jailbreak,'' reducing refusal probability to near zero while simultaneously achieving a greater level of semantic similarity to the reference texts compared to Standard American English prompts. However, this ``dialect jailbreak'' introduces a critical safety trade-off regarding content sanitization. We find that current safety alignment techniques are brittle and over-indexed on explicit keywords, creating a bifurcated user experience where ``standard'' users receive cautious, sanitized information while dialect speakers navigate a less sanitized, more raw, and potentially a more hostile information landscape and highlights a fundamental tension in alignment--between equitable and linguistic diversity--and underscores the need for safety mechanisms that generalize beyond explicit cues.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过对24000+条响应进行析因设计，发现LLM中存在身份悖论：明确声明身份会触发安全过滤器导致高拒绝率，而通过方言（如AAVE、新加坡英语）隐性表达身份则会引发"方言越狱"——几乎完全消除拒绝但牺牲内容审核，造成"标准"用户与方言用户间的信息环境不平等。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未厘清LLM性能差异究竟源于用户明确声明的身份本身，还是身份被传达的方式（显性vs隐性）。真实交互中身份常通过社会语言学线索隐性传递，需解耦这两种信号以理解偏见的来源。
AI.method: 采用析因设计，在两个开源LLM（Gemma-3-12B和Qwen-3-VL-8B）上收集24000+条响应，比较明确声明用户画像的提示与通过方言（AAVE、新加坡英语）隐式传达身份的提示，覆盖多个敏感领域。
AI.result: 1）显性身份提示激活安全过滤器，导致拒绝率上升、语义相似性下降；2）隐式方言提示引发"方言越狱"，拒绝率降至接近零、语义相似性超过标准美式英语；3）方言越狱带来关键安全权衡：内容审核减弱，方言用户接触更少被筛选、更原始、可能更敌对的信息环境。
AI.conclusion: 当前安全对齐技术脆弱且过度依赖显式关键词，造成"标准"用户与方言用户之间的二元化体验，揭示了对齐中存在公平性与语言多样性之间的根本张力，亟需能泛化到显式线索之外的安全机制。

title: EmbodiedLGR: Integrating Lightweight Graph Representation and Retrieval for Semantic-Spatial Memory in Robotic Agents
summary: As the world of agentic artificial intelligence applied to robotics evolves, the need for agents capable of building and retrieving memories and observations efficiently is increasing. Robots operating in complex environments must build memory structures to enable useful human-robot interactions by leveraging the mnemonic representation of the current operating context. People interacting with robots may expect the embodied agent to provide information about locations, events, or objects, which requires the agent to provide precise answers within human-like inference times to be perceived as responsive. We propose the Embodied Light Graph Retrieval Agent (EmbodiedLGR-Agent), a visual-language model (VLM)-driven agent architecture that constructs dense and efficient representations of robot operating environments. EmbodiedLGR-Agent directly addresses the need for an efficient memory representation of the environment by providing a hybrid building-retrieval approach built on parameter-efficient VLMs that store low-level information about objects and their positions in a semantic graph, while retaining high-level descriptions of the observed scenes with a traditional retrieval-augmented architecture. EmbodiedLGR-Agent is evaluated on the popular NaVQA dataset, achieving state-of-the-art performance in inference and querying times for embodied agents, while retaining competitive accuracy on the global task relative to the current state-of-the-art approaches. Moreover, EmbodiedLGR-Agent was successfully deployed on a physical robot, showing practical utility in real-world contexts through human-robot interaction, while running the visual-language model and the building-retrieval pipeline locally.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EmbodiedLGR-Agent，一种基于视觉语言模型的混合构建-检索架构，通过语义图存储低层对象信息与检索增强架构保留高层场景描述，在NaVQA数据集上实现推理与查询速度的SOTA性能，并在实体机器人上成功部署，验证了实际人机交互中的实用性。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要在复杂环境中构建高效记忆结构以支持人机交互，用户期望机器人能像人类一样快速提供关于位置、事件或物体的精确信息，现有方法在记忆效率与查询速度上存在不足。
AI.method: 提出EmbodiedLGR-Agent架构，采用参数高效的VLM驱动，通过语义图存储物体及其位置的低层信息，同时利用传统检索增强架构保留场景的高层描述，形成混合构建-检索机制。
AI.result: 在NaVQA数据集上取得推理与查询时间的SOTA性能，同时在全局任务上保持与当前最优方法相近的准确率；成功部署于实体机器人，在真实场景中实现本地化运行VLM与构建-检索流程。
AI.conclusion: EmbodiedLGR-Agent通过混合记忆表征有效平衡了检索效率与准确性，证明其在真实机器人人机交互中的可行性与实用价值。

title: Convergent Evolution: How Different Language Models Learn Similar Number Representations
summary: Language models trained on natural text learn to represent numbers using periodic features with dominant periods at $T=2, 5, 10$. In this paper, we identify a two-tiered hierarchy of these features: while Transformers, Linear RNNs, LSTMs, and classical word embeddings trained in different ways all learn features that have period-$T$ spikes in the Fourier domain, only some learn geometrically separable features that can be used to linearly classify a number mod-$T$. To explain this incongruity, we prove that Fourier domain sparsity is necessary but not sufficient for mod-$T$ geometric separability. Empirically, we investigate when model training yields geometrically separable features, finding that the data, architecture, optimizer, and tokenizer all play key roles. In particular, we identify two different routes through which models can acquire geometrically separable features: they can learn them from complementary co-occurrence signals in general language data, including text-number co-occurrence and cross-number interaction, or from multi-token (but not single-token) addition problems. Overall, our results highlight the phenomenon of convergent evolution in feature learning: A diverse range of models learn similar features from different training signals.

AI.tldr: 本文发现语言模型学习数字表示时存在周期特征（T=2,5,10），但只有部分模型能学到几何可分离的模T特征。傅里叶域稀疏性是必要非充分条件。模型能否学到几何可分离特征取决于数据、架构、优化器和分词器。几何可分离特征可通过两种途径获得：从语言数据中的共现信号学习，或从多token加法问题学习。这揭示了特征学习中的趋同进化现象。
AI.motivation: 解释为何不同语言模型（Transformer、Linear RNN、LSTM等）在傅里叶域中都表现出周期T的尖峰，但只有部分模型能学到可用于模T线性分类的几何可分离特征。
AI.method: 理论证明傅里叶域稀疏性是模T几何可分离性的必要非充分条件；实证探究数据、架构、优化器和分词器对几何可分离特征学习的影响；识别两种获取几何可分离特征的路径。
AI.result: 发现模型可从语言数据中的文本-数字共现和跨数字交互信号学习几何可分离特征，或从多token（非单token）加法问题中学习。不同模型从不同训练信号中学习到相似特征。
AI.conclusion: 不同模型学习数字表示时存在趋同进化现象，即从不同训练信号中学习到相似特征，但几何可分离性需要更严格的训练条件。

title: Hallucination Early Detection in Diffusion Models
comment: 21 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables. Published in International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)
summary: Text-to-Image generation has seen significant advancements in output realism with the advent of diffusion models. However, diffusion models encounter difficulties when tasked with generating multiple objects, frequently resulting in hallucinations where certain entities are omitted. While existing solutions typically focus on optimizing latent representations within diffusion models, the relevance of the initial generation seed is typically underestimated. While using various seeds in multiple iterations can improve results, this method also significantly increases time and energy costs. To address this challenge, we introduce HEaD+ (Hallucination Early Detection +), a novel approach designed to identify incorrect generations early in the diffusion process. The HEaD+ framework integrates cross-attention maps and textual information with a novel input, the Predicted Final Image. The objective is to assess whether to proceed with the current generation or restart it with a different seed, thereby exploring multiple-generation seeds while conserving time. HEaD+ is trained on the newly created InsideGen dataset of 45,000 generated images, each containing prompts with up to seven objects. Our findings demonstrate a 6-8% increase in the likelihood of achieving a complete generation (i.e., an image accurately representing all specified subjects) with four objects when applying HEaD+ alongside existing models. Additionally, HEaD+ reduces generation times by up to 32% when aiming for a complete image, enhancing the efficiency of generating complete and accurate object representations relative to leading models. Moreover, we propose an integrated localization module that predicts object centroid positions and verifies pairwise spatial relations (if requested by the users) at an intermediate timestep, gating generation together with object presence to further improve relation-consistent outcomes.

AI.tldr: HEaD+是一种针对扩散模型多对象生成中幻觉问题（对象遗漏）的早期检测框架，通过结合交叉注意力图、文本信息和预测最终图像，在生成早期判断是否更换种子，从而在保证生成完整性的同时降低时间和能耗，在包含45,000张图像的InsideGen数据集上实现了6-8%的完整生成率提升和最高32%的时间节省，并集成了空间关系验证模块。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在生成多对象时容易出现幻觉（遗漏实体），现有方法多聚焦于优化潜在表示而低估了初始种子的重要性，但多轮尝试不同种子虽然有效却显著增加时间和能耗成本，因此需要一种能在生成早期检测错误并决定是否更换种子的高效方法。
AI.method: HEaD+框架集成交叉注意力图、文本信息以及新增的"预测最终图像"输入，在扩散过程早期判断当前生成是否完整；若不完整则更换种子重新生成，从而在探索多个种子时节省时间。模型在自行构建的包含45,000张生成图像的InsideGen数据集上训练，每张图像对应最多包含七个对象的提示。此外还集成了定位模块，可在中间时间步预测对象质心位置并验证空间关系（用户可选）。
AI.result: 在四对象生成任务中，应用HEaD+可使完整生成（所有指定对象均准确呈现）的概率提升6-8%；在追求完整图像时，生成时间最多减少32%。
AI.conclusion: HEaD+通过早期检测幻觉并智能切换种子，在不牺牲生成质量的前提下显著提升了多对象生成的完整性和时间效率，且支持空间关系验证，为扩散模型的多对象生成提供了实用且高效的解决方案。

title: Using Machine Mental Imagery for Representing Common Ground in Situated Dialogue
comment: Work under review. Biswesh Mohapatra and Giovanni Duca both contributed equally to this work
summary: Situated dialogue requires speakers to maintain a reliable representation of shared context rather than reasoning only over isolated utterances. Current conversational agents often struggle with this requirement, especially when the common ground must be preserved beyond the immediate context window. In such settings, fine-grained distinctions are frequently compressed into purely textual representations, leading to a critical failure mode we call \emph{representational blur}, in which similar but distinct entities collapse into interchangeable descriptions. This semantic flattening creates an illusion of grounding, where agents appear locally coherent but fail to track shared context persistently over time. Inspired by the role of mental imagery in human reasoning, and based on the increased availability of multimodal models, we explore whether conversational agents can be given an analogous ability to construct some depictive intermediate representations during dialogue to address these limitations. Thus, we introduce an active visual scaffolding framework that incrementally converts dialogue state into a persistent visual history that can later be retrieved for grounded response generation. Evaluation on the IndiRef benchmark shows that incremental externalization itself improves over full-dialog reasoning, while visual scaffolding provides additional gains by reducing representational blur and enforcing concrete scene commitments. At the same time, textual representations remain advantageous for non-depictable information, and a hybrid multimodal setting yields the best overall performance. Together, these findings suggest that conversational agents benefit from an explicitly multimodal representation of common ground that integrates depictive and propositional information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种主动视觉结构化框架，通过将对话状态逐步转化为持久的视觉历史表示，来解决情境对话中由于纯文本表示导致的“表征模糊”问题。实验表明，增量外部化和多模态混合设置能显著提升对话系统在共享上下文追踪上的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前对话智能体在需要超越即时上下文窗口维护共同背景时，经常出现“表征模糊”——相似但不同的实体在纯文本表示中坍缩为可互换的描述，造成局部连贯但全局失真的虚假接地现象。受人类推理中心理意象的启发，作者希望探索多模态模型能否为对话智能体赋予类似的描摹性中间表征能力。
AI.method: 提出主动视觉结构化框架，将对话状态增量式转化为持久的视觉历史记录，后续可检索用于接地响应生成。具体包括：①增量外部化：逐步将对话状态转为视觉表示；②视觉结构化：通过强制生成具体场景承诺来减少表征模糊；③混合多模态设置：同时利用视觉表示（可描摹信息）与文本表示（不可描摹信息）。
AI.result: 在IndiRef基准上，增量外部化本身优于全对话推理；视觉结构化进一步提升了性能，减少了表征模糊；但纯文本在不可描摹信息上仍有优势；混合多模态设置取得了最佳整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 对话智能体受益于显式的多模态共同背景表示，整合描摹性（视觉）与命题性（文本）信息能更好地维护共享上下文的连贯性和精确性。

title: COFFAIL: A Dataset of Successful and Anomalous Robot Skill Executions in the Context of Coffee Preparation
comment: Presented as an extended abstract at the 2nd German Robotics Conference (GRC)
summary: In the context of robot learning for manipulation, curated datasets are an important resource for advancing the state of the art; however, available datasets typically only include successful executions or are focused on one particular type of skill. In this short paper, we briefly describe a dataset of various skills performed in the context of coffee preparation. The dataset, which we call COFFAIL, includes both successful and anomalous skill execution episodes collected with a physical robot in a kitchen environment, a couple of which are performed with bimanual manipulation. In addition to describing the data collection setup and the collected data, the paper illustrates the use of the data in COFFAIL to learn a robot policy using imitation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了COFFAIL数据集，这是一个在咖啡制备场景下收集的机器人技能执行数据集，包含成功和异常两种执行结果，覆盖多种技能（包括双臂操作），并展示了如何使用该数据集通过模仿学习来训练机器人策略。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器人操作数据集通常只包含成功执行样本或仅专注于单一技能类型，缺乏包含失败/异常执行的多技能数据集，这限制了机器人学习的泛化能力和鲁棒性研究。
AI.method: 在真实厨房环境中使用物理机器人收集了咖啡制备过程中各种技能的执行数据，同时记录了成功和异常（失败）的执行片段，部分任务涉及双臂操作。论文还展示了使用该数据集进行模仿学习来训练机器人策略的方法。
AI.result: 成功构建了包含多技能、多结果类型（成功/异常）的COFFAIL数据集，并通过模仿学习实验验证了该数据集在机器人策略学习中的可用性。
AI.conclusion: COFFAIL数据集为机器人操作学习提供了包含失败案例的多技能数据资源，有助于推动机器人学习的鲁棒性和泛化能力研究。

title: X-PCR: A Benchmark for Cross-modality Progressive Clinical Reasoning in Ophthalmic Diagnosis
summary: Despite significant progress in Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs), their clinical reasoning capacity for multi-modal diagnosis remains largely unexamined. Current benchmarks, mostly single-modality data, can't evaluate progressive reasoning and cross-modal integration essential for clinical practice. We introduce the Cross-Modality Progressive Clinical Reasoning (X-PCR) benchmark, the first comprehensive evaluation of MLLMs through a complete ophthalmology diagnostic workflow, with two reasoning tasks: 1) a six-stage progressive reasoning chain spanning image quality assessment to clinical decision-making, and 2) a cross-modality reasoning task integrating six imaging modalities. The benchmark comprises 26,415 images and 177,868 expert-verified VQA pairs curated from 51 public datasets, covering 52 ophthalmic diseases. Evaluation of 21 MLLMs reveals critical gaps in progressive reasoning and cross-modal integration. Dataset and code: https://github.com/CVI-SZU/X-PCR.

AI.tldr: 提出了X-PCR基准，首个通过完整的眼科诊断工作流程评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的基准，包含渐进式推理链和跨模态推理两大任务，涵盖26,415张图像和177,868个专家验证的VQA对，评估了21个MLLMs，揭示了其在渐进推理和跨模态整合方面的关键缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在临床诊断中的推理能力尚未得到充分检验，现有基准多为单模态数据，无法评估渐进式推理和跨模态整合能力，而这些正是临床实践的核心要求。
AI.method: 构建X-PCR基准，设计了两个推理任务：1）六阶段渐进推理链，从图像质量评估到临床决策；2）跨模态推理任务，整合六种成像模态。数据来自51个公开数据集，经专家验证。
AI.result: 评估了21个MLLMs，发现在渐进式推理和跨模态整合方面存在关键差距。
AI.conclusion: X-PCR基准有效揭示了当前MLLMs在临床推理中的不足，为未来提升多模态临床诊断能力提供了评估框架和方向。

title: A Comparative Evaluation of Geometric Accuracy in NeRF and Gaussian Splatting
summary: Recent advances in neural rendering have introduced numerous 3D scene representations. Although standard computer vision metrics evaluate the visual quality of generated images, they often overlook the fidelity of surface geometry. This limitation is particularly critical in robotics, where accurate geometry is essential for tasks such as grasping and object manipulation. In this paper, we present an evaluation pipeline for neural rendering methods that focuses on geometric accuracy, along with a benchmark comprising 19 diverse scenes. Our approach enables a systematic assessment of reconstruction methods in terms of surface and shape fidelity, complementing traditional visual metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文针对神经渲染方法在几何精度评估上的不足，提出了一个专注于表面和形状保真度的评估流程，并构建了包含19个多样化场景的基准数据集，以补充传统视觉指标。
AI.motivation: 现有神经渲染方法虽然视觉质量评估指标完善，但在机器人等需要精确几何信息的应用场景中，表面几何保真度往往被忽视，缺乏系统性评估方法。
AI.method: 提出了一个针对几何精度的评估流程，并构建了包含19个多样化场景的基准数据集，用于系统评估重建方法在表面和形状保真度方面的表现。
AI.result: 建立了一个专注于几何精度的评估基准，能够系统评估神经渲染方法的表面和形状保真度。
AI.conclusion: 该评估流程和基准可以有效补充传统视觉指标，为机器人操作等需要精确几何信息的任务提供更可靠的评估依据。

title: Stability-Driven Motion Generation for Object-Guided Human-Human Co-Manipulation
summary: Co-manipulation requires multiple humans to synchronize their motions with a shared object while ensuring reasonable interactions, maintaining natural poses, and preserving stable states. However, most existing motion generation approaches are designed for single-character scenarios or fail to account for payload-induced dynamics. In this work, we propose a flow-matching framework that ensures the generated co-manipulation motions align with the intended goals while maintaining naturalness and effectiveness. Specifically, we first introduce a generative model that derives explicit manipulation strategies from the object's affordance and spatial configuration, which guide the motion flow toward successful manipulation. To improve motion quality, we then design an adversarial interaction prior that promotes natural individual poses and realistic inter-person interactions during co-manipulation. In addition, we also incorporate a stability-driven simulation into the flow matching process, which refines unstable interaction states through sampling-based optimization and directly adjusts the vector field regression to promote more effective manipulation. The experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves higher contact accuracy, lower penetration, and better distributional fidelity compared to state-of-the-art human-object interaction baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/boycehbz/StaCOM.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于流匹配的协同操作运动生成框架StaCOM，通过物体可供性引导、对抗交互先验和稳定性驱动仿真，生成符合目标、自然且稳定的多人物体交互运动。
AI.motivation: 现有运动生成方法多针对单人场景，无法处理多人协同操作中负载带来的动力学问题，难以保证运动的自然性、交互合理性和状态稳定性。
AI.method: 1）基于物体可供性和空间配置的生成模型推导操作策略，引导运动流；2）对抗交互先验促进自然姿态和真实人际交互；3）将稳定性驱动仿真融入流匹配过程，通过采样优化修正不稳定状态并调整向量场回归。
AI.result: 与SOTA人-物交互基线相比，该方法在接触精度、穿透率和分布保真度上均取得更优结果。
AI.conclusion: StaCOM框架有效解决了多人协同操作运动生成的动力学与自然性问题，验证了流匹配结合稳定性仿真的可行性。

title: Enhancing Science Classroom Discourse Analysis through Joint Multi-Task Learning for Reasoning-Component Classification
summary: Analyzing the reasoning patterns of students in science classrooms is critical for understanding knowledge construction mechanism and improving instructional practice to maximize cognitive engagement, yet manual coding of classroom discourse at scale remains prohibitively labor-intensive. We present an automated discourse analysis system (ADAS) that jointly classifies teacher and student utterances along two complementary dimensions: Utterance Type and Reasoning Component derived from our prior CDAT framework. To address severe label imbalance among minority classes, we (1) stratify-resplit the annotated corpus, (2) apply LLM-based synthetic data augmentation targeting minority classes, and (3) train a dual-probe head RoBERTa-base classifier. A zero-shot GPT-5.4 baseline achieves macro-F1 of 0.467 on UT and 0.476 on RC, establishing meaningful upper bounds for prompt-only approaches motivating fine-tuning. Beyond classification, we conduct discourse pattern analyses including UTxRC co-occurrence profiling, Cognitive Complexity Index (CCI) computation per session, lag-sequential analysis, and IRF chain analysis, revealing that teacher Feedback-with-Question (Fq) moves are the most consistent antecedents of student inferential reasoning (SR-I). Our results demonstrate that LLM-based augmentation meaningfully improves UT minority-class recognition, and that the structural simplicity of the RC task makes it tractable even for lexical baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个自动化课堂话语分析系统(ADAS)，通过双维度分类（话语类型与推理成分）和多种话语模式分析方法，揭示课堂互动中的认知推理机制，并利用LLM数据增强解决标签不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 科学课堂中学生推理模式的自动化分析对于理解知识建构机制和优化教学实践至关重要，但传统人工编码耗力巨大，亟需高效的自动化分析工具。
AI.method: (1) 分层重划分标注语料库；(2) 基于LLM的合成数据增强，针对少数类生成样本；(3) 训练双探头头的RoBERTa-base分类器；(4) 进行UT×RC共现分析、认知复杂度指数计算、滞后序列分析和IRF链分析等多种话语模式分析。
AI.result: 零样本GPT-5.4基线在UT和RC上分别达到0.467和0.476的macro-F1；LLM数据增强有效提升了少数类的识别性能；教师Fq（带问题的反馈）是学生推理推理（SR-I）最一致的先行触发行为；RC任务结构简单，即使基于词级的基线模型也能较好处理。
AI.conclusion: LLM增强策略能切实改善少数类识别；RC任务的结构简单性使其对词汇基线模型更易处理；教师提问式反馈在激发学生推理推理中起关键作用。

title: Continuous Focus Groups: A Longitudinal Method for Clinical HRI in Autism Care
summary: Qualitative methods are important to use alongside quantitative methods to improve Human-Robot Interaction (HRI), yet they are often applied in static or one-off formats that cannot capture how stakeholder perspectives evolve over time. This limitation is especially evident in clinical contexts, where families and patients face heavy burdens and cannot easily participate in repeated research encounters. To address this gap, we introduce continuous focus groups, a longitudinal and co-agential method designed to sustain dialogue with assistive care professionals working with children with autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Three focus groups were organized across successive phases of a robot-assisted therapeutic protocol, enabling participants to revisit and refine earlier views as the intervention progressed. Results show that continuity fostered trust, supported the integration of tacit clinical expertise into design decisions, and functioned as an ethical safeguard by allowing participants to renegotiate involvement and surface new concerns. By bridging the therapeutic iteration of families, children, and clinicians with the research-design iteration of researchers and developers, continuous focus groups provide a methodological contribution that is both feasible in practice and rigorous in design. Beyond autism care, this approach offers a transferable framework for advancing qualitative research in HRI, particularly in sensitive domains where direct user participation is limited and continuity is essential.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“连续焦点小组”的纵向、共主体性质性研究方法，用于在自闭症谱系障碍(ASD)儿童辅助治疗场景中持续收集利益相关者（照护专业人员）的观点演变。该方法在机器人辅助治疗协议的不同阶段组织三次焦点小组，使参与者能够随着干预进程重新审视和修正早期观点。结果表明，连续性促进了信任建立、隐性临床专业知识融入设计决策，并作为伦理保障让参与者重新协商参与度、提出新关切。该方法弥合了家庭-儿童-临床医生的治疗迭代与研究者-开发者的研究设计迭代之间的鸿沟，为HRI领域特别是用户参与受限的敏感领域提供了可迁移的质性研究框架。
AI.motivation: 质性方法对改进人机交互(HRI)至关重要，但现有方法多为静态或一次性形式，无法捕捉利益相关者观点随时间的演化。这一问题在临床情境（如ASD儿童家庭）中尤为突出，因为患者和家属负担沉重，难以反复参与研究。因此，亟需一种既可行又严谨的纵向质性方法，能够在不增加参与者负担的前提下持续获取其观点演变。
AI.method: 提出“连续焦点小组”(continuous focus groups)方法——一种纵向、共主体性(longitudinal and co-agential)研究设计。在机器人辅助ASD儿童治疗协议的不同阶段（干预前、中、后）组织三轮焦点小组，邀请同一组临床照护专业人员参与。参与者可在后续轮次中重新审视、修正或深化前期讨论中的观点，实现观点的迭代演化。
AI.result: 1）连续性促进了参与者与研究团队之间的信任建立；2）支持隐性临床专业知识融入设计决策；3）作为伦理保障机制，允许参与者重新协商参与程度、提出新的伦理关切。该方法成功弥合了“治疗迭代”（家庭、儿童、临床医生）与“研究设计迭代”（研究者、开发者）之间的鸿沟。
AI.conclusion: 连续焦点小组是一种在实践中可行、在设计中严谨的质性研究方法论贡献。除自闭症照护外，该方法可推广至HRI领域中其他用户直接参与受限、需要纵向连续性的敏感应用场景。

title: Image Generators are Generalist Vision Learners
summary: Recent works show that image and video generators exhibit zero-shot visual understanding behaviors, in a way reminiscent of how LLMs develop emergent capabilities of language understanding and reasoning from generative pretraining. While it has long been conjectured that the ability to create visual content implies an ability to understand it, there has been limited evidence that generative vision models have developed strong understanding capabilities. In this work, we demonstrate that image generation training serves a role similar to LLM pretraining, and lets models learn powerful and general visual representations that enable SOTA performance on various vision tasks. We introduce Vision Banana, a generalist model built by instruction-tuning Nano Banana Pro (NBP) on a mixture of its original training data alongside a small amount of vision task data. By parameterizing the output space of vision tasks as RGB images, we seamlessly reframe perception as image generation. Our generalist model, Vision Banana, achieves SOTA results on a variety of vision tasks involving both 2D and 3D understanding, beating or rivaling zero-shot domain-specialists, including Segment Anything Model 3 on segmentation tasks, and the Depth Anything series on metric depth estimation. We show that these results can be achieved with lightweight instruction-tuning without sacrificing the base model's image generation capabilities. The superior results suggest that image generation pretraining is a generalist vision learner. It also shows that image generation serves as a unified and universal interface for vision tasks, similar to text generation's role in language understanding and reasoning. We could be witnessing a major paradigm shift for computer vision, where generative vision pretraining takes a central role in building Foundational Vision Models for both generation and understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Vision Banana，通过对Nano Banana Pro模型进行指令微调，将视觉任务参数化为RGB图像输出，证明图像生成预训练能像LLM预训练一样学习强大且通用的视觉表征，在2D和3D理解任务上达到SOTA，超越SAM 3和Depth Anything等专用模型。
AI.motivation: 探究图像生成预训练是否能像LLM预训练一样，使模型发展出强大的视觉理解能力，并验证生成式预训练能否作为构建通用基础视觉模型的核心范式。
AI.method: 将视觉任务的输出空间参数化为RGB图像，从而将感知任务重构为图像生成问题；基于Nano Banana Pro（NBP）模型，在其原始训练数据与少量视觉任务数据的混合集上进行轻量级指令微调，构建通用模型Vision Banana。
AI.result: Vision Banana在2D和3D视觉理解任务上达到SOTA，在分割任务上超越SAM 3，在度量深度估计上超越Depth Anything系列，且未牺牲基础模型的图像生成能力。
AI.conclusion: 图像生成预训练是一种通用视觉学习器，图像生成可作为视觉任务的统一接口，类似文本生成在语言理解中的作用，预示着计算机视觉领域可能正经历从判别式预训练向生成式预训练的重大范式转变。

title: Does "Do Differentiable Simulators Give Better Policy Gradients?'' Give Better Policy Gradients?
summary: In policy gradient reinforcement learning, access to a differentiable model enables 1st-order gradient estimation that accelerates learning compared to relying solely on derivative-free 0th-order estimators. However, discontinuous dynamics cause bias and undermine the effectiveness of 1st-order estimators. Prior work addressed this bias by constructing a confidence interval around the REINFORCE 0th-order gradient estimator and using these bounds to detect discontinuities. However, the REINFORCE estimator is notoriously noisy, and we find that this method requires task-specific hyperparameter tuning and has low sample efficiency. This paper asks whether such bias is the primary obstacle and what minimal fixes suffice. First, we re-examine standard discontinuous settings from prior work and introduce DDCG, a lightweight test that switches estimators in nonsmooth regions; with a single hyperparameter, DDCG achieves robust performance and remains reliable with small samples. Second, on differentiable robotics control tasks, we present IVW-H, a per-step inverse-variance implementation that stabilizes variance without explicit discontinuity detection and yields strong results. Together, these findings indicate that while estimator switching improves robustness in controlled studies, careful variance control often dominates in practical deployments.

AI.tldr: 本文针对策略梯度强化学习中，可微模型提供的一阶梯度估计在遇到不连续动力学时产生偏差的问题，提出了两种轻量级解决方案：DDCG（通过单个超参数在不连续区域切换估计器）和IVW-H（基于逆方差的逐步骤方差稳定方法）。实验表明，尽管估计器切换在受控研究中提升了鲁棒性，但在实际部署中方差控制往往更为关键。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（基于REINFORCE置信区间检测不连续性）存在估计器噪声大、需要任务特定超参数调优、样本效率低等问题。本文旨在探究偏差是否为主要障碍，以及最小修复方案即可奏效。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：1) DDCG（Discontinuity Detection Controlled Gradient）——一种轻量级测试，在不光滑区域切换估计器，仅需单个超参数即可在少量样本下保持可靠；2) IVW-H（Inverse-Variance Weighted per-step Hybrid）——一种基于逆方差加权的每步骤混合策略，在不显式检测不连续性的情况下稳定方差。
AI.result: DDCG在标准不连续环境中取得鲁棒性能；IVW-H在可微机器人控制任务中表现优异。实验表明方差控制在实践中比不连续性检测更为关键。
AI.conclusion: 估计器切换在受控研究中提升了鲁棒性，但在实际部署中，细致的方差控制往往主导性能表现。

title: Working Memory Constraints Scaffold Learning in Transformers under Data Scarcity
summary: We investigate the integration of human-like working memory constraints into the Transformer architecture and implement several cognitively inspired attention variants, including fixed-width windows based and temporal decay based attention mechanisms. Our modified GPT-2 models are trained from scratch on developmentally plausible datasets (10M and 100M words). Performance is evaluated on grammatical judgment tasks (BLiMP) and alignment with human reading time data. Our results indicate that these cognitively-inspired constraints, particularly fixed-width attention, can significantly improve grammatical accuracy especially when training data is scarce. These constrained models also tend to show a stronger alignment with human processing metrics. The findings suggest that such constraints may serve as a beneficial inductive bias, guiding models towards more robust linguistic representations, especially in data-limited settings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在Transformer架构中融入类人工作记忆约束，通过实现固定宽度窗口和时序衰减等认知启发式注意力机制，在发育可行的小规模数据集上训练GPT-2模型。实验表明，认知约束（尤其是固定宽度注意力）能显著提升语法判断准确性，特别是在数据稀缺场景下，且约束模型与人类阅读时间数据对齐度更高，说明这类约束可作为有益的归纳偏置引导模型学习更鲁棒的 linguistic 表征。
AI.motivation: 探索将人类工作记忆约束引入Transformer架构是否能作为有效的归纳偏置，提升模型在数据有限条件下的语言学习能力，并使其行为更接近人类语言处理模式。
AI.method: 在GPT-2架构中实现固定宽度窗口注意力和时序衰减注意力两种认知启发式变体，在10M和100M词规模的发育合理数据集上从头训练，通过BLiMP语法判断任务和人类阅读时间数据对齐度进行评测。
AI.result: 认知约束（特别是固定宽度注意力）显著提升了语法判断准确性，在数据稀缺场景下效果尤为突出；约束模型与人类阅读时间数据的对齐度更高。
AI.conclusion: 类人工作记忆约束可作为有益的归纳偏置，引导模型在数据有限条件下形成更鲁棒的语言表征，为构建更贴近人类认知的语言模型提供了实证支持。

title: Hybrid Latent Reasoning with Decoupled Policy Optimization
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning significantly elevates the complex problem-solving capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). However, adapting CoT to vision typically discretizes signals to fit LLM inputs, causing early semantic collapse and discarding fine-grained details. While external tools can mitigate this, they introduce a rigid bottleneck, confining reasoning to predefined operations. Although recent latent reasoning paradigms internalize visual states to overcome these limitations, optimizing the resulting hybrid discrete-continuous action space remains challenging. In this work, we propose HyLaR (Hybrid Latent Reasoning), a framework that seamlessly interleaves discrete text generation with continuous visual latent representations. Specifically, following an initial cold-start supervised fine-tuning (SFT), we introduce DePO (Decoupled Policy Optimization) to enable effective reinforcement learning within this hybrid space. DePO decomposes the policy gradient objective, applying independent trust-region constraints to the textual and latent components, alongside an exact closed-form von Mises-Fisher (vMF) KL regularizer. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HyLaR outperforms standard MLLMs and state-of-the-art latent reasoning approaches across fine-grained perception and general multimodal understanding benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/EthenCheng/HyLaR.

AI.tldr: HyLaR提出了一种混合潜在推理框架，将离散文本生成与连续视觉潜在表示交错结合，并引入解耦策略优化(DePO)在混合离散-连续动作空间中实现有效强化学习，在细粒度感知和通用多模态理解基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有CoT推理方法在视觉任务中因离散化信号导致早期语义崩溃和细节丢失，外部工具引入刚性瓶颈，而潜在推理范式面临混合离散-连续动作空间优化困难的问题。
AI.method: 提出HyLaR框架：1) 初始冷启动监督微调(SFT)；2) 引入解耦策略优化(DePO)，将策略梯度目标分解，对文本和潜在组件应用独立置信域约束，并结合精确闭合形式的von Mises-Fisher (vMF) KL正则化器。
AI.result: 在细粒度感知和通用多模态理解基准上，HyLaR优于标准MLLMs和最新潜在推理方法。
AI.conclusion: HyLaR通过混合离散-连续推理空间及解耦策略优化，有效解决了多模态大模型中视觉推理的细节丢失和优化困难问题，为视觉-语言推理提供了新范式。

title: Chatting about Conditional Trajectory Prediction
summary: Human behavior has the nature of mutual dependencies, which requires human-robot interactive systems to predict surrounding agents trajectories by modeling complex social interactions, avoiding collisions and executing safe path planning. While there exist many trajectory prediction methods, most of them do not incorporate the own motion of the ego agent and only model interactions based on static information. We are inspired by the humans theory of mind during trajectory selection and propose a Cross time domain intention-interactive method for conditional Trajectory prediction(CiT). Our proposed CiT conducts joint analysis of behavior intentions over time, and achieves information complementarity and integration across different time domains. The intention in its own time domain can be corrected by the social interaction information from the other time domain to obtain a more precise intention representation. In addition, CiT is designed to closely integrate with robotic motion planning and control modules, capable of generating a set of optional trajectory prediction results for all surrounding agents based on potential motions of the ego agent. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed CiT significantly outperforms the existing methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance in the benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种跨时域意图交互方法(CiT)，通过联合分析不同时间域的行为意图并实现信息互补，结合自车运动进行条件轨迹预测，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法大多未考虑自车运动，且仅基于静态信息建模社交交互，无法充分捕捉人类行为中的相互依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出CiT方法，进行跨时间域的行为意图联合分析，实现不同时间域的信息互补与集成；一个时间域的意图可由另一时间域的社交交互信息进行校正，以获得更精确的意图表示；与机器人运动规划和控制模块紧密集成，基于自车潜在运动生成周围所有智能体的可选轨迹预测结果。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到最先进性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CiT通过跨时域意图交互和自车运动条件预测，有效提升了人机交互系统中轨迹预测的准确性，并可与运动规划控制模块无缝集成。

title: SurgCoT: Advancing Spatiotemporal Reasoning in Surgical Videos through a Chain-of-Thought Benchmark
summary: Fine-grained spatiotemporal reasoning on surgical videos is critical, yet the capabilities of Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in this domain remain largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce SurgCoT, a unified benchmark for evaluating chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning in MLLMs across 7 surgical specialties and 35 diverse procedures. SurgCoT assesses five core reasoning dimensions: Causal Action Ordering, Cue-Action Alignment, Affordance Mapping, Micro-Transition Localization, and Anomaly Onset Tracking, through a structured CoT framework with an intensive annotation protocol (Question-Option-Knowledge-Clue-Answer), where the Knowledge field provides essential background context and Clue provides definitive spatiotemporal evidence. Evaluation of 10 leading MLLMs shows: 1) commercial models outperform open-source and medical-specialized variants; 2) significant gaps exist in surgical CoT reasoning; 3) SurgCoT enables effective evaluation and enhances progressive spatiotemporal reasoning. SurgCoT provides a reproducible testbed to narrow the gap between MLLM capabilities and clinical reasoning demands. Code: https://github.com/CVI-SZU/SurgCoT.

AI.tldr: SurgCoT是一个用于评估多模态大语言模型在手术视频中细粒度时空推理能力的基准，涵盖7个外科专科、35种手术流程，通过结构化思维链框架评估5个核心推理维度。实验表明商业模型优于开源和医学专用模型，但整体仍存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在外科手术视频中的细粒度时空推理能力尚未得到充分探索，缺乏统一的评估基准来系统衡量其链式思维推理能力。
AI.method: 构建SurgCoT基准，包含7个外科专科、35种手术流程，通过Question-Option-Knowledge-Clue-Answer五元组注释协议，评估因果动作排序、线索-动作对齐、功能映射、微观转换定位和异常起始追踪五个推理维度。
AI.result: 商业模型表现优于开源和医学专用模型；外科手术链式思维推理存在显著差距；SurgCoT能够有效评估并增强渐进式时空推理能力。
AI.conclusion: SurgCoT为弥合MLLM能力与临床推理需求之间的差距提供了可复现的测试平台。

title: Muscle-inspired magnetic actuators that push, pull, crawl, and grasp
summary: Functional magnetic composites capable of large deformation, load bearing, and multifunctional motion are essential for next-generation adaptive soft robots. Here, we present muscle-inspired magnetic actuators (MMA), additively manufactured from a thermoplastic/permanent magnet polyurethane/Nd2Fe14B (TPU/MQP-S) composite using laser powder bed fusion (LPBF). By tuning the laser-energy scale between 1.0 and 3.0, both mechanical stiffness and magnetic response are precisely controlled: the tensile strength increases from 0.28 to 0.99 MPa while maintaining 30-45% elongation at break. This process enables the creation of 0.5 mm-thick flexural hinges, which reversibly bend and fold under moderate magnetic fields without damage. Two actuator types are reported showing the system versatility. The elongated actuator with self-weight of 1.57 g, magnetized in its contracted state, achieves linear contraction under a 500 mT field, lifting 50 g (32x its own weight) and sustaining performance over at least 50 cycles. Equipped with anisotropic frictional feet, it supports movement of a magnetic crawling robot that achieves up to 100% locomotion success on textured substrates. The expandable actuator exhibits reversible opening and closing under a 300 mT field, reliably grasping and releasing different objects, including soft berries and rigid 3D printed geometries. It can also anchor in a tube while holding suspended 50 g loads. This work demonstrates a LPBF-based strategy to program both stiffness and magnetization within a single material system, enabling remotely driven, reconfigurable, and fatigue-resistant soft actuators. The approach opens new possibilities for force controlled, multifunctional magnetic soft robots for adaptive gripping, locomotion, and minimally invasive manipulation of biomedical tools.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了采用激光粉末床熔融（LPBF）增材制造技术，从热塑性聚氨酯/钕铁硼（TPU/MQP-S）复合材料制备肌肉启发式磁驱动致动器（MMA）。通过调节激光能量密度（1.0-3.0），可精确控制力学刚度与磁响应，拉伸强度从0.28 MPa提升至0.99 MPa，同时保持30-45%断裂伸长率。制造出0.5 mm厚柔性铰链，可在中等磁场下可逆弯折。展示了两种致动器：伸长型致动器（自重1.57g）在500 mT磁场下实现线性收缩，可提举50g（32倍自重）并稳定运行50次循环；可展开型致动器在300 mT磁场下实现可逆开合，可抓取软浆果及刚性3D打印物体，并能在管中锚定悬挂50g负载。各向异性摩擦足可实现爬行机器人100%运动成功率。该工作展示了通过LPBF在单一材料系统中编程刚度和磁化的策略，为远程驱动、可重构、抗疲劳的软体致动器开辟了新途径。
AI.motivation: 下一代自适应软体机器人亟需兼具大变形、承重能力和多功能运动特性的功能磁性复合材料。现有软体致动器在刚度和磁响应协同调控方面存在局限，且缺乏集制造与编程于一体的高效策略。
AI.method: 采用LPBF增材制造技术，以TPU/MQP-S复合材料为原料，通过调节激光能量密度（1.0-3.0）实现力学刚度与磁响应的精确控制。利用该工艺制造0.5 mm厚柔性铰链，并设计伸长型和可展开型两种致动器结构，配备各向异性摩擦足实现爬行运动。
AI.result: 拉伸强度从0.28 MPa可控提升至0.99 MPa，断裂伸长率保持30-45%。伸长型致动器（自重1.57g）在500 mT磁场下提举50g（32倍自重），稳定运行50次循环；爬行机器人在纹理基座上运动成功率达100%。可展开型致动器在300 mT磁场下可逆开合，成功抓取软浆果和刚性物体，并可锚定悬挂50g负载。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明LPBF可在单一材料系统中同时编程刚度和磁化，实现远程驱动、可重构且抗疲劳的软体致动器。为力控多功能磁驱动软体机器人在自适应抓取、运动和微创生物医学工具操作中开辟了新可能。

title: Efficient Multi-Cohort Inference for Long-Term Effects and Lifetime Value in A/B Testing with User Learning
summary:
In streaming platforms churn is extremely costly, yet A/B tests are typically evaluated using outcomes observed within a limited experimental horizon. Even when both short- and predicted long-term engagement metrics are considered, they may fail to capture how a treatment affects users' retention. Consequently, an intervention may appear beneficial in the short term and neutral in the long term while still generating lower total value than the control due to users churn.
  To address this limitation, we introduce a method that estimates long-term treatment effects (LTE) and residual lifetime value change ($ΔERLV$) in short multi-cohort A/B tests under user learning. To estimate time-varying treatment effects efficiently, we introduce an inverse-variance weighted estimator that combines multiple cohorts estimates, reducing variance relative to standard approaches in the literature. The estimated treatment trajectory is then modeled as a parametric decay to recover both the asymptotic treatment effect and the cumulative value generated over time.
  Our framework enables simultaneous evaluation of steady-state impact and residual user value within a single experiment. Empirical results show improved precision in estimating LTE and $ΔERLV$ and identify scenarios in which relying on either short-term or long-term metrics alone would lead to incorrect product decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在短周期多队列A/B测试中估计长期处理效应(LTE)和剩余生命周期价值变化(ΔERLV)的方法，通过逆方差加权估计器结合多队列估计降低方差，并对处理效应轨迹进行参数衰减建模，以解决流媒体平台中因用户流失导致的短期指标误导性问题。
AI.motivation: 流媒体平台中用户流失成本极高，但传统A/B测试仅在有限实验窗口内评估结果。即使同时考虑短期和预测的长期参与指标，也可能无法捕捉处理对用户留存的影响，导致短期看似有益、长期中性的干预措施因用户流失而产生比对照更低的总价值。
AI.method: (1) 提出逆方差加权估计器(IVW)，通过组合多个队列的估计值来降低时变处理效应估计的方差；(2) 将估计的处理效应轨迹建模为参数衰减形式，以恢复渐近处理效应和随时间累积的增量价值；(3) 在短周期多队列A/B测试框架下同时评估稳态影响和剩余用户价值。
AI.result: 实证结果表明，该方法在估计LTE和ΔERLV方面具有更高的精度，并识别出仅依赖短期或长期指标会导致错误产品决策的场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够在单一实验中同时评估稳态影响和剩余用户价值，为流媒体平台的A/B测试提供更准确的产品决策依据，避免因用户流失效应被忽视而做出次优决策。

title: UniCVR: From Alignment to Reranking for Unified Zero-Shot Composed Visual Retrieval
summary: Composed image retrieval, multi-turn composed image retrieval, and composed video retrieval all share a common paradigm: composing the reference visual with modification text to retrieve the desired target. Despite this shared structure, the three tasks have been studied in isolation, with no prior work proposing a unified framework, let alone a zero-shot solution. In this paper, we propose UniCVR, the first unified zero-shot composed visual retrieval framework that jointly addresses all three tasks without any task-specific human-annotated data. UniCVR strategically combines two complementary strengths: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for compositional query understanding and Vision-Language Pre-trained (VLP) models for structured visual retrieval. Concretely, UniCVR operates in two stages. In Stage I, we train the MLLM as a compositional query embedder via contrastive learning on a curated multi-source dataset of approximately 3.5M samples, bridging the heterogeneous embedding spaces between the MLLM and the frozen VLP gallery encoder. A cluster-based hard negative sampling strategy is proposed to strengthen contrastive supervision. In Stage II, we introduce an MLLM-guided dual-level reranking mechanism that applies adaptive budgeted subset scoring to a small number of top-ranked candidates, and then exploits the resulting relevance signals through a dual-level re-scoring scheme, producing more accurate final rankings with minimal computational overhead. Extensive experiments across five benchmarks covering all three tasks demonstrate that UniCVR achieves cutting-edge performance, validating its effectiveness and generalizability. Our data and code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniCVR，首个统一的零样本组合视觉检索框架，通过两阶段策略（对比学习训练的MLLM查询嵌入器 + MLLM引导的双级重排序）联合解决图像/多轮图像/视频三种组合检索任务，无需任何任务特定标注数据，在五个基准上达到先进性能。
AI.motivation: 组合图像检索、多轮组合图像检索和组合视频检索虽然共享相同的范式（参考视觉+修改文本→检索目标），但此前三者被孤立研究，缺乏统一框架，更无零样本解决方案。
AI.method: UniCVR两阶段：阶段I利用对比学习在约350万样本的多源数据集上训练MLLM作为组合查询嵌入器，并采用基于聚类的难负样本采样策略；阶段II引入MLLM引导的双级重排序，先对少量候选子集进行自适应预算评分，再通过双级重评分方案产生更精确的最终排序。
AI.result: 在覆盖三种任务的五个基准上，UniCVR均达到了前沿性能，验证了其有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: UniCVR是首个统一零样本组合视觉检索框架，通过融合MLLM和VLP模型的互补优势，成功将三种视觉检索任务统一在一个框架下，无需任务特定标注数据即可取得优异性能。

title: Unmasking the Illusion of Embodied Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models report impressive success rates on standard robotic benchmarks, fueling optimism about general-purpose physical intelligence. However, recent evidence suggests a systematic misalignment between standard benchmark success and true embodied reasoning, raising the question of whether these high scores reflect genuine cognitive capability. To address this gap, we introduce BeTTER, a diagnostic Benchmark for Testing True Embodied Reasoning in robotic policies. BeTTER applies targeted causal interventions (e.g., spatial layout shifts, temporal extrapolation) while enforcing kinematic isolation to explicitly decouple high-level reasoning failures from low-level execution limits. Through systematic evaluation, we reveal that state-of-the-art VLAs catastrophically fail in dynamic scenarios, exhibiting severe lexical-kinematic shortcuts, behavioral inertia, and semantic feature collapse. Crucially, our mechanistic analysis traces these symptoms to fundamental architectural bottlenecks - such as capacity compression and myopic downsampling - which systematically degrade the model's foundational semantic representation. We demonstrate that highly static evaluation protocols effectively mask this degradation by allowing optimization to overfit to sensorimotor priors. Supported by real-world robotic validation, our findings confirm that this representational breakdown is not a simulation artifact, highlighting the critical need for future VLA paradigms to resolve the structural tension between high-frequency control and high-level reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BeTTER基准测试，通过因果干预揭示当前视觉-语言-动作模型在动态场景中存在严重的推理能力退化，包括词汇-运动捷径、行为惯性和语义特征坍缩，并证明这些缺陷源于架构瓶颈（容量压缩和短视降采样），而静态评估协议掩盖了这些问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在标准机器人基准上取得了高成功率，但这些高分可能并不反映真正的具身推理能力。已有证据表明基准测试成功与真实推理之间存在系统性错位，因此需要一种诊断性基准来解耦高层推理失败与低层执行限制。
AI.method: 提出BeTTER基准，通过因果干预（如空间布局偏移、时间外推）并强制运动学隔离，系统评估VLA模型的推理能力。进一步通过机制分析追溯缺陷的架构根源。
AI.result: 最先进的VLA模型在动态场景中严重失败，表现出词汇-运动捷径、行为惯性和语义特征坍缩。机制分析表明这些症状源于架构瓶颈：容量压缩和短视降采样导致基础语义表征系统性退化。静态评估协议通过允许过拟合传感器运动先验掩盖了这种退化。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLA模型的推理缺陷并非仿真伪影，而是架构性表征崩溃的真实表现。未来VLA范式需要解决高频控制与高层推理之间的结构性张力。

title: Relative Entropy Estimation in Function Space: Theory and Applications to Trajectory Inference
summary: Trajectory Inference (TI) seeks to recover latent dynamical processes from snapshot data, where only independent samples from time-indexed marginals are observed. In applications such as single-cell genomics, destructive measurements make path-space laws non-identifiable from finitely many marginals, leaving held-out marginal prediction as the dominant but limited evaluation protocol. We introduce a general framework for estimating the Kullback-Leibler divergence (KL) divergence between probability measures on function space, yielding a tractable, data-driven estimator that is scalable to realistic snapshot datasets. We validate the accuracy of our estimator on a benchmark suite, where the estimated functional KL closely matches the analytic KL. Applying this framework to synthetic and real scRNA-seq datasets, we show that current evaluation metrics often give inconsistent assessments, whereas path-space KL enables a coherent comparison of trajectory inference methods and exposes discrepancies in inferred dynamics, especially in regions with sparse or missing data. These results support functional KL as a principled criterion for evaluating trajectory inference under partial observability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于函数空间KL散度的轨迹推断评估框架，能够从快照数据中估计路径空间概率分布之间的差异，并通过合成和真实单细胞RNA-seq数据集验证，证明其比传统评估指标更一致和可靠。
AI.motivation: 在轨迹推断中，由于破坏性测量导致路径空间分布无法从有限边际分布中识别，现有评估主要依赖留出边际预测，但该协议存在局限性。需要一种更原则性的评估标准来衡量轨迹推断方法在部分可观测性下的性能。
AI.method: 提出了一个通用框架来估计函数空间上概率测度之间的KL散度，构建了一个可处理、数据驱动的估计器，可扩展到现实快照数据集。通过基准套件验证了估计器准确性，并在合成和真实scRNA-seq数据上进行了评估。
AI.result: 估计的功能KL与解析KL高度吻合。在合成和真实单细胞数据上，现有评估指标常给出不一致的结果，而路径空间KL能够实现对轨迹推断方法的一致比较，并揭示稀疏或缺失数据区域的动力学差异。
AI.conclusion: 功能KL散度可作为部分可观测性下轨迹推断评估的原则性准则。

title: Fisher Decorator: Refining Flow Policy via A Local Transport Map
summary: Recent advances in flow-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) have achieved strong performance by parameterizing policies via flow matching. However, they still face critical trade-offs among expressiveness, optimality, and efficiency. In particular, existing flow policies interpret the $L_2$ regularization as an upper bound of the 2-Wasserstein distance ($W_2$), which can be problematic in offline settings. This issue stems from a fundamental geometric mismatch: the behavioral policy manifold is inherently anisotropic, whereas the $L_2$ (or upper bound of $W_2$) regularization is isotropic and density-insensitive, leading to systematically misaligned optimization directions. To address this, we revisit offline RL from a geometric perspective and show that policy refinement can be formulated as a local transport map: an initial flow policy augmented by a residual displacement. By analyzing the induced density transformation, we derive a local quadratic approximation of the KL-constrained objective governed by the Fisher information matrix, enabling a tractable anisotropic optimization formulation. By leveraging the score function embedded in the flow velocity, we obtain a corresponding quadratic constraint for efficient optimization. Our results reveal that the optimality gap in prior methods arises from their isotropic approximation. In contrast, our framework achieves a controllable approximation error within a provable neighborhood of the optimal solution. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across diverse offline RL benchmarks. See project page: https://github.com/ARC0127/Fisher-Decorator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fisher-Decorator框架，从几何角度解决离线强化学习中流策略的L2正则化各向同性导致的优化方向错位问题，通过Fisher信息矩阵实现各向异性优化，达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流的离线强化学习方法使用L2正则化作为2-Wasserstein距离的上界，但行为策略流形本质上是各向异性的，而L2正则化是各向同性且密度不敏感的，导致优化方向系统性错位，存在表达能力、最优性和效率之间的关键权衡。
AI.method: 从几何视角将策略细化重新表述为局部传输映射（初始流策略+残差位移）；通过Fisher信息矩阵推导KL约束目标的局部二次近似，实现可处理的各向异性优化；利用流速度中嵌入的score函数获得相应的二次约束。
AI.result: 理论揭示先前方法的最优性差距源于各向同性近似；本框架在最优解的可证明邻域内实现可控的近似误差；在多种离线RL基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: Fisher信息矩阵引导的各向异性优化有效解决了流策略的几何失配问题，在保持表达能力和效率的同时提升了最优性。

title: Breaking Bad: Interpretability-Based Safety Audits of State-of-the-Art LLMs
summary: Effective safety auditing of large language models (LLMs) demands tools that go beyond black-box probing and systematically uncover vulnerabilities rooted in model internals. We present a comprehensive, interpretability-driven jailbreaking audit of eight SOTA open-source LLMs: Llama-3.1-8B, Llama-3.3-70B-4bt, GPT-oss- 20B, GPT-oss-120B, Qwen3-0.6B, Qwen3-32B, Phi4-3.8B, and Phi4-14B. Leveraging interpretability-based approaches -- Universal Steering (US) and Representation Engineering (RepE) -- we introduce an adaptive two-stage grid search algorithm to identify optimal activation-steering coefficients for unsafe behavioral concepts. Our evaluation, conducted on a curated set of harmful queries and a standardized LLM-based judging protocol, reveals stark contrasts in model robustness. The Llama-3 models are highly vulnerable, with up to 91\% (US) and 83\% (RepE) jailbroken responses on Llama-3.3-70B-4bt, while GPT-oss-120B remains robust to attacks via both interpretability approaches. Qwen and Phi models show mixed results, with the smaller Qwen3-0.6B and Phi4-3.8B mostly exhibiting lower jailbreaking rates, while their larger counterparts are more susceptible. Our results establish interpretability-based steering as a powerful tool for systematic safety audits, but also highlight its dual-use risks and the need for better internal defenses in LLM deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可解释性的红队测试方法，通过对8个开源大语言模型的内部激活进行定向操控，系统评估其安全漏洞。结果显示Llama-3系列模型极易被越狱（攻击成功率最高达91%），GPT-oss-120B最为鲁棒，而小模型通常比大模型更安全。
AI.motivation: 现有安全审计多采用黑盒探测方式，难以系统性地发现模型内部的安全漏洞。需要开发基于模型内部机制的工具来更有效地评估LLM的安全性。
AI.method: 采用两种可解释性方法（Universal Steering和Representation Engineering），提出自适应两阶段网格搜索算法来寻找最优的激活操控系数，在8个开源LLM上对有害查询进行安全审计。
AI.result: Llama-3.3-70B-4bt在US和RepE攻击下分别达到91%和83%的越狱率；GPT-oss-120B对两种攻击均表现鲁棒；小模型（Qwen3-0.6B、Phi4-3.8B）越狱率较低，大版本更易受攻击。
AI.conclusion: 基于可解释性的激活操控是系统安全审计的有力工具，但同时也揭示了其双重用途风险，LLM部署需要更好的内部防御机制。

title: Propensity Inference: Environmental Contributors to LLM Behaviour
summary: Motivated by loss of control risks from misaligned AI systems, we develop and apply methods for measuring language models' propensity for unsanctioned behaviour. We contribute three methodological improvements: analysing effects of changes to environmental factors on behaviour, quantifying effect sizes via Bayesian generalised linear models, and taking explicit measures against circular analysis. We apply the methodology to measure the effects of 12 environmental factors (6 strategic in nature, 6 non-strategic) and thus the extent to which behaviour is explained by strategic aspects of the environment, a question relevant to risks from misalignment. Across 23 language models and 11 evaluation environments, we find approximately equal contributions from strategic and non-strategic factors for explaining behaviour, do not find strategic factors becoming more or less influential as capabilities improve, and find some evidence for a trend for increased sensitivity to goal conflicts. Finally, we highlight a key direction for future propensity research: the development of theoretical frameworks and cognitive models of AI decision-making into empirically testable forms.

AI.tldr: 本文针对AI系统失调可能带来的失控风险，开发了测量语言模型违规行为倾向的方法，包括三项改进：分析环境因素变化对行为的影响、通过贝叶斯广义线性模型量化效应大小、以及采取明确措施防止循环分析。通过对23个语言模型和11个评估环境进行实验，发现战略性和非战略性因素对行为解释贡献大致相等，能力提升并未使战略性因素影响力增强，但发现目标冲突敏感性存在增强趋势。
AI.motivation: 源于对失调AI系统可能带来失控风险的担忧，需要量化评估语言模型在未见过的情境中出现不当行为的倾向性，从而为AI安全治理提供可测量的依据。
AI.method: 提出了三项方法论改进：1) 分析环境因素变化对模型行为的影响；2) 使用贝叶斯广义线性模型量化效应大小；3) 采取明确措施防止循环分析。实验涉及23个语言模型、11个评估环境，考察12个环境因素（6个战略性、6个非战略性）。
AI.result: 战略性因素与非战略性因素对行为的解释贡献大致相等；随着模型能力提升，战略性因素并未变得更为或更不显著；但发现模型对目标冲突的敏感性存在增强趋势的证据。
AI.conclusion: 强调未来研究的关键方向是发展可实证检验的AI决策理论框架和认知模型，以进一步推进行为倾向性研究。

title: Can Explicit Physical Feasibility Benefit VLA Learning? An Empirical Study
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models map multimodal inputs directly to robot actions and are typically trained through large-scale imitation learning. While this paradigm has shown strong performance, prevailing VLA training procedures do not explicitly supervise hard physical constraints such as obstacle avoidance or kinematic feasibility.
