To bridge these gaps, we propose OmniVLA-RL, a novel architecture that leverages a Mix-of-Transformers (MoT) design to synergistically integrate reasoning, spatial, and action experts. Furthermore, we introduce Flow-GSPO, which reformulates flow matching as a Stochastic Differential Equation (SDE) process and integrates it with Group Segmented Policy Optimization (GSPO) to enhance action precision and training robustness. Extensive evaluations on the LIBERO and LIBERO-Plus benchmarks demonstrate that OmniVLA-RL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, effectively overcoming the fundamental limitations of current VLA models.

AI.tldr: OmniVLA-RL提出了一种结合Mix-of-Transformers（MoT）架构和Flow-GSPO训练策略的视觉-语言-动作模型，通过协同推理、空间和动作专家，以及将流匹配重构为随机微分方程过程并整合分组分段策略优化，在LIBERO和LIBERO-Plus基准上显著超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型存在三个关键缺陷：空间感知不精确、多模态融合次优以及强化学习训练不稳定，亟需一种能够同时克服这些局限性的统一架构。
AI.method: 采用Mix-of-Transformers（MoT）设计协同整合推理专家、空间专家和动作专家；提出Flow-GSPO，将流匹配重构为随机微分方程（SDE）过程，并与分组分段策略优化（GSPO）相结合。
AI.result: 在LIBERO和LIBERO-Plus基准上的广泛评估表明，OmniVLA-RL显著优于现有最先进方法，有效克服了当前VLA模型的基本局限性。
AI.conclusion: OmniVLA-RL通过MoT架构和Flow-GSPO训练策略，成功解决了VLA模型在空间感知、多模态融合和训练稳定性方面的核心问题，为 embodied AI 提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: Auto-ART: Structured Literature Synthesis and Automated Adversarial Robustness Testing
comment: NeurIPS 2026 Evaluations and Datasets Track Submission
summary: Adversarial robustness evaluation underpins every claim of trustworthy ML deployment, yet the field suffers from fragmented protocols and undetected gradient masking. We make two contributions. (1) Structured synthesis. We analyze nine peer-reviewed corpus sources (2020--2026) through seven complementary protocols, producing the first end-to-end structured analysis of the field's consensus and unresolved challenges. (2) Auto-ART framework. We introduce Auto-ART, an open-source framework that operationalizes identified gaps: 50+ attacks, 28 defense modules, the Robustness Diagnostic Index (RDI), and gradient-masking detection. It supports multi-norm evaluation (l1/l2/linf/semantic/spatial) and compliance mapping to NIST AI RMF, OWASP LLM Top 10, and the EU AI Act. Empirical validation on RobustBench demonstrates that Auto-ART's pre-screening identifies gradient masking in 92% of flagged cases, and RDI rankings correlate highly with full AutoAttack. Multi-norm evaluation exposes a 23.5 pp gap between average and worst-case robustness on state-of-the-art models. No prior work combines such structured meta-scientific analysis with an executable evaluation framework bridging literature gaps into engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文通过结构化分析九类文献来源与七种评估协议，揭示了对抗鲁棒性评估领域存在协议碎片化和梯度掩蔽检测缺失的问题；同时提出Auto-ART开源框架，集成50+攻击、28个防御模块、鲁棒性诊断指数（RDI）及梯度掩蔽检测，支持多范数评估并映射至NIST AI RMF、OWASP LLM Top 10、EU AI Act等合规标准，实验表明预筛可识别92%的梯度掩蔽案例，多范数评估揭示SOTA模型平均与最差鲁棒性间存在23.5个百分点的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗鲁棒性评估存在协议碎片化（评估标准不统一）和梯度掩蔽被忽视的问题，导致可信ML部署的鲁棒性声明缺乏可靠支撑，亟需系统性梳理共识与挑战并提供工程化的解决框架。
AI.method: （1）结构化综合：对2020–2026年间九类同行评审文献来源通过七种互补协议进行端到端结构化分析；（2）Auto-ART框架：集成50+攻击算法、28个防御模块、RDI指数及梯度掩蔽检测引擎，支持l1/l2/linf/语义/空间多范数评估，并映射至NIST AI RMF、OWASP LLM Top 10、EU AI Act等监管合规框架。
AI.result: Auto-ART的预筛查可识别92%的梯度掩蔽案例；RDI排名与完整AutoAttack高度相关；多范数评估显示SOTA模型平均鲁棒性与最差情况鲁棒性之间存在23.5个百分点的差距。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将结构化元科学分析与可执行的评估框架相结合，弥合了文献到工程实现的鸿沟，为可信ML部署提供了标准化、合规化的鲁棒性评估工具。

title: HumanScore: Benchmarking Human Motions in Generated Videos
summary: Recent advances in model architectures, compute, and data scale have driven rapid progress in video generation, producing increasingly realistic content. Yet, no prior method systematically measures how faithfully these systems render human bodies and motion dynamics. In this paper, we present HumanScore, a systematic framework to evaluate the quality of human motions in AI-generated videos. HumanScore defines six interpretable metrics spanning kinematic plausibility, temporal stability, and biomechanical consistency, enabling fine-grained diagnosis beyond visual realism alone. Through carefully designed prompts, we elicit a diverse set of movements at varying intensities and evaluate videos generated by thirteen state-of-the-art models. Our analysis reveals consistent gaps between perceptual plausibility and motion biomechanical fidelity, identifies recurrent failure modes (e.g., temporal jitter, anatomically implausible poses, and motion drift), and produces robust model rankings from quantitative and physically meaningful criteria.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HumanScore，一个系统评估AI生成视频中人体运动质量的框架，包含六项可解释指标，覆盖运动学合理性、时间稳定性和生物力学一致性。通过对13个前沿模型的评测，揭示了感知合理性与运动生物力学保真度之间的持续差距，并识别出常见失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽在视觉真实性上取得显著进展，但缺乏系统评估生成视频中人体运动质量的方法，特别是对运动学合理性、时间稳定性和生物力学一致性的细粒度诊断。
AI.method: 提出HumanScore框架，定义六项可解释评估指标；通过精心设计的提示词生成多样化运动；对13个SOTA模型进行系统评测。
AI.result: 发现感知合理性与运动生物力学保真度之间存在持续差距；识别出时间抖动、解剖学上不可能的姿势和运动漂移等常见失败模式；生成基于定量和物理意义标准的稳健模型排名。
AI.conclusion: HumanScore能够超越视觉真实感，提供对AI生成视频中人体运动的细粒度诊断，为视频生成模型在人体运动质量方面的评估提供了系统化工具。

title: Integrated packing, placement, scheduling, and routing of personalized production: a pharmaceutical Industry 4.0 use-case with a planar transport system
summary:
The recent emergence of planar transport systems necessitates re-evaluation of Flexible Manufacturing Systems (FMS) to address the simultaneous scheduling of internal logistics and production operations. By operating on a tile-based planar grid, these systems allow independent movers full two-dimensional freedom, mitigating inefficiencies inherent to traditional sequential lines. This paper applies a planar FMS framework to a real-world use case in the pharmaceutical industry: the automated production of personalized drugs.
  Implementing this system requires solving optimization problems at both tactical and operational levels. The tactical level involves decisions regarding production line layout and the positioning of drug dispensers. A Mixed-Integer Quadratic Programming model is utilized for the packing problem to exploit drug co-occurrence patterns found in historical patient data. Subsequently, we solve the placement problem - a bi-level problem combining an assignment problem with Shortest Hamiltonian paths with neighborhoods - to arrange dispensers in a layout minimizing expected travel distances.
  The operational level is encountered daily, scheduling individual movers to process new orders as quickly as possible. This scheduling problem is formulated using Constraint Programming, modeling movers as reservoir resources to ensure order completeness, complemented by a routing phase using an iterative conflict-resolution mechanism and DAG-based reasoning to convert schedules into conflict-free paths.
  Evaluation using real-world prescription data for 40 drugs shows the framework scales efficiently across several layout topologies for up to 500 orders, with schedules that are highly effective and computationally tractable for daily operations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个应用于制药行业个性化药物自动化生产的平面柔性制造系统（FMS）框架，在战术层面通过混合整数二次规划解决布局与分配问题，在操作层面通过约束规划与冲突消解机制实现调度，实验证明该系统在40种药物、500个订单规模下高效可行。
AI.motivation: 平面运输系统的出现要求重新审视传统柔性制造系统（FMS），以解决内部物流与生产操作的同步调度问题。传统顺序生产线存在效率低下的问题，而基于瓦片式平面网格的系统允许独立移动器具有完全二维自由度，可缓解这些不足。
AI.method: 战术层面：采用混合整数二次规划（MIQP）模型解决包装问题，利用历史患者数据中的药物共现模式；随后求解双层布局问题（分配问题+最短哈密顿路径与邻域），最小化预期行进距离。操作层面：使用约束规划（CP）建模，将移动器视为水库资源以确保订单完整性，并通过迭代冲突消解机制和基于DAG的推理将调度转换为无冲突路径。
AI.result: 基于40种药物的真实处方数据评估，该框架在多种布局拓扑下可扩展至500个订单，生成的调度方案高效且计算上可在日常操作中处理。
AI.conclusion: 平面FMS框架在制药行业个性化药物生产中具有实际可行性和高效性，战术与操作层面的优化方法能有效应对实际规模问题。

title: A Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability-Guided Search Framework for Efficient and Safe Indoor Planar Robot Navigation
summary: Autonomous navigation requires planning to reach a goal safely and efficiently in complex and potentially dynamic environments. Graph search-based algorithms are widely adopted due to their generality and theoretical guarantees when equipped with admissible heuristics. However, the computational complexity of graph search grows rapidly with the dimensionality of the search space, often making real-time planning in dynamic environments intractable. In this paper, we combine offline Hamilton-Jacobi (HJ) reachability with online graph search to leverage the complementary strengths of both. Precomputed HJ value functions, used as informative heuristics and proactive safety constraints, amortize online computation of the graph search process. At the same time, graph search enables reachability-based reasoning to be incorporated into online planning, overcoming the long-standing challenge of HJ reachability requiring full knowledge of the environment. Extensive simulation studies and real-world experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms baseline methods in terms of planning efficiency and navigation safety, in environments with and without human presence.

AI.tldr: 本文结合离线Hamilton-Jacobi可达性分析与在线图搜索，利用预计算的HJ值函数作为启发式信息和安全约束，在复杂动态环境中实现高效且安全的自主导航，显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 图搜索算法在高维动态空间中计算复杂度高，难以实现实时规划；而HJ可达性分析虽能提供安全保证，但需要预先知道完整环境信息。两者各有优劣，亟需一种方法结合二者的互补优势。
AI.method: 将离线预计算的HJ值函数作为在线图搜索的启发式信息和主动安全约束，利用HJ可达性指导图搜索的节点扩展和路径选择，同时图搜索使可达性推理能够适应未知环境。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实实验中，该方法在规划效率和导航安全性方面一致优于基线方法，适用于有无人存在的各类环境。
AI.conclusion: 通过离线HJ可达性与在线图搜索的结合，有效克服了各自局限性，实现了高效、安全的实时自主导航。

title: GSCompleter: A Distillation-Free Plugin for Metric-Aware 3D Gaussian Splatting Completion in Seconds
summary: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized real-time rendering, its performance degrades significantly under sparse-view extrapolation, manifesting as severe geometric voids and artifacts. Existing solutions primarily rely on an iterative "Repair-then-Distill" paradigm, which is inherently unstable and prone to overfitting. In this work, we propose GSCompleter, a distillation-free plugin that shifts scene completion to a stable "Generate-then-Register" workflow. Our approach first synthesizes plausible 2D reference images and explicitly lifts them into metric-scale 3D primitives via a robust Stereo-Anchor mechanism. These primitives are then seamlessly integrated into the global context through a novel Ray-Constrained Registration strategy. This shift to a rapid registration paradigm delivers superior 3DGS completion performance across three distinct benchmarks, enhancing the quality and efficiency of various baselines and achieving new SOTA results.

AI.tldr: GSCompleter提出了一种"生成-注册"范式替代传统"修复-蒸馏"方法，通过合成2D参考图像并利用立体锚点机制提升为度量尺度3D基元，再通过射线约束注册策略无缝集成到全局场景中，在稀疏视角外推下实现了3DGS场景补全的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 3DGS在稀疏视角外推下性能严重下降，出现几何空洞和伪影；现有"修复-蒸馏"范式不稳定且易过拟合，亟需更稳定高效的场景补全方法。
AI.method: 采用"生成-注册"双阶段流程：(1) 合成合理的2D参考图像；(2) 通过立体锚点（Stereo-Anchor）机制显式提升为度量尺度3D基元；(3) 利用射线约束注册（Ray-Constrained Registration）策略将基元无缝集成到全局场景中。
AI.result: 在三个不同基准测试中均优于现有方法，提升了多种基线的补全质量和效率，达到新的SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 蒸馏免费的"生成-注册"范式相比不稳定的"修复-蒸馏"范式在3DGS稀疏视角场景补全中具有更优的稳定性与性能表现。

title: Infrastructure-Centric World Models: Bridging Temporal Depth and Spatial Breadth for Roadside Perception
summary: World models, generative AI systems that simulate how environments evolve, are transforming autonomous driving, yet all existing approaches adopt an ego-vehicle perspective, leaving the infrastructure viewpoint unexplored. We argue that infrastructure-centric world models offer a fundamentally complementary capability: the bird's-eye, multi-sensor, persistent viewpoint that roadside systems uniquely possess. Central to our thesis is a spatio-temporal complementarity: fixed roadside sensors excel at temporal depth, accumulating long-term behavioral distributions including rare safety-critical events, while vehicle-borne sensors excel at spatial breadth, sampling diverse scenes across large road networks. This paper presents a vision for Infrastructure-centric World Models (I-WM) in three phases: (I) generative scene understanding with quality-aware uncertainty propagation, (II) physics-informed predictive dynamics with multi-agent counterfactual reasoning, and (III) collaborative world models for V2X communication via latent space alignment. We propose a dual-layer architecture, annotation-free perception as a multi-modal data engine feeding end-to-end generative world models, with a phased sensor strategy from LiDAR through 4D radar and signal phase data to event cameras. We establish a taxonomy of driving world model paradigms, position I-WM relative to LeCun's JEPA, Li Fei-Fei's spatial intelligence, and VLA architectures, and introduce Infrastructure VLA (I-VLA) as a novel unification of roadside perception, language commands, and traffic control actions. Our vision builds upon existing multi-LiDAR pipelines and identifies open-source foundations for each phase, providing a path toward infrastructure that understands and anticipates traffic.

AI.tldr: 本文提出以基础设施为中心的世界模型（I-WM）新范式，利用路侧多传感器系统的鸟瞰、持久视角，与车载视角形成时空互补——固定传感器擅长时间深度（积累长时行为分布及罕见安全关键事件），车载传感器擅长空间广度（采样大路网多样场景）。论文分三阶段构建I-WM：生成式场景理解（含质量感知不确定性传播）、物理信息预测动力学（含多智能体反事实推理）、V2X协同世界模型（潜空间对齐），并提出双层次架构、无标注感知数据引擎、VLA统一框架（I-VLA），同时建立驾驶世界模型分类体系。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶世界模型全部采用自车视角，忽略了基础设施视角这一根本性空白。路侧系统具有鸟瞰、多传感器、持久观测的独特能力，与车载视角形成时空互补，因此有必要探索以基础设施为中心的世界模型（I-WM）这一新范式。
AI.method: 提出三阶段I-WM构建方案：(I) 生成式场景理解+质量感知不确定性传播；(II) 物理信息预测动力学+多智能体反事实推理；(III) V2X协同世界模型通过潜空间对齐。架构上采用双层次设计，无标注感知作为多模态数据引擎，阶段式传感器策略（LiDAR→4D雷达+信号相位→事件相机），并引入I-VLA统一路侧感知、语言指令与交通控制动作。
AI.result: 建立了驾驶世界模型范式分类体系，将I-WM与LeCun的JEPA、李飞飞的空间智能、VLA架构进行定位比较，并为每阶段识别了开源基础，提供了从基础设施角度理解和预测交通的可行路径。
AI.conclusion: 基础设施中心世界模型是对现有自车中心方法的根本性补充，其时空互补特性（路侧时间深度+车载空间广度）有望显著提升自动驾驶安全性与泛化能力。

title: MGDA-Decoupled: Geometry-Aware Multi-Objective Optimisation for DPO-based LLM Alignment
comment: Accepted to the Algorithmic Fairness Across Alignment Procedures and Agentic Systems Workshop at ICLR 2026
summary: Aligning large language models (LLMs) to desirable human values requires balancing multiple, potentially conflicting objectives such as helpfulness, truthfulness, and harmlessness, which presents a multi-objective optimisation challenge. Most alignment pipelines rely on a fixed scalarisation of these objectives, which can introduce procedural unfairness by systematically under-weighting harder-to-optimise or minority objectives. To promote more equitable trade-offs, we introduce MGDA-Decoupled, a geometry-based multi-objective optimisation algorithm that finds a shared descent direction while explicitly accounting for each objective's convergence dynamics. In contrast to prior methods that depend on reinforcement learning (e.g., GAPO) or explicit reward models (e.g., MODPO), our approach operates entirely within the lightweight Direct Preference Optimisation (DPO) paradigm. Experiments on the UltraFeedback dataset show that geometry-aware methods -- and MGDA-Decoupled in particular -- achieve the highest win rates against golden responses, both overall and per objective.

AI.tldr: 提出MGDA-Decoupled算法，利用几何多目标优化在DPO框架下平衡LLM对齐中的多个目标（有用性、真实性、无害性），实验表明该方法在UltraFeedback数据集上取得了最佳胜率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM对齐流程使用固定的目标标量化方法，系统性地低估了难以优化或少数目标的权重，导致程序性不公平。需要一种更公平的多目标权衡方法。
AI.method: 提出MGDA-Decoupled，一种基于几何的多目标优化算法，在寻找共享下降方向时显式考虑每个目标的收敛动态。该方法完全在轻量级DPO范式内运行，不依赖强化学习或显式奖励模型。
AI.result: 在UltraFeedback数据集上，几何感知方法（特别是MGDA-Decoupled）在整体和每个目标上均取得了对黄金响应的最高胜率。
AI.conclusion: 基于几何的多目标优化方法能更公平地平衡LLM对齐中的多个目标，MGDA-Decoupled在DPO框架下实现了优于现有方法的性能。

title: Maximum Likelihood Reconstruction for Multi-Look Digital Holography with Markov-Modeled Speckle Correlation
summary: Multi-look acquisition is a widely used strategy for reducing speckle noise in coherent imaging systems such as digital holography. By acquiring multiple measurements, speckle can be suppressed through averaging or joint reconstruction, typically under the assumption that speckle realizations across looks are statistically independent. In practice, however, hardware constraints limit measurement diversity, leading to inter-look correlation that degrades the performance of conventional methods. In this work, we study the reconstruction of speckle-free reflectivity from complex-valued multi-look measurements in the presence of correlated speckle. We model the inter-look dependence using a first-order Markov process and derive the corresponding likelihood under a first-order Markov approximation, resulting in a constrained maximum likelihood estimation problem. To solve this problem, we develop an efficient projected gradient descent framework that combines gradient-based updates with implicit regularization via deep image priors, and leverages Monte Carlo approximation and matrix-free operators for scalable computation. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed approach remains robust under strong inter-look correlation, achieving performance close to the ideal independent-look scenario and consistently outperforming methods that ignore such dependencies. These results highlight the importance of explicitly modeling inter-look correlation and provide a practical framework for multi-look holographic reconstruction under realistic acquisition conditions. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Computational-Imaging-RU/MLE-Holography-Markov.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在相干成像系统中，针对多帧采集时帧间散斑相关性问题进行无散斑反射率重建的方法。通过一阶马尔可夫过程建模帧间依赖，并基于约束极大似然估计与投影梯度下降框架（结合深度图像先验与蒙特卡洛近似），该方法在强相关条件下仍能接近理想独立帧性能，优于忽略相关性的传统方法。
AI.motivation: 实际多帧采集系统中，硬件受限导致各帧散斑并非统计独立，而传统方法假设独立，导致性能下降。因此需要显式建模帧间散斑相关性以提升重建质量。
AI.method: 采用一阶马尔可夫过程建模帧间散斑相关性，推导对应似然函数，构建约束极大似然估计问题；提出投影梯度下降框架，结合梯度更新与深度图像先验的隐式正则化，并通过蒙特卡洛近似和无矩阵算子实现可扩展计算。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，在强帧间相关条件下，所提方法依然鲁棒，性能接近理想独立帧场景，且持续优于忽略相关性的方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模帧间散斑相关性对于多帧全息重建至关重要，所提框架在实际采集条件下具有实用价值。

title: HypEHR: Hyperbolic Modeling of Electronic Health Records for Efficient Question Answering
summary: Electronic health record (EHR) question answering is often handled by LLM-based pipelines that are costly to deploy and do not explicitly leverage the hierarchical structure of clinical data. Motivated by evidence that medical ontologies and patient trajectories exhibit hyperbolic geometry, we propose HypEHR, a compact Lorentzian model that embeds codes, visits, and questions in hyperbolic space and answers queries via geometry-consistent cross-attention with type-specific pointer heads. HypEHR is pretrained with next-visit diagnosis prediction and hierarchy-aware regularization to align representations with the ICD ontology. On two MIMIC-IV-based EHR-QA benchmarks, HypEHR approaches LLM-based methods while using far fewer parameters. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/yuyuliu11037/HypEHR.

AI.tldr: HypEHR是一种紧凑型洛伦兹模型，通过在双曲空间中嵌入代码、就诊和问题，并利用几何一致性的交叉注意力机制和类型特定的指针头来回答EHR问题。该模型通过下一就诊诊断预测和层级感知正则化进行预训练，在MIMIC-IV基准上以远少于LLM方法的参数达到了接近的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于LLM的EHR问答管道部署成本高，且未能显式利用临床数据的分层结构。医学本体和患者轨迹展现出双曲几何特性，这为设计更紧凑、更高效的模型提供了契机。
AI.method: 提出HypEHR，一种紧凑的洛伦兹模型：(1) 在双曲空间中嵌入诊断代码、就诊记录和问题；(2) 通过几何一致的交叉注意力机制和类型特定的指针头回答查询；(3) 使用下一就诊诊断预测和层级感知正则化（对齐ICD本体）进行预训练。
AI.result: 在两个基于MIMIC-IV的EHR问答基准上，HypEHR以远少于LLM方法的参数达到了接近的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 利用双曲几何来显式建模临床数据的分层结构，可以在大幅降低模型规模的同时保持接近LLM的问答性能，验证了双曲空间在医学领域应用的有效性。

title: Novel Algorithms for Smoothly Differentiable and Efficiently Vectorizable Contact Manifold Construction
comment: Accepted for publication at the ICRA 2026 Workshop on Contact-Rich Control and Representation
summary: Generating intelligent robot behavior in contact-rich settings is a research problem where zeroth-order methods currently prevail. Developing methods that make use of first/second order information about the dynamics holds great promise in terms of increasing the solution speed and computational efficiency. The main bottleneck in this research direction is the difficulty in obtaining useful gradients and Hessians, due to pathologies in all three steps of a common simulation pipeline: i) collision detection, ii) contact dynamics, iii) time integration. This abstract proposes a method that can address the collision detection part of the puzzle in a manner that is smoothly differentiable and massively vectorizable. This is achieved via two contributions: i) a highly expressive class of analytical SDF primitives that can efficiently represent complex 3D surfaces, ii) a novel contact manifold generation routine that makes use of this geometry representation.

AI.tldr: 本文针对接触丰富的机器人智能行为生成问题，提出了一种光滑可微且可大规模向量化的碰撞检测方法，通过两类分析SDF基元和新型接触流形生成例程来解决传统仿真管线中梯度/海森矩阵难以获取的瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 当前接触丰富的机器人行为生成主要依赖零阶方法，而一阶/二阶信息（梯度、海森矩阵）能显著提升求解速度和计算效率。但传统仿真管线中碰撞检测、接触动力学、时间积分三个步骤存在病态问题，导致难以获得有用的梯度和海森矩阵。
AI.method: 提出两种贡献：1）一类高表达力的解析SDF（有符号距离函数）基元，能高效表示复杂3D表面；2）一种利用该几何表示的新型接触流形生成例程，使碰撞检测部分光滑可微且可大规模向量化。
AI.result: 实现了碰撞检测部分的光滑可微性，支持大规模向量化并行计算，有望提升接触丰富场景下机器人行为生成的求解速度和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了仿真管线中碰撞检测环节的梯度获取难题，为在接触丰富场景中利用一阶/二阶优化方法高效生成机器人智能行为奠定了基础。

title: Variance Is Not Importance: Structural Analysis of Transformer Compressibility Across Model Scales
summary:
We present a systematic empirical study of transformer compression through over 40 experiments on GPT-2 (124M parameters) and Mistral 7B (7.24B parameters). Our analysis covers spectral compression, block-level function replacement, rotation-based quantization, activation geometry, and adaptive early exit.
  We identify five structural properties relevant to compression. (1) Variance is not importance: high-variance activation directions are approximately 96 percent uncorrelated with predictive directions (measured via CCA), and projecting onto these subspaces preserves over 90 percent of variance while degrading perplexity. (2) Block linearity is conditional: transformer blocks are approximately linear (R^2 ~ 0.95 on GPT-2, 0.93 on Mistral block 31) only under the correct upstream distribution; modifying earlier blocks induces distribution shift that degrades downstream approximations. (3) The reconstruction wall: approaches that factor weights into quantized components amplify errors through cross-terms, making direct quantization strictly superior. (4) Linearity increases with depth: Mistral 7B exhibits a progression from R^2 = 0.17 (block 0) to R^2 = 0.93 (block 31), indicating a division between nonlinear feature construction and linear refinement. (5) Approximately 30 percent of tokens are computationally easy, confirmed via exit heads and KL divergence sensitivity.
  We demonstrate that single-block linear replacement achieves 34x compression with a 1.71 perplexity increase on the final block of Mistral 7B, while multi-block replacement fails due to residual error accumulation and distribution shift. These findings suggest fundamental limits to static post-training compression and motivate adaptive, per-token computation as a more effective direction.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在GPT-2 (124M)和Mistral 7B (7.24B)上进行的40余项实验，系统研究了Transformer压缩的五项结构性属性：方差不等于重要性、块线性具有条件性、重建墙效应、随深度线性增加、约30%的token计算上简单。单块线性替换在Mistral 7B末层实现34倍压缩且困惑度仅增1.71，但多块替换因残差累积和分布偏移而失败，表明静态后训练压缩存在根本性限制，自适应逐token计算是更有效的方向。
AI.motivation: 系统性地揭示Transformer模型中影响压缩效果的结构性属性，识别静态后训练压缩的根本限制，并探索更有效的压缩方向。
AI.method: 在GPT-2 (124M)和Mistral 7B (7.24B)上进行40余项实验，涵盖谱压缩、块级函数替换、基于旋转的量化、激活几何分析和自适应早退策略。
AI.result: (1)高方差方向与预测方向几乎不相关(约96%)；(2)块线性仅在上游分布正确时成立；(3)权重分解为量化分量会通过交叉项放大误差；(4)线性度随深度递增(Mistral: R²从0.17到0.93)；(5)约30%的token易于计算。单块替换在末层实现34倍压缩(困惑度+1.71)，多块替换失败。
AI.conclusion: 静态后训练压缩存在根本性限制，自适应逐token计算是更有效的压缩方向。

title: IMPACT-CYCLE: A Contract-Based Multi-Agent System for Claim-Level Supervisory Correction of Long-Video Semantic Memory
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, code are available at https://github.com/MKong17/IMPACT_CYCLE
summary: Correcting errors in long-video understanding is disproportionately costly: existing multimodal pipelines produce opaque, end-to-end outputs that expose no intermediate state for inspection, forcing annotators to revisit raw video and reconstruct temporal logic from scratch. The core bottleneck is not generation quality alone, but the absence of a supervisory interface through which human effort can be proportional to the scope of each error. We present IMPACT-CYCLE, a supervisory multi-agent system that reformulates long-video understanding as iterative claim-level maintenance of a shared semantic memory -- a structured, versioned state encoding typed claims, a claim dependency graph, and a provenance log. Role-specialized agents operating under explicit authority contracts decompose verification into local object-relation correctness, cross-temporal consistency, and global semantic coherence, with corrections confined to structurally dependent claims. When automated evidence is insufficient, the system escalates to human arbitration as the supervisory authority with final override rights; dependency-closure re-verification then ensures correction cost remains proportional to error scope. Experiments on VidOR show substantially improved downstream reasoning (VQA: 0.71 to 0.79) and a 4.8x reduction in human arbitration cost, with workload significantly lower than manual annotation. Code will be released at https://github.com/MKong17/IMPACT_CYCLE.

AI.tldr: IMPACT-CYCLE是一种基于多智能体协作和共享语义记忆的监督系统，通过结构化的声明维护和分层验证机制，实现长视频理解中的高效纠错，将人工仲裁成本降低4.8倍，VQA分数从0.71提升至0.79。
AI.motivation: 现有长视频理解管线产生不透明的端到端输出，无法暴露中间状态供检查，导致人工标注者需从头回顾原始视频并重建时序逻辑，纠错成本与错误范围不成比例。
AI.method: 提出IMPACT-CYCLE系统：(1) 构建共享语义记忆——包含类型化声明、声明依赖图和溯源日志的带版本结构化状态；(2) 角色专用智能体在明确权限合约下执行分层验证（局部对象关系正确性、跨时间一致性和全局语义连贯性）；(3) 纠错限定在结构依赖的声明范围内；(4) 自动化证据不足时升级至人类仲裁，通过依赖闭包重验证确保纠错成本与错误范围成比例。
AI.result: 在VidOR数据集上，VQA从0.71提升至0.79，人工仲裁成本降低4.8倍，工作量显著低于人工标注。
AI.conclusion: IMPACT-CYCLE通过结构化语义记忆和分层验证机制，有效解决了长视频理解中纠错成本高的问题，实现了纠错成本与错误范围的比例性，显著提升了下游推理性能并降低了人工干预成本。

title: Adaptive Test-Time Compute Allocation with Evolving In-Context Demonstrations
summary: While scaling test-time compute can substantially improve model performance, existing approaches either rely on static compute allocation or sample from fixed generation distributions. In this work, we introduce a test-time compute allocation framework that jointly adapts where computation is spent and how generation is performed. Our method begins with a warm-up phase that identifies easy queries and assembles an initial pool of question-response pairs from the test set itself. An adaptive phase then concentrates further computation on unresolved queries while reshaping their generation distributions through evolving in-context demonstrations -- conditioning each generation on successful responses from semantically related queries rather than resampling from a fixed distribution. Experiments across math, coding, and reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms existing baselines while consuming substantially less inference-time compute.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应测试时计算分配框架，通过预热阶段识别简单问题并构建初始问答池，然后在自适应阶段对未解决查询集中计算资源，并利用语义相关的成功响应重构生成分布，在数学、编码和推理基准上以更少的推理计算实现了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时计算方法要么采用静态计算分配，要么从固定生成分布中采样，缺乏对计算分配和生成过程的联合自适应调整能力，导致计算效率低下。
AI.method: 1) 预热阶段：识别简单查询并构建初始问答池；2) 自适应阶段：对未解决查询集中计算，通过语义相关的成功示例作为上下文演示来动态重构生成分布，而非从固定分布重新采样。
AI.result: 在数学、编码和推理基准上，该方法以显著更少的推理计算量一致优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合自适应计算分配和生成分布塑造是提升测试时计算效率的有效范式。

title: Safer Trajectory Planning with CBF-guided Diffusion Model for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles
summary: Safe and agile trajectory planning is essential for autonomous systems, especially during complex aerobatic maneuvers. Motivated by the recent success of diffusion models in generative tasks, this paper introduces AeroTrajGen, a novel framework for diffusion-based trajectory generation that incorporates control barrier function (CBF)-guided sampling during inference, specifically designed for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). The proposed CBF-guided sampling addresses two critical challenges: (1) mitigating the inherent unpredictability and potential safety violations of diffusion models, and (2) reducing reliance on extensively safety-verified training data. During the reverse diffusion process, CBF-based guidance ensures collision-free trajectories by seamlessly integrating safety constraint gradients with the diffusion model's score function. The model features an obstacle-aware diffusion transformer architecture with multi-modal conditioning, including trajectory history, obstacles, maneuver styles, and goal, enabling the generation of smooth, highly agile trajectories across 14 distinct aerobatic maneuvers. Trained on a dataset of 2,000 expert demonstrations, AeroTrajGen is rigorously evaluated in simulation under multi-obstacle environments. Simulation results demonstrate that CBF-guided sampling reduces collision rates by 94.7% compared to unguided diffusion baselines, while preserving trajectory agility and diversity. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/RoboticsPolyu/CBF-DMP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AeroTrajGen框架，利用扩散模型结合控制障碍函数（CBF）引导采样，为无人机生成安全、敏捷的特技轨迹，在仿真中碰撞率降低94.7%。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在轨迹生成中具有不可预测性和潜在安全违规风险，且依赖大量经过安全验证的训练数据；现有方法难以在保证敏捷性的同时确保碰撞安全。
AI.method: 提出CBF引导采样的扩散模型框架，在逆向扩散过程中将安全约束梯度与扩散模型的得分函数无缝融合；采用障碍物感知的扩散Transformer架构，支持多模态条件输入（轨迹历史、障碍物、机动风格、目标）。
AI.result: 在2000条专家演示数据集上训练，多障碍物仿真环境中，CBF引导采样相比无引导扩散基线碰撞率降低94.7%，同时保持轨迹的敏捷性和多样性。
AI.conclusion: CBF引导扩散模型在无人机特技轨迹生成中能有效平衡安全性与敏捷性，减少对安全验证数据的依赖，为复杂机动场景下的自主系统轨迹规划提供了可行方案。

title: Improving clinical interpretability of linear neuroimaging models through feature whitening
summary: Linear models are widely used in computational neuroimaging to identify biomarkers associated with brain pathologies. However, interpreting the learned weights remains challenging, as they do not always yield clinically meaningful insights. This difficulty arises in part from the inherent correlation between brain regions, which causes linear weights to reflect shared rather than region-specific contributions. In particular, some groups of regions, including homologous structures in the left and right hemispheres, are known to exhibit strong anatomical correlations. In this work, we leverage this prior neuroanatomical knowledge to introduce a whitening approach applied to groups of regions with known shared variance, designed to disentangle overlapping information across correlated brain measures. We additionally propose a regularized variant that allows controlled tuning of the degree of decorrelation. We evaluate this method using region-of-interest features in two psychiatric classification tasks, distinguishing individuals with bipolar disorder or schizophrenia from healthy controls. Importantly, unlike PCA or ICA which use whitening as a dimensionality reduction step, our approach decorrelates anatomically informed pairs of neuroanatomical regions while retaining the full input signal, making it specifically suited for feature interpretation rather than feature selection. Our findings demonstrate that whitening improves the interpretability of model weights while preserving predictive performance, providing a robust framework for linking linear model outputs to neurobiological mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于先验神经解剖学知识的白化方法，对已知具有共享方差的脑区组（如左右半球同源结构）进行去相关处理，以提升线性模型权重的可解释性，同时保持预测性能。在双相情感障碍和精神分裂症分类任务中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 线性模型在计算神经影像学中被广泛用于识别与脑病理相关的生物标志物，但学到的权重往往难以提供临床上有意义的解释，这主要是因为脑区之间存在固有相关性，导致权重反映的是共享而非区域特异性贡献。
AI.method: 利用先验神经解剖学知识，对具有已知共享方差的脑区组（如左右半球同源结构）应用白化方法以解缠重叠信息；同时提出正则化变体以可控方式调节去相关程度。与PCA或ICA不同，该方法不解耦为降维步骤，而是保留全部输入信号，专门面向特征解释。
AI.result: 在双相情感障碍和精神分裂症与健康对照的分类任务中，白化方法提升了模型权重的可解释性，同时保持了预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为将线性模型输出与神经生物学机制关联提供了稳健框架，特别适用于特征解释而非特征选择场景。

title: Pairing Regularization for Mitigating Many-to-One Collapse in GANs
summary: Mode collapse remains a fundamental challenge in training generative adversarial networks (GANs). While existing works have primarily focused on inter-mode collapse, such as mode dropping, intra-mode collapse-where many latent variables map to the same or highly similar outputs-has received significantly less attention. In this work, we propose a pairing regularizer jointly optimized with the generator to mitigate the many-to-one collapse by enforcing local consistency between latent variables and generated samples. We show that the effect of pairing regularization depends on the dominant failure mode of training. In collapse-prone regimes with limited exploration, pairing encourages structured local exploration, leading to improved coverage and higher recall. In contrast, under stabilized training with sufficient exploration, pairing refines the generator's induced data density by discouraging redundant mappings, thereby improving precision without sacrificing recall. Extensive experiments on both toy distributions and real-image benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed regularizer effectively complements existing stabilization techniques by directly addressing intra-mode collapse.

AI.tldr: 针对GANs中未被充分研究的"模内坍塌"问题（多个潜变量映射到相同或高度相似的输出），本文提出了一种配对正则化方法，通过在潜变量和生成样本之间施加局部一致性约束来缓解多对一映射问题。该方法在不同训练模式下效果不同：在坍塌易发、探索不足时促进结构化局部探索以提升召回率；在稳定训练、探索充分时通过减少冗余映射提升精确率而不牺牲召回率。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN研究主要关注"模间坍塌"（如模式丢弃），而对"模内坍塌"（多个潜变量映射到相同或高度相似的输出）关注不足。作者旨在解决这一被忽视但同样关键的问题。
AI.method: 提出一种配对正则化项，与生成器联合优化，通过在潜变量与生成样本之间施加局部一致性来抑制多对一的映射坍塌。
AI.result: 配对正则化的效果取决于训练的主导失败模式：在坍塌易发、探索有限的场景下，配对正则化促进结构化局部探索，提升覆盖率和召回率；在训练稳定、探索充分的场景下，通过抑制冗余映射提高精确率且不牺牲召回率。
AI.conclusion: 广泛的玩具分布和真实图像基准实验表明，该正则化器能有效补充现有稳定化技术，直接针对模内坍塌问题发挥作用。

title: FLASH: Fast Learning via GPU-Accelerated Simulation for High-Fidelity Deformable Manipulation in Minutes
summary: Simulation frameworks such as Isaac Sim have enabled scalable robot learning for locomotion and rigid-body manipulation; however, contact-rich simulation remains a major bottleneck for deformable object manipulation. The continuously changing geometry of soft materials, together with large numbers of vertices and contact constraints, makes it difficult to achieve high accuracy, speed, and stability required for large-scale interactive learning. We present FLASH, a GPU-native simulation framework for contact-rich deformable manipulation, built on an accurate NCP-based solver that enforces strict contact and deformation constraints while being explicitly designed for fine-grained GPU parallelism. Rather than porting conventional single-instruction-multiple-data (SIMD) solvers to GPUs, FLASH redesigns the physics engine from the ground up to leverage modern GPU architectures, including optimized collision handling and memory layouts. As a result, FLASH scales to over 3 million degrees of freedom at 30 FPS on a single RTX 5090, while accurately simulating physical interactions. Policies trained solely on FLASH-generated synthetic data in minutes achieve robust zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, which we validate on physical robots performing challenging deformable manipulation tasks such as towel folding and garment folding, without any real-world demonstration, providing a practical alternative to labor-intensive real-world data collection.

AI.tldr: FLASH是一个基于GPU的原生仿真框架，专为接触丰富的可变形物体操作设计，采用NCP求解器实现严格接触与变形约束，在单张RTX 5090上支持300万自由度@30FPS，生成的仿真数据训练的策略可零样本迁移到真实机器人完成毛巾折叠等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有仿真框架（如Isaac Sim）在刚体操作和 locomotion 上表现良好，但接触丰富的可变形物体操作仿真因软材料几何不断变化、顶点和接触约束数量庞大，难以同时满足大规模交互学习所需的高精度、高速度和高稳定性。
AI.method: FLASH从零设计GPU原生物理引擎，基于NCP（非线性互补问题）求解器强制执行严格的接触与变形约束，并针对现代GPU架构优化碰撞处理和内存布局，而非简单将传统SIMD求解器移植到GPU。
AI.result: 在单张RTX 5090上，FLASH可扩展到超过300万自由度并以30 FPS运行；仅使用FLASH生成的合成数据训练几分钟的策略，即可在物理机器人上实现零样本的sim-to-real迁移，成功完成毛巾折叠和衣物折叠等挑战性任务。
AI.conclusion: FLASH为可变形物体操作提供了实用的替代方案，无需真实世界演示即可实现从仿真到真实的有效迁移，避免了劳动密集型的真实数据收集。

title: GRPO-VPS: Enhancing Group Relative Policy Optimization with Verifiable Process Supervision for Effective Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has advanced the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) by leveraging direct outcome verification instead of learned reward models. Building on this paradigm, Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) eliminates the need for critic models but suffers from indiscriminate credit assignment for intermediate steps, which limits its ability to identify effective reasoning strategies and incurs overthinking. In this work, we introduce a model-free and verifiable process supervision via probing the model's belief in the correct answer throughout its reasoning trajectory. By segmenting the generation into discrete steps and tracking the conditional probability of the correct answer appended at each segment boundary, we efficiently compute interpretable segment-wise progress measurements to refine GRPO's trajectory-level feedback. This approach enables more targeted and sample-efficient policy updates, while avoiding the need for intermediate supervision derived from costly Monte Carlo rollouts or auxiliary models. Experiments on mathematical and general-domain benchmarks show consistent gains over GRPO across diverse models: up to 2.6-point accuracy improvements and 13.7% reasoning-length reductions on math tasks, and up to 2.4 points and 4% on general-domain tasks, demonstrating strong generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需模型、基于可验证过程监督的强化学习方法，通过在推理轨迹中探测模型对正确答案的信念（即条件概率），实现细粒度的段级信用分配，从而改进GRPO策略。实验表明，该方法在数学和通用任务上均能提升准确率并减少推理长度。
AI.motivation: GRPO虽然消除了critic模型，但存在中间步骤的信用分配不精准（indiscriminate credit assignment）和过度思考（overthinking）问题，限制了其识别有效推理策略的能力。
AI.method: 将生成过程分段，在每个段边界处追踪正确答案的条件概率作为可解释的段级进度信号，以此细化GRPO的轨迹级反馈，实现更精准且样本高效的策略更新，无需昂贵的蒙特卡洛 rollout或辅助模型。
AI.result: 数学任务上准确率提升最多2.6个百分点，推理长度减少最多13.7%；通用任务上准确率提升最多2.4个百分点，推理长度减少最多4%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的可验证过程监督方法能有效提升GRPO的性能和效率，具有较强的泛化能力。

title: Think before Go: Hierarchical Reasoning for Image-goal Navigation
summary: Image-goal navigation steers an agent to a target location specified by an image in unseen environments. Existing methods primarily handle this task by learning an end-to-end navigation policy, which compares the similarities of target and observation images and directly predicts the actions. However, when the target is distant or lies in another room, such methods fail to extract informative visual cues, leading the agent to wander around. Motivated by the human cognitive principle that deliberate, high-level reasoning guides fast, reactive execution in complex tasks, we propose Hierarchical Reasoning Navigation (HRNav), a framework that decomposes image-goal navigation into high-level planning and low-level execution. In high-level planning, a vision-language model is trained on a self-collected dataset to generate a short-horizon plan, such as whether the agent should walk through the door or down the hallway. This downgrades the difficulty of the long-horizon task, making it more amenable to the execution part. In low-level execution, an online reinforcement learning policy is utilized to decide actions conditioned on the short-horizon plan. We also devise a novel Wandering Suppression Penalty (WSP) to further reduce the wandering problem. Together, these components form a hierarchical framework for Image-Goal Navigation. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world environments demonstrate the superiority of our method.

AI.tldr: HRNav将图像目标导航分解为高层规划（视觉语言模型生成短时计划）和低层执行（在线强化学习策略基于计划决策动作），并引入游荡抑制惩罚，在仿真和真实环境中均表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端方法在目标较远或跨房间时无法提取有效视觉线索，导致智能体游荡。受人类认知中"深思熟虑的高层推理引导快速反应执行"原理启发，提出分层推理导航框架。
AI.method: 提出HRNav框架：1）高层规划：在自收集数据集上训练视觉语言模型生成短时计划（如穿过门或沿走廊走）；2）低层执行：在线强化学习策略基于短时计划决策动作；3）游荡抑制惩罚（WSP）减少游荡问题。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境中的大量实验证明了该方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将长视距任务分解为短时计划，降低了任务难度；WSP惩罚进一步抑制了智能体游荡行为，共同形成了有效的图像目标导航分层框架。

title: A weighted angle distance on strings
comment: 31 pages, 13 figures, 3 tables. Code and experiments: https://github.com/grantmolnar/weighted-angle-distance. Patent pending
summary: We define a multi-scale metric $d_ρ$ on strings by aggregating angle distances between all $n$-gram count vectors with exponential weights $ρ^n$. We benchmark $d_ρ$ in DBSCAN clustering against edit and $n$-gram baselines, give a linear-time suffix-tree algorithm for evaluation, prove metric and stability properties (including robustness under tandem-repeat stutters), and characterize isometries.

AI.tldr: 本文定义了一种基于聚合所有n-gram计数向量之间角度距离（带指数权重ρ^n）的多尺度字符串度量d_ρ，并在DBSCAN聚类中针对编辑距离和n-gram基线进行了基准测试，提出了线性时间后缀树评估算法，证明了度量性质和稳定性（包括对串联重复滑动的鲁棒性），并刻画了等距映射。
AI.motivation: 现有字符串距离度量（如编辑距离、n-gram距离）在捕捉多尺度语义特征时存在局限性，需要一种能同时考虑不同粒度n-gram信息且具有良好理论性质的度量方法。
AI.method: 定义多尺度度量d_ρ，通过聚合所有n-gram计数向量的角度距离并赋予指数权重ρ^n实现；设计线性时间后缀树算法进行高效计算；在DBSCAN聚类中与编辑距离和n-gram基线对比验证效果。
AI.result: d_ρ在DBSCAN聚类任务中优于编辑距离和n-gram基线；线性时间算法验证了计算可行性；证明了度量性质、稳定性及对串联重复滑动的鲁棒性；完成了等距映射的分类刻画。
AI.conclusion: d_ρ是一种兼具多尺度敏感性和良好理论性质的字符串度量，适用于聚类等下游任务，其线性时间算法和鲁棒性使其具有实际应用价值。

title: Learning Whole-Body Humanoid Locomotion via Motion Generation and Motion Tracking
summary: Whole-body humanoid locomotion is challenging due to high-dimensional control, morphological instability, and the need for real-time adaptation to various terrains using onboard perception. Directly applying reinforcement learning (RL) with reward shaping to humanoid locomotion often leads to lower-body-dominated behaviors, whereas imitation-based RL can learn more coordinated whole-body skills but is typically limited to replaying reference motions without a mechanism to adapt them online from perception for terrain-aware locomotion. To address this gap, we propose a whole-body humanoid locomotion framework that combines skills learned from reference motions with terrain-aware adaptation. We first train a diffusion model on retargeted human motions for real-time prediction of terrain-aware reference motions. Concurrently, we train a whole-body reference tracker with RL using this motion data. To improve robustness under imperfectly generated references, we further fine-tune the tracker with a frozen motion generator in a closed-loop setting. The resulting system supports directional goal-reaching control with terrain-aware whole-body adaptation, and can be deployed on a Unitree G1 humanoid robot with onboard perception and computation. The hardware experiments demonstrate successful traversal over boxes, hurdles, stairs, and mixed terrain combinations. Quantitative results further show the benefits of incorporating online motion generation and fine-tuning the motion tracker for improved generalization and robustness.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合参考运动技能与地形感知自适应学习的全身人形机器人 locomotion 框架。首先训练扩散模型以实时预测地形感知参考动作，同时用强化学习训练全身参考跟踪器，并通过闭锁循环微调提升鲁棒性。系统支持定向目标控制与全身地形自适应，在 Unitree G1 机器人上成功穿越箱子、跨栏、楼梯等混合地形。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习的人形机器人运动方法要么产生下体主导的行为（奖励塑造），要么虽能学习协调的全身技能但仅限于回放参考动作，无法在线自适应地形。本文旨在弥合这一差距，实现全身协调且地形感知的人形机器人运动。
AI.method: 1) 基于重定向人体运动数据训练扩散模型，实时预测地形感知参考动作；2) 用强化学习训练全身参考跟踪器；3) 在闭环设置下使用冻结的运动生成器微调跟踪器以提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在 Unitree G1 真实机器人上成功穿越箱子、跨栏、楼梯及混合地形组合。定量结果验证了在线运动生成和微调跟踪器能显著提升泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效结合了模仿学习与地形感知自适应，使全身人形机器人 locomotion 具备在线参考运动生成与定向目标控制能力，且在复杂地形上表现出良好的泛化性和鲁棒性。

title: FurnSet: Exploiting Repeats for 3D Scene Reconstruction
summary: Single-view 3D scene reconstruction involves inferring both object geometry and spatial layout. Existing methods typically reconstruct objects independently or rely on implicit scene context, failing to exploit the repeated instances commonly present in realworld scenes. We propose FurnSet, a framework that explicitly identifies and leverages repeated object instances to improve reconstruction. Our method introduces per-object CLS tokens and a set-aware self-attention mechanism that groups identical instances and aggregates complementary observations across them, enabling joint reconstruction. We further combine scene-level and object-level conditioning to guide object reconstruction, followed by layout optimization using object point clouds with 3D and 2D projection losses for scene alignment. Experiments on 3D-Future and 3D-Front demonstrate improved scene reconstruction quality, highlighting the effectiveness of exploiting repetition for robust 3D scene reconstruction.

AI.tldr: FurnSet通过显式识别和利用重复物体实例来改进单视角3D场景重建，引入每个物体的CLS令牌和集合感知自注意力机制，结合场景级和物体级条件进行联合重建与布局优化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法独立重建物体或依赖隐式场景上下文，未能充分利用真实场景中普遍存在的重复实例信息，导致重建质量受限。
AI.method: 提出FurnSet框架，引入每个物体的CLS令牌和集合感知自注意力机制，用于分组相同实例并聚合互补观测信息；结合场景级和物体级条件指导重建；利用物体点云进行布局优化，包含3D和2D投影损失进行场景对齐。
AI.result: 在3D-Future和3D-Front数据集上取得了更优的场景重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 显式利用重复实例能够有效提升3D场景重建的鲁棒性和质量。

title: The Last Harness You'll Ever Build
summary: AI agents are increasingly deployed on complex, domain-specific workflows -- navigating enterprise web applications that require dozens of clicks and form fills, orchestrating multi-step research pipelines that span search, extraction, and synthesis, automating code review across unfamiliar repositories, and handling customer escalations that demand nuanced domain knowledge. \textbf{Each new task domain requires painstaking, expert-driven harness engineering}: designing the prompts, tools, orchestration logic, and evaluation criteria that make a foundation model effective. We present a two-level framework that automates this process. At the first level, the \textbf{Harness Evolution Loop} optimizes a worker agent's harness $\mathcal{H}$ for a single task: a Worker Agent $W_{\mathcal{H}}$ executes the task, an Evaluator Agent $V$ adversarially diagnoses failures and scores performance, and an Evolution Agent $E$ modifies the harness based on the full history of prior attempts. At the second level, the \textbf{Meta-Evolution Loop} optimizes the evolution protocol $Λ= (W_{\mathcal{H}}, \mathcal{H}^{(0)}, V, E)$ itself across diverse tasks, \textbf{learning a protocol $Λ^{(\text{best})}$ that enables rapid harness convergence on any new task -- so that adapting an agent to a novel domain requires no human harness engineering at all.} We formalize the correspondence to meta-learning and present both algorithms. The framework \textbf{shifts manual harness engineering into automated harness engineering}, and takes one step further -- \textbf{automating the design of the automation itself}.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个两层框架来自动化AI Agent的"harness"（提示词、工具、编排逻辑和评估标准）工程设计：第一层Harness Evolution Loop为单个任务优化worker agent的harness，第二层Meta-Evolution Loop跨不同任务学习最优的进化协议，使得在新领域无需任何人工harness工程即可快速适配。
AI.motivation: 当前AI Agent在复杂领域特定工作流中部署时，每个新任务领域都需要大量专业且耗费人力的harness工程（设计提示词、工具、编排逻辑和评估标准），缺乏自动化手段，严重限制了Agent快速迁移到新领域的能力。
AI.method: 提出两层框架：第一层Harness Evolution Loop包含Worker Agent（执行任务）、Evaluator Agent（对抗性诊断失败并评分）、Evolution Agent（基于完整历史修改harness）；第二层Meta-Evolution Loop跨不同任务优化进化协议Λ=(W_H, H^0, V, E)，学习最优协议使harness在新任务上快速收敛。形式化建立了与元学习的对应关系。
AI.result: 将人工harness工程转变为自动化harness工程，并进一步自动化自动化本身的设计——学习到的协议使Agent适应任何新领域时无需任何人工harness工程。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将手动harness工程转变为自动化harness工程，并更进一步——自动化了自动化本身的设计，使得在新任务领域中实现零人工harness工程成为可能。

title: A Rapid Deployment Pipeline for Autonomous Humanoid Grasping Based on Foundation Models
summary: Deploying a humanoid robot to manipulate a new object has traditionally required one to two days of effort: data collection, manual annotation, 3D model acquisition, and model training. This paper presents an end-to-end rapid deployment pipeline that integrates three foundation-model components to shorten the onboarding cycle for a new object to approximately 30 minutes: (i) Roboflow-based automatic annotation to assist in training a YOLOv8 object detector; (ii) 3D reconstruction based on Meta SAM 3D, which eliminates the need for a dedicated laser scanner; and (iii) zero-shot 6-DoF pose tracking based on FoundationPose, using the SAM~3D-generated mesh directly as the template. The estimated pose drives a Unity-based inverse kinematics planner, whose joint commands are streamed via UDP to a Unitree~G1 humanoid and executed through the Unitree SDK. We demonstrate detection accuracy of mAP@0.5 = 0.995, pose tracking precision of $σ< 1.05$ mm, and successful grasping on a real robot at five positions within the workspace. We further verify the generality of the pipeline on an automobile-window glue-application task. The results show that combining foundation models for perception with everyday imaging devices (e.g., smartphones) can substantially lower the deployment barrier for humanoid manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个端到端快速部署管线，集成三个基础模型组件（Roboflow自动标注+YOLOv8检测、Meta SAM 3D重建、FoundationPose零样本6-DoF位姿跟踪），将人形机器人操作新物体的部署时间从1-2天缩短至约30分钟，在真实机器人上实现了高精度检测（mAP@0.5=0.995）和抓取成功。
AI.motivation: 传统人形机器人操作新物体需要1-2天的部署时间（数据采集、手动标注、3D模型获取、模型训练），效率低下，亟需缩短部署周期。
AI.method: 集成三个基础模型组件：(i) Roboflow自动标注辅助训练YOLOv8目标检测器；(ii) 基于Meta SAM 3D的3D重建，无需专用激光扫描仪；(iii) 基于FoundationPose的零样本6-DoF位姿跟踪，直接使用SAM 3D生成的网格作为模板。估计的位姿驱动Unity逆运动学规划器，通过UDP将关节指令发送至Unitree G1人形机器人执行。
AI.result: 检测精度mAP@0.5=0.995，位姿跟踪精度σ<1.05mm，在工作空间内5个位置成功抓取，并在汽车车窗涂胶任务中验证了泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 结合基础模型进行感知与日常成像设备（如智能手机）可大幅降低人形机器人操作任务的部署门槛。

title: pAI/MSc: ML Theory Research with Humans on the Loop
summary: We present pAI/MSc, an open-source, customizable, modular multi-agent system for academic research workflows. Our goal is not autonomous scientific ideation, nor fully automated research. It is narrower and more practical: to reduce by orders of magnitude the human steering required to turn a specified hypothesis into a literature-grounded, mathematically established, experimentally supported, submission-oriented manuscript draft. pAI/MSc is built with a current emphasis on machine learning theory and adjacent quantitative fields.

AI.tldr: pAI/MSc是一个开源、可定制、模块化的多智能体系统，旨在将指定假设转化为有文献支撑、数学建立、实验支持、可投稿的手稿草稿，大幅减少人工指导需求，目前重点支持机器学习理论及相邻定量领域。
AI.motivation: 现有AI科研系统要么追求完全自主科学发现，要么过于局限；本文旨在填补中间地带——在假设已经明确的情况下，大幅降低将假设转化为完整学术手稿所需的人工干预量，提升研究效率。
AI.method: 构建开源、可定制、模块化的多智能体系统pAI/MSc，通过多个协作智能体分工完成文献检索、数学推导、实验验证和论文撰写等任务，以模块化设计支持灵活扩展。
AI.result: 实现了将指定假设转化为包含文献支撑、数学建立、实验支持、可直接投稿格式的手稿草稿，且人工指导需求降低了数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: pAI/MSc在学术研究流程中提供了一种实用的中间路线——既非完全自动化也非纯粹人工，而是通过多智能体协作显著降低从假设到成稿的人力成本，特别适用于机器学习理论及定量领域。

title: Energy-Based Open-Set Active Learning for Object Classification
comment: To be published in the 2026 International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR)
summary: Active learning (AL) has emerged as a crucial methodology for minimizing labeling costs in deep learning by selecting the most valuable samples from a pool of unlabeled data for annotation. Traditional AL operates under a closed-set assumption, where all classes in the dataset are known and consistent. However, real-world scenarios often present open-set conditions in which unlabeled data contains both known and unknown classes. In such environments, standard AL techniques struggle. They can mistakenly query samples from unknown categories, leading to inefficient use of annotation budgets. In this paper, we propose a novel dual-stage energy-based framework for open-set AL. Our method employs two specialized energy-based models (EBMs). The first, an energy-based known/unknown separator, filters out samples likely to belong to unknown classes. The second, an energy-based sample scorer, assesses the informativeness of the filtered known samples. Using the energy landscape, our models distinguish between data points from known and unknown classes in the unlabeled pool by assigning lower energy to known samples and higher energy to unknown samples, ensuring that only samples from classes of interest are selected for labeling. By integrating these components, our approach ensures efficient and targeted sample selection, maximizing learning impact in each iteration. Experiments on 2D (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, TinyImageNet) and 3D (ModelNet40) object classification benchmarks demonstrates that our framework outperforms existing approaches, achieving superior annotation efficiency and classification performance in open-set environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种双阶段能量基框架用于开放集主动学习，通过能量基已知/未知分离器和能量基样本评分器，在标注预算有限的情况下高效筛选已知类别的有价值样本进行标注，实验证明在2D和3D基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统主动学习在封闭集假设下有效，但现实场景中未标注数据常包含未知类别，导致标准AL方法会错误查询未知类样本，浪费标注预算。
AI.method: 提出双阶段能量基框架：第一阶段用能量基已知/未知分离器过滤未知类样本（已知样本能量低，未知样本能量高）；第二阶段用能量基样本评分器评估过滤后已知样本的信息量，确保只选择感兴趣类别的样本进行标注。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、TinyImageNet（2D）和ModelNet40（3D）基准上，所提框架在标注效率和分类性能上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 双阶段能量基框架能够有效应对开放集环境下的主动学习挑战，通过能量景观区分已知与未知类别，实现高效且精准的样本选择，最大化每次迭代的学习收益。

title: Value-Conflict Diagnostics Reveal Widespread Alignment Faking in Language Models
comment: Under submission at COLM 2026 Won the Best Student Paper Award at MSLD 2026 @ UIUC
summary: Alignment faking, where a model behaves aligned with developer policy when monitored but reverts to its own preferences when unobserved, is a concerning yet poorly understood phenomenon, in part because current diagnostic tools remain limited. Prior diagnostics rely on highly toxic and clearly harmful scenarios, causing most models to refuse immediately. As a result, models never deliberate over developer policy, monitoring conditions, or the consequences of non-compliance, making these diagnostics fundamentally unable to detect alignment faking propensity. To support study of this phenomenon, we first introduce VLAF, a diagnostic framework grounded in the hypothesis that alignment faking is most likely when developer policy conflicts with a model's strongly held values. VLAF uses morally unambiguous scenarios to probe this conflict across diverse moral values, bypassing refusal behavior while preserving meaningful deliberative stakes. Using VLAF, we find that alignment faking is substantially more prevalent than previously reported, occurring in models as small as 7B parameters - with olmo2-7b-instruct faking alignment in 37% of cases.Finally, we show that oversight conditions induce activation shifts that lie along a single direction in representation space. This means the behavioral divergence driving alignment faking can be captured by a single contrastive steering vector, which we exploit for lightweight inference-time mitigation. Finally, we exploit this for mitigation that requires no labeled data and minimal computational overhead, achieving relative reductions in alignment faking of 85.8%, 94.0%, and 57.7% on olmo2-7b-instruct, olmo2-13b-instruct, and qwen3-8b respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLAF诊断框架，发现对齐伪装现象比以往报告的更普遍，即使在70亿参数的小模型中也会出现，并利用表征空间中的单一对比转向向量实现了轻量级的缓解方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐伪装诊断工具局限于高度有毒的明显有害场景，导致模型立即拒绝，无法考察模型对开发者政策、监控条件和违规后果的深思熟虑过程，因此无法检测对齐伪装倾向。
AI.method: 提出VLAF框架，基于开发者政策与模型强烈持有的价值观冲突时最易发生对齐伪装的假设，使用道德上明确的场景探查不同道德价值观下的冲突，绕过拒绝行为同时保留有意义的权衡后果。并发现监督条件引起的激活偏移在表征空间中沿单一方向分布，构建对比转向向量用于推理阶段缓解。
AI.result: 对齐伪装比以往报告更普遍，olmo2-7b-instruct在37%的案例中伪装对齐。使用单一对比转向向量进行缓解，在olmo2-7b-instruct、olmo2-13b-instruct和qwen3-8b上分别实现85.8%、94.0%和57.7%的相对降低。
AI.conclusion: 对齐伪装现象比已知更广泛存在，可通过表征空间中的简单方向进行检测与缓解，无需标注数据和大量计算开销。

title: Seeing Isn't Believing: Mitigating Belief Inertia via Active Intervention in Embodied Agents
summary: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have enabled agents to tackle complex embodied tasks through environmental interaction. However, these agents still make suboptimal decisions and perform ineffective actions, as they often overlook critical environmental feedback that differs from their internal beliefs. Through a formal probing analysis, we characterize this as belief inertia, a phenomenon where agents stubbornly adhere to prior beliefs despite explicit observations. To address this, we advocate active belief intervention, moving from passive understanding to active management. We introduce the Estimate-Verify-Update (EVU) mechanism, which empowers agents to predict expected outcomes, verify them against observations through explicit reasoning, and actively update prior beliefs based on the verification evidence. EVU is designed as a unified intervention mechanism that generates textual belief states explicitly, and can be integrated into both prompting-based and training-based agent reasoning methods. Extensive experiments across three embodied benchmarks demonstrate that EVU consistently yields substantial gains in task success rates. Further analyses validate that our approach effectively mitigates belief inertia, advancing the development of more robust embodied agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/WangHanLinHenry/EVU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出估计-验证-更新（EVU）机制，通过主动信念干预来解决大型语言模型智能体在具身任务中因忽视环境反馈而产生的信念惯性问题，在三个基准上显著提升任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的智能体在具身任务中常因忽视与内部信念不一致的环境反馈而做出次优决策和无效行动，作者通过形式化探测分析将这一问题表征为"信念惯性"（belief inertia）。
AI.method: 提出EVU（Estimate-Verify-Update）机制：1) Estimate：预测预期结果；2) Verify：通过显式推理将预测与观测对比验证；3) Update：基于验证证据主动更新先验信念。该机制生成显式文本信念状态，可集成到基于提示和基于训练两种推理方法中。
AI.result: 在三个具身基准任务上的实验表明，EVU持续显著提升任务成功率；进一步分析验证了该方法有效缓解了信念惯性。
AI.conclusion: EVU作为统一的主动信念干预机制，能够有效克服具身智能体中的信念惯性，推动更鲁棒的具身智能体发展。

title: PASTA: A Patch-Agnostic Twofold-Stealthy Backdoor Attack on Vision Transformers
summary:
Vision Transformers (ViTs) have achieved remarkable success across vision tasks, yet recent studies show they remain vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Existing patch-wise attacks typically assume a single fixed trigger location during inference to maximize trigger attention. However, they overlook the self-attention mechanism in ViTs, which captures long-range dependencies across patches. In this work, we observe that a patch-wise trigger can achieve high attack effectiveness when activating backdoors across neighboring patches, a phenomenon we term the Trigger Radiating Effect (TRE). We further find that inter-patch trigger insertion during training can synergistically enhance TRE compared to single-patch insertion. Prior ViT-specific attacks that maximize trigger attention often sacrifice visual and attention stealthiness, making them detectable.
  Based on these insights, we propose PASTA, a twofold stealthy patch-wise backdoor attack in both pixel and attention domains. PASTA enables backdoor activation when the trigger is placed at arbitrary patches during inference. To achieve this, we introduce a multi-location trigger insertion strategy to enhance TRE. However, preserving stealthiness while maintaining strong TRE is challenging, as TRE is weakened under stealthy constraints. We therefore formulate a bi-level optimization problem and propose an adaptive backdoor learning framework, where the model and trigger iteratively adapt to each other to avoid local optima. Extensive experiments show that PASTA achieves 99.13% attack success rate across arbitrary patches on average, while significantly improving visual and attention stealthiness (144.43x and 18.68x) and robustness (2.79x) against state-of-the-art ViT defenses across four datasets, outperforming CNN- and ViT-based baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PASTA，一种针对ViT的隐蔽后门攻击方法。观察到补丁触发器可跨邻近补丁激活后门（触发辐射效应TRE），并利用多位置触发器插入策略增强TRE。通过双层优化和自适应后门学习框架，实现任意位置触发即可激活后门，同时显著提升像素域和注意力域的隐蔽性。实验表明PASTA在四个数据集上平均ASR达99.13%，隐蔽性和鲁棒性大幅优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有针对ViT的后门攻击通常假设推理时触发器位于固定位置以最大化注意力，但忽视了ViT自注意力机制捕获跨补丁长距离依赖的特性。同时，现有攻击在追求触发器注意力最大化时牺牲了视觉和注意力隐蔽性，容易被检测。作者希望利用ViT自注意力的特性设计一种既隐蔽又可在任意位置触发后门的攻击方法。
AI.method: 首先发现补丁触发器可跨邻近补丁激活后门的"触发辐射效应(TRE)"，并提出多位置触发器插入训练策略协同增强TRE。在此基础上设计PASTA：在像素域和注意力域进行双重隐蔽优化；采用双层优化问题建模，提出自适应后门学习框架，使模型和触发器在训练过程中迭代相互适应以避免局部最优，从而在保持隐蔽性的同时维持强TRE。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上，PASTA平均攻击成功率99.13%（任意补丁位置）；相比SOTA方法，视觉隐蔽性提升144.43倍，注意力隐蔽性提升18.68倍，鲁棒性提升2.79倍；优于CNN和ViT基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种针对ViT的隐蔽且灵活的补丁级后门攻击方法PASTA，利用触发辐射效应和多位置训练实现任意位置触发，通过自适应学习框架平衡了隐蔽性与攻击有效性，在多个指标上显著超越现有方法。

title: Breaking MCP with Function Hijacking Attacks: Novel Threats for Function Calling and Agentic Models
summary: The growth of agentic AI has drawn significant attention to function calling Large Language Models (LLMs), which are designed to extend the capabilities of AI-powered system by invoking external functions. Injection and jailbreaking attacks have been extensively explored to showcase the vulnerabilities of LLMs to user prompt manipulation. The expanded capabilities of agentic models introduce further vulnerabilities via their function calling interface. Recent work in LLM security showed that function calling can be abused, leading to data tampering and theft, causing disruptive behavior such as endless loops, or causing LLMs to produce harmful content in the style of jailbreaking attacks. This paper introduces a novel function hijacking attack (FHA) that manipulates the tool selection process of agentic models to force the invocation of a specific, attacker-chosen function. While existing attacks focus on semantic preference of the model for function-calling tasks, we show that FHA is largely agnostic to the context semantics and robust to the function sets, making it applicable across diverse domains. We further demonstrate that FHA can be trained to produce universal adversarial functions, enabling a single attacked function to hijack tool selection across multiple queries and payload configurations. We conducted experiments on 5 different models, including instructed and reasoning variants, reaching 70% to 100% ASR over the established BFCL dataset. Our findings further demonstrate the need for strong guardrails and security modules for agentic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对智能体模型函数调用过程的函数劫持攻击（FHA），该攻击通过操纵工具选择过程迫使模型调用攻击者指定的函数。FHA对上下文语义不敏感且对函数集鲁棒，可生成通用对抗函数，在5种模型上达到70%-100%的攻击成功率（ASR）。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已展示了函数调用接口存在被滥用的风险（如数据篡改、窃取、无限循环、生成有害内容），但缺乏针对工具选择过程的定向操控攻击方法。本文旨在填补这一空白，揭示函数调用过程中被忽视的安全漏洞。
AI.method: 提出函数劫持攻击（FHA），通过操纵智能体模型的工具选择过程，强制模型调用攻击者指定的函数。FHA不依赖上下文语义，对函数集具有鲁棒性，并可训练生成通用对抗函数，使其能跨多个查询和负载配置保持不变地劫持工具选择。
AI.result: 在5种不同模型（包括指令型与推理型变体）上基于BFCL数据集进行实验，攻击成功率（ASR）达到70%至100%。
AI.conclusion: FHA攻击揭示了智能体系统函数调用接口的严重安全漏洞，强调了在智能体系统中部署强有力防护措施和安全模块的必要性。

title: MM-Hand: A 21-DOF Multi-modal Modular Dexterous Robotic Hand with Remote Actuation
summary: High-DOF dexterous hands require compact actuation, rich sensing, and reliable thermal behavior, but conventional designs often occupy valuable in-hand space, increase end-effector mass, and suffer from heat accumulation near the hand. Remote tendon-driven actuation offers an alternative by relocating motors to the robot base or an external motor hub, thereby freeing the fingers and palm for additional degrees of freedom, sensing modules, and maintainable mechanical structures. This paper presents MM-Hand, a 21-DOF Multimodal Modular dexterous hand based on remote tendon-driven actuation. The hand integrates spring-return tendon-driven fingers, modular 3D-printed finger and palm structures, quick tendon connectors for maintenance, and a multimodal sensing system including joint angle sensors, tactile sensors, motor-side feedback, and in-palm stereo vision. We further analyze tendon-sheath length variation and friction loss to guide the design of the routing, motor hub, and closed-loop joint control. Experiments validate the transmission, output force, sensing, and control capability of the system. The fingertip force reaches 25N under a 1m remote sheath transmission, demonstrating practical load capacity despite long-distance tendon routing. Closed-loop joint-level experiments further evaluate command tracking with a static arm and during arm motion. These results show that MM-Hand provides a lightweight, sensor-rich, and maintainable hardware platform for dexterous manipulation research. To support the community, all hardware designs and software frameworks are made fully open-source at https://mmlab.hk/research/MM-Hand.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MM-Hand，一种基于远程腱驱动、具备21个自由度、集成多模态感知的模块化灵巧手，通过弹簧复位腱驱动手指、模块化3D打印结构、快速腱连接器和多模态传感系统（关节角度、触觉、电机反馈、掌内立体视觉）实现轻量化、高可维护性的灵巧操作平台，并在1米远程鞘管传输下达到25N指尖力。所有设计已开源。
AI.motivation: 高自由度灵巧手需要紧凑驱动、丰富感知和可靠热管理，但传统设计占用宝贵的掌内空间、增加末端质量并导致热量积聚。远程腱驱动可解决这些问题，将电机外置以释放手指和手掌空间用于更多自由度、感知模块和可维护结构。
AI.method: 采用远程腱驱动架构（弹簧复位腱驱动手指），模块化3D打印手指和手掌结构，快速腱连接器便于维护，集成多模态传感系统（关节角度传感器、触觉传感器、电机侧反馈、掌内立体视觉），并分析腱鞘长度变化和摩擦损耗以指导布线、电机轮毂和闭环关节控制设计。
AI.result: 在1米远程鞘管传输下指尖力达到25N；闭环关节实验验证了静态手臂和手臂运动过程中的指令跟踪能力；系统实现了轻量化、传感器丰富且可维护的硬件平台。
AI.conclusion: MM-Hand为灵巧操作研究提供了轻量、感知丰富且可维护的硬件平台，所有设计和软件均已开源发布。

title: Gaussians on a Diet: High-Quality Memory-Bounded 3D Gaussian Splatting Training
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized novel view synthesis with high-quality rendering through continuous aggregations of millions of 3D Gaussian primitives. However, it suffers from a substantial memory footprint, particularly during training due to uncontrolled densification, posing a critical bottleneck for deployment on memory-constrained edge devices. While existing methods prune redundant Gaussians post-training, they fail to address the peak memory spikes caused by the abrupt growth of Gaussians early in the training process. To solve the training memory consumption problem, we propose a systematic memory-bounded training framework that dynamically optimizes Gaussians through iterative growth and pruning. In other words, the proposed framework alternates between incremental pruning of low-impact Gaussians and strategic growing of new primitives with an adaptive Gaussian compensation, maintaining a near-constant low memory usage while progressively refining rendering fidelity. We comprehensively evaluate the proposed training framework on various real-world datasets under strict memory constraints, showing significant improvements over existing state-of-the-art methods. Particularly, our proposed method practically enables memory-efficient 3DGS training on NVIDIA Jetson AGX Xavier, achieving similar visual quality with up to 80% lower peak training memory consumption than the original 3DGS.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种内存受限的3D高斯泼溅训练框架，通过迭代剪枝和增长机制动态优化高斯原语，在保持近恒定低内存占用的同时逐步提升渲染质量，在NVIDIA Jetson AGX Xavier上实现最高80%的峰值训练内存降低。
AI.motivation: 3DGS在训练过程中因不受控的密集化导致内存占用剧增，成为部署在内存受限的边缘设备上的关键瓶颈。现有方法仅在训练后剪枝冗余高斯体，无法解决训练早期高斯体突然增长导致的内存峰值问题。
AI.method: 提出系统性的内存受限训练框架，通过迭代交替进行增量剪枝低影响高斯体和策略性增长新原语（带自适应高斯补偿），动态优化高斯体数量，维持近恒定低内存使用同时渐进式优化渲染保真度。
AI.result: 在多种真实数据集上严格内存约束下显著优于现有SOTA方法。在NVIDIA Jetson AGX Xavier上实现与原始3DGS相近的视觉质量，峰值训练内存降低高达80%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了3DGS训练内存消耗问题，通过动态迭代剪枝与增长机制在内存受限条件下实现了高质量渲染，为边缘设备部署提供了可行方案。

title: GaLa: Hypergraph-Guided Visual Language Models for Procedural Planning
summary: Implicit spatial relations and deep semantic structures encoded in object attributes are crucial for procedural planning in embodied AI systems. However, existing approaches often over rely on the reasoning capabilities of vision language models (VLMs) themselves, while overlooking the rich structured semantic information that can be mined from multimodal inputs. As a result, models struggle to effectively understand functional spatial relationships in complex scenes. To fully exploit implicit spatial relations and deep semantic structures in multimodal data, we propose GaLa, a vision language framework for multimodal procedural planning. GaLa introduces a hypergraph-based representation, where object instances in the image are modeled as nodes, and region-level hyperedges are constructed by aggregating objects according to their attributes and functional semantics. This design explicitly captures implicit semantic relations among objects as well as the hierarchical organization of functional regions. Furthermore, we design a TriView HyperGraph Encoder that enforces semantic consistency across the node view, area view, and node area association view via contrastive learning, enabling hypergraph semantics to be more effectively injected into downstream VLM reasoning. Extensive experiments on the ActPlan1K and ALFRED benchmarks demonstrate that GaLa significantly outperforms existing methods in terms of execution success rate, LCS, and planning correctness.

AI.tldr: GaLa提出了一种基于超图的多模态程序规划框架，通过将图像中的对象实例建模为节点，并根据属性和功能语义构建区域级超边，显式捕获隐式空间关系和深层语义结构；同时设计三视角超图编码器，利用对比学习保持节点、区域及关联视角的语义一致性，有效提升下游VLM推理能力，在ActPlan1K和ALFRED基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖VLM自身的推理能力，忽略了从多模态输入中挖掘的丰富结构化语义信息，导致模型难以有效理解复杂场景中的功能空间关系。
AI.method: 提出GaLa框架，包含超图表示（对象为节点、属性/功能语义聚合为区域级超边）和三视角超图编码器（通过对比学习保持节点视角、区域视角和节点-区域关联视角的语义一致性）。
AI.result: 在ActPlan1K和ALFRED基准上，GaLa在执行成功率、LCS和规划正确性方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模隐式空间关系和深层语义结构有助于提升多模态程序规划的推理能力，超图结构与对比学习结合能有效弥合结构化语义与VLM推理之间的鸿沟。

title: Differentially Private Clustered Federated Learning with Privacy-Preserving Initialization and Normality-Driven Aggregation
summary: Federated learning (FL) enables training of a global model while keeping raw data on end-devices. Despite this, FL has shown to leak private user information and thus in practice, it is often coupled with methods such as differential privacy (DP) and secure vector sum to provide formal privacy guarantees to its participants. In realistic cross-device deployments, the data are highly heterogeneous, so vanilla federated learning converges slowly and generalizes poorly. Clustered federated learning (CFL) mitigates this by segregating users into clusters, leading to lower intra-cluster data heterogeneity. Nevertheless, coupling CFL with DP remains challenging: the injected DP noise makes individual client updates excessively noisy, and the server is unable to initialize cluster centroids with the less noisy aggregated updates. To address this challenge, we propose PINA, a two-stage framework that first lets each client fine-tune a lightweight low-rank adaptation (LoRA) adapter and privately share a compressed sketch of the update. The server leverages these sketches to construct robust cluster centroids. In the second stage, PINA introduces a normality-driven aggregation mechanism that improves convergence and robustness. Our method retains the benefits of clustered FL while providing formal privacy guarantees against an untrusted server. Extensive evaluations show that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art DP-FL algorithms by an average of 2.9% in accuracy for privacy budgets (epsilon in {2, 8}).

AI.tldr: 提出PINA框架，通过LoRA适配器压缩客户端更新为草图，结合正常性驱动聚合机制，在聚类联邦学习中实现差分隐私保护，在隐私预算ε∈{2,8}下平均准确率提升2.9%。
AI.motivation: 聚类联邦学习(CFL)虽能缓解数据异构问题，但与差分隐私(DP)结合时面临挑战：DP噪声使个体客户端更新过于嘈杂，服务器无法利用噪声较少的聚合更新来初始化聚类质心。
AI.method: 两阶段框架PINA：第一阶段，每个客户端微调轻量级LoRA适配器，并私密共享更新的压缩草图，服务器利用这些草图构建鲁棒的聚类质心；第二阶段，引入正常性驱动聚合机制，提升收敛性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在隐私预算ε∈{2,8}下，PINA方法在准确率上平均优于现有最先进的DP-FL算法2.9%。
AI.conclusion: PINA在保留聚类FL优势的同时，为面向不可信服务器的场景提供了形式化隐私保障，有效解决了DP与CFL结合的难题。

title: Normalizing Flows with Iterative Denoising
summary:
Normalizing Flows (NFs) are a classical family of likelihood-based methods that have received revived attention. Recent efforts such as TARFlow have shown that
  NFs are capable of achieving promising performance on image modeling tasks, making them viable alternatives to other methods such as diffusion models.
  In this work, we further advance the state of Normalizing Flow generative models by introducing iterative TARFlow (iTARFlow). Unlike diffusion models, iTARFlow maintains a fully end-to-end, likelihood-based objective during training. During sampling, it performs autoregressive generation followed by an iterative denoising procedure inspired by diffusion-style methods. Through extensive experiments, we show that iTARFlow achieves competitive performance across ImageNet resolutions of 64, 128, and 256 pixels, demonstrating its potential as a strong generative model and advancing the frontier of Normalizing Flows. In addition, we analyze the characteristic artifacts produced by iTARFlow, offering insights that may shed light on future improvements. Code is available at https://github.com/apple/ml-itarflow.

AI.tldr: 本文提出迭代TARFlow（iTARFlow），一种融合自回归生成与扩散式迭代去噪的归一化流生成模型，在ImageNet 64×64、128×128和256×256分辨率上取得竞争性表现，并分析了其特征性伪影。
AI.motivation: 推动归一化流（NFs）作为生成模型的前沿，证明其能够成为扩散模型等方法的可行替代方案，进一步提升NFs在图像建模任务上的性能。
AI.method: iTARFlow在训练时保持完全端到端的基于似然的优化目标；采样时先进行自回归生成，再执行受扩散模型启发的迭代去噪过程。
AI.result: 在ImageNet 64×64、128×128和256×256分辨率上取得竞争性性能，验证了其作为强大生成模型的潜力。
AI.conclusion: iTARFlow推进了归一化流的前沿；对其特征性伪影的分析为未来改进提供了洞见。

title: FluSplat: Sparse-View 3D Editing without Test-Time Optimization
summary:
Recent advances in text-guided image editing and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled high-quality 3D scene manipulation. However, existing pipelines rely on iterative edit-and-fit optimization at test time, alternating between 2D diffusion editing and 3D reconstruction. This process is computationally expensive, scene-specific, and prone to cross-view inconsistencies.
  We propose a feed-forward framework for cross-view consistent 3D scene editing from sparse views. Instead of enforcing consistency through iterative 3D refinement, we introduce a cross-view regularization scheme in the image domain during training. By jointly supervising multi-view edits with geometric alignment constraints, our model produces view-consistent results without per-scene optimization at inference. The edited views are then lifted into 3D via a feedforward 3DGS model, yielding a coherent 3DGS representation in a single forward pass.
  Experiments demonstrate competitive editing fidelity and substantially improved cross-view consistency compared to optimization-based methods, while reducing inference time by orders of magnitude.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种前馈式的3D场景编辑框架，通过训练时的跨视图正则化实现视图一致性，无需逐场景优化即可从稀疏视图生成一致的3DGS表示，推理速度比现有优化方法快数个数量级。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本引导的3D场景编辑方法依赖迭代式的编辑-拟合优化过程，计算成本高、场景特定且容易出现跨视图不一致问题。
AI.method: 提出前馈式框架：1) 在训练阶段引入跨视图正则化方案，通过几何对齐约束联合监督多视图编辑；2) 推理时直接将编辑后的视图通过前馈式3DGS模型提升为一致的3DGS表示，无需逐场景优化。
AI.result: 在编辑保真度上与优化方法相当，跨视图一致性显著提升，推理时间减少数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 证明了通过训练阶段的跨视图正则化替代推理时的迭代优化，能够高效实现跨视图一致的3D场景编辑。

title: Planning Smooth and Safe Control Laws for a Unicycle Robot Among Obstacles
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the 2026 European Control Conference (ECC)
summary: This paper presents a framework for safe navigation of a unicycle point robot to a goal position in an environment populated with obstacles from almost any admissible state, considering input limits. We introduce a novel QP formulation to create a Cinfinity-smooth vector field with reduced total bending and total turning. Then we design an analytic, non-linear feedback controller that inherently satisfies the conditions of Nagumo's theorem, ensuring forward invariance of the safe set without requiring any online optimization. We have demonstrated that our controller, even under hard input limits, safely converges to the goal position. Simulations confirm the effectiveness of the proposed framework, resulting in a twice faster arrival time with over 50\% lower angular control effort compared to the baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于QP优化的光滑矢量场框架，结合满足Nagumo不变性定理的解析非线性反馈控制器，实现了受限输入下轮式机器人的安全导航，相比基线方法到达时间快2倍、角控制量降低50%以上。
AI.motivation: 针对存在障碍物和输入限制的环境中，单轮点机器人从几乎任意可行状态到目标位置的安全导航问题。
AI.method: 提出一种新的QP（二次规划）公式构造C∞光滑矢量场，降低总弯曲度和总转向角；设计解析非线性反馈控制器，天然满足Nagumo定理的正向不变性条件，无需在线优化；同时考虑硬输入约束。
AI.result: 仿真验证表明，所提框架相比基线方法到达时间快2倍，角控制量降低50%以上，且在硬输入限制下仍能安全收敛到目标位置。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的光滑矢量场与解析反馈控制器相结合，能够在输入受限条件下实现高效、低能耗的安全导航。

title: A Hierarchical MARL-Based Approach for Coordinated Retail P2P Trading and Wholesale Market Participation of DERs
summary: The ongoing shift towards decentralization of the electric energy sector, driven by the growing electrification across end-use sectors, and widespread adoption of distributed energy resources (DERs), necessitates their active participation in the electricity markets to support grid operations. Furthermore, with bi-directional energy and communication flows becoming standard, intelligent, easy-to-deploy, resource-conservative demand-side participation is expected to play a critical role in securing power grid operational flexibility and market efficiency. This work proposes a market engagement framework that leverages a hierarchical multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (MARL) approach to enable individual prosumers to participate in peer-to-peer retail auctions and further aggregate these intelligent prosumers to facilitate effective DER participation in wholesale markets. Ultimately, a Stackelberg game is proposed to coordinate this hierarchical MARL-based DER market participation framework toward enhanced market performance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于分层多智能体深度强化学习（MARL）的电力市场参与框架，使产消者能够参与点对点零售拍卖，并聚合后参与批发市场，最后通过Stackelberg博弈进行协调优化。
AI.motivation: 电力行业去中心化趋势下，分布式能源资源（DER）广泛接入，需要其主动参与电力市场以支持电网运行。同时，双向能量与信息流成为常态，亟需智能、易部署、资源节约的需求侧参与方案来保障电网灵活性和市场效率。
AI.method: 采用分层多智能体深度强化学习（MARL）方法，底层使个体产消者参与点对点零售拍卖，上层将智能产消者聚合后参与批发市场，最终引入Stackelberg博弈协调整个分层框架。
AI.result: 该框架能够有效提升分布式能源资源参与电力市场的整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的分层MARL框架结合Stackelberg博弈，为分布式能源参与零售和批发市场提供了一种有效的协调机制，有助于提升市场效率和电网灵活性。

title: Learning to count small and clustered objects with application to bacterial colonies
summary: Automated bacterial colony counting from images is an important technique to obtain data required for the development of vaccines and antibiotics. However, bacterial colonies present unique machine vision challenges that affect counting, including (1) small physical size, (2) object clustering, (3) high data annotation cost, and (4) limited cross-species generalisation. While FamNet is an established object counting technique effective for clustered objects and costly data annotation, its effectiveness for small colony sizes and cross-species generalisation remains unknown. To address the first three challenges, we propose ACFamNet, an extension of FamNet that handles small and clustered objects using a novel region of interest pooling with alignment and optimised feature engineering. To address all four challenges above, we introduce ACFamNet Pro, which augments ACFamNet with multi-head attention and residual connections, enabling dynamic weighting of objects and improved gradient flow. Experiments show that ACFamNet Pro achieves a mean normalised absolute error (MNAE) of 9.64% under 5-fold cross-validation, outperforming ACFamNet and FamNet by 2.23% and 12.71%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ACFamNet和ACFamNet Pro两种基于FamNet的改进方法，用于解决细菌菌落图像计数中的小尺寸、聚类、标注成本高和跨物种泛化四大挑战。ACFamNet Pro通过引入多头注意力和残差连接，在5折交叉验证中达到9.64%的MNAE，分别优于ACFamNet和FamNet 2.23%和12.71%。
AI.motivation: 细菌菌落自动计数对疫苗和抗生素开发至关重要，但现有方法面临小物理尺寸、对象聚类、高标注成本和跨物种泛化能力有限四大挑战。FamNet虽能处理聚类和高标注成本问题，但其对小尺寸菌落和跨物种泛化的有效性未知。
AI.method: 提出ACFamNet：在FamNet基础上引入对齐的区域兴趣池化和优化特征工程以处理小尺寸和聚类对象。进一步提出ACFamNet Pro：在ACFamNet基础上增加多头注意力和残差连接，实现对象的动态加权和梯度流改善。
AI.result: ACFamNet Pro在5折交叉验证下达到9.64%的MNAE，比ACFamNet提升2.23%，比FamNet提升12.71%。
AI.conclusion: ACFamNet Pro有效解决了细菌菌落计数的四大挑战，显著优于基线方法。

title: Escaping the Agreement Trap: Defensibility Signals for Evaluating Rule-Governed AI
comment: 22 pages, 10 figures, preprint. Research on Defensibility Index (DI), Ambiguity Index (AI), and Probabilistic Defensibility Signal (PDS) for policy-grounded evaluation of rule-governed AI in content moderation (Reddit production data)
summary: Content moderation systems are typically evaluated by measuring agreement with human labels. In rule-governed environments this assumption fails: multiple decisions may be logically consistent with the governing policy, and agreement metrics penalize valid decisions while mischaracterizing ambiguity as error - a failure mode we term the Agreement Trap. We formalize evaluation as policy-grounded correctness and introduce the Defensibility Index (DI) and Ambiguity Index (AI). To estimate reasoning stability without additional audit passes, we introduce the Probabilistic Defensibility Signal (PDS), derived from audit-model token logprobs. We harness LLM reasoning traces as a governance signal rather than a classification output by deploying the audit model not to decide whether content violates policy, but to verify whether a proposed decision is logically derivable from the governing rule hierarchy. We validate the framework on 193,000+ Reddit moderation decisions across multiple communities and evaluation cohorts, finding a 33-46.6 percentage-point gap between agreement-based and policy-grounded metrics, with 79.8-80.6% of the model's false negatives corresponding to policy-grounded decisions rather than true errors. We further show that measured ambiguity is driven by rule specificity: auditing 37,286 identical decisions under three tiers of the same community rules reduces AI by 10.8 pp while DI remains stable. Repeated-sampling analysis attributes PDS variance primarily to governance ambiguity rather than decoding noise. A Governance Gate built on these signals achieves 78.6% automation coverage with 64.9% risk reduction. Together, these results show that evaluation in rule-governed environments should shift from agreement with historical labels to reasoning-grounded validity under explicit rules.

AI.tldr: 传统内容审核评估依赖人工标签一致性，但在规则治理环境中，多个决策可能都符合政策，一致性指标会错误惩罚有效决策。本文提出以政策为基础的正确性评估框架，引入Defensibility Index (DI)、Ambiguity Index (AI)和Probabilistic Defensibility Signal (PDS)，在Reddit 19.3万+条审核数据上验证，表明评估应转向基于推理的有效性而非历史标签一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有内容审核系统评估依赖与人工标签的一致性（Agreement Trap），但在规则治理环境中，多个决策可能都逻辑符合政策，一致性指标会将合理的替代决策误判为错误，无法区分真正的错误与政策允许的多义性。
AI.method: 提出政策基础的正确性评估框架：Defensibility Index (DI)衡量决策是否可从规则层级中逻辑推导；Ambiguity Index (AI)量化规则多义性；Probabilistic Defensibility Signal (PDS)利用审计模型的token对数概率估计推理稳定性。部署审计模型验证决策的逻辑可导出性而非直接分类。
AI.result: 在193,000+条Reddit审核数据上，一致性指标与政策基础指标之间存在33-46.6个百分点的差距；模型79.8-80.6%的假阴性实际是政策基础的合理决策而非真正错误；规则层级细化可降低AI 10.8个百分点；Governance Gate实现78.6%自动化覆盖率与64.9%风险降低。
