AI.conclusion: 规则治理环境下的内容审核评估应从与历史标签的一致性转向基于明确规则的推理有效性问题。

title: Modeling, Control and Self-sensing of Dielectric Elastomer Soft Actuators: A Review
summary: Dielectric elastomer actuators (DEAs) have garnered extensive attention especially in soft robotic applications over the past few decades owing to the advantages of lightweight, large strain, fast response and high energy density. However, because the DEAs suffer from nonlinear elasticity, inherent viscoelastic creep, hysteresis and vibrational dynamics, the modeling, control and self-sensing of DEAs are challenging, thereby hindering the practical applications of DEAs. In order to address these challenges, numerous studies have been conducted. In this review, various physics-based modeling methods and phenomenological modeling methods for predicting the electromechanical response of DEAs are presented and discussed. Different control methods for DEAs are reviewed, which are classified into open-loop feedforward control, feedback control, feedforward-feedback control and adaptive feedforward control. Physics-based self-sensing methods and data-driven self-sensing methods for reconstructing the DEA displacement without the need for additional sensors are discussed. Finally, the existing problems and new opportunities for the further studies are summarized.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了介电弹性体致动器(DEA)在非线性弹性、粘弹性蠕变、迟滞和振动动力学等方面的建模、控制和自感知方法，包括物理建模与现象学建模方法、前馈/反馈/自适应控制策略，以及基于物理和数据驱动的自感知技术，并总结了当前存在的问题和未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: DEA具有轻质、大应变、快速响应和高能量密度等优势，在软体机器人领域受到广泛关注，但因其固有的非线性弹性、粘弹性蠕变、迟滞和振动动力学特性，导致建模、控制和自感知面临巨大挑战，严重阻碍了DEA的实际应用。
AI.method: 本文采用综述方法，系统梳理和讨论了：(1) 预测DEA机电响应的物理建模方法和现象学建模方法；(2) 开环前馈控制、反馈控制、前馈-反馈控制和自适应前馈控制等控制方法；(3) 基于物理模型和数据驱动的自感知方法。
AI.result: 系统归纳了DEA建模、控制和自感知领域的研究进展，明确了各类方法的优缺点和应用场景，识别了现有研究中存在的问题。
AI.conclusion: DEA在建模、控制和自感知方面仍存在诸多挑战，但同时也涌现出新的研究机遇，为未来DEA的实用化发展指明了方向。

title: Cognitive Alignment At No Cost: Inducing Human Attention Biases For Interpretable Vision Transformers
summary: For state-of-the-art image understanding, Vision Transformers (ViTs) have become the standard architecture but their processing diverges substantially from human attentional characteristics. We investigate whether this cognitive gap can be shrunk by fine-tuning the self-attention weights of Google's ViT-B/16 on human saliency fixation maps. To isolate the effects of semantically relevant signals from generic human supervision, the tuned model is compared against a shuffled control. Fine-tuning significantly improved alignment across five saliency metrics and induced three hallmark human-like biases: tuning reversed the baseline's anti-human large-object bias toward small-objects, amplified the animacy preference and diminished extreme attention entropy. Bayesian parity analysis provides decisive to very-strong evidence that this cognitive alignment comes at no cost to the model's original classification performance on in- (ImageNet), corrupted (ImageNet-C) and out-of-distribution (ObjectNet) benchmarks. An equivalent procedure applied to a ResNet-50 Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) instead degraded both alignment and accuracy, suggesting that the ViT's modular self-attention mechanism is uniquely suited for dissociating spatial priority from representational logic. These findings demonstrate that biologically grounded priors can be instilled as a free emergent property of human-aligned attention, to improve transformer interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在人类显著性注视图上微调Vision Transformer (ViT-B/16)的自注意力权重，显著提升了模型与人类注意特征的 alignment，同时保持分类性能不变；而等效方法应用于ResNet-50则导致对齐和准确率均下降，表明ViT的模块化自注意力机制独特地支持将空间优先级与表征逻辑分离。
AI.motivation: ViT虽然在图像理解中成为标准架构，但其处理方式与人类注意特征存在显著差距。作者希望探究能否通过微调自注意力权重来缩小这一认知鸿沟。
AI.method: 在人类显著性注视图上对Google的ViT-B/16进行自注意力权重的微调，并与混洗控制组对比以分离语义相关信号的影响；同时在ResNet-50 CNN上执行等效程序作为对照。
AI.result: 微调在五个显著性指标上显著提升了alignment，并诱导了三种类人类偏见（小物体偏好、动物偏好增强、极端注意力熵降低）。贝叶斯分析证明认知对齐未损害原始分类性能（ImageNet、ImageNet-C、ObjectNet）。而ResNet-50的对齐和准确率均下降。
AI.conclusion: 生物学启发的先验可以作为人类对齐注意力的自由涌现属性注入ViT，提升其可解释性，且ViT的模块化自注意力机制独特地适用于解耦空间优先级和表征逻辑。

title: SpeechParaling-Bench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Paralinguistic-Aware Speech Generation
summary: Paralinguistic cues are essential for natural human-computer interaction, yet their evaluation in Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) remains limited by coarse feature coverage and the inherent subjectivity of assessment. To address these challenges, we introduce SpeechParaling-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark for paralinguistic-aware speech generation. It expands existing coverage from fewer than 50 to over 100 fine-grained features, supported by more than 1,000 English-Chinese parallel speech queries, and is organized into three progressively challenging tasks: fine-grained control, intra-utterance variation, and context-aware adaptation. To enable reliable evaluation, we further develop a pairwise comparison pipeline, in which candidate responses are evaluated against a fixed baseline by an LALM-based judge. By framing evaluation as relative preference rather than absolute scoring, this approach mitigates subjectivity and yields more stable and scalable assessments without costly human annotation. Extensive experiments reveal substantial limitations in current LALMs. Even leading proprietary models struggle with comprehensive static control and dynamic modulation of paralinguistic features, while failure to correctly interpret paralinguistic cues accounts for 43.3% of errors in situational dialogue. These findings underscore the need for more robust paralinguistic modeling toward human-aligned voice assistants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SpeechParaling-Bench，一个覆盖100+细粒度特征的并行语音评测基准，并设计了基于成对比较的LALM评判流水线，用于评估大型音频语言模型在副语言感知生成方面的能力。实验表明当前LALM在副语言控制上存在显著局限。
AI.motivation: 现有LALM对副语言线索的评估存在特征覆盖粗粒度（少于50个）以及内在主观性问题，需要一个更全面、可靠的评估基准来推动副语言感知的人机交互发展。
AI.method: 1) 构建了覆盖100+细粒度特征、1000+中英平行语音查询的SpeechParaling-Bench基准，包含三项逐步递进的任务（细粒度控制、语内变化、上下文自适应）；2) 提出基于成对比较的评估流水线，利用LALM评判器将候选响应与固定基线进行相对偏好比较，替代绝对打分以减轻主观性。
AI.result: 当前LALM在静态控制和动态副语言特征调制上均存在显著不足；在情景对话中，43.3%的错误源于未能正确解释副语言线索。
AI.conclusion: 副语言建模需要进一步强化，以实现与人更对齐的语音助手。

title: Shepherding UAV Swarm with Action Prediction Based on Movement Constraints
summary: In this study, we propose a new sheepdog-inspired control method for a swarm of small unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), which predicts the swarm behavior while explicitly accounting for the motion constraints of real robots. Sheepdog-inspired guidance control refers to a framework in which a small number of navigator agents (sheepdog agents) indirectly drive a large number of autonomous agents (a flock of sheep agents) so as to steer the group toward a target position. In conventional studies on sheepdog-inspired guidance, both types of agents have typically been modeled as point masses, and the guidance law for the navigator agents has been designed using simple interaction vectors based on the instantaneous relative positions between the agents. However, when implementing such methods on real robots such as drones, it is necessary to consider each agent's motion constraints, including upper bounds on velocity and acceleration. Moreover, we argue that guidance can be made more efficient by predicting the future behavior of the autonomous swarm that is observable to the navigator agents. To this end, we propose a three-dimensional guidance control law based on behavior prediction of autonomous agents under motion constraints, inspired by the Dynamic Window Approach (DWA). At each control cycle, the navigator agent generates a set of feasible motion candidates that satisfy its motion constraints, and predicts the short-horizon swarm evolution using an internal model of the autonomous agents maintained within the navigator agent. The motion candidates are then evaluated according to criteria such as the progress velocity toward the target, the positioning strategy with respect to the swarm, and safety margins, and the optimal motion is selected to achieve safe and efficient guidance. Numerical simulation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed guidance control law.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受牧羊犬启发的新型无人机集群控制方法，通过考虑真实机器人的运动约束（速度和加速度上限）并预测自主集群的未来行为，基于动态窗口法（DWA）设计三维制导律，实现安全高效的集群引导。
AI.motivation: 传统牧羊犬式引导控制将智能体建模为质点，忽略真实机器人的运动约束（速度、加速度上限），且仅基于瞬时相对位置设计引导律，效率低下，难以直接部署于实际无人机系统。
AI.method: 提出基于动态窗口法（DWA）的三维制导律：在每个控制周期，导航者（牧羊犬）生成满足自身运动约束的可行运动候选，利用内置自主智能体模型预测短时域内集群演化，并根据朝向目标的进展速度、相对于集群的定位策略及安全裕度评估候选运动，选择最优策略。
AI.result: 数值仿真结果验证了所提制导律的有效性，能够实现安全高效的集群引导。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式考虑运动约束和引入行为预测，所提出的牧羊犬式控制方法能够更有效地引导真实机器人集群。

title: Amortized Vine Copulas for High-Dimensional Density and Information Estimation
summary: Modeling high-dimensional dependencies while keeping likelihoods tractable remains challenging. Classical vine-copula pipelines are interpretable but can be expensive, while many neural estimators are flexible but less structured. In this work, we propose Vine Denoising Copula (VDC), an amortized vine-copula pipeline that trains a single bivariate denoising model and reuses it across all vine edges. For each edge, given pseudo-observations, the model predicts a density grid. We then apply an IPFP/Sinkhorn projection that enforces non-negativity, unit mass, and uniform marginals. This keeps the exact vine likelihood and preserves the usual copula interpretation while replacing repeated per-edge optimization with GPU inference. Across synthetic and real-data benchmarks, VDC delivers strong bivariate density accuracy, competitive MI/TC estimation, and substantial speedups for high-dimensional vine fitting. In practice, these gains make explicit information estimation and dependence decomposition feasible at scales where repeated vine fitting would otherwise be costly, although conditional downstream inference remains mixed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Vine Denoising Copula (VDC)，通过训练单个二元去噪模型并复用于所有藤边，结合IPFP/Sinkhorn投影保持似然可处理性和藤结构可解释性，在合成和真实数据上实现高维藤拟合的显著加速，同时保持准确的二元密度估计和竞争性的MI/TC估计性能。
AI.motivation: 经典藤-连接函数管道可解释但计算昂贵，而许多神经估计器灵活但缺乏结构。现有方法无法同时兼顾可解释性、似然可处理性和计算效率。
AI.method: 提出VDC：训练单个二元去噪模型并在所有藤边上复用；对每个边，给定伪观测值预测密度网格；应用IPFP/Sinkhorn投影强制满足非负性、单位质量和均匀边缘分布，从而保持精确的藤似然和连接函数可解释性，用GPU推理替代逐边重复优化。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据基准上，VDC实现了准确的二元密度估计、竞争性的MI/TC估计，以及高维藤拟合的显著加速。这使得显式信息估计和依赖分解在传统方法计算成本高昂的规模下变得可行，但条件下游推理结果仍参差不齐。
AI.conclusion: VDC成功证明了通过摊销策略和可微投影可以桥接经典藤结构模型与现代神经方法的优势，为高维依赖建模和显式信息估计提供了实用且高效的解决方案，但条件推理方面仍需进一步改进。

title: AVISE: Framework for Evaluating the Security of AI Systems
summary: As artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly deployed across critical domains, their security vulnerabilities pose growing risks of high-profile exploits and consequential system failures. Yet systematic approaches to evaluating AI security remain underdeveloped. In this paper, we introduce AVISE (AI Vulnerability Identification and Security Evaluation), a modular open-source framework for identifying vulnerabilities in and evaluating the security of AI systems and models. As a demonstration of the framework, we extend the theory-of-mind-based multi-turn Red Queen attack into an Adversarial Language Model (ALM) augmented attack and develop an automated Security Evaluation Test (SET) for discovering jailbreak vulnerabilities in language models. The SET comprises 25 test cases and an Evaluation Language Model (ELM) that determines whether each test case was able to jailbreak the target model, achieving 92% accuracy, an F1-score of 0.91, and a Matthews correlation coefficient of 0.83. We evaluate nine recently released language models of diverse sizes with the SET and find that all are vulnerable to the augmented Red Queen attack to varying degrees. AVISE provides researchers and industry practitioners with an extensible foundation for developing and deploying automated SETs, offering a concrete step toward more rigorous and reproducible AI security evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AVISE框架，一个模块化开源工具，用于识别和评估AI系统/模型的安全漏洞。通过将基于心智理论的多轮Red Queen攻击扩展为对抗性语言模型（ALM）增强攻击，并开发自动化安全评估测试（SET），验证了框架的有效性。SET包含25个测试用例和评估语言模型（ELM），在检测越狱漏洞方面达到92%准确率、0.91 F1分数和0.83马修斯相关系数。对9个近期发布的语言模型评估显示，所有模型均不同程度易受增强型Red Queen攻击。
AI.motivation: AI系统在关键领域的广泛部署带来了日益增长的安全漏洞风险和高调利用事件的威胁，但目前缺乏系统化的AI安全评估方法。
AI.method: 提出了AVISE模块化开源框架，将Red Queen攻击扩展为ALM增强攻击，并开发了由25个测试用例和ELM组成的SET自动化评估流程。
AI.result: SET在检测越狱漏洞方面达到92%准确率、0.91 F1分数和0.83马修斯相关系数；9个近期发布的语言模型均不同程度易受攻击。
AI.conclusion: AVISE为研究人员和从业者提供了可扩展的基础，用于开发和部署自动化安全评估测试，推动AI安全评估向更严谨和可复现的方向发展。

title: ScenarioControl: Vision-Language Controllable Vectorized Latent Scenario Generation
summary: We introduce ScenarioControl, the first vision-language control mechanism for learned driving scenario generation. Given a text prompt or an input image, Scenario-Control synthesizes diverse, realistic 3D scenario rollouts - including map, 3D boxes of reactive actors over time, pedestrians, driving infrastructure, and ego camera observations. The method generates scenes in a vectorized latent space that represents road structure and dynamic agents jointly. To connect multimodal control with sparse vectorized scene elements, we propose a cross-global control mechanism that integrates crossattention with a lightweight global-context branch, enabling fine-grained control over road layout and traffic conditions while preserving realism. The method produces temporally consistent scenario rollouts from the perspectives different actors in the scene, supporting long-horizon continuation of driving scenarios. To facilitate training and evaluation, we release a dataset with text annotations aligned to vectorized map structures. Extensive experiments validate that the control adherence and fidelity of ScenarioControl compare favorable to all tested methods across all experiments. Project webpage: https://light.princeton.edu/ScenarioControl

AI.tldr: ScenarioControl是首个用于学习型驾驶场景生成的视觉-语言控制机制，能够通过文本提示或输入图像合成多样化、逼真的3D场景（包括地图、动态障碍物3D框、行人、基础设施和自车观测），采用交叉全局控制机制实现多模态控制与稀疏矢量化场景元素的连接，在保持真实感的同时对道路布局和交通状况进行精细控制。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶场景生成方法缺乏灵活的多模态控制能力，难以根据文本或图像等用户输入生成多样化且逼真的3D驾驶场景。
AI.method: 提出交叉全局控制机制（cross-global control mechanism），将交叉注意力与轻量级全局上下文分支相结合，在矢量化潜空间中对道路结构和动态智能体进行联合建模，实现多模态控制。
AI.result: 在所有测试方法中，ScenarioControl在控制依从性和保真度方面均表现优异，能够生成长时间一致的场景推演，并支持从不同智能体视角观察。
AI.conclusion: ScenarioControl在驾驶场景生成中实现了卓越的多模态控制能力和场景真实性，并配套发布了矢量化地图结构的文本标注数据集。

title: BOIL: Learning Environment Personalized Information
summary: Navigating complex environments poses challenges for multi-agent systems, requiring efficient extraction of insights from limited information. In this paper, we introduce the Blackbox Oracle Information Learning (BOIL) process, a scalable solution for extracting valuable insights from the environment structure. Leveraging the Pagerank algorithm and common information maximization, BOIL facilitates the extraction of information to guide long-term agent behavior applicable to problems such as coverage, patrolling, and stochastic reachability. Through experiments, we demonstrate the efficacy of BOIL in generating strategy distributions conducive to improved performance over extended time horizons, surpassing heuristic approaches in complex environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Blackbox Oracle Information Learning (BOIL)过程，利用PageRank算法和公共信息最大化从环境结构中提取可扩展的洞察，以指导覆盖、巡逻和随机可达性等长期多智能体行为，实验证明其在复杂环境中超越启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统在复杂环境中从有限信息中高效提取洞察以导航环境面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出BOIL过程，结合PageRank算法和公共信息最大化，从环境结构中提取可扩展的信息。
AI.result: BOIL生成的策略分布在长时间范围内优于启发式方法，在覆盖、巡逻和随机可达性等任务中表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: BOIL是一种可扩展的信息提取方法，能有效指导多智能体在复杂环境中的长期行为。

title: On Bayesian Softmax-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Models
summary: Mixture-of-experts models provide a flexible framework for learning complex probabilistic input-output relationships by combining multiple expert models through an input-dependent gating mechanism. These models have become increasingly prominent in modern machine learning, yet their theoretical properties in the Bayesian framework remain largely unexplored. In this paper, we study Bayesian mixture-of-experts models, focusing on the ubiquitous softmax-based gating mechanism. Specifically, we investigate the asymptotic behavior of the posterior distribution for three fundamental statistical tasks: density estimation, parameter estimation, and model selection. First, we establish posterior contraction rates for density estimation, both in the regimes with a fixed, known number of experts and with a random learnable number of experts. We then analyze parameter estimation and derive convergence guarantees based on tailored Voronoi-type losses, which account for the complex identifiability structure of mixture-of-experts models. Finally, we propose and analyze two complementary strategies for selecting the number of experts. Taken together, these results provide one of the first systematic theoretical analyses of Bayesian mixture-of-experts models with softmax gating, and yield several theory-grounded insights for practical model design.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了基于softmax门控机制的贝叶斯混合专家模型的理论性质，包括密度估计的后验收缩率、基于Voronoi损失的参数估计收敛性保证，以及专家数量选择策略，为贝叶斯混合专家模型提供了最早的系统性理论分析之一。
AI.motivation: 混合专家模型通过输入相关的门控机制组合多个专家模型，在现代机器学习中日益重要，但其在贝叶斯框架下的理论性质尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 针对softmax门控的贝叶斯混合专家模型，研究三个基本统计任务：密度估计（固定/随机专家数）、参数估计（基于Voronoi型损失函数的收敛性保证）和模型选择（两种互补策略）。
AI.result: 建立了密度估计的后验收缩率，推导了参数估计的收敛保证，提出了分析专家数量选择的两种策略。
AI.conclusion: 提供了贝叶斯softmax门控混合专家模型的首批系统理论分析之一，并为实际模型设计提供了若干理论指导。

title: RareSpot+: A Benchmark, Model, and Active Learning Framework for Small and Rare Wildlife in Aerial Imagery
summary: Automated wildlife monitoring from aerial imagery is vital for conservation but remains limited by two persistent challenges: the difficulty of detecting small, rare species and the high cost of large-scale expert annotation. Prairie dogs exemplify this problem -- they are ecologically important yet appear tiny, sparsely distributed, and visually indistinct from their surroundings, posing a severe challenge for conventional detection models. To overcome these limitations, we present RareSpot+, a detection framework that integrates multi-scale consistency learning, context-aware augmentation, and geospatially guided active learning to address these issues. A novel multi-scale consistency loss aligns intermediate feature maps across detection heads, enhancing localization of small (approx. 30 pixels wide) objects without architectural changes, while context-aware augmentation improves robustness by synthesizing hard, ecologically plausible examples. A geospatial active learning module exploits domain-specific spatial priors linking prairie dogs and burrows, together with test-time augmentation and a meta-uncertainty model, to reduce redundant labeling. On a 2 km^2 aerial dataset, RareSpot+ improves detection over the baseline mAP@50 by +35.2% (absolute +0.13). Cross-dataset tests on HerdNet, AED, and several other wildlife benchmarks demonstrate robust detector-level transferability. The active learning module further boosts prairie dog AP by 14.5% using an annotation budget of just 1.7% of the unlabeled tiles. Beyond detection, RareSpot+ enables spatial ecological analyses such as clustering and co-occurrence, linking vision-based detection with quantitative ecology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RareSpot+检测框架，通过多尺度一致性学习、上下文感知增强和地理空间主动学习，解决了航拍影像中小型稀有物种（以草原犬鼠为例）的检测难题，在仅需1.7%标注预算下检测AP提升14.5%，并实现了视觉检测与定量生态学的衔接。
AI.motivation: 航拍影像自动化野生动物监测在保育中至关重要，但面临两个持续挑战：小尺寸稀有物种难以检测，以及大规模专家标注成本高昂。草原犬鼠作为生态重要物种，体积小、分布稀疏、与背景视觉难以区分，对传统检测模型构成严峻挑战。
AI.method: RareSpot+框架包含三个核心模块：1）多尺度一致性学习，在检测头间对齐中间特征图以增强小目标（约30像素）定位能力，无需改变架构；2）上下文感知增强，通过合成生态学上合理的困难样本来提升鲁棒性；3）地理空间主动学习，利用草原犬鼠与洞穴之间的空间先验知识，结合测试时增强和元不确定性模型，减少冗余标注。
AI.result: 在2 km²航拍数据集上，RareSpot+相比基线mAP@50提升35.2%（绝对+0.13）。跨数据集测试（HerdNet、AED等多个野生动物基准）展示了稳健的检测器级可迁移性。主动学习模块在仅使用1.7%未标注瓦片作为标注预算的情况下，将草原犬鼠AP提升14.5%。
AI.conclusion: RareSpot+不仅提升了小目标稀有物种的检测性能，还通过聚类和共现分析等空间生态分析，将基于视觉的检测与定量生态学联系起来，实现了从检测到生态分析的全链路能力。

title: Web-Gewu: A Browser-Based Interactive Playground for Robot Reinforcement Learning
summary: With the rapid development of embodied intelligence, robotics education faces a dual challenge: high computational barriers and cumbersome environment configuration. Existing centralized cloud simulation solutions incur substantial GPU and bandwidth costs that preclude large-scale deployment, while pure local computing is severely constrained by learners' hardware limitations. To address these issues, we propose \href{http://47.76.242.88:8080/receiver/index.html}{Web-Gewu}, an interactive robotics education platform built on a WebRTC cloud-edge-client collaborative architecture. The system offloads all physics simulation and reinforcement learning (RL) training to the edge node, while the cloud server acts exclusively as a lightweight signaling relay, enabling extremely low-cost browser-based peer-to-peer (P2P) real-time streaming. Learners can interact with multi-form robots at low end-to-end latency directly in a web browser without any local installation, and simultaneously observe real-time visualization of multi-dimensional monitoring data, including reinforcement learning reward curves. Combined with a predefined robust command communication protocol, Web-Gewu provides a highly scalable, out-of-the-box, and barrier-free teaching infrastructure for embodied intelligence, significantly lowering the barrier to entry for cutting-edge robotics technology.

AI.tldr: Web-Gewu是一个基于WebRTC云边端协同架构的交互式机器人教育平台，通过将物理仿真和强化学习训练卸载到边缘节点，云服务器仅作为轻量级信令中继，实现了低成本的浏览器端P2P实时流传输，让学习者无需安装任何软件即可在浏览器中与多形态机器人进行低延迟交互，并实时观察多维监控数据（如强化学习奖励曲线），显著降低了具身智能教育的入门门槛。
AI.motivation: 现有集中式云仿真方案GPU和带宽成本高昂，难以大规模部署；纯本地计算又受限于学习者的硬件条件。具身智能教育面临高计算门槛和繁琐环境配置的双重挑战。
AI.method: 提出WebRTC云边端协同架构：边缘节点负责物理仿真和强化学习训练，云服务器仅作为轻量级信令中继，实现浏览器端的P2P实时流传输；结合预定义的鲁棒命令通信协议，支持多形态机器人交互和多维监控数据实时可视化。
AI.result: 实现了低成本、免安装、低延迟的浏览器端机器人交互平台，支持多形态机器人操作、强化学习奖励曲线实时可视化，具备高可扩展性和开箱即用的特性。
AI.conclusion: Web-Gewu为具身智能教育提供了一种高度可扩展、开箱即用、无门槛的教学基础设施，显著降低了前沿机器人技术的入门门槛。

title: Sink-Token-Aware Pruning for Fine-Grained Video Understanding in Efficient Video LLMs
summary: Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) incur high inference latency due to a large number of visual tokens provided to LLMs. To address this, training-free visual token pruning has emerged as a solution to reduce computational costs; however, existing methods are primarily validated on Multiple-Choice Question Answering (MCQA) benchmarks, where coarse-grained cues often suffice. In this work, we reveal that these methods suffer a sharp performance collapse on fine-grained understanding tasks requiring precise visual grounding, such as hallucination evaluation. To explore this gap, we conduct a systematic analysis and identify sink tokens--semantically uninformative tokens that attract excessive attention--as a key obstacle to fine-grained video understanding. When these sink tokens survive pruning, they distort the model's visual evidence and hinder fine-grained understanding. Motivated by these insights, we propose Sink-Token-aware Pruning (SToP), a simple yet effective plug-and-play method that introduces a sink score to quantify each token's tendency to behave as a sink and applies this score to existing spatial and temporal pruning methods to suppress them, thereby enhancing video understanding. To validate the effectiveness of SToP, we apply it to state-of-the-art pruning methods (VisionZip, FastVid, and Holitom) and evaluate it across diverse benchmarks covering hallucination, open-ended generation, compositional reasoning, and MCQA. Our results demonstrate that SToP significantly boosts performance, even when pruning up to 90% of visual tokens.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示现有训练无关的视觉令牌剪枝方法在细粒度视频理解任务上性能严重下降，归因于"汇点令牌"（sink tokens）在剪枝中存活并扭曲视觉证据。提出SToP方法，通过汇点分数量化并抑制这些令牌，在剪枝90%视觉令牌时仍显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有训练无关的视觉令牌剪枝方法主要在MCQA基准上验证，但在需要精确视觉定位的细粒度理解任务（如幻觉评估）上性能急剧下降，缺乏对此问题的系统分析和有效解决方案。
AI.method: 提出SToP（Sink-Token-aware Pruning），一种即插即用方法。通过引入汇点分数（sink score）量化每个令牌成为汇点令牌的倾向，将该分数应用于现有空间和时间剪枝方法，抑制这些无信息量的令牌在剪枝后存活。
AI.result: 将SToP应用于VisionZip、FastVid和Holitom等SOTA剪枝方法，在幻觉评估、开放生成、组合推理和MCQA等多种基准上评估，即使剪枝90%视觉令牌仍能显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 汇点令牌是阻碍细粒度视频理解的关键障碍，SToP通过抑制这些令牌能有效解决该问题，可作为现有剪枝方法的通用增强模块。

title: Optimizing Data Augmentation for Real-Time Small UAV Detection: A Lightweight Context-Aware Approach
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 34th International Conference on Electrical Engineering (ICEE 2026)
summary: Visual detection of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is a critical task in surveillance systems due to their small physical size and environmental challenges. Although deep learning models have achieved significant progress, deploying them on edge devices necessitates the use of lightweight models, such as YOLOv11 Nano, which possess limited learning capacity. In this research, an efficient and context-aware data augmentation pipeline, combining Mosaic strategies and HSV color-space adaptation, is proposed to enhance the performance of these models. Experimental results on four standard datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach, compared to heavy and instance-level methods like Copy-Paste, not only prevents the generation of synthetic artifacts and overfitting but also significantly improves mean Average Precision (mAP) across all scenarios. Furthermore, the evaluation of generalization capability under foggy conditions revealed that the proposed method offers the optimal balance between Precision and stability for real-time systems, whereas alternative methods, such as MixUp, are effective only in specific applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Mosaic策略和HSV色彩空间自适应的数据增强管道，在不引入合成伪影的前提下，显著提升了YOLOv11 Nano等轻量级模型在无人机视觉检测任务中的mAP性能，并在雾天条件下展现出最佳的精度与稳定性平衡。
AI.motivation: 无人机视觉检测中，轻量级模型（如YOLOv11 Nano）因学习能力有限，在目标尺寸小、环境多变等挑战下性能不足；同时，现有的实例级增强方法（如Copy-Paste）易引入合成伪影和过拟合，亟需一种高效且上下文感知的数据增强方案。
AI.method: 提出一种高效的上下文感知数据增强管道，核心包含两种技术：(1) Mosaic策略，通过拼接多张图像丰富上下文信息；(2) HSV色彩空间自适应调整，增强对光照变化的鲁棒性。该方法属于轻量级、非实例级别的增强手段，避免生成合成伪影。
AI.result: 在四个标准数据集上，该方法相比Copy-Paste等实例级方法显著提升了所有场景下的平均精度(mAP)；在雾天泛化评估中，该方法在精度与稳定性之间取得了最优平衡，而MixUp仅在特定应用中有效。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的Mosaic+HSV自适应数据增强管道为轻量级模型在边缘设备上的无人机检测提供了高效、鲁棒的解决方案，有效防止了过拟合与合成伪影，适用于实时监控系统。

title: Diagnosing CFG Interpretation in LLMs
summary: As LLMs are increasingly integrated into agentic systems, they must adhere to dynamically defined, machine-interpretable interfaces. We evaluate LLMs as in-context interpreters: given a novel context-free grammar, can LLMs generate syntactically valid, behaviorally functional, and semantically faithful outputs? We introduce RoboGrid, a framework that disentangles syntax, behavior, and semantics through controlled stress-tests of recursion depth, expression complexity, and surface styles. Our experiments reveal a consistent hierarchical degradation: LLMs often maintain surface syntax but fail to preserve structural semantics. Despite the partial mitigation provided by CoT reasoning, performance collapses under structural density, specifically deep recursion and high branching, with semantic alignment vanishing at extreme depths. Furthermore, "Alien" lexicons reveal that LLMs rely on semantic bootstrapping from keywords rather than pure symbolic induction. These findings pinpoint critical gaps in hierarchical state-tracking required for reliable, grammar-agnostic agents.

AI.tldr: LLM作为上下文解释器，在面对新上下文无关语法时，在语法有效、行为功能、语义忠实方面存在层级退化现象，表现为表面语法保持但结构语义丢失，且深度递归和高分支复杂度下性能急剧下降。CoT推理仅部分缓解问题，"外来"词典实验表明LLM依赖关键词语义引导而非纯符号归纳。
AI.motivation: LLM被集成到智能体系统中时，需要遵循动态定义的、机器可解释的接口。现有研究缺乏对LLM作为上下文解释器在语法、行为和语义三个维度上的系统评估，特别是面对全新上下文无关语法时的能力边界。
AI.method: 提出RoboGrid框架，通过控制递归深度、表达式复杂度和表面样式进行压力测试，将语法、行为和语义三个维度解耦评估，并引入"外来"词汇表测试LLM的纯符号归纳能力。
AI.result: 1) LLM存在一致的层级退化现象：表面语法保持但结构语义丢失；2) CoT推理仅部分缓解，在高结构密度（深度递归、高分支）下性能崩溃；3) "外来"词典下LLM依赖语义引导而非纯符号归纳。
AI.conclusion: LLM在层级状态跟踪方面存在关键缺陷，这限制了其作为语法无关智能体的可靠性，需要改进层次化状态跟踪能力。

title: Efficient Symbolic Computations for Identifying Causal Effects
summary: Determining identifiability of causal effects from observational data under latent confounding is a central challenge in causal inference. For linear structural causal models, identifiability of causal effects is decidable through symbolic computation. However, standard approaches based on Gröbner bases become computationally infeasible beyond small settings due to their doubly exponential complexity. In this work, we study how to practically use symbolic computation for deciding rational identifiability. In particular, we present an efficient algorithm that provably finds the lowest degree identifying formulas. For a causal effect of interest, if there exists an identification formula of a prespecified maximal degree, our algorithm returns such a formula in quasi-polynomial time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效算法，能在拟多项式时间内找到线性结构因果模型中因果效应的最低阶可识别公式，解决了标准Gröbner基方法由于双指数复杂度而无法应用于大规模设置的问题。
AI.motivation: 在存在潜在混杂的情况下，从观测数据中确定因果效应的可识别性是因果推断的核心挑战。线性结构因果模型中的可识别性可通过符号计算判定，但基于Gröbner基的标准方法因双指数复杂度在超过小规模设置后变得计算上不可行。
AI.method: 提出了一种高效算法，该算法能够找到最低阶的识别公式。对于给定的因果效应，如果存在一个预设最大阶数的识别公式，则该算法能在拟多项式时间内返回该公式。
AI.result: 该算法在拟多项式时间内返回预设最大阶数内的识别公式，显著优于标准Gröbner基方法的双指数复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 符号计算可以实用地用于判断线性因果模型中的有理可识别性，所提算法为实际应用提供了可行的计算方案。

title: A Computational Model of Message Sensation Value in Short Video Multimodal Features that Predicts Sensory and Behavioral Engagement
summary: The contemporary media landscape is characterized by sensational short videos. While prior research examines the effects of individual multimodal features, the collective impact of multimodal features on viewer engagement with short videos remains unknown. Grounded in the theoretical framework of Message Sensation Value (MSV), this study develops and tests a computational model of MSV with multimodal feature analysis and human evaluation of 1,200 short videos. This model that predicts sensory and behavioral engagement was further validated across two unseen datasets from three short video platforms (combined N = 14,492). While MSV is positively associated with sensory engagement, it shows an inverted U-shaped relationship with behavioral engagement: Higher MSV elicits stronger sensory stimulation, but moderate MSV optimizes behavioral engagement. This research advances the theoretical understanding of short video engagement and introduces a robust computational tool for short video research.

AI.tldr: 本研究基于信息感官价值（MSV）理论框架，通过多模态特征分析和人工评估1,200个短视频，开发并验证了一个计算模型。该模型在两个未见过的数据集（共14,492个短视频）上得到验证。研究发现MSV与感官参与呈正相关，但与行为参与呈倒U型关系：高MSV引发更强感官刺激，但中等MSV优化行为参与。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别考察了单个多模态特征对短视频参与度的影响，但多模态特征对观众参与度的集体影响尚不清楚。作者旨在填补这一空白，系统性地探究多模态特征的联合效应。
AI.method: 基于MSV理论框架，结合多模态特征分析与人工评估，对1,200个短视频进行建模。随后在两个未见过的数据集（来自三个短视频平台，共14,492个视频）上进行跨数据集验证。
AI.result: MSV与感官参与正相关；MSV与行为参与呈倒U型关系，即中等水平的MSV最有利于行为参与。
AI.conclusion: 研究推进了对短视频参与度的理论理解，并为短视频研究提供了一个可靠的计算工具。

title: Rule-VLN: Bridging Perception and Compliance via Semantic Reasoning and Geometric Rectification
summary: As embodied AI transitions to real-world deployment, the success of the Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) task tends to evolve from mere reachability to social compliance. However, current agents suffer from a "goal-driven trap", prioritizing physical geometry ("can I go?") over semantic rules ("may I go?"), frequently overlooking subtle regulatory constraints. To bridge this gap, we establish Rule-VLN, the first large-scale urban benchmark for rule-compliant navigation. Spanning a massive 29k-node environment, it injects 177 diverse regulatory categories into 8k constrained nodes across four curriculum levels, challenging agents with fine-grained visual and behavioral constraints. We further propose the Semantic Navigation Rectification Module (SNRM), a universal, zero-shot module designed to equip pre-trained agents with safety awareness. SNRM integrates a coarse-to-fine visual perception VLM framework with an epistemic mental map for dynamic detour planning. Experiments demonstrate that while Rule-VLN challenges state-of-the-art models, SNRM significantly restores navigation capabilities, reducing CVR by 19.26% and boosting TC by 5.97%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Rule-VLN，首个大规模城市规则合规导航基准，包含29k节点环境、177种法规类别和8k约束节点，并设计SNRM模块，通过粗到细的视觉感知VLM框架和认知心理地图实现动态绕行规划，显著提升智能体遵守社会规范的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLN智能体陷入"目标驱动陷阱"，优先考虑几何可达性（"我能走吗？"）而非语义规则（"我可以走吗？"），经常忽视细微的监管约束，难以满足真实世界部署中对社会合规性的要求。
AI.method: 1）建立Rule-VLN基准：大规模29k节点城市环境，注入177种监管类别到8k约束节点，分四个课程难度级别；2）提出SNRM模块：零样本通用模块，集成粗到细的视觉感知VLM框架和认知心理地图，用于动态绕行规划。
AI.result: Rule-VLN对现有SOTA模型构成挑战；SNRM显著恢复导航能力，CVR降低19.26%，TC提升5.97%。
AI.conclusion: 从"可达性"到"合规性"的范式转变是VLN真实部署的关键，本文通过基准和模块双贡献，推动了规则感知的具身智能导航发展。

title: Online CS-based SAR Edge-Mapping
comment: SPIE Defense and Commercial Sensing 2026, Algorithms for Synthetic Aperture Radar Imagery XXXIII
summary: With modern defense applications increasingly relying on inexpensive, small Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), a major challenge lies in designing intelligent and computationally efficient onboard Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) algorithms to carry out operational objectives. This is especially critical in Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR), where processing techniques such as ATR are often carried out post data collection, requiring onboard systems to bear the memory burden of storing the back-scattered signals. To alleviate this high cost, we propose an online, direct, edge-mapping technique which bypasses the image reconstruction step to classify scenes and targets. Furthermore, by reconstructing the scene as an edge-map we inherently promote sparsity, requiring fewer measurements and computational power than classic SAR reconstruction algorithms such as backprojection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线、直接的边缘映射技术，跳过SAR图像重建步骤，直接在边缘端对场景和目标进行分类，通过构建边缘图促进稀疏性，相比传统背投算法减少了测量数量和计算开销。
AI.motivation: 小型无人机在国防应用中日益普及，但传统SAR自动目标识别（ATR）算法通常在后端进行图像重建，导致机载系统需要承担巨大的存储和计算负担，亟需一种更高效的边缘端解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一种在线、直接的边缘映射技术，绕过图像重建步骤，直接在边缘端对场景和目标进行分类；通过重建场景边缘图来内在促进稀疏性，从而减少所需测量数量和计算量。
AI.result: 相比经典SAR重建算法（如背投影），该方法需要的测量更少，计算功耗更低，同时实现了对场景和目标的分类。
AI.conclusion: 该边缘映射技术能够有效缓解机载系统的存储和计算负担，为小型无人机平台上的实时SAR自动目标识别提供了可行的轻量化方案。

title: NaviFormer: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Transformer-like Model to Holistically Solve the Navigation Problem
comment: Published in IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2025
summary: Path planning is usually solved by addressing either the (high-level) route planning problem (waypoint sequencing to achieve the final goal) or the (low-level) path planning problem (trajectory prediction between two waypoints avoiding collisions). However, real-world problems usually require simultaneous solutions to the route and path planning subproblems with a holistic and efficient approach. In this paper, we introduce NaviFormer, a deep reinforcement learning model based on a Transformer architecture that solves the global navigation problem by predicting both high-level routes and low-level trajectories. To evaluate NaviFormer, several experiments have been conducted, including comparisons with other algorithms. Results show competitive accuracy from NaviFormer since it can understand the constraints and difficulties of each subproblem and act consequently to improve performance. Moreover, its superior computation speed proves its suitability for real-time missions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NaviFormer，一种基于Transformer架构的深度强化学习模型，能够同时解决路径规划中的高层路线规划（航点序列）和低层路径规划（轨迹预测）子问题，在保持竞争性精度的同时具备优异的计算速度，适用于实时任务。
AI.motivation: 现实中的导航问题需要同时解决高层路线规划和低层路径规划两个子问题，而现有方法通常分开处理，缺乏整体高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出NaviFormer，一种基于Transformer架构的深度强化学习模型，能够同时预测高层路线和低层轨迹，以整体方式解决全局导航问题。
AI.result: 实验表明NaviFormer具有竞争性的准确性，能够理解每个子问题的约束和难点并相应提升性能；同时其计算速度优越，适合实时任务。
AI.conclusion: NaviFormer通过统一框架同时解决路线规划和路径规划子问题，在精度和速度上均表现出色，证明了其在实时导航任务中的适用性。

title: Fast Amortized Fitting of Scientific Signals Across Time and Ensembles via Transferable Neural Fields
summary: Neural fields, also known as implicit neural representations (INRs), offer a powerful framework for modeling continuous geometry, but their effectiveness in high-dimensional scientific settings is limited by slow convergence and scaling challenges. In this study, we extend INR models to handle spatiotemporal and multivariate signals and show how INR features can be transferred across scientific signals to enable efficient and scalable representation across time and ensemble runs in an amortized fashion. Across controlled transformation regimes (e.g., geometric transformations and localized perturbations of synthetic fields) and high-fidelity scientific domains-including turbulent flows, fluid-material impact dynamics, and astrophysical systems-we show that transferable features improve not only signal fidelity but also the accuracy of derived geometric and physical quantities, including density gradients and vorticity. In particular, transferable features reduce iterations to reach target reconstruction quality by up to an order of magnitude, increase early-stage reconstruction quality by multiple dB (with gains exceeding 10 dB in some cases), and consistently improve gradient-based physical accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文将隐式神经表示（INR）扩展至时空和多变量信号，提出可迁移的INR特征以高效表示科学信号，在湍流、流体-材料冲击、天体物理等领域实现10倍收敛加速和>10 dB重建质量提升，并改善梯度级物理量精度。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经场（隐式神经表示）在建模连续几何方面表现强大，但在高维科学场景中收敛缓慢且扩展性差，亟需一种高效、可扩展的信号表示方法。
AI.method: 扩展INR模型处理时空和多变量信号，提出跨科学信号的可迁移INR特征；在可控变换（几何变换、局部扰动）和高保真科学领域（湍流、流体-材料冲击、天体物理）中验证。
AI.result: 可迁移特征将达到目标重建质量的迭代次数减少一个数量级；早期重建质量提升多个dB（部分超过10 dB）；持续改善梯度级物理量（密度梯度、涡量）的准确度。
AI.conclusion: 可迁移的INR特征能显著提升科学信号重建的效率和精度，同时改善衍生物理量的准确性，为高维科学数据的高效表示提供了新途径。

title: Automatic Ontology Construction Using LLMs as an External Layer of Memory, Verification, and Planning for Hybrid Intelligent Systems
comment: Artificial Intelligence; Knowledge Representation and Reasoning; Information Retrieval; Machine Learning
summary:
This paper presents a hybrid architecture for intelligent systems in which large language models (LLMs) are extended with an external ontological memory layer. Instead of relying solely on parametric knowledge and vector-based retrieval (RAG), the proposed approach constructs and maintains a structured knowledge graph using RDF/OWL representations, enabling persistent, verifiable, and semantically grounded reasoning.
  The core contribution is an automated pipeline for ontology construction from heterogeneous data sources, including documents, APIs, and dialogue logs. The system performs entity recognition, relation extraction, normalization, and triple generation, followed by validation using SHACL and OWL constraints, and continuous graph updates. During inference, LLMs operate over a combined context that integrates vector-based retrieval with graph-based reasoning and external tool interaction.
  Experimental observations on planning tasks, including the Tower of Hanoi benchmark, indicate that ontology augmentation improves performance in multi-step reasoning scenarios compared to baseline LLM systems. In addition, the ontology layer enables formal validation of generated outputs, transforming the system into a generation-verification-correction pipeline.
  The proposed architecture addresses key limitations of current LLM-based systems, including lack of long-term memory, weak structural understanding, and limited reasoning capabilities. It provides a foundation for building agent-based systems, robotics applications, and enterprise AI solutions that require persistent knowledge, explainability, and reliable decision-making.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种混合架构，将大语言模型与外部本体论记忆层（基于RDF/OWL的知识图谱）相结合，通过自动化本体构建流水线实现持久化、可验证的语义推理，在规划任务上优于纯LLM基线系统。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM系统存在缺乏长期记忆、结构性理解弱、推理能力有限等关键局限性，单纯依赖参数化知识和向量检索（RAG）不足以支持持久化、可验证的语义推理。
AI.method: 构建混合架构：LLM + 外部本体记忆层（RDF/OWL知识图谱）。核心是自动化本体构建流水线，包括从异构数据源进行实体识别、关系抽取、归一化、三元组生成，再经SHACL和OWL约束验证，并持续更新图结构。推理时LLM结合向量检索、图谱推理和外部工具交互的联合上下文进行决策。
AI.result: 在多步推理的规划任务（如汉诺塔基准测试）上，本体增强方案相比基线LLM系统性能更优。本体层支持对生成结果的形式化验证，形成生成-验证-修正流水线。
AI.conclusion: 该架构有效弥补了LLM在长期记忆、结构理解和推理能力方面的不足，为需要持久知识、可解释性和可靠决策的智能体系统、机器人应用和企业AI解决方案提供了基础框架。

title: Efficient Test-Time Inference via Deterministic Exploration of Truncated Decoding Trees
summary: Self-consistency boosts inference-time performance by sampling multiple reasoning traces in parallel and voting. However, in constrained domains like math and code, this strategy is compute-inefficient because it samples with replacement, repeatedly revisiting the same high-probability prefixes and duplicate completions. We propose Distinct Leaf Enumeration (DLE), a deterministic decoding method that treats truncated sampling as traversal of a pruned decoding tree and systematically enumerates distinct leaves instead of sampling with replacement. This strategy improves inference efficiency in two ways. Algorithmically, it increases coverage of the truncated search space under a fixed budget by exploring previously unvisited high-probability branches. Systemically, it reuses shared prefixes and reduces redundant token generation. Empirically, DLE explores higher-quality reasoning traces than stochastic self-consistency, yielding better performance on math, coding, and general reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出确定性解码方法DLE（Distinct Leaf Enumeration），通过将截断采样视为剪枝解码树的遍历并系统枚举不同叶节点，替代随机自一致性中的有放回采样，从而在数学、代码等受限领域提升推理效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自一致性方法在数学和代码等受限领域中存在计算效率低下的问题，因为它采用有放回采样，反复生成相同的高概率前缀和重复完成，浪费计算资源。
AI.method: 将截断采样建模为对剪枝解码树的遍历，提出确定性解码方法DLE，系统性地枚举不同的叶节点（即不同的推理轨迹），而非进行有放回采样。通过重用共享前缀来减少冗余token生成，提高搜索空间覆盖率。
AI.result: 在固定推理预算下，DLE比随机自一致性探索到更高质量的推理轨迹，在数学推理、代码生成和通用推理任务上均取得更好的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: DLE通过确定性枚举不同叶节点的策略，在算法层面提高了截断搜索空间的覆盖率，在系统层面复用了共享前缀，从而在受限领域实现了比随机自一致性更高效、更优质的推理性能。

title: Can "AI" Be a Doctor? A Study of Empathy, Readability, and Alignment in Clinical LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in healthcare, yet their communicative alignment with clinical standards remains insufficiently quantified. We conduct a multidimensional evaluation of general-purpose and domain-specialized LLMs across structured medical explanations and real-world physician-patient interactions, analyzing semantic fidelity, readability, and affective resonance. Baseline models amplify affective polarity relative to physicians (Very Negative: 43.14-45.10% vs. 37.25%) and, in larger architectures such as GPT-5 and Claude, produce substantially higher linguistic complexity (FKGL up to 16.91-17.60 vs. 11.47-12.50 in physician-authored responses). Empathy-oriented prompting reduces extreme negativity and lowers grade-level complexity (up to -6.87 FKGL points for GPT-5) but does not significantly increase semantic fidelity. Collaborative rewriting yields the strongest overall alignment. Rephrase configurations achieve the highest semantic similarity to physician answers (up to mean = 0.93) while consistently improving readability and reducing affective extremity. Dual stakeholder evaluation shows that no model surpasses physicians on epistemic criteria, whereas patients consistently prefer rewritten variants for clarity and emotional tone. These findings suggest that LLMs function most effectively as collaborative communication enhancers rather than replacements for clinical expertise.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了通用和专用LLMs在医学沟通中的表现，发现基础模型在情感极性和语言复杂性上与临床标准存在偏差。共情提示和协作改写能改善对齐效果，其中改写变体在语义相似度、可读性和情感表达上最接近医生水平。双重视角评估显示，LLMs更适合作为协作沟通增强工具而非临床替代品。
AI.motivation: LLMs在医疗领域部署日益广泛，但其与临床沟通标准的对齐程度尚未得到充分量化，亟需系统的多维评估。
AI.method: 对通用型和领域专用型LLMs进行多维评估，覆盖结构化医学解释和真实医患对话，分析语义保真度、可读性和情感共鸣三个维度；采用共情提示、协作改写等干预策略，并引入医患双重视角评估。
AI.result: 基础模型情感极性更强（非常负面：43.14-45.10% vs. 医生37.25%）；大模型语言复杂度更高（FKGL达16.91-17.60 vs. 医生11.47-12.50）；共情提示降低极端情感和年级复杂度（GPT-5降低6.87 FKGL）；改写变体语义相似度最高（均值0.93）；患者偏好改写变体，但所有模型在认知标准上均未超越医生。
AI.conclusion: LLMs更适合作为协作沟通增强工具而非临床专业知识替代品。

title: Towards Certified Malware Detection: Provable Guarantees Against Evasion Attacks
summary: Machine learning-based static malware detectors remain vulnerable to adversarial evasion techniques, such as metamorphic engine mutations. To address this vulnerability, we propose a certifiably robust malware detection framework based on randomized smoothing through feature ablation and targeted noise injection. During evaluation, our system analyzes an executable by generating multiple ablated variants, classifies them by using a smoothed classifier, and identifies the final label based on the majority vote. By analyzing the top-class voting distribution and the Wilson score interval, we derive a formal certificate that guarantees robustness within a specific radius against feature-space perturbations. We evaluate our approach by comparing the performance of the base classifier and the smoothed classifier on both clean executables and ablated variants generated using PyMetaEngine. Our results demonstrate that the proposed smoothed classifier successfully provides certifiable robustness against metamorphic evasion attacks without requiring modifications to the underlying machine learning architecture.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于随机平滑（特征消融与定向噪声注入）的静态恶意软件检测框架，通过平滑分类器对可执行文件的消融变体进行多数投票分类，并利用威尔逊评分区间推导形式化鲁棒性证书，在不修改底层ML架构的前提下抵御元变形引擎的逃逸攻击。
AI.motivation: 基于机器学习的静态恶意软件检测器仍易受对抗性逃逸技术（如元变形引擎突变）的攻击。
AI.method: 提出基于随机平滑的鲁棒检测框架：对可执行文件生成多个消融变体，使用平滑分类器进行多数投票分类；通过分析最高类别投票分布与威尔逊评分区间，推导形式化鲁棒性证书。
AI.result: 在干净可执行文件和PyMetaEngine生成的消融变体上的实验表明，所提平滑分类器成功提供了对元变形逃逸攻击的可证明鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架无需修改底层机器学习架构即可实现形式化鲁棒性保证，有效防御元变形引擎的对抗性逃逸。

title: Decentralized Machine Learning with Centralized Performance Guarantees via Gibbs Algorithms
comment: In Proceedings of the International Symposium on Information Theory (ISIT), 2026
summary: In this paper, it is shown, for the first time, that centralized performance is achievable in decentralized learning without sharing the local datasets. Specifically, when clients adopt an empirical risk minimization with relative-entropy regularization (ERM-RER) learning framework and a forward-backward communication between clients is established, it suffices to share the locally obtained Gibbs measures to achieve the same performance as that of a centralized ERM-RER with access to all the datasets. The core idea is that the Gibbs measure produced by client~$k$ is used, as reference measure, by client~$k+1$. This effectively establishes a principled way to encode prior information through a reference measure. In particular, achieving centralized performance in the decentralized setting requires a specific scaling of the regularization factors with the local sample sizes. Overall, this result opens the door to novel decentralized learning paradigms that shift the collaboration strategy from sharing data to sharing the local inductive bias via the reference measures over the set of models.

AI.tldr: 本文首次证明，在分散式学习中，无需共享本地数据集即可实现集中式性能。具体而言，当客户端采用相对熵正则化经验风险最小化（ERM-RER）学习框架并建立客户端间的前后向通信时，共享本地获得的吉布斯测度足以达到与访问所有数据集的集中式ERM-RER相同的性能。核心思想是客户端k产生的吉布斯测度作为客户端k+1的参考测度，这建立了一种通过参考测度编码先验信息的原则性方法。实现分散式环境中的集中式性能需要对正则化因子与本地样本量进行特定缩放。这一结果为新的分散式学习范式打开了大门，将协作策略从共享数据转变为通过模型集上的参考测度共享局部归纳偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有分散式学习通常需要共享本地数据集或模型参数，但面临隐私和通信瓶颈。本文旨在探索是否能在不共享数据集的情况下，使分散式学习达到与集中式学习同等的性能水平。
AI.method: 采用相对熵正则化经验风险最小化（ERM-RER）学习框架，建立客户端间的前向-后向通信机制。核心方法是让每个客户端将前一个客户端产生的吉布斯测度作为自己的参考测度，从而在客户端间传递归纳偏置，而非直接共享数据。
AI.result: 证明了通过共享本地吉布斯测度（而非原始数据），分散式ERM-RER能够达到与集中式ERM-RER相同的性能。实现这一结果需要对正则化因子与本地样本量进行特定的缩放。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为设计新型分散式学习范式提供了理论基础，揭示了通过模型集上的参考测度共享局部归纳偏置可以替代直接数据共享，从而在保护隐私的同时实现集中式性能。

title: Camera Control for Text-to-Image Generation via Learning Viewpoint Tokens
summary: Current text-to-image models struggle to provide precise camera control using natural language alone. In this work, we present a framework for precise camera control with global scene understanding in text-to-image generation by learning parametric camera tokens. We fine-tune image generation models for viewpoint-conditioned text-to-image generation on a curated dataset that combines 3D-rendered images for geometric supervision and photorealistic augmentations for appearance and background diversity. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while preserving image quality and prompt fidelity. Unlike prior methods that overfit to object-specific appearance correlations, our viewpoint tokens learn factorized geometric representations that transfer to unseen object categories. Our work shows that text-vision latent spaces can be endowed with explicit 3D camera structure, offering a pathway toward geometrically-aware prompts for text-to-image generation. Project page: https://randdl.github.io/viewtoken_control/

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViewToken框架，通过学习参数化相机令牌实现文本到图像生成中的精确相机控制，在保持图像质量和提示保真度的同时达到最先进的准确性，并且学习的视角令牌能迁移到未见过的物体类别。
AI.motivation: 现有文生图模型仅依靠自然语言难以提供精确的相机控制，缺乏对全局场景的几何理解能力。
AI.method: 通过微调图像生成模型，在结合3D渲染图像（几何监督）和真实感增强图像（外观与背景多样性）的 curated 数据集上进行视角条件化的文本到图像生成，学习参数化相机令牌。
AI.result: 定性和定量实验表明该方法在保持图像质量和提示保真度的前提下，达到了最先进的相机控制精度；视角令牌学习到因子化的几何表征，能泛化到未见物体类别。
AI.conclusion: 文本-视觉潜在空间可以被赋予显式的3D相机结构，为几何感知的文生图提示提供了可行路径。

title: SWE-chat: Coding Agent Interactions From Real Users in the Wild
summary: AI coding agents are being adopted at scale, yet we lack empirical evidence on how people actually use them and how much of their output is useful in practice. We present SWE-chat, the first large-scale dataset of real coding agent sessions collected from open-source developers in the wild. The dataset currently contains 6,000 sessions, comprising more than 63,000 user prompts and 355,000 agent tool calls. SWE-chat is a living dataset; our collection pipeline automatically and continually discovers and processes sessions from public repositories. Leveraging SWE-chat, we provide an initial empirical characterization of real-world coding agent usage and failure modes. We find that coding patterns are bimodal: in 41% of sessions, agents author virtually all committed code ("vibe coding"), while in 23%, humans write all code themselves. Despite rapidly improving capabilities, coding agents remain inefficient in natural settings. Just 44% of all agent-produced code survives into user commits, and agent-written code introduces more security vulnerabilities than code authored by humans. Furthermore, users push back against agent outputs -- through corrections, failure reports, and interruptions -- in 44% of all turns. By capturing complete interaction traces with human vs. agent code authorship attribution, SWE-chat provides an empirical foundation for moving beyond curated benchmarks towards an evidence-based understanding of how AI agents perform in real developer workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SWE-chat，首个大规模真实编码智能体会话数据集（6,000个会话，63,000+用户提示，355,000+工具调用），揭示了真实世界中使用模式的二元性：41%的会话中智能体几乎编写了所有代码（"vibe coding"），而23%由人类完全编写。仅44%的智能体代码最终存活在提交中，且智能体引入更多安全漏洞，用户在44%的交互回合中对智能体输出进行纠正、报告失败或中断。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏关于人们如何在真实环境中实际使用AI编码智能体的经验证据，已有研究多依赖人工基准测试而非自然工作流数据，无法反映智能体在真实开发者工作流中的实际表现和失败模式。
AI.method: 构建SWE-chat数据集：通过自动管道持续从公共仓库中采集完整的编码智能体交互轨迹（含用户提示、工具调用和代码归属标注），并对6,000个会话进行统计分析，刻画使用模式、代码存活率、安全漏洞及用户反馈行为。
AI.result: 1) 编码模式呈二元分布：41%为智能体主导的"vibe coding"，23%为人类全自主编码；2) 仅44%的智能体代码最终进入用户提交；3) 智能体编写的代码比人类编写的引入更多安全漏洞；4) 用户在44%的交互回合中对智能体输出进行纠正、报告失败或中断。
AI.conclusion: SWE-chat为超越人工基准、基于证据理解AI编码智能体在真实开发者工作流中的表现提供了经验基础，表明当前智能体在自然环境中效率有限且存在安全隐患，需要进一步改进。

title: Leveraging VR Robot Games to Facilitate Data Collection for Embodied Intelligence Tasks
summary: Collecting embodied interaction data at scale remains costly and difficult due to the limited accessibility of conventional interfaces. We present a gamified data collection framework based on Unity that combines procedural scene generation, VR-based humanoid robot control, automatic task evaluation, and trajectory logging. A trash pick-and-place task prototype is developed to validate the full workflow.Experimental results indicate that the collected demonstrations exhibit broad coverage of the state-action space, and that increasing task difficulty leads to higher motion intensity as well as more extensive exploration of the arm's workspace. The proposed framework demonstrates that game-oriented virtual environments can serve as an effective and extensible solution for embodied data collection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于Unity的 gamified 数据收集框架，结合程序化场景生成、VR人形机器人控制、自动任务评估和轨迹记录，通过垃圾拾取放置任务验证了工作流，实验表明该框架能有效收集覆盖广泛状态-动作空间的示教数据。
AI.motivation: 传统界面获取具身交互数据的成本高、难度大，缺乏可扩展的采集方法。
AI.method: 基于Unity构建游戏化数据收集框架，包括：程序化场景生成、VR人形机器人控制、自动任务评估、轨迹记录；并开发了垃圾拾取放置任务原型验证整个工作流。
AI.result: 收集的示教数据覆盖了广泛的状态-动作空间；增加任务难度导致更高的运动强度以及对机械臂工作空间更广泛的探索。
AI.conclusion: 面向游戏的虚拟环境可以作为一种有效且可扩展的具身数据收集解决方案。

title: Data-Driven Open-Loop Simulation for Digital-Twin Operator Decision Support in Wastewater Treatment
summary: Wastewater treatment plants (WWTPs) need digital-twin-style decision support tools that can simulate plant response under prescribed control plans, tolerate irregular and missing sensing, and remain informative over 12-36 h planning horizons. Meeting these requirements with full-scale plant data remains an open engineering-AI challenge. We present CCSS-RS, a controlled continuous-time state-space model that separates historical state inference from future control and exogenous rollout. The model combines typed context encoding, gain-weighted forcing of prescribed and forecast drivers, semigroup-consistent rollouts, and Student-t plus hurdle outputs for heavy-tailed and zero-inflated WWTP sensor data. On the public Avedøre full-scale benchmark, with 906,815 timesteps, 43% missingness, and 1-20 min irregular sampling, CCSS-RS achieves RMSE 0.696 and CRPS 0.349 at H=1000 across 10,000 test windows. This reduces RMSE by 40-46% relative to Neural CDE baselines and by 31-35% relative to simplified internal variants. Four case studies using a frozen checkpoint on test data demonstrate operational value: oxygen-setpoint perturbations shift predicted ammonium by -2.3 to +1.4 over horizons 300-1000; a smoothed setpoint plan ranks first in multi-criterion screening; context-only sensor outages raise monitored-variable RMSE by at most 10%; and ammonium, nitrate, and oxygen remain more accurate than persistence throughout the rollout. These results establish CCSS-RS as a practical learned simulator for offline scenario screening in industrial wastewater treatment, complementary to mechanistic models.

AI.tldr: 提出CCSS-RS模型，一种受控连续时间状态空间模型，用于污水处理厂数字孪生决策支持，在Avedøre基准数据集上相比基线降低40-46% RMSE，并展示了操作价值。
AI.motivation: 污水处理厂需要数字孪生决策支持工具来模拟控制方案下的工厂响应，处理不规则和缺失传感数据，并在12-36小时规划范围内保持信息有效性，而使用全规模工厂数据满足这些要求仍是工程AI的开放挑战。
AI.method: 提出CCSS-RS（受控连续时间状态空间模型），分离历史状态推断与未来控制和外生变量推演；结合类型化上下文编码、增益加权的预设和预测驱动、半群一致性推演，以及用于重尾和零膨胀WWTP传感器数据的Student-t加Hurdle输出分布。
AI.result: 在Avedøre全规模基准（906,815时间步，43%缺失率，1-20分钟不规则采样）上，H=1000时RMSE 0.696、CRPS 0.349；相对Neural CDE基线降低40-46% RMSE，相对简化内部变体降低31-35%。四个案例研究验证了操作价值。
AI.conclusion: CCSS-RS可作为工业废水处理离线场景筛选的实用学习模拟器，与传统机理模型互补。

title: Visual Reasoning through Tool-supervised Reinforcement Learning
summary: In this paper, we investigate the problem of how to effectively master tool-use to solve complex visual reasoning tasks for Multimodal Large Language Models. To achieve that, we propose a novel Tool-supervised Reinforcement Learning (ToolsRL) framework, with direct tool supervision for more effective tool-use learning. We focus on a series of simple, native, and interpretable visual tools, including zoom-in, rotate, flip, and draw point/line, whose tool supervision is easy to collect. A reinforcement learning curriculum is developed, where the first stage is solely optimized by a set of well motivated tool-specific rewards, and the second stage is trained with the accuracy targeted rewards while allowing calling tools. In this way, tool calling capability is mastered before using tools to complete visual reasoning tasks, avoiding the potential optimization conflict among those heterogeneous tasks. Our experiments have shown that the tool-supervised curriculum training is efficient and ToolsRL can achieve strong tool-use capabilities for complex visual reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出ToolsRL框架，通过工具监督的强化学习课程训练，使多模态大模型逐步掌握使用缩放、旋转、翻转等视觉工具来解决复杂视觉推理任务。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型在解决复杂视觉推理任务时，缺乏有效使用工具的能力，且直接联合优化工具调用与推理任务存在优化冲突问题。
AI.method: 提出ToolsRL框架，包含两阶段强化学习课程：第一阶段通过工具专属奖励优化工具调用能力，第二阶段在允许调用工具的条件下用准确率导向奖励训练视觉推理任务。
AI.result: 工具监督的课程训练高效，ToolsRL在复杂视觉推理任务上展现出强大的工具使用能力。
AI.conclusion: 分阶段课程训练能有效避免异构任务间的优化冲突，先掌握工具调用能力再用于推理任务是一种高效的学习范式。

title: Time-Division Multiplexing Actuation in Tendon-Driven Arms: Lightweight Design and Fault Tolerance
summary: Robotic manipulators for aerospace applications require a delicate balance between lightweight construction and fault-tolerant operation to satisfy strict weight limitations and ensure reliability in remote, hazardous environments. This paper presents Time-Division Multiplexing Actuation (TDMA), a practical approach for tendon-driven robots that significantly reduces actuator count while preserving high torque output and intrinsic fault tolerance. The key hardware employs a vertically-stacked rotational selection structure that integrates self-rotating TDM motors for rapid configuration, electromagnetic clutches enabling sub-0.1 second engagement, a worm gear reducer for enhanced load capacity and self-locking capability, and a dual-encoder system for precise, long-term positioning. Leveraging TDMA, the proposed MuxArm achieves a self-weight of 2.17 kg, supports an actuator driving capacity of 10 kg, and maintains end-effector accuracy up to 1% of its length, even under partial servo failure. Additionally, an actuation space trajectory planning algorithm is developed, enabling fault-tolerant control and reducing tendon load by up to 50% compared to conventional methods. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate MuxArm's robust performance in diverse settings, including free-space, cluttered, and confined environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出时分多路复用驱动（TDMA）方法，通过减少腱驱动机器人的执行器数量，在保持高扭矩输出和内在容错能力的同时，实现了轻量化与故障容忍的平衡。基于TDMA的MuxArm机械臂自重2.17kg，可驱动10kg负载，末端精度达臂长1%，且在部分伺服故障下仍能工作。所提出的运动规划算法可将腱索负载降低50%。实验验证了其在自由空间、杂乱和受限环境中的鲁棒性能。
AI.motivation: 航空航天应用中的机器人操作臂需要在严格重量限制下实现轻量化构造与容错运行之间的精细平衡，现有方案难以同时满足这两方面需求。
AI.method: 提出时分多路复用驱动（TDMA）方法，核心硬件包括垂直堆叠旋转选择结构、自旋转TDM电机、电磁离合器（亚0.1秒接合）、蜗轮减速器（增强负载能力和自锁能力）以及双编码器系统（精确定位）。基于此设计MuxArm机械臂，并开发了驱动空间轨迹规划算法实现容错控制。
AI.result: MuxArm自重2.17kg，驱动能力10kg，末端精度达臂长1%，部分伺服故障下仍可运行；所提算法相比传统方法降低腱索负载50%。
AI.conclusion: TDMA方法有效减少了执行器数量，同时保持了高扭矩输出和容错能力，实验证明MuxArm在多种环境（自由空间、杂乱空间、受限空间）中均表现出色。

title: CrackForward: Context-Aware Severity Stage Crack Synthesis for Data Augmentation
summary: Reliable crack detection and segmentation are vital for structural health monitoring, yet the scarcity of well-annotated data constitutes a major challenge. To address this limitation, we propose a novel context-aware generative framework designed to synthesize realistic crack growth patterns for data augmentation. Unlike existing methods that primarily manipulate textures or background content, CrackForward explicitly models crack morphology by combining directional crack elongation with learned thickening and branching. Our framework integrates two key innovations: (i) a contextually guided crack expansion module, which uses local directional cues and adaptive random walk to simulate realistic propagation paths; and (ii) a two-stage U-Net-style generator that learns to reproduce spatially varying crack characteristics such as thickness, branching, and growth. Experimental results show that the generated samples preserve target-stage saturation and thickness characteristics and improve the performance of several crack segmentation architectures. These results indicate that structure-aware synthetic crack generation can provide more informative training data than conventional augmentation alone.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CrackForward的上下文感知生成框架，通过显式建模裂纹形态（定向延伸、增厚与分支）来合成逼真的裂纹扩展模式，用于数据增强以解决裂纹分割中标注数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 裂纹检测与分割中高质量标注数据稀缺，现有数据增强方法主要操作纹理或背景内容，未能显式建模裂纹形态学特征。
AI.method: 提出CrackForward框架，包含两个核心创新：(i) 上下文引导的裂纹扩展模块，利用局部方向线索与自适应随机游走模拟真实传播路径；(ii) 两阶段U-Net风格生成器，学习再现裂纹厚度、分支和生长等空间变化特征。
AI.result: 生成样本保留了目标阶段的饱和度和厚度特征，并提升了多种裂纹分割架构的性能。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知的合成裂纹生成相比传统增强方法能提供更具信息量的训练数据。

title: Chain Of Interaction Benchmark (COIN): When Reasoning meets Embodied Interaction
summary: Generalist embodied agents must perform interactive, causally-dependent reasoning, continually interacting with the environment, acquiring information, and updating plans to solve long-horizon tasks before they could be adopted in real-life scenarios. For instance, retrieving an apple from a cabinet may require opening multiple doors and drawers before the apple becomes visible and reachable, demanding sequential interaction under partial observability. However, existing benchmarks fail to systematically evaluate this essential capability. We introduce COIN, a benchmark designed to assess interactive reasoning in realistic robotic manipulation through three key contributions. First, we construct COIN-50: 50 interactive tasks in daily scenarios, and create COIN-Primitive required by causally-dependent tasks, and COIN-Composition with mid-term complexity for skill learning and generalization evaluation. Second, we develop a low-cost mobile AR teleoperation system and collect the COIN-Primitive Dataset with 50 demonstrations per primitive task (1,000 in total). Third, we develop systematic evaluation metrics about execution stability and generalization robustness to evaluate CodeAsPolicy, VLA, and language-conditioned H-VLA approaches. Our comprehensive evaluation reveals critical limitations in current methods: models struggle with interactive reasoning tasks due to significant gaps between visual understanding and motor execution. We provide fine-grained analysis of these limitations.

AI.tldr: COIN是一个评估具身智能体在部分可观测环境下进行因果依赖的交互式推理能力的基准，包含50个日常任务、原始技能数据集和组合任务，系统评估了现有方法（CodeAsPolicy、VLA、H-VLA）在视觉理解与运动执行之间的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基准无法系统评估具身智能体在真实场景中所需的交互式、因果依赖的推理能力（如打开多个抽屉才能拿到苹果），因此需要构建专门的评估基准。
AI.method: 1) 构建COIN-50（50个交互任务）、COIN-Primitive（因果依赖的基础技能）和COIN-Composition（中期复杂度的组合技能）；2) 开发低成本移动AR遥操作系统收集原始技能数据集（50个演示/每个原始任务，共1000个）；3) 设计执行稳定性和泛化鲁棒性指标，评估CodeAsPolicy、VLA和语言条件H-VLA方法。
AI.result: 当前方法在交互式推理任务中表现不佳，存在视觉理解与运动执行之间的显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 现有具身智能方法在处理因果依赖的交互推理任务时存在根本性局限，COIN基准为系统评估和推动该领域发展提供了有效工具。

title: Infection-Reasoner: A Compact Vision-Language Model for Wound Infection Classification with Evidence-Grounded Clinical Reasoning
summary: Assessing chronic wound infection from photographs is challenging because visual appearance varies across wound etiologies, anatomical locations, and imaging conditions. Prior image-based deep learning methods have mainly focused on classification with limited interpretability, despite the need for evidence-grounded explanations to support point-of-care decision making. We present Infection-Reasoner, a compact 4B-parameter reasoning vision-language model for chronic wound infection classification and rationale generation. To address the scarcity of expert-labeled wound images with reasoning annotations, Infection-Reasoner is trained using a two-stage pipeline: (1) reasoning distillation, in which GPT-5.1 generates chain-of-thought rationales for unlabeled wound images to initialize wound-specific reasoning in a smaller student model (Qwen3-VL-4B-Thinking), and (2) reinforcement learning post-training with Group Relative Policy Optimization on a small labeled infection dataset to refine classification reasoning. On a held-out heterogeneous wound dataset, Infection-Reasoner achieved 86.8\% accuracy, 86.4\% sensitivity, and 87.1\% specificity, outperforming several strong baselines, including GPT-5.1. Rationale quality was further evaluated using both multimodal large language model (MLLM) judges and wound expert review. Across four MLLM judges, visual-support agreement scores ranged from 0.722 to 0.903, while expert review rated 61.8\% of rationales as Correct and 32.4\% as Partially Correct.

AI.tldr: 提出了Infection-Reasoner，一个4B参数的推理视觉语言模型，用于慢性伤口感染分类和理由生成。采用两阶段训练：GPT-5.1知识蒸馏生成思维链推理，再通过强化学习（GRPO）优化分类推理。在异质伤口数据集上达到86.8%准确率，推理质量经MLLM评估和专家评审验证。
AI.motivation: 慢性伤口感染的视觉评估具有挑战性，现有深度学习方法主要关注分类而缺乏可解释性，难以支持临床决策。需要一种既能分类又能生成基于证据的推理解释的方法。
AI.method: 两阶段训练管道：(1) 推理蒸馏——利用GPT-5.1为未标注伤口图像生成思维链推理，将知识迁移到小型学生模型Qwen3-VL-4B-Thinking；(2) 使用Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)在少量标注感染数据集上进行强化学习后训练，优化分类推理能力。
AI.result: 在异质伤口数据集上：准确率86.8%、灵敏度86.4%、特异性87.1%，优于多个强基线模型包括GPT-5.1。推理质量方面：四个MLLM评估者的视觉支持一致性得分为0.722-0.903，专家评审中61.8%的推理被评为正确、32.4%部分正确。
AI.conclusion: Infection-Reasoner在小参数规模下（4B）通过蒸馏和强化学习实现了优于大模型（GPT-5.1）的分类性能，同时具备高质量的可解释推理能力，适合在临床点-of-care场景中部署。

title: Greedy Kalman-Swarm: Improving State Estimation in Robot Swarms in Harsh Environments
summary: State estimation is a fundamental requirement in robotics, where the accurate determination of a robot's state is essential for stable operation despite inherent process disturbances and sensor noise. Traditionally, this is achieved through Kalman filtering, providing a statistically optimal estimate by balancing predictive models with noisy measurements. In the context of robotic swarms, the challenge shifts from individual accuracy to collective coordination, where the integration of global dynamics can significantly enhance the precision of the entire group. Existing estimation techniques rely on centralized processing or heavy communication protocols to reach a global consensus, which are frequently impractical in real-world deployments. Here we show that a localized, "greedy" approach to distributed state estimation (termed "Greedy Kalman-Swarm") allows individual robots to leverage relative inter-robot sensing for improved accuracy without requiring full data availability or global communication. Simulations in communication-constrained environments show robots can effectively integrate all currently available neighbor data at each iteration to refine their internal states, yet remain robust and functional even when data is missing. This results in a performance profile that strikes a balance between the low overhead of independent estimation and the high accuracy of centralized systems, specifically under harsh or dynamic environmental conditions. Our results demonstrate that global state awareness can be emergent rather than enforced, providing a scalable framework for maintaining swarm cohesion in unpredictable terrains. We anticipate that this decentralized methodology will serve as a foundation for more resilient autonomous systems, particularly in search-and-rescue or space exploration missions where reliable, high-bandwidth communication cannot be guaranteed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"Greedy Kalman-Swarm"的分布式状态估计方法，允许机器人仅通过局部相对感知和邻居数据融合来提升状态估计精度，无需全局通信，在通信受限环境下实现了兼顾独立估计低开销与集中式高精度的性能平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人状态估计依赖卡尔曼滤波，但在机器人集群场景中，现有方法要么需要集中式处理，要么依赖高带宽全局通信协议来实现共识，这些方案在实际部署中往往不切实际。因此需要一种去中心化、低通信开销的分布式状态估计方法。
AI.method: 提出"Greedy Kalman-Swarm"方法，采用局部"贪婪"策略：每个机器人在每次迭代中仅利用当前可用的邻居相对感知数据来更新自身状态，不要求完整数据可用性或全局通信，以局部信息融合实现状态的逐步精化。
AI.result: 在通信受限环境下的仿真表明，该方法能够有效整合所有当前可用的邻居数据以优化内部状态，且在数据缺失时仍保持鲁棒性与功能性。性能介于独立估计的低开销与集中式系统的高精度之间，尤其在恶劣或动态环境条件下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 全局状态感知可以是一种涌现现象而非强制结果，该去中心化方法为在不可预测地形中保持集群一致性提供了可扩展框架，有望成为搜索救援、太空探索等无法保证高带宽通信场景下更鲁棒自主系统的基础。

title: UniCon3R: Contact-aware 3D Human-Scene Reconstruction from Monocular Video
summary: We introduce UniCon3R (Unified Contact-aware 3D Reconstruction), a unified feed-forward framework for online human-scene 4D reconstruction from monocular videos. Recent feed-forward methods enable real-time world-coordinate human motion and scene reconstruction, but they often produce physically implausible artifacts such as bodies floating above the ground or penetrating parts of the scene. The key reason is that existing approaches fail to model physical interactions between the human and the environment. A natural next step is to predict human-scene contact as an auxiliary output -- yet we find this alone is not sufficient: contact must actively correct the reconstruction. To address this, we explicitly model interaction by inferring 3D contact from the human pose and scene geometry and use the contact as a corrective cue for generating the final pose. This enables UniCon3R to jointly recover high-fidelity scene geometry and spatially aligned 3D humans within the scene. Experiments on standard human-centric video benchmarks such as RICH, EMDB, 3DPW and SLOPER4D show that UniCon3R outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on physical plausibility and global human motion estimation while achieving real-time online inference. We experimentally demonstrate that contact serves as a powerful internal prior rather than just an external metric, thus establishing a new paradigm for physically grounded joint human-scene reconstruction. Project page is available at https://surtantheta.github.io/UniCon3R .

AI.tldr: UniCon3R是一个统一的在线前馈框架，通过显式建模人体-场景3D接触并将其作为校正信号，实现从单目视频进行物理合理的4D人体-场景重建，在多个基准上超越现有方法并支持实时推理。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈方法虽能实时重建人体运动与场景，但常产生身体漂浮、穿透等物理不合理伪影，根本原因是未能建模人体与环境间的物理交互。单纯预测接触作为辅助输出不足以解决问题，接触必须主动校正重建结果。
AI.method: 从人体姿态和场景几何推断3D接触，并将接触作为校正线索用于生成最终姿态，显式建模人体-场景交互，实现联合恢复高保真场景几何与空间对齐的3D人体。
AI.result: 在RICH、EMDB、3DPW和SLOPER4D等基准上，UniCon3R在物理合理性和全局人体运动估计方面超越SOTA基线，同时实现实时在线推理。
AI.conclusion: 接触不仅是外部度量指标，更可作为强大的内部先验，为物理合理的人-场景联合重建建立了新范式。

title: Where and What: Reasoning Dynamic and Implicit Preferences in Situated Conversational Recommendation
summary: Situated conversational recommendation (SCR), which utilizes visual scenes grounded in specific environments and natural language dialogue to deliver contextually appropriate recommendations, has emerged as a promising research direction due to its close alignment with real-world scenarios. Compared to traditional recommendations, SCR requires a deeper understanding of dynamic and implicit user preferences, as the surrounding scene often influences users' underlying interests, while both may evolve across conversations. This complexity significantly impacts the timing and relevance of recommendations. To address this, we propose situated preference reasoning (SiPeR), a novel framework that integrates two core mechanisms: (1) Scene transition estimation, which estimates whether the current scene satisfies user needs, and guides the user toward a more suitable scene when necessary; and (2) Bayesian inverse inference, which leverages the likelihood of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to predict user preferences about candidate items within the scene. Extensive experiments on two representative benchmarks demonstrate SiPeR's superiority in both recommendation accuracy and response generation quality. The code and data are available at https://github.com/DongdingLin/SiPeR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SiPeR框架，通过场景转换估计和贝叶斯逆推理两个核心机制，解决情境化对话推荐中动态隐式偏好理解与推荐时机问题，在两个基准上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 情境化对话推荐（SCR）相比传统推荐需要更深入地理解动态且隐式的用户偏好，因为周围场景常影响用户潜在兴趣，且两者均可能随对话演变，这种复杂性显著影响了推荐的时机和相关性。
AI.method: 提出SiPeR框架，包含两个核心机制：(1) 场景转换估计——估计当前场景是否满足用户需求，必要时引导用户转向更合适的场景；(2) 贝叶斯逆推理——利用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的似然来预测用户对候选项目的偏好。
AI.result: 在两个代表性基准上的大量实验表明，SiPeR在推荐准确性和回复生成质量方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SiPeR通过场景感知与贝叶斯推理的有效结合，显著提升了情境化对话推荐的性能，代码和数据已开源。

title: Refinement of Accelerated Demonstrations via Incremental Iterative Reference Learning Control for Fast Contact-Rich Imitation Learning
summary: Fast execution of contact-rich manipulation is critical for practical deployment, yet providing fast demonstrations for imitation learning (IL) remains challenging: humans cannot demonstrate at high speed, and naively accelerating demonstrations alters contact dynamics and induces large tracking errors. We present a method to autonomously refine time-accelerated demonstrations by repurposing Iterative Reference Learning Control (IRLC) to iteratively update the reference trajectory from observed tracking errors. However, applying IRLC directly at high speed tends to produce larger early-iteration errors and less stable transients. To address this issue, we propose Incremental Iterative Reference Learning Control (I2RLC), which gradually increases the speed while updating the reference, yielding high-fidelity trajectories. We validate on real-robot whiteboard erasing and peg-in-hole tasks using a teleoperation setup with a compliance-controlled follower and a 3D-printed haptic leader. Both IRLC and I2RLC achieve up to 10x faster demonstrations with reduced tracking error; moreover, I2RLC improves spatial similarity to the original trajectories by 22.5% on average over IRLC across three tasks and multiple speeds (3x-10x). We then use the refined trajectories to train IL policies; the resulting policies execute faster than the demonstrations and achieve 100% success rates in the peg-in-hole task at both seen and unseen positions, with I2RLC-trained policies exhibiting lower contact forces than those trained on IRLC-refined demonstrations. These results indicate that gradual speed scheduling coupled with reference adaptation provides a practical path to fast, contact-rich IL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出I2RLC方法，通过逐步加速并迭代更新参考轨迹，自主优化时间加速的接触式操作示教，在机器人擦白板和插销孔任务中实现高达10倍加速，并将空间相似度提升22.5%，训练出的模仿学习策略在高速执行下保持100%成功率且接触力更低。
AI.motivation: 接触式操作需要快速执行以实现实际部署，但高速示教面临人类无法快速演示、加速演示改变接触动力学并产生大跟踪误差的挑战。
AI.method: 提出增量式迭代参考学习控制（I2RLC），通过逐步增加速度并同时更新参考轨迹，解决直接加速下IRLC早期误差大、瞬态不稳定的问题。
AI.result: 在真实机器人擦白板和插销孔任务中，IRLC和I2RLC均实现高达10倍加速并降低跟踪误差；I2RLC在三个任务和多种速度下平均空间相似度提升22.5%；训练的IL策略在插销孔任务中达到100%成功率，且I2RLC训练的策略接触力更低。
AI.conclusion: 逐步速度调度结合参考轨迹自适应为高速接触式模仿学习提供了一条实用路径。

title: SceneOrchestra: Efficient Agentic 3D Scene Synthesis via Full Tool-Call Trajectory Generation
summary: Recent agentic frameworks for 3D scene synthesis have advanced realism and diversity by integrating heterogeneous generation and editing tools. These tools are organized into workflows orchestrated by an off-the-shelf LLM. Current approaches typically adopt an execute-review-reflect loop: at each step, the orchestrator executes a tool, renders intermediate results for review, and then decides on the tool and its parameters for the next step. However, this design has two key limitations. First, next-step tool selection and parameter configuration are driven by heuristic rules, which can lead to suboptimal execution flows, unnecessary tool invocations, degraded output quality, and increased runtime. Second, rendering and reviewing intermediate results after each step introduces additional latency. To address these issues, we propose SceneOrchestra, a trainable orchestration framework that optimizes the tool-call execution flow and eliminates the step-by-step review loop, improving both efficiency and output quality. SceneOrchestra consists of an orchestrator and a discriminator, which we fine-tune with a two-phase training strategy. In the first phase, the orchestrator learns context-aware tool selection and complete tool-call trajectory generation, while the discriminator is trained to assess the quality of full trajectories, enabling it to select the best trajectory from multiple candidates. In the second phase, we perform interleaved training, where the discriminator adapts to the orchestrator's evolving trajectory distribution and distills its discriminative capability back into the orchestrator. At inference, we only use the orchestrator to generate and execute full tool-call trajectories from instructions, without requiring the discriminator. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art scene quality while reducing runtime compared to previous work.

AI.tldr: SceneOrchestra提出了一种可训练的编排框架，通过两阶段训练策略优化3D场景合成的工具调用流程，消除了逐步骤的审查循环，在提升场景质量的同时降低了运行时间。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM编排的3D场景合成方法存在两个关键局限：一是工具选择与参数配置依赖启发式规则，导致执行流程次优、不必要的工具调用和质量下降；二是逐步骤渲染和审查中间结果引入了额外延迟。
AI.method: 提出SceneOrchestra框架，包含编排器（orchestrator）和判别器（discriminator），采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段让编排器学习上下文感知的工具选择和完整工具调用轨迹生成，判别器学习评估完整轨迹质量；第二阶段进行交错训练，判别器适配编排器演进的轨迹分布并将其判别能力蒸馏回编排器。推理时仅使用编排器生成并执行完整的工具调用轨迹。
AI.result: 在3D场景合成任务上实现了最先进的场景质量，同时相比之前的工作减少了运行时间。
AI.conclusion: 通过将工具编排从启发式规则驱动的逐步骤循环转变为可学习的完整轨迹生成，显著提升了3D场景合成的效率与质量。

title: LongBench: Evaluating Robotic Manipulation Policies on Real-World Long-Horizon Tasks
summary: Robotic manipulation policies often degrade over extended horizons, yet existing benchmarks provide limited insight into why such failures occur. Most prior benchmarks are either simulation-based or report aggregate success, making it difficult to disentangle the distinct sources of temporal difficulty in real-world execution. We introduce LongBench, a real-world benchmark for evaluating long-horizon manipulation. LongBench consists of over 1,000 real-world episodes, covering two complementary regimes: Context-Independent (fully observable) and Context-Dependent (ambiguity-driven). By organizing tasks into capability- and ambiguity-specific subsets, LongBench enables mechanism-aware evaluation of execution robustness, temporal consistency, and context-dependent reasoning. Evaluating six state-of-the-art policies reveals that long-horizon performance is not governed by a single factor. We observe that performance in fully observable settings is more strongly associated with execution robustness, while contextual difficulty varies across tasks and is not consistently improved by memory-based methods. We hope that LongBench serves as a useful benchmark for studying long-horizon manipulation and for developing policies with stronger robustness across both execution and contextual challenges.

AI.tldr: LongBench是一个包含1000+真实世界episode的长时程操作基准，通过区分上下文无关（完全可观测）和上下文相关（歧义驱动）两类任务，揭示了长时程策略性能下降并非由单一因素导致：完全可观测场景中执行鲁棒性更关键，而上下文困难则随任务变化且记忆方法不能一致改善。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作策略在长时程任务中性能退化严重，但现有基准测试多为仿真环境或仅报告聚合成功率，无法解耦真实世界中导致时间维度困难的不同原因。
AI.method: 构建包含1000+真实世界episode的LongBench基准，将任务组织成上下文无关（完全可观测）和上下文相关（歧义驱动）两个互补场景，并按能力和歧义类型细分子集，实现机制可感知的评估。
AI.result: 对六种最先进策略的评估表明，长时程性能受多因素影响：完全可观测场景下性能与执行鲁棒性更相关，而上下文难度因任务而异，基于记忆的方法不能一致提升性能。
AI.conclusion: LongBench可作为研究长时程操作的有效基准，有助于开发在执⾏和上下文挑战两方面都具备更强鲁棒性的策略。

title: MMCORE: MultiModal COnnection with Representation Aligned Latent Embeddings
summary:
We present MMCORE, a unified framework designed for multimodal image generation and editing. MMCORE leverages a pre-trained Vision-Language Model (VLM) to predict semantic visual embeddings via learnable query tokens, which subsequently serve as conditioning signals for a diffusion model. This streamlined design effectively transfers the rich understanding and reasoning capabilities of VLMs into the visual generation process. By obviating the need for deep fusion between autoregressive and diffusion models or training from scratch, MMCORE significantly reduces computational overhead while maintaining high-fidelity synthesis.
  MMCORE seamlessly integrates text-to-image synthesis with interleaved image generation, demonstrating robust multimodal comprehension in complex scenarios such as spatial reasoning and visual grounding. Comprehensive evaluations indicate that MMCORE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across a broad spectrum of text-to-image and single/multi-image editing benchmarks.

AI.tldr: MMCORE是一个统一框架，利用预训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）通过可学习查询令牌预测语义视觉嵌入，并将其作为扩散模型的条件信号，实现多模态图像生成与编辑，在降低计算开销的同时保持高保真合成，并在文本到图像生成和图像编辑任务上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态图像生成与编辑方法需要深度的自回归与扩散模型融合或从头训练，计算开销大。作者希望设计一个统一框架，能够高效利用VLMs的丰富理解和推理能力，同时避免高昂的计算成本。
AI.method: MMCORE利用预训练的VLM通过可学习查询令牌预测语义视觉嵌入，将其作为扩散模型的条件信号，实现文本到图像合成和交错图像生成，无需深度融合或从头训练。
AI.result: 在文本到图像生成及单/多图像编辑基准上，MMCORE持续优于现有最先进基线方法，并在空间推理和视觉定位等复杂场景中展现出强大的多模态理解能力。
AI.conclusion: MMCORE通过VLM语义嵌入引导扩散模型的设计，在降低计算开销的同时实现了高保真图像生成与编辑，为多模态生成任务提供了一个高效且统一的解决方案。

title: Anchor-and-Resume Concession Under Dynamic Pricing for LLM-Augmented Freight Negotiation
summary:
Freight brokerages negotiate thousands of carrier rates daily under dynamic pricing conditions where models frequently revise targets mid-conversation. Classical time-dependent concession frameworks use a fixed shape parameter $β$ that cannot adapt to these updates. Deriving $β$ from the live spread enables adaptation but introduces a new problem: a pricing shift can cause the formula to retract a previous offer, violating monotonicity. LLM-powered brokers offer flexibility but require expensive reasoning models, produce non-deterministic pricing, and remain vulnerable to prompt injection.
  We propose a two-index anchor-and-resume framework that addresses both limitations. A spread-derived $β$ maps each load's margin structure to the correct concession posture, while the anchor-and-resume mechanism guarantees monotonically non-decreasing offers under arbitrary pricing shifts. All pricing decisions remain in a deterministic formula; the LLM, when used, serves only as a natural-language translation layer.
