Empirical evaluation across 115,125 negotiations shows that the adaptive $β$ tailors behavior by regime: in narrow spreads, it concedes quickly to prioritize deal closure and load coverage; in medium and wide spreads, it matches or exceeds the best fixed-$β$ baselines in broker savings. Against an unconstrained 20-billion-parameter LLM broker, it achieves similar agreement rates and savings. Against LLM-powered carriers as more realistic stochastic counterparties, it maintains comparable savings and higher agreement rates than against rule-based opponents. By decoupling the LLM from pricing logic, the framework scales horizontally to thousands of concurrent negotiations with negligible inference cost and transparent decision-making.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种双索引锚定-恢复（anchor-and-resume）框架，通过从价差动态推导β参数并保证单调性，解决了货运经纪谈判中动态定价与单调性冲突的问题，同时将LLM限制为自然语言翻译层，保留了确定性定价逻辑。
AI.motivation: 传统时间依赖让步框架使用固定形状参数β，无法适应动态定价中频繁修订目标的情况；而由实时价差推导β虽能适应，但定价偏移会导致回撤先前报价，违反单调性。LLM驱动的经纪人虽灵活，但昂贵、非确定性且易受提示注入攻击。
AI.method: 提出双索引锚定-恢复框架：(1) 由价差推导的β将每批货物的利润结构映射到正确的让步姿态；(2) 锚定-恢复机制保证在任意定价偏移下报价单调非递减。所有定价决策由确定性公式完成，LLM仅作为自然语言翻译层。
AI.result: 在115,125次谈判实验中：自适应β在窄价差中快速让步优先成交；在中宽价差中达到或超越最优固定β基线。与无约束200亿参数LLM经纪人相比，达成相似协议率和节省。对LLM驱动的承运方（更真实的随机对手）相比基于规则的对手，保持了相当节省和更高协议率。
AI.conclusion: 通过将LLM与定价逻辑解耦，该框架可横向扩展到数千并发谈判，推理成本可忽略不计，且决策透明。

title: IRIS: Interpolative Rényi Iterative Self-play for Large Language Model Fine-Tuning
summary: Self-play fine-tuning enables large language models to improve beyond supervised fine-tuning without additional human annotations by contrasting annotated responses with self-generated ones. Many existing methods rely on a fixed divergence regime. SPIN is closely related to a KL-based regime, SPACE to a Jensen-Shannon-style objective via noise contrastive estimation, and SPIF to $χ^2$-regularized self-play. Since these divergences exhibit different strengths depending on the distributional gap between model and target, no single choice appears to provide favorable learning dynamics across training stages. We propose IRIS (Interpolative Rényi Iterative Self-play), a Rényi-based self-play fine-tuning framework with a continuously adjustable objective. IRIS decomposes into two independent tilted risk terms over annotated and synthetic data, with exponential importance weights controlled by the order parameter $α$. We show that several self-play objectives can be interpreted as limiting or representative regimes at particular values of $α$, providing a unified theoretical perspective on these methods. An adaptive order schedule further adjusts $α$ to the distributional gap, shifting from sharper importance weighting early in training to smoother refinement near convergence. Theoretically, we establish the fixed-point property of IRIS and analyze how $α$ controls gradient concentration. Experiments on Zephyr-7B and Qwen2.5-3B across ten benchmarks show that IRIS improves upon baselines, reaching 44.57\% average score with gains across iterations. In our setting, IRIS with only 26$k$ annotated samples surpasses standard supervised fine-tuning trained on the full 200$k$ dataset.

AI.tldr: IRIS提出了一种基于Rényi散度的可调节自博弈微调框架，通过连续可调的阶参数α统一了多种自博弈目标，并采用自适应调度策略，在仅26k标注样本下超越全量200k数据的SFT基线。
AI.motivation: 现有自博弈微调方法（SPIN、SPACE、SPIF）依赖固定的散度约束，不同散度在不同训练阶段表现各异，缺乏统一的、能适应模型与目标分布差距动态变化的可调节目标。
AI.method: 将Rényi散度引入自博弈框架，分解为标注数据与合成数据上的两项独立倾斜风险项，指数重要性权重由α控制；并提出自适应阶数调度，随训练进程动态调整α值。
AI.result: 在Zephyr-7B和Qwen2.5-3B上跨10个基准的平均得分达44.57%，且仅用26k标注样本即超越200k全量数据的SFT结果。
AI.conclusion: IRIS通过可调节的Rényi散度统一了多种自博弈方法，自适应α调度有效应对不同训练阶段的分布差异，实现了数据高效且性能更优的微调。

title: Interval POMDP Shielding for Imperfect-Perception Agents
summary:
Autonomous systems that rely on learned perception can make unsafe decisions when sensor readings are misclassified. We study shielding for this setting: given a proposed action, a shield blocks actions that could violate safety. We consider the common case where system dynamics are known but perception uncertainty must be estimated from finite labeled data. From these data we build confidence intervals for the probabilities of perception outcomes and use them to model the system as a finite Interval Partially Observable Markov Decision Process with discrete states and actions. We then propose an algorithm to compute a conservative set of beliefs over the underlying state that is consistent with the observations seen so far.
  This enables us to construct a runtime shield that comes with a finite-horizon guarantee: with high probability over the training data, if the true perception uncertainty rates lie within the learned intervals, then every action admitted by the shield satisfies a stated lower bound on safety. Experiments on four case studies show that our shielding approach (and variants derived from it) improves the safety of the system over state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于学习感知的自主系统的安全防护问题。利用有限标注数据构建感知不确定性的置信区间，将系统建模为区间部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（Interval-POMDP），并提出一种运行时屏蔽算法，在有限时域内提供高概率的安全保证。实验表明该方法优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 依赖学习感知的自主系统可能因传感器误分类而做出不安全决策，现有方法缺乏在感知不确定性来自有限标注数据时的形式化安全保证。
AI.method: 1）从有限标注数据构建感知结果概率的置信区间；2）将系统建模为离散状态和动作的区间部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（Interval-POMDP）；3）提出算法计算与观测一致的保守信念集；4）构建运行时屏蔽，提供有限时域安全保证。
AI.result: 在四个案例研究中，所提屏蔽方法及其变体在提升系统安全性方面优于最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于区间POMDP的运行时屏蔽方法能够在感知不确定性仅来自有限数据的情况下，以高概率保证被允许动作满足安全下界，有效提升自主系统的安全性。

title: LiDAR-based Crowd Navigation with Visible Edge Group Representation
summary: Robot navigation in crowded pedestrian environments is a well-known challenge and we explore the practical deployment of group-based representations in this setting. Pedestrian groups have been empirically shown to enable a mobile robot's navigation behavior to be safer and more social. However, existing approaches either explored groups only in limited scenarios with no high-density crowds or depended on external detection modules to track individuals, which are prone to noise and errors due to occlusions in crowds. We show that group prediction accuracy affects navigation performance only marginally in crowded environments. Based on this observation, we propose the visible edge-based group representation. We additionally demonstrate via simulation experiments that our navigation framework, integrated with the simplified group representation, performs comparatively in terms of safety and socialness in dense crowds, while achieving faster computation speed. Finally, we deploy our navigation framework on a real robot to explore the benefits of practically deploying group-based representations in the real world.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在拥挤行人环境中基于群体的机器人导航表示方法，提出了一种简化但高效的可见边缘群体表示，在保持安全性和社交性的同时显著提升了计算速度，并在真实机器人上进行了部署验证。
AI.motivation: 现有群体感知导航方法要么局限于低密度场景，要么依赖易受遮挡噪声影响的外部个体检测模块，缺乏在密集人群中的实用部署方案。
AI.method: 首先通过实验发现群体预测精度对密集人群中的导航性能影响有限；基于此观察，提出可见边缘群体表示（visible edge-based group representation），将其集成到导航框架中。
AI.result: 在仿真实验中，该简化群体表示在密集人群中实现了与复杂方法相当的安全性和社交性，同时计算速度更快；并在真实机器人上成功部署。
AI.conclusion: 群体预测精度在密集环境中对导航性能影响不大，因此采用简化群体表示是实用且高效的选择，有助于群体感知导航从仿真走向真实部署。

title: Surrogate Functionals for Machine-Learned Orbital-Free Density Functional Theory
summary: We introduce surrogate functionals: machine-learned energy functionals for orbital-free density functional theory (OF-DFT) which are defined not by universal fidelity to a physical reference, but merely by the requirement that density optimization with a fixed procedure yields the true ground-state density. Helpfully, training surrogate functionals requires only ground-state densities, no energies or gradients away from the ground state. We here propose a gradient-descent-improvement loss that guarantees exponential convergence of the density to the ground state, and combine it with an adaptive sampling scheme that concentrates learning around the optimization trajectories actually visited during inference. On the QM9 and QMugs benchmarks, surrogate functionals achieve density errors competitive with or improving upon the state of the art for fully supervised machine-learned OF-DFT, while eliminating the need for the $O(N^3)$ orthononormalization step required by prior work, yielding improved runtime scaling for larger systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于无轨道密度泛函理论(OF-DFT)的机器学习能量泛函——替代泛函(surrogate functionals)，其不追求通用物理保真度，而是仅要求通过固定流程的密度优化能得到真实基态密度。该方法通过梯度下降改进损失实现密度指数收敛至基态，并结合自适应采样策略聚焦于推理时实际访问的优化轨迹。在QM9和QMugs基准上，替代泛函的密度误差与最先进的全监督机器学习OF-DFT相当或更优，同时消除了先前工作中所需的O(N³)正交归一化步骤，从而提升了大规模系统的运行时间可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习OF-DFT方法需要能量或梯度等监督信号，且存在计算瓶颈(O(N³)正交归一化)。作者希望设计一种仅需基态密度作为训练数据、无需物理参考能量/梯度，同时能提升计算效率的能量泛函。
AI.method: 提出替代泛函(surrogate functionals)，通过梯度下降改进损失(Gradient-Descent-Improvement loss)保证密度指数收敛至基态；结合自适应采样策略，集中学习推理时实际访问的优化轨迹区域。
AI.result: 在QM9和QMugs基准上，替代泛函的密度误差与全监督方法相当或更优；消除了O(N³)正交归一化步骤，提升了大规模系统的计算可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 替代泛函为OF-DFT提供了一种更高效且计算可扩展的机器学习方案，通过放弃通用物理保真度而专注于密度优化流程的正确性，在保持精度的同时显著降低了计算复杂度。

title: Exploiting LLM-as-a-Judge Disposition on Free Text Legal QA via Prompt Optimization
comment: Accepted at the 21st International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Law (ICAIL 2026), Singapore, June 8-12, 2026. 10 pages, 14 figures, 2 tables
summary: This work explores the role of prompt design and judge selection in LLM-as-a-Judge evaluations of free text legal question answering. We examine whether automatic task prompt optimization improves over human-centered design, whether optimization effectiveness varies by judge feedback style, and whether optimized prompts transfer across judges. We systematically address these questions on the LEXam benchmark by optimizing task prompts using the ProTeGi method with feedback from two judges (Qwen3-32B, DeepSeek-V3) across four task models, and then testing cross-judge transfer. Automatic optimization consistently outperforms the baseline, with lenient judge feedback yielding higher and more consistent gains than strict judge feedback. Prompts optimized with lenient feedback transfer better to strict judges than the reverse direction. Analysis reveals that lenient judges provide permissive feedback, yielding prompts with broader applicability, whereas strict judges produce restrictive feedback, leading to judge-specific overfitting. Our findings demonstrate algorithmically optimizing prompts on training data can outperform human-centered prompt design and that judges' dispositions during optimization shape prompt generalizability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究LLM-as-a-Judge在法律问答评估中的提示设计和裁判选择，发现自动提示优化优于人工设计，宽松裁判反馈产生的提示泛化性更好，而严格裁判反馈会导致过拟合。
AI.motivation: 探究提示设计和裁判选择对LLM-as-a-Judge评估的影响，特别是自动提示优化是否优于人工设计、优化效果是否因裁判反馈风格而异、优化后的提示能否跨裁判迁移。
AI.method: 基于LEXam基准，使用ProTeGi方法优化任务提示，采用Qwen3-32B和DeepSeek-V3两个裁判模型，在四个任务模型上测试，并进行跨裁判迁移实验。
AI.result: 自动优化一致优于基线；宽松裁判反馈带来更高且更一致的性能提升；宽松反馈优化的提示向严格裁判迁移效果更好；严格裁判反馈易导致提示过拟合。
AI.conclusion: 算法化提示优化可超越人工设计，裁判的反馈风格显著影响提示的泛化能力——宽松裁判产生更通用的提示，严格裁判导致裁判特定过拟合。

title: The Origin of Edge of Stability
summary: Full-batch gradient descent on neural networks drives the largest Hessian eigenvalue to the threshold $2/η$, where $η$ is the learning rate. This phenomenon, the Edge of Stability, has resisted a unified explanation: existing accounts establish self-regulation near the edge but do not explain why the trajectory is forced toward $2/η$ from arbitrary initialization. We introduce the edge coupling, a functional on consecutive iterate pairs whose coefficient is uniquely fixed by the gradient-descent update. Differencing its criticality condition yields a step recurrence with stability boundary $2/η$, and a second-order expansion yields a loss-change formula whose telescoping sum forces curvature toward $2/η$. The two formulas involve different Hessian averages, but the mean value theorem localizes each to the true Hessian at an interior point of the step segment, yielding exact forcing of the Hessian eigenvalue with no gap. Setting both gradients of the edge coupling to zero classifies fixed points and period-two orbits; near a fixed point, the problem reduces to a function of the half-amplitude alone, which determines which directions support period-two orbits and on which side of the critical learning rate they appear.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"边缘耦合"（edge coupling）函数，从梯度下降更新中唯一确定其系数，通过差分化临界条件导出稳定性边界2/η，并利用二阶展开的损失变化公式的 telescoping 和迫使 Hessian 特征值趋向2/η。两个公式涉及不同 Hessian 平均，但中值定理将其定位到步长段内点的真实 Hessian，实现无间隙的精确强迫。边缘耦合的梯度归零可分类不动点和二周期轨道，并在不动点附近将问题约化为半振幅函数，决定哪些方向支持二周期轨道及其与临界学习率的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有理论虽然建立了梯度下降在稳定性边界附近的自调节现象，但未能解释为何从任意初始化出发，轨迹都会被强制推向2/η这一特定临界值。本文旨在给出一个统一的机制来解释这一"稳定边缘"（Edge of Stability）现象的起源。
AI.method: 引入"边缘耦合"（edge coupling）函数，这是一个定义在连续迭代对上的泛函，其系数由梯度下降更新唯一确定。通过差分化临界条件得到步长递推关系，稳定性边界为2/η；通过二阶展开得到损失变化公式，其 telescoping 和迫使 Hessian 特征值趋向2/η。利用中值定理将两种 Hessian 平均定位到步长段内点的真实 Hessian，实现无间隙的精确强迫。通过将边缘耦合的梯度设为零来分类不动点和二周期轨道。
AI.result: 成功推导出 Hessian 特征值被精确强迫趋向2/η的机制，无近似间隙；建立了不动点和二周期轨道的分类方法，并将不动点附近的问题简化为关于半振幅的函数，从而确定哪些方向支持二周期轨道以及它们出现在临界学习率的哪一侧。
AI.conclusion: 边缘耦合框架为"稳定边缘"现象提供了一个统一的、无间隙的数学解释，揭示了梯度下降动力学中 Hessian 特征值被强制推向2/η的内在机制，并为周期性动力学提供了完整的分类理论。

title: AnyRecon: Arbitrary-View 3D Reconstruction with Video Diffusion Model
summary: Sparse-view 3D reconstruction is essential for modeling scenes from casual captures, but remain challenging for non-generative reconstruction. Existing diffusion-based approaches mitigates this issues by synthesizing novel views, but they often condition on only one or two capture frames, which restricts geometric consistency and limits scalability to large or diverse scenes. We propose AnyRecon, a scalable framework for reconstruction from arbitrary and unordered sparse inputs that preserves explicit geometric control while supporting flexible conditioning cardinality. To support long-range conditioning, our method constructs a persistent global scene memory via a prepended capture view cache, and removes temporal compression to maintain frame-level correspondence under large viewpoint changes. Beyond better generative model, we also find that the interplay between generation and reconstruction is crucial for large-scale 3D scenes. Thus, we introduce a geometry-aware conditioning strategy that couples generation and reconstruction through an explicit 3D geometric memory and geometry-driven capture-view retrieval. To ensure efficiency, we combine 4-step diffusion distillation with context-window sparse attention to reduce quadratic complexity. Extensive experiments demonstrate robust and scalable reconstruction across irregular inputs, large viewpoint gaps, and long trajectories.

AI.tldr: AnyRecon提出了一种可扩展的稀疏视角3D重建框架，通过持久化全局场景内存、几何感知条件策略和4步扩散蒸馏，实现了对任意无序输入的高质量重建，支持灵活的条件基数并保持几何一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散方法通常仅依赖一两个捕获帧作为条件，限制了几何一致性和对大场景的可扩展性。缺乏支持任意数量无序稀疏输入且保持显式几何控制的可扩展框架。
AI.method: 1) 构建持久化全局场景内存（捕获视图缓存）支持长程条件；2) 引入显式3D几何内存和几何驱动的捕获视图检索，实现生成与重建的耦合；3) 采用4步扩散蒸馏结合上下文窗口稀疏注意力降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在非规则输入、大视角差距和长轨迹场景下均展现出鲁棒且可扩展的重建性能。
AI.conclusion: AnyRecon通过将显式几何控制与灵活的扩散条件机制相结合，有效解决了稀疏视角重建中的几何一致性和可扩展性问题，为大规模3D场景重建提供了新范式。

title: Rewind-IL: Online Failure Detection and State Respawning for Imitation Learning
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables. Project page at https://sjay05.github.io/rewind-il
summary: Imitation learning has enabled robots to acquire complex visuomotor manipulation skills from demonstrations, but deployment failures remain a major obstacle, especially for long-horizon action-chunked policies. Once execution drifts off the demonstration manifold, these policies often continue producing locally plausible actions without recovering from the failure. Existing runtime monitors either require failure data, over-trigger under benign feature drift, or stop at failure detection without providing a recovery mechanism. We present Rewind-IL, a training-free online safeguard framework for generative action-chunked imitation policies. Rewind-IL combines a zero-shot failure detector based on Temporal Inter-chunk Discrepancy Estimate (TIDE), calibrated with split conformal prediction, with a state-respawning mechanism that returns the robot to a semantically verified safe intermediate state. Offline, a vision-language model identifies recovery checkpoints in demonstrations, and the frozen policy encoder is used to construct a compact checkpoint feature database. Online, Rewind-IL monitors self-consistency in overlapping action chunks, tracks similarity to the checkpoint library, and, upon failure, rewinds execution to the latest verified safe state before restarting inference from a clean policy state. Experiments on real-world and simulated long-horizon manipulation tasks, including transfer to flow-matching action-chunked policies, demonstrate that policy-internal consistency coupled with semantically grounded respawning offers a practical route to improved reliability in imitation learning. Supplemental materials are available at https://sjay05.github.io/rewind-il

AI.tldr: Rewind-IL 提出了一种无需训练的在线安全防护框架，通过时序块间差异估计（TIDE）进行零样本失败检测，并结合状态重生机制，使机器人从执行失败中恢复到语义验证的安全中间状态，从而提升生成式动作块模仿策略在长程操作任务中的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有的模仿学习策略在部署时容易出现执行漂移，且现有运行时监控方法要么需要失败数据，要么在良性特征漂移下过度触发，要么仅检测失败而不提供恢复机制，缺乏有效的失败恢复手段。
AI.method: 1) 提出基于时序块间差异估计（TIDE）的零样本失败检测器，结合分裂共形预测进行校准；2) 构建基于视觉-语言模型的恢复检查点特征库；3) 在线监控重叠动作块的自一致性和检查点库相似度；4) 失败时回滚到最新已验证安全状态，从干净的策略状态重启推理。
AI.result: 在真实世界和模拟的长程操作任务（包括迁移到流匹配动作块策略）上验证了有效性，表明策略内部一致性与语义化状态重生相结合能显著提升模仿学习的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 策略内部一致性与语义化状态重生结合是提升模仿学习可靠性的实用路径。

title: CityRAG: Stepping Into a City via Spatially-Grounded Video Generation
summary: We address the problem of generating a 3D-consistent, navigable environment that is spatially grounded: a simulation of a real location. Existing video generative models can produce a plausible sequence that is consistent with a text (T2V) or image (I2V) prompt. However, the capability to reconstruct the real world under arbitrary weather conditions and dynamic object configurations is essential for downstream applications including autonomous driving and robotics simulation. To this end, we present CityRAG, a video generative model that leverages large corpora of geo-registered data as context to ground generation to the physical scene, while maintaining learned priors for complex motion and appearance changes. CityRAG relies on temporally unaligned training data, which teaches the model to semantically disentangle the underlying scene from its transient attributes. Our experiments demonstrate that CityRAG can generate coherent minutes-long, physically grounded video sequences, maintain weather and lighting conditions over thousands of frames, achieve loop closure, and navigate complex trajectories to reconstruct real-world geography.

AI.tldr: CityRAG是一种视频生成模型，利用大规模地理注册数据作为上下文，生成3D一致、可导航且空间锚定的真实场景模拟视频，能够处理任意天气和动态物体配置，生成数分钟长、物理一致的视频序列。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型（T2V/I2V）虽能生成与文本或图像提示一致的合理序列，但缺乏重建真实世界场景的能力，特别是在任意天气条件和动态物体配置下。而自动驾驶和机器人仿真等下游应用需要这种能够精确重建真实物理场景的能力。
AI.method: CityRAG利用大规模地理注册数据作为上下文，将生成过程锚定到真实物理场景，同时保留复杂运动和外貌变化的先验知识。模型使用时间上不对齐的训练数据，使其学会在语义上解耦底层场景与其瞬态属性（如天气、光照、动态物体）。
AI.result: CityRAG能够生成数分钟长、物理锚定的连贯视频序列；在数千帧中保持天气和光照条件的一致性；实现闭环（loop closure）；能够导航复杂轨迹以重建真实世界地理环境。
AI.conclusion: CityRAG通过将生成模型与地理注册数据相结合，成功实现了对真实世界场景的3D一致重建，为自动驾驶和机器人仿真等应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: ReconVLA: An Uncertainty-Guided and Failure-Aware Vision-Language-Action Framework for Robotic Control
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have emerged as generalist robotic controllers capable of mapping visual observations and natural language instructions to continuous action sequences. However, VLAs provide no calibrated measure of confidence in their action predictions, thus limiting their reliability in real-world settings where uncertainty and failures must be anticipated. To address this problem we introduce ReconVLA, a reliable conformal model that produces uncertainty-guided and failure-aware control signals. Concretely, our approach applies conformal prediction directly to the action token outputs of pretrained VLA policies, yielding calibrated uncertainty estimates that correlate with execution quality and task success. Furthermore, we extend conformal prediction to the robot state space to detect outliers or unsafe states before failures occur, providing a simple yet effective failure detection mechanism that complements the action-level uncertainty. We evaluate ReconVLA in both simulation and real robot experiments across diverse manipulation tasks. Our results show that conformalized action predictions consistently improve failure anticipation, reduce catastrophic errors, and provide a calibrated measure of confidence without retraining or modifying the underlying VLA.

AI.tldr: ReconVLA通过将共形预测应用于VLA模型的动作标记输出和机器人状态空间，实现了校准的不确定性估计和故障感知控制，无需重新训练即可提升故障预测能力并减少灾难性错误。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型缺乏对动作预测置信度的校准度量，限制了其在现实世界中对不确定性和失败进行预期的可靠性。
AI.method: 将共形预测直接应用于预训练VLA策略的动作标记输出以获取校准的不确定性估计；进一步将共形预测扩展到机器人状态空间以检测异常或不安全状态，实现故障检测机制。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实机器人实验中，共形化的动作预测持续改进了故障预测能力，减少了灾难性错误，并提供了校准的置信度度量。
AI.conclusion: ReconVLA能够在无需重新训练或修改底层VLA的情况下，提升VLA模型的可靠性和安全性，为不确定性引导和故障感知控制提供有效方案。

title: DialToM: A Theory of Mind Benchmark for Forecasting State-Driven Dialogue Trajectories
comment: Submitted to KDD 2026 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been shown to possess Theory of Mind (ToM) abilities. However, it remains unclear whether this stems from robust reasoning or spurious correlations. We introduce DialToM, a human-verified benchmark built from natural human dialogue using a multiple-choice framework. We evaluate not only mental state prediction (Literal ToM) but also the functional utility of these states (Functional ToM) through Prospective Diagnostic Forecasting -- probing whether models can identify state-consistent dialogue trajectories solely from mental-state profiles. Our results reveal a significant reasoning asymmetry: while LLMs excel at identifying mental states, most (except for Gemini 3 Pro) fail to leverage this understanding to forecast social trajectories. Additionally, we find only weak semantic similarities between human and LLM-generated inferences. To facilitate reproducibility, the DialToM dataset and evaluation code are publicly available at https://github.com/Stealth-py/DialToM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DialToM基准，用于评估LLM在自然对话中的心理理论能力，区分了字面ToM（识别心理状态）和功能ToM（利用心理状态预测对话轨迹）。实验发现LLM在识别心理状态上表现良好，但除了Gemini 3 Pro外，大多数模型无法利用这些状态进行社会轨迹预测，且LLM与人类的推理语义相似度较低。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已证明LLM具备一定的心理理论能力，但不清楚这种能力是源于稳健推理还是虚假相关性。因此需要更严谨的基准来区分LLM对心理状态的识别能力与其功能性运用能力。
AI.method: 构建基于自然对话的人类验证基准DialToM，采用多项选择框架，评估字面ToM（心理状态预测）和功能ToM（前瞻性诊断预测，即仅从心理状态特征预测一致性的对话轨迹）。
AI.result: LLM在识别心理状态方面表现出色，但除Gemini 3 Pro外，大多数模型无法利用心理状态预测社会轨迹；人类与LLM生成的推理语义相似度较低。
AI.conclusion: LLM在ToM任务中存在显著的推理不对称性——擅长识别状态但难以功能性运用，表明其ToM能力仍存在根本性局限。

title: Diffusion-Based Optimization for Accelerated Convergence of Redundant Dual-Arm Minimum Time Problems
summary: We present a framework leveraging a novel variant of the model-based diffusion algorithm to minimize the time required for a redundant dual-arm robot configuration to follow a desired relative Cartesian path. Our prior work proposed a bi-level optimization approach for the dual-arm problem, where we derived the analytical solution to the lower-level convex sub-problem and solved the high-level nonconvex problem using a primal-dual approach. However, the gradient-based nature leads to a large computation overhead, and it prohibits directly imposing an $L_{\infty}$ Cartesian error constraint along the joint trajectory due to the sparsity of the gradient. In this work, we propose a diffusion-based framework that relies on probabilistic sampling to tackle the aforementioned challenges in the nonconvex high-level problem, leading to a 35x reduction in the runtime and 34\% less Cartesian error compared to our prior work.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于模型扩散算法的新变体框架，用于最小化冗余双臂机器人配置沿期望相对笛卡尔路径运动的时间，相比先前方法实现了35倍运行时间缩减和34%的笛卡尔误差降低。
AI.motivation: 先前工作中基于梯度的双层优化方法存在计算开销大、梯度稀疏导致无法直接施加L∞笛卡尔误差约束的问题。
AI.method: 采用基于概率采样的扩散框架来处理非凸高层问题，替代原有的梯度方法。
AI.result: 运行时间减少35倍，笛卡尔误差降低34%。
AI.conclusion: 基于扩散的框架有效解决了梯度方法的局限性，显著提升了双臂机器人路径跟踪的效率与精度。

title: Unlocking the Forecasting Economy: A Suite of Datasets for the Full Lifecycle of Prediction Market: [Experiments \& Analysis]
summary: Prediction markets are markets for trading claims on future events, such as presidential elections, and their prices provide continuously updated signals of collective beliefs. In decentralized platforms such as Polymarket, the market lifecycle spans market creation, token registration, trading, oracle interaction, dispute, and final settlement, yet the corresponding data are fragmented across heterogeneous off-chain and on-chain sources. We present the first continuously maintained dataset suite for the full lifecycle of decentralized prediction markets, built on Polymarket. To address the challenges of large-scale cross-source integration, incomplete linkage, and continuous synchronization, we build a unified relational data system that integrates three canonical layers: market metadata, fill-level trading records, and oracle-resolution events, through identifier resolution, on-chain recovery, and incremental updates. The resulting dataset spans October 2020 to March 2026 and comprises more than 770 thousand market records, over 943 million fill records, and nearly 2 million oracle events. We describe the data model, collection pipeline, and consistency mechanisms that make the dataset reproducible and extensible, and we demonstrate its utility through descriptive analyses of market activity and two downstream case studies: NBA outcome calibration and CPI expectation reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个覆盖去中心化预测市场完整生命周期的持续维护数据集，基于Polymarket平台构建，整合了超过77万市场记录、9.43亿成交记录和近200万个预言机事件，并展示了其在NBA结果校准和CPI预期重构等下游任务中的应用价值。
AI.motivation: 去中心化预测市场（如Polymarket）的数据分散在异构的链下和链上来源中，涵盖市场创建、代币注册、交易、预言机交互、争议和最终结算等完整生命周期，缺乏统一集成的数据集来支持大规模分析和研究。
AI.method: 构建统一的关系数据系统，集成三个规范层（市场元数据、逐笔成交记录、预言机解析事件），通过标识符解析、链上恢复和增量更新机制解决跨源集成、不完整链接和持续同步的挑战。
AI.result: 数据集覆盖2020年10月至2026年3月，包含超过77万市场记录、9.43亿成交记录、近200万预言机事件，并验证了数据集在NBA结果校准和CPI预期重构两个下游案例中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集具有可复现性和可扩展性，为去中心化预测市场研究提供了标准化的数据基础设施，填补了该领域缺乏完整生命周期数据集的空白。

title: Wan-Image: Pushing the Boundaries of Generative Visual Intelligence
summary: We present Wan-Image, a unified visual generation system explicitly engineered to paradigm-shift image generation models from casual synthesizers into professional-grade productivity tools. While contemporary diffusion models excel at aesthetic generation, they frequently encounter critical bottlenecks in rigorous design workflows that demand absolute controllability, complex typography rendering, and strict identity preservation. To address these challenges, Wan-Image features a natively unified multi-modal architecture by synergizing the cognitive capabilities of large language models with the high-fidelity pixel synthesis of diffusion transformers, which seamlessly translates highly nuanced user intents into precise visual outputs. It is fundamentally powered by large-scale multi-modal data scaling, a systematic fine-grained annotation engine, and curated reinforcement learning data to surpass basic instruction following and unlock expert-level professional capabilities. These include ultra-long complex text rendering, hyper-diverse portrait generation, palette-guided generation, multi-subject identity preservation, coherent sequential visual generation, precise multi-modal interactive editing, native alpha-channel generation, and high-efficiency 4K synthesis. Across diverse human evaluations, Wan-Image exceeds Seedream 5.0 Lite and GPT Image 1.5 in overall performance, reaching parity with Nano Banana Pro in challenging tasks. Ultimately, Wan-Image revolutionizes visual content creation across e-commerce, entertainment, education, and personal productivity, redefining the boundaries of professional visual synthesis.

AI.tldr: Wan-Image是一个统一的视觉生成系统，通过融合大语言模型的认知能力与扩散Transformer的高保真像素合成，将图像生成模型从随意生成器转变为专业级生产力工具，在可控性、复杂文本渲染和身份保持等专业任务上超越现有模型，达到与Nano Banana Pro相当的水平。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在美观生成方面表现优异，但在要求绝对可控性、复杂排版渲染和严格身份保留的专业设计工作流中存在关键瓶颈，亟需将图像生成模型从随意合成器转变为专业级生产力工具。
AI.method: 提出原生统一多模态架构，将大语言模型的认知能力与扩散Transformer的高保真像素合成协同结合；通过大规模多模态数据扩展、系统化细粒度标注引擎和经过精心设计的强化学习数据来超越基础的指令跟随能力。
AI.result: 在多样化人工评估中，Wan-Image在整体性能上超过了Seedream 5.0 Lite和GPT Image 1.5，在挑战性任务中达到了与Nano Banana Pro相当的水平。
AI.conclusion: Wan-Image革新了电子商务、娱乐、教育和个人生产力领域的视觉内容创作，重新定义了专业视觉合成的边界。

title: ONOTE: Benchmarking Omnimodal Notation Processing for Expert-level Music Intelligence
summary: Omnimodal Notation Processing (ONP) represents a unique frontier for omnimodal AI due to the rigorous, multi-dimensional alignment required across auditory, visual, and symbolic domains. Current research remains fragmented, focusing on isolated transcription tasks that fail to bridge the gap between superficial pattern recognition and the underlying musical logic. This landscape is further complicated by severe notation biases toward Western staff and the inherent unreliability of "LLM-as-a-judge" metrics, which often mask structural reasoning failures with systemic hallucinations. To establish a more rigorous standard, we introduce ONOTE, a multi-format benchmark that utilizes a deterministic pipeline--grounded in canonical pitch projection--to eliminate subjective scoring biases across diverse notation systems. Our evaluation of leading omnimodal models exposes a fundamental disconnect between perceptual accuracy and music-theoretic comprehension, providing a necessary framework for diagnosing reasoning vulnerabilities in complex, rule-constrained domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ONOTE基准，通过确定性管道消除主观评分偏差，揭示了当前全模态模型在感知准确性与音乐理论理解之间的根本脱节，为复杂规则约束领域的推理脆弱性诊断提供了框架。
AI.motivation: 当前全模态符号处理（ONP）研究碎片化，仅关注孤立的转录任务，无法弥合浅层模式识别与深层音乐逻辑之间的鸿沟；同时存在严重的记谱法偏向（集中于西方五线谱）以及"LLM-as-a-judge"指标的内在不可靠性，这些指标常以系统性幻觉掩盖结构推理失败。
AI.method: 引入ONOTE多格式基准，利用基于规范音高投影（canonical pitch projection）的确定性管道，消除跨多种记谱系统的主观评分偏差。
AI.result: 对领先全模态模型的评估揭示了感知准确性与音乐理论理解之间的根本脱节（fundamental disconnect），即模型在感知层面表现尚可但缺乏对音乐理论的结构性理解。
AI.conclusion: ONOTE提供了一个必要框架，用于诊断复杂、规则约束领域中的推理脆弱性，推动全模态AI研究从浅层模式识别走向真正的音乐逻辑理解。

title: Emergency Stopping for Liquid-manipulating Robots
summary: Manipulating open liquid containers is challenging because liquids are highly sensitive to vessel accelerations and jerks. Although spill-free liquid manipulation has been widely studied, emergency stopping under unexpected hazards has received little attention, despite the fact that abrupt braking may cause hazardous spills. This letter presents an emergency stop system for robots manipulating liquids in open containers. We formulate emergency stopping as an optimal control problem and solve it in a model predictive control framework to generate time-optimal, spill-free stopping trajectories. The method operates as a plug-and-play safety layer on top of existing slosh-free motion planning methods, enabling immediate reaction to detected hazards while accounting for nonlinear liquid dynamics. We demonstrate, through simulation and on a 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda robot, that the proposed approach achieves fast emergency stopping without spilling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于机器人操纵开放容器中液体的紧急停止系统，通过模型预测控制框架生成时间最优且无溢出的停止轨迹，作为即插即用的安全层，在检测到危险时能够快速响应而不造成液体溢出。
AI.motivation: 现有无溢出液体操纵研究主要关注平稳运动规划，但忽视了紧急制动场景下可能发生的危险溢出问题，缺乏针对意外危险的安全停止机制。
AI.method: 将紧急停止问题形式化为最优控制问题，在模型预测控制框架下求解，生成时间最优且无溢出的停止轨迹；该方法作为即插即用的安全层，叠加在现有无晃动运动规划方法之上，能够即时响应检测到的危险并考虑非线性液体动力学。
AI.result: 通过仿真和在7自由度Franka Emika Panda机器人上的实验，证明了所提方法能够在快速紧急停止的同时避免液体溢出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了机器人操纵液体时紧急制动可能导致溢出的安全问题，可作为现有无溢出规划方法的补充安全机制。

title: Scalable AI Inference: Performance Analysis and Optimization of AI Model Serving
summary: AI research often emphasizes model design and algorithmic performance, while deployment and inference remain comparatively underexplored despite being critical for real-world use. This study addresses that gap by investigating the performance and optimization of a BentoML-based AI inference system for scalable model serving developed in collaboration with graphworks.ai. The evaluation first establishes baseline performance under three realistic workload scenarios. To ensure a fair and reproducible assessment, a pre-trained RoBERTa sentiment analysis model is used throughout the experiments. The system is subjected to traffic patterns following gamma and exponential distributions in order to emulate real-world usage conditions, including steady, bursty, and high-intensity workloads. Key performance metrics, such as latency percentiles and throughput, are collected and analyzed to identify bottlenecks in the inference pipeline. Based on the baseline results, optimization strategies are introduced at multiple levels of the serving stack to improve efficiency and scalability. The optimized system is then reevaluated under the same workload conditions, and the results are compared with the baseline using statistical analysis to quantify the impact of the applied improvements. The findings demonstrate practical strategies for achieving efficient and scalable AI inference with BentoML. The study examines how latency and throughput scale under varying workloads, how optimizations at the runtime, service, and deployment levels affect response time, and how deployment in a single-node K3s cluster influences resilience during disruptions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于BentoML的AI推理系统的性能与优化，使用预训练的RoBERTa情感分析模型，在伽马分布和指数分布的工作负载（包括稳态、突发和高强度场景）下建立基线性能，随后在运行时、服务和部署多个层面引入优化策略，并在单节点K3s集群中评估优化效果。
AI.motivation: AI研究大多关注模型设计与算法性能，而部署和推理环节虽然对实际应用至关重要，却相对缺乏系统性的研究。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用BentoML构建AI推理系统，选用预训练RoBERTa模型，设计三种真实工作负载场景（稳态、突发、高强度），采用伽马分布和指数分布模拟流量模式，收集延迟百分位和吞吐量等关键指标，并在运行时、服务和部署层面实施优化，最后在单节点K3s集群中评估。
AI.result: 优化后的系统在相同工作负载条件下性能显著提升，通过统计分析量化了改进效果，揭示了延迟和吞吐量在不同工作负载下的扩展规律，以及各层面优化对响应时间的影响。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了使用BentoML实现高效可扩展AI推理的实用策略，并分析了单节点K3s集群部署在中断期间的韧性表现。

title: Generative Drifting for Conditional Medical Image Generation
summary: Conditional medical image generation plays an important role in many clinically relevant imaging tasks. However, existing methods still face a fundamental challenge in balancing inference efficiency, patient-specific fidelity, and distribution-level plausibility, particularly in high-dimensional 3D medical imaging. In this work, we propose GDM, a generative drifting framework that reformulates deterministic medical image prediction as a multi-objective learning problem to jointly promote distribution-level plausibility and patient-specific fidelity while retaining one-step inference. GDM extends drifting to 3D medical imaging through an attractive-repulsive drift that minimizes the discrepancy between the generator pushforward and the target distribution. To enable stable drifting-based learning in 3D volumetric data, GDM constructs a multi-level feature bank from a medical foundation encoder to support reliable affinity estimation and drifting field computation across complementary global, local, and spatial representations. In addition, a gradient coordination strategy in the shared output space improves optimization balance under competing distribution-level and fidelity-oriented objectives. We evaluate the proposed framework on two representative tasks, MRI-to-CT synthesis and sparse-view CT reconstruction. Experimental results show that GDM consistently outperforms a wide range of baselines, including GAN-based, flow-matching-based, and SDE-based generative models, as well as supervised regression methods, while improving the balance among anatomical fidelity, quantitative reliability, perceptual realism, and inference efficiency. These findings suggest that GDM provides a practical and effective framework for conditional 3D medical image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GDM（生成漂移框架），将确定性医学图像预测重述为多目标学习问题，在保持单步推理的同时联合提升分布级合理性和患者特异性保真度。通过吸引力-排斥漂移、多级特征库和梯度协调策略，在MRI到CT合成与稀疏视图CT重建任务上优于GAN、流匹配、SDE等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有条件医学图像生成方法在高维3D医学成像中难以平衡推理效率、患者特异性保真度和分布级合理性，亟需一种能同时兼顾三者且支持单步推理的有效框架。
AI.method: GDM将确定性预测重构为多目标学习，采用吸引力-排斥漂移最小化生成器前推分布与目标分布间的差异；构建基于医学基础编码器的多级特征库以支持可靠的亲和性估计和漂移场计算；引入梯度协调策略在共享输出空间中优化竞争目标的平衡。
AI.result: 在MRI-to-CT合成和稀疏视图CT重建两个任务上，GDM在解剖保真度、定量可靠性、感知真实性和推理效率的平衡上持续优于GAN、流匹配、SDE及有监督回归方法。
AI.conclusion: GDM为条件3D医学图像生成提供了一种实用且有效的框架。

title: FineCog-Nav: Integrating Fine-grained Cognitive Modules for Zero-shot Multimodal UAV Navigation
summary: UAV vision-language navigation (VLN) requires an agent to navigate complex 3D environments from an egocentric perspective while following ambiguous multi-step instructions over long horizons. Existing zero-shot methods remain limited, as they often rely on large base models, generic prompts, and loosely coordinated modules. In this work, we propose FineCog-Nav, a top-down framework inspired by human cognition that organizes navigation into fine-grained modules for language processing, perception, attention, memory, imagination, reasoning, and decision-making. Each module is driven by a moderate-sized foundation model with role-specific prompts and structured input-output protocols, enabling effective collaboration and improved interpretability. To support fine-grained evaluation, we construct AerialVLN-Fine, a curated benchmark of 300 trajectories derived from AerialVLN, with sentence-level instruction-trajectory alignment and refined instructions containing explicit visual endpoints and landmark references. Experiments show that FineCog-Nav consistently outperforms zero-shot baselines in instruction adherence, long-horizon planning, and generalization to unseen environments. These results suggest the effectiveness of fine-grained cognitive modularization for zero-shot aerial navigation. Project page: https://smartdianlab.github.io/projects-FineCogNav.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FineCog-Nav，一种受人类认知启发的自上而下无人机视觉语言导航框架，通过细粒度模块化（语言处理、感知、注意力、记忆、想象、推理、决策）和中等规模基础模型实现零样本导航，并在构建的AerialVLN-Fine基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本无人机视觉语言导航方法过度依赖大型基础模型、通用提示和松散耦合的模块，在复杂3D环境中遵循模糊多步指令的能力有限。为提升指令遵循、长程规划和泛化能力，需要更精细、结构化的导航框架。
AI.method: 提出FineCog-Nav，一个自上而下的认知启发框架，将导航分解为语言处理、感知、注意力、记忆、想象、推理和决策七个细粒度模块，每个模块由中等规模基础模型驱动，配有角色特定提示和结构化输入输出协议。同时构建AerialVLN-Fine基准，包含300条轨迹，具备句子级指令-轨迹对齐和含显式视觉端点与地标引用的精炼指令。
AI.result: 在AerialVLN-Fine基准上，FineCog-Nav在指令遵循、长程规划和对未知环境的泛化能力方面一致优于零样本基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度认知模块化方法能有效提升零样本无人机视觉语言导航的性能，模块间通过结构化协议协作增强了可解释性和导航效果。

title: Calibrating conditional risk
summary: We introduce and study the problem of calibrating conditional risk, which involves estimating the expected loss of a prediction model conditional on input features. We analyze this problem in both classification and regression settings and show that it is fundamentally equivalent to a standard regression task. For classification settings, we further establish a connection between conditional risk calibration and individual/conditional probability calibration, and develop theoretical insights for the performance metric. This reveals that while conditional risk calibration is related to existing uncertainty quantification problems, it remains a distinct and standalone machine learning problem. Empirically, we validate our theoretical findings and demonstrate the practical implications of conditional risk calibration in the learning to defer (L2D) framework. Our systematic experiments provide both qualitative and quantitative assessments, offering guidance for future research in uncertainty-aware decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文引入并研究了条件风险校准问题，即在给定输入特征条件下估计预测模型的期望损失。通过理论和实验证明该问题等价于标准回归任务，并在分类与回归设定下建立了与不确定性量化问题的联系与区别，同时在"学习延迟决策"框架中验证了其实际应用价值。
AI.motivation: 现有的不确定性量化方法（如概率校准）主要关注预测置信度与真实频率的一致性，但缺乏对条件风险（即给定特征条件下的期望损失）的系统性研究。本文旨在正式定义条件风险校准问题，揭示其与现有校准任务的关系，并为不确定性感知决策提供理论指导。
AI.method: 1. 形式化定义条件风险校准问题，证明其等价于标准回归任务；2. 在分类场景中建立条件风险校准与个体/条件概率校准之间的理论联系；3. 推导性能度量的理论见解；4. 在"学习延迟决策"框架下进行系统性实验验证，包括定性和定量评估。
AI.result: 理论结果表明条件风险校准本质上是标准回归问题；在分类场景中，条件风险校准与现有的概率校准虽有联系，但仍是独立且独特的机器学习问题。实验验证了理论发现，并在L2D框架中展示了条件风险校准的实际应用效果。
AI.conclusion: 条件风险校准是一个区别于现有不确定性量化方法的独立问题，它为不确定性感知决策提供了新的理论视角和实践工具，尤其在人机协作的延迟决策场景中具有重要应用价值。

title: Participatory provenance as representational auditing for AI-mediated public consultation
summary: Artificial intelligence is increasingly deployed to synthesize large-scale public input in policy consultations and participatory processes. Yet no formal framework exists for auditing whether these summaries faithfully represent the source population, an accountability gap that existing approaches to AI explainability, grounding and hallucination detection do not address because they focus on output quality rather than input fidelity. Here, participatory provenance is introduced: a measurement framework grounded in optimal transport theory, causal inference and semantic analysis that tracks how individual public submissions are transformed, filtered or lost through AI-mediated summarization. Applied to Canada's 2025-2026 national AI Strategy consultation ($n = 5{,}253$ respondents across two independent policy topics), the framework reveals that both official government summaries underperform a random-participant baseline ($-9.1\%$ and $-8.0\%$ coverage degradation), with $16.9\%$ and $15.3\%$ of participants effectively excluded. Exclusion concentrates in clusters expressing dissent, scepticism and critique of AI ($33$-$88\%$ exclusion rates). Brevity, semantic isolation and rhetorical register independently predict representational outcome. An accompanying open-source interactive tool, the Co-creation Provenance Lab, enables policymakers to audit and iteratively improve summaries, establishing genuine human-in-the-loop oversight at scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"参与溯源"框架，用于审计AI在政策咨询中生成的摘要是否忠实代表公众意见。应用于加拿大2025-2026国家AI战略咨询（n=5,253），发现官方摘要比随机基线覆盖率低9.1%和8.0%，16.9%和15.3%参与者被排除，持异议和批评意见的群体被排除率高达33-88%。简短、语义孤立和修辞风格可预测代表结果。配套开源工具"共创溯源实验室"支持政策制定者审计和改进摘要。
AI.motivation: 现有AI可解释性、接地性和幻觉检测方法聚焦输出质量而非输入忠实度，缺乏正式框架来审计AI生成的公众意见摘要是否忠实代表源人群，存在问责缺口。
AI.method: 基于最优传输理论、因果推断和语义分析构建"参与溯源"测量框架，追踪个体公众提交意见在AI介导的摘要过程中如何被转化、过滤或丢失。
AI.result: 官方摘要比随机参与者基线分别低9.1%和8.0%的覆盖率，16.9%和15.3%的参与者被有效排除；持异议、怀疑和批评意见的群体排除率高达33-88%；文本简短性、语义孤立性和修辞风格是代表性的独立预测因子。
AI.conclusion: 参与溯源框架可有效审计AI摘要的代表性，配套开源工具能实现大规模真正的人机协同监督，为政策咨询中的AI accountability提供系统性方法。

title: Semantic Area Graph Reasoning for Multi-Robot Language-Guided Search
summary: Coordinating multi-robot systems (MRS) to search in unknown environments is particularly challenging for tasks that require semantic reasoning beyond geometric exploration. Classical coordination strategies rely on frontier coverage or information gain and cannot incorporate high-level task intent, such as searching for objects associated with specific room types. We propose \textit{Semantic Area Graph Reasoning} (SAGR), a hierarchical framework that enables Large Language Models (LLMs) to coordinate multi-robot exploration and semantic search through a structured semantic-topological abstraction of the environment. SAGR incrementally constructs a semantic area graph from a semantic occupancy map, encoding room instances, connectivity, frontier availability, and robot states into a compact task-relevant representation for LLM reasoning. The LLM performs high-level semantic room assignment based on spatial structure and task context, while deterministic frontier planning and local navigation handle geometric execution within assigned rooms. Experiments on the Habitat-Matterport3D dataset across 100 scenarios show that SAGR remains competitive with state-of-the-art exploration methods while consistently improving semantic target search efficiency, with up to 18.8\% in large environments. These results highlight the value of structured semantic abstractions as an effective interface between LLM-based reasoning and multi-robot coordination in complex indoor environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAGR框架，通过构建语义区域图作为LLM推理的结构化接口，实现大语言模型协调多机器人系统在未知环境中进行语义目标搜索，在Habitat-Matterport3D数据集上相比经典方法在大型环境下语义搜索效率提升高达18.8%。
AI.motivation: 经典多机器人搜索策略基于前沿覆盖或信息增益，无法融入高级任务意图（如搜索特定房间类型的物体），需要一种能够结合语义推理的结构化协调框架。
AI.method: 提出SAGR层次化框架：底层构建语义占用地图并增量生成语义区域图（包含房间实例、连通性、前沿可用性和机器人状态）；上层利用LLM基于空间结构和任务上下文进行高层次语义房间分配，同时由确定性前沿规划和局部导航负责房间内的几何执行。
AI.result: 在Habitat-Matterport3D数据集100个场景中，SAGR在探索效率上与SOTA方法持平，同时在语义目标搜索效率上持续提升，大型环境下提升达18.8%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的语义抽象是连接LLM推理与多机器人协调的有效接口，在复杂室内环境中能显著提升语义任务导向的搜索性能。

title: WebGen-R1: Incentivizing Large Language Models to Generate Functional and Aesthetic Websites with Reinforcement Learning
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at function-level code generation, project-level tasks such as generating functional and visually aesthetic multi-page websites remain highly challenging. Existing works are often limited to single-page static websites, while agentic frameworks typically rely on multi-turn execution with proprietary models, leading to substantial token costs, high latency, and brittle integration. Training a small LLM end-to-end with reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising alternative, yet it faces a critical bottleneck in designing reliable and computationally feasible rewards for website generation. Unlike single-file coding tasks that can be verified by unit tests, website generation requires evaluating inherently subjective aesthetics, cross-page interactions, and functional correctness. To this end, we propose WebGen-R1, an end-to-end RL framework tailored for project-level website generation. We first introduce a scaffold-driven structured generation paradigm that constrains the large open-ended action space and preserves architectural integrity. We then design a novel cascaded multimodal reward that seamlessly couples structural guarantees with execution-grounded functional feedback and vision-based aesthetic supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our WebGen-R1 substantially transforms a 7B base model from generating nearly nonfunctional websites into producing deployable, aesthetically aligned multi-page websites. Remarkably, our WebGen-R1 not only consistently outperforms heavily scaled open-source models (up to 72B), but also rivals the state-of-the-art DeepSeek-R1 (671B) in functional success, while substantially exceeding it in valid rendering and aesthetic alignment. These results position WebGen-R1 as a viable path for scaling small open models from function-level code generation to project-level web application generation.

AI.tldr: WebGen-R1提出了一种端到端的强化学习框架，用于项目级多页面网站生成。通过脚手架驱动的结构化生成范式约束动作空间，并设计级联多模态奖励机制（结构保证+功能反馈+视觉美学监督），将7B基础模型从生成几乎不可用的网站转变为生成可部署、美学对齐的多页面网站。该框架不仅一致优于高达72B的开源模型，在功能成功率上与DeepSeek-R1（671B）媲美，在有效渲染和美学对齐上显著超越。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在函数级代码生成上表现出色，但在项目级（如多页面网站生成）任务中仍面临巨大挑战。现有方法或限于单页静态网站，或依赖多轮执行的专有模型导致高成本和高延迟。训练小模型进行端到端RL面临关键瓶颈：网站生成缺乏像单元测试那样的可靠且可计算奖励，涉及主观美学、跨页面交互和功能正确性评估。
AI.method: 提出WebGen-R1框架：(1) 脚手架驱动的结构化生成范式，约束开放动作空间并保持架构完整性；(2) 级联多模态奖励，将结构保证、执行反馈的功能正确性和基于视觉的美学监督无缝耦合。
AI.result: WebGen-R1将7B基础模型从生成几乎不可用的网站转变为可部署的美学对齐多页面网站；一致优于高达72B的开源模型；功能成功率上媲美DeepSeek-R1（671B），在有效渲染和美学对齐上显著超越。
AI.conclusion: WebGen-R1为将小型开放模型从函数级代码生成扩展到项目级Web应用生成提供了可行路径。

title: DENALI: A Dataset Enabling Non-Line-of-Sight Spatial Reasoning with Low-Cost LiDARs
summary: Consumer LiDARs in mobile devices and robots typically output a single depth value per pixel. Yet internally, they record full time-resolved histograms containing direct and multi-bounce light returns; these multi-bounce returns encode rich non-line-of-sight (NLOS) cues that can enable perception of hidden objects in a scene. However, severe hardware limitations of consumer LiDARs make NLOS reconstruction with conventional methods difficult. In this work, we motivate a complementary direction: enabling NLOS perception with low-cost LiDARs through data-driven inference. We present DENALI, the first large-scale real-world dataset of space-time histograms from low-cost LiDARs capturing hidden objects. We capture time-resolved LiDAR histograms for 72,000 hidden-object scenes across diverse object shapes, positions, lighting conditions, and spatial resolutions. Using our dataset, we show that consumer LiDARs can enable accurate, data-driven NLOS perception. We further identify key scene and modeling factors that limit performance, as well as simulation-fidelity gaps that hinder current sim-to-real transfer, motivating future work toward scalable NLOS vision with consumer LiDARs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DENALI，首个大规模真实世界低功耗LiDAR时空直方图数据集，用于数据驱动的非视距（NLOS）感知，涵盖72,000个隐藏物体场景，证明消费级LiDAR可通过数据驱动方法实现准确NLOS重建，并分析了性能限制因素及仿真到现实的差距。
AI.motivation: 消费级LiDAR通常只输出单深度值，但其内部记录的时间分辨直方图包含多次反射的非视距线索，可用于感知隐藏物体。然而，现有硬件限制使得传统NLOS重建方法难以适用，因此需要探索数据驱动的替代方案。
AI.method: 构建DENALI数据集，使用低功耗LiDAR采集72,000个隐藏物体场景的时空直方图，覆盖多样物体形状、位置、光照条件和空间分辨率；基于该数据集训练数据驱动模型进行NLOS感知。
AI.result: 消费级LiDAR结合数据驱动方法能够实现准确的NLOS感知；识别了限制性能的关键场景因素和建模因素；揭示了当前仿真到真实迁移（sim-to-real）存在的保真度差距。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法为消费级LiDAR实现NLOS感知提供了可行方向，但仍有性能瓶颈和sim-to-real差距需要解决，为未来可扩展NLOS视觉研究提供了方向。

title: SafeRedirect: Defeating Internal Safety Collapse via Task-Completion Redirection in Frontier LLMs
summary: Internal Safety Collapse (ISC) is a failure mode in which frontier LLMs, when executing legitimate professional tasks whose correct completion structurally requires harmful content, spontaneously generate that content with safety failure rates exceeding 95%. Existing input-level defenses achieve a 100% failure rate against ISC, and standard system prompt defenses provide only partial mitigation. We propose SafeRedirect, a system-level override that defeats ISC by redirecting the model's task-completion drive rather than suppressing it. SafeRedirect grants explicit permission to fail the task, prescribes a deterministic hard-stop output, and instructs the model to preserve harmful placeholders unresolved. Evaluated on seven frontier LLMs across three AI/ML-related ISC task types in the single-turn setting, SafeRedirect reduces average unsafe generation rates from 71.2% to 8.0%, compared to 55.0% for the strongest viable baseline. Multi-model ablation reveals that failure permission and condition specificity are universally critical, while the importance of other components varies across models. Cross-attack evaluation confirms state-of-the-art defense against ISC with generalization performance at least on par with the baseline on other attack families. Code is available at https://github.com/fzjcdt/SafeRedirect.

AI.tldr: SafeRedirect是一种系统级安全防御方法，通过重定向模型的任务完成驱动力，将内部安全崩溃（ISC）导致的平均不安全生成率从71.2%降低到8.0%，在七个前沿大语言模型上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 前沿大语言模型在执行需要有害内容的合法专业任务时，会出现内部安全崩溃（ISC），即自发生成有害内容且安全失败率超过95%。现有输入级防御对此100%无效，标准系统提示防御也仅能部分缓解。
AI.method: SafeRedirect是一种系统级覆盖方法，通过三个核心指令来重定向模型的任务完成驱动力：1）明确允许任务失败；2）规定确定性的硬停止输出；3）指示模型保留有害占位符未解析状态。
AI.result: 在七个前沿大语言模型上、三种AI/ML相关ISC任务类型的单轮对话设置中，SafeRedirect将平均不安全生成率从71.2%降至8.0%，而最强可行基线为55.0%。多模型消融实验表明失败许可和条件特异性是普遍关键组件。
AI.conclusion: SafeRedirect在防御ISC方面达到最先进水平，跨攻击评估显示其泛化性能至少与基线在其他攻击类型上相当。

title: SpanVLA: Efficient Action Bridging and Learning from Negative-Recovery Samples for Vision-Language-Action Model
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising autonomous driving paradigm for leveraging world knowledge and reasoning capabilities, especially in long-tail scenarios. However, existing VLA models often struggle with the high latency in action generation using an autoregressive generation framework and exhibit limited robustness. In this paper, we propose SpanVLA, a novel end-to-end autonomous driving framework, integrating an autoregressive reasoning and a flow-matching action expert. First, SpanVLA introduces an efficient bridge to leverage the vision and reasoning guidance of VLM to efficiently plan future trajectories using a flow-matching policy conditioned on historical trajectory initialization, which significantly reduces inference time. Second, to further improve the performance and robustness of the SpanVLA model, we propose a GRPO-based post-training method to enable the VLA model not only to learn from positive driving samples but also to learn how to avoid the typical negative behaviors and learn recovery behaviors. We further introduce mReasoning, a new real-world driving reasoning dataset, focusing on complex, reasoning-demanding scenarios and negative-recovery samples. Extensive experiments on the NAVSIM (v1 and v2) demonstrate the competitive performance of the SpanVLA model. Additionally, the qualitative results across diverse scenarios highlight the planning performance and robustness of our model.

AI.tldr: SpanVLA 提出了一种结合自回归推理与流匹配动作专家的端到端自动驾驶框架，通过历史轨迹初始化的流匹配策略显著降低推理延迟，并采用 GRPO 后训练方法从正负样本中学习鲁棒行为，在 NAVSIM 基准上取得 competitive 性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLA 模型在自动驾驶中存在两大问题：一是自回归生成框架导致动作生成的高延迟，二是模型鲁棒性有限。本文旨在解决这两个瓶颈，实现高效且鲁棒的端到端自动驾驶。
AI.method: 1) 提出 SpanVLA 框架，通过高效桥接模块利用 VLM 的视觉和推理引导，结合历史轨迹初始化的流匹配策略（flow-matching policy）进行未来轨迹规划，大幅降低推理时间；2) 提出基于 GRPO 的后训练方法，使模型不仅从正样本学习，还能从负样本中学习如何避免典型不良行为并学习恢复行为；3) 引入 mReasoning 数据集，聚焦复杂、高推理需求的场景及负样本恢复案例。
AI.result: 在 NAVSIM (v1 和 v2) 上的大量实验验证了 SpanVLA 的 competitive 性能，定性结果表明模型在多样化场景下具有良好的规划性能和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SpanVLA 通过流匹配动作专家和 GRPO 后训练，有效解决了 VLA 模型在自动驾驶中的高延迟和鲁棒性问题，为端到端自动驾驶提供了一种高效且可靠的解决方案。

title: SENSE: Stereo OpEN Vocabulary SEmantic Segmentation
summary: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation enables models to segment objects or image regions beyond fixed class sets, offering flexibility in dynamic environments. However, existing methods often rely on single-view images and struggle with spatial precision, especially under occlusions and near object boundaries. We propose SENSE, the first work on Stereo OpEN Vocabulary SEmantic Segmentation, which leverages stereo vision and vision-language models to enhance open-vocabulary semantic segmentation. By incorporating stereo image pairs, we introduce geometric cues that improve spatial reasoning and segmentation accuracy. Trained on the PhraseStereo dataset, our approach achieves strong performance in phrase-grounded tasks and demonstrates generalization in zero-shot settings. On PhraseStereo, we show a +2.9% improvement in Average Precision over the baseline method and +0.76% over the best competing method. SENSE also provides a relative improvement of +3.5% mIoU on Cityscapes and +18% on KITTI compared to the baseline work. By jointly reasoning over semantics and geometry, SENSE supports accurate scene understanding from natural language, essential for autonomous robots and Intelligent Transportation Systems.

AI.tldr: SENSE是首个利用立体视觉增强开放词汇语义分割的工作，通过引入Stereo图像对的几何线索，在PhraseStereo数据集上AP提升2.9%，在Cityscapes和KITTI上mIoU分别提升3.5%和18%。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇语义分割方法依赖单视图图像，在遮挡和物体边界附近空间精度不足，缺乏几何线索。
AI.method: 提出SENSE框架，融合立体视觉（Stereo image pairs）与视觉-语言模型，联合推理语义与几何信息以提升分割精度。
AI.result: PhraseStereo上AP提升2.9%（vs baseline）和0.76%（vs best competing）；Cityscapes上mIoU相对提升3.5%；KITTI上mIoU相对提升18%。
AI.conclusion: 立体视觉能有效弥补单视图开放词汇分割的空间精度不足，支持自然语言驱动的精确场景理解，适用于自动驾驶和智能交通系统。

title: Face Anything: 4D Face Reconstruction from Any Image Sequence
summary: Accurate reconstruction and tracking of dynamic human faces from image sequences is challenging because non-rigid deformations, expression changes, and viewpoint variations occur simultaneously, creating significant ambiguity in geometry and correspondence estimation. We present a unified method for high-fidelity 4D facial reconstruction based on canonical facial point prediction, a representation that assigns each pixel a normalized facial coordinate in a shared canonical space. This formulation transforms dense tracking and dynamic reconstruction into a canonical reconstruction problem, enabling temporally consistent geometry and reliable correspondences within a single feed-forward model. By jointly predicting depth and canonical coordinates, our method enables accurate depth estimation, temporally stable reconstruction, dense 3D geometry, and robust facial point tracking within a single architecture. We implement this formulation using a transformer-based model that jointly predicts depth and canonical facial coordinates, trained using multi-view geometry data that non-rigidly warps into the canonical space. Extensive experiments on image and video benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across reconstruction and tracking tasks, achieving approximately 3$\times$ lower correspondence error and faster inference than prior dynamic reconstruction methods, while improving depth accuracy by 16%. These results highlight canonical facial point prediction as an effective foundation for unified feed-forward 4D facial reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于规范面部点预测的统一前馈式4D人脸重建方法，通过将每个像素映射到共享规范空间的面部坐标，实现了时间一致的重建和稠密跟踪。采用Transformer联合预测深度和规范坐标，在多视图几何数据上训练，在重建和跟踪任务上达到SOTA，对应误差降低约3倍，深度精度提升16%。
AI.motivation: 动态人脸重建中，非刚性变形、表情变化和视角变化同时存在，导致几何和对应关系估计存在显著歧义，现有方法难以同时实现高精度的深度估计、时间一致性重建和鲁棒的面部点跟踪。
AI.method: 提出规范面部点预测表示，将每个像素分配一个共享规范空间中的归一化面部坐标，将稠密跟踪和动态重建转化为规范重建问题。采用Transformer模型联合预测深度图和规范面部坐标，利用多视图几何数据进行非刚性变形到规范空间的训练。
AI.result: 在图像和视频基准上取得SOTA结果：对应误差降低约3倍，深度精度提升16%，推理速度优于先前的动态重建方法。
AI.conclusion: 规范面部点预测可作为统一前馈式4D人脸重建的有效基础表示，能够在单个架构中同时实现准确的深度估计、时间稳定的重建、稠密3D几何和鲁棒的面部点跟踪。

title: Towards Event-Aware Forecasting in DeFi: Insights from On-chain Automated Market Maker Protocols
summary: Automated Market Makers (AMMs), as a core infrastructure of decentralized finance (DeFi), uniquely drive on-chain asset pricing through a deterministic reserve ratio mechanism. Unlike traditional markets, AMM price dynamics is triggered largely by on-chain events (e.g., swap) that change the reserve ratio, rather than by continuous responses to off-chain information. This makes event-level analysis crucial for understanding price formation mechanisms in AMMs. However, existing research generally neglects the micro-structural dynamics at the AMMs level, lacking both a comprehensive dataset covering multiple protocols with fine-grained event classification and an effective framework for event-aware modeling. To fill this gap, we construct a dataset containing 8.9 million on-chain event records from four representative AMMs protocols: Pendle, Uniswap v3, Aave and Morpho, with precise annotations of transaction type and block height timestamps. Furthermore, we propose an Uncertainty Weighted Mean Squared Error (UWM) loss function, which incorporates the block interval regression term into the traditional Time-Point Process (TPP) objective function by weighting the uncertainty with homoscedasticity. Extensive experiments on eight advanced TPP architectures demonstrate that this loss function reduces the time prediction error by an average of 56.41\% while maintaining the accuracy of event type prediction, establishing a robust benchmark for event-aware prediction in the AMMs ecosystem. This work provides the necessary data foundation and methodological framework for modeling the discreteness and event-driven characteristics of on-chain price discovery. All datasets and source code are publicly available. https://github.com/yosen-king/Deep-AMM-Events

AI.tldr: 本文构建了包含890万条链上事件记录的AMMs数据集，并提出不确定性加权均方误差（UWM）损失函数，将区块间隔回归项融入时间点过程目标函数，在8种先进TPP架构上将时间预测误差平均降低56.41%，为AMM生态系统的事件感知预测建立了稳健基准。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽视了AMM层面的微观结构动态，既缺乏覆盖多协议、具备细粒度事件分类的全面数据集，也缺乏有效的事件感知建模框架。
AI.method: 构建包含Pendle、Uniswap v3、Aave和Morpho四个代表性AMM协议的890万条链上事件记录数据集，并提出UWM损失函数，通过同方差不确定性加权将区块间隔回归项融入传统TPP目标函数。
AI.result: 在8种先进TPP架构上，UWM损失函数在保持事件类型预测准确性的同时，将时间预测误差平均降低56.41%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为建模链上价格发现的离散性和事件驱动特征提供了必要的数据基础和方法框架，所有数据集和源代码已公开。

title: Unveiling Fine-Grained Visual Traces: Evaluating Multimodal Interleaved Reasoning Chains in Multimodal STEM Tasks
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown promising reasoning abilities, yet evaluating their performance in specialized domains remains challenging. STEM reasoning is a particularly valuable testbed because it provides highly verifiable feedback, but existing benchmarks often permit unimodal shortcuts due to modality redundancy and focus mainly on final-answer accuracy, overlooking the reasoning process itself. To address this challenge, we introduce StepSTEM: a graduate-level benchmark of 283 problems across mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, and engineering for fine-grained evaluation of cross-modal reasoning in MLLMs. StepSTEM is constructed through a rigorous curation pipeline that enforces strict complementarity between textual and visual inputs. We further propose a general step-level evaluation framework for both text-only chain-of-thought and interleaved image-text reasoning, using dynamic programming to align predicted reasoning steps with multiple reference solutions. Experiments across a wide range of models show that current MLLMs still rely heavily on textual reasoning, with even Gemini 3.1 Pro and Claude Opus 4.6 achieving only 38.29% accuracy. These results highlight substantial headroom for genuine cross-modal STEM reasoning and position StepSTEM as a benchmark for fine-grained evaluation of multimodal reasoning. Source code is available at https://github.com/lll-hhh/STEPSTEM.

AI.tldr: StepSTEM是一个面向研究生级别的283道跨学科STEM问题的基准测试，通过严格的多模态互补性筛选流程构建，并提出了基于动态规划的步骤级推理评估框架。实验表明当前MLLMs仍严重依赖文本推理，顶尖模型准确率仅38.29%。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM评估存在两个问题：1) 基准测试存在模态冗余，允许单模态捷径；2) 仅关注最终答案准确性，忽略推理过程。STEM推理可提供高度可验证的反馈，是评估多模态推理的理想试验场。
AI.method: 1) 构建StepSTEM基准：通过严格筛选流程确保文本与视觉输入之间具有严格互补性，涵盖数学、物理、化学、生物学和工程学283个问题。2) 提出步骤级评估框架：支持纯文本思维链和图文交错推理，使用动态规划将预测推理步骤与多个参考答案对齐。
AI.result: 在多种模型上的实验表明，当前MLLMs严重依赖文本推理，Gemini 3.1 Pro和Claude Opus 4.6等顶尖模型仅达到38.29%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: StepSTEM揭示了当前MLLMs在真正的跨模态STEM推理方面存在巨大提升空间，可作为多模态推理细粒度评估的基准。

title: ORPHEAS: A Cross-Lingual Greek-English Embedding Model for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at Engineering Applications and Advances of Artificial Intelligence 2026 (EAAAI'26)
summary: Effective retrieval-augmented generation across bilingual Greek--English applications requires embedding models capable of capturing both domain-specific semantic relationships and cross-lingual semantic alignment. Existing multilingual embedding models distribute their representational capacity across numerous languages, limiting their optimization for Greek and failing to encode the morphological complexity and domain-specific terminological structures inherent in Greek text. In this work, we propose ORPHEAS, a specialized Greek--English embedding model for bilingual retrieval-augmented generation. ORPHEAS is trained with a high quality dataset generated by a knowledge graph-based fine-tuning methodology which is applied to a diverse multi-domain corpus, which enables language-agnostic semantic representations. The numerical experiments across monolingual and cross-lingual retrieval benchmarks reveal that ORPHEAS outperforms state-of-the-art multilingual embedding models, demonstrating that domain-specialized fine-tuning on morphologically complex languages does not compromise cross-lingual retrieval capability.

AI.tldr: 提出ORPHEAS，一个专门针对希腊语-英语双语检索增强生成的嵌入模型，通过知识图谱微调方法在跨领域语料上训练，在单语和跨语言检索任务中均优于现有多语言模型。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言嵌入模型将表征能力分散在众多语言中，未能针对希腊语进行优化，无法编码希腊语的形态复杂性和领域特定术语结构，限制了双语检索增强生成的效果。
AI.method: 基于知识图谱的微调方法，对多领域语料生成高质量数据集，训练专门的希腊语-英语双语嵌入模型ORPHEAS，实现语言无关的语义表征。
AI.result: 在单语和跨语言检索基准上，ORPHEAS优于最先进的多语言嵌入模型。
AI.conclusion: 面向形态复杂语言的领域专门微调不会损害跨语言检索能力，反而能取得更优性能。

title: A Reconfigurable Pneumatic Joint Enabling Localized Selective Stiffening and Shape Locking in Vine-Inspired Robots
summary: Vine-inspired robots achieve large workspace coverage through tip eversion, enabling safe navigation in confined and cluttered environments. However, their deployment in free space is fundamentally limited by low axial stiffness, poor load-bearing capacity, and the inability to retain shape during and after steering. In this work, we propose a reconfigurable pneumatic joint (RPJ) architecture that introduces discrete, pressure-tunable stiffness along the robot body without compromising continuous growth. Each RPJ module comprises symmetrically distributed pneumatic chambers that locally increase bending stiffness when pressurized, enabling decoupling between global compliance and localized rigidity. We integrate the RPJs into a soft growing robot with tendon-driven steering and develop a compact base station for mid-air eversion. System characterization and experimental validation demonstrate moderate pressure requirements for eversion, as well as comparable localized stiffening and steering performance to layer-jamming mechanisms. Demonstrations further show that the proposed robot achieves improved shape retention during bending, reduced gravitational deflection under load, cascading retraction, and reliable payload transport up to 202 g in free space. The RPJ mechanism establishes a practical pathway toward structurally adaptive vine robots for manipulation-oriented tasks such as object sorting and adaptive exploration in unconstrained environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可重构气动关节（RPJ）架构，通过在软体生长机器人上集成离散、压力可调的刚度模块，在不影响连续生长能力的前提下提高轴向刚度和承载能力，实现了自由空间中的形状保持和负载运输（最高202g）。
AI.motivation: 藤蔓机器人在自由空间中存在轴向刚度低、承载能力差、转向后形状保持能力不足等根本性限制，难以在非受限环境中执行操作类任务。
AI.method: 提出可重构气动关节（RPJ）架构，每个RPJ模块包含对称布置的气动腔室，加压时局部增加弯曲刚度，实现全局柔顺性与局部刚性的解耦；结合腱驱动转向和紧凑基站，实现空中外翻生长。
AI.result: 中等气压即可满足外翻需求；局部刚化和转向性能与层阻塞机制相当；实现了弯曲时形状保持改善、负载下重力挠度减小、级联回收以及自由空间中最重202g的负载运输。
AI.conclusion: RPJ机制为构建结构自适应的藤蔓机器人提供了实用路径，可应用于物体分拣、自适应探索等无约束环境中的操作任务。

title: IR-Flow: Bridging Discriminative and Generative Image Restoration via Rectified Flow
summary: In image restoration, single-step discriminative mappings often lack fine details via expectation learning, whereas generative paradigms suffer from inefficient multi-step sampling and noise-residual coupling. To address this dilemma, we propose IR-Flow, a novel image restoration method based on Rectified Flow that serves as a unified framework bridging the gap between discriminative and generative paradigms. Specifically, we first construct multilevel data distribution flows, which expand the ability of models to learn from and adapt to various levels of degradation. Subsequently, cumulative velocity fields are proposed to learn transport trajectories across varying degradation levels, guiding intermediate states toward the clean target, while a multi-step consistency constraint is presented to enforce trajectory coherence and boost few-step restoration performance. We show that directly establishing a linear transport flow between degraded and clean image domains not only enables fast inference but also improves adaptability to out-of-distribution degradations. Extensive evaluations on deraining, denoising and raindrop removal tasks demonstrate that IR-Flow achieves competitive quantitative results with only a few sampling steps, offering an efficient and flexible framework that maintains an excellent distortion-perception balance. Our code is available at https://github.com/fanzh03/IR-Flow.

AI.tldr: IR-Flow提出基于整流流（Rectified Flow）的统一图像修复框架，通过多级数据分布流、累积速度场和多步一致性约束，以少步采样实现判别式与生成式范式之间的桥梁，在去雨、去噪和去雨滴任务上取得优异效果。
AI.motivation: 单步判别式映射因期望学习而缺乏细节，生成式范式则存在多步采样效率低和噪声-残差耦合问题。现有方法难以兼顾快速推理与高保真度，亟需一种统一的高效图像修复框架。
AI.method: 1) 构建多级数据分布流，增强模型对不同退化程度的适应能力；2) 提出累积速度场学习跨退化程度的传输轨迹，引导中间状态向干净目标演进；3) 引入多步一致性约束保证轨迹连贯性并提升少步修复性能；4) 在退化与干净图像域间建立线性传输流实现快速推理。
AI.result: 在去雨、去噪和去雨滴任务上，IR-Flow仅需少量采样步骤即可取得具有竞争力的定量结果，并保持良好的失真-感知平衡，对分布外退化具有良好的适应性。
AI.conclusion: IR-Flow作为一种基于整流流的统一框架，有效弥合了判别式与生成式范式之间的差距，实现了高效、灵活且具备优异失真-感知平衡的图像修复方法。

title: Robust Fleet Sizing for Multi-UAV Inspection Missions under Synchronized Replacement Demand
summary:
Multi-UAV inspection missions require spare drones to replace active drones during recharging cycles. Existing fleet-sizing approaches often assume steady-state operating conditions that do not apply to finite-horizon missions, or they treat replacement requests as statistically independent events. The latter provides per-request blocking guarantees that fail to translate to mission-level reliability when demands cluster. This paper identifies a structural failure mode where efficient routing assigns similar workloads to each UAV, leading to synchronized battery depletion and replacement bursts that exhaust the spare pool even when average capacity is sufficient.
  We derive a closed-form sufficient fleet-sizing rule, k = m(ceil(R) + 1), where m is the number of active UAVs and R is the recovery-to-active time ratio. This additive buffer of m spares absorbs worst-case synchronized demand at recovery-cycle boundaries and ensures mission-level reliability even when all UAVs deplete simultaneously. Monte Carlo validation across five scenarios (m in [2, 10], R in [0.87, 3.39], 1000 trials each) shows that Erlang-B sizing with a per-request blocking target epsilon = 0.01 drops to 69.9% mission success at R = 3.39, with 95% of spare exhaustion events concentrated in the top-decile 5-minute demand windows. In contrast, the proposed rule maintains 99.8% success (Wilson 95% lower bound 99.3%) across all tested conditions, including wind variability up to CV = 0.30, while requiring only four additional drones in the most demanding scenario.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多无人机（UAV）有限时域巡检任务中因电池同步耗尽导致备用无人机不足的问题，提出了一个封闭形式的充分性机队规模规则 k = m(ceil(R) + 1)，并验证了其在保证任务级可靠性方面优于传统Erlang-B方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或假定稳态运行（不适用于有限时域任务），或将替换请求视为独立事件（提供每请求阻塞保证但无法转化为任务级可靠性）。本文识别出高效路由导致各UAV工作量相近，进而引发电池同步耗尽和替换突发这一结构性失效模式，即使平均备用量充分也会耗尽备用池。
AI.method: 推导了封闭形式的充分性机队规模规则 k = m(ceil(R) + 1)，其中m为活跃UAV数量，R为恢复时间与活跃时间之比。通过蒙特卡洛模拟（5种场景，m∈[2,10]，R∈[0.87,3.39]，各1000次试验）进行验证，并与Erlang-B方法（每请求阻塞目标ε=0.01）对比，同时考虑了风速变异性（CV=0.30）。
AI.result: Erlang-B方法在R=3.39时任务成功率降至69.9%，95%的备用耗尽事件集中在最高分位5分钟需求窗口。本文提出的规则在所有测试条件下保持99.8%的成功率（Wilson 95%下限99.3%），在最苛刻场景下仅需增加4架无人机。
AI.conclusion: 提出的加性缓冲规则（m个备用无人机）能吸收恢复周期边界处最坏情况下的同步需求，确保即使所有UAV同时耗尽时的任务级可靠性，且额外成本可控。

title: Cold-Start Forecasting of New Product Life-Cycles via Conditional Diffusion Models
summary: Forecasting the life-cycle trajectory of a newly launched product is important for launch planning, resource allocation, and early risk assessment. This task is especially difficult in the pre-launch and early post-launch phases, when product-specific outcome history is limited or unavailable, creating a cold-start problem. In these phases, firms must make decisions before demand patterns become reliably observable, while early signals are often sparse, noisy, and unstable We propose the Conditional Diffusion Life-cycle Forecaster (CDLF), a conditional generative framework for forecasting new-product life-cycle trajectories under cold start. CDLF combines three sources of information: static descriptors, reference trajectories from similar products, and newly arriving observations when available. Here, static descriptors refer to structured pre-launch characteristics of the product, such as category, price tier, brand or organization identity, scale, and access conditions. This structure allows the model to condition forecasts on relevant product context and to update them adaptively over time without retraining, yielding flexible multi-modal predictive distributions under extreme data scarcity. The method satisfies consistency with a horizon-uniform distributional error bound for recursive generation. Across studies on Intel microprocessor stock keeping unit (SKU) life cycles and the platform-mediated adoption of open large language model repositories, CDLF delivers more accurate point forecasts and higher-quality probabilistic forecasts than classical diffusion models, Bayesian updating approaches, and other state-of-the-art machine-learning baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出条件扩散生命周期预测器（CDLF），一种用于冷启动场景下新产品生命周期轨迹预测的条件生成框架。该框架融合静态描述符、相似产品参考轨迹和新到达观测数据，在极端数据稀缺条件下生成灵活的多模态预测分布，并在Intel微处理器SKU和开源大语言模型库两个实际数据集上优于传统扩散模型、贝叶斯更新方法及其他机器学习基线。
AI.motivation: 新产品生命周期预测在发布前和发布初期面临冷启动问题——产品特定结果历史有限或缺失，早期信号稀疏、嘈杂且不稳定，而此阶段的预测对发布规划、资源分配和早期风险评估至关重要。
AI.method: CDLF是一个条件生成框架，结合三类信息源：(1) 静态描述符（如类别、价格层级、品牌、规模等结构化发布前特征）；(2) 相似产品的参考轨迹；(3) 新到达的观测数据。模型可在无需重新训练的条件下自适应更新预测，并满足递归生成的水平均匀分布误差界一致性。
AI.result: 在Intel微处理器SKU生命周期和开源大语言模型仓库的平台中介采纳两个研究中，CDLF在点预测精度和概率预测质量上均优于经典扩散模型、贝叶斯更新方法及其他最先进的机器学习基线。
AI.conclusion: CDLF通过条件生成框架有效解决了新产品生命周期预测的冷启动问题，能够利用多源信息在数据极度稀缺条件下生成可更新的、灵活的多模态预测分布，并具备理论上的误差界保证。

title: MMControl: Unified Multi-Modal Control for Joint Audio-Video Generation
summary: Recent advances in Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have enabled high-quality joint audio-video generation, producing videos with synchronized audio within a single model. However, existing controllable generation frameworks are typically restricted to video-only control. This restricts comprehensive controllability and often leads to suboptimal cross-modal alignment. To bridge this gap, we present MMControl, which enables users to perform Multi-Modal Control in joint audio-video generation. MMControl introduces a dual-stream conditional injection mechanism. It incorporates both visual and acoustic control signals, including reference images, reference audio, depth maps, and pose sequences, into a joint generation process. These conditions are injected through bypass branches into a joint audio-video Diffusion Transformer, enabling the model to simultaneously generate identity-consistent video and timbre-consistent audio under structural constraints. Furthermore, we introduce modality-specific guidance scaling, which allows users to independently and dynamically adjust the influence strength of each visual and acoustic condition at inference time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MMControl achieves fine-grained, composable control over character identity, voice timbre, body pose, and scene layout in joint audio-video generation.

AI.tldr: MMControl是一种面向联合音视频生成的多模态控制框架，通过双流条件注入机制和模态特定引导缩放，实现了对角色身份、音色、姿态和场景布局的细粒度、可组合控制。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散Transformer（DiTs）在联合音视频生成方面取得了进展，但可控生成框架通常局限于视频单模态控制，导致跨模态对齐效果不佳。为弥补这一空白，本文提出MMControl，实现对联合音视频生成的多模态控制。
AI.method: 提出双流条件注入机制，将视觉控制信号（参考图像、深度图、姿态序列）和声学控制信号（参考音频）通过旁路分支注入联合音视频扩散Transformer。同时引入模态特定引导缩放，允许用户在推理时独立动态调整每个条件的影响强度。
AI.result: 实验表明MMControl在联合音视频生成中实现了对角色身份、语音音色、身体姿态和场景布局的细粒度、可组合控制。
AI.conclusion: MMControl通过多模态条件注入和灵活的引导缩放策略，有效解决了联合音视频生成中跨模态对齐和细粒度控制的问题，为多模态内容生成提供了更全面的可控性方案。

title: DTEA: A Dual-Topology Elastic Actuator Enabling Real-Time Switching Between Series and Parallel Compliance
summary: Series and parallel elastic actuators offer complementary but mutually exclusive advantages, yet no existing actuator enables real-time transition between these topologies during operation. This paper presents a novel actuator design called the Dual-Topology Elastic Actuator (DTEA), which enables dynamic switching between SEA and PEA topologies during operation. A proof-of-concept prototype of the DTEA is developed to demonstrate the feasibility of the topology-switching mechanism. Experiments are conducted to evaluate the robustness and timing of the switching mechanism under operational conditions. The actuator successfully performed 324 topology-switching cycles under load without damage, demonstrating the robustness of the mechanism. The measured switching time between SEA and PEA modes is under 33.33 ms. Additional experiments are conducted to characterize the static stiffness and disturbance rejection performance in both SEA and PEA modes. Static stiffness tests show that the PEA mode is 1.53x stiffer than the SEA mode, with KSEA = 5.57 +/- 0.02 Nm/rad and KPEA = 8.54 +/- 0.02 Nm/rad. Disturbance rejection experiments show that the mean peak deflection in SEA mode is 2.26x larger than in PEA mode (5.2 deg vs. 2.3 deg), while the mean settling time is 3.45x longer (1380 ms vs. 400 ms). The observed behaviors are consistent with the known characteristics of conventional SEA and PEA actuators, validating the functionality of both modes in the DTEA actuator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双拓扑弹性驱动器（DTEA），能够在运行中动态切换串联弹性驱动器（SEA）和并联弹性驱动器（PEA）两种拓扑结构。实验证明该机制在负载下完成324次切换且无损坏，切换时间低于33.33 ms，两种模式均验证了与传统SEA和PEA一致的特性。
AI.motivation: 串联和并联弹性驱动器具有互补但互斥的优势，现有设计无法在运行中实时切换拓扑结构。
AI.method: 设计DTEA实现SEA和PEA拓扑的动态切换，搭建原理样机，开展鲁棒性、切换时间、静态刚度及扰动抑制实验。
AI.result: 324次负载切换无损坏；切换时间<33.33 ms；PEA模式刚度（8.54 Nm/rad）为SEA模式（5.57 Nm/rad）的1.53倍；SEA模式峰值偏转（5.2 deg）为PEA（2.3 deg）的2.26倍，稳定时间（1380 ms）为PEA（400 ms）的3.45倍。
AI.conclusion: DTEA成功实现了两种拓扑运行中切换，两种模式性能与传统SEA和PEA一致，验证了该设计的可行性和有效性。

title: MedFlowSeg: Flow Matching for Medical Image Segmentation with Frequency-Aware Attention
summary: Flow matching has recently emerged as a principled framework for learning continuous-time transport maps, enabling efficient deterministic generation without relying on stochastic diffusion processes. While generative modeling has shown promise for medical image segmentation, particularly in capturing uncertainty and complex anatomical variability, existing approaches are predominantly built upon diffusion models, which incur substantial computational overhead due to iterative sampling and are often constrained by UNet-based parameterizations. In this work, we introduce MedFlowSeg, a conditional flow matching framework that formulates medical image segmentation as learning a time-dependent vector field that transports a simple prior distribution to the target segmentation distribution. This formulation enables one-step deterministic inference while preserving the expressiveness of generative modeling. We further develop a dual-conditioning mechanism to incorporate structured priors into the learned flow. Specifically, we propose a Dual-Branch Spatial Attention module that injects multi-scale structural information into the flow field, and a Frequency-Aware Attention module that models cross-domain interactions between spatial and spectral representations via discrepancy-aware fusion and time-dependent modulation. Together, these components provide an effective parameterization of conditional flows that capture both global anatomical structure and fine-grained boundary details. We provide extensive empirical validation across multiple medical imaging modalities, demonstrating that MedFlowSeg achieves state-of-the-art performance while significantly reducing computational cost compared to diffusion-based methods. Our results highlight the potential of flow matching as a theoretically grounded and computationally efficient alternative for generative medical image segmentation.

AI.tldr: MedFlowSeg提出了一种基于条件流匹配的医学图像分割框架，通过学习从简单先验分布到目标分割分布的时间相关向量场，实现单步确定性推理，并设计了双分支空间注意力和频率感知注意力模块来注入结构先验，在多个医学影像模态上取得了SOTA性能并显著降低了计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的生成式医学图像分割方法存在迭代采样导致的高计算开销以及受限于UNet参数化的问题，亟需一种理论上更简洁、计算更高效的生成式分割框架。
AI.method: 采用条件流匹配框架，将分割任务建模为学习时间相关向量场以传输先验分布；提出双分支空间注意力模块注入多尺度结构信息，以及频率感知注意力模块通过差异感知融合和时间相关调制建模跨域交互，实现条件流的有效参数化。
AI.result: 在多个医学影像模态上取得了状态最优的分割性能，同时相比扩散模型方法显著降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 流匹配可作为扩散模型的理论严谨且计算高效的替代方案，用于生成式医学图像分割。

title: Large Language Models Outperform Humans in Fraud Detection and Resistance to Motivated Investor Pressure
summary: Large language models trained on human feedback may suppress fraud warnings when investors arrive already persuaded of a fraudulent opportunity. We tested this in a preregistered experiment across seven leading LLMs and twelve investment scenarios covering legitimate, high-risk, and objectively fraudulent opportunities, combining 3,360 AI advisory conversations with a 1,201-participant human benchmark. Contrary to predictions, motivated investor framing did not suppress AI fraud warnings; if anything, it marginally increased them. Endorsement reversal occurred in fewer than 3 in 1,000 observations. Human advisors endorsed fraudulent investments at baseline rates of 13-14%, versus 0% across all LLMs, and suppressed warnings under pressure at two to four times the AI rate. AI systems currently provide more consistent fraud warnings than lay humans in an identical advisory role.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型在投资者已倾向于欺诈机会时，非但没有抑制欺诈警告，反而略有增加。在7个领先LLM和12个投资场景的实验中（3360次AI咨询对话 vs 1201名人类基准），AI的欺诈警告比人类更一致：人类在基线水平有13-14%会推荐欺诈投资（AI为0%），且在压力下抑制警告的比率是AI的2-4倍。
AI.motivation: 检验大型语言模型在投资者已对欺诈性机会深信不疑时，是否会因为基于人类反馈的微调而抑制欺诈警告——即探究AI是否会在迎合用户偏好的倾向下牺牲风险警示的客观性。
AI.method: 预注册实验，涉及7个领先LLM和12个投资场景（合法、高风险、客观欺诈三种类型），共3,360次AI咨询对话，并以1,201名参与者的人类基准作为对照。
AI.result: 与预测相反，投资者动机框架并未抑制AI的欺诈警告，反而略微增加；支持反转发生率低于0.3%。人类顾问在基线水平有13-14%会推荐欺诈投资（所有LLM均为0%），且在压力下抑制警告的比率是AI的2-4倍。
AI.conclusion: 在当前设定下，AI系统比普通人类在相同咨询角色中提供更一致的欺诈警告。

title: Environment-Adaptive Solid-State LiDAR-Inertial Odometry
summary: Solid-state LiDAR-inertial SLAM has attracted significant attention due to its advantages in speed and robustness. However, achieving accurate mapping in extreme environments remains challenging due to severe geometric degeneracy and unreliable observations, which often lead to ill-conditioned optimization and map inconsistencies. To address these challenges, we propose an environment-adaptive solid-state LiDAR-inertial odometry that integrates local normal-vector constraints with degeneracy-aware map maintenance to enhance localization accuracy.
