AI.tldr: uLEAD-TabPFN是一个基于Prior-Data Fitted Networks的依赖异常检测框架，通过学习潜在空间中的条件依赖关系来识别异常，在57个表格数据集上尤其在高维场景中表现优异，平均ROC-AUC提升近20%。
AI.motivation: 现有表格数据异常检测方法多依赖基于近似的线索，难以捕捉违反复杂特征依赖关系的异常；而基于依赖的异常检测方法在建模依赖关系和高维数据扩展性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出uLEAD-TabPFN框架，利用预训练的Prior-Data Fitted Networks（PFN）估计特征间的条件依赖关系，在学习的潜在空间中识别违反这些依赖的异常，并结合不确定性感知评分实现鲁棒检测。
AI.result: 在ADBench的57个表格数据集上，uLEAD-TabPFN在中等和高维场景取得最优平均排名；高维数据上平均ROC-AUC比平均基线提升约20%，比最佳基线提升约2.8%。
AI.conclusion: uLEAD-TabPFN提供了互补的异常检测能力，在现有方法难以处理的数据集上表现优异，实现了鲁棒且可扩展的依赖型异常检测。

title: EgoSelf: From Memory to Personalized Egocentric Assistant
summary: Egocentric assistants often rely on first-person view data to capture user behavior and context for personalized services. Since different users exhibit distinct habits, preferences, and routines, such personalization is essential for truly effective assistance. However, effectively integrating long-term user data for personalization remains a key challenge. To address this, we introduce EgoSelf, a system that includes a graph-based interaction memory constructed from past observations and a dedicated learning task for personalization. The memory captures temporal and semantic relationships among interaction events and entities, from which user-specific profiles are derived. The personalized learning task is formulated as a prediction problem where the model predicts possible future interactions from individual user's historical behavior recorded in the graph. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of EgoSelf as a personalized egocentric assistant. Code is available at https://abie-e.github.io/EgoSelf/.

AI.tldr: EgoSelf是一个利用图结构交互记忆和个性化预测任务实现长期用户数据整合的自我中心助手系统，在个性化辅助任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有自我中心助手在整合用户长期行为数据进行个性化服务方面存在挑战，不同用户具有独特的习惯、偏好和日常模式，如何有效利用历史观察数据实现个性化是核心难题。
AI.method: 提出EgoSelf系统，包含两个关键组件：(1) 基于图的交互记忆，捕捉交互事件与实体之间的时序和语义关系，从中提取用户专属画像；(2) 个性化学习任务，形式化为预测问题，让模型从图中记录的用户历史行为预测未来可能的交互。
AI.result: 大量实验证明EgoSelf作为个性化自我中心助手是有效的。
AI.conclusion: EgoSelf通过图结构记忆和预测式个性化学习有效解决了长期用户数据整合问题，为自我中心助手的个性化提供了可行方案。

title: Early-Stage Product Line Validation Using LLMs: A Study on Semi-Formal Blueprint Analysis
comment: The 41st ACM/SIGAPP Symposium on Applied Computing (SAC '26), March 23--27, 2026, Thessaloniki, Greece DOI: 10.1145/3748522.3779903
summary: We study whether Large Language Models (LLMs) can perform feature model analysis operations (AOs) directly on semi-formal textual blueprints, i.e., concise constrained-language descriptions of feature hierarchies and constraints, enabling early validation in Software Product Line scoping. Using 12 state-of-the-art LLMs and 16 standard AOs, we compare their outputs against the solver-based oracle FLAMA. Results show that reasoning-optimized models (e.g., Grok 4 Fast Reasoning, Gemini 2.5 Pro) achieve 88-89% average accuracy across all evaluated blueprints and operations, approaching solver correctness. We identify systematic errors in structural parsing and constraint reasoning, and highlight accuracy-cost trade-offs that inform model selection. These findings position LLMs as lightweight assistants for early variability validation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）能否直接对半形式化文本蓝图（即特征层次和约束的简洁受限语言描述）执行特征模型分析操作，以实现软件产品线范围界定中的早期验证。使用12个最先进的LLMs和16个标准分析操作，将其输出与基于求解器的oracle FLAMA进行比较。结果表明，推理优化模型（如Grok 4 Fast Reasoning、Gemini 2.5 Pro）在所有评估的蓝图和操作中平均准确率达到88-89%，接近求解器正确性。研究识别了结构解析和约束推理中的系统性错误，并突出了准确性与成本之间的权衡，为模型选择提供参考。这些发现将LLMs定位为早期可变性验证的轻量级助手。
AI.motivation: 探究LLMs是否能够直接对半形式化文本蓝图执行特征模型分析操作，从而在软件产品线范围界定中实现早期验证，避免传统求解器方法的复杂性和开销。
AI.method: 使用12个最先进的LLMs和16个标准分析操作，在特征模型文本蓝图上进行评估，并将LLMs的输出与基于求解器的oracle FLAMA进行对比分析。
AI.result: 推理优化模型（如Grok 4 Fast Reasoning、Gemini 2.5 Pro）平均准确率达88-89%，接近求解器正确性；同时发现结构解析和约束推理中存在系统性错误，并揭示了准确性与成本之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: LLMs可以作为早期可变性验证的轻量级助手，在准确性和成本之间进行权衡，为模型选择提供指导。

title: NeuroMesh: A Unified Neural Inference Framework for Decentralized Multi-Robot Collaboration
comment: 8 page, 8 figures, Accepted at the IEEE Robotics Automation Letter (RA-L)
summary: Deploying learned multi-robot models on heterogeneous robots remains challenging due to hardware heterogeneity, communication constraints, and the lack of a unified execution stack. This paper presents NeuroMesh, a multi-domain, cross-platform, and modular decentralized neural inference framework that standardizes observation encoding, message passing, aggregation, and task decoding in a unified pipeline. NeuroMesh combines a dual-aggregation paradigm for reduction- and broadcast-based information fusion with a parallelized architecture that decouples cycle time from end-to-end latency. Our high-performance C++ implementation leverages Zenoh for inter-robot communication and supports hybrid GPU/CPU inference. We validate NeuroMesh on a heterogeneous team of aerial and ground robots across collaborative perception, decentralized control, and task assignment, demonstrating robust operation across diverse task structures and payload sizes. We plan to release NeuroMesh as an open-source framework to the community.

AI.tldr: NeuroMesh是一个多域、跨平台、模块化的去中心化神经推理框架，通过统一流水线标准化多机器人模型部署，支持异构空中-地面机器人团队在协同感知、分散控制和任务分配等任务上的鲁棒运行。
AI.motivation: 在异构机器人上部署多机器人学习模型面临硬件异构性、通信约束以及缺乏统一执行栈的挑战，现有方案难以实现跨平台、跨域的高效协作推理。
AI.method: 提出NeuroMesh框架，包含：(1) 统一流水线：标准化观测编码、消息传递、聚合与任务解码；(2) 双聚合范式：结合缩减式与广播式信息融合；(3) 并行化架构：解耦周期时间与端到端延迟；(4) 基于Zenoh的高性能C++实现，支持混合GPU/CPU推理。
AI.result: 在异构空中-地面机器人团队上验证了协同感知、分散控制和任务分配三类任务，展示了在不同任务结构和载荷规模下的鲁棒运行能力。
AI.conclusion: NeuroMesh有效解决了异构多机器人系统的神经推理部署问题，计划开源以促进社区发展。

title: Mol-Debate: Multi-Agent Debate Improves Structural Reasoning in Molecular Design
summary: Text-guided molecular design is a key capability for AI-driven drug discovery, yet it remains challenging to map sequential natural-language instructions with non-linear molecular structures under strict chemical constraints. Most existing approaches, including RAG, CoT prompting, and fine-tuning or RL, emphasize a small set of ad-hoc reasoning perspectives implemented in a largely one-shot generation pipeline. In contrast, real-world drug discovery relies on dynamic, multi-perspective critique and iterative refinement to reconcile semantic intent with structural feasibility. Motivated by this, we propose Mol-Debate, a generation paradigm that enables such dynamic reasoning through an iterative generate-debate-refine loop. We further characterize key challenges in this paradigm and address them through perspective-oriented orchestration, including developer-debater conflict, global-local structural reasoning, and static-dynamic integration. Experiments demonstrate that Mol-Debate achieves state-of-the-art performance against strong general and chemical baselines, reaching 59.82% exact match on ChEBI-20 and 50.52% weighted success rate on S$^2$-Bench. Our code is available at https://github.com/wyuzh/Mol-Debate.

AI.tldr: Mol-Debate提出了一种基于迭代生成-辩论-精炼循环的分子设计范式，通过多视角动态推理实现文本引导的药物分子生成，在ChEBI-20和S²-Bench上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（RAG、CoT、微调/RL）主要采用一次性生成管线，仅强调少量特定推理视角，无法满足真实药物发现中需要动态、多视角批评和迭代精炼以协调语义意图与结构可行性的需求。
AI.method: 提出Mol-Debate范式，采用迭代生成-辩论-精炼循环，并设计了视角导向的编排机制，包括解决开发者-辩论者冲突、全局-局部结构推理以及静态-动态集成三个关键挑战。
AI.result: 在ChEBI-20上达到59.82%的精确匹配率，在S²-Bench上达到50.52%的加权成功率，超越通用基线和化学领域强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: Mol-Debate通过多视角动态辩论与迭代精炼有效桥接了文本指令与分子结构之间的语义鸿沟，为文本引导的药物分子设计提供了更符合实际需求的生成范式。

title: Paparazzo: Active Mapping of Moving 3D Objects
comment: Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Current 3D mapping pipelines generally assume static environments, which limits their ability to accurately capture and reconstruct moving objects. To address this limitation, we introduce the novel task of active mapping of moving objects, in which a mapping agent must plan its trajectory while compensating for the object's motion. Our approach, Paparazzo, provides a learning-free solution that robustly predicts the target's trajectory and identifies the most informative viewpoints from which to observe it, to plan its own path. We also contribute a comprehensive benchmark designed for this new task. Through extensive experiments, we show that Paparazzo significantly improves 3D reconstruction completeness and accuracy compared to several strong baselines, marking an important step toward dynamic scene understanding. Project page: https://davidea97.github.io/paparazzo-page/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需学习的主动移动物体建图方法Paparazzo，能够自主规划轨迹以补偿物体运动，在动态场景的3D重建完整性和准确性上显著优于多种强基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D建图pipeline通常假设静态环境，难以准确捕捉和重建运动物体，缺乏针对移动物体的主动建图框架。
AI.method: 提出Paparazzo：一种无学习（learning-free）方案，通过鲁棒地预测目标运动轨迹，识别最具信息量的观察视点，从而自主规划路径以补偿物体运动。
AI.result: 在综合基准测试中，Paparazzo在3D重建完整性和准确性上显著优于多个强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法标志着向动态场景理解迈出了重要一步，填补了主动移动物体建图任务的空白。

title: One-Shot Cross-Geometry Skill Transfer through Part Decomposition
summary: Given a demonstration, a robot should be able to generalize a skill to any object it encounters-but existing approaches to skill transfer often fail to adapt to objects with unfamiliar shapes. Motivated by examples of improved transfer from compositional modeling, we propose a method for improving transfer by decomposing objects into their constituent semantic parts. We leverage data-efficient generative shape models to accurately transfer interaction points from the parts of a demonstration object to a novel object. We autonomously construct an objective to optimize the alignment of those points on skill-relevant object parts. Our method generalizes to a wider range of object geometries than existing work, and achieves successful one-shot transfer for a range of skills and objects from a single demonstration, in both simulated and real environments.

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过将物体分解为语义部件并利用生成式形状模型，实现从单一示教到新物体的技能泛化方法，在仿真和真实环境中均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有技能迁移方法在面对形状不熟悉的物体时往往失败，而组合建模已被证明能改善迁移效果，因此本文旨在通过物体部件分解来提升技能迁移的泛化能力。
AI.method: 将物体分解为语义部件，利用数据高效的生成式形状模型准确迁移示教物体部件上的交互点到新物体，并自主构建目标函数以优化这些点在技能相关部件上的对齐。
AI.result: 方法能够泛化到比现有工作更广泛的物体几何形状，从单一示教实现多种技能和物体的一次性成功迁移，在仿真和真实环境中均得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 基于语义部件分解的生成式形状模型能有效提升机器人技能迁移的泛化性，实现对陌生形状物体的自适应。

title: Machine Learning for Two-Stage Graph Sparsification for the Travelling Salesman Problem
summary: High-performance TSP solvers like LKH search within a sparsified candidate graph rather than over all possible edges. Graph sparsification is non-trivial: keep too many edges and the solver wastes time; cut too many and it loses edges that belong to the optimal tour. The two leading heuristic methods, $α$-Nearest and POPMUSIC, produce high-quality candidate graphs, but no single heuristic is both sparse and reliable across all instance sizes and distributions. Machine learning methods can potentially learn better sparsification models. However, existing approaches operate on the complete graph, which is expensive and mostly restricted to Euclidean distances. To address this issue, we propose a two-stage graph sparsification approach: Stage~1 takes the union of $α$-Nearest and POPMUSIC to maximise recall; Stage~2 trains a single model to reduce density. We conducted experiments across four TSPLIB distance types, five spatial distributions, and problem sizes from 50 to 500. The two-stage approach substantially reduces candidate-graph density while retaining high coverage, generalises across distance types and distributions, outperforms recent neural sparsification methods that are restricted to Euclidean distances, and becomes increasingly valuable at larger scales where single-stage heuristics degrade.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段图稀疏化方法，先合并α-Nearest和POPMUSIC以提高召回率，再训练单一模型降低密度，在多种距离类型和分布上优于现有方法，且在大规模问题上优势更明显。
AI.motivation: 现有TSP求解器依赖候选图稀疏化，但单阶段启发式方法（α-Nearest、POPMUSIC）无法同时在所有实例规模和分布上兼顾稀疏性与可靠性；机器学习方法虽可学习更好模型，但现有方法在完整图上操作、计算昂贵且局限于欧氏距离。
AI.method: 两阶段图稀疏化：第一阶段取α-Nearest和POPMUSIC的并集最大化召回率；第二阶段训练单一模型降低图密度。实验涵盖四种TSPLIB距离类型、五种空间分布及50到500节点规模。
AI.result: 两阶段方法显著降低候选图密度同时保持高覆盖率，泛化能力强于仅限欧氏距离的神经稀疏化方法，在大规模问题上单阶段方法性能退化时优势更明显。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段图稀疏化策略有效平衡了稀疏性与覆盖率，具有良好的跨距离类型和分布的泛化能力，特别适用于大规模TSP问题。

title: Evaluating Histogram Matching for Robust Deep learning-Based Grapevine Disease Detection
summary: Variability in illumination is a primary factor limiting deep learning robustness for field-based plant disease detection. This study evaluates Histogram Matching (HM), a technique that transforms the pixel intensity distribution of an image to match a reference profile, to mitigate this in grapevine classification, distinguishing among healthy leaves, downy mildew, and spider mite damage. We propose a dual-stage integration of HM: (i) as a preprocessing step for normalization, and (ii) as a data augmentation technique to introduce controlled training variability. Experiments using 1,469 RGB images (comprising homogeneous leaf-focused and heterogeneous canopy samples) to train ResNet-18 models demonstrate that this combination significantly enhances robustness on real-world canopy images. While leaf-focused samples showed marginal gains, the canopy subset improved markedly, indicating that balancing normalization with histogram-based diversification effectively bridges the domain gap caused by uncontrolled lighting.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出将直方图匹配（HM）双重集成到深度学习流程中——既作为预处理归一化手段，又作为数据增强技术——以提升光照变化下葡萄树病害检测的鲁棒性。在1469张RGB图像（含均质叶片和异质冠层样本）上用ResNet-18验证，该方法显著改善了真实冠层图像的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 光照变化是限制田间植物病害检测深度学习模型鲁棒性的主要因素，现有方法难以有效弥合因不受控光照条件造成的域差异。
AI.method: 提出直方图匹配（HM）的双阶段集成策略：(i) 作为预处理步骤进行图像归一化，(ii) 作为数据增强技术引入受控的训练集变异。使用ResNet-18在1469张RGB图像（含叶片聚焦样本和冠层样本）上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 叶片聚焦样本提升有限，但冠层子集性能显著提升，表明归一化与基于直方图的多样化策略有效弥合了由光照变化引起的域差距。
AI.conclusion: 预处理归一化与基于直方图的数据增强相结合，能有效提升模型在真实冠层场景下应对光照变化的鲁棒性，为田间植物病害检测提供了实用方案。

title: Iterated Invariant EKF for Quadruped Robot Odometry
summary: Kalman filter-based algorithms are fundamental for mobile robots, as they provide a computationally efficient solution to the challenging problem of state estimation. However, they rely on two main assumptions that are difficult to satisfy in practice: (a) the system dynamics must be linear with Gaussian process noise, and (b) the measurement model must also be linear with Gaussian measurement noise. Previous works have extended assumption (a) to nonlinear spaces through the Invariant Extended Kalman Filter (IEKF), showing that it retains properties similar to those of the classical Kalman filter when the system dynamics are group-affine on a Lie group. More recently, the counterpart of assumption (b) for the same nonlinear setting was addressed in [1]. By means of the proposed Iterated Invariant Extended Kalman Filter (IterIEKF), the authors of that work demonstrated that the update step exhibits several compatibility properties of the classical linear Kalman filter. In this work, we introduce a novel open-source state estimation algorithm for legged robots based on the IterIEKF. The update step of the proposed filter relies solely on proprioceptive measurements, exploiting kinematic constraints on foot velocity during contact and base-frame velocity, making it inherently robust to environmental conditions. Through extensive numerical simulations and evaluation on real-world datasets, we demonstrate that the IterIEKF outperforms the vanilla IEKF, the SO(3)-based Kalman Filter, and its iterated variant in terms of both accuracy and consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于迭代不变扩展卡尔曼滤波（IterIEKF）的开源足式机器人状态估计算法。该算法仅利用本体感知测量和运动学约束进行更新，在仿真和真实数据集上相比IEKF、SO(3)卡尔曼滤波及其迭代变体在精度和一致性上均表现更优。
AI.motivation: 卡尔曼滤波在状态估计中高效但依赖线性和高斯假设，实践中难以满足。前人工作通过IEKF解决了非线性动力学假设的扩展，但测量模型的非线性对应问题直到最近才被IterIEKF解决。本文旨在将IterIEKF应用于足式机器人，提供一个开源且鲁棒的状态估计算法。
AI.method: 基于IterIEKF框架，更新步骤仅利用本体感知测量，通过足部接触速度和基座速度的运动学约束实现，不依赖外部环境感知。
AI.result: 通过大量数值仿真和真实数据集评估，IterIEKF在精度和一致性上均优于普通IEKF、SO(3)卡尔曼滤波及其迭代变体。
AI.conclusion: IterIEKF结合了非线性动力学和测量模型的优点，利用本体感知约束实现了对环境条件鲁棒的足式机器人状态估计，具有更高的精度和一致性。

title: Clinically Interpretable Sepsis Early Warning via LLM-Guided Simulation of Temporal Physiological Dynamics
summary: Timely and interpretable early warning of sepsis remains a major clinical challenge due to the complex temporal dynamics of physiological deterioration. Traditional data-driven models often provide accurate yet opaque predictions, limiting physicians' confidence and clinical applicability. To address this limitation, we propose a Large Language Model (LLM)-guided temporal simulation framework that explicitly models physiological trajectories prior to disease onset for clinically interpretable prediction. The framework consists of a spatiotemporal feature extraction module that captures dynamic dependencies among multivariate vital signs, a Medical Prompt-as-Prefix module that embeds clinical reasoning cues into LLMs, and an agent-based post-processing component that constrains predictions within physiologically plausible ranges. By first simulating the evolution of key physiological indicators and then classifying sepsis onset, our model offers transparent prediction mechanisms that align with clinical judgment. Evaluated on the MIMIC-IV and eICU databases, the proposed method achieves superior AUC scores (0.861-0.903) across 24-4-hour pre-onset prediction tasks, outperforming conventional deep learning and rule-based approaches. More importantly, it provides interpretable trajectories and risk trends that can assist clinicians in early intervention and personalized decision-making in intensive care environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于大语言模型引导的时间模拟框架，通过显式建模脓毒症发病前的生理轨迹实现可解释的早期预警，在MIMIC-IV和eICU数据集上取得了优于传统方法的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统数据驱动的脓毒症早期预警模型虽然准确但缺乏可解释性，限制了临床医生的信任度和实际应用。
AI.method: 框架包含三个核心模块：时空特征提取模块（捕捉多变量生命体征的动态依赖）、医学提示作为前缀模块（将临床推理线索嵌入LLM）、基于智能体的后处理模块（约束预测在生理合理范围内）。先模拟关键生理指标的演变，再进行脓毒症发病分类。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV和eICU数据库上，该方法在24-4小时发病前预测任务中取得了0.861-0.903的AUC分数，优于传统深度学习和基于规则的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅预测性能优越，还能提供可解释的轨迹和风险趋势，有助于临床医生在重症监护环境中进行早期干预和个性化决策。

title: Seeing Candidates at Scale: Multimodal LLMs for Visual Political Communication on Instagram
comment: An earlier version was presented at #SMSociety 2024 (London)
summary: This paper presents a computational case study that evaluates the capabilities of specialized machine learning models and emerging multimodal large language models for Visual Political Communication (VPC) analysis. Focusing on concentrated visibility in Instagram stories and posts during the 2021 German federal election campaign, we compare the performance of traditional computer vision models (FaceNet512, RetinaFace, Google Cloud Vision) with a multimodal large language model (GPT-4o) in identifying front-runner politicians and counting individuals in images. GPT-4o outperformed the other models, achieving a macro F1-score of 0.89 for face recognition and 0.86 for person counting in stories. These findings demonstrate the potential of advanced AI systems to scale and refine visual content analysis in political communication while highlighting methodological considerations for future research.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过计算案例分析评估了传统计算机视觉模型（FaceNet512、RetinaFace、Google Cloud Vision）与多模态大语言模型（GPT-4o）在视觉政治传播分析中的表现。以2021年德国联邦大选期间Instagram故事和帖子中的集中可见性为焦点，GPT-4o在人物识别（宏F1=0.89）和人数统计（宏F1=0.86）任务上均优于其他模型，展示了先进AI系统在扩展和优化政治传播视觉内容分析方面的潜力。
AI.motivation: 视觉政治传播（VPC）分析中，传统计算机视觉模型在复杂场景下的识别和计数能力有限，而新兴多模态大语言模型在此领域的应用尚未得到系统评估。本研究旨在填补这一空白，比较两类方法在真实政治传播场景中的表现。
AI.method: 以2021年德国联邦大选期间Instagram故事和帖子为数据源，聚焦集中可见性分析。比较传统模型（FaceNet512、RetinaFace、Google Cloud Vision）与多模态大语言模型GPT-4o在识别领先候选人和计数图像中人物数量方面的性能，使用宏F1-score作为评估指标。
AI.result: GPT-4o在两项任务中均表现最佳：人脸识别宏F1-score为0.89，人物计数宏F1-score为0.86，显著优于传统计算机视觉模型。
AI.conclusion: 先进AI系统（特别是多模态大语言模型）在扩展和优化政治传播视觉内容分析方面具有显著潜力，同时为未来研究提供了方法论考量。

title: Abstract Sim2Real through Approximate Information States
summary: In recent years, reinforcement learning (RL) has shown remarkable success in robotics when a fast and accurate simulator is available for a given task. When using RL and simulation, more simulator realism is generally beneficial but becomes harder to obtain as robots are deployed in increasingly complex and widescale domains. In such settings, simulators will likely fail to model all relevant details of a given target task and this observation motivates the study of sim2real with simulators that leave out key task details. In this paper, we formalize and study the abstract sim2real problem: given an abstract simulator that models a target task at a coarse level of abstraction, how can we train a policy with RL in the abstract simulator and successfully transfer it to the real-world? Our first contribution is to formalize this problem using the language of state abstraction from the RL literature. This framing shows that an abstract simulator can be grounded to match the target task if the grounded abstract dynamics take the history of states into account. Based on the formalism, we then introduce a method that uses real-world task data to correct the dynamics of the abstract simulator. We then show that this method enables successful policy transfer both in sim2sim and sim2real evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了抽象模拟器到真实环境的策略迁移问题（abstract sim2real），通过状态抽象理论形式化该问题，并提出一种利用真实任务数据修正抽象模拟器动力学的方法，从而实现在模拟器中训练的RL策略成功迁移到真实环境。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人部署到日益复杂和大规模的领域，构建精确且完整的模拟器变得越来越困难。模拟器往往会遗漏目标任务的关键细节，因此需要研究在抽象（粗粒度）模拟器中训练策略并成功迁移到真实世界的方法。
AI.method: 首先利用强化学习中的状态抽象语言形式化了抽象sim2real问题，证明如果抽象动力学考虑了状态历史，则抽象模拟器可以匹配目标任务。基于该形式化，提出一种利用真实任务数据来修正抽象模拟器动力学的方法。
AI.result: 在sim2sim和sim2real评估中，所提出的方法均实现了成功的策略迁移。
AI.conclusion: 通过形式化抽象sim2real问题并提出基于真实数据修正抽象模拟器动力学的方法，可以有效解决模拟器过于简化导致迁移失败的问题，为复杂环境下机器人强化学习策略迁移提供了可行的理论框架和实用方法。

title: Deep sprite-based image models: An analysis
summary: While foundation models drive steady progress in image segmentation and diffusion algorithms compose always more realistic images, the seemingly simple problem of identifying recurrent patterns in a collection of images remains very much open. In this paper, we focus on sprite-based image decomposition models, which have shown some promise for clustering and image decomposition and are appealing because of their high interpretability. These models come in different flavors, need to be tailored to specific datasets, and struggle to scale to images with many objects. We dive into the details of their design, identify their core components, and perform an extensive analysis on clustering benchmarks. We leverage this analysis to propose a deep sprite-based image decomposition method that performs on par with state-of-the-art unsupervised class-aware image segmentation methods on the standard CLEVR benchmark, scales linearly with the number of objects, identifies explicitly object categories, and fully models images in an easily interpretable way.

AI.tldr: 本文深入分析了基于精灵（sprite）的图像分解模型，识别其核心组件，并通过大量聚类基准测试提出了一种深度精灵图像分解方法，该方法在CLEVR基准上达到了与无监督类别感知图像分割方法相当的性能，能线性扩展至多对象场景，显式识别对象类别，并以高度可解释的方式完整建模图像。
AI.motivation: 尽管基础模型在图像分割和扩散算法方面取得了进展，但在图像集合中识别重复模式这一看似简单的问题仍未解决。精灵基图像分解模型因其高可解释性而具有吸引力，但现有模型需要针对特定数据集定制，且难以扩展到包含多个对象的图像。
AI.method: 深入分析现有精灵基图像分解模型的设计细节，识别其核心组件，在聚类基准上进行广泛分析，并基于此提出一种深度精灵图像分解方法。
AI.result: 提出的方法在标准CLEVR基准上达到与无监督类别感知图像分割方法相当的性能，且计算复杂度与对象数量呈线性关系，能够显式识别对象类别，并以高度可解释的方式完整建模图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统的分析和设计改进，精灵基图像分解模型可以有效解决多对象场景下的可扩展性问题，同时保持高可解释性，在无监督图像分割任务上具备竞争力。

title: Knowledge Capsules: Structured Nonparametric Memory Units for LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) encode knowledge in parametric weights, making it costly to update or extend without retraining. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) mitigates this limitation by appending retrieved text to the input, but operates purely through context expansion, where external knowledge competes as tokens within the attention mechanism. As a result, its influence is indirect and often unstable, particularly in long context and multi hop reasoning scenarios. We propose Knowledge Capsules, structured nonparametric memory units that represent normalized relational knowledge and can be constructed directly from document corpora using a frozen base model. Instead of injecting knowledge as text, we introduce an External Key Value Injection (KVI) framework that compiles capsules into attention-compatible key value representations, enabling external knowledge to directly participate in the model's attention computation. By shifting knowledge integration from context-level augmentation to memory level interaction, the proposed framework consistently outperforms RAG and GraphRAG across multiple QA benchmarks, with improved stability and accuracy in long context and multi hop reasoning, while requiring no parameter updates.

AI.tldr: 提出知识胶囊（Knowledge Capsules），一种结构化非参数记忆单元，通过外部键值注入（KVI）框架将文档中的关系知识编译为注意力兼容的键值表示，使外部知识直接参与注意力计算，在多项QA基准上优于RAG和GraphRAG，且无需参数更新。
AI.motivation: LLM以参数形式编码知识导致更新或扩展代价高昂，RAG虽通过上下文扩展缓解该问题，但其以文本形式注入外部知识，在注意力机制中与原始token竞争，影响间接且不稳定，尤其在长上下文和多跳推理场景中表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出知识胶囊（Knowledge Capsules）作为结构化非参数记忆单元，利用冻结基模型从文档语料直接构建归一化的关系知识；设计外部键值注入（KVI）框架，将胶囊编译为注意力兼容的键值表示，使外部知识直接参与模型的注意力计算。
AI.result: 在多个QA基准上，该方法一致优于RAG和GraphRAG，在长上下文和多跳推理场景中表现出更高的稳定性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: 将知识集成从上下文级增强转变为记忆级交互，无需参数更新即可实现更稳定、更准确的外部知识融合。

title: R3D: Revisiting 3D Policy Learning
summary: 3D policy learning promises superior generalization and cross-embodiment transfer, but progress has been hindered by training instabilities and severe overfitting, precluding the adoption of powerful 3D perception models. In this work, we systematically diagnose these failures, identifying the omission of 3D data augmentation and the adverse effects of Batch Normalization as primary causes. We propose a new architecture coupling a scalable transformer-based 3D encoder with a diffusion decoder, engineered specifically for stability at scale and designed to leverage large-scale pre-training. Our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art 3D baselines on challenging manipulation benchmarks, establishing a new and robust foundation for scalable 3D imitation learning. Project Page: https://r3d-policy.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文诊断了3D策略学习中的训练不稳定和过拟合问题，发现缺乏3D数据增强和Batch Normalization的负面影响是主要原因。提出了一种新的架构，将可扩展的基于Transformer的3D编码器与扩散解码器相结合，专门为大规模稳定性而设计，并利用大规模预训练。该方法在具有挑战性的操作基准测试上显著优于最先进的3D基线，为可扩展的3D模仿学习建立了新的稳健基础。
AI.motivation: 3D策略学习虽然有望实现更好的泛化和跨实体迁移，但训练不稳定和严重过拟合问题阻碍了强大3D感知模型的应用。本文旨在系统诊断这些失败原因并提出解决方案。
AI.method: 系统诊断了训练失败的原因，发现缺乏3D数据增强和Batch Normalization的负面影响是主要因素。提出了一种新架构，将可扩展的基于Transformer的3D编码器与扩散解码器耦合，专门设计用于大规模稳定性，并利用大规模预训练。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的操作基准测试上，该方法显著优于最先进的3D基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为可扩展的3D模仿学习建立了新的稳健基础，验证了通过正确的架构设计和训练策略，3D策略学习可以克服之前的局限性。

title: TS-Attn: Temporal-wise Separable Attention for Multi-Event Video Generation
summary: Generating high-quality videos from complex temporal descriptions that contain multiple sequential actions is a key unsolved problem. Existing methods are constrained by an inherent trade-off: using multiple short prompts fed sequentially into the model improves action fidelity but compromises temporal consistency, while a single complex prompt preserves consistency at the cost of prompt-following capability. We attribute this problem to two primary causes: 1) temporal misalignment between video content and the prompt, and 2) conflicting attention coupling between motion-related visual objects and their associated text conditions. To address these challenges, we propose a novel, training-free attention mechanism, Temporal-wise Separable Attention (TS-Attn), which dynamically rearranges attention distribution to ensure temporal awareness and global coherence in multi-event scenarios. TS-Attn can be seamlessly integrated into various pre-trained text-to-video models, boosting StoryEval-Bench scores by 33.5% and 16.4% on Wan2.1-T2V-14B and Wan2.2-T2V-A14B with only a 2% increase in inference time. It also supports plug-and-play usage across models for multi-event image-to-video generation. The source code and project page are available at https://github.com/Hong-yu-Zhang/TS-Attn.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练的时序可分离注意力机制（TS-Attn），通过动态重排注意力分布解决复杂时序描述中的多事件视频生成问题，在仅增加2%推理时间的情况下将StoryEval-Bench分数提升33.5%和16.4%。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多事件时序视频生成中存在固有权衡：多段短提示序列输入能提升动作保真度但损害时序一致性，单个复杂提示能保持一致性但提示跟随能力弱。根本原因是视频内容与提示之间的时序错位，以及运动相关视觉对象与其文本条件之间的注意力耦合冲突。
AI.method: 提出TS-Attn（Temporal-wise Separable Attention），一种无需训练的注意力机制，通过动态重排注意力分布来确保多事件场景下的时序感知与全局连贯性，可无缝集成到各类预训练文生视频模型中。
AI.result: 在Wan2.1-T2V-14B和Wan2.2-T2V-A14B上分别提升StoryEval-Bench分数33.5%和16.4%，仅增加2%推理时间；支持即插即用式多事件图生视频生成。
AI.conclusion: TS-Attn有效解决了复杂时序描述中多事件视频生成的时序错位和注意力耦合问题，是一种高效、轻量、可移植的解决方案。

title: Vision-Based Safe Human-Robot Collaboration with Uncertainty Guarantees
summary: We propose a framework for vision-based human pose estimation and motion prediction that gives conformal prediction guarantees for certifiably safe human-robot collaboration. Our framework combines aleatoric uncertainty estimation with OOD detection for high probabilistic confidence. To integrate our pipeline in certifiable safety frameworks, we propose conformal prediction sets for human motion predictions with high, valid confidence. We evaluate our pipeline on recorded human motion data and a real-world human-robot collaboration setting.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于视觉的人体姿态估计和运动预测框架，通过保形预测为安全人机协作提供可认证的保证。
AI.motivation: 实现可认证安全的人机协作，需要对人体的运动预测提供高置信度且有效的概率保证。
AI.method: 将偶然不确定性估计与OOD检测相结合，并引入保形预测集来生成具有高置信度的人体运动预测。
AI.result: 在记录的人体运动数据和真实的人机协作场景中进行了评估。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够提供符合保形预测保证的安全保障，适用于人机协作的认证安全框架。

title: Vibrotactile Preference Learning: Uncertainty-Aware Preference Learning for Personalized Vibration Feedback
summary: Individual differences in vibrotactile perception underscore the growing importance of personalization as haptic feedback becomes more prevalent in interactive systems. We propose Vibrotactile Preference Learning (VPL), a system that captures user-specific preference spaces over vibrotactile parameters via Gaussian-process-based uncertainty-aware preference learning. VPL uses an expected information gain-based acquisition strategy to guide query selection over 40 rounds of pairwise comparisons of overall user preference, augmented with user-reported uncertainty, enabling efficient exploration of the parameter space. We evaluate VPL in a user study (N = 13) using the vibrotactile feedback from a Microsoft Xbox controller, showing that it efficiently learns individualized preferences while maintaining comfortable, low-workload user interactions. These results highlight the potential of VPL for scalable personalization of vibrotactile experiences.

AI.tldr: 提出Vibrotactile Preference Learning (VPL)系统，利用高斯过程的不确定性感知偏好学习，通过成对比较和用户报告的不确定性来个性化振动触觉参数空间，实验表明能高效学习个体偏好且保持低工作负荷。
AI.motivation: 振动触觉感知存在个体差异，随着触觉反馈在交互系统中日益普及，个性化需求日益增长，现有方法缺乏对用户偏好的高效、可扩展学习机制。
AI.method: 基于高斯过程的不确定性感知偏好学习，采用期望信息增益驱动的采集策略，通过40轮成对比较（结合用户自报不确定性）引导查询选择，高效探索振动触觉参数空间。
AI.result: 在13名用户的评估中，使用Xbox控制器振动反馈，VPL能够高效学习个性化偏好，同时保持舒适且低工作负荷的用户交互体验。
AI.conclusion: VPL在振动触觉体验的可扩展个性化方面具有潜力，为触觉交互系统的个性化提供了有效方案。

title: LoViF 2026 Challenge on Real-World All-in-One Image Restoration: Methods and Results
summary: This paper presents a review for the LoViF Challenge on Real-World All-in-One Image Restoration. The challenge aimed to advance research on real-world all-in-one image restoration under diverse real-world degradation conditions, including blur, low-light, haze, rain, and snow. It provided a unified benchmark to evaluate the robustness and generalization ability of restoration models across multiple degradation categories within a common framework. The competition attracted 124 registered participants and received 9 valid final submissions with corresponding fact sheets, significantly contributing to the progress of real-world all-in-one image restoration. This report provides a detailed analysis of the submitted methods and corresponding results, emphasizing recent progress in unified real-world image restoration. The analysis highlights effective approaches and establishes a benchmark for future research in real-world low-level vision.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了LoViF挑战赛在真实世界全能图像修复方面的进展，该挑战赛针对模糊、低光、雾霾、雨和雪等多种退化条件，提供了一个统一基准来评估模型鲁棒性和泛化能力。共有124名注册参与者，9份有效最终提交，报告详细分析了提交方法和结果，为未来真实世界低级视觉研究建立了基准。
AI.motivation: 推动真实世界全能图像修复研究，建立统一的基准来评估模型在多种退化条件下的鲁棒性和泛化能力，解决现有方法在不同退化类型上的性能差异问题。
AI.method: 通过组织LoViF挑战赛，提供包含模糊、低光、雾霾、雨和雪等多种真实退化条件的统一基准数据集，收集并分析来自124名注册参与者的9份有效最终提交的方法和事实表，进行系统性评估和比较。
AI.result: 9份有效提交方法在统一基准上进行了评估，揭示了不同方法在处理多种退化类型时的表现差异，识别出有效的修复策略，建立了用于未来研究的基准。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛显著推进了真实世界全能图像修复领域的发展，通过统一基准和详细分析为未来研究提供了有价值的参考和方向，特别是在多种退化条件下的通用修复能力方面。

title: A Hierarchical Spatiotemporal Action Tokenizer for In-Context Imitation Learning in Robotics
summary: We present a novel hierarchical spatiotemporal action tokenizer for in-context imitation learning. We first propose a hierarchical approach, which consists of two successive levels of vector quantization. In particular, the lower level assigns input actions to fine-grained subclusters, while the higher level further maps fine-grained subclusters to clusters. Our hierarchical approach outperforms the non-hierarchical counterpart, while mainly exploiting spatial information by reconstructing input actions. Furthermore, we extend our approach by utilizing both spatial and temporal cues, forming a hierarchical spatiotemporal action tokenizer, namely HiST-AT. Specifically, our hierarchical spatiotemporal approach conducts multi-level clustering, while simultaneously recovering input actions and their associated timestamps. Finally, extensive evaluations on multiple simulation and real robotic manipulation benchmarks show that our approach establishes a new state-of-the-art performance in in-context imitation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于情境模仿学习的分层时空动作分词器（HiST-AT），通过两级向量量化（低层细粒度子聚类+高层映射到聚类）实现分层动作编码，并同时利用空间和时间信息重建输入动作及其时间戳，在多个仿真和真实机器人操作基准上取得了最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有情境模仿学习方法在动作分词化方面缺乏层次化结构，且主要利用空间信息而忽略了时间线索，导致动作表征能力有限。
AI.method: 提出分层时空动作分词器（HiST-AT）：(1) 采用两级向量量化层次结构，低层将输入动作分配到细粒度子簇，高层将子簇进一步映射到簇；(2) 同时利用空间和时间线索，在重建输入动作的同时恢复对应的时间戳；(3) 进行多层级聚类以提升表征能力。
AI.result: 在多个仿真和真实机器人操作基准上，HiST-AT在情境模仿学习中取得了新的最优性能，且分层方法显著优于非分层基线。
AI.conclusion: 分层时空动作分词策略能有效提升情境模仿学习的性能，空间与时间信息的联合建模是关键因素。

title: Scaling Self-Play with Self-Guidance
summary: LLM self-play algorithms are notable in that, in principle, nothing bounds their learning: a Conjecturer model creates problems for a Solver, and both improve together. However, in practice, existing LLM self-play methods do not scale well with large amounts of compute, instead hitting learning plateaus. We argue this is because over long training runs, the Conjecturer learns to hack its reward, collapsing to artificially complex problems that do not help the Solver improve. To overcome this, we introduce Self-Guided Self-Play (SGS), a self-play algorithm in which the language model itself guides the Conjecturer away from degeneracy. In SGS, the model takes on three roles: Solver, Conjecturer, and a Guide that scores synthetic problems by their relevance to unsolved target problems and how clean and natural they are, providing supervision against Conjecturer collapse. Our core hypothesis is that language models can assess whether a subproblem is useful for achieving a goal. We evaluate the scaling properties of SGS by running training for significantly longer than prior works and by fitting scaling laws to cumulative solve rate curves. Applying SGS to formal theorem proving in Lean4, we find that it surpasses the asymptotic solve rate of our strongest RL baseline in fewer than 80 rounds of self-play and enables a 7B parameter model, after 200 rounds of self-play, to solve more problems than a 671B parameter model pass@4.

AI.tldr: 现有LLM自我博弈方法在长时间训练中会因Conjecturer模型作弊（生成过于复杂无益的问题）而陷入学习瓶颈。本文提出SGS（自我引导自我博弈）算法，引入Guide角色评估子问题的相关性和自然性，防止Conjecturer退化。在Lean4形式化定理证明中，SGS在80轮内超越强RL基线的渐近求解率，200轮后7B模型超越671B模型pass@4。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM自我博弈方法在长时间训练中会因Conjecturer模型学会"作弊"而陷入学习瓶颈——它会生成人为复杂但对Solver提升无益的问题，从而欺骗奖励信号。作者旨在解决这一退化问题，使自我博弈能够持续扩展。
AI.method: 提出SGS（Self-Guided Self-Play）算法，让语言模型承担三种角色：Solver（求解器）、Conjecturer（猜想器）和Guide（引导器）。Guide负责评分合成问题：（1）与未解决目标问题的相关性；（2）问题的简洁自然程度，从而对Conjecturer提供监督，防止其退化坍塌。
AI.result: 在Lean4形式化定理证明任务中，SGS在少于80轮自我博弈内超越最强RL基线的渐近求解率；经过200轮自我博弈后，7B参数的模型能够比671B参数的模型pass@4解决更多问题。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型能够有效评估子问题对达成目标的实用性。SGS通过引入Guide角色自我监督，成功突破自我博弈中的退化瓶颈，实现可持续的规模扩展，且小模型可通过充分自我博弈超越大模型。

title: DINO Eats CLIP: Adapting Beyond Knowns for Open-set 3D Object Retrieval
summary: Vision foundation models have shown great promise for open-set 3D object retrieval (3DOR) through efficient adaptation to multi-view images. Leveraging semantically aligned latent space, previous work typically adapts the CLIP encoder to build view-based 3D descriptors. Despite CLIP's strong generalization ability, its lack of fine-grainedness prompted us to explore the potential of a more recent self-supervised encoder-DINO. To address this, we propose DINO Eats CLIP (DEC), a novel framework for dynamic multi-view integration that is regularized by synthesizing data for unseen classes. We first find that simply mean-pooling over view features from a frozen DINO backbone gives decent performance. Yet, further adaptation causes severe overfitting on average view patterns of known classes. To combat it, we then design a module named Chunking and Adapting Module (CAM). It segments multi-view images into chunks and dynamically integrates local view relations, yielding more robust features than the standard pooling strategy. Finally, we propose Virtual Feature Synthesis (VFS) module to mitigate bias towards known categories explicitly. Under the hood, VFS leverages CLIP's broad, pre-aligned vision-language space to synthesize virtual features for unseen classes. By exposing DEC to these virtual features, we greatly enhance its open-set discrimination capacity. Extensive experiments on standard open-set 3DOR benchmarks demonstrate its superior efficacy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEC框架，通过动态多视角整合（CAM模块）和虚拟特征合成（VFS模块）解决DINO在开放集3D物体检索中因微调导致的过拟合和已知类别偏差问题，在标准基准上取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: CLIP编码器虽泛化能力强但缺乏细粒度特征，而DINO自监督编码器具有潜力，但直接微调会导致对已知类别平均视角模式的严重过拟合。作者旨在探索DINO的潜力并解决其过拟合与已知类别偏差问题。
AI.method: 提出DEC框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) Chunking and Adapting Module (CAM)，将多视角图像分割成块并动态整合局部视角关系，生成比标准池化更鲁棒的特征；(2) Virtual Feature Synthesis (VFS)模块，利用CLIP预对齐的视觉-语言空间为未见类别合成虚拟特征，增强开放集判别能力。
AI.result: 在标准开放集3DOR基准上，DEC框架表现优异，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过CAM和VFS模块，DEC成功克服了DINO编码器在开放集3DOR任务中的过拟合与偏差问题，验证了自监督编码器DINO在该任务上的潜力优于CLIP。

title: Adaptive Defense Orchestration for RAG: A Sentinel-Strategist Architecture against Multi-Vector Attacks
comment: 21 pages, 2 figures, 9 tables. Manuscript prepared for submission to ACM CCS
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems are increasingly deployed in sensitive domains such as healthcare and law, where they rely on private, domain-specific knowledge. This capability introduces significant security risks, including membership inference, data poisoning, and unintended content leakage. A straightforward mitigation is to enable all relevant defenses simultaneously, but doing so incurs a substantial utility cost. In our experiments, an always-on defense stack reduces contextual recall by more than 40%, indicating that retrieval degradation is the primary failure mode. To mitigate this trade-off in RAG systems, we propose the Sentinel-Strategist architecture, a context-aware framework for risk analysis and defense selection. A Sentinel detects anomalous retrieval behavior, after which a Strategist selectively deploys only the defenses warranted by the query context. Evaluated across three benchmark datasets and five orchestration models, ADO is shown to eliminate MBA-style membership inference leakage while substantially recovering retrieval utility relative to a fully static defense stack, approaching undefended baseline levels. Under data poisoning, the strongest ADO variants reduce attack success to near zero while restoring contextual recall to more than 75% of the undefended baseline, although robustness remains sensitive to model choice. Overall, these findings show that adaptive, query-aware defense can substantially reduce the security-utility trade-off in RAG systems.

AI.tldr: 提出Sentinel-Strategist架构，通过上下文感知的异常检测与选择性防御部署，在RAG系统中显著缓解安全性与检索效用之间的权衡，相比全开防御栈在消除成员推断攻击的同时将上下文召回率恢复到未防御基线的75%以上。
AI.motivation: RAG系统在医疗、法律等敏感领域依赖私有领域知识，面临成员推断、数据投毒和内容泄露等安全风险。全面启用所有防御会严重损害检索效用（上下文召回率下降超40%），亟需一种能动态平衡安全性与效用的自适应防御机制。
AI.method: 提出Sentinel-Strategist架构：Sentinel组件检测异常检索行为，Strategist根据查询上下文选择性部署最合适的防御策略（即ADO框架）。在三个基准数据集和五个编排模型上评估。
AI.result: ADO完全消除了MBA式成员推断泄露；在数据投毒攻击下，最强ADO变体将攻击成功率降至接近零，同时将上下文召回率恢复至未防御基线的75%以上，但鲁棒性受模型选择影响。
AI.conclusion: 自适应、查询感知的防御策略能大幅降低RAG系统的安全-效用权衡，验证了按需防御相比全开静态防御堆栈的显著优势。

title: Benchmarking Classical Coverage Path Planning Heuristics on Irregular Hexagonal Grids for Maritime Coverage Scenarios
summary: Coverage path planning on irregular hexagonal grids is relevant to maritime surveillance, search and rescue and environmental monitoring, yet classical methods are often compared on small ad hoc examples or on rectangular grids. This paper presents a reproducible benchmark of deterministic single-vehicle coverage path planning heuristics on irregular hexagonal graphs derived from synthetic but maritime-motivated areas of interest. The benchmark contains 10,000 Hamiltonian-feasible instances spanning compact, elongated, and irregular morphologies, 17 heuristics from seven families, and a common evaluation protocol covering Hamiltonian success, complete-coverage success, revisits, path length, heading changes, and CPU latency. Across the released dataset, heuristics with explicit shortest-path reconnection solve the relaxed coverage task reliably but almost never produce zero-revisit tours. Exact Depth-First Search confirms that every released instance is Hamiltonian-feasible. The strongest classical Hamiltonian baseline is a Warnsdorff variant that uses an index-based tie-break together with a terminal-inclusive residual-degree policy, reaching 79.0% Hamiltonian success. The dominant design choice is not tie-breaking alone, but how the residual degree is defined when the endpoint is reserved until the final move. This shows that underreported implementation details can materially affect performance on sparse geometric graphs with bottlenecks. The benchmark is intended as a controlled testbed for heuristic analysis rather than as a claim of operational optimality at fleet scale.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个包含10,000个不规则六边形网格实例的覆盖路径规划基准测试，评估了7类17种启发式算法，发现Warnsdorff变体在哈密顿路径成功率上最佳（79.0%），并揭示了残差度定义方式比单纯的破平策略更为关键。
AI.motivation: 现有覆盖路径规划方法多在小规模特例或矩形网格上比较，缺乏在海洋监测等应用场景中更相关的非规则六边形网格上的系统基准测试，无法公平比较不同启发式算法的实际性能。
AI.method: 生成10,000个具备哈密顿路径可行性的不规则六边形网格实例（涵盖紧凑、细长、不规则三种形态），实现7类17种启发式算法，统一评估哈密顿成功率、完全覆盖成功率、回头次数、路径长度、航向变化次数和CPU延迟等指标。
AI.result: Warnsdorff变体（索引破平+终端包容残差度策略）达到79.0%哈密顿成功率；显式最短路径重连的启发式能可靠完成松弛覆盖任务但几乎无法实现零回头路径；穷举DFS验证所有实例均哈密顿可行。
AI.conclusion: 残差度的定义方式（是否保留终点约束）比破平策略本身对性能影响更大，表明在稀疏几何图上实现细节的微小差异会显著影响启发式效果，本基准旨在为启发式分析提供受控测试平台。

title: ACT: Anti-Crosstalk Learning for Cross-Sectional Stock Ranking via Temporal Disentanglement and Structural Purification
summary: Cross-sectional stock ranking is a fundamental task in quantitative investment, relying on both temporal modeling of individual stocks and the capture of inter-stock dependencies. While existing deep learning models leverage graph-based approaches to enhance ranking accuracy by propagating information over relational graphs, they suffer from a key challenge: crosstalk, namely unintended information interference across predictive factors. We identify two forms of crosstalk: temporal-scale crosstalk, where trends, fluctuations, and shocks are entangled in a shared representation and non-transferable local patterns contaminate cross-stock learning; and structural crosstalk, where heterogeneous relations are indiscriminately fused and relation-specific predictive signals are obscured. To address both issues, we propose the Anti-CrossTalk (ACT) framework for cross-sectional stock ranking via temporal disentanglement and structural purification. Specifically, ACT first decomposes each stock sequence into trend, fluctuation, and shock components, then extracts component-specific information through dedicated branches, which effectively decouples non-transferable local patterns. ACT further introduces a Progressive Structural Purification Encoder to sequentially purify structural crosstalk on the trend component after mitigating temporal-scale crosstalk. An adaptive fusion module finally integrates all branch representations for ranking. Experiments on CSI300 and CSI500 demonstrate that ACT achieves state-of-the-art ranking accuracy and superior portfolio performance, with improvements of up to 74.25% on the CSI300 dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ACT框架，通过时序解缠和结构净化解决跨截面股票排序中的串扰问题（时序尺度串扰和结构串扰），在CSI300和CSI500数据集上取得SOTA性能，最高提升74.25%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图的深度学习模型在股票排序中存在两类串扰问题：1) 时序尺度串扰：趋势、波动和冲击在共享表征中纠缠，不可迁移的局部模式污染跨股票学习；2) 结构串扰：异质关系被不加区分地融合，掩盖了关系特定的预测信号。
AI.method: ACT框架包含三部分：1) 将每只股票序列分解为趋势、波动和冲击成分，通过专用分支提取成分特定信息以解耦不可迁移的局部模式；2) 渐进式结构净化编码器，在缓解时序尺度串扰后逐步净化趋势成分上的结构串扰；3) 自适应融合模块整合所有分支表征进行排序。
AI.result: 在CSI300和CSI500数据集上，ACT在排序精度和投资组合性能上均达到最先进水平，在CSI300数据集上最高提升74.25%。
AI.conclusion: 通过时序解缠和结构净化可以有效解决跨截面股票排序中的串扰问题，提升排序准确性和投资组合表现。

title: Dual Pose-Graph Semantic Localization for Vision-Based Autonomous Drone Racing
summary: Autonomous drone racing demands robust real-time localization under extreme conditions: high-speed flight, aggressive maneuvers, and payload-constrained platforms that often rely on a single camera for perception. Existing visual SLAM systems, while effective in general scenarios, struggle with motion blur and feature instability inherent to racing dynamics, and do not exploit the structured nature of racing environments. In this work, we present a dual pose-graph architecture that fuses odometry with semantic detections for robust localization. A temporary graph accumulates multiple gate observations between keyframes and optimizes them into a single refined constraint per landmark, which is then promoted to a persistent main graph. This design preserves the information richness of frequent detections while preventing graph growth from degrading real-time performance. The system is designed to be sensor-agnostic, although in this work we validate it using monocular visual-inertial odometry and visual gate detections. Experimental evaluation on the TII-RATM dataset shows a 56% to 74% reduction in ATE compared to standalone VIO, while an ablation study confirms that the dual-graph architecture achieves 10% to 12% higher accuracy than a single-graph baseline at identical computational cost. Deployment in the A2RL competition demonstrated that the system performs real-time onboard localization during flight, reducing the drift of the odometry baseline by up to 4.2 m per lap.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双位姿图架构，融合视觉-惯性里程计与语义门检测，用于自主无人机竞速中的鲁棒实时定位。该架构通过临时图累积多次检测并优化为单一约束后提升至主图，在保留信息丰富性的同时防止图规模膨胀。实验表明，相比单独VIO，ATE降低56%-74%；消融实验显示双图架构比单图基线精度提高10%-12%；在A2RL竞赛中实现单圈漂移减少最多4.2米。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉SLAM系统在无人机竞速场景中因运动模糊和特征不稳定而表现不佳，且未能利用竞速环境的结构化特性（如门标志物），需要一种能够在高速、激进机动和单目视觉约束下实现鲁棒实时定位的方法。
AI.method: 提出双位姿图架构：临时图在关键帧间累积多次门检测观测并优化为单一约束，随后将该约束提升至持久主图。该设计保持频繁检测的信息丰富性，同时防止图规模增长影响实时性能。传感器无关设计，本文使用单目视觉-惯性里程计+视觉门检测进行验证。
AI.result: 在TII-RATM数据集上ATE降低56%-74%；消融实验显示双图架构比单图基线精度高10%-12%；在A2RL竞赛中单圈漂移减少最多4.2米。
AI.conclusion: 双位姿图架构能有效融合语义检测与里程计，在无人机竞速极端条件下实现鲁棒实时定位，且计算开销可控。

title: VCE: A zero-cost hallucination mitigation method of LVLMs via visual contrastive editing
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) frequently suffer from Object Hallucination (OH), wherein they generate descriptions containing objects that are not actually present in the input image. This phenomenon is particularly problematic in real-world applications such as medical imaging and autonomous driving, where accuracy is critical. Recent studies suggest that the hallucination problem may stem from language priors: biases learned during pretraining that cause LVLMs to generate words based on their statistical co-occurrence. To mitigate this problem, we propose Visual Contrastive Editing (VCE), a novel post-hoc method that identifies and suppresses hallucinatory tendencies by analyzing the model's response to contrastive visual perturbations. Using Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), we decompose the model's activation patterns to isolate hallucination subspaces and apply targeted parameter edits to attenuate its influence. Unlike existing approaches that require fine-tuning or labeled data, VCE operates as a label-free intervention, making it both scalable and practical for deployment in resource-constrained settings. Experimental results demonstrate that VCE effectively reduces object hallucination across multiple benchmarks while maintaining the model's original computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出视觉对比编辑（VCE），一种基于SVD分解和对比视觉扰动的后处理方法，无需微调或标注数据，通过识别并抑制语言先验导致的幻觉子空间来减少LVLM中的物体幻觉。
AI.motivation: LVLM在医学成像和自动驾驶等关键应用中频繁出现物体幻觉（OH），即生成输入图像中不存在的物体描述。研究表明此问题源于语言先验偏差，需要一种无需微调或标注数据的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 提出VCE方法：通过对比视觉扰动分析模型响应差异，利用SVD分解激活模式以隔离幻觉子空间，然后对参数进行目标性编辑以削弱幻觉影响。该方法属于后处理干预，无需标签数据。
AI.result: 在多个基准上有效减少了物体幻觉，同时保持了模型原有的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: VCE作为一种可扩展且实用的无标签干预方法，适用于资源受限场景下的LVLM部署，能有效缓解物体幻觉问题。

title: Validating a Deep Learning Algorithm to Identify Patients with Glaucoma using Systemic Electronic Health Records
summary: We evaluated whether a glaucoma risk assessment (GRA) model trained on All of Us national data can identify patients at high probability of glaucoma using only systemic electronic health records (EHR) at an independent institution. In this cross-sectional study, 20,636 Stanford patients seen from November 2013 to January 2024 were included (15% with glaucoma). A pretrained GRA model was fine-tuned on the Stanford cohort and tested on a held-out set using demographics, systemic diagnoses, medications, laboratory results, and physical examination measurements as inputs. The best model achieved AUROC 0.883 and PPV 0.657. Calibration was consistent with clinical risk: the highest prediction decile showed the greatest glaucoma diagnosis rate (65.7%) and treatment rate (57.0%). Performance improved with more trainable layers up to 15 and with additional data. An EHR-only GRA model may enable scalable and accessible pre-screening without specialized imaging.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用All of Us国家级数据训练的青光眼风险评估（GRA）模型，仅通过系统电子健康记录（EHR）即可在独立机构中识别高风险患者。在斯坦福20,636名患者（15%青光眼）的横断面研究中，最优模型AUROC达0.883，PPV达0.657；最高预测十分位数组青光眼诊断率65.7%、治疗率57.0%。仅依赖EHR的GRA模型可在无需专业影像检查情况下实现可扩展、可及的青光眼预筛查。
AI.motivation: 青光眼筛查通常依赖专业影像设备，成本高且可及性有限。研究者希望开发一种仅利用日常电子健康记录（全身性诊断、用药、实验室检查等）即可评估青光眼风险的模型，以实现大规模、低成本的预筛查。
AI.method: 基于All of Us国家数据预训练的GRA模型，在斯坦福独立队列（20,636例，2013-2024年）上进行微调。输入特征包括人口统计学、全身诊断、用药、实验室结果和体格检查测量。模型在留出测试集上评估，并分析可训练层数及数据量对性能的影响。
AI.result: 最优模型AUROC为0.883，PPV为0.657。校准曲线与临床风险一致：最高预测十分位数组的青光眼诊断率（65.7%）和治疗率（57.0%）最高。模型性能随可训练层数（最多15层）和数据量增加而提升。
AI.conclusion: 仅依赖全身性EHR数据的GRA模型具有良好的判别能力和校准度，可在无需专业眼科影像检查的情况下实现可扩展、可及的青光眼预筛查，有望提高青光眼的早期发现率。

title: GOLD-BEV: GrOund and aeriaL Data for Dense Semantic BEV Mapping of Dynamic Scenes
summary: Understanding road scenes in a geometrically consistent, scene-centric representation is crucial for planning and mapping. We present GOLD-BEV, a framework that learns dense bird's-eye-view (BEV) semantic environment maps-including dynamic agents-from ego-centric sensors, using time-synchronized aerial imagery as supervision only during training. BEV-aligned aerial crops provide an intuitive target space, enabling dense semantic annotation with minimal manual effort and avoiding the ambiguity of ego-only BEV labeling. Crucially, strict aerial-ground synchronization allows overhead observations to supervise moving traffic participants and mitigates the temporal inconsistencies inherent to non-synchronized overhead sources. To obtain scalable dense targets, we generate BEV pseudo-labels using domain-adapted aerial teachers, and jointly train BEV segmentation with optional pseudo-aerial BEV reconstruction for interpretability. Finally, we extend beyond aerial coverage by learning to synthesize pseudo-aerial BEV images from ego sensors, which support lightweight human annotation and uncertainty-aware pseudo-labeling on unlabeled drives.

AI.tldr: GOLD-BEV 提出利用时间同步的航拍图像作为监督信号，训练模型从自车传感器生成稠密的BEV语义地图（包括动态目标），无需人工标注BEV，并通过伪标签和伪航拍BEV重建扩展可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有BEV感知方法依赖于昂贵的自车视角标注或存在时序不一致的航拍监督，难以高效获取稠密、语义一致且包含动态目标的BEV环境地图。
AI.method: 1) 使用时间同步的航拍图像作为训练监督，提供直观的BEV对齐目标空间；2) 通过领域自适应的航拍教师模型生成稠密BEV伪标签；3) 联合训练BEV分割与可选的伪航拍BEV重建；4) 从自车传感器学习合成伪航拍BEV图像，支持轻量人工标注和不确定性感知伪标签。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了GOLD-BEV能够生成包含动态目标的稠密BEV语义地图，显著降低标注成本，且性能优于仅依赖自车监督或非同步航拍监督的方法。
AI.conclusion: 时间同步的航拍监督为BEV感知提供了一种低成本、高一致性的训练范式，结合伪标签和伪航拍合成可进一步扩展到无航拍覆盖的场景。

title: MedSkillAudit: A Domain-Specific Audit Framework for Medical Research Agent Skills
summary: Background: Agent skills are increasingly deployed as modular, reusable capability units in AI agent systems. Medical research agent skills require safeguards beyond general-purpose evaluation, including scientific integrity, methodological validity, reproducibility, and boundary safety. This study developed and preliminarily evaluated a domain-specific audit framework for medical research agent skills, with a focus on reliability against expert review. Methods: We developed MedSkillAudit (skill-auditor@1.0), a layered framework assessing skill release readiness before deployment. We evaluated 75 skills across five medical research categories (15 per category). Two experts independently assigned a quality score (0-100), an ordinal release disposition (Production Ready / Limited Release / Beta Only / Reject), and a high-risk failure flag. System-expert agreement was quantified using ICC(2,1) and linearly weighted Cohen's kappa, benchmarked against the human inter-rater baseline. Results: The mean consensus quality score was 72.4 (SD = 13.0); 57.3% of skills fell below the Limited Release threshold. MedSkillAudit achieved ICC(2,1) = 0.449 (95% CI: 0.250-0.610), exceeding the human inter-rater ICC of 0.300. System-consensus score divergence (SD = 9.5) was smaller than inter-expert divergence (SD = 12.4), with no directional bias (Wilcoxon p = 0.613). Protocol Design showed the strongest category-level agreement (ICC = 0.551); Academic Writing showed a negative ICC (-0.567), reflecting a structural rubric-expert mismatch. Conclusions: Domain-specific pre-deployment audit may provide a practical foundation for governing medical research agent skills, complementing general-purpose quality checks with structured audit workflows tailored to scientific use cases.

AI.tldr: 本文开发并初步评估了面向医学研究智能体技能（Agent Skills）的领域专用审计框架 MedSkillAudit（skill-auditor@1.0），通过5类75项技能的双专家评审与系统审计对比，发现系统与专家的一致性（ICC=0.449）优于专家间一致性（ICC=0.300），表明该框架可作为医学研究技能部署前的可靠治理基础。
AI.motivation: 医学研究智能体技能需要超越通用评估的专门保障（科学完整性、方法学有效性、可复现性、边界安全性），但缺乏领域专属的审计框架。本研究旨在开发并初步验证一个针对医学研究技能的前置审计体系。
AI.method: 构建MedSkillAudit分层审计框架，评估技能发布就绪度；选取5类医学研究技能（每类15项，共75项）；两位专家独立评分（质量分数0-100、发布处置等级、高风险标志）；采用ICC(2,1)和线性加权Cohen's Kappa量化系统-专家一致性，以人类评分者间信度作为基线对照。
AI.result: 共识质量均分72.4（SD=13.0），57.3%技能低于Limited Release阈值；MedSkillAudit的ICC(2,1)=0.449（95% CI: 0.250-0.610），优于人类评分者间ICC=0.300；系统-共识分数差异（SD=9.5）小于专家间差异（SD=12.4），无方向性偏倚（Wilcoxon p=0.613）；Protocol Design类一致性最强（ICC=0.551），Academic Writing类出现负ICC（-0.567）。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定的前置部署审计可为医学研究智能体技能提供实用的治理基础，通过结构化审计流程补充通用质量检查，特别适用于科学用例。

title: Trajectory Planning for a Multi-UAV Rigid-Payload Cascaded Transportation System Based on Enhanced Tube-RRT*
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures. Under review at IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems (TAES). This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: This paper presents a two-stage trajectory planning framework for a multi-UAV rigid-payload cascaded transportation system, aiming to address planning challenges in densely cluttered environments. In Stage I, an Enhanced Tube-RRT* algorithm is developed by integrating active hybrid sampling and an adaptive expansion strategy, enabling rapid generation of a safe and feasible virtual tube in environments with dense obstacles. Moreover, a trajectory smoothness cost is explicitly incorporated into the edge cost to reduce excessive turns and thereby mitigate cable-induced oscillations. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed Enhanced Tube-RRT* achieves a higher success rate and effective sampling rate than mixed-sampling Tube-RRT* (STube-RRT*) and adaptive-extension Tube-RRT* (AETube-RRT*), while producing a shorter optimal path with a smaller cumulative turning angle. In Stage II, a convex quadratic program is formulated by considering payload translational and rotational dynamics, cable tension constraints, and collision-safety constraints, yielding a smooth, collision-free desired payload trajectory. Finally, a centralized geometric control scheme is applied to the cascaded system to validate the effectiveness and feasibility of the proposed planning framework, offering a practical solution for payload attitude maneuvering in densely cluttered environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向多无人机-刚性载荷级联运输系统的两阶段轨迹规划框架，在密集障碍环境中实现了安全、平滑的轨迹生成。第一阶段提出Enhanced Tube-RRT*算法，集成主动混合采样和自适应扩展策略，快速生成安全虚拟管道；第二阶段构建凸二次规划问题，考虑载荷动力学与缆绳约束，最终通过集中式几何控制验证了框架的有效性。
AI.motivation: 解决多无人机携带刚性载荷在密集障碍环境中的轨迹规划难题，特别是现有方法在复杂环境中成功率低、路径不平滑且易引发缆绳振荡的问题。
AI.method: 两阶段规划框架：Stage I提出Enhanced Tube-RRT*算法（集成主动混合采样、自适应扩展策略，并将轨迹平滑代价纳入边成本）；Stage II构建凸二次规划（考虑载荷平动/转动动力学、缆绳张力约束和碰撞安全约束），最后采用集中式几何控制方案。
AI.result: Enhanced Tube-RRT*在成功率、有效采样率上优于STube-RRT*和AETube-RRT*，同时获得更短最优路径和更小的累积转向角。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架在密集障碍环境中为载荷姿态机动提供了实用解决方案，通过集中式几何控制验证了其有效性和可行性。

title: Structure-Aware Variational Learning of a Class of Generalized Diffusions
summary: Learning the underlying potential energy of stochastic gradient systems from partial and noisy observations is a fundamental problem arising in physics, chemistry, and data-driven modeling. Classical approaches often rely on direct regression of governing equations or velocity fields, which can be sensitive to noise and external perturbations and may fail when observations are incomplete. In this work, we propose a structure-aware, energy-based learning framework for inferring unknown potential functions in generalized diffusion processes, grounded in the energetic variational approach. Starting from the energy-dissipation law associated with the Fokker-Planck equation, we construct loss functions based on the De Giorgi dissipation functional, which consistently couple the free energy and the dissipation mechanism of the system. This formulation avoids explicit enforcement of the governing partial differential equation and preserves the underlying variational structure of the dynamics. Through numerical experiments in one, two, and three dimensions, we demonstrate that the proposed energy-based loss exhibits enhanced robustness with respect to observation time, noise level, and the diversity and amount of available training data. These results highlight the effectiveness of energy-dissipation principles as a reliable foundation for learning stochastic diffusion dynamics from data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于能量的结构感知学习框架，用于从部分带噪声的观测数据中推断随机梯度系统的未知势能函数，该方法基于能量-耗散定律和De Giorgi耗散泛函构建损失函数，避免显式求解偏微分方程，并在1D/2D/3D数值实验中展现出对观测时间、噪声水平和数据多样性的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 从部分且带噪声的观测中学习随机梯度系统的潜在势能是物理、化学和数据驱动建模中的基础问题，传统方法依赖对控制方程或速度场的直接回归，对噪声和外部扰动敏感，且在观测不完整时可能失效。
AI.method: 基于能量变分方法，从与Fokker-Planck方程相关的能量-耗散定律出发，利用De Giorgi耗散泛函构建损失函数，该损失函数一致地耦合了系统的自由能与耗散机制，避免了显式强制执行控制偏微分方程，同时保留了动力学背后的变分结构。
AI.result: 在1D、2D和3D数值实验中，所提出的基于能量的损失函数在观测时间、噪声水平以及训练数据的多样性和数量方面展现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 能量-耗散原理作为从数据中学习随机扩散动力学的可靠基础是有效的。

title: HP-Edit: A Human-Preference Post-Training Framework for Image Editing
summary: Common image editing tasks typically adopt powerful generative diffusion models as the leading paradigm for real-world content editing. Meanwhile, although reinforcement learning (RL) methods such as Diffusion-DPO and Flow-GRPO have further improved generation quality, efficiently applying Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) to diffusion-based editing remains largely unexplored, due to a lack of scalable human-preference datasets and frameworks tailored to diverse editing needs. To fill this gap, we propose HP-Edit, a post-training framework for Human Preference-aligned Editing, and introduce RealPref-50K, a real-world dataset across eight common tasks and balancing common object editing. Specifically, HP-Edit leverages a small amount of human-preference scoring data and a pretrained visual large language model (VLM) to develop HP-Scorer--an automatic, human preference-aligned evaluator. We then use HP-Scorer both to efficiently build a scalable preference dataset and to serve as the reward function for post-training the editing model. We also introduce RealPref-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating real-world editing performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances models such as Qwen-Image-Edit-2509, aligning their outputs more closely with human preference.

AI.tldr: HP-Edit提出了一种基于人类偏好对齐的图像编辑后训练框架，通过少量偏好评分数据和预训练VLM构建HP-Scorer自动评估器，并引入RealPref-50K数据集和RealPref-Bench基准，显著提升了编辑模型与人类偏好的一致性。
AI.motivation: 目前基于扩散模型的图像编辑技术虽已成熟，但如何高效地将基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）应用于扩散编辑领域仍未被充分探索，主要缺乏可扩展的人类偏好数据集和适用于多样化编辑需求的训练框架。
AI.method: 1) 构建RealPref-50K真实世界数据集，覆盖8种常见编辑任务；2) 利用少量人类偏好评分数据和预训练VLM训练HP-Scorer，作为自动的人类偏好对齐评估器；3) 使用HP-Scorer构建大规模偏好数据集，并作为奖励函数对编辑模型进行后训练。
AI.result: 在RealPref-Bench基准上的大量实验表明，该方法显著提升了Qwen-Image-Edit-2509等模型的编辑效果，使输出更符合人类偏好。
AI.conclusion: HP-Edit成功填补了将RLHF应用于扩散编辑模型的空白，为图像编辑的人类偏好对齐提供了一种可扩展且有效的后训练框架。

title: Shift-Up: A Framework for Software Engineering Guardrails in AI-native Software Development -- Initial Findings
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the VibeX 2026 International Workshop on Vibe Coding and Vibe Researching
summary: Generative AI (GenAI) is reshaping software engineering by shifting development from manual coding toward agent-driven implementation. While vibe coding promises rapid prototyping, it often suffers from architectural drift, limited traceability, and reduced maintainability. Applying the design science research (DSR) methodology, this paper proposes Shift-Up, a framework that reinterprets established software engineering practices, like executable requirements (BDD), architectural modeling (C4), and architecture decision records (ADRs), as structural guardrails for GenAI-native development. Preliminary findings from our exploratory evaluation compare unstructured vibe coding, structured prompt engineering, and the Shift-Up approach in the development of a web application. These findings indicate that embedding machine-readable requirements and architectural artifacts stabilizes agent behavior, reduces implementation drift, and shifts human effort toward higher-level design and validation activities. The results suggest that traditional software engineering artifacts can serve as effective control mechanisms in AI-assisted development.

AI.tldr: Shift-Up框架通过将可执行需求(BDD)、架构建模(C4)和架构决策记录(ADRs)等传统软件工程实践作为结构化护栏，来约束和稳定GenAI原生开发中的智能体行为，减少实现漂移并将人力转向高层设计和验证。
AI.motivation: Vibe coding（氛围编码）虽支持快速原型开发，但存在架构漂移、可追溯性有限和可维护性降低等问题，亟需为GenAI原生开发引入结构化的工程实践约束。
AI.method: 采用设计科学研究(DSR)方法论，提出Shift-Up框架，将可执行需求(BDD)、架构建模(C4)和架构决策记录(ADRs)整合为GenAI-native开发的结构化护栏，并通过对比无结构vibe coding、结构化提示工程和Shift-Up三种方式开发Web应用进行探索性评估。
AI.result: 嵌入机器可读的需求和架构工件能够稳定智能体行为、减少实现漂移，并将人力投入转向更高层次的设计与验证活动。
AI.conclusion: 传统软件工程工件可以作为AI辅助开发中有效的控制机制，Shift-Up框架相比无结构vibe coding和结构化提示工程在可控性和可维护性方面表现更优。

title: CAVERS: Multimodal SLAM Data from a Natural Karstic Cave with Ground Truth Motion Capture
summary: Autonomous robots operating in natural karstic caves face perception and navigation challenges that are qualitatively distinct from those encountered in mines or tunnels: irregular geometry, reflective wet surfaces, near-zero ambient light, and complex branching passages. Yet publicly available datasets targeting this environment remain scarce and offer limited sensing modalities and environmental diversity. We present CAVERS, a multimodal dataset acquired in two structurally distinct rooms of Cueva de la Victoria, Málaga, Spain, comprising 24 sequences totaling approximately 335 GB of recorded data. The sensor suite combines an Intel RealSense D435i RGB-D-I camera, an Optris PI640i near-IR thermal camera, and a Velodyne VLP-16 LiDAR, operated both handheld and mounted on a wheeled rover under full darkness and artificial illumination. For most of the sequences, mm-accurate 6-DoF ground truth pose and velocity at 120 Hz are provided by an Optirack motion capture system installed directly inside the cave. We benchmark seven state-of-the-art SLAM and odometry algorithms spanning visual, visual-inertial, thermal-inertial, and LiDAR-based pipelines, as well as a 3D reconstruction pipeline, demonstrating the dataset's usability. %The dataset and all supplementary material are publicly available at: https://github.com/spaceuma/cavers.

AI.tldr: CAVERS是一个多模态洞穴数据集，包含24个序列（约335 GB），由RGB-D、热成像和LiDAR传感器在西班牙Cueva de la Victoria洞穴中采集，提供毫米级精度的6-DoF真值位姿和速度，用于评估SLAM、里程计和3D重建算法。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人在天然喀斯特洞穴中面临不规则几何结构、反射性湿润表面、近零环境光和复杂分支通道等独特感知与导航挑战，而现有公开数据集缺乏针对此类环境的传感模态和多样性。
AI.method: 在西班牙Cueva de la Victoria两个结构不同的洞穴房间中，使用Intel RealSense D435i RGB-D相机、Optris PI640i近红外热像仪和Velodyne VLP-16 LiDAR组成多传感器套件，在完全黑暗和人工照明条件下以手持和轮式机器人平台采集数据，并通过Optirack运动捕捉系统提供120 Hz的毫米级精度6-DoF真值位姿和速度。
AI.result: 包含24个序列、约335 GB的多模态数据；对7种主流SLAM/里程计算法（视觉、视觉-惯性、热惯性、LiDAR）和一种3D重建管线进行了基准测试，验证了数据集的可用性。
AI.conclusion: CAVERS填补了天然喀斯特洞穴环境多模态数据集的空白，为研究极端视觉条件下的机器人感知与导航提供了标准化基准平台。

title: VecHeart: Holistic Four-Chamber Cardiac Anatomy Modeling via Hybrid VecSets
summary: Accurate cardiac anatomy modeling requires the model to be able to handle intricate interrelations among structures. In this paper, we propose VecHeart, a unified framework for holistic reconstruction and generation of four-chamber cardiac structures. To overcome the limitations of current feed-forward implicit methods, specifically their restriction to single-object modeling and their neglect of inter-part correlations, we introduce Hybrid Part Transformer, which leverages part-specific learnable queries and interleaved attention to capture complex inter-chamber dependencies. Furthermore, we propose Anatomical Completion Masking and Modality Alignment strategies, enabling the model to infer complete four-chamber structures from partial, sparse, or noisy observations, even when certain anatomical parts are entirely missing. VecHeart also seamlessly extends to 3D+t dynamic mesh sequence generation, demonstrating exceptional versatility. Experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, maintaining high-fidelity reconstruction across diverse challenging scenarios. Code will be released.

AI.tldr: VecHeart是一个统一框架，通过Hybrid Part Transformer、解剖补全掩码和模态对齐策略，实现了四腔心脏结构的整体重建与生成，在部分/稀疏/有噪观测下仍能保持高保真度，并支持3D+t动态网格序列生成，达到了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈隐式方法受限于单目标建模，忽视了心脏各部分之间的相互关联，无法处理复杂的结构间相互关系，因此需要一种能够捕捉腔室间复杂依赖关系的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出VecHeart框架，包含三个核心组件：1) Hybrid Part Transformer，通过部件特定可学习查询和交错注意力捕获腔室间复杂依赖；2) 解剖补全掩码策略，使模型能从部分/稀疏/有噪观测中推断完整四腔结构；3) 模态对齐策略，支持跨模态的鲁棒重建。
AI.result: 在多种挑战性场景下实现了SOTA性能，保持高保真重建质量，并且能无缝扩展到3D+t动态网格序列生成。
AI.conclusion: VecHeart通过部件级Transformer和补全掩码等设计，有效解决了心脏多结构联合建模问题，在鲁棒性和泛化性上超越了现有方法。

title: DockAnywhere: Data-Efficient Visuomotor Policy Learning for Mobile Manipulation via Novel Demonstration Generation
summary: Mobile manipulation is a fundamental capability that enables robots to interact in expansive environments such as homes and factories. Most existing approaches follow a two-stage paradigm, where the robot first navigates to a docking point and then performs fixed-base manipulation using powerful visuomotor policies. However, real-world mobile manipulation often suffers from the view generalization problem due to shifts of docking points. To address this issue, we propose a novel low-cost demonstration generation framework named DockAnywhere, which improves viewpoint generalization under docking variability by lifting a single demonstration to diverse feasible docking configurations. Specifically, DockAnywhere lifts a trajectory to any feasible docking points by decoupling docking-dependent base motions from contact-rich manipulation skills that remain invariant across viewpoints. Feasible docking proposals are sampled under feasibility constraints, and corresponding trajectories are generated via structure-preserving augmentation. Visual observations are synthesized in 3D space by representing the robot and objects as point clouds and applying point-level spatial editing to ensure the consistency of observation and action across viewpoints. Extensive experiments on ManiSkill and real-world platforms demonstrate that DockAnywhere substantially improves policy success rates and easily generalizes to novel viewpoints from unseen docking points during training, significantly enhancing the generalization capability of mobile manipulation policy in real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DockAnywhere框架，通过将单次示教轨迹提升到多样化的可停靠点，并利用点云空间编辑保证视觉一致性，解决了移动操作中因停靠点变化导致的视角泛化问题，显著提升了策略在未见停靠点的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有移动操作采用先导航后固定基座操作的两阶段范式，但实际部署中停靠点偏移导致视角泛化问题严重，影响策略成功率。
AI.method: 将轨迹解耦为停靠依赖的基座运动和视角不变的接触操作技能；在可行性约束下采样停靠点，通过结构保持增强生成对应轨迹；在3D点云空间中进行点级空间编辑，确保不同视角下观察与动作的一致性。
AI.result: 在ManiSkill和真实平台上的实验表明，DockAnywhere显著提升了策略成功率，并能轻松泛化到训练中未见的停靠点视角。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效增强了移动操作策略在实际部署中的泛化能力，解决了因停靠点变化带来的视角泛化难题。

title: Lever: Inference-Time Policy Reuse under Support Constraints
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) policies are typically trained for fixed objectives, making reuse difficult when task requirements change. We study inference-time policy reuse: given a library of pre-trained policies and a new composite objective, can a high-quality policy be constructed entirely offline, without additional environment interaction? We introduce lever (Leveraging Efficient Vector Embeddings for Reusable policies), an end-to-end framework that retrieves relevant policies, evaluates them using behavioral embeddings, and composes new policies via offline Q-value composition. We focus on the support-limited regime, where no value propagation is possible, and show that the effectiveness of reuse depends critically on the coverage of available transitions. To balance performance and computational cost, lever proposes composition strategies that control the exploration of candidate policies. Experiments in deterministic GridWorld environments show that inference-time composition can match, and in some cases exceed, training-from-scratch performance while providing substantial speedups. At the same time, performance degrades when long-horizon dependencies require value propagation, highlighting a fundamental limitation of offline reuse.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出LEVER框架，通过行为嵌入检索和离线Q值组合，在无需环境交互的情况下重用预训练策略以解决新复合目标。实验表明在确定性网格世界中可媲美甚至超越从头训练的性能，但在需要值传播的长时序依赖任务中表现有限。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习策略针对固定目标训练，难以在任务需求变化时重用。作者希望实现推理时的策略重用，即利用预训练策略库离线构建高质量策略，无需额外环境交互。
AI.method: 提出LEVER框架：(1) 通过行为嵌入检索相关策略；(2) 利用行为嵌入评估策略；(3) 通过离线Q值组合合成新策略。重点关注支持有限（support-limited）场景，采用组合策略控制候选策略的探索程度以平衡性能与计算成本。
AI.result: 在确定性GridWorld环境中，推理时策略组合能够匹配甚至超越从头训练的性能，并带来显著加速。但在需要值传播的长时序依赖任务中性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 离线策略重用在支持有限场景下有效，但受限于可用转移数据的覆盖范围。长时序依赖需要值传播时，离线重用存在根本性局限。

title: HarmoniDiff-RS: Training-Free Diffusion Harmonization for Satellite Image Composition
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, CVPR 2026 findings. Code is available at https://github.com/XiaoqiZhuang/HarmoniDiff-RS
summary: Satellite image composition plays a critical role in remote sensing applications such as data augmentation, disaste simulation, and urban planning. We propose HarmoniDiff-RS, a training-free diffusion-based framework for harmonizing composite satellite images under diverse domain conditions. Our method aligns the source and target domains through a Latent Mean Shift operation that transfers radiometric characteristics between them. To balance harmonization and content preservation, we introduce a Timestep-wise Latent Fusion strategy by leveraging early inverted latents for high harmonization and late latents for semantic consistency to generate a set of composite candidates. A lightweight harmony classifier is trained to further automatically select the most coherent result among them. We also construct RSIC-H, a benchmark dataset for satellite image harmonization derived from fMoW, providing 500 paired composition samples. Experiments demonstrate that our method effectively performs satellite image composition, showing strong potential for scalable remote-sensing synthesis and simulation tasks. Code is available at: https://github.com/XiaoqiZhuang/HarmoniDiff-RS.

AI.tldr: HarmoniDiff-RS提出了一种无需训练的扩散框架，用于在多样域条件下协调合成卫星图像。该方法通过潜在均值偏移对齐域间辐射特征，利用时间步潜在融合策略平衡协调与内容保留，并训练轻量级分类器自动选择最佳结果。实验在构建的RSIC-H基准数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像合成在数据增强、灾害模拟和城市规划等遥感应用中至关重要，但现有方法难以在多样域条件下实现有效的图像协调。
AI.method: 提出HarmoniDiff-RS框架：1) 潜在均值偏移(Latent Mean Shift)操作实现源域与目标域辐射特征对齐；2) 时间步潜在融合(Timestep-wise Latent Fusion)策略，利用早期反转潜在变量保证高协调性、晚期潜在变量保证语义一致性；3) 轻量级协调分类器自动选择最连贯的合成候选结果。
AI.result: 在构建的RSIC-H基准数据集（基于fMoW的500对合成样本）上验证了方法的有效性，表明能有效执行卫星图像合成任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在遥感图像合成与模拟任务中展现出良好的扩展潜力，且无需额外训练即可实现域间协调。

title: DEX-Mouse: A Low-cost Portable and Universal Interface with Force Feedback for Data Collection of Dexterous Robotic Hands
summary: Data-driven dexterous hand manipulation requires large-scale, physically consistent demonstration data. Simulation and video-based methods suffer from sim-to-real gaps and retargeting problems, while MoCap glove-based teleoperation systems require per-operator calibration and lack portability, as the robot hand is typically fixed to a stationary arm. Portable alternatives improve mobility but lack cross-platform and cross-operator compatibility. We present DEX-Mouse, a portable, calibration-free hand-held teleoperation interface with integrated kinesthetic force feedback, built from commercial off-the-shelf components under USD 150. The operator-agnostic design requires no calibration or structural modification, enabling immediate deployment across diverse environments and platforms. The interface supports a configuration in which the target robot hand is mounted directly on the forearm of an operator, producing robot-aligned data. In a comparative user study across various dexterous manipulation tasks, operators using the proposed system achieved an 86.67% task completion rate under the attached configuration. Also, we found that the attached configuration reduced the perceived workload of the operators compared to spatially separated teleoperation setups across all compared interfaces. The complete hardware and software stack, including bill of materials, CAD models, and firmware, is open-sourced at https://dex-mouse.github.io/ to facilitate replication and adoption.

AI.tldr: DEX-Mouse 是一种低成本（<150美元）、便携、免校准的手持遥操作界面，集成动觉力反馈，支持将机器人手直接安装在操作者前臂上，实现即插即用的灵巧手数据采集。实验表明其在附着配置下任务完成率达86.67%，且相比分离式遥操作显著降低了操作者感知负荷。全部硬件软件已开源。
AI.motivation: 现有灵巧手遥操作数据采集方法存在仿真到现实差距、重定向问题、需逐人校准、便携性差、跨平台兼容性不足等局限，亟需一种低成本、便携、免校准、跨平台兼容的遥操作接口。
AI.method: 基于商用现成组件（<150美元）构建手持式遥操作界面，采用操作者无关设计，无需校准或结构改造；支持将目标机器人手直接安装在操作者前臂上以生成机器人对齐数据。
AI.result: 在多种灵巧操作任务的对比用户研究中，附着配置下的任务完成率达86.67%；相比空间分离的遥操作设置，附着配置显著降低了操作者的感知工作负荷。
AI.conclusion: DEX-Mouse 提供了一种便携、低成本、免校准的灵巧手遥操作方案，有效解决了跨平台和跨操作者兼容性问题，且开源实现便于推广复现。

title: Cover meets Robbins while Betting on Bounded Data: $\ln n$ Regret and Almost Sure $\ln\ln n$ Regret
summary: Consider betting against a sequence of data in $[0,1]$, where one is allowed to make any bet that is fair if the data have a conditional mean $m_0 \in (0,1)$. Cover's universal portfolio algorithm delivers a worst-case regret of $O(\ln n)$ compared to the best constant bet in hindsight, and this bound is unimprovable against adversarially generated data. In this work, we present a novel mixture betting strategy that combines insights from Robbins and Cover, and exhibits a different behavior: it eventually produces a regret of $O(\ln \ln n)$ on \emph{almost} all paths (a measure-one set of paths if each conditional mean equals $m_0$ and intrinsic variance increases to $\infty$), but has an $O(\log n)$ regret on the complement (a measure zero set of paths). Our paper appears to be the first to point out the value in hedging two very different strategies to achieve a best-of-both-worlds adaptivity to stochastic data and protection against adversarial data. We contrast our results to those in~\cite{agrawal2025regret} for a sub-Gaussian mixture on unbounded data: their worst-case regret has to be unbounded, but a similar hedging delivers both an optimal betting growth-rate and an almost sure $\ln\ln n$ regret on stochastic data. Finally, our strategy witnesses a sharp game-theoretic upper law of the iterated logarithm, analogous to~\cite{shafer2005probability}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合投注策略，结合Robbins和Cover的思想，在几乎所有的路径上实现O(ln ln n)的遗憾，而在补集（测度零）上保持O(log n)遗憾，实现了对随机数据自适应性和对抗数据鲁棒性的最佳权衡。
AI.motivation: Cover的通用投资组合算法在对抗性数据下具有O(ln n)的最优最坏情况遗憾，但无法在随机数据下获得更好的性能。本文旨在设计一种策略，既能像Cover算法那样保护免受对抗数据影响，又能在随机数据下获得更优的渐近性能。
AI.method: 提出一种混合投注策略，将Robbins和Cover的思想结合，通过对冲两种截然不同的策略实现"两全其美"的自适应性。该策略在几乎所有路径上（条件均值等于m₀且内在方差趋于无穷的测度一路径集）产生O(ln ln n)遗憾，而在补集（测度零）上保持O(log n)遗憾。
AI.result: 1) 在随机数据上几乎必然达到O(ln ln n)遗憾；2) 在对抗数据上保持O(log n)遗憾；3) 对比子高斯混合方法（其最坏情况遗憾无界），本方法通过类似对冲同时实现最优投注增长率和几乎必然的ln ln n遗憾；4) 策略见证了尖锐的博弈论上重对数律。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次指出对冲两种截然不同的策略可以在随机数据自适应性和对抗数据保护之间实现最佳权衡，为在线学习和投注理论提供了新的视角和方法。

title: Self-Awareness before Action: Mitigating Logical Inertia via Proactive Cognitive Awareness
summary: Large language models perform well on many reasoning tasks, yet they often lack awareness of whether their current knowledge or reasoning state is complete. In non-interactive puzzle settings, the narrative is fixed and the underlying structure is hidden; once a model forms an early hypothesis under incomplete premises, it can propagate that error throughout the reasoning process, leading to unstable conclusions. To address this issue, we propose SABA, a reasoning framework that explicitly introduces self-awareness of missing premises before making the final decision. SABA formulates reasoning as a recursive process that alternates between structured state construction and obstacle resolution: it first applies Information Fusion to consolidate the narrative into a verifiable base state, and then uses Query-driven Structured Reasoning to identify and resolve missing or underspecified premises by turning them into queries and progressively completing the reasoning state through hypothesis construction and state refinement. Across multiple evaluation metrics, SABA achieves the best performance on all three difficulty splits of the non-interactive Detective Puzzle benchmark, and it also maintains leading results on multiple public benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出SABA框架，通过引入缺失前提的自我意识，在非交互式谜题等推理任务中递归地进行状态构建与障碍解析，从而避免早期错误传播，在多项基准测试中取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在推理任务中常缺乏对自身知识或推理状态完整性的感知，在非交互式谜题场景中，由于叙事固定且底层结构隐藏，模型在前提不完整时过早形成假设会导致错误传播和不稳定结论。
AI.method: SABA框架将推理建模为递归过程，交替进行结构化状态构建和障碍解析：首先通过信息融合将叙事整合为可验证的基础状态，然后利用查询驱动的结构化推理识别缺失或未明确定义的前提，通过假设构建和状态细化逐步完善推理状态。
AI.result: 在非交互式侦探谜题基准的三个难度划分上均取得最佳性能，并在多个公开基准上保持领先结果。
AI.conclusion: 显式引入对缺失前提的自我意识能有效提升大语言模型在不完整信息场景下的推理稳定性与准确性。

title: Momentum-constrained Hybrid Heuristic Trajectory Optimization Framework with Residual-enhanced DRL for Visually Impaired Scenarios
comment: 24 pages, 14 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2509.15582
summary: Safe and efficient assistive planning for visually impaired scenarios remains challenging, since existing methods struggle with multi-objective optimization, generalization, and interpretability. In response, this paper proposes a Momentum-Constrained Hybrid Heuristic Trajectory Optimization Framework (MHHTOF). To balance multiple objectives of comfort and safety, the framework designs a Heuristic Trajectory Sampling Cluster (HTSC) with a Momentum-Constrained Trajectory Optimization (MTO), which suppresses abrupt velocity and acceleration changes. In addition, a novel residual-enhanced deep reinforcement learning (DRL) module refines candidate trajectories, advancing temporal modeling and policy generalization. Finally, a dual-stage cost modeling mechanism (DCMM) is introduced to regulate optimization, where costs in the Frenet space ensure consistency, and reward-driven adaptive weights in the Cartesian space integrate user preferences for interpretability and user-centric decision-making.
