AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于预训练基础模型的后验自适应保形异常检测方法，无需微调即可监控时间序列，通过可解释为假警报率的异常分数实现透明决策，并采用加权分位数保形预测边界自适应学习最优权重参数，在分布漂移下稳定控制假警报。
AI.motivation: 解决工业场景中时间序列异常检测面临的数据有限、缺乏训练专业知识、需要即时推理等关键挑战，同时利用日益普及的时间序列基础模型，实现无需额外微调即可部署的模型无关解决方案。
AI.method: 采用后验自适应保形异常检测方法，基于预训练基础模型的预测结果计算可解释异常分数（p值）；使用加权分位数保形预测边界，并通过从历史预测中自适应学习最优加权参数，实现分布漂移下的校准和稳定的假警报控制。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法在简单性、可解释性、鲁棒性和自适应性方面均表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 该方法是一种模型无关的解决方案，能与基础模型无缝集成，支持资源受限环境下的快速部署，同时保持样本外保证，有效解决了工业异常检测中的实际挑战。

title: On the Stability and Generalization of First-order Bilevel Minimax Optimization
summary: Bilevel optimization and bilevel minimax optimization have recently emerged as unifying frameworks for a range of machine-learning tasks, including hyperparameter optimization and reinforcement learning. The existing literature focuses on empirical efficiency and convergence guarantees, leaving a critical theoretical gap in understanding how well these algorithms generalize. To bridge this gap, we provide the first systematic generalization analysis for first-order gradient-based bilevel minimax solvers with lower-level minimax problems. Specifically, by leveraging algorithmic stability arguments, we derive fine-grained generalization bounds for three representative algorithms, including single-timescale stochastic gradient descent-ascent, and two variants of two-timescale stochastic gradient descent-ascent. Our results reveal a precise trade-off among algorithmic stability, generalization gaps, and practical settings. Furthermore, extensive empirical evaluations corroborate our theoretical insights on realistic optimization tasks with bilevel minimax structures.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对一阶梯度驱动的双层极小极大优化算法进行了系统性的泛化分析，通过算法稳定性论证推导了三种代表性算法的精细泛化边界，揭示了算法稳定性、泛化差距与实践设置之间的精确权衡，并通过大量实验验证了理论洞察。
AI.motivation: 现有文献主要关注双层优化和双层极小极大优化的经验效率与收敛保证，但缺乏对这些算法泛化性能的理论理解，存在关键理论空白。
AI.method: 利用算法稳定性论据，推导了三种代表性算法的精细泛化边界：单时间尺度随机梯度下降-上升法（SGDA）以及两种变体的双时间尺度随机梯度下降-上升法。
AI.result: 揭示了算法稳定性、泛化差距与实践设置之间的精确权衡关系，并在具有双层极小极大结构的现实优化任务上进行了大量实证评估。
AI.conclusion: 为双层极小极大优化算法的泛化性能提供了首个系统性理论分析框架，填补了该领域的理论空白。

title: Environmental Understanding Vision-Language Model for Embodied Agent
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown strong perception and reasoning abilities for instruction-following embodied agents. However, despite these abilities and their generalization performance, they still face limitations in environmental understanding, often failing on interactions or relying on environment metadata during execution. To address this challenge, we propose a novel framework named Environmental Understanding Embodied Agent (EUEA), which fine-tunes four core skills: 1) object perception for identifying relevant objects, 2) task planning for generating interaction subgoals, 3) action understanding for judging success likelihood, and 4) goal recognition for determining goal completion. By fine-tuning VLMs with EUEA skills, our framework enables more reliable task execution for instruction-following. We further introduce a recovery step that leverages these core skills and a group relative policy optimization (GRPO) stage that refines inconsistent skill predictions. The recovery step samples alternative actions to correct failure cases, and the GRPO stage refines inconsistent skill predictions. Across ALFRED tasks, our VLM significantly outperforms a behavior-cloning baseline, achieving an 8.86% improvement in average success rate. The recovery and GRPO stages provide an additional 3.03% gain, further enhancing overall performance. Finally, our skill-level analyses reveal key limitations in the environmental understanding of closed- and open-source VLMs and identify the capabilities necessary for effective agent-environment interaction.

AI.tldr: 提出EUEA框架，通过微调VLM的四项核心技能（物体感知、任务规划、动作理解、目标识别），结合恢复步骤和GRPO优化，在ALFRED任务上提升8.86%成功率，额外3.03%增益。
AI.motivation: VLM在指令跟随的具身智能体中虽表现强大，但在环境理解方面仍存在局限，常导致交互失败或过度依赖环境元数据。
AI.method: 提出EUEA框架，微调VLM的四个核心技能；引入恢复步骤采样替代动作纠正失败；使用GRPO阶段优化不一致的技能预测。
AI.result: 在ALFRED任务中，成功率平均提升8.86%；恢复与GRPO阶段额外带来3.03%的增益。
AI.conclusion: EUEA框架有效提升了VLM在具身环境中的环境理解能力；技能级分析揭示了开源与闭源VLM在环境理解上的关键局限性。

title: CooperDrive: Enhancing Driving Decisions Through Cooperative Perception
summary: Autonomous vehicles equipped with robust onboard perception, localization, and planning still face limitations in occlusion and non-line-of-sight (NLOS) scenarios, where delayed reactions can increase collision risk. We propose CooperDrive, a cooperative perception framework that augments situational awareness and enables earlier, safer driving decisions. CooperDrive offers two key advantages: (i) each vehicle retains its native perception, localization, and planning stack, and (ii) a lightweight object-level sharing and fusion strategy bridges perception and planning. Specifically, CooperDrive reuses detector Bird's-Eye View (BEV) features to estimate accurate vehicle poses without additional heavy encoders, thereby reconstructing BEV representations and feeding the planner with low latency. On the planning side, CooperDrive leverages the expanded object set to anticipate potential conflicts earlier and adjust speed and trajectory proactively, thereby transforming reactive behaviors into predictive and safer driving decisions. Real-world closed-loop tests at occlusion-heavy NLOS intersections demonstrate that CooperDrive increases reaction lead time, minimum time-to-collision (TTC), and stopping margin, while requiring only 90 kbps bandwidth and maintaining an average end-to-end latency of 89 ms.

AI.tldr: CooperDrive是一种协同感知框架，通过轻量级的目标级共享与融合策略，在保留车辆原生感知-定位-规划栈的前提下，利用BEV特征实现低延迟位姿估计与规划，显著提升遮挡和非视距场景下的安全性与反应时间。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在遮挡和非视距场景中，由于感知受限导致反应延迟，碰撞风险增加。现有协同感知方案往往需要额外重编码器或修改原生规划栈，难以兼顾轻量化和实用性。
AI.method: 复用检测器BEV特征进行车辆位姿估计，避免额外重编码器；采用目标级共享与融合策略，桥接感知与规划；利用扩展目标集提前预测冲突并主动调整速度与轨迹。
AI.result: 在遮挡严重的NLOS交叉口实测中，CooperDrive提升了反应提前时间、最小碰撞时间和停车裕度，仅需90 kbps带宽，端到端平均延迟89 ms。
AI.conclusion: CooperDrive通过轻量级协同感知有效将反应式行为转化为预测性安全驾驶决策，在低带宽和低延迟条件下显著提升遮挡场景下的行车安全。

title: Meta Additive Model: Interpretable Sparse Learning With Auto Weighting
summary: Sparse additive models have attracted much attention in high-dimensional data analysis due to their flexible representation and strong interpretability. However, most existing models are limited to single-level learning under the mean-squared error criterion, whose empirical performance can degrade significantly in the presence of complex noise, such as non-Gaussian perturbations, outliers, noisy labels, and imbalanced categories. The sample reweighting strategy is widely used to reduce the model's sensitivity to atypical data; however, it typically requires prespecifying the weighting functions and manually selecting additional hyperparameters. To address this issue, we propose a new meta additive model (MAM) based on the bilevel optimization framework, which learns data-driven weighting of individual losses by parameterizing the weighting function via an MLP trained on meta data. MAM is capable of a variety of learning tasks, including variable selection, robust regression estimation, and imbalanced classification. Theoretically, MAM provides guarantees on convergence in computation, algorithmic generalization, and variable selection consistency under mild conditions. Empirically, MAM outperforms several state-of-the-art additive models on both synthetic and real-world data under various data corruptions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双层优化的元加性模型（MAM），通过MLP参数化加权函数实现数据驱动的样本重加权，能够同时处理变量选择、鲁棒回归和不平衡分类任务，并在理论和实验上均表现优越。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏加性模型在复杂噪声（如非高斯扰动、异常值、噪声标签、类别不平衡）下性能退化严重，而样本重加权策略通常需要预先指定加权函数和手动选择超参数，缺乏自适应能力。
AI.method: 提出元加性模型（MAM），基于双层优化框架，利用元数据训练的MLP来参数化加权函数，实现对个体损失的数据驱动加权，从而自适应地降低模型对异常数据的敏感性。
AI.result: 理论方面：证明了MAM在计算收敛性、算法泛化性和变量选择一致性方面的保证；实验方面：在多种数据损坏场景下的合成数据和真实数据上，MAM优于多种现有加性模型。
AI.conclusion: MAM通过双层优化与元学习结合，解决了传统加性模型在复杂噪声环境下的鲁棒性问题，为高维数据提供了一个灵活、可解释且鲁棒的建模框架。

title: Allo{SR}$^2$: Rectifying One-Step Super-Resolution to Stay Real via Allomorphic Generative Flows
summary: Real-world image super-resolution (Real-SR) has been revolutionized by leveraging the powerful generative priors of large-scale diffusion and flow-based models. However, fine-tuning these models on limited LR-HR pairs often precipitates "prior collapse" that the model sacrifices its inherent generative richness to overfit specific training degradations. This issue is further exacerbated in one-step generation, where the absence of multi-step refinement leads to significant trajectory drift and artifact generation. In this paper, we propose Allo{SR}$^2$, a novel framework that rectifies one-step SR trajectories via allomorphic generative flows to maintain high-fidelity generative realism. Specifically, we utilize Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) Guided Trajectory Initialization to establish a physically grounded starting state by aligning the degradation level of LR latent features with the optimal anchoring timestep of the pre-trained flow. To ensure a stable, curvature-free path for one-step inference, we propose Flow-Anchored Trajectory Consistency (FATC), which enforces velocity-level supervision across intermediate states. Furthermore, we develop Allomorphic Trajectory Matching (ATM), a self-adversarial alignment strategy that minimizes the distributional discrepancy between the SR flow and the generative flow in a unified vector field. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that Allo{SR}$^2$ achieves state-of-the-art performance in one-step Real-SR, offering a superior balance between restoration fidelity and generative realism while maintaining extreme efficiency.

AI.tldr: AlloSR²提出了一种用于一步式真实图像超分辨率的框架，通过信噪比引导轨迹初始化、流锚定轨迹一致性和异形轨迹匹配三大技术，解决了扩散/流模型在微调时出现的先验崩溃、轨迹漂移和伪影问题，在保持高效推理的同时实现了保真度与生成真实感的最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散和流模型的真实图像超分辨率方法在有限LR-HR数据对上进行微调时，模型会牺牲固有的生成先验 richness 来过度拟合特定训练退化，即"先验崩溃"问题；这一问题在一阶生成中尤为严重，因为缺乏多步细化导致显著的轨迹漂移和伪影生成。
AI.method: 1) 信噪比引导轨迹初始化：通过将LR潜在特征的退化水平与预训练流的最优锚定时间步对齐，建立物理上有依据的起始状态；2) 流锚定轨迹一致性：对中间状态施加速度级监督，确保一步推理的稳定无曲率路径；3) 异形轨迹匹配：一种自对抗对齐策略，在统一向量场中最小化SR流与生成流之间的分布差异。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界基准上的大量实验表明，AlloSR²在一阶真实超分辨率任务中达到了最先进的性能，在保持极致推理效率的同时，实现了恢复保真度和生成真实感之间的优越平衡。
AI.conclusion: AlloSR²通过异形生成流矫正一阶SR轨迹，有效解决了先验崩溃和轨迹漂移问题，为高效高保真的真实图像超分辨率提供了新的框架。

title: ActuBench: A Multi-Agent LLM Pipeline for Generation and Evaluation of Actuarial Reasoning Tasks
summary: We present ActuBench, a multi-agent LLM pipeline for the automated generation and evaluation of advanced actuarial assessment items aligned with the International Actuarial Association (IAA) Education Syllabus. The pipeline separates four LLM roles by adapter: one agent drafts items, one constructs distractors, a third independently verifies both stages and drives bounded one-shot repair loops, and a cost-optimized auxiliary agent handles Wikipedia-note summarization and topic labelling. The items, per-model responses and complete leaderboard are published as a browsable web interface at https://actubench.de/en/, allowing readers and practitioners to inspect individual items without a repository checkout. We evaluate 50 language models from eight providers on two complementary benchmarks -- 100 empirically hardest multiple-choice items and 100 open-ended items scored by an LLM judge -- and report three headline findings. First, multi-agent verification is load-bearing: the independent verifier flags a majority of drafted items on first pass, most of which the one-shot repair loop resolves. Second, locally-hosted open-weights inference sits on the cost-performance Pareto front: a Gemma~4 model running on consumer hardware and a Cerebras-hosted 120B open-weights model dominate the near-zero-cost region, with the latter within one item of the top of the leaderboard. Third, MCQ and LLM-as-Judge rankings differ meaningfully: the MCQ scaffold inflates the performance ceiling, and Judge-mode evaluation is needed to discriminate at the frontier.

AI.tldr: ActuBench 是一个多智能体 LLM 流水线，用于自动生成和评估精算题目。通过分离四个 LLM 角色（出题、构造干扰项、独立验证与修复、成本优化辅助），实现了高质量精算评估题目的自动化生产。在 50 个语言模型上的评测显示：多智能体验证是关键、本地开源推理处于性价比前沿、MCQ 与 LLM 裁判两种评测模式存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 精算领域缺乏自动化的高质量题目生成与评估系统，现有方法难以兼顾题目质量、成本效率和模型评测的全面性，亟需一个端到端的流水线来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 设计四角色多智能体 LLM 流水线：1) 出题智能体；2) 干扰项构造智能体；3) 独立验证智能体（驱动单次修复循环）；4) 成本优化辅助智能体（Wikipedia 摘要与主题标注）。构建两个基准：100 道最难的 MCQ 和 100 道开放性题目，使用 LLM 裁判评分。
AI.result: 对 8 家供应商的 50 个语言模型进行评测，三个主要发现：1) 多智能体验证是关键——独立验证器首次否决大部分题目，单次修复可解决多数问题；2) 本地开源推理处于性价比前沿——Gemma 4 和 Cerebras 托管的 120B 模型主导近零成本区域；3) MCQ 与裁判模式排名存在显著差异，MCQ 垫高了性能天花板，需要用裁判模式区分前沿模型。
AI.conclusion: ActuBench 验证了多智能体流水线在精算题目自动生成中的有效性，揭示了多智能体验证的关键作用、开源模型在成本效益上的优势，以及不同评测模式对模型排名的重要影响。

title: BIEVR-LIO: Robust LiDAR-Inertial Odometry through Bump-Image-Enhanced Voxel Maps
summary: Reliable odometry is essential for mobile robots as they increasingly enter more challenging environments, which often contain little information to constrain point cloud registration, resulting in degraded LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (LIO) accuracy or even divergence. To address this, we present BIEVR-LIO, a novel approach designed specifically to exploit subtle variations in the available geometry for improved robustness. We propose a high-resolution map representation that stores surfaces as compact voxel-wise oriented height images. This representation can directly be used for registration without the calculation of intermediate geometric primitives while still supporting efficient updates. Since informative geometry is often sparsely distributed in the environment, we further propose a map-informed point sampling strategy to focus registration on geometrically informative regions, improving robustness in uninformative environments while reducing computational cost compared to global high-resolution sampling. Experiments across multiple sensors, platforms, and environments demonstrates state-of-the-art performance in well-constrained scenes and substantial improvements in challenging scenarios where baseline methods diverge. Additionally, we demonstrate that the fine-grained geometry captured by BIEVR-LIO can be used for downstream tasks such as elevation mapping for robot locomotion.

AI.tldr: BIEVR-LIO 提出了一种基于体素方向高度图的高分辨率地图表示方法，结合地图信息点采样策略，在信息匮乏环境下实现了鲁棒的 LiDAR-惯性里程计，性能优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有 LIO 在信息匮乏环境（如开阔走廊、长隧道等）中，点云配准约束不足，导致精度下降甚至发散，亟需一种能利用环境中细微几何信息的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出体素级方向高度图（voxel-wise oriented height images）作为高分辨率地图表示，无需计算中间几何基元即可直接用于配准；2) 提出地图信息点采样策略，聚焦几何信息丰富区域，在提升鲁棒性的同时降低计算开销。
AI.result: 在多种传感器、平台和环境下的实验表明，该方法在良好约束场景中达到 SOTA 性能，在基线方法发散的高难场景中取得了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: BIEVR-LIO 有效提升了 LIO 在信息匮乏环境下的鲁棒性，且捕获的细粒度几何信息可服务于高程建图等下游任务，具有实用价值。

title: Learning to Credit the Right Steps: Objective-aware Process Optimization for Visual Generation
summary: Reinforcement learning, particularly Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has emerged as an effective framework for post-training visual generative models with human preference signals. However, its effectiveness is fundamentally limited by coarse reward credit assignment. In modern visual generation, multiple reward models are often used to capture heterogeneous objectives, such as visual quality, motion consistency, and text alignment. Existing GRPO pipelines typically collapse these rewards into a single static scalar and propagate it uniformly across the entire diffusion trajectory. This design ignores the stage-specific roles of different denoising steps and produces mistimed or incompatible optimization signals. To address this issue, we propose Objective-aware Trajectory Credit Assignment (OTCA), a structured framework for fine-grained GRPO training. OTCA consists of two key components. Trajectory-Level Credit Decomposition estimates the relative importance of different denoising steps. Multi-Objective Credit Allocation adaptively weights and combines multiple reward signals throughout the denoising process. By jointly modeling temporal credit and objective-level credit, OTCA converts coarse reward supervision into a structured, timestep-aware training signal that better matches the iterative nature of diffusion-based generation. Extensive experiments show that OTCA consistently improves both image and video generation quality across evaluation metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出目标感知轨迹信用分配框架（OTCA），通过轨迹级信用分解和多目标信用分配解决GRPO在视觉生成后训练中粗粒度奖励信用分配问题，显著提升图像和视频生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO管道将多个奖励模型（如视觉质量、运动一致性、文本对齐）的异构目标坍缩为单一静态标量并均匀传播，忽略了扩散过程中不同去噪步骤的阶段特定角色，导致时机不当或不兼容的优化信号。
AI.method: 提出OTCA框架，包含两个核心组件：1）轨迹级信用分解，估计不同去噪步骤的相对重要性；2）多目标信用分配，在去噪过程中自适应加权组合多个奖励信号。联合建模时间信用和目标信用，将粗粒度奖励监督转化为结构化的时间步感知训练信号。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，OTCA在图像和视频生成质量评估指标上均取得一致性改进。
AI.conclusion: OTCA通过细粒度GRPO训练有效解决了粗粒度信用分配问题，更好地匹配了扩散生成模型的迭代特性，在多种视觉生成任务中表现优异。

title: SpaceMind: A Modular and Self-Evolving Embodied Vision-Language Agent Framework for Autonomous On-orbit Servicing
comment: 23 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables. Code available at https://github.com/wuaodi/SpaceMind
summary: Autonomous on-orbit servicing demands embodied agents that perceive through visual sensors, reason about 3D spatial situations, and execute multi-phase tasks over extended horizons. We present SpaceMind, a modular and self-evolving vision-language model (VLM) agent framework that decomposes knowledge, tools, and reasoning into three independently extensible dimensions: skill modules with dynamic routing, Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools with configurable profiles, and injectable reasoning-mode skills. An MCP-Redis interface layer enables the same codebase to operate across simulation and physical hardware without modification, and a Skill Self-Evolution mechanism distills operational experience into persistent skill files without model fine-tuning. We validate SpaceMind through 192 closed-loop runs across five satellites, three task types, and two environments, a UE5 simulation and a physical laboratory, deliberately including degraded conditions to stress-test robustness. Under nominal conditions all modes achieve 90--100% navigation success; under degradation, the Prospective mode uniquely succeeds in search-and-approach tasks where other modes fail. A self-evolution study shows that the agent recovers from failure in four of six groups from a single failed episode, including complete failure to 100% success and inspection scores improving from 12 to 59 out of 100. Real-world validation confirms zero-code-modification transfer to a physical robot with 100% rendezvous success. Code: https://github.com/wuaodi/SpaceMind

AI.tldr: SpaceMind是一个模块化、自进化的视觉语言模型智能体框架，用于自主在轨服务任务。它通过技能模块、MCP工具和可注入推理模式三种维度分解知识，利用MCP-Redis接口层实现仿真到物理硬件的零代码迁移，并通过技能自进化机制从经验中学习。在5颗卫星、3种任务类型、两个环境的192次闭环测试中，标称条件下导航成功率90-100%，退化条件下Prospective模式可完成其他模式失败的任务，自进化研究显示单次失败经验可让6组中的4组恢复至100%成功，实物验证实现零代码迁移且会合成功率100%。
AI.motivation: 自主在轨服务需要能够通过视觉传感器感知、推理3D空间情境并执行长跨度多阶段任务的具身智能体，现有方法在模块化、跨环境迁移和持续学习方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出SpaceMind框架，包含三个独立可扩展维度：具有动态路由的技能模块、带有可配置配置文件的MCP工具、可注入的推理模式技能。MCP-Redis接口层实现仿真与硬件的无缝迁移，Skill Self-Evolution机制通过蒸馏操作经验为持久化技能文件实现自进化，无需模型微调。
AI.result: 在192次闭环测试中，标称条件下所有模式导航成功率90-100%；退化条件下Prospective模式在搜索-接近任务中唯一成功；自进化研究中单次失败经验使6组中4组恢复，包括从完全失败到100%成功，检测评分从12提升至59/100；实物验证零代码迁移，会合成功率100%。
AI.conclusion: SpaceMind通过模块化设计、MCP-Redis接口层和技能自进化机制，有效解决了自主在轨服务中长跨度任务执行、跨环境迁移和持续学习问题，在仿真和实物环境中均展现出高鲁棒性和成功率。

title: Differentiable Conformal Training for LLM Reasoning Factuality
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently hallucinate, limiting their reliability in critical applications. Conformal Prediction (CP) addresses this by calibrating error rates on held-out data to provide statistically valid confidence guarantees. Recent work extends CP to LLM factuality to filter out risky claims, ensuring that hallucination rates remain below a user-specified level (e.g., 10%). While prior methods treat claims independently, Coherent Factuality extends to multi-step reasoning by representing outputs as dependency graphs and jointly validating claims with their logical ancestors. A key limitation is that Coherent Factuality is not differentiable, requiring hand-crafted scorers that at high reliability levels remove nearly 60% of true claims. We introduce Differentiable Coherent Factuality (DCF), a fully differentiable relaxation that enables learning improved scorers while provably recovering the original algorithm's guarantees. Experiments on two benchmark reasoning datasets demonstrate DCF achieves up to 141% improvement in claim retention while maintaining reliability guarantees, representing a significant step towards reliable conformal LLM systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出可微分一致性事实性（DCF），通过全可微分的松弛方法改进LLM的事实性保证，在保持统计可靠性保证的同时，将正确声明的保留率提升高达141%。
AI.motivation: 现有的一致性事实性方法不可微分，依赖手工设计的评分器，在高可靠性要求下会移除近60%的正确声明，限制了下游任务的实用性。
AI.method: 提出DCF（Differentiable Coherent Factuality），一种全可微分的松弛方法，将输出表示为依赖图并联合验证声明及其逻辑祖先，通过学习优化的评分器同时保留原始算法的可证明保证。
AI.result: 在两个基准推理数据集上，DCF在保持可靠性保证的同时，声明保留率提升高达141%。
AI.conclusion: DCF代表了向可靠的一致性LLM系统迈出的重要一步，通过可微分框架兼顾了统计保证与实用性能。

title: Adaptive Slicing-Assisted Hyper Inference for Enhanced Small Object Detection in High-Resolution Imagery
summary: Deep learning-based object detectors have achieved remarkable success across numerous computer vision applications, yet they continue to struggle with small object detection in high-resolution aerial and satellite imagery, where dense object distributions, variable shooting angles, diminutive target sizes, and substantial inter-class variability pose formidable challenges. Existing slicing strategies that partition high-resolution images into manageable patches have demonstrated promising results for enlarging the effective receptive field of small targets; however, their reliance on fixed slice dimensions introduces significant redundant computation, inflating inference cost and undermining detection speed. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Adaptive Slicing-Assisted Hyper Inference (ASAHI)}, a novel slicing framework that shifts the paradigm from prescribing a fixed slice size to adaptively determining the optimal number of slices according to image resolution, thereby substantially mitigating redundant computation while preserving beneficial overlap between adjacent patches. ASAHI integrates three synergistic components: (1)an adaptive resolution-aware slicing algorithm that dynamically generates 6 or 12 overlapping patches based on a learned threshold, (2)a slicing-assisted fine-tuning (SAF) strategy that constructs augmented training data comprising both full-resolution and sliced image patches, and (3)a Cluster-DIoU-NMS (CDN) post-processing module that combines the geometric merging efficiency of Cluster-NMS with the center-distance-aware suppression of DIoU-NMS to achieve robust duplicate elimination in crowded scenes. Extensive experiments on VisDrone2019 and xView, demonstrate that ASAHI achieves state-of-the-art performance with 56.8% on VisDrone2019-DET-val and 22.7% on xView-test, while reducing inference time by 20-25% compared to the baseline SAHI method.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应切片辅助超推理(ASAHI)框架，通过根据图像分辨率动态确定最优切片数量而非固定切片尺寸，在保持相邻切片重叠的同时大幅减少冗余计算，在VisDrone2019和xView数据集上达到SOTA性能，并相比基线SAHI方法减少20-25%的推理时间。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率遥感图像中的小目标检测面临目标密集、尺寸微小、类间差异大等挑战；现有固定尺寸的切片策略虽然有效，但引入了大量冗余计算，导致推理成本高、速度慢。
AI.method: 提出ASAHI框架，包含三个协同组件：(1)自适应分辨率感知切片算法，基于学习阈值动态生成6或12个重叠切片；(2)切片辅助微调(SAF)策略，构建包含全分辨率和切片图像块的增强训练数据；(3)Cluster-DIoU-NMS(CDN)后处理模块，融合Cluster-NMS的几何合并效率与DIoU-NMS的中心距离感知抑制，实现拥挤场景下的鲁棒重复消除。
AI.result: 在VisDrone2019-DET-val上达到56.8%，在xView-test上达到22.7%的mAP，相比基线SAHI方法推理时间减少20-25%。
AI.conclusion: ASAHI通过自适应切片策略有效平衡了检测性能与推理效率，证明了动态确定切片数量的范式优于固定切片尺寸方法。

title: ATIR: Towards Audio-Text Interleaved Contextual Retrieval
summary: Audio carries richer information than text, including emotion, speaker traits, and environmental context, while also enabling lower-latency processing compared to speech-to-text pipelines. However, recent multimodal information retrieval research has predominantly focused on images, largely overlooking audio, especially in the setting of interleaved audio-text contextual retrieval. In this work, we introduce the Audio-Text Interleaved contextual Retrieval (ATIR) task, where queries can alternate between audio and text modalities. We construct an ATIR benchmark by integrating several Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), QA, and retrieval datasets, ultimately unifying four types of contextual retrieval tasks. This benchmark substantially addresses the limitations of existing audio retrieval datasets in semantic retrieval. To study this task, we evaluate several off-the-shelf retrievers and train our ATIR model based on a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM). We further introduce a novel token compression mechanism that is orthogonal to existing compression methods, thereby alleviating the issue of excessive audio tokens in MLLM-based ATIR models. Experimental results demonstrate that our ATIR model achieves substantial improvements over strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出音频-文本交错上下文检索（ATIR）任务，构建了统一四种上下文检索类型的基准数据集，并基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）训练了ATIR模型，同时引入了一种与现有压缩方法正交的新型token压缩机制来解决MLLM中音频token过多的问题，实验表明模型显著优于强基线。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态信息检索研究主要集中在图像上，忽视了音频模态，尤其是在交错音频-文本上下文检索场景下。音频相比文本包含更丰富的信息（情感、说话人特征、环境上下文），且延迟更低，因此亟需探索音频-文本交错检索任务。
AI.method: 1) 定义了ATIR任务（查询可在音频和文本模态间交错）；2) 整合多个ASR、QA和检索数据集构建ATIR基准，统一四种上下文检索任务；3) 评估现有检索器并基于MLLM训练ATIR模型；4) 提出一种与现有方法正交的新型token压缩机制，缓解MLLM中音频token过长问题。
AI.result: ATIR模型在构建的基准上取得了显著优于强基线的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 音频-文本交错上下文检索是一个值得关注的研究方向，所提出的ATIR模型和token压缩机制有效推动了该领域的发展，填补了音频在多模态检索中的空白。

title: RoSLAC: Robust Simultaneous Localization and Calibration of Multiple Magnetometers
summary: Localization of autonomous mobile robots (AMRs) in enclosed or semi-enclosed environments such as offices, hotels, hospitals, indoor parking facilities, and underground spaces where GPS signals are weak or unavailable remains a major obstacle to the deployment of fully autonomous systems. Infrastructure-based localization approaches, such as QR codes and RFID, are constrained by high installation and maintenance costs as well as limited flexibility, while onboard sensor-based methods, including LiDAR- and vision-based solutions, are affected by ambiguous geometric features and frequent occlusions caused by dynamic obstacles such as pedestrians. Ambient magnetic field (AMF)-based localization has therefore attracted growing interest in recent years because it does not rely on external infrastructure or geometric features, making it well-suited for AMR applications such as service robots and security robots. However, magnetometer measurements are often corrupted by distortions caused by ferromagnetic materials present on the sensor platform, which bias the AMF and degrade localization reliability. As a result, accurate magnetometer calibration to estimate distortion parameters becomes essential. Conventional calibration methods that rely on rotating the magnetometer are impractical for large and heavy platforms. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a robust simultaneous localization and calibration (RoSLAC) approach based on alternating optimization, which iteratively and efficiently estimates both the platform pose and magnetometer calibration parameters. Extensive evaluations conducted in high-fidelity simulation and real-world environments demonstrate that the proposed RoSLAC method achieves high localization accuracy while maintaining low computational cost compared with state-of-the-art magnetometer calibration techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于交替优化的鲁棒同步定位与磁力计标定方法（RoSLAC），用于解决GPS信号缺失环境下自主移动机器人的定位问题，通过迭代估计平台位姿和磁力计标定参数，在保证高定位精度的同时降低了计算成本。
AI.motivation: 环境磁场定位虽不依赖外部基础设施，但磁力计测量易受传感器平台上的铁磁材料干扰而产生畸变，影响定位可靠性。传统校准方法需旋转磁力计，对大型重载平台不适用。
AI.method: 提出RoSLAC方法，基于交替优化框架，迭代地同时估计平台位姿和磁力计标定参数，实现定位与标定的联合优化。
AI.result: 在高保真仿真和真实环境中的广泛评估表明，与最先进的磁力计标定技术相比，RoSLAC在实现高定位精度的同时保持了较低的计算成本。
AI.conclusion: RoSLAC方法有效解决了大型平台磁力计难以旋转标定的问题，为服务机器人、安防机器人等AMR应用提供了一种低成本、高精度的定位方案。

title: SkillLearnBench: Benchmarking Continual Learning Methods for Agent Skill Generation on Real-World Tasks
summary: Skills have become the de facto way to enable LLM agents to perform complex real-world tasks with customized instructions, workflows, and tools, but how to learn them automatically and effectively remains unclear. We introduce SkillLearnBench, the first benchmark for evaluating continual skill learning methods, comprising 20 verified, skill-dependent tasks across 15 sub-domains derived from a real-world skill taxonomy , evaluated at three levels: skill quality, execution trajectory, and task outcome. Using this benchmark, we evaluate recent continual learning techniques, those leveraging one-shot, self/teacher feedback, and skill creator to generate skills from agent experiences. We find that all continual learning methods improve over the no-skill baseline, yet consistent gains remain elusive: no method leads across all tasks and LLMs, and scaling to stronger LLMs does not reliably help. Continual learning improves tasks with clear, reusable workflows but struggles on open-ended tasks, and using stronger LLM backbones does not consistently produce better skills. Our analysis also revealed that multiple iterations in continual learning facilitate genuine improvement via external feedback, whereas self-feedback alone induces recursive drift. Our data and code are open-source at https://github.com/cxcscmu/SkillLearnBench to enable further studies of automatic skill generation and continual learning techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SkillLearnBench——首个用于评估大语言模型智能体持续技能学习能力的基准，包含20个验证过的技能依赖任务，涵盖15个子领域。实验发现：所有持续学习方法都优于无技能基线，但没有方法在所有任务和LLM上一致有效；持续学习对具有可复用工作流的任务有效，但在开放任务上表现不佳；多轮迭代结合外部反馈可带来真实改进，而仅依赖自我反馈会导致递归漂移。
AI.motivation: 技能已成为LLM智能体执行复杂真实世界任务的主要方式，但如何自动且有效地学习技能仍不清楚，现有研究缺乏系统评估持续技能学习方法的基准。
AI.method: 构建SkillLearnBench基准（20个任务、15个子领域，源自真实技能分类体系），从技能质量、执行轨迹、任务结果三个层面评估；对比了多种持续学习方法（一次性学习、自我/教师反馈、技能创建者等）。
AI.result: 所有持续学习方法均优于无技能基线，但无方法能在所有任务和LLM上一致有效；持续学习在可复用工作流任务上有效，开放任务上效果有限；强LLM骨干并不稳定提升技能质量；多轮外部反馈带来真实改进，自我反馈导致递归漂移。
AI.conclusion: 持续技能学习有潜力但当前方法仍有限制，外部反馈比自我反馈更可靠，该基准为未来自动技能生成与持续学习研究提供了标准化评估平台。

title: Thinking Before Matching: A Reinforcement Reasoning Paradigm Towards General Person Re-Identification
summary: Learning identity-discriminative representations with multi-scene generality has become a critical objective in person re-identification (ReID). However, mainstream perception-driven paradigms tend to identify fitting from massive annotated data rather than identity-causal cues understanding, which presents a fragile representation against multiple disruptions. In this work, ReID-R is proposed as a novel reasoning-driven paradigm that achieves explicit identity understanding and reasoning by incorporating chain-of-thought into the ReID pipeline. Specifically, ReID-R consists of a two-stage contribution: (i) Discriminative reasoning warm-up, where a model is trained in a CoT label-free manner to acquire identity-aware feature understanding; and (ii) Efficient reinforcement learning, which proposes a non-trivial sampling to construct scene-generalizable data. On this basis, ReID-R leverages high-quality reward signals to guide the model toward focusing on ID-related cues, achieving accurate reasoning and correct responses. Extensive experiments on multiple ReID benchmarks demonstrate that ReID-R achieves competitive identity discrimination as superior methods using only 14.3K non-trivial data (20.9% of the existing data scale). Furthermore, benefit from inherent reasoning, ReID-R can provide high-quality interpretation for results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReID-R，一种基于推理驱动的人物再识别新范式，通过将思维链（CoT）融入ReID流程，实现显式身份理解与推理。该方法包含两个阶段：判别性推理预热（无标签CoT训练获取身份感知特征）和高效强化学习（非平凡采样构建场景泛化数据）。仅用现有14.3K数据（20.9%规模）即可达到竞争性性能，并能提供高质量结果解释。
AI.motivation: 现有感知驱动范式倾向于从大量标注数据中学习拟合，而非理解身份因果线索，导致模型在面对多种干扰时表现脆弱。因此，亟需一种能够显式理解与推理身份信息的范式来提升泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: ReID-R包含两阶段：(i) 判别性推理预热——以无标签CoT方式训练模型，获取身份感知特征理解；(ii) 高效强化学习——通过非平凡采样构建场景泛化数据，利用高质量奖励信号引导模型聚焦于身份相关线索，实现准确推理与正确响应。
AI.result: 在多个ReID基准上，ReID-R仅使用14.3K非平凡数据（现有数据规模的20.9%）即可达到与先进方法相竞争的识别性能，同时得益于内置推理能力，还能为结果提供高质量的解释。
AI.conclusion: 推理驱动范式ReID-R通过思维链与强化学习的结合，有效实现了身份识别中的显式因果理解，大幅降低了对大规模标注数据的依赖，并提供了可解释性，为ReID任务开辟了新的技术路径。

title: CART: Context-Aware Terrain Adaptation using Temporal Sequence Selection for Legged Robots
summary: Animals in nature combine multiple modalities, such as sight and feel, to perceive terrain and develop an understanding of how to walk on uneven terrain in a stable manner. Similarly, legged robots need to develop their ability to stably walk on complex terrains by developing an understanding of the relationship between vision and proprioception. Most current terrain adaptation methods are susceptible to failure on complex, off-road terrain as they rely on prior experience, particularly observations from a vision sensor. This experience-based learning often creates a Visual-Texture Paradox between what has been seen and how it actually feels. In this work, we introduce CART, a high-level controller built on a context-aware terrain adaptation approach that integrates proprioception and exteroception from onboard sensing to achieve a robust understanding of terrain. We evaluate our method on multiple terrains using an ANYmal-C robot on the IsaacSim simulator and a Boston Dynamics SPOT robot for our real-world experiments. To evaluate the learned contextual terrain properties, we adapt vibrational stability on the base of the robot as a metric. We compare CART with various state-of-the-art baselines equipped with multimodal sensing in both simulation and the real world. CART achieves an average success rate improvement of 5% over all baselines in simulation and improves the overall stability up to 45% and 24% in the real world without increasing the time taken by the robot to accomplish locomotion tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CART方法，通过融合视觉与本体感知实现上下文感知的地形适应，使腿式机器人在复杂非结构化地形上实现稳定行走。在ANYmal-C模拟和SPOT实物实验中，CART相比基线方法在成功率上提升5%，稳定性最高提升45%和24%。
AI.motivation: 现有地形适应方法过度依赖视觉经验的先验知识，容易在复杂越野地形上失败，且存在"视觉-触觉悖论"（视觉看到的与真实触觉感知不一致），需要一种能鲁棒融合多模态感知的地形理解方法。
AI.method: 提出CART（Context-Aware Robot Terrain adaptation）高层控制器，通过融合本体感知（proprioception）和外感受（exteroception）实现上下文感知的地形适应。使用机器人基底的振动稳定性作为学习地形上下文属性的度量指标。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中，CART相比所有基线方法的平均成功率提升5%；在实物实验中，整体稳定性分别提升45%和24%，且不增加 locomotion 任务的完成时间。
AI.conclusion: 融合本体感知与外感受的上下文感知方法能有效解决视觉-触觉悖论，显著提升腿式机器人在复杂地形上的行走稳定性与成功率。

title: Attention-based Multi-modal Deep Learning Model of Spatio-temporal Crop Yield Prediction with Satellite, Soil and Climate Data
summary:
Crop yield prediction is one of the most important challenge, which is crucial to world food security and policy-making decisions. The conventional forecasting techniques are limited in their accuracy with reference to the fact that they utilize static data sources that do not reflect the dynamic and intricate relationships that exist between the variables of the environment over time [5,13]. This paper presents Attention-Based Multi-Modal Deep Learning Framework (ABMMDLF), which is suggested to be used in high-accuracy spatio-temporal crop yield prediction.
  The model we use combines multi-year satellite imagery, high-resolution time-series of meteorological data and initial soil properties as opposed to the traditional models which use only one of the aforementioned factors [12, 21]. The main architecture involves the use of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to extract spatial features and a Temporal Attention Mechanism to adaptively weight important phenological periods targeted by the algorithm to change over time and condition on spatial features of images and video sequences. As can be experimentally seen, the proposed research work provides an R^2 score of 0.89, which is far better than the baseline models do.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力的多模态深度学习框架（ABMMDLF），用于高精度时空作物产量预测。该模型融合了多年卫星图像、高分辨率气象时间序列和土壤初始属性，利用CNN提取空间特征，并结合时间注意力机制自适应地加权关键物候期。实验表明，该模型R²分数达到0.89，优于传统基线模型。
AI.motivation: 传统作物产量预测方法受限于使用静态数据源，无法反映环境变量之间随时间变化的动态复杂关系，导致预测精度不足。本文旨在解决这一问题，提高作物产量预测的准确性。
AI.method: 提出ABMMDLF框架，融合多年卫星图像、高分辨率气象时间序列和土壤初始属性三种多模态数据。使用CNN提取空间特征，引入时间注意力机制自适应地加权关键物候期，实现时空特征的联合建模。
AI.result: 所提出的ABMMDLF模型在实验中取得了0.89的R²分数，显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 融合多模态数据并结合注意力机制的深度学习方法能有效提升作物产量预测的精度，为粮食安全和政策决策提供更可靠的支持。

title: Memory-Augmented LLM-based Multi-Agent System for Automated Feature Generation on Tabular Data
comment: 16 pages (including appendix), 4 main figures, 15 tables. Accepted to ACL 2026
summary: Automated feature generation extracts informative features from raw tabular data without manual intervention and is crucial for accurate, generalizable machine learning. Traditional methods rely on predefined operator libraries and cannot leverage task semantics, limiting their ability to produce diverse, high-value features for complex tasks. Recent Large Language Model (LLM)-based approaches introduce richer semantic signals, but still suffer from a restricted feature space due to fixed generation patterns and from the absence of feedback from the learning objective. To address these challenges, we propose a Memory-Augmented LLM-based Multi-Agent System (\textbf{MALMAS}) for automated feature generation. MALMAS decomposes the generation process into agents with distinct responsibilities, and a Router Agent activates an appropriate subset of agents per iteration, further broadening exploration of the feature space. We further integrate a memory module comprising procedural memory, feedback memory, and conceptual memory, enabling iterative refinement that adaptively guides subsequent feature generation and improves feature quality and diversity. Extensive experiments on multiple public datasets against state-of-the-art baselines demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. The code is available at https://github.com/fxdong24/MALMAS

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于记忆增强的LLM多智能体系统（MALMAS）用于自动化特征生成，通过将生成过程分解为多个负责不同职责的智能体，并引入路由机制和三种记忆模块（程序记忆、反馈记忆、概念记忆），在多个公开数据集上取得了优于现有方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统自动化特征生成方法依赖预定义操作符库且无法利用任务语义，导致特征空间受限；而基于LLM的方法虽然引入了语义信号，但仍受限于固定的生成模式且缺乏学习目标的反馈信号。
AI.method: 提出MALMAS框架：(1) 将特征生成过程分解为多个具有不同职责的智能体；(2) 引入Router Agent每轮激活合适的智能体子集以扩大特征空间探索；(3) 集成三种记忆模块——程序记忆、反馈记忆和概念记忆，实现自适应迭代优化。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上的实验结果表明，MALMAS优于现有最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MALMAS通过多智能体协作和记忆增强机制有效解决了传统和LLM-based自动化特征生成方法的局限性，提升了特征质量和多样性。

title: HiVLA: A Visual-Grounded-Centric Hierarchical Embodied Manipulation System
summary: While end-to-end Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation, fine-tuning them on narrow control data often compromises the profound reasoning capabilities inherited from their base Vision-Language Models (VLMs). To resolve this fundamental trade-off, we propose HiVLA, a visual-grounded-centric hierarchical framework that explicitly decouples high-level semantic planning from low-level motor control. In high-level part, a VLM planner first performs task decomposition and visual grounding to generate structured plans, comprising a subtask instruction and a precise target bounding box. Then, to translate this plan into physical actions, we introduce a flow-matching Diffusion Transformer (DiT) action expert in low-level part equipped with a novel cascaded cross-attention mechanism. This design sequentially fuses global context, high-resolution object-centric crops and skill semantics, enabling the DiT to focus purely on robust execution. Our decoupled architecture preserves the VLM's zero-shot reasoning while allowing independent improvement of both components. Extensive experiments in simulation and the real world demonstrate that HiVLA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art end-to-end baselines, particularly excelling in long-horizon skill composition and the fine-grained manipulation of small objects in cluttered scenes.

AI.tldr: HiVLA提出了一种视觉-语言-动作分层框架，通过将高层语义规划与低层运动控制解耦，在保留VLM强大推理能力的同时实现稳健的机器人操作，在长序列任务组合和杂乱场景小物体精细操作上显著优于端到端基线方法。
AI.motivation: 端到端VLA模型在狭窄控制数据上微调时，会损害其基座VLM继承的深层推理能力，亟需一种能同时保留推理能力并实现稳健控制的方案。
AI.method: 提出HiVLA分层框架：高层使用VLM规划器进行任务分解与视觉定位，生成子任务指令和目标边界框；低层引入流匹配扩散Transformer动作专家，通过级联交叉注意力机制依次融合全局上下文、高分辨率物体中心裁剪和技能语义，实现纯执行。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界实验中，HiVLA显著优于最先进的端到端基线方法，尤其在长序列技能组合和杂乱场景中小物体的精细操作方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 解耦架构在保留VLM零样本推理能力的同时，允许两个组件独立优化，有效解决了VLM推理能力在微调中退化的问题。

title: An Object-Centered Data Acquisition Method for 3D Gaussian Splatting using Mobile Phones
summary: Data acquisition through mobile phones remains a challenge for 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). In this work we target the object-centered scenario and enable reliable mobile acquisition by providing on-device capture guidance and recording onboard sensor signals for offline reconstruction. After the calibration step, the device orientations are aligned to a baseline frame to obtain relative poses, and the optical axis of the camera is mapped to an object-centered spherical grid for uniform viewpoint indexing. To curb polar sampling bias, we compute area-weighted spherical coverage in real-time and guide the user's motion accordingly. We compare the proposed method with RealityScan and the free-capture strategy. Our method achieves superior reconstruction quality using fewer input images compared to free capture and RealityScan. Further analysis shows that the proposed method is able to obtain more comprehensive and uniform viewpoint coverage during object-centered acquisition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于移动手机的对象中心3D高斯溅射采集方法，通过实时拍摄引导和传感器信号利用，在减少输入图像数量的同时实现了更优的重建质量和更均匀的视角覆盖。
AI.motivation: 移动设备进行3DGS数据采集仍然困难，现有方法缺乏有效的采集引导，导致视角覆盖不均衡、重建质量不稳定。
AI.method: 1) 校准后将对准基线帧的设备方向对齐获得相对位姿；2) 将相机光轴映射到对象中心球面网格进行均匀视角索引；3) 实时计算面积加权的球面覆盖率，引导用户运动以抑制极地采样偏差。
AI.result: 与RealityScan和自由采集策略相比，该方法在更少输入图像下实现了更优的重建质量，且获得了更全面均匀的视角覆盖。
AI.conclusion: 提出的移动端拍摄引导方法可有效提升对象中心3DGS采集的效率和重建质量，为移动设备上的可靠3D数据获取提供了可行方案。

title: UMI-3D: Extending Universal Manipulation Interface from Vision-Limited to 3D Spatial Perception
summary: We present UMI-3D, a multimodal extension of the Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI) for robust and scalable data collection in embodied manipulation. While UMI enables portable, wrist-mounted data acquisition, its reliance on monocular visual SLAM makes it vulnerable to occlusions, dynamic scenes, and tracking failures, limiting its applicability in real-world environments. UMI-3D addresses these limitations by introducing a lightweight and low-cost LiDAR sensor tightly integrated into the wrist-mounted interface, enabling LiDAR-centric SLAM with accurate metric-scale pose estimation under challenging conditions. We further develop a hardware-synchronized multimodal sensing pipeline and a unified spatiotemporal calibration framework that aligns visual observations with LiDAR point clouds, producing consistent 3D representations of demonstrations. Despite maintaining the original 2D visuomotor policy formulation, UMI-3D significantly improves the quality and reliability of collected data, which directly translates into enhanced policy performance. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate that UMI-3D not only achieves high success rates on standard manipulation tasks, but also enables learning of tasks that are challenging or infeasible for the original vision-only UMI setup, including large deformable object manipulation and articulated object operation. The system supports an end-to-end pipeline for data acquisition, alignment, training, and deployment, while preserving the portability and accessibility of the original UMI. All hardware and software components are open-sourced to facilitate large-scale data collection and accelerate research in embodied intelligence: \href{https://umi-3d.github.io}{https://umi-3d.github.io}.

AI.tldr: UMI-3D 是通用操作接口(UMI)的多模态扩展，通过集成轻量低成本LiDAR传感器和LiDAR-centric SLAM，克服了原UMI依赖单目视觉SLAM在遮挡、动态场景下的局限性，提升了数据采集的鲁棒性和策略性能。
AI.motivation: 原UMI依赖单目视觉SLAM，在遮挡、动态场景下易出现跟踪失败，限制了其在真实环境中的适用性。
AI.method: 在腕载接口中集成轻量低成本LiDAR传感器，构建LiDAR-centric SLAM实现精确度量尺度位姿估计；开发硬件同步多模态感知流水线和统一时空标定框架，对齐视觉与LiDAR点云，生成一致的三维演示表示。
AI.result: 在标准操作任务上实现高成功率，并能学习原UMI难以完成的任务（如大变形物体操作、铰接物体操作）。
AI.conclusion: UMI-3D在保持原UMI便携性和可访问性的同时，显著提升了数据采集质量和策略性能，并通过开源推动具身智能研究。

title: On the Quantization Robustness of Diffusion Language Models in Coding Benchmarks
summary: Auto-regressive Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance on coding tasks, but incur high memory and inference costs. Diffusion-based language models (d-LLMs) offer bounded inference cost via iterative denoising, but their behavior under post-training quantization (PTQ) has been sparsely explored. We investigate the application and robustness of PTQ techniques, specifically GPTQ and a modified Hessian-Aware Quantization (HAWQ) algorithm, on a diffusion-based coding LLM (CoDA) and observe that these methods applied to CoDA exhibit greater robustness at low bitwidths compared to Qwen3-1.7B, its auto-regressive counterpart, under a standardized evaluation pipeline. We find that in our setup, CoDA exhibits greater robustness at low bitwidths (2-4 bits), with smaller accuracy degradation across HumanEval and MBPP benchmarks. Additionally, mixed-precision configurations derived from HAWQ provide smooth trade-offs across accuracy, latency, and memory. The results suggest that diffusion LLMs may offer advantages for efficient deployment due to more quantization-resilience.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了扩散式代码语言模型(CoDA)在低比特量化下的鲁棒性，发现其相比自回归模型(Qwen3-1.7B)在2-4比特宽度下表现更稳健，混合精度配置可实现精度-延迟-内存的平滑权衡。
AI.motivation: 自回归LLM在编码任务上性能优异但推理成本高，扩散式语言模型推理成本有界但后训练量化(PTQ)行为尚不清楚，因此需要探索扩散模型在量化下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用GPTQ和改进的Hessian感知量化(HAWQ)算法，对扩散式代码LLM(CoDA)进行PTQ评估，并与自回归模型Qwen3-1.7B在标准化流程下对比。
AI.result: CoDA在2-4比特低比特宽度下表现出更强的量化鲁棒性，HumanEval和MBPP基准上的精度下降更小；HAWQ导出的混合精度配置在精度、延迟和内存之间实现了平滑权衡。
AI.conclusion: 扩散式LLM因更高的量化鲁棒性，可能更适合高效部署。

title: Positive-Only Drifting Policy Optimization
summary: In the field of online reinforcement learning (RL), traditional Gaussian policies and flow-based methods are often constrained by their unimodal expressiveness, complex gradient clipping, or stringent trust-region requirements. Moreover, they all rely on post-hoc penalization of negative samples to correct erroneous actions. This paper introduces Positive-Only Drifting Policy Optimization (PODPO), a likelihood-free and gradient-clipping-free generative approach for online RL. By leveraging the drifting model, PODPO performs policy updates via advantage-weighted local contrastive drifting. Relying solely on positive-advantage samples, it elegantly steers actions toward high-return regions while exploiting the inherent local smoothness of the generative model to enable proactive error prevention. In doing so, PODPO opens a promising new pathway for generative policy learning in online settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PODPO方法，一种无需似然和梯度裁剪的在线强化学习生成式策略，通过优势加权局部对比漂移仅利用正优势样本更新策略，无需负样本惩罚即可引导动作向高回报区域移动。
AI.motivation: 传统在线RL中的高斯策略和基于流的方法受限于单模态表达力、复杂的梯度裁剪或严格的信任域约束，且都依赖事后惩罚负样本来纠正错误动作，缺乏主动预防机制。
AI.method: 提出PODPO方法，利用漂移模型（Drifting Model），通过优势加权局部对比漂移进行策略更新，仅使用正优势样本，无需似然计算和梯度裁剪。
AI.result: PODPO仅依靠正优势样本即可将动作引导至高回报区域，并利用生成模型固有的局部平滑性实现主动错误预防。
AI.conclusion: PODPO为在线强化学习中的生成式策略学习开辟了一条有前景的新路径。

title: Improved large-scale graph learning through ridge spectral sparsification
summary: Graph-based techniques and spectral graph theory have enriched the field of machine learning with a variety of critical advances. A central object in the analysis is the graph Laplacian L, which encodes the structure of the graph. We consider the problem of learning over this Laplacian in a distributed streaming setting, where new edges of the graph are observed in real time by a network of workers. In this setting, it is hard to learn quickly or approximately while keeping a distributed representation of L. To address this challenge, we present a novel algorithm, GSQUEAK, which efficiently sparsifies the Laplacian by maintaining a small subset of effective resistances. We show that our algorithm produces sparsifiers with strong spectral approximation guarantees, all while processing edges in a single pass and in a distributed fashion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GSQUEAK算法，用于在分布式流式处理环境下高效稀疏化图拉普拉斯矩阵L，通过维护少量有效电阻的边子集，实现单次遍历和分布式的强谱逼近保证。
AI.motivation: 在分布式流式处理场景中，图的新边以实时方式被一组工作节点观测，传统的图拉普拉斯学习方法难以在保持分布式表示的同时快速或近似地学习。
AI.method: 提出GSQUEAK算法，通过维护一小部分有效电阻（effective resistances）来稀疏化图拉普拉斯矩阵L，算法以单次遍历（single pass）和分布式方式处理边。
AI.result: GSQUEAK生成的稀疏化子图具有强谱逼近保证（strong spectral approximation guarantees）。
AI.conclusion: GSQUEAK算法能够在分布式流式设置下高效稀疏化拉普拉斯矩阵，为分布式图学习提供了一种可行的谱稀疏化方案。

title: SketchFaceGS: Real-Time Sketch-Driven Face Editing and Generation with Gaussian Splatting
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 as a Highlight. Jittor implementation: https://github.com/gogoneural/SketchFaceGS_jittor. (C) 2026 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted
summary: 3D Gaussian representations have emerged as a powerful paradigm for digital head modeling, achieving photorealistic quality with real-time rendering. However, intuitive and interactive creation or editing of 3D Gaussian head models remains challenging. Although 2D sketches provide an ideal interaction modality for fast, intuitive conceptual design, they are sparse, depth-ambiguous, and lack high-frequency appearance cues, making it difficult to infer dense, geometrically consistent 3D Gaussian structures from strokes - especially under real-time constraints. To address these challenges, we propose SketchFaceGS, the first sketch-driven framework for real-time generation and editing of photorealistic 3D Gaussian head models from 2D sketches. Our method uses a feed-forward, coarse-to-fine architecture. A Transformer-based UV feature-prediction module first reconstructs a coarse but geometrically consistent UV feature map from the input sketch, and then a 3D UV feature enhancement module refines it with high-frequency, photorealistic detail to produce a high-fidelity 3D head. For editing, we introduce a UV Mask Fusion technique combined with a layer-by-layer feature-fusion strategy, enabling precise, real-time, free-viewpoint modifications. Extensive experiments show that SketchFaceGS outperforms existing methods in both generation fidelity and editing flexibility, producing high-quality, editable 3D heads from sketches in a single forward pass.

AI.tldr: SketchFaceGS是首个基于草图的框架，能够从2D草图中实时生成和编辑逼真的3D高斯头部模型，采用粗到细的架构，包含Transformer UV特征预测模块和3D UV特征增强模块，并通过UV Mask融合技术实现精准编辑。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯表示在数字头部建模中表现出色，但直观交互式的创建和编辑仍然困难。2D草图虽提供理想的交互方式，但存在稀疏、深度模糊和缺乏高频外观线索的问题，难以推断稠密且几何一致的3D高斯结构。
AI.method: 提出SketchFaceGS框架，采用前馈式粗到细架构：1) Transformer-based UV特征预测模块从草图中重建粗粒度的UV特征图；2) 3D UV特征增强模块细化高频逼真细节；3) UV Mask融合技术结合逐层特征融合策略实现实时编辑。
AI.result: 在生成保真度和编辑灵活性上均优于现有方法，能够从草图中通过单次前向传播生成高质量、可编辑的3D头部模型。
AI.conclusion: SketchFaceGS成功解决了从稀疏草图推断3D高斯结构的挑战，实现了实时、高保真的头部模型生成与编辑，为数字人建模提供了更直观的交互方式。

title: Analysis of Nystrom method with sequential ridge leverage scores
summary: Large-scale kernel ridge regression (KRR) is limited by the need to store a large kernel matrix K_t. To avoid storing the entire matrix K_t, Nystrom methods subsample a subset of columns of the kernel matrix, and efficiently find an approximate KRR solution on the reconstructed matrix. The chosen subsampling distribution in turn affects the statistical and computational tradeoffs. For KRR problems, recent works show that a sampling distribution proportional to the ridge leverage scores (RLSs) provides strong reconstruction guarantees for the approximation. While exact RLSs are as difficult to compute as a KRR solution, we may be able to approximate them well enough. In this paper, we study KRR problems in a sequential setting and introduce the INK-ESTIMATE algorithm, that incrementally computes the RLSs estimates. INK-ESTIMATE maintains a small sketch of K_t, that at each step is used to compute an intermediate estimate of the RLSs. First, our sketch update does not require access to previously seen columns, and therefore a single pass over the kernel matrix is sufficient. Second, the algorithm requires a fixed, small space budget to run dependent only on the effective dimension of the kernel matrix. Finally, our sketch provides strong approximation guarantees on the distance between the true kernel matrix and its approximation, and on the statistical risk of the approximate KRR solution at any time, because all our guarantees hold at any intermediate step.

AI.tldr: 本文提出INK-ESTIMATE算法，通过增量计算岭回归杠杆分数（RLSs）来近似大规模核岭回归（KRR）问题。该算法只需单遍扫描核矩阵、固定的小空间预算（取决于核矩阵的有效维度），并在任意中间步骤都能提供强近似保证。
AI.motivation: 大规模核岭回归（KRR）受限于存储整个核矩阵K_t的需求。虽然Nyström方法通过子采样列来避免存储完整矩阵，但子采样分布的选择影响统计与计算权衡。已有研究表明，与岭回归杠杆分数（RLSs）成比例的采样分布能提供强重构保证，但精确RLSs的计算难度与KRR解相当，因此需要高效的近似方法。
AI.method: 提出INK-ESTIMATE算法，在序贯设置下增量计算RLSs估计。该算法维护K_t的一个小型sketch，每一步利用该sketch计算中间RLSs估计。sketch更新不需要访问之前见过的列，因此只需单遍扫描核矩阵。算法空间预算固定且仅依赖于核矩阵的有效维度。
AI.result: 算法在任意中间步骤都能提供真实核矩阵与其近似之间距离的强近似保证，以及近似KRR解的统计风险保证。空间复杂度仅与核矩阵的有效维度相关，而非全矩阵规模。
AI.conclusion: INK-ESTIMATE通过增量RLSs估计实现了高效的大规模KRR近似，兼具单遍扫描、固定小空间预算和任意中间步骤强保证的优点，为序贯KRR问题提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Hybrid Policy Distillation for LLMs
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) is a powerful paradigm for compressing large language models (LLMs), whose effectiveness depends on intertwined choices of divergence direction, optimization strategy, and data regime. We break down the design of existing KD methods and present a unified view that establishes connections between them, reformulating KD as a reweighted log-likelihood objective at the token level. We further propose Hybrid Policy Distillation (HPD), which integrates the complementary advantages of forward and reverse KL to balance mode coverage and mode-seeking, and combines off-policy data with lightweight, approximate on-policy sampling. We validate HPD on long-generation math reasoning as well as short-generation dialogue and code tasks, demonstrating improved optimization stability, computational efficiency, and final performance across diverse model families and scales. The code related to this work is available at https://github.com/zwhong714/Hybrid-Policy-Distillation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一视角将知识蒸馏重构为token级重加权对数似然目标，并设计混合策略蒸馏（HPD），结合前向与反向KL的互补优势，平衡模式覆盖与模式寻找，在数学推理、对话和代码任务上验证了优化稳定性、计算效率和性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM知识蒸馏方法在散度方向、优化策略和数据来源等维度上选择交织，缺乏统一的理论视角和有效的混合策略来平衡模式覆盖与模式寻找。
AI.method: 1) 将现有KD方法统一重构为token级重加权对数似然目标；2) 提出HPD，融合前向KL（模式覆盖）和反向KL（模式寻找）的互补优势；3) 结合离线数据与轻量级近似在线采样。
AI.result: 在长文本数学推理、短文本对话和代码任务上，HPD在不同模型家族和规模下均展现出更优的优化稳定性、计算效率和最终性能。
AI.conclusion: HPD通过混合策略有效平衡了蒸馏中的模式覆盖与模式寻找，为LLM知识蒸馏提供了统一的理论框架和实用的高性能方案。

title: Scale-Invariant Sampling in Multi-Arm Bandit Motion Planning for Object Extraction
summary: Object extraction tasks often occur in disassembly problems, where bolts, screws, or pins have to be removed from tight, narrow spaces. In such problems, the distance to the environment is often on the millimeter scale. Sampling-based planners can solve such problems and provide completeness guarantees. However, sampling becomes a bottleneck, since almost all motions will result in collisions with the environment. To overcome this problem, we propose a novel scale-invariant sampling strategy which explores the configuration space using a grow-shrink search to find useful, high-entropy sampling scales. Once a useful sampling scale has been found, our framework exploits this scale by using a principal components analysis (PCA) to find useful directions for object extraction. We embed this sampler into a multi-arm bandit rapidly-exploring random tree (MAB-RRT) planner and test it on eight challenging 3D object extraction scenarios, involving bolts, gears, rods, pins, and sockets. To evaluate our framework, we compare it with classical sampling strategies like uniform sampling, obstacle-based sampling, and narrow-passage sampling, and with modern strategies like mate vectors, physics-based planning, and disassembly breadth first search. Our experiments show that scale-invariant sampling improves success rate by one order of magnitude on 7 out of 8 scenarios. This demonstrates that scale-invariant sampling is an important concept for general purpose object extraction in disassembly tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种尺度不变采样策略，通过增长-收缩搜索和PCA主成分分析，在多臂老虎机RRT规划器中实现物体拆卸提取，在7/8的3D场景中将成功率提升一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 在拆卸问题中（如螺栓、螺钉、销钉的移除），物体提取任务常发生在毫米级狭窄空间。基于采样的规划器虽能提供完备性保证，但几乎所有运动都会与环境碰撞，导致采样成为瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出尺度不变采样策略：使用增长-收缩搜索探索构型空间以发现高熵有用采样尺度；利用PCA寻找物体提取的有用方向；将采样器嵌入多臂老虎机RRT（MAB-RRT）规划器中。
AI.result: 在8个具有挑战性的3D物体提取场景（螺栓、齿轮、杆、销钉、插座）中，与均匀采样、基于障碍物采样、窄通道采样等经典策略以及mate向量、基于物理规划、拆卸BFS等现代策略相比，尺度不变采样在7/8场景中将成功率提升一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 尺度不变采样是通用物体拆卸提取任务中的重要概念。

title: Maximum Entropy Semi-Supervised Inverse Reinforcement Learning
comment: In Proceedings of the 24th International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI 2015)
summary: A popular approach to apprenticeship learning (AL) is to formulate it as an inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) problem. The MaxEnt-IRL algorithm successfully integrates the maximum entropy principle into IRL and unlike its predecessors, it resolves the ambiguity arising from the fact that a possibly large number of policies could match the expert's behavior. In this paper, we study an AL setting in which in addition to the expert's trajectories, a number of unsupervised trajectories is available. We introduce MESSI, a novel algorithm that combines MaxEnt-IRL with principles coming from semi-supervised learning. In particular, MESSI integrates the unsupervised data into the MaxEnt-IRL framework using a pairwise penalty on trajectories. Empirical results in a highway driving and grid-world problems indicate that MESSI is able to take advantage of the unsupervised trajectories and improve the performance of MaxEnt-IRL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MESSI算法，将半监督学习原理与最大熵逆强化学习（MaxEnt-IRL）相结合，利用无监督轨迹数据提升学徒学习性能。
AI.motivation: 标准MaxEnt-IRL仅利用专家轨迹，忽略了大量可获取的无监督轨迹数据，这些数据可能包含有助于学习奖励函数的结构信息。
AI.method: MESSI将无监督数据融入MaxEnt-IRL框架，通过在轨迹对上施加成对惩罚项来实现半监督学习，利用无监督轨迹辅助奖励函数学习。
AI.result: 在高速公路驾驶和网格世界问题上的实验结果表明，MESSI能够有效利用无监督轨迹，在性能上优于标准的MaxEnt-IRL算法。
AI.conclusion: 将半监督学习思想引入逆强化学习是提升学徒学习性能的有效途径，无监督轨迹数据可为奖励函数学习提供额外信息。

title: How Far Are Video Models from True Multimodal Reasoning?
summary: Despite remarkable progress toward general-purpose video models, a critical question remains unanswered: how far are these models from achieving true multimodal reasoning? Existing benchmarks fail to address this question rigorously, as they remain constrained by straightforward task designs and fragmented evaluation metrics that neglect complex multimodal reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce CLVG-Bench, an evaluation framework designed to probe video models' zero-shot reasoning capabilities via Context Learning in Video Generation. CLVG-Bench comprises more than 1,000 high-quality, manually annotated metadata across 6 categories and 47 subcategories, covering complex scenarios including physical simulation, logical reasoning, and interactive contexts. To enable rigorous and scalable assessment, we further propose an Adaptive Video Evaluator (AVE) that aligns with human expert perception using minimal annotations, delivering interpretable textual feedback across diverse video context tasks. Extensive experiments reveal a striking answer to our central question: while state-of-the-art (SOTA) video models, such as Seedance 2.0, demonstrate competence on certain understanding and reasoning subtasks, they fall substantially short with logically grounded and interactive generation tasks (achieving success rates <25% and ~0%, respectively), exposing multimodal reasoning and physical grounding as critical bottlenecks. By systematically quantifying these limitations, the proposed method provides actionable feedbacks and a clear roadmap toward truly robust, general-purpose video models. CLVG-Bench and code are released here.

AI.tldr: CLVG-Bench 是一个通过视频生成中的上下文学习来评估视频模型零样本推理能力的基准框架，包含1000+手动标注元数据、47个子类别，并提出了自适应视频评估器（AVE）。实验表明SOTA视频模型在逻辑推理和交互式生成任务上表现极差（成功率<25%和~0%），揭示了多模态推理和物理基础是当前视频模型的关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有视频模型基准测试受限于简单的任务设计和碎片化的评估指标，无法严格评估模型的多模态推理能力，缺乏对复杂推理场景的系统性测试。
AI.method: 1) 构建CLVG-Bench，包含1000+高质量手动标注元数据，覆盖6个大类47个子类别（物理模拟、逻辑推理、交互上下文等）；2) 提出自适应视频评估器（AVE），用最少标注对齐人类专家感知，输出可解释的文本反馈。
AI.result: SOTA视频模型（如Seedance 2.0）在简单理解和推理子任务上表现尚可，但在逻辑推理任务上成功率<25%，在交互式生成任务上成功率接近0%，多模态推理和物理基础成为核心瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: CLVG-Bench系统性地量化了当前视频模型的局限性，为构建真正鲁棒的通用视频模型提供了可操作的反馈和清晰的方向指引。

title: Federated Learning over Blockchain-Enabled Cloud Infrastructure
summary: The rise of IoT devices and the uptake of cloud computing have informed a new era of data-driven intelligence. Traditional centralized machine learning models that require a large volume of data to be stored in a single location have therefore become more susceptible to data breaches, privacy violations, and regulatory non-compliance. This report presents a thorough examination of the merging of Federated Learning (FL) and blockchain technology in a cloud-edge setting, demonstrating it as an effective solution to the stated concerns. We are proposing a detailed four-dimensional architectural categorization that meticulously assesses coordination frameworks, consensus algorithms, data storage practices, and trust models that are significant to these integrated systems. The manuscript presents a comprehensive comparative examination of two cutting-edge frameworks: the Multi-Objectives Reinforcement Federated Learning Blockchain (MORFLB), which is designed for intelligent transportation systems, and the Federated Blockchain-IoT Framework for Sustainable Healthcare Systems (FBCI-SHS), elucidating their distinctive contributions and inherent limitations. Lastly, we engage in a thorough evaluation of the literature that integrates a comparative perspective on current frameworks to discern the singular nature of this research within existing knowledge systems. The manuscript culminates in delineating the principal challenges and offering a strategic framework for prospective research trajectories, emphasizing the advancement of adaptive, resilient, and standardized BCFL systems across diverse application domains.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地研究了联邦学习与区块链技术在云边环境中的融合，提出了四维架构分类体系，并对MORFLB和FBCI-SHS两个前沿框架进行了比较分析，最后指出了未来研究方向与挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式机器学习模型在面对物联网和云计算时代的海量数据时，存在数据泄露、隐私侵犯和监管合规风险，亟需一种去中心化的安全解决方案。
AI.method: 提出四维架构分类（协调框架、共识算法、数据存储实践、信任模型），并对MORFLB（智能交通系统）和FBCI-SHS（可持续医疗系统）两个框架进行综合比较分析。
AI.result: 建立了集成FL与区块链在云边环境中的系统化分类体系，识别了MORFLB与FBCI-SHS各自的独特贡献与固有局限。
AI.conclusion: 总结了当前BCFL系统面临的主要挑战，并提出了面向自适应、弹性、标准化的未来研究战略框架。

title: Towards Secure Logging: Characterizing and Benchmarking Logging Code Security Issues with LLMs
comment: Accepted at FSE 2026 Research Papers Track
summary: Logging code plays an important role in software systems by recording key events and behaviors, which are essential for debugging and monitoring. However, insecure logging practices can inadvertently expose sensitive information or enable attacks such as log injection, posing serious threats to system security and privacy. Prior research has examined general defects in logging code, but systematic analysis of logging code security issues remains limited, particularly in leveraging LLMs for detection and repair. In this paper, we derive a comprehensive taxonomy of logging code security issues, encompassing four common issue categories and 10 corresponding patterns. We further construct a benchmark dataset with 101 real-world logging security issue reports that have been manually reviewed and annotated. We then propose an automated framework that incorporates various contextual knowledge to evaluate LLMs' capabilities in detecting and repairing logging security issues. Our experimental results reveal a notable disparity in performance: while LLMs are moderately effective at detecting security issues (e.g., the accuracy ranges from 12.9% to 52.5% on average), they face noticeable challenges in reliably generating correct code repairs. We also find that the issue description alone improves the LLMs' detection accuracy more than the security pattern explanation or a combination of both. Overall, our findings provide actionable insights for practitioners and highlight the potential and limitations of current LLMs for secure logging.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地研究了日志代码安全问题，构建了包含4类10种模式的分类体系和101个真实问题的基准数据集，并提出了一种利用多种上下文知识评估LLM检测与修复日志安全问题的自动化框架。实验表明LLM在检测方面效果中等（准确率12.9%-52.5%），但在代码修复方面表现不佳，且问题描述比安全模式解释更有效。
AI.motivation: 日志代码安全问题（如敏感信息泄露、日志注入）对系统安全和隐私构成严重威胁，但现有研究缺乏对日志代码安全问题的系统性分析，尤其是在利用大语言模型进行检测和修复方面的研究有限。
AI.method: 首先通过系统性分析推导出包含4类常见问题和10种具体模式的日志安全分类体系；构建了包含101个经人工审阅标注的真实日志安全问题的基准数据集；提出了一种集成多种上下文知识的自动化框架，用于评估LLM在日志安全问题的检测和修复能力。
AI.result: LLM在检测日志安全问题时准确率范围为12.9%-52.5%，表现中等；但在可靠生成正确代码修复方面面临显著挑战；仅使用问题描述比使用安全模式解释或组合方式更能提升检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为从业人员提供了可操作的见解，揭示了当前LLM在日志安全领域的能力与局限性，为后续研究指明了方向。

title: Towards Multi-Object-Tracking with Radar on a Fast Moving Vehicle: On the Potential of Processing Radar in the Frequency Domain
summary: We promote in this paper the processing of radar data in the frequency domain to achieve higher robustness against noise and structural errors, especially in comparison to feature-based methods. This holds also for high dynamics in the scene, i.e., ego-motion of the vehicle with the sensor plus the presence of an unknown number of other moving objects. In addition to the high robustness, the processing in the frequency domain has the so far neglected advantage that the underlying correlation based methods used for, e.g., registration, provide information about all moving structures in the scene. A typical automotive application case is overtaking maneuvers, which in the context of autonomous racing are used here as a motivating example. Initial experiments and results with Fourier SOFT in 2D (FS2D) are presented that use the Boreas dataset to demonstrate radar-only-odometry, i.e., radar-odometry without sensor-fusion, to support our arguments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在频域处理雷达数据的方法（FS2D），相比基于特征的方法，对噪声、结构误差和高动态场景具有更高鲁棒性，并利用频域相关方法提供场景中所有运动结构的信息，在自主赛车超车场景中通过Boreas数据集验证了纯雷达里程计的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于特征的雷达数据处理方法对噪声、结构误差和高动态场景鲁棒性不足，且忽视了频域处理在提供场景运动结构信息方面的优势。
AI.method: 提出Fourier SOFT in 2D (FS2D)方法，在频域对雷达数据进行处理，利用基于相关的配准方法获取场景中所有运动结构的信息，实现纯雷达里程计。
AI.result: 在Boreas数据集上的实验表明，FS2D方法在无传感器融合的情况下，仅凭雷达数据即可实现里程计估计，验证了频域处理的高鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 频域雷达数据处理相比特征方法具有更高的鲁棒性，并能提供场景中所有运动结构的信息，适用于自动驾驶等动态场景。

title: Bootstrapping Post-training Signals for Open-ended Tasks via Rubric-based Self-play on Pre-training Text
summary: Self-play has recently emerged as a promising paradigm to train Large Language Models (LLMs). In self-play, the target LLM creates the task input (e.g., ask a question), which it then addresses itself by producing a task output (e.g., give an answer). A reward model evaluates the output, and the rewards are then used to train the LLM, typically via Reinforcement Learning (RL). Self-play incurs minimal supervision costs, and this is especially helpful for post-training LLMs, which require high-quality input-output pairs that traditionally have to be written by humans or expensive proprietary models. However, existing work explores self-play only for verifiable tasks such as math and coding. Instead, we seek to extend it to more realistic open-ended tasks. In particular, we propose POP, a self-play framework that uses the same LLM to synthesize evaluation rubrics, along with input-output pairs, for each example. The rubric is then used to evaluate outputs and train the model. We further ground the framework on a content-rich pretraining corpus to (1) ensure a generation-verification gap and reduce reward hacking, and (2) prevent mode collapse. On Qwen-2.5-7B, POP increases performance of both pretrained and instruction-tuned models, across different tasks ranging from long-form Healthcare QA to creative writing and instruction following.

AI.tldr: POP是一种自对弈框架，让同一LLM合成评估标准（rubric）和输入-输出对，并基于内容丰富的预训练语料库进行训练，从而将自对弈从可验证任务扩展到开放式任务，在Qwen-2.5-7B上提升了长文本医疗QA、创意写作和指令遵循等任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自对弈方法仅适用于数学和代码等可验证任务，无法推广到更现实的开放式任务。同时，传统的高质量输入-输出对需要人工或昂贵专有模型编写，成本高昂。POP旨在将自对弈扩展到开放式任务，同时保持低监督成本。
AI.method: POP框架使用同一LLM为每个样本合成评估标准（rubric）以及输入-输出对；利用评估标准评估输出并训练模型；基于内容丰富的预训练语料库来确保生成-验证差距以减少奖励黑客攻击，并防止模式崩溃。
AI.result: 在Qwen-2.5-7B上，POP在长文本医疗QA、创意写作和指令遵循等多种任务上，同时提升了预训练模型和指令微调模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 自对弈可以通过合成评估标准的方式有效扩展到开放式任务，基于预训练语料库的约束能够缓解奖励黑客和模式崩溃问题，为低成本后训练LLM提供了新方向。

title: MSDS: Deep Structural Similarity with Multiscale Representation
summary: Deep-feature-based perceptual similarity models have demonstrated strong alignment with human visual perception in Image Quality Assessment (IQA). However, most existing approaches operate at a single spatial scale, implicitly assuming that structural similarity at a fixed resolution is sufficient. The role of spatial scale in deep-feature similarity modeling thus remains insufficiently understood. In this letter, we isolate spatial scale as an independent factor using a minimal multiscale extension of DeepSSIM, referred to as Deep Structural Similarity with Multiscale Representation (MSDS). The proposed framework decouples deep feature representation from cross-scale integration by computing DeepSSIM independently across pyramid levels and fusing the resulting scores with a lightweight set of learnable global weights. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent and statistically significant improvements over the single-scale baseline, while introducing negligible additional complexity. The results empirically confirm spatial scale as a non-negligible factor in deep perceptual similarity, isolated here via a minimal testbed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MSDS（多尺度深度结构相似性），通过在图像金字塔各层级独立计算DeepSSIM并轻量融合，验证了空间尺度是深度感知相似性建模中不可忽略的因素，在多个IQA基准上显著提升性能且计算开销极小。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度特征的感知相似性模型大多在单一空间尺度下操作，隐含假设固定分辨率下的结构相似性足够，而空间尺度在深度特征相似性建模中的作用尚未被充分理解。
AI.method: 提出MSDS框架，将DeepSSIM解耦为深度特征表示与跨尺度集成两个独立部分：在图像金字塔各层级独立计算DeepSSIM，然后用一组轻量的可学习全局权重融合各层级得分。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，MSDS相比单尺度基线取得一致且统计显著的性能提升，同时引入的计算开销极小。
AI.conclusion: 通过最小化测试平台（minimal testbed）实验，实证确认空间尺度是深度感知相似性中不可忽略的因素。

title: Goal2Skill: Long-Horizon Manipulation with Adaptive Planning and Reflection
summary:
Recent vision-language-action (VLA) systems have demonstrated strong capabilities in embodied manipulation. However, most existing VLA policies rely on limited observation windows and end-to-end action prediction, which makes them brittle in long-horizon, memory-dependent tasks with partial observability, occlusions, and multi-stage dependencies. Such tasks require not only precise visuomotor control, but also persistent memory, adaptive task decomposition, and explicit recovery from execution failures. To address these limitations, we propose a dual-system framework for long-horizon embodied manipulation.
  Our framework explicitly separates high-level semantic reasoning from low-level motor execution. A high-level planner, implemented as a VLM-based agentic module, maintains structured task memory and performs goal decomposition, outcome verification, and error-driven correction. A low-level executor, instantiated as a VLA-based visuomotor controller, carries out each sub-task through diffusion-based action generation conditioned on geometry-preserving filtered observations. Together, the two systems form a closed loop between planning and execution, enabling memory-aware reasoning, adaptive replanning, and robust online recovery. Experiments on representative RMBench tasks show that the proposed framework substantially outperforms representative baselines, achieving a 32.4% average success rate compared with 9.8% for the strongest baseline. Ablation studies further confirm the importance of structured memory and closed-loop recovery for long-horizon manipulation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种双系统框架（VLM高层规划器 + VLA低层执行器）用于长时域具身操作，在RMBench任务上平均成功率32.4%，远超最强基线9.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA策略依赖有限观测窗口和端到端动作预测，在长时域、部分可观测、存在遮挡和多阶段依赖的任务中表现脆弱，缺乏持久记忆、自适应任务分解和显式故障恢复能力。
AI.method: 双系统框架：1) 高层规划器：基于VLM的智能体模块，维护结构化任务记忆，进行目标分解、结果验证和错误驱动修正；2) 低层执行器：基于VLA的视觉运动控制器，通过基于几何保持滤波观测的扩散动作生成执行子任务。两者形成规划-执行闭环。
AI.result: 在RMBench任务上，所提框架平均成功率32.4%，最强基线仅9.8%；消融实验证实结构化记忆和闭环恢复对长时域操作的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 将高层语义推理与低层运动执行显式分离的双系统设计，结合结构化记忆和闭环恢复机制，能有效提升长时域具身操作任务的成功率。

title: Separable Pathways for Causal Reasoning: How Architectural Scaffolding Enables Hypothesis-Space Restructuring in LLM Agents
summary: Causal discovery through experimentation and intervention is fundamental to robust problem solving. It requires not just updating beliefs within a fixed framework but revising the hypothesis space itself, a capacity current AI agents lack when evidence demands representations they have not previously constructed. We extend the blicket detector paradigm from developmental science to test this capacity in AI agents equipped with architectural scaffolding that targets hypothesis-space restructuring. Our compositional architecture has two discrete components: context graphs, which structure exploration as typed state machines, and dynamic behaviors, which monitor for evidence that the current hypothesis space is inadequate and expand it at runtime. Across 1,085 experimental trials, these components make orthogonal contributions: context graphs drive reasoning quality within the post-switch hypothesis space, accounting for 94\% of the accuracy gain, while dynamic behaviors drive reasoning eligibility by detecting regime changes and preventing premature commitment to outdated hypotheses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种组合式架构，通过上下文图（context graphs）和动态行为（dynamic behaviors）两个组件，使AI智能体能够在因果发现中实时扩展假设空间。1,085次实验表明：上下文图驱动假设空间内的推理质量（准确率提升94%），动态行为驱动假设空间的适应性切换，防止过早收敛于过时假设。
AI.motivation: 当前AI智能体缺乏在证据要求尚未构建过的表征时修正假设空间的能力，而因果发现恰恰需要这种能力——不仅在固定框架内更新信念，还要能够修订假设空间本身。
AI.method: 借鉴发展科学中的blicket探测器范式，设计组合式架构：(1) 上下文图——将探索结构化为带类型的状态机；(2) 动态行为——监控当前假设空间是否不足，并在运行时扩展假设空间。通过1,085次实验分别测试两个组件的贡献。
AI.result: 上下文图解释了准确率提升的94%，主要贡献于假设空间切换后的推理质量；动态行为通过检测机制变化来驱动推理的资格（eligibility），防止过早承诺于过时假设。
AI.conclusion: 两个组件具有正交贡献：上下文图提升推理质量，动态行为确保推理资格。该架构使AI具备了实时扩展假设空间的能力，弥补了现有AI在因果发现中的关键缺陷。

title: ST-Prune: Training-Free Spatio-Temporal Token Pruning for Vision-Language Models in Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have become central to autonomous driving systems, yet their deployment is severely bottlenecked by the massive computational overhead of multi-view camera and multi-frame video input. Existing token pruning methods, primarily designed for single-image inputs, treat each frame or view in isolation and thus fail to exploit the inherent spatio-temporal redundancies in driving scenarios. To bridge this gap, we propose ST-Prune, a training-free, plug-and-play framework comprising two complementary modules: Motion-aware Temporal Pruning (MTP) and Ring-view Spatial Pruning (RSP). MTP addresses temporal redundancy by encoding motion volatility and temporal recency as soft constraints within the diversity selection objective, prioritizing dynamic trajectories and current-frame content over static historical background. RSP further resolves spatial redundancy by exploiting the ring-view camera geometry to penalize bilateral cross-view similarity, eliminating duplicate projections and residual background that temporal pruning alone cannot suppress. These two modules together constitute a complete spatio-temporal pruning process, preserving key scene information under strict compression. Validated across four benchmarks spanning perception, prediction, and planning, ST-Prune establishes new state-of-the-art for training-free token pruning. Notably, even at 90\% token reduction, ST-Prune achieves near-lossless performance with certain metrics surpassing the full-model baseline, while maintaining inference speeds comparable to existing pruning approaches.

AI.tldr: ST-Prune提出了一种无需训练、即插即用的框架，通过运动感知时间剪枝（MTP）和环形视图空间剪枝（RSP）两个模块，在自动驾驶多视图多帧视频输入中实现高效令牌剪枝，在90%压缩率下仍保持近乎无损的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在自动驾驶中面临多视图相机和多帧视频输入带来的巨大计算开销，而现有令牌剪枝方法仅针对单图像设计，未能利用驾驶场景中固有的时空冗余，亟需一种高效的时空剪枝方案。
AI.method: 提出ST-Prune框架，包含两个互补模块：1）运动感知时间剪枝（MTP），将运动波动性和时间新近性编码为多样性选择目标中的软约束，优先保留动态轨迹和当前帧内容；2）环形视图空间剪枝（RSP），利用环视相机几何结构惩罚双边跨视图相似性，消除时间剪枝无法抑制的重复投影和残余背景。
AI.result: 在四个涵盖感知、预测和规划的基准测试中达到训练无关令牌剪枝的最新最优结果。90%令牌缩减率下实现近乎无损的性能，某些指标甚至超过完整模型基线，同时推理速度与现有剪枝方法相当。
AI.conclusion: ST-Prune通过时空联合剪枝策略有效解决了自动驾驶中多视图多帧输入的冗余问题，证明了无需重新训练即可实现高效令牌压缩的可能性，为VLMs在自动驾驶中的实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: Do Masked Autoencoders Improve Downhole Prediction? An Empirical Study on Real Well Drilling Data
summary: Downhole drilling telemetry presents a fundamental labeling asymmetry: surface sensor data are generated continuously at 1~Hz, while labeled downhole measurements are costly, intermittent, and scarce. Current machine learning approaches for downhole metric prediction universally adopt fully supervised training from scratch, which is poorly suited to this data regime. We present the first empirical evaluation of masked autoencoder (MAE) pretraining for downhole drilling metric prediction. Using two publicly available Utah FORGE geothermal wells comprising approximately 3.5 million timesteps of multivariate drilling telemetry, we conduct a systematic full-factorial design space search across 72 MAE configurations and compare them against supervised LSTM and GRU baselines on the task of predicting Total Mud Volume. Results show that the best MAE configuration reduces test mean absolute error by 19.8\% relative to the supervised GRU baseline, while trailing the supervised LSTM baseline by 6.4\%. Analysis of design dimensions reveals that latent space width is the dominant architectural choice (Pearson $r = -0.59$ with test MAE), while masking ratio has negligible effect, an unexpected finding attributed to high temporal redundancy in 1~Hz drilling data. These results establish MAE pretraining as a viable paradigm for drilling analytics and identify the conditions under which it is most beneficial.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将掩码自编码器（MAE）预训练用于钻井遥测指标预测。在Utah FORGE两口地热井约350万时间步的数据上，系统评估了72种MAE配置，结果显示最佳MAE相比监督GRU基线降低19.8%测试MAE，但落后监督LSTM 6.4%。潜在空间宽度是主导设计因素，掩码比例影响可忽略。
AI.motivation: 井下钻井遥测存在基本标注不对称性：地面传感器数据以1Hz连续生成，而有标注的井下测量数据成本高昂、间歇且稀缺。当前机器学习方法普遍采用从头开始的完全监督训练，不适合这种数据体制。
AI.method: 基于两个公开Utah FORGE地热井数据集（约350万时间步的多变量钻井遥测数据），进行全因子设计空间搜索，评估72种MAE配置，并与监督LSTM和GRU基线对比，任务为预测总泥浆体积。
AI.result: 最佳MAE配置相比监督GRU基线降低19.8%测试MAE，但落后监督LSTM基线6.4%。潜在空间宽度是主导架构选择（Pearson r=-0.59），掩码比例影响可忽略，归因于1Hz钻井数据的高时间冗余性。
AI.conclusion: MAE预训练可作为钻井分析的有效范式，并识别了其最有益的条件。

title: Denoising, Fast and Slow: Difficulty-Aware Adaptive Sampling for Image Generation
summary: Diffusion- and flow-based models usually allocate compute uniformly across space, updating all patches with the same timestep and number of function evaluations. While convenient, this ignores the heterogeneity of natural images: some regions are easy to denoise, whereas others benefit from more refinement or additional context. Motivated by this, we explore patch-level noise scales for image synthesis. We find that naively varying timesteps across image tokens performs poorly, as it exposes the model to overly informative training states that do not occur at inference. We therefore introduce a timestep sampler that explicitly controls the maximum patch-level information available during training, and show that moving from global to patch-level timesteps already improves image generation over standard baselines. By further augmenting the model with a lightweight per-patch difficulty head, we enable adaptive samplers that allocate compute dynamically where it is most needed. Combined with noise levels varying over both space and diffusion time, this yields Patch Forcing (PF), a framework that advances easier regions earlier so they can provide context for harder ones. PF achieves superior results on class-conditional ImageNet, remains orthogonal to representation alignment and guidance methods, and scales to text-to-image synthesis. Our results suggest that patch-level denoising schedules provide a promising foundation for adaptive image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Patch Forcing (PF)框架，通过逐补丁级别的噪声调度，根据图像区域的难易程度动态分配计算资源，在ImageNet和文本到图像合成中取得优于统一调度的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散和流模型对所有图像区域使用统一的噪声调度和计算量，忽略了自然图像中不同区域的异质性（有些区域易于去噪，有些需要更多精炼或上下文信息）。
AI.method: 1) 提出逐补丁时间步采样器，显式控制训练时最大补丁级信息量；2) 引入轻量级逐补丁难度头，实现自适应采样；3) 结合空间和扩散时间上变化的噪声水平，形成Patch Forcing框架，优先推进简单区域以为难区域提供上下文。
AI.result: 在类条件ImageNet上取得优越结果，与表征对齐和引导方法正交，可扩展到文本到图像合成。
AI.conclusion: 逐补丁去噪调度为自适应图像生成提供了有前景的基础。

title: Taint-Style Vulnerability Detection and Confirmation for Node.js Packages Using LLM Agent Reasoning
summary: The rapidly evolving Node$.$js ecosystem currently includes millions of packages and is a critical part of modern software supply chains, making vulnerability detection of Node$.$js packages increasingly important.
