However, traditional program analysis struggles in this setting because of dynamic JavaScript features and the large number of package dependencies. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) and the emerging paradigm of LLM-based agents offer an alternative to handcrafted program models. This raises the question of whether an LLM-centric, tool-augmented approach can effectively detect and confirm taint-style vulnerabilities (e.g., arbitrary command injection) in Node$.$js packages. We implement LLMVD$.$js, a multi-stage agent pipeline to scan code, propose vulnerabilities, generate proof-of-concept exploits, and validate them through lightweight execution oracles; and systematically evaluate its effectiveness in taint-style vulnerability detection and confirmation in Node$.$js packages without dedicated static/dynamic analysis engines for path derivation. For packages from public benchmarks, LLMVD$.$js confirms 84% of the vulnerabilities, compared to less than 22% for prior program analysis tools. It also outperforms a prior LLM-program-analysis hybrid approach while requiring neither vulnerability annotations nor prior vulnerability reports. When evaluated on a set of 260 recently released packages (without vulnerability groundtruth information), traditional tools produce validated exploits for few ($\leq 2$) packages, while LLMVD$.$js generates validated exploits for 36 packages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLMVD.js，一个基于LLM的多阶段智能体管道，用于检测和确认Node.js包中的污点类漏洞。该方法通过代码扫描、漏洞提议、生成PoC利用及轻量级执行验证，在基准测试中确认了84%的漏洞（传统工具<22%），并在260个新包中为36个生成可验证利用（传统工具≤2个）。
AI.motivation: Node.js生态系统规模庞大且动态特性强，传统程序分析难以有效检测漏洞。LLM和基于LLM的智能体提供了一种替代方案，但以LLM为中心、工具增强的方法能否有效检测和确认Node.js包中的污点类漏洞仍是一个开放问题。
AI.method: 实现LLMVD.js——一个多阶段智能体管道：(1) 扫描代码；(2) 提出漏洞；(3) 生成PoC利用；(4) 通过轻量级执行预言机进行验证。无需专用的静态/动态分析引擎进行路径推导。
AI.result: 在公开基准测试中确认84%的漏洞（传统工具<22%），优于先前的LLM-程序分析混合方法且无需漏洞标注或先验报告。在260个新发布包中，传统工具仅对≤2个包生成可验证利用，而LLMVD.js对36个包生成了可验证利用。
AI.conclusion: 以LLM为中心、工具增强的多阶段智能体方法在Node.js包污点类漏洞检测和确认上显著优于传统程序分析工具和先前的LLM混合方法，是一种有效的替代方案。

title: Mosaic: An Extensible Framework for Composing Rule-Based and Learned Motion Planners
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables, submitted at 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots & Systems
summary: Safe and explainable motion planning remains a central challenge in autonomous driving. While rule-based planners offer predictable and explainable behavior, they often fail to grasp the complexity and uncertainty of real-world traffic. Conversely, learned planners exhibit strong adaptability but suffer from reduced transparency and occasional safety violations. We introduce Mosaic, an extensible framework for structured decision-making that integrates both paradigms through arbitration graphs. By decoupling trajectory verification and scoring from the generation of trajectories by individual planners, every decision becomes transparent and traceable. Trajectory verification at a higher level introduces redundancy between the planners, limiting emergency braking to the rare case where all planners fail to produce a valid trajectory. Through unified scoring and optimal trajectory selection, rule-based and learned planners with complementary strengths and weaknesses can be combined to yield the best of both worlds. In experimental evaluation on nuPlan, Mosaic achieves 95.48 CLS-NR and 93.98 CLS-R on the Val14 closed-loop benchmark, setting a new state of the art, while reducing at-fault collisions by 30% compared to either planner in isolation. On the interPlan benchmark, focused on highly interactive and difficult scenarios, Mosaic scores 54.30 CLS-R, outperforming its best constituent planner by 23.3% - all without retraining or requiring additional data. The code is available at github.com/KIT-MRT/mosaic.

AI.tldr: Summary generation failed
AI.motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable
AI.method: Method extraction failed
AI.result: Result analysis unavailable
AI.conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

title: Replicable Bandits with UCB based Exploration
summary: We study replicable algorithms for stochastic multi-armed bandits (MAB) and linear bandits with UCB (Upper Confidence Bound) based exploration. A bandit algorithm is $ρ$-replicable if two executions using shared internal randomness but independent reward realizations, produce the same action sequence with probability at least $1-ρ$. Prior work is primarily elimination-based and, in linear bandits with infinitely many actions, relies on discretization, leading to suboptimal dependence on the dimension $d$ and $ρ$. We develop optimistic alternatives for both settings. For stochastic multi-armed bandits, we propose RepUCB, a replicable batched UCB algorithm and show that it attains a regret $O\!\left(\frac{K^2\log^2 T}{ρ^2}\sum_{a:Δ_a>0}\left(Δ_a+\frac{\log(KT\log T)}{Δ_a}\right)\right)$. For stochastic linear bandits, we first introduce RepRidge, a replicable ridge regression estimator that satisfies both a confidence guarantee and a $ρ$-replicability guarantee. Beyond its role in our bandit algorithm, this estimator and its guarantees may also be of independent interest in other statistical estimation settings. We then use RepRidge to design RepLinUCB, a replicable optimistic algorithm for stochastic linear bandits, and show that its regret is bounded by $\widetilde{O}\!\big(\big(d+\frac{d^3}ρ\big)\sqrt{T}\big)$. This improves the best prior regret guarantee by a factor of $O(d/ρ)$, showing that our optimistic algorithm can substantially reduce the price of replicability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究随机多臂老虎机和线性老虎机中可复现的乐观算法（UCB系列），提出了RepUCB和RepLinUCB算法，分别实现了更优的遗憾界，其中RepLinUCB将可复现性代价从O(d/ρ)降低到O(d^3/ρ)。
AI.motivation: 现有可复现bandit算法主要基于消除法，在线性老虎机（无限动作空间）中依赖离散化，导致对维度d和复现参数ρ的依赖次优。本文旨在设计基于乐观探索（UCB）的可复现算法，以降低可复现性带来的性能代价。
AI.method: 对于多臂老虎机，提出RepUCB（可复现的批量化UCB算法）；对于线性老虎机，先提出RepRidge（可复现的岭回归估计器，满足置信度与ρ-可复现性双重保证），再基于RepRidge设计RepLinUCB（可复现的乐观线性UCB算法）。
AI.result: RepUCB的遗憾界为O(K^2 log^2 T/ρ^2 ∑_{a:Δ_a>0} (Δ_a + log(KT log T)/Δ_a))；RepLinUCB的遗憾界为Õ((d + d^3/ρ)√T)，相比此前最优结果提升了O(d/ρ)因子。
AI.conclusion: 乐观方法（UCB框架）能显著降低可复现bandit算法中复现性带来的性能代价，RepRidge估计器本身也具有独立于bandit场景的统计估计价值。

title: BALTIC: A Benchmark and Cross-Domain Strategy for 3D Reconstruction Across Air and Underwater Domains Under Varying Illumination
summary: Robust 3D reconstruction across varying environmental conditions remains a critical challenge for robotic perception, particularly when transitioning between air and water. To address this, we introduce BALTIC, a controlled benchmark designed to systematically evaluate modern 3D reconstruction methods under variations in medium and lighting. The benchmark comprises 13 datasets spanning two media (air and water) and three lighting conditions (ambient, artificial, and mixed), with additional variations in motion type, scanning pattern, and initialization trajectory, resulting in a diverse set of sequences. Our experimental setup features a custom water tank equipped with a monocular camera and an HTC Vive tracker, enabling accurate ground-truth pose estimation. We further investigate cross-domain reconstruction by augmenting underwater image sequences with a small number of in-air views captured under similar lighting conditions. We evaluate Structure-from-Motion reconstruction using COLMAP in terms of both trajectory accuracy and scene geometry, and use these reconstructions as input to Neural Radiance Fields and 3D Gaussian Splatting methods. The resulting models are assessed against ground-truth trajectories and in-air references, while rendered outputs are compared using perceptual and photometric metrics. Additionally, we perform a color restoration analysis to evaluate radiometric consistency across domains. Our results show that under controlled, texture-consistent conditions, Gaussian Splatting with simple preprocessing (e.g., white balance correction) can achieve performance comparable to specialized underwater methods, although its robustness decreases in more complex and heterogeneous real-world environments

AI.tldr: BALTIC是一个用于评估空气-水下跨介质3D重建的受控基准，包含13个数据集，覆盖两种介质和三种光照条件。实验发现，经过简单预处理的高斯泼溅法在受控条件下可达到与专用水下方法相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 不同环境条件（尤其是空气与水之间的过渡）下的鲁棒3D重建仍是机器人感知的关键挑战，现有方法缺乏受控基准进行系统评估。
AI.method: 搭建配备单目相机和HTC Vive追踪器的定制水槽，构建13个数据集（两种介质×三种光照条件），并引入跨域重建（水下序列+少量空中视角）。使用COLMAP评估轨迹与场景几何，再将其输入NeRF和3D高斯泼溅法，最终用地面真值轨迹和渲染指标进行评估。
AI.result: 在受控、纹理一致条件下，经白平衡校正的高斯泼溅法性能可媲美专用水下方法；但在更复杂的真实环境中鲁棒性下降。
AI.conclusion: BALTIC基准揭示了跨介质重建的挑战，并为方法评估提供了标准化平台。

title: Failure Identification in Imitation Learning Via Statistical and Semantic Filtering
comment: 8 pages, Appendix coming soon, accepted at ICRA 2026
summary: Imitation learning (IL) policies in robotics deliver strong performance in controlled settings but remain brittle in real-world deployments: rare events such as hardware faults, defective parts, unexpected human actions, or any state that lies outside the training distribution can lead to failed executions. Vision-based Anomaly Detection (AD) methods emerged as an appropriate solution to detect these anomalous failure states but do not distinguish failures from benign deviations. We introduce FIDeL (Failure Identification in Demonstration Learning), a policy-independent failure detection module. Leveraging recent AD methods, FIDeL builds a compact representation of nominal demonstrations and aligns incoming observations via optimal transport matching to produce anomaly scores and heatmaps. Spatio-temporal thresholds are derived with an extension of conformal prediction, and a Vision-Language Model (VLM) performs semantic filtering to discriminate benign anomalies from genuine failures. We also introduce BotFails, a multimodal dataset of real-world tasks for failure detection in robotics. FIDeL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, yielding +5.30% percent AUROC in anomaly detection and +17.38% percent failure-detection accuracy on BotFails compared to existing methods.

AI.tldr: FIDeL是一种策略无关的机器人失败检测模块，利用异常检测、最优传输匹配、共形预测扩展和视觉-语言模型，在模拟异常中区分真实故障与良性偏差，在BotFails数据集上异常检测AUROC提升5.30%，故障检测准确率提升17.38%。
AI.motivation: 机器人模仿学习策略在真实部署中因罕见事件（硬件故障、零件缺陷、意外人机交互等分布外状态）而表现脆弱，现有视觉异常检测方法无法区分故障与良性偏差，亟需能够识别真实故障的检测模块。
AI.method: FIDeL框架包含三个核心组件：(1) 基于最优传输的异常评分构建，通过对齐测试观测与正常示范的紧凑表示生成异常分数和热力图；(2) 共形预测扩展推导时空阈值；(3) 视觉-语言模型进行语义过滤，区分良性异常与真实故障。
AI.result: 在BotFails数据集上，FIDeL在异常检测任务中AUROC提升5.30%，故障检测准确率相比现有方法提升17.38%，持续优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FIDeL作为一种策略无关的即插即用模块，能有效提升机器人系统在真实部署中的鲁棒性，通过语义过滤机制成功区分了异常检测中难以辨别的故障与良性偏差，并提供了可解释的热力图输出。

title: PortraitDirector: A Hierarchical Disentanglement Framework for Controllable and Real-time Facial Reenactment
summary: Existing facial reenactment methods struggle with a trade-off between expressiveness and fine-grained controllability. Holistic facial reenactment models often sacrifice granular control for expressiveness, while methods designed for control may struggle with fidelity and robust disentanglement. Instead of treating facial motion as a monolithic signal, we explore an alternative compositional perspective. In this paper, we introduce PortraitDirector, a novel framework that formulates face reenactment as a hierarchical composition task, achieving high-fidelity and controllable results. We employ a Hierarchical Motion Disentanglement and Composition strategy, deconstructing facial motion into a Spatial Layer for physical movements and a Semantic Layer for emotional content. The Spatial Layer comprises: (i) global head pose, managed via a dedicated representation and injection pathway; (ii) spatially separated local facial expressions, distilled from cropped facial regions and purged of emotional cues via Emotion-Filtering Module leveraging an information bottleneck. The Semantic Layer contains a derived global emotion. The disentangled components are then recomposed into an expressive motion latent. Furthermore, we engineer the framework for real-time performance through a suite of optimizations, including diffusion distillation, causal attention and VAE acceleration. PortraitDirector achieves streaming, high-fidelity, controllable 512 x 512 face reenactment at 20 FPS with a end-to-end 800 ms latency on a single 5090 GPU.

AI.tldr: PortraitDirector提出分层运动解耦与组合框架，将面部运动分解为空间层（头部姿态+局部表情）和语义层（全局情感），通过信息瓶颈过滤情绪线索，实现高保真、可控的实时面部重演（512×512 @20FPS，延迟800ms）。
AI.motivation: 现有面部重演方法在表现力和细粒度可控性之间存在权衡：整体模型牺牲粒度控制，而可控方法则在保真度和鲁棒解耦上表现不佳。作者探索将面部运动视为组合性信号而非单一整体的替代视角。
AI.method: 提出分层运动解耦与组合（Hierarchical Motion Disentanglement and Composition）策略：空间层处理全局头部姿态（专用表征与注入路径）和空间分离的局部表情（裁剪面部区域+情感过滤模块使用信息瓶颈净化情感线索）；语义层提取全局情感。解耦组件重组为表现性运动潜码。通过扩散蒸馏、因果注意力、VAE加速实现实时性能。
AI.result: 在单张5090 GPU上实现流式、高保真、可控的512×512面部重演，帧率20FPS，端到端延迟800ms。
AI.conclusion: 通过将面部运动分解为空间层（物理运动）和语义层（情感内容）的分层组合视角，PortraitDirector有效解决了表现力与可控性之间的权衡，同时通过工程优化实现了实时性能。

title: Continuous Semantic Caching for Low-Cost LLM Serving
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) become increasingly popular, caching responses so that they can be reused by users with semantically similar queries has become a vital strategy for reducing inference costs and latency. Existing caching frameworks have proposed to decide which query responses to cache by assuming a finite, known universe of discrete queries and learning their serving costs and arrival probabilities. As LLMs' pool of users and queries expands, however, such an assumption becomes increasingly untenable: real-world LLM queries reside in an infinite, continuous embedding space. In this paper, we establish the first rigorous theoretical framework for semantic LLM response caching in continuous query space under uncertainty. To bridge the gap between discrete optimization and continuous representation spaces, we introduce dynamic $ε$-net discretization coupled with Kernel Ridge Regression. This design enables the system to formally quantify estimation uncertainty and generalize partial feedback on LLM query costs across continuous semantic query neighborhoods. We develop both offline learning and online adaptive algorithms optimized to reduce switching costs incurred by changing the cached responses. We prove that our online algorithm achieves a sublinear regret bound against an optimal continuous oracle, which reduces to existing bounds for discrete query models. Extensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that our framework approximates the continuous optimal cache well while also reducing computational and switching overhead compared to existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文首次为连续查询空间下的语义LLM响应缓存建立了严格的理论框架，通过动态ε-网离散化与核岭回归相结合的方法，在不确定性下实现了缓存策略的优化，并证明了在线算法具有次线性遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM缓存框架假设查询空间是有限、已知的离散集合，然而实际应用中LLM查询位于无限连续的嵌入空间，这一假设不再成立。亟需建立适用于连续查询空间的语义缓存理论框架。
AI.method: 引入动态ε-网离散化将连续空间离散化，并结合核岭回归（KRR）量化估计不确定性；设计离线学习与在线自适应算法，优化因缓存响应变更产生的切换成本。
AI.result: 在线算法在连续oracle下达到次线性遗憾界，可归约至现有离散查询模型的上界；实验表明框架能有效逼近连续最优缓存，同时降低计算与切换开销。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了连续查询空间语义缓存的理论空白，为大规模LLM推理缓存提供了兼具理论保证与实用性的解决方案。

title: KD-Judge: A Knowledge-Driven Automated Judge Framework for Functional Fitness Movements on Edge Devices
summary: Functional fitness movements are widely used in training, competition, and health-oriented exercise programs, yet consistently enforcing repetition (rep) standards remains challenging due to subjective human judgment, time constraints, and evolving rules. Existing AI-based approaches mainly rely on learned scoring or reference-based comparisons and lack explicit rule-based, limiting transparency and deterministic rep-level validation. To address these limitations, we propose KD-Judge, a novel knowledge-driven automated judging framework for functional fitness movements. It converts unstructured rulebook standards into executable, machine-readable representations using an LLM-based retrieval-augmented generation and chain-of-thought rule-structuring pipeline. The structured rules are then incorporated by a deterministic rule-based judging system with pose-guided kinematic reasoning to assess rep validity and temporal boundaries. To improve efficiency on edge devices, including a high-performance desktop and the resource-constrained Jetson AGX Xavier, we introduce a dual strategy caching mechanism that can be selectively applied to reduce redundant and unnecessary computation. Experiments demonstrate reliable rule-structuring performance and accurate rep-level assessment, with judgment evaluation conducted on the CFRep dataset, achieving faster-than-real-time execution (real-time factor (RTF) < 1). When the proposed caching strategy is enabled, the system achieves up to 3.36x and 15.91x speedups on resource-constrained edge device compared to the non-caching baseline for pre-recorded and live-streaming scenarios, respectively. These results show that KD-Judge enables transparent, efficient, and scalable rule-grounded rep-level analysis that can complement human judging in practice.

AI.tldr: KD-Judge是一个知识驱动的自动化评判框架，利用LLM将非结构化规则转换为可执行的机器表示，结合确定性规则评判系统和姿态引导的运动学推理，实现功能健身动作的精准rep级别评估，在CFRep数据集上达到超实时执行速度，并通过双策略缓存机制在边缘设备上实现高达15.91倍的加速。
AI.motivation: 现有AI评判方法主要依赖学习评分或参考比较，缺乏基于显式规则的透明性和确定性rep级别验证能力，而人工评判存在主观性、时间限制和规则演变等问题。
AI.method: 提出KD-Judge框架：(1) 利用LLM结合检索增强生成和思维链规则结构化流水线，将非结构化规则手册转换为可执行表示；(2) 设计确定性规则评判系统，结合姿态引导运动学推理评估rep有效性和时间边界；(3) 引入双策略缓存机制，在边缘设备上选择性减少冗余和不必要计算。
AI.result: 在CFRep数据集上实现可靠的规则结构化和准确的rep级别评估，达到超实时执行（RTF<1）。缓存策略在资源受限边缘设备上，预录和直播场景分别实现高达3.36倍和15.91倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: KD-Judge实现了透明、高效、可扩展的基于规则的rep级别分析，能够在实际场景中补充人工评判。

title: Robust Continual Unlearning against Knowledge Erosion and Forgetting Reversal
summary: As a means to balance the growth of the AI industry with the need for privacy protection, machine unlearning plays a crucial role in realizing the ``right to be forgotten'' in artificial intelligence. This technique enables AI systems to remove the influence of specific data while preserving the rest of the learned knowledge. Although it has been actively studied, most existing unlearning methods assume that unlearning is performed only once. In this work, we evaluate existing unlearning algorithms in a more realistic scenario where unlearning is conducted repeatedly, and in this setting, we identify two critical phenomena: (1) Knowledge Erosion, where the accuracy on retain data progressively degrades over unlearning phases, and (2) Forgetting Reversal, where previously forgotten samples become recognizable again in later phases. To address these challenges, we propose SAFER (StAbility-preserving Forgetting with Effective Regularization), a continual unlearning framework that maintains representation stability for retain data while enforcing negative logit margins for forget data. Extensive experiments show that SAFER mitigates not only knowledge erosion but also forgetting reversal, achieving stable performance across multiple unlearning phases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAFER框架，解决连续遗忘场景中的知识侵蚀和遗忘反转问题，通过保持表征稳定性和负logit边界约束，实现多次遗忘后的稳定性能。
AI.motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法大多假设仅执行一次遗忘，不适用于实际中需要多次连续遗忘的场景。本文发现多次遗忘会导致两个关键问题：知识侵蚀（保留数据准确率逐渐下降）和遗忘反转（已遗忘样本重新可识别），亟需解决这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出SAFER框架，包含两个核心机制：(1)对保留数据维持表征稳定性，(2)对遗忘数据强制执行负logit边界，从而在连续遗忘中保持模型性能稳定。
AI.result: 实验表明SAFER有效缓解了知识侵蚀和遗忘反转，在多次遗忘阶段中实现了稳定的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: SAFER框架为连续遗忘场景提供了有效解决方案，平衡了隐私保护与模型性能保持，推进了机器遗忘在现实场景中的应用。

title: Empirical Prediction of Pedestrian Comfort in Mobile Robot Pedestrian Encounters
summary: Mobile robots joining public spaces like sidewalks must care for pedestrian comfort. Many studies consider pedestrians' objective safety, for example, by developing collision avoidance algorithms, but not enough studies take the pedestrian's subjective safety or comfort into consideration. Quantifying comfort is a major challenge that hinders mobile robots from understanding and responding to human emotions. We empirically look into the relationship between the mobile robot-pedestrian interaction kinematics and subjective comfort. We perform one-on-one experimental trials, each involving a mobile robot and a volunteer. Statistical analysis of pedestrians' reported comfort versus the kinematic variables shows moderate but significant correlations for most variables. Based on these empirical findings, we design three comfort estimators/predictors derived from the minimum distance, the minimum projected time-to-collision, and a composite estimator. The composite estimator employs all studied kinematic variables and reaches the highest prediction rate and classifying performance among the predictors. The composite predictor has an odds ratio of 3.67. In simple terms, when it identifies a pedestrian as comfortable, it is almost 4 times more likely that the pedestrian is comfortable rather than uncomfortable. The study provides a comfort quantifier for incorporating pedestrian feelings into path planners for more socially compliant robots.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过实验探究了移动机器人与行人交互的运动学变量与行人主观舒适度之间的关系，并基于最小距离、最小预测碰撞时间等变量设计了舒适度预测器，其中复合预测器达到了最佳分类性能（优势比3.67），为将行人感受融入机器人路径规划提供了量化依据。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注行人客观安全（如碰撞避免算法），但缺乏对行人主观安全或舒适度的考量，而量化舒适度是让移动机器人理解并响应人类情感的主要挑战。
AI.method: 进行一对一实验，每次涉及一个移动机器人和一名志愿者；通过统计分析行人报告的舒适度与运动学变量之间的关系；基于最小距离、最小预测碰撞时间及复合方法设计三种舒适度估计器/预测器。
AI.result: 大多数运动学变量与行人舒适度之间存在中等但显著的统计相关性；复合预测器（使用所有运动学变量）达到最高预测率和分类性能，优势比为3.67。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了一个舒适度量化器，可用于将行人感受融入路径规划器，从而实现更具社会合规性的机器人行为。

title: EgoMotion: Hierarchical Reasoning and Diffusion for Egocentric Vision-Language Motion Generation
summary: Faithfully modeling human behavior in dynamic environments is a foundational challenge for embodied intelligence. While conditional motion synthesis has achieved significant advances, egocentric motion generation remains largely underexplored due to the inherent complexity of first-person perception. In this work, we investigate Egocentric Vision-Language (Ego-VL) motion generation. This task requires synthesizing 3D human motion conditioned jointly on first-person visual observations and natural language instructions. We identify a critical \textit{reasoning-generation entanglement} challenge: the simultaneous optimization of semantic reasoning and kinematic modeling introduces gradient conflicts. These conflicts systematically degrade the fidelity of multimodal grounding and motion quality. To address this challenge, we propose a hierarchical generative framework \textbf{EgoMotion}. Inspired by the biological decoupling of cognitive reasoning and motor control, EgoMotion operates in two stages. In the Cognitive Reasoning stage, A vision-language model (VLM) projects multimodal inputs into a structured space of discrete motion primitives. This forces the VLM to acquire goal-consistent representations, effectively bridging the semantic gap between high-level perceptual understanding and low-level action execution. In the Motion Generation stage, these learned representations serve as expressive conditioning signals for a diffusion-based motion generator. By performing iterative denoising within a continuous latent space, the generator synthesizes physically plausible and temporally coherent trajectories. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that EgoMotion achieves state-of-the-art performance, and produces motion sequences that are both semantically grounded and kinematically superior to existing approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoMotion，一种两阶段分层生成框架，用于解决自我中心视觉-语言（Ego-VL）运动生成中的推理-生成纠缠问题。该方法通过认知推理阶段将多模态输入投影到离散运动基元空间，再由扩散运动生成器合成物理合理的3D人体运动，在语义理解和运动质量上均达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 动态环境中人类行为的逼真建模是具身智能的基础挑战。现有条件运动合成虽有进展，但自我中心运动生成因第一人称感知的固有复杂性而未被充分探索。该方法旨在解决Ego-VL运动生成中语义推理与运动建模同时优化时产生的梯度冲突问题。
AI.method: 提出EgoMotion分层生成框架，包含两个阶段：(1) 认知推理阶段：利用VLM将多模态输入投影到离散运动基元的结构化空间，获取目标一致的表征，弥合高层感知理解与低层动作执行之间的语义鸿沟；(2) 运动生成阶段：学习到的表征作为扩散运动生成器的条件信号，在连续潜空间中进行迭代去噪，合成物理合理且时间连贯的轨迹。
AI.result: 大量实验表明EgoMotion达到最先进性能，生成的运动序列在语义基础和运动学质量上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 受生物认知推理与运动控制分离机制启发，EgoMotion通过两阶段解耦有效解决了推理-生成纠缠问题，验证了分层架构在自我中心运动生成任务中的有效性。

title: Vision-and-Language Navigation for UAVs: Progress, Challenges, and a Research Roadmap
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV-VLN) represents a pivotal challenge in embodied artificial intelligence, focused on enabling UAVs to interpret high-level human commands and execute long-horizon tasks in complex 3D environments. This paper provides a comprehensive and structured survey of the field, from its formal task definition to the current state of the art. We establish a methodological taxonomy that charts the technological evolution from early modular and deep learning approaches to contemporary agentic systems driven by large foundation models, including Vision-Language Models (VLMs), Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, and the emerging integration of generative world models with VLA architectures for physically-grounded reasoning. The survey systematically reviews the ecosystem of essential resources simulators, datasets, and evaluation metrics that facilitates standardized research. Furthermore, we conduct a critical analysis of the primary challenges impeding real-world deployment: the simulation-to-reality gap, robust perception in dynamic outdoor settings, reasoning with linguistic ambiguity, and the efficient deployment of large models on resource-constrained hardware. By synthesizing current benchmarks and limitations, this survey concludes by proposing a forward-looking research roadmap to guide future inquiry into key frontiers such as multi-agent swarm coordination and air-ground collaborative robotics.

AI.tldr: 本文对无人机视觉-语言导航（UAV-VLN）领域进行了全面的结构化综述，从任务定义到最新进展，建立了从早期模块化方法到基于大型基础模型（如VLM、VLA）的当代智能体系统的技术分类法，系统梳理了模拟器、数据集和评估指标等生态系统，并批判性分析了仿真到现实迁移、动态环境感知、语言歧义推理和资源受限部署等核心挑战，最后提出了多智能体协同和空地协作机器人等未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: UAV-VLN是具身人工智能中的关键挑战，旨在使无人机能够理解高级人类指令并在复杂3D环境中执行长时域任务。该领域缺乏系统的结构化综述，因此需要进行全面的技术梳理和未来方向展望。
AI.method: 建立了方法学分类法，追踪技术演进：从早期模块化方法和深度学习方法，到基于大型基础模型的智能体系统（VLM、VLA），以及生成式世界模型与VLA架构在物理接地推理中的新兴融合。系统综述了模拟器、数据集和评估指标等标准化研究资源。
AI.result: 识别了阻碍实际部署的主要挑战：仿真到现实的迁移差距、动态户外环境中的鲁棒感知、语言歧义推理、以及大型模型在资源受限硬件上的高效部署。
AI.conclusion: 通过综合当前基准和局限性，提出了前瞻性研究路线图，指导未来在多智能体集群协调和空地协作机器人等前沿方向的研究。

title: Multi-modal Test-time Adaptation via Adaptive Probabilistic Gaussian Calibration
summary: Multi-modal test-time adaptation (TTA) enhances the resilience of benchmark multi-modal models against distribution shifts by leveraging the unlabeled target data during inference. Despite the documented success, the advancement of multi-modal TTA methodologies has been impeded by a persistent limitation, i.e., the lack of explicit modeling of category-conditional distributions, which is crucial for yielding accurate predictions and reliable decision boundaries. Canonical Gaussian discriminant analysis (GDA) provides a vanilla modeling of category-conditional distributions and achieves moderate advancement in uni-modal contexts. However, in multi-modal TTA scenario, the inherent modality distribution asymmetry undermines the effectiveness of modeling the category-conditional distribution via the canonical GDA. To this end, we introduce a tailored probabilistic Gaussian model for multi-modal TTA to explicitly model the category-conditional distributions, and further propose an adaptive contrastive asymmetry rectification technique to counteract the adverse effects arising from modality asymmetry, thereby deriving calibrated predictions and reliable decision boundaries. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance under a wide range of distribution shifts. The code is available at https://github.com/XuJinglinn/AdaPGC.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多模态测试时自适应（TTA）中缺乏显式类别条件分布建模的问题，提出了一种改进的概率高斯模型（AdaPGC），通过自适应对比不对称矫正技术来缓解模态分布不对称带来的负面影响，从而获得校准的预测和可靠的决策边界，在多种分布偏移场景下达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有TTA方法缺乏对类别条件分布的显式建模，而传统高斯判别分析（GDA）虽能提供简单建模但在多模态场景下受限于模态分布不对称性，难以有效发挥作用。
AI.method: 提出了一种针对多模态TTA的定制化概率高斯模型来显式建模类别条件分布，并设计了自适应对比不对称矫正（Adaptive Contrastive Asymmetry Rectification）技术来抵消模态不对称带来的不利影响，从而获得校准的预测和可靠的决策边界。
AI.result: 在多种基准数据集和广泛的分布偏移场景下，该方法达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模类别条件分布并矫正模态不对称性，有效提升了多模态TTA在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和准确性。

title: AgentSOC: A Multi-Layer Agentic AI Framework for Security Operations Automation
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables. Peer-reviewed paper published in IEEE ICAIC 2026 (IEEE Xplore)
summary: Security Operations Centers (SOCs) increasingly encounter difficulties in correlating heterogeneous alerts, interpreting multi-stage attack progressions, and selecting safe and effective response actions. This study introduces AgentSOC, a multi-layered agentic AI framework that enhances SOC automation by integrating perception, anticipatory reasoning, and risk-based action planning. The proposed architecture consolidates several layers of abstraction to provide a single operational loop to support normalizing alerts, enriching context, generating hypotheses, validating structural feasibility, and executing policy-compliant responses. Conceptually evaluated within a large enterprise environment, AgentSOC improves triage consistency, anticipates attackers' intentions, and provides recommended containment options that are both operationally feasible and well-balanced between security efficacy and operational impact. The results suggest that hybrid agentic reasoning has the potential to serve as a foundation for developing adaptive, safer SOC automation in large enterprises. Additionally, a minimal Proof-Of-Concept (POC) demonstration using LANL authentication data demonstrated the feasibility of the proposed architecture.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgentSOC——一种多层智能体AI框架，通过整合感知、预期推理和基于风险的行动规划来增强安全运营中心(SOC)自动化，在大规模企业环境中实现告警标准化、上下文丰富化、假设生成、结构可行性验证和策略合规响应执行。
AI.motivation: SOC在处理异构告警关联、解释多阶段攻击进程以及选择安全有效的响应动作方面面临日益增长的困难。
AI.method: 提出多层智能体AI架构AgentSOC，包含多个抽象层以形成统一运营循环，支持告警标准化、上下文丰富、假设生成、结构可行性验证和策略合规响应执行。
AI.result: 概念评估显示AgentSOC提升了研判一致性、能够预测攻击者意图，并提供兼具安全效能和运营可行性的响应建议；基于LANL认证数据的最小化概念验证(POC)验证了架构可行性。
AI.conclusion: 混合智能体推理有潜力作为大型企业自适应、更安全的SOC自动化基础。

title: A Mechanistic Analysis of Sim-and-Real Co-Training in Generative Robot Policies
summary: Co-training, which combines limited in-domain real-world data with abundant surrogate data such as simulation or cross-embodiment robot data, is widely used for training generative robot policies. Despite its empirical success, the mechanisms that determine when and why co-training is effective remain poorly understood. We investigate the mechanism of sim-and-real co-training through theoretical analysis and empirical study, and identify two intrinsic effects governing performance. The first, \textbf{``structured representation alignment"}, reflects a balance between cross-domain representation alignment and domain discernibility, and plays a primary role in downstream performance. The second, the \textbf{``importance reweighting effect"}, arises from domain-dependent modulation of action weighting and operates at a secondary level. We validate these effects with controlled experiments on a toy model and extensive sim-and-sim and sim-and-real robot manipulation experiments. Our analysis offers a unified interpretation of recent co-training techniques and motivates a simple method that consistently improves upon prior approaches. More broadly, our aim is to examine the inner workings of co-training and to facilitate research in this direction.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论分析和实验研究，揭示了sim-and-real协同训练中两种内在机制：结构化表征对齐（主要作用）和重要性重加权效应（次要作用），并提出了统一解释框架和改进方法。
AI.motivation: 虽然协同训练在生成式机器人策略中广泛应用，但其有效性的内在机制尚不明确，本文旨在从理论上解释何时及为何协同训练有效。
AI.method: 通过理论分析识别两种效应，并在玩具模型、sim-and-sim以及sim-and-real机器人操作实验中进行受控验证。
AI.result: 结构化表征对齐（平衡跨域表征对齐与域可区分性）主导下游性能，重要性重加权效应（域依赖的动作加权调制）起次要作用。
AI.conclusion: 为近期协同训练技术提供了统一解释，并提出了一种持续优于先前方法的简单改进方法，有助于理解协同训练的内部工作机制。

title: Achieving the Kesten-Stigum bound in the non-uniform hypergraph stochastic block model
summary:
We study the community detection problem in the non-uniform hypergraph stochastic block model (HSBM), where hyperedges of varying sizes coexist. This setting captures higher-order and multi-view interactions and raises a fundamental question: can multiple uniform hypergraph layers below the detection threshold be combined to enable weak recovery? We answer this question by establishing a Kesten--Stigum-type bound for weak recovery in a general class of non-uniform HSBMs with $r$ blocks, generated according to multiple symmetric probability tensors. In the case $r=2$, we show that weak recovery is possible whenever the sum of the signal-to-noise ratios across all uniform hypergraph layers exceeds one, thereby confirming the positive part of a conjecture in (Chodrow et al., 2023). Moreover, we provide a polynomial-time spectral algorithm that achieves this threshold via an optimally weighted non-backtracking operator. For the unweighted non-backtracking matrix, our spectral method attains a different algorithmic threshold, also conjectured in (Chodrow et al., 2023).
  Our approach develops a spectral theory for weighted non-backtracking operators on non-uniform hypergraphs, including a precise characterization of outlier eigenvalues and eigenvector overlaps. We introduce a novel Ihara--Bass formula tailored to weighted non-uniform hypergraphs, which yields an efficient low-dimensional representation and leads to a provable spectral reconstruction algorithm. Taken together, these results provide a principled and computationally efficient approach to clustering in non-uniform hypergraphs, and highlight the role of optimal weighting in aggregating heterogeneous higher-order interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非均匀超图随机块模型(HSBM)中的社区检测问题。针对多大小超边共存的情形，建立了弱恢复的Kesten-Stigum型界，证明当所有均匀超图层的信噪比之和超过1时弱恢复是可能的，并提供了达到该阈值的多项式时间谱算法。引入加权非回溯算子的光谱理论及新型Ihara-Bass公式，实现了非均匀超图的高效谱聚类。
AI.motivation: 探究在非均匀超图HSBM中，多个低于检测阈值的均匀超图层能否通过组合实现弱恢复，解决Chodrow等人提出的猜想。
AI.method: 通过建立非均匀超图加权非回溯算子的光谱理论（包括离群特征值和特征向量重叠的精确刻画），提出新型Ihara-Bass公式以实现低维表示，并设计基于最优权重的多项式时间谱算法。
AI.result: 在r=2块情形下，证明了当所有均匀超图层的信噪比之和超过1时弱恢复是可能的（验证了猜想的正部）；加权非回溯算子达到此阈值，而未加权版本达到另一不同阈值（亦为猜想内容）。
AI.conclusion: 提供了非均匀超图中基于最优权重聚合异构高阶交互的原则性且计算高效的聚类方法，揭示了最优权重在聚合中的关键作用。

title: The Essence of Balance for Self-Improving Agents in Vision-and-Language Navigation
summary: In vision-and-language navigation (VLN), self-improvement from policy-induced experience, using only standard VLN action supervision, critically depends on balancing behavioral diversity and learning stability, which governs whether the agent can extract a reliable learning signal for improvement. Increasing behavioral diversity is necessary to expose alternative action hypotheses but can destabilize policy-induced learning signals, whereas overly conservative stability constraints suppress exploration and induce early commitment, making reliable self-improvement difficult. To address this challenge, we propose Stability-Diversity Balance (SDB), a plug-and-play mechanism for balanced self-improvement in VLN. SDB expands each decision step into multiple latent behavioral hypotheses by applying controlled shifts in the instruction-conditioned hidden states, and then performs reliability-aware soft evaluation and aggregation to retain diverse yet instruction-consistent alternatives during learning. An explicit regularizer further constrains hypothesis interactions, preventing excessive drift or premature collapse of hypothesis diversity and stabilizing self-improvement without discarding training signals. Experiments on R2R, SOON, and REVERIE show consistent improvements; for example, on REVERIE val-unseen, SDB improves SPL from 33.73 to 35.93 and OSR from 51.07 to 54.25.

AI.tldr: 提出稳定性-多样性平衡（SDB）机制，通过在VLN中扩展潜在行为假设并进行可靠性感知的软评估与聚合，平衡行为多样性与学习稳定性，实现可靠的自我改进。
AI.motivation: VLN自我改进中，行为多样性与学习稳定性之间存在根本性矛盾：多样性有助于探索新策略但会破坏学习信号稳定性，而过强的稳定性约束会抑制探索导致过早收敛，使得可靠的自我改进难以实现。
AI.method: SDB包含三个核心组件：1) 对指令条件化隐藏状态施加受控偏移，将每个决策步骤扩展为多个潜在行为假设；2) 可靠性感知的软评估与聚合，保留多样且与指令一致的假设；3) 显式正则化项约束假设间交互，防止过度漂移或假设多样性过早崩溃。
AI.result: 在R2R、SOON和REVERIE数据集上均取得一致改进，以REVERIE val-unseen为例：SPL从33.73提升至35.93，OSR从51.07提升至54.25。
AI.conclusion: SDB作为即插即用机制，能有效平衡VLN自我改进中的稳定性与多样性，通过保留多样化但指令一致的假设并加以正则化约束，显著提升了导航性能。

title: ESCAPE: Episodic Spatial Memory and Adaptive Execution Policy for Long-Horizon Mobile Manipulation
summary: Coordinating navigation and manipulation with robust performance is essential for embodied AI in complex indoor environments. However, as tasks extend over long horizons, existing methods often struggle due to catastrophic forgetting, spatial inconsistency, and rigid execution. To address these issues, we propose ESCAPE (Episodic Spatial Memory Coupled with an Adaptive Policy for Execution), operating through a tightly coupled perception-grounding-execution workflow. For robust perception, ESCAPE features a Spatio-Temporal Fusion Mapping module to autoregressively construct a depth-free, persistent 3D spatial memory, alongside a Memory-Driven Target Grounding module for precise interaction mask generation. To achieve flexible action, our Adaptive Execution Policy dynamically orchestrates proactive global navigation and reactive local manipulation to seize opportunistic targets. ESCAPE achieves state-of-the-art performance on the ALFRED benchmark, reaching 65.09% and 60.79% success rates in test seen and unseen environments with step-by-step instructions. By reducing redundant exploration, our ESCAPE attains substantial improvements in path-length-weighted metrics and maintains robust performance (61.24% / 56.04%) even without detailed guidance for long-horizon tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ESCAPE框架，通过时空融合建图、记忆驱动目标定位和自适应执行策略，在ALFRED基准上实现了65.09%（测试可见）和60.79%（测试不可见）的成功率，并在长时域任务中保持鲁棒性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在长时域导航与操作任务中面临灾难性遗忘、空间不一致和刚性执行三大问题，缺乏鲁棒且灵活的协调机制。
AI.method: ESCAPE包含三个核心模块：1) 时空融合建图模块，自回归构建无深度依赖的持久3D空间记忆；2) 记忆驱动目标定位模块，生成精确交互掩码；3) 自适应执行策略，动态协调全局导航与局部操作，捕捉机会性目标。
AI.result: 在ALFRED基准上，ESCAPE在逐步指令下测试可见/不可见环境分别达到65.09%/60.79%成功率；在无详细指导的长时域任务中仍保持61.24%/56.04%的鲁棒性能。
AI.conclusion: ESCAPE通过紧耦合的感知-定位-执行流程，有效减少了冗余探索，在路径长度加权指标上获得显著提升，证明了记忆驱动与自适应策略在长时域具身AI任务中的有效性。

title: Evaluation of Winning Solutions of 2025 Low Power Computer Vision Challenge
summary: The IEEE Low-Power Computer Vision Challenge (LPCVC) aims to promote the development of efficient vision models for edge devices, balancing accuracy with constraints such as latency, memory capacity, and energy use. The 2025 challenge featured three tracks: (1) Image classification under various lighting conditions and styles, (2) Open-Vocabulary Segmentation with Text Prompt, and (3) Monocular Depth Estimation. This paper presents the design of LPCVC 2025, including its competition structure and evaluation framework, which integrates the Qualcomm AI Hub for consistent and reproducible benchmarking. The paper also introduces the top-performing solutions from each track and outlines key trends and observations. The paper concludes with suggestions for future computer vision competitions.

AI.tldr: IEEE LPCVC 2025挑战赛包含三个赛道（图像分类、开放词汇分割、单目深度估计），采用高通AI Hub进行基准测试，总结了各赛道最优方案及未来竞赛建议。
AI.motivation: 推动边缘设备上高效视觉模型的发展，在精度与延迟、内存、能耗等约束之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 设计了三赛道竞赛结构，集成Qualcomm AI Hub实现一致且可复现的基准测试评估框架。
AI.result: 提出了各赛道最优解决方案，并总结了关键趋势和观察结果。
AI.conclusion: 给出了未来计算机视觉竞赛的建议，强调边缘设备上效率与精度的平衡。

title: Are LLM Uncertainty and Correctness Encoded by the Same Features? A Functional Dissociation via Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Large language models can be uncertain yet correct, or confident yet wrong, raising the question of whether their output-level uncertainty and their actual correctness are driven by the same internal mechanisms or by distinct feature populations. We introduce a 2x2 framework that partitions model predictions along correctness and confidence axes, and uses sparse autoencoders to identify features associated with each dimension independently. Applying this to Llama-3.1-8B and Gemma-2-9B, we identify three feature populations that play fundamentally different functional roles. Pure uncertainty features are functionally essential: suppressing them severely degrades accuracy. Pure incorrectness features are functionally inert: despite showing statistically significant activation differences between correct and incorrect predictions, the majority produce near-zero change in accuracy when suppressed. Confounded features that encode both signals are detrimental to output quality, and targeted suppression of them yields a 1.1% accuracy improvement and a 75% entropy reduction, with effects transferring across the ARC-Challenge and RACE benchmarks. The feature categories are also informationally distinct: the activations of just 3 confounded features from a single mid-network layer predict model correctness (AUROC ~0.79), enabling selective abstention that raises accuracy from 62% to 81% at 53% coverage. The results demonstrate that uncertainty and correctness are distinct internal phenomena, with implications for interpretability and targeted inference-time intervention.

AI.tldr: 本文利用稀疏自编码器将模型预测按正确性和置信度分解，发现三类特征：纯不确定性特征（功能关键）、纯不正确特征（功能惰性）、混杂特征（有害但可预测正确性），抑制混杂特征可提升准确率1.1%并降低75%熵值，3个混杂特征即可预测正确性（AUROC~0.79），实现选择性弃权将准确率从62%提升至81%。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型可能不确定但正确，或自信但错误，这引发了一个问题：输出层面的不确定性与实际正确性是否由相同的内部机制驱动，还是由不同的特征群体驱动。
AI.method: 提出一个2×2框架，沿正确性和置信度两个轴对模型预测进行划分，使用稀疏自编码器独立识别与每个维度相关的特征。在Llama-3.1-8B和Gemma-2-9B上进行实验，通过抑制特定特征观察对准确率的影响。
AI.result: 发现三类特征群体：纯不确定性特征（抑制后准确率严重下降）、纯不正确特征（抑制后准确率几乎不变）、混杂特征（抑制后准确率提升1.1%，熵值降低75%）。仅3个来自单层中间层的混杂特征即可预测正确性（AUROC~0.79），选择性弃权将准确率从62%提升至81%。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性与正确性是分离的内部现象，具有不同的功能角色，对可解释性和推理时定向干预具有重要意义。

title: Generative Texture Filtering
summary: We present a generative method for texture filtering, which exhibits surprisingly good performance and generalizability. Our core idea is to empower texture filtering by taking full advantage of the strong learned image prior of pre-trained generative models. To this end, we propose to fine-tune a pre-trained generative model via a two-stage strategy. Specifically, we first conduct supervised fine-tuning on a very small set of paired images, and then perform reinforcement fine-tuning on a large-scale unlabeled dataset under the guidance of a reward function that quantifies the quality of texture removal and structure preservation. Extensive experiments show that our method clearly outperforms previous methods, and is effective to deal with previously challenging cases. Our code is available at https://github.com/OnlyZZZZ/Generative_Texture_Filtering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成式模型的纹理过滤方法，通过两阶段微调预训练生成模型（先在有标签小数据集上监督微调，再在大规模无标签数据集上强化微调），在纹理去除和结构保持方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有纹理过滤方法在处理复杂纹理时性能有限，作者希望利用预训练生成模型强大的图像先验知识来提升纹理过滤的效果和泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用两阶段微调策略：第一阶段在少量配对图像上进行监督微调；第二阶段在大规模无标签数据集上使用强化学习微调，奖励函数同时量化纹理去除质量和结构保持程度。
AI.result: 该方法在纹理过滤任务上显著优于以往方法，能够有效处理此前具有挑战性的案例，展现出良好的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 预训练生成模型经适当微调后可在纹理过滤任务中发挥强大作用，两阶段训练策略是平衡监督信号与无标签数据利用的有效方案。

title: Explore Like Humans: Autonomous Exploration with Online SG-Memo Construction for Embodied Agents
summary: Constructing structured spatial memory is essential for enabling long-horizon reasoning in complex embodied navigation tasks. Current memory construction predominantly relies on a decoupled, two-stage paradigm: agents first aggregate environmental data through exploration, followed by the offline reconstruction of spatial memory. However, this post-hoc and geometry-centric approach precludes agents from leveraging high-level semantic intelligence, often causing them to overlook navigationally critical landmarks (e.g., doorways and staircases) that serve as fundamental semantic anchors in human cognitive maps. To bridge this gap, we propose ABot-Explorer, a novel active exploration framework that unifies memory construction and exploration into an online, RGB-only process. At its core, ABot-Explorer leverages Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to distill Semantic Navigational Affordances (SNA), which act as cognitive-aligned anchors to guide the agent's movement. By dynamically integrating these SNAs into a hierarchical SG-Memo, ABot-Explorer mirrors human-like exploratory logic by prioritizing structural transit nodes to facilitate efficient coverage. To support this framework, we contribute a large-scale dataset extending InteriorGS with SNA and SG-Memo annotations. Experimental results demonstrate that ABot-Explorer significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods in both exploration efficiency and environment coverage, while the resulting SG-Memo is shown to effectively support diverse downstream tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ABot-Explorer，一种将记忆构建与探索统一为在线RGB-only过程的主动探索框架。它利用大型视觉语言模型（VLMs）提炼语义导航可供性（SNA）作为认知对齐的锚点，并动态整合到层次化SG-Memo中，模仿人类探索逻辑优先遍历结构转节点，在探索效率和环境覆盖上显著超越当前最优方法。
AI.motivation: 现有空间记忆构建采用解耦的两阶段范式（先探索收集数据，再离线重建），这种事后且以几何为中心的方法无法利用高层语义智能，导致智能体容易忽略导航关键地标（如门、楼梯），而这些是人类认知地图中的核心语义锚点。
AI.method: 提出ABot-Explorer主动探索框架，核心是使用大型视觉语言模型（VLMs）蒸馏出语义导航可供性（SNA）作为认知对齐的锚点，动态地将SNA整合到层次化场景记忆（SG-Memo）中，实现记忆构建与探索的在线统一。同时贡献了扩展InteriorGS的大规模数据集，包含SNA和SG-Memo标注。
AI.result: 在探索效率和环境覆盖上显著优于当前最先进方法，且生成的SG-Memo能有效支持多种下游任务。
AI.conclusion: 将高层语义智能（VLMs蒸馏的SNA）融入在线探索过程，能够突破传统几何中心范式的局限，使智能体更接近人类的探索逻辑，同时为空间记忆构建提供了新的范式。

title: Evolvable Embodied Agent for Robotic Manipulation via Long Short-Term Reflection and Optimization
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2026 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2026)
summary: Achieving general-purpose robotics requires empowering robots to adapt and evolve based on their environment and feedback. Traditional methods face limitations such as extensive training requirements, difficulties in cross-task generalization, and lack of interpretability. Prompt learning offers new opportunities for self-evolving robots without extensive training, but simply reflecting on past experiences. However, extracting meaningful insights from task successes and failures remains a challenge. To this end, we propose the evolvable embodied agent (EEAgent) framework, which leverages large vision-language models (VLMs) for better environmental interpretation and policy planning. To enhance reflection on past experiences, we propose a long short-term reflective optimization (LSTRO) mechanism that dynamically refines prompts based on both past experiences and newly learned lessons, facilitating continuous self-evolution, thereby enhancing overall task success rates. Evaluations on six VIMA-Bench tasks reveal that our approach sets a new state-of-the-art, notably outperforming baselines in complex scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出EEAgent框架，利用大视觉语言模型和长短期反思优化机制，使机器人无需大量训练即可通过反思过去经验实现自我进化，在VIMA-Bench六个任务上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人方法需要大量训练、跨任务泛化困难且缺乏可解释性，而提示学习为自我进化机器人提供了新机会，但从任务成功与失败中提取有意义洞察仍然是一个挑战。
AI.method: 提出EEAgent框架，利用大视觉语言模型(VLM)增强环境理解和策略规划；提出长短期反思优化(LSTRO)机制，基于过去经验和新学到的教训动态优化提示，实现持续自我进化。
AI.result: 在VIMA-Bench的六个任务上评估，该方法达到新的SOTA，尤其在复杂场景中显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过LSTRO机制使机器人能够基于历史经验和最新反馈动态优化提示，实现无需大量训练的持续自我进化，有效提升任务成功率。

title: Generalization and Membership Inference Attack a Practical Perspective
summary: With the emergence of new evaluation metrics and attack methodologies for Membership Inference Attacks (MIA), it becomes essential to reevaluate previously accepted assumptions. In this paper, we revisit the longstanding debate regarding the correlation between MIA success rates and model generalization using an empirical approach. We focused on employing augmentation techniques and early stopping to enhance model generalization and examined their impact on MIA success rates. We found that utilizing advanced generalization techniques can significantly decrease attack performance, potentially by up to 100 times. Moreover, combining these methods not only improves model generalization but also reduces attack effectiveness by introducing randomness during training. Additionally, our study confirmed the direct impact of generalization on MIA performance through an analysis of over 1K models in a controlled environment.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证方法重新审视了成员推断攻击（MIA）成功率与模型泛化能力之间的长期争议，发现使用数据增强和早停等先进泛化技术可显著降低攻击性能（最高达100倍），且结合多种方法能通过引入训练随机性进一步降低攻击效果，并通过1000+模型的受控实验验证了泛化对MIA性能的直接影响。
AI.motivation: 随着MIA新评估指标和攻击方法的出现，需要重新评估先前关于MIA成功率与模型泛化之间关联的假设。
AI.method: 采用实证研究方法，使用数据增强和早停技术提升模型泛化能力，在受控环境中对1000+模型进行分析，观察这些技术对MIA成功率的影响。
AI.result: 先进的泛化技术可显著降低攻击性能（最高达100倍）；组合使用多种方法不仅提升泛化能力，还通过引入训练随机性降低攻击效果；在1000+模型的受控实验中确认了泛化对MIA性能的直接影响。
AI.conclusion: 模型泛化能力与MIA成功率之间存在直接关联，通过提升泛化能力（如数据增强和早停）可有效防御成员推断攻击。

title: Guiding Distribution Matching Distillation with Gradient-Based Reinforcement Learning
summary: Diffusion distillation, exemplified by Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD), has shown great promise in few-step generation but often sacrifices quality for sampling speed. While integrating Reinforcement Learning (RL) into distillation offers potential, a naive fusion of these two objectives relies on suboptimal raw sample evaluation. This sample-based scoring creates inherent conflicts with the distillation trajectory and produces unreliable rewards due to the noisy nature of early-stage generation. To overcome these limitations, we propose GDMD, a novel framework that redefines the reward mechanism by prioritizing distillation gradients over raw pixel outputs as the primary signal for optimization. By reinterpreting the DMD gradients as implicit target tensors, our framework enables existing reward models to directly evaluate the quality of distillation updates. This gradient-level guidance functions as an adaptive weighting that synchronizes the RL policy with the distillation objective, effectively neutralizing optimization divergence. Empirical results show that GDMD sets a new SOTA for few-step generation. Specifically, our 4-step models outperform the quality of their multi-step teacher and substantially exceed previous DMDR results in GenEval and human-preference metrics, exhibiting strong scalability potential.

AI.tldr: GDMD提出了一种新的扩散蒸馏框架，通过将奖励信号从原始像素输出转移到蒸馏梯度上，解决了分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）中强化学习与蒸馏目标之间的冲突。该方法在4步生成中超越了多步教师模型和之前的DMD结果，在GenEval和人类偏好指标上达到新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散蒸馏方法（如DMD）在追求少步生成速度时会牺牲生成质量。将强化学习（RL）融入蒸馏虽有潜力，但两种目标的简单融合依赖于次优的原始样本评估，这种基于样本的打分方式与蒸馏轨迹存在固有冲突，且早期生成阶段的噪声会导致不可靠的奖励信号。
AI.method: GDMD重新定义了奖励机制，将DMD梯度重新解释为隐式目标张量，优先使用蒸馏梯度而非原始像素输出作为优化的主要信号。梯度级指导作为自适应权重，同步RL策略与蒸馏目标，有效消除优化发散。
AI.result: 4步生成模型在质量上超越了多步教师模型，在GenEval和人类偏好指标上大幅超过之前的DMD结果，展现了强可扩展性，达到了少步生成的新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 通过梯度级奖励机制解决蒸馏与强化学习目标的冲突，GDMD实现了少步生成中速度与质量的更好平衡，为扩散蒸馏提供了一种更可靠的优化框架。

title: Stability Principle Underlying Passive Dynamic Walking of Rimless Wheel
comment: This is a corrected version of the 2012 IEEE CCA paper. A typographical error in Eq. (16) has been corrected
summary: Rimless wheels are known as the simplest model for passive dynamic walking. It is known that the passive gait generated only by gravity effect always becomes asymptotically stable and 1-period because a rimless wheel automatically achieves the two necessary conditions for guaranteeing the asymptotic stability; one is the constraint on impact posture and the other is the constraint on restored mechanical energy. The asymptotic stability is then easily shown by the recurrence formula of kinetic energy. There is room, however, for further research into the inherent stability principle. In this paper, we reconsider the stability of the stance phase based on the linearization of the equation of motion, and investigate the relation between the stability and energy conservation law. Through the mathematical analysis, we provide a greater understanding of the inherent stability principle.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了无辐车轮（rimless wheel）被动行走的稳定性原理，通过运动方程线性化和能量守恒定律分析，揭示了其内在稳定性机制。
AI.motivation: 无辐车轮的被动步态已知是渐进稳定的，但其内在稳定性原理仍有待深入研究。本文旨在通过数学分析，更深入地理解这一稳定性原理。
AI.method: 基于运动方程的线性化方法，重新审视支撑相（stance phase）的稳定性，并研究稳定性与能量守恒定律之间的关系。
AI.result: 无辐车轮自动满足了保证渐进稳定性的两个必要条件：冲击姿态约束和恢复机械能约束，其渐进稳定性可通过动能递推公式简便证明。
AI.conclusion: 通过数学分析，对无辐车轮被动行走的内在稳定性原理提供了更深入的理解。

title: AutoAWG: Adverse Weather Generation with Adaptive Multi-Controls for Automotive Videos
summary: Perception robustness under adverse weather remains a critical challenge for autonomous driving, with the core bottleneck being the scarcity of real-world video data in adverse weather. Existing weather generation approaches struggle to balance visual quality and annotation reusability. We present AutoAWG, a controllable Adverse Weather video Generation framework for Autonomous driving. Our method employs a semantics-guided adaptive fusion of multiple controls to balance strong weather stylization with high-fidelity preservation of safety-critical targets; leverages a vanishing point-anchored temporal synthesis strategy to construct training sequences from static images, thereby reducing reliance on synthetic data; and adopts masked training to enhance long-horizon generation stability. On the nuScenes validation set, AutoAWG significantly outperforms prior state-of-the-art methods: without first-frame conditioning, FID and FVD are relatively reduced by 50.0% and 16.1%; with first-frame conditioning, they are further reduced by 8.7% and 7.2%, respectively. Extensive qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate advantages in style fidelity, temporal consistency, and semantic--structural integrity, underscoring the practical value of AutoAWG for improving downstream perception in autonomous driving. Our code is available at: https://github.com/higherhu/AutoAWG

AI.tldr: AutoAWG是一个面向自动驾驶的可控恶劣天气视频生成框架，通过语义引导的自适应融合控制、消失点锚定的时序合成策略和掩码训练，在保持视觉质量和标注可用性的同时，显著优于现有方法（FID降低50.0%，FVD降低16.1%）。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的感知鲁棒性面临挑战，核心瓶颈是真实世界恶劣天气视频数据的稀缺。现有天气生成方法难以在视觉质量与标注重用性之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 1) 语义引导的自适应融合控制，平衡强天气风格化与安全关键目标的高保真度；2) 消失点锚定的时序合成策略，从静态图像构建训练序列，减少对合成数据的依赖；3) 掩码训练增强长时序生成的稳定性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes验证集上，无首帧条件时FID和FVD分别降低50.0%和16.1%；有首帧条件时进一步降低8.7%和7.2%，在风格保真度、时序一致性和语义结构完整性上均优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: AutoAWG在恶劣天气视频生成方面取得显著进步，对提升自动驾驶下游感知任务具有实用价值，代码已开源。

title: A Multi-Agent Framework with Structured Reasoning and Reflective Refinement for Multimodal Empathetic Response Generation
summary: Multimodal empathetic response generation (MERG) aims to generate emotionally engaging and empathetic responses based on users' multimodal contexts. Existing approaches usually rely on an implicit one-pass generation paradigm from multimodal context to the final response, which overlooks two intrinsic characteristics of MERG: (1) Human perception of emotional cues is inherently structured rather than a direct mapping. The conventional paradigm neglects the hierarchical progression of emotion perception, leading to distorted emotional judgments. (2) Given the inherent complexity and ambiguity of human emotions, the conventional paradigm is prone to significant emotional biases, ultimately resulting in suboptimal empathy. In this paper, we propose a multi-agent framework for MERG, which enhances empathy through structured reasoning and reflective refinement. Specifically, we first introduce a structured empathetic reasoning-to-generation module that explicitly decomposes response generation via multimodal perception, consistency-aware emotion forecasting, pragmatic strategy planning, and strategy-guided response generation, providing a clearer intermediate path from multimodal evidence to response realization. Besides, we develop a global reflection and refinement module, in which a global reflection agent performs step-wise auditing over intermediate states and the generated response, eliminating existing emotional biases and empathy errors, and triggering targeted regeneration. Overall, such a closed-loop framework enables our model to gradually improve the accuracy of emotion perception and eliminate emotion biases during the iteration process. Experiments on several benchmarks, e.g., IEMOCAP and MELD, demonstrate that our model has superior empathic response generation capabilities compared to state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多智能体框架用于多模态共情响应生成，通过结构化推理和反思性优化，解决了现有方法忽略情感感知层次结构和易产生情感偏差的问题，在多个基准上取得最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态共情响应生成方法采用隐式的一次性生成范式，忽略了两个内在特性：(1)人类对情感线索的感知具有层次结构，而非直接映射，导致情感判断失真；(2)人类情感固有的复杂性和模糊性使传统范式容易产生显著的情感偏差，最终导致共情效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出多智能体框架，包含两个核心模块：(1)结构化共情推理-生成模块，将响应生成显式分解为多模态感知、一致性感知的情感预测、语用策略规划和策略引导的响应生成四个步骤；(2)全局反思与优化模块，通过全局反思智能体对中间状态和生成响应进行逐步审计，消除情感偏差和共情错误，触发针对性重新生成，形成闭环迭代优化。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP和MELD等多个基准数据集上，所提模型在共情响应生成能力上优于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化推理和反思性优化的闭环框架，模型能够在迭代过程中逐步提升情感感知的准确性并消除情感偏差，从而显著增强多模态共情响应生成的效果。

title: Chain of Uncertain Rewards with Large Language Models for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Designing effective reward functions is a cornerstone of reinforcement learning (RL), yet it remains a challenging and labor-intensive process due to the inefficiencies and inconsistencies inherent in traditional methods. Existing methods often rely on extensive manual design and evaluation steps, which are prone to redundancy and overlook local uncertainties at intermediate decision points. To address these challenges, we propose the Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR), a novel framework that integrates large language models (LLMs) to streamline reward function design and evaluation in RL environments. Specifically, our CoUR introduces code uncertainty quantification with a similarity selection mechanism that combines textual and semantic analyses to identify and reuse the most relevant reward function components. By reducing redundant evaluations and leveraging Bayesian optimization on decoupled reward terms, CoUR enables a more efficient and robust search for optimal reward feedback. We comprehensively evaluate CoUR across nine original environments from IsaacGym and all 20 tasks from the Bidexterous Manipulation benchmark. The experimental results demonstrate that CoUR not only achieves better performance but also significantly lowers the cost of reward evaluations.

AI.tldr: 提出Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR)框架，利用大语言模型和代码不确定性量化机制，通过相似性选择与贝叶斯优化解耦奖励项，在IsaacGym和Bidexterous Manipulation基准上实现更高效、更低成本的奖励函数设计。
AI.motivation: 传统RL奖励函数设计依赖大量人工且效率低下、易冗余，且忽略了中间决策点的局部不确定性。
AI.method: 集成LLM，引入代码不确定性量化与结合文本及语义分析的相似性选择机制，识别复用最相关的奖励函数组件；通过解耦奖励项并结合贝叶斯优化减少冗余评估，高效搜索最优奖励。
AI.result: 在IsaacGym的9个环境和Bidexterous Manipulation的20个任务上，CoUR不仅取得了更优性能，还显著降低了奖励评估成本。
AI.conclusion: CoUR框架能有效解决传统奖励函数设计的低效与不一致问题，实现更高效、鲁棒的奖励搜索。

title: AdaGScale: Viewpoint-Adaptive Gaussian Scaling in 3D Gaussian Splatting to Reduce Gaussian-Tile Pairs
summary: Reducing the number of Gaussian-tile pairs is one of the most promising approaches to improve 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D-GS) rendering speed on GPUs. However, the importance difference existing among Gaussian-tile pairs has never been considered in the previous works. In this paper, we propose AdaGScale, a novel viewpoint-adaptive Gaussian scaling technique for reducing the number of Gaussian-tile pairs. AdaGScale is based on the observation that the peripheral tiles located far from Gaussian center contribute negligibly to pixel color accumulation. This suggests an opportunity for reducing the number of Gaussian-tile pairs based on color contribution. AdaGScale efficiently estimates the color contribution in the peripheral region of each Gaussian during a preprocessing stage and adaptively scales its size based on the peripheral score. As a result, Gaussians with lower importance intersect with fewer tiles during the intersection test, which improves rendering speed while maintaining image quality. The adjusted size is used only for tile intersection test, and the original size is retained during color accumulation to preserve visual fidelity. Experimental results show that AdaGScale achieves a geometric mean speedup of 13.8x over original 3D-GS on a GPU, with only about 0.5 dB degradation in PSNR on city-scale scenes.

AI.tldr: AdaGScale提出了一种视角自适应的3D高斯缩放技术，通过评估高斯外围区域的颜色贡献，自适应缩小低重要性高斯的尺寸以减少高斯-瓦片对数量，从而在不显著损失图像质量的情况下实现13.8倍渲染加速。
AI.motivation: 现有3D-GS渲染加速方法未考虑不同高斯-瓦片对之间的重要性差异，而外围瓦片对颜色累积贡献极小，存在减少无效计算的机会。
AI.method: 在预处理阶段评估每个高斯外围区域的颜色贡献（外围分数），据此自适应缩放高斯尺寸；缩放后的尺寸仅用于瓦片相交测试，原始尺寸保留用于颜色累积。
AI.result: 在城市场景数据集上，相较于原始3D-GS，几何平均渲染速度提升13.8倍，PSNR仅下降约0.5 dB。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应缩放低重要性高斯以减少相交瓦片数量，可在保持视觉保真度的同时显著提升渲染速度。

title: Auditing and Controlling AI Agent Actions in Spreadsheets
summary: Advances in AI agent capabilities have outpaced users' ability to meaningfully oversee their execution. AI agents can perform sophisticated, multi-step knowledge work autonomously from start to finish, yet this process remains effectively inaccessible during execution, often buried within large volumes of intermediate reasoning and outputs: by the time users receive the output, all underlying decisions have already been made without their involvement. This lack of transparency leaves users unable to examine the agent's assumptions, identify errors before they propagate, or redirect execution when it deviates from their intent. The stakes are particularly high in spreadsheet environments, where process and artifact are inseparable. Each decision the agent makes is recorded directly in cells that belong to and reflect on the user. We introduce Pista, a spreadsheet AI agent that decomposes execution into auditable, controllable actions, providing users with visibility into the agent's decision-making process and the capacity to intervene at each step. A formative study (N = 8) and a within-subjects summative evaluation (N = 16) comparing Pista to a baseline agent demonstrated that active participation in execution influenced not only task outcomes but also users' comprehension of the task, their perception of the agent, and their sense of role within the workflow. Users identified their own intent reflected in the agent's actions, detected errors that post-hoc review would have failed to surface, and reported a sense of co-ownership over the resulting output. These findings indicate that meaningful human oversight of AI agents in knowledge work requires not improved post-hoc review mechanisms, but active participation in decisions as they are made.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pista，一个可审计、可控的电子表格AI智能体，通过将执行过程分解为可干预的步骤，让用户能在决策过程中主动参与，而非事后审查。用户研究发现，这种主动参与机制显著提升了用户对任务的理、对智能体的感知以及任务的共同所有权感。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体在执行复杂、多步骤知识工作时，过程对用户不透明，大量中间推理和输出被隐藏，用户在收到最终输出时所有底层决策已确定，无法检查假设、识别错误或纠正偏差。这在电子表格环境中尤为严重，因为过程和制品不可分离。
AI.method: Pista将执行过程分解为可审计、可控的操作，为用户提供智能体决策过程的可见性以及每一步的干预能力。进行了形成性研究(N=8)和组内设计总结性评估(N=16)，比较Pista与基线智能体。
AI.result: 用户主动参与执行不仅影响任务结果，还影响用户对任务的理解、对智能体的感知以及在工作流中的角色感。用户能在智能体行为中看到自己的意图，发现事后审查无法发现的错误，并对最终输出产生共同所有权感。
AI.conclusion: 对AI智能体在知识工作中的有意义的人类监督，需要的不是改进的事后审查机制，而是在决策过程中主动参与。

title: RadarSplat-RIO: Indoor Radar-Inertial Odometry with Gaussian Splatting-Based Radar Bundle Adjustment
summary: Radar is more resilient to adverse weather and lighting conditions than visual and Lidar simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). However, most radar SLAM pipelines still rely heavily on frame-to-frame odometry, which leads to substantial drift. While loop closure can correct long-term errors, it requires revisiting places and relies on robust place recognition. In contrast, visual odometry methods typically leverage bundle adjustment (BA) to jointly optimize poses and map within a local window. However, an equivalent BA formulation for radar has remained largely unexplored. We present the first radar BA framework enabled by Gaussian Splatting (GS), a dense and differentiable scene representation. Our method jointly optimizes radar sensor poses and scene geometry using full range-azimuth-Doppler data, bringing the benefits of multi-frame BA to radar for the first time. When integrated with an existing radar-inertial odometry frontend, our approach significantly reduces pose drift and improves robustness. Across multiple indoor scenes, our radar BA achieves substantial gains over the prior radar-inertial odometry, reducing average absolute translational and rotational errors by 90% and 80%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个基于高斯溅射的雷达光束法平差框架，利用全范围-方位角-多普勒数据联合优化雷达传感器位姿和场景几何，与雷达惯性里程计前端集成后，在室内场景中将平均绝对平移误差降低90%、旋转误差降低80%。
AI.motivation: 现有雷达SLAM大多依赖帧间里程计导致显著漂移，回环检测虽能修正长期误差但依赖于重访场所和鲁棒的地点识别，而视觉里程计中常用的光束法平差在雷达领域尚未得到探索，因此需要将多帧联合优化的优势引入雷达SLAM。
AI.method: 利用高斯溅射作为密集且可微的场景表示，构建首个雷达BA框架，使用完整范围-方位角-多普勒数据进行联合优化，估计雷达传感器位姿和场景几何，并与现有雷达惯性里程计前端集成。
AI.result: 在多个室内场景中，该方法相较于先前的雷达惯性里程计，平均绝对平移误差降低90%，平均绝对旋转误差降低80%。
AI.conclusion: 基于高斯溅射的雷达光束法平差能够显著减少位姿漂移、提升鲁棒性，首次在雷达领域实现了多帧BA带来的优势。

title: Toward Clinically Acceptable Chest X-ray Report Generation: A Qualitative Retrospective Pilot Study of CXRMate-2
summary:
Chest X-ray (CXR) radiology report generation (RRG) models have shown rapid progress, yet their clinical utility remains uncertain due to limited evaluation by radiologists. We present CXRMate-2, a state-of-the-art CXR RRG model that integrates structured multimodal conditioning and reinforcement learning with a composite reward for semantic alignment with radiologist reports. Across the MIMIC-CXR, CheXpert Plus, and ReXgradient datasets, CXRMate-2 achieves statistically significant improvements over strong benchmarks, including gains of 11.2% and 24.4% in GREEN and RadGraph-XL, respectively, on MIMIC-CXR relative to MedGemma 1.5 (4B).
  To directly compare CXRMate-2 against radiologist reporting, we conduct a blinded, randomised qualitative retrospective evaluation. Three consultant radiologists compare generated and radiologist reports across 120 studies from the MIMIC-CXR test set. Generated reports were deemed acceptable (defined as preferred or rated equally to radiologist reports) in 45% of ratings, with no statistically significant difference in preference rates between radiologist reports and acceptable generated reports for seven of the eight analysed findings. Preference for radiologist reports was driven primarily by higher recall, while generated reports were often preferred for readability.
  Together, these results suggest a credible pathway to clinically acceptable CXR RRG. Improvements in recall, alongside better detection of subtle findings (e.g., pulmonary congestion), are likely sufficient to achieve non-inferiority to radiologist reporting. With these targeted advances, CXR RRG systems may be ready for prospective evaluation in assistive roles within radiologist-led workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CXRMate-2，一种集成了结构化多模态条件约束与强化学习的胸部X光报告生成模型，在MIMIC-CXR等数据集上显著优于现有基准（GREEN提升11.2%，RadGraph-XL提升24.4%）。通过盲法随机定性评估，三位放射科医生对其与放射科医生报告进行了比较，结果显示生成报告在45%的评级中被认为可接受，且在8项发现中有7项偏好率无统计学显著差异。放射科医生报告的偏好主要源于更高的召回率，而生成报告则在可读性上更受青睐。研究认为，进一步提升召回率和对细微发现的检测能力，有望使CXR报告生成系统达到与放射科医生报告的非劣效性，从而具备在前瞻性辅助场景中评估的条件。
AI.motivation: 尽管CXR报告生成模型发展迅速，但其临床效用因缺乏放射科医生的直接评估而存疑。现有评估主要依赖自动指标，无法真实反映临床可接受性。本文旨在通过放射科医生参与的盲法定性评估，系统衡量生成报告与专业报告之间的差距，并探索达到临床可接受水平的可行路径。
AI.method: 1) 模型架构：CXRMate-2采用结构化多模态条件约束（结合图像与结构化信息）和强化学习，并使用复合奖励函数来优化语义对齐。2) 评估方法：在MIMIC-CXR、CheXpert Plus、ReXgradient三个数据集上进行自动指标评估；同时设计盲法随机定性回顾研究，由三位顾问放射科医生对120例MIMIC-CXR测试集样本的生成报告与放射科医生报告进行对比评分，评估可接受性及偏好率。
AI.result: 1) 自动指标：在MIMIC-CXR上，相比MedGemma 1.5 (4B)，GREEN提升11.2%，RadGraph-XL提升24.4%，所有改进均具有统计学显著性。2) 定性评估：生成报告在45%的评级中被认为可接受（即偏好于或等同于放射科医生报告）；在8项发现中，有7项的偏好率与放射科医生报告无统计学显著差异。3) 偏好差异：放射科医生报告的偏好主要源于更高的召回率，而生成报告则在可读性上更受青睐。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，CXR报告生成已具备达到临床可接受水平的可行路径。通过提升召回率并改善对细微发现（如肺淤血）的检测能力，有望实现与放射科医生报告的非劣效性。在此基础上，CXR报告生成系统可进一步在前瞻性辅助角色中进行评估，融入放射科医生主导的工作流程。

title: RobotPan: A 360$^\circ$ Surround-View Robotic Vision System for Embodied Perception
summary: Surround-view perception is increasingly important for robotic navigation and loco-manipulation, especially in human-in-the-loop settings such as teleoperation, data collection, and emergency takeover. However, current robotic visual interfaces are often limited to narrow forward-facing views, or, when multiple on-board cameras are available, require cumbersome manual switching that interrupts the operator's workflow. Both configurations suffer from motion-induced jitter that causes simulator sickness in head-mounted displays. We introduce a surround-view robotic vision system that combines six cameras with LiDAR to provide full 360$^\circ$ visual coverage, while meeting the geometric and real-time constraints of embodied deployment. We further present \textsc{RobotPan}, a feed-forward framework that predicts \emph{metric-scaled} and \emph{compact} 3D Gaussians from calibrated sparse-view inputs for real-time rendering, reconstruction, and streaming. \textsc{RobotPan} lifts multi-view features into a unified spherical coordinate representation and decodes Gaussians using hierarchical spherical voxel priors, allocating fine resolution near the robot and coarser resolution at larger radii to reduce computational redundancy without sacrificing fidelity. To support long sequences, our online fusion updates dynamic content while preventing unbounded growth in static regions by selectively updating appearance. Finally, we release a multi-sensor dataset tailored to 360$^\circ$ novel view synthesis and metric 3D reconstruction for robotics, covering navigation, manipulation, and locomotion on real platforms. Experiments show that \textsc{RobotPan} achieves competitive quality against prior feed-forward reconstruction and view-synthesis methods while producing substantially fewer Gaussians, enabling practical real-time embodied deployment. Project website: https://robotpan.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出RobotPan，一种结合六相机与LiDAR的360°环视机器人视觉系统，通过前馈预测度量尺度且紧凑的3D高斯分布，实现实时渲染、重建与流式传输，在减少高斯数量的同时保持高质量，支持机器人在导航、操作等场景中的实际部署。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人视觉界面多局限于窄前向视野，或需手动切换多相机视角，且头戴显示器中运动抖动易引起晕动症，亟需一种满足几何与实时约束的360°环视系统。
AI.method: 结合六相机与LiDAR提供360°全覆盖；提出RobotPan前馈框架，将多视图特征提升至统一球面坐标表示，利用分层球面体素先验解码紧凑的度量尺度3D高斯；采用在线融合更新动态内容，选择性更新静态区域外观以防止无限增长。
AI.result: RobotPan在保持与现有前馈重建和新视角合成方法相当质量的同时，生成的高斯数量大幅减少，实现了实时的具身部署。
AI.conclusion: 所提系统与框架在机器人导航、操作、 locomotion等场景中具有实用价值，并发布了多传感器数据集以支持360°新视角合成与度量3D重建研究。

title: From Signal Degradation to Computation Collapse: Uncovering the Two Failure Modes of LLM Quantization
summary: Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) is critical for the efficient deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs). While 4-bit quantization is widely regarded as an optimal trade-off, reducing the precision to 2-bit usually triggers a catastrophic ``performance cliff.'' It remains unclear whether the underlying mechanisms differ fundamentally. Consequently, we conduct a systematic mechanistic analysis, revealing two qualitatively distinct failure modes: Signal Degradation, where the computational patterns remain intact but information precision is impaired by cumulative error; and Computation Collapse, where key components fail to function, preventing correct information processing and destroying the signal in the early layers. Guided by this diagnosis, we conduct mechanism-aware interventions, demonstrating that targeted, training-free repair can mitigate Signal Degradation, but remains ineffective for Computation Collapse. Our findings provide a systematic diagnostic framework for PTQ failures and suggest that addressing Computation Collapse requires structural reconstruction rather than mere compensation.

AI.tldr: 论文揭示了LLM后训练量化中2-bit相比4-bit出现“性能悬崖”的两种本质不同的失败机制：信号退化（信息精度受损但计算模式完好）和计算崩溃（关键组件失效导致早期信号破坏），并证明针对性的无训练修复只能缓解前者，后者需要结构性重建。
AI.motivation: 4-bit量化被认为是LLM部署的最优折衷，但降至2-bit会导致灾难性性能下降，且其根本机制是否与4-bit不同尚不清楚，亟需系统性机制分析。
AI.method: 通过系统性机制分析方法，识别出两种定性不同的失败模式：信号退化（计算模式完整但累积误差降低信息精度）和计算崩溃（早期层关键组件失效，破坏信号处理）。并基于诊断结果进行机制感知干预实验。
AI.result: 信号退化可通过无训练的目标性修复缓解，但计算崩溃对此类修复无效；两种模式在本质机制上存在定性差异。
AI.conclusion: 论文建立了PTQ失败的系统性诊断框架，指出计算崩溃需要结构性重建而非简单补偿，为低比特量化提供了理论指导。

title: From Fuzzy to Formal: Scaling Hospital Quality Improvement with AI
summary: Hospital Quality Improvement (QI) plays a critical role in optimizing healthcare delivery by translating high-level hospital goals into actionable solutions. A critical step of QI is to identify the key modifiable contributing factors, a process we call QI factor discovery, typically through expert-driven semi-structured qualitative tools like fishbone diagrams, chart reviews, and Lean Healthcare methods. AI has the potential to transform and accelerate QI factor discovery, which is traditionally time- and resource-intensive and limited in reproducibility and auditability. Nevertheless, current AI alignment methods assume the task is well-defined, whereas QI factor discovery is an exploratory, fuzzy, and iterative sense-making process that relies on complex implicit expert judgments. To design an AI pipeline that formalizes the QI process while preserving its exploratory components, we propose viewing the task as learning not only LLM prompts but also the overarching natural-language specifications. In particular, we map QI factor discovery to steps of the classical AI/ML development process (problem formalization, model learning, and model validation) where the specifications are tunable hyperparameters. Domain experts and AI agents iteratively refine both the overarching specifications and AI pipeline until AI extractions are concordant with expert annotations and aligned with clinical objectives. We applied this "Human-AI Spec-Solution Co-optimization" framework at an urban safety-net hospital to identify factors driving prolonged length of stay and unplanned 30-day readmissions. The resulting AI-for-QI pipelines achieved $\ge 70\%$ concordance with expert annotations. Compared to prior manual Lean analyses, the AI pipeline was substantially more efficient, recovered previous findings, surfaced new modifiable factors, and produced auditable reasoning traces.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种"人机规范-方案协同优化"框架，将医院质量改进中的因素发现这一模糊探索性任务形式化为AI/ML开发流程，通过领域专家与AI智能体迭代优化规范与方案，并在安全网医院的实际应用中实现了≥70%的专家标注一致性，比传统方法更高效、可审计且能发现新因素。
AI.motivation: 医院质量改进(QI)中的因素发现传统上依赖专家驱动的半结构化定性工具（如鱼骨图、图表审查、精益医疗方法），耗时耗资源且缺乏可重复性和可审计性。AI有潜力加速这一过程，但现有AI对齐方法假设任务是明确定义的，而QI因素发现是探索性、模糊且迭代的，依赖复杂的隐式专家判断。
AI.method: 将QI因素发现映射到经典AI/ML开发流程的三个步骤（问题形式化、模型学习、模型验证），其中将自然语言规范视为可调超参数。领域专家与AI智能体迭代协同优化顶层规范与AI流水线，直到AI提取结果与专家标注一致且符合临床目标。该框架应用于城市安全网医院，识别导致住院时间延长和30天非计划再入院的因素。
AI.result: AI-for-QI流水线达到了≥70%的专家标注一致性。相比传统精益分析方法，该AI流水线效率显著提高，复现了已有发现，发现了新的可修改因素，并产生了可审计的推理轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的"人机规范-方案协同优化"框架有效形式化了QI因素发现这一模糊探索性任务，在保留其探索性组件的同时实现了高效、可审计的AI辅助分析，验证了将顶层规范作为可调超参数进行迭代优化的方法在真实临床环境中的可行性。

title: Robust Energy-Aware Routing for Air-Ground Cooperative Multi-UAV Delivery in Wind-Uncertain Environments
summary: Ensuring energy feasibility under wind uncertainty is critical for the safety and reliability of UAV delivery missions. In realistic truck-drone logistics systems, UAVs must deliver parcels and safely return under time-varying wind conditions that are only partially observable during flight. However, most existing routing approaches assume static or deterministic energy models, making them unreliable in dynamic wind environments. We propose Battery-Efficient Routing (BER), an online risk-sensitive planning framework for wind-sensitive truck-assisted UAV delivery. The problem is formulated as routing on a time dependent energy graph whose edge costs evolve according to wind-induced aerodynamic effects. BER continuously evaluates return feasibility while balancing instantaneous energy expenditure and uncertainty-aware risk. The approach is embedded in a hierarchical aerial-ground delivery architecture that combines task allocation, routing, and decentralized trajectory execution. Extensive simulations on synthetic ER graphs generated in Unreal Engine environments and quasi-real wind logs demonstrate that BER significantly improves mission success rates and reduces wind-induced failures compared with static and greedy baselines. These results highlight the importance of integrating real-time energy budgeting and environmental awareness for UAV delivery planning under dynamic wind conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Battery-Efficient Routing (BER)框架，一种面向风敏感 truck-assisted UAV 投递的在线风险敏感规划方法，通过时变能量图建模风致气动效应，实时评估返航可行性并平衡能量消耗与不确定性风险，在合成ER图和真实风数据仿真中显著提升任务成功率并降低风致故障。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机配送路径规划方法大多采用静态或确定性能耗模型，无法应对动态风环境下部分可观测的风况变化，导致实际物流系统中无人机无法可靠地完成配送并安全返航。
AI.method: 将问题建模为时变能量图上的路由问题，边成本随风致气动效应动态演化；BER在线评估返航可行性，综合权衡瞬时能量消耗与不确定性感知风险；嵌入层次化空地协同配送架构（任务分配、路径规划、分布式轨迹执行）。
AI.result: 在Unreal Engine生成的合成ER图和准真实风数据日志上，BER相比静态和贪心基线方法显著提升任务成功率并降低风致故障率。
AI.conclusion: 将实时能量预算与环境感知集成到无人机配送规划中，对动态风条件下的可靠运行至关重要。

title: Bridging Foundation Models and ASTM Metallurgical Standards for Automated Grain Size Estimation from Microscopy Images
comment: Accepted at the 11th IEEE Workshop on Computer Vision for Multimodal Microscopy Image Analysis (CVMI), CVPR Workshops 2026
summary: Extracting standardized metallurgical metrics from microscopy images remains challenging due to complex grain morphology and the data demands of supervised segmentation. To bridge foundational computer vision with practical metallurgical evaluation, we propose an automated pipeline for dense instance segmentation and grain size estimation that adapts Cellpose-SAM to microstructures and integrates its topology-aware gradient tracking with an ASTM E112 Jeffries planimetric module. We systematically benchmark this pipeline against a classical convolutional network (U-Net), an adaptive-prompting vision foundation model (MatSAM) and a contemporary vision-language model (Qwen2.5-VL-7B). Our evaluations reveal that while the out-of-the-box vision-language model struggles with the localized spatial reasoning required for dense microscopic counting and MatSAM suffers from over-segmentation despite its domain-specific prompt generation, our adapted pipeline successfully maintains topological separation. Furthermore, experiments across progressively reduced training splits demonstrate exceptional few-shot scalability; utilizing only two training samples, the proposed system predicts the ASTM grain size number (G) with a mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) as low as 1.50%, while robustness testing across varying target grain counts empirically validates the ASTM 50-grain sampling minimum. These results highlight the efficacy of application-level foundation model integration for highly accurate, automated materials characterization. Our project repository is available at https://github.com/mueez-overflow/ASTM-Grain-Size-Estimator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将Cellpose-SAM适配于金相图像的自动化流水线，用于密集实例分割和晶粒度估计，并在少量样本（2张训练图像）下实现ASTM晶粒度号G的MAPE低至1.50%，优于U-Net、MatSAM和Qwen2.5-VL-7B等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 从显微图像中提取标准化的冶金学指标因晶粒形态复杂和有监督分割数据需求大而面临挑战，亟需将基础视觉模型桥接至实际冶金评估。
AI.method: 提出将Cellpose-SAM适配于微观结构，结合拓扑感知梯度跟踪与ASTM E112 Jeffries平面测量法，构建端到端的密集实例分割与晶粒度估计流水线，并与U-Net、MatSAM、Qwen2.5-VL-7B进行系统对比。
AI.result: 仅用2张训练样本即可预测ASTM晶粒度号G，MAPE低至1.50%；在不同目标晶粒数量下验证了ASTM 50粒采样最小值；视觉语言模型（Qwen2.5-VL-7B）在密集微观计数中表现不佳，MatSAM存在过分割问题。
AI.conclusion: 应用级基础模型集成能够高效实现高精度自动化材料表征，验证了少样本场景下该方法的优越性和实际应用潜力。

title: Information Aggregation with AI Agents
summary: Can Large Language Models (AI agents) aggregate dispersed private information through trading and reason about the knowledge of others by observing price movements? We conduct a controlled experiment where AI agents trade in a prediction market after receiving private signals, measuring information aggregation by the log error of the last price. We find that although the median market is effective at aggregating information in the easy information structures, increasing the complexity has a significant and negative impact, suggesting that AI agents may suffer from the same limitations as humans when reasoning about others. Consistent with our theoretical predictions, information aggregation remains unaffected by allowing cheap talk communication, changing the duration of the market or initial price, and strategic prompting-thus demonstrating that prediction markets are robust. We establish that "smarter" AI agents perform better at aggregation and they are more profitable. Surprisingly, giving them feedback about past performance makes them worse at aggregation and reduces their profits.

AI.tldr: 通过控制实验发现，LLM智能体在预测市场中能有效聚合简单信息，但信息结构复杂度增加会显著降低聚合效果；市场在允许廉价谈话、改变市场时长或初始价格时表现稳健，但给予历史表现反馈反而损害聚合能力与盈利能力。
AI.motivation: 探究大语言模型（AI智能体）能否像人类一样通过交易聚合分散的私有信息，并透过价格变动推理他人的知识。
AI.method: 设计受控实验，让AI智能体在收到私有信号后在预测市场中交易，以最后价格的对数误差衡量信息聚合效果，并系统操纵信息结构复杂度、交流方式、市场时长、初始价格、智能体智能水平及反馈机制。
AI.result: 中位数市场在简单信息结构下聚合有效；复杂度增加显著损害聚合效果；廉价谈话、市场时长、初始价格和策略提示对聚合无显著影响；更聪明的智能体聚合更好且利润更高；给予历史反馈反而降低聚合表现和利润。
AI.conclusion: AI智能体在推理他人知识时存在与人类相似的局限性，但预测市场机制本身具有稳健性；历史反馈对聚合有负面作用，提示设计时需谨慎。

title: Learning-Based Sparsification of Dynamic Graphs in Robotic Exploration Algorithms
summary: Many robotic exploration algorithms rely on graph structures for frontier-based exploration and dynamic path planning. However, these graphs grow rapidly, accumulating redundant information and impacting performance. We present a transformer-based framework trained with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to prune these graphs during exploration, limiting their growth and reducing the accumulation of excess information.
