The framework was evaluated on simulations of a robotic agent using Rapidly Exploring Random Trees (RRT) to carry out frontier-based exploration, where the learned policy reduces graph size by up to 96%. We find preliminary evidence that our framework learns to associate pruning decisions with exploration outcomes despite sparse, delayed reward signals. We also observe that while intelligent pruning achieves a lower rate of exploration compared to baselines, it yields the lowest standard deviation, producing the most consistent exploration across varied environments. To the best of our knowledge, these results are the first suggesting the viability of RL in sparsification of dynamic graphs used in robotic exploration algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于Transformer和PPO的强化学习框架，用于在机器人探索过程中动态剪枝RRT图结构，将图大小减少高达96%，虽探索速率略低于基线但标准差最低、一致性最强，首次验证了RL在机器人探索动态图稀疏化中的可行性。
AI.motivation: 机器人探索算法中使用的图结构（如RRT）会快速增长，积累冗余信息，影响性能。现有方法缺乏对图进行智能剪枝以控制其增长的有效手段。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构，使用PPO算法训练剪枝策略，在采用RRT进行前沿探索的机器人仿真环境中执行图剪枝。
AI.result: 剪枝策略将图大小减少高达96%；探索速率略低于基线，但标准差最低，在不同环境中表现最一致。
AI.conclusion: 初步证明了RL在动态图稀疏化中的可行性，模型能在稀疏延迟奖励信号下学习将剪枝决策与探索结果关联。

title: TriEx: A Game-based Tri-View Framework for Explaining Internal Reasoning in Multi-Agent LLMs
summary: Explainability for Large Language Model (LLM) agents is especially challenging in interactive, partially observable settings, where decisions depend on evolving beliefs and other agents. We present \textbf{TriEx}, a tri-view explainability framework that instruments sequential decision making with aligned artifacts: (i) structured first-person self-reasoning bound to an action, (ii) explicit second-person belief states about opponents updated over time, and (iii) third-person oracle audits grounded in environment-derived reference signals. This design turns explanations from free-form narratives into evidence-anchored objects that can be compared and checked across time and perspectives. Using imperfect-information strategic games as a controlled testbed, we show that TriEx enables scalable analysis of explanation faithfulness, belief dynamics, and evaluator reliability, revealing systematic mismatches between what agents say, what they believe, and what they do. Our results highlight explainability as an interaction-dependent property and motivate multi-view, evidence-grounded evaluation for LLM agents. Code is available at https://github.com/Einsam1819/TriEx.

AI.tldr: TriEx是一个三视角可解释性框架，通过结构化的第一人称自我推理、明确的第二人称信念状态和第三人称先知审计，将LLM智能体的解释从自由形式叙述转变为可跨时间与视角比较和检验的证据锚定对象。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在交互式、部分可观测环境中的可解释性面临挑战，因为决策依赖于不断演化的信念和其他智能体。现有解释多为自由形式叙述，缺乏可比较和检验的证据基础。
AI.method: 提出TriEx三视角可解释性框架：(i) 第一人称结构化自我推理（绑定到具体动作）；(ii) 第二人称显式信念状态（随时间更新对手信念）；(iii) 第三人称先知审计（基于环境参考信号）。在不完美信息策略游戏中作为受控测试平台进行验证。
AI.result: TriEx能够对解释的忠实度、信念动态和评估者可靠性进行可扩展分析，揭示智能体所说、所信和所做之间存在系统性不匹配。
AI.conclusion: 可解释性是一种依赖于交互的属性，需要多视角、基于证据的评估方法用于LLM智能体。

title: Singularity Avoidance in Inverse Kinematics: A Unified Treatment of Classical and Learning-based Methods
summary: Singular configurations cause loss of task-space mobility, unbounded joint velocities, and solver divergence in inverse kinematics (IK) for serial manipulators. No existing survey bridges classical singularity-robust IK with rapidly growing learning-based approaches. We provide a unified treatment spanning Jacobian regularization, Riemannian manipulability tracking, constrained optimization, and modern data-driven paradigms. A systematic taxonomy classifies methods by retained geometric structure and robustness guarantees (formal vs. empirical). We address a critical evaluation gap by proposing a benchmarking protocol and presenting experimental results: 12 IK solvers are evaluated on the Franka Panda under position-only IK across four complementary panels measuring error degradation by condition number, velocity amplification, out-of-distribution robustness, and computational cost. Results show that pure learning methods fail even on well-conditioned targets (MLP: 0% success, approx. 10 mm mean error), while hybrid warm-start architectures - IKFlow (59% to 100%), CycleIK(0% to 98.6%), GGIK (0% to 100%) - rescue learned solvers via classical refinement, with DLS converging from initial errors up to 207 mm. Deeper singularity-regime evaluation is identified as immediate future work.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了串联机械臂奇异位形下的逆运动学求解方法，统一了从雅可比正则化、黎曼可操作性跟踪、约束优化到数据驱动方法的完整框架，提出了分类体系、基准测试协议，并在Franka Panda机器人上对12种IK求解器进行了四维度的实验评估，结果显示纯学习方法在良态目标上完全失效，而混合热启动架构通过经典精化显著提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 现有综述缺乏连接经典奇异鲁棒IK与快速发展的基于学习方法之间的桥梁，且缺乏统一的分类体系和标准化评估基准，导致方法选择和应用存在空白。
AI.method: 提出系统性分类法，按保留的几何结构和鲁棒性保证（形式化 vs. 经验性）对方法进行分类；设计包含四个互补面板的基准测试协议（误差退化、速度放大、分布外鲁棒性、计算成本），在Franka Panda机器人上进行位置级IK实验评估12种求解器。
AI.result: 纯学习方法在良态目标上完全失败（MLP：0%成功率，约10 mm平均误差）；混合热启动架构（IKFlow 59%→100%，CycleIK 0%→98.6%，GGIK 0%→100%）通过经典精化显著提升性能；DLS可从高达207 mm的初始误差收敛。
AI.conclusion: 纯学习方法在奇异区域缺乏鲁棒性，混合架构（学习+经典精化）是当前最优策略；更深入的奇异区域评估被确定为未来工作方向。

title: DR-Venus: Towards Frontier Edge-Scale Deep Research Agents with Only 10K Open Data
summary: Edge-scale deep research agents based on small language models are attractive for real-world deployment due to their advantages in cost, latency, and privacy. In this work, we study how to train a strong small deep research agent under limited open-data by improving both data quality and data utilization. We present DR-Venus, a frontier 4B deep research agent for edge-scale deployment, built entirely on open data. Our training recipe consists of two stages. In the first stage, we use agentic supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to establish basic agentic capability, combining strict data cleaning with resampling of long-horizon trajectories to improve data quality and utilization. In the second stage, we apply agentic reinforcement learning (RL) to further improve execution reliability on long-horizon deep research tasks. To make RL effective for small agents in this setting, we build on IGPO and design turn-level rewards based on information gain and format-aware regularization, thereby enhancing supervision density and turn-level credit assignment. Built entirely on roughly 10K open-data, DR-Venus-4B significantly outperforms prior agentic models under 9B parameters on multiple deep research benchmarks, while also narrowing the gap to much larger 30B-class systems. Our further analysis shows that 4B agents already possess surprisingly strong performance potential, highlighting both the deployment promise of small models and the value of test-time scaling in this setting. We release our models, code, and key recipes to support reproducible research on edge-scale deep research agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DR-Venus，一个基于4B小语言模型的边缘级深度研究智能体，通过两阶段训练（监督微调+强化学习）在仅使用约1万条开放数据的情况下，显著超越同规模模型并缩小与30B级系统的差距。
AI.motivation: 边缘侧深度研究智能体在成本、延迟和隐私方面具有优势，但如何在有限开放数据下训练出强性能的小模型是一个挑战，现有方法在数据质量和利用效率上存在不足。
AI.method: 两阶段训练：阶段一采用智能体监督微调（SFT），结合严格数据清洗和长程轨迹重采样；阶段二应用智能体强化学习（RL），基于IGPO设计回合级奖励，利用信息增益和格式感知正则化增强监督密度和信用分配。
AI.result: DR-Venus-4B在多个深度研究基准上显著优于9B以下模型，并缩小了与30B级系统的差距，证明4B小模型具备强大的性能潜力。
AI.conclusion: 小模型在边缘部署中具有巨大潜力，测试时扩展（test-time scaling）在该场景下价值显著，开源模型、代码和关键训练方案可支持可复现研究。

title: Diffusion Sequence Models for Generative In-Context Meta-Learning of Robot Dynamics
comment: Angelo Moroncelli, Matteo Rufolo and Gunes Cagin Aydin contributed equally to this work
summary: Accurate modeling of robot dynamics is essential for model-based control, yet remains challenging under distributional shifts and real-time constraints. In this work, we formulate system identification as an in-context meta-learning problem and compare deterministic and generative sequence models for forward dynamics prediction. We take a Transformer-based meta-model, as a strong deterministic baseline, and introduce to this setting two complementary diffusion-based approaches: (i) inpainting diffusion (Diffuser), which learns the joint input-observation distribution, and (ii) conditioned diffusion models (CNN and Transformer), which generate future observations conditioned on control inputs. Through large-scale randomized simulations, we analyze performance across in-distribution and out-of-distribution regimes, as well as computational trade-offs relevant for control. We show that diffusion models significantly improve robustness under distribution shift, with inpainting diffusion achieving the best performance in our experiments. Finally, we demonstrate that warm-started sampling enables diffusion models to operate within real-time constraints, making them viable for control applications. These results highlight generative meta-models as a promising direction for robust system identification in robotics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将系统辨识建模为上下文元学习问题，比较了确定性模型与扩散生成模型在前向动力学预测中的表现。实验表明，扩散模型在分布偏移下具有更强的鲁棒性，其中填充扩散（inpainting diffusion）效果最佳，且通过热启动采样可在实时控制约束下运行。
AI.motivation: 机器人动力学建模对基于模型的控制至关重要，但在分布偏移和实时性约束下仍具挑战性，现有方法难以兼顾准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将系统辨识形式化为上下文元学习问题；采用Transformer作为确定性基线模型；引入两种扩散方法：（i）填充扩散（Diffuser）学习联合输入-观测分布，（ii）条件扩散模型（CNN和Transformer）根据控制输入生成未来观测。通过大规模随机仿真评估分布内/外性能及计算效率。
AI.result: 扩散模型在分布偏移下显著提升鲁棒性，其中填充扩散性能最优；热启动采样使扩散模型满足实时性要求。
AI.conclusion: 生成式元模型为机器人鲁棒系统辨识提供了有前景的方向。

title: TactileEval: A Step Towards Automated Fine-Grained Evaluation and Editing of Tactile Graphics
comment: Code, data, and models are available at https://TactileEval.github.io/
summary: Tactile graphics require careful expert validation before reaching blind and visually impaired (BVI) learners, yet existing datasets provide only coarse holistic quality ratings that offer no actionable repair signal. We present TactileEval, a three-stage pipeline that takes a first step toward automating this process. Drawing on expert free-text comments from the TactileNet dataset, we establish a five-category quality taxonomy; encompassing view angle, part completeness, background clutter, texture separation, and line quality aligned with BANA standards. We subsequently gathered 14,095 structured annotations via Amazon Mechanical Turk, spanning 66 object classes organized into six distinct families. A reproducible ViT-L/14 feature probe trained on this data achieves 85.70% overall test accuracy across 30 different tasks, with consistent difficulty ordering suggesting the taxonomy suggesting the taxonomy captures meaningful perceptual structure. Building on these evaluations, we present a ViT-guided automated editing pipeline that routes classifier scores through family-specific prompt templates to produce targeted corrections via gpt-image-1 image editing. Code, data, and models are available at https://TactileEval.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出TactileEval，一个三阶段自动化评估与修复触觉图形质量的流水线。首先基于专家评论建立五类别质量分类体系（视角、部件完整性、背景杂乱、纹理分离、线条质量），然后收集14,095条结构化标注训练ViT-L/14特征探针达到85.70%的测试准确率，最后利用ViT引导的自动化编辑流水线通过GPT-image-1生成针对性修复。
AI.motivation: 触觉图形在被视障学习者使用前需要专家仔细验证，但现有数据集仅提供粗粒度的整体质量评分，缺乏可操作的修复信号，无法指导后续改进。
AI.method: 三阶段流水线：（1）基于专家自由文本评论建立五类别质量分类体系；（2）通过Amazon Mechanical Turk收集14,095条结构化标注，使用ViT-L/14特征探针训练分类器；（3）构建ViT引导的自动化编辑流水线，将分类器得分路由至家族特定提示模板，调用GPT-image-1生成针对性修正。
AI.result: ViT-L/14特征探针在30个不同任务上达到85.70%总体测试准确率，难度排序保持一致，表明分类体系捕获了有意义的感知结构。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次实现了触觉图形质量评估与自动化修复的初步自动化，为视障学习者提供了可操作的质量反馈与修复信号。

title: Boundary Sampling to Learn Predictive Safety Filters via Pontryagin's Maximum Principle
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Safety filters provide a practical approach for enforcing safety constraints in autonomous systems. While learning-based tools scale to high-dimensional systems, their performance depends on informative data that includes states likely to lead to constraint violation, which can be difficult to efficiently sample in complex, high-dimensional systems. In this work, we characterize trajectories that barely avoid safety violations using the Pontryagin Maximum Principle. These boundary trajectories are used to guide data collection for learned Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability, concentrating learning efforts near safety-critical states to improve efficiency. The learned Control Barrier Value Function is then used directly for safety filtering. Simulations and experimental validation on a shared-control automotive racing application demonstrate PMP sampling improves learning efficiency, yielding faster convergence, reduced failure rates, and improved safe set reconstruction, with wall times around 3ms.

AI.tldr: 本文利用庞特里亚金最大值原理(PMP)表征安全边界轨迹，指导安全关键状态附近的数据采集，以提高学习型汉密尔顿-雅可比可达性安全过滤器的学习效率。
AI.motivation: 在高维复杂系统中，学习型安全过滤器依赖于包含可能导致约束违规状态的信息性数据，但这些难以有效采样，现有方法效率不足。
AI.method: 利用庞特里亚金最大值原理(PMP)表征刚好避免安全违规的边界轨迹，用这些边界轨迹指导学习型汉密尔顿-雅可比可达性方法的数据采集，将学习集中到安全关键状态附近；学习的控制障碍值函数直接用于安全过滤。
AI.result: 在共享控制赛车应用的仿真与实验中，PMP采样提高了学习效率，实现更快收敛、降低故障率、改善安全集重建，壁钟时间约3ms。
AI.conclusion: PMP指导的数据采集策略能有效提升高维系统安全过滤器的学习效率，该方法在实时应用中具有可行性。

title: Safe Continual Reinforcement Learning in Non-stationary Environments
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) offers a compelling data-driven paradigm for synthesizing controllers for complex systems when accurate physical models are unavailable; however, most existing control-oriented RL methods assume stationarity and, therefore, struggle in real-world non-stationary deployments where system dynamics and operating conditions can change unexpectedly. Moreover, RL controllers acting in physical environments must satisfy safety constraints throughout their learning and execution phases, rendering transient violations during adaptation unacceptable. Although continual RL and safe RL have each addressed non-stationarity and safety, respectively, their intersection remains comparatively unexplored, motivating the study of safe continual RL algorithms that can adapt over the system's lifetime while preserving safety. In this work, we systematically investigate safe continual reinforcement learning by introducing three benchmark environments that capture safety-critical continual adaptation and by evaluating representative approaches from safe RL, continual RL, and their combinations. Our empirical results reveal a fundamental tension between maintaining safety constraints and preventing catastrophic forgetting under non-stationary dynamics, with existing methods generally failing to achieve both objectives simultaneously. To address this shortcoming, we examine regularization-based strategies that partially mitigate this trade-off and characterize their benefits and limitations. Finally, we outline key open challenges and research directions toward developing safe, resilient learning-based controllers capable of sustained autonomous operation in changing environments.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了安全持续强化学习在非平稳环境中的挑战，发现现有方法难以同时满足安全约束和防止灾难性遗忘，并提出了三种基准环境及正则化策略来缓解这一矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法假设环境平稳，难以应对实际部署中的非平稳变化；同时，物理环境中的RL控制器必须在学习和执行全程满足安全约束，但持续RL和安全性研究的交叉领域尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 构建了三种面向安全关键持续适应的基准环境，系统评估了安全RL、持续RL及其组合的代表性方法，并研究了基于正则化的策略。
AI.result: 实证揭示了安全约束维持与灾难性遗忘防止之间存在根本性矛盾，现有方法普遍无法同时实现两个目标；正则化策略可部分缓解这一权衡。
AI.conclusion: 指出了开发能够在变化环境中持续自主运行的安全弹性学习控制器所面临的关键开放挑战和未来研究方向。

title: Hierarchically Robust Zero-shot Vision-language Models
comment: This paper is accepted by CVPR'26
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) can perform zero-shot classification but are susceptible to adversarial attacks. While robust fine-tuning improves their robustness, existing approaches align fixed text embeddings with an image embedding, sacrificing natural performance and robustness. A robustness degradation also occurs when a model faces adversarial attacks targeting superclasses (parent classes, e.g., mammal) in addition to their base (leaf) classes (e.g., cat). Thus, to enhance adversarial robustness and leverage the inherent hierarchical properties of class space, we propose a novel adversarial fine-tuning framework based on hierarchical embeddings and several levels of adversarially robust alignment of image-text modalities. Additional mechanisms place visual embeddings at the desired depth of hierarchy, and we provide a theoretical connection between the depth of embedding in the hierarchy and the maximum viable margin size. Our model naturally realizes several margin sizes, boosting generalization of adversaries for robustification. As various trees with different parent labels can share the same leaf labels, we also consider aligning over multiple trees to boost semantic variety. Experiments across several datasets are performed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于层次嵌入的对抗性微调框架，通过在视觉-语言模型中引入层级类别空间对抗对齐，提升模型在基础类和超类上的鲁棒性，并理论证明了嵌入深度与最大可行边界的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM的鲁棒微调方法将固定文本嵌入与图像嵌入对齐，牺牲了自然性能和鲁棒性；同时模型面对超类（父类）对抗攻击时会出现鲁棒性退化。因此需要一种能利用类别层次结构来增强对抗鲁棒性的方法。
AI.method: 提出基于层次嵌入的对抗微调框架：1) 在层次结构中不同层级进行图像-文本模态的对抗鲁棒对齐；2) 引入机制将视觉嵌入置于层次结构的期望深度；3) 理论上建立嵌入深度与最大可行边界之间的关系；4) 考虑跨多个层次树进行对齐以增强语义多样性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比现有方法在基础类和超类上均能实现更好的对抗鲁棒性，同时保持了较好的自然性能。
AI.conclusion: 利用类别层次结构进行多层级对抗对齐可以有效提升VLM的鲁棒性，理论分析表明嵌入深度与边界大小存在内在联系，多树对齐进一步增强了语义多样性。

title: Vectorizing Projection in Manifold-Constrained Motion Planning for Real-Time Whole-Body Control
summary: Many robot planning tasks require satisfaction of one or more constraints throughout the entire trajectory. For geometric constraints, manifold-constrained motion planning algorithms are capable of planning collision-free path between start and goal configurations on the constraint submanifolds specified by task. Current state-of-the-art methods can take tens of seconds to solve these tasks for complex systems such as humanoid robots, making real-world use impractical, especially in dynamic settings. Inspired by recent advances in hardware accelerated motion planning, we present a CPU SIMD-accelerated manifold-constrained motion planner that revisits projection-based constraint satisfaction through the lens of parallelization. By transforming relevant components into parallelizable structures, we use SIMD parallelism to plan constraint satisfying solutions. Our approach achieves up to 100-1000x speed-ups over the state-of-the-art, making real-time constrained motion planning feasible for the first time. We demonstrate our planner on a real humanoid robot and show real-time whole-body quasi-static plan generation. Our work is available at https://commalab.org/papers/mcvamp/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CPU SIMD加速的流形约束运动规划器，通过将投影约束满足过程并行化，实现比现有方法快100-1000倍的加速，并在真实人形机器人上展示了实时全身准静态规划能力。
AI.motivation: 现有流形约束运动规划方法对复杂系统（如人形机器人）求解时间长达数十秒，难以满足动态环境下的实时应用需求。
AI.method: 借鉴硬件加速运动规划的最新进展，将基于投影的约束满足过程转化为可并行结构，利用CPU SIMD并行计算实现加速。
AI.result: 相比现有最优方法实现100-1000倍加速，首次使实时约束运动规划成为可行，并在真实人形机器人上完成了实时全身准静态规划。
AI.conclusion: CPU SIMD并行化是加速流形约束运动规划的有效途径，该方法具有实际部署价值。

title: FASTER: Value-Guided Sampling for Fast RL
summary: Some of the most performant reinforcement learning algorithms today can be prohibitively expensive as they use test-time scaling methods such as sampling multiple action candidates and selecting the best one. In this work, we propose FASTER, a method for getting the benefits of sampling-based test-time scaling of diffusion-based policies without the computational cost by tracing the performance gain of action samples back to earlier in the denoising process. Our key insight is that we can model the denoising of multiple action candidates and selecting the best one as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) where the goal is to progressively filter action candidates before denoising is complete. With this MDP, we can learn a policy and value function in the denoising space that predicts the downstream value of action candidates in the denoising process and filters them while maximizing returns. The result is a method that is lightweight and can be plugged into existing generative RL algorithms. Across challenging long-horizon manipulation tasks in online and batch-online RL, FASTER consistently improves the underlying policies and achieves the best overall performance among the compared methods. Applied to a pretrained VLA, FASTER achieves the same performance while substantially reducing training and inference compute requirements. Code is available at https://github.com/alexanderswerdlow/faster .

AI.tldr: FASTER提出了一种将扩散策略的测试时采样计算成本转移到去噪过程早期的方法，通过在去噪空间中建模为MDP来逐步过滤动作候选，从而在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于采样的测试时扩展方法（如采样多个动作候选并选择最佳）虽然能提升强化学习性能，但计算成本过高，限制了其在实际应用中的可行性。
AI.method: 将扩散策略中多个动作候选的去噪与筛选过程建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），在去噪空间中学习策略和价值函数，逐步过滤低价值动作候选，实现早期筛选以节省计算资源。
AI.result: 在在线和批量在线RL的长时域操作任务中，FASTER一致性地提升底层策略性能，达到最佳总体表现；应用于预训练VLA时，在保持同等性能的前提下大幅降低训练和推理计算需求。
AI.conclusion: FASTER是一种轻量级、可即插即用的方法，能够在不增加计算成本的情况下获得基于采样的测试时扩展的性能收益，适用于现有的生成式RL算法。

title: HMR-Net: Hierarchical Modular Routing for Cross-Domain Object Detection in Aerial Images
summary: Despite advances in object detection, aerial imagery remains a challenging domain, as models often fail to generalize across variations in spatial resolution, scene composition, and semantic label coverage. Differences in geographic context, sensor characteristics, and object distributions across datasets limit the capacity of conventional models to learn consistent and transferable representations. Shared methods trained on such data tend to impose a unified representation across fundamentally different domains, resulting in poor performance on region-specific content and less flexibility when dealing with novel object categories. To address this, we propose a novel modular learning framework that enables structured specialization in aerial detection. Our method introduces a hierarchical routing mechanism with two levels of modularity: a global expert assignment layer that uses latent geographic embeddings to route datasets to specialized processing modules, and a local scene decomposition mechanism that allocates image subregions to region-specific sub-modules. This allows our method to specialize across datasets and within complex scenes. Additionally, the framework contains a conditional expert module that uses external semantic information (e.g., category names or textual descriptions) to enable detection of novel object categories during inference, without the need for retraining or fine-tuning. By moving beyond monolithic representations, our method offers an adaptive framework for remote sensing object detection. Comprehensive evaluations on four datasets highlight improvements in multi-dataset generalization, regional specialization, and open-category detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模块化学习框架，通过层级路由机制实现遥感目标检测中的结构化 specialization，支持跨数据集泛化、区域特化和开放类别检测。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测模型在航拍图像上难以泛化，因空间分辨率、场景组成和标签覆盖的差异导致共享表示方法在不同领域表现不佳，缺乏灵活性和区域特化能力。
AI.method: 提出模块化学习框架，包含两级模块化机制：(1) 全局专家分配层，利用潜在地理嵌入将数据集路由至特化处理模块；(2) 局部场景分解机制，将图像子区域分配到区域特定子模块；另包含条件专家模块，利用外部语义信息（类别名称或文本描述）实现推理时检测新类别，无需重训练。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的综合评估表明，该方法在多数据集泛化、区域特化和开放类别检测方面均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法超越了单一 monolithic 表示，为遥感目标检测提供了一种自适应的模块化框架，能够同时应对领域差异、区域特性和新类别检测挑战。

title: Utilizing Inpainting for Keypoint Detection for Vision-Based Control of Robotic Manipulators
summary: In this paper we present a novel visual servoing framework to control a robotic manipulator in the configuration space by using purely natural visual features. Our goal is to develop methods that can robustly detect and track natural features or keypoints on robotic manipulators that would be used for vision-based control, especially for scenarios where placing external markers on the robot is not feasible or preferred at runtime. For the model training process of our data driven approach, we create a data collection pipeline where we attach ArUco markers along the robot's body, label their centers as keypoints, and then utilize an inpainting method to remove the markers and reconstruct the occluded regions. By doing so, we generate natural (markerless) robot images that are automatically labeled with the marker locations. These images are used to train a keypoint detection algorithm, which is used to control the robot configuration using natural features of the robot. Unlike the prior methods that rely on accurate camera calibration and robot models for labeling training images, our approach eliminates these dependencies through inpainting. To achieve robust keypoint detection even in the presence of occlusion, we introduce a second inpainting model, this time to utilize during runtime, that reconstructs occluded regions of the robot in real time, enabling continuous keypoint detection. To further enhance the consistency and robustness of keypoint predictions, we integrate an Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF) that refines the keypoint estimates over time, adding to stable and reliable control performance. We obtained successful control results with this model-free and purely vision-based control strategy, utilizing natural robot features in the runtime, both under full visibility and partial occlusion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自然视觉特征的机器人操控视觉伺服框架，通过数据驱动方法（使用ArUco标记+图像修补生成训练数据）训练关键点检测算法，并结合运行时图像修补和UKF滤波，实现了无模型、纯视觉的机器人构型空间控制，在完全可见和部分遮挡条件下均取得了成功。
AI.motivation: 开发一种无需在机器人上放置外部标记、无需精确相机标定和机器人模型的视觉伺服方法，解决传统方法在运行时无法或不便使用人工标记的场景下的控制需求。
AI.method: (1) 数据收集阶段：在机器人身体上粘贴ArUco标记，标记其中心作为关键点，然后使用图像修补方法去除标记并重建遮挡区域，生成带自动标注的自然（无标记）机器人图像；(2) 训练阶段：用生成的图像训练关键点检测算法；(3) 运行时：使用第二个图像修补模型实时重建机器人被遮挡区域，结合无迹卡尔曼滤波(UKF)平滑关键点估计，实现纯视觉伺服控制。
AI.result: 在完全可见和部分遮挡条件下，该方法均实现了成功的机器人构型控制，验证了无模型、纯视觉控制策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于自然特征（无需外部标记）且不依赖精确标定和模型信息的视觉伺服框架是可行的，图像修补+UKF滤波增强了关键点检测的鲁棒性，为实际场景中的视觉机器人控制提供了新的解决方案。

title: FB-NLL: A Feature-Based Approach to Tackle Noisy Labels in Personalized Federated Learning
summary:
Personalized Federated Learning (PFL) aims to learn multiple task-specific models rather than a single global model across heterogeneous data distributions. Existing PFL approaches typically rely on iterative optimization-such as model update trajectories-to cluster users that need to accomplish the same tasks together. However, these learning-dynamics-based methods are inherently vulnerable to low-quality data and noisy labels, as corrupted updates distort clustering decisions and degrade personalization performance. To tackle this, we propose FB-NLL, a feature-centric framework that decouples user clustering from iterative training dynamics. By exploiting the intrinsic heterogeneity of local feature spaces, FB-NLL characterizes each user through the spectral structure of the covariances of their feature representations and leverages subspace similarity to identify task-consistent user groupings. This geometry-aware clustering is label-agnostic and is performed in a one-shot manner prior to training, significantly reducing communication overhead and computational costs compared to iterative baselines.
  Complementing this, we introduce a feature-consistency-based detection and correction strategy to address noisy labels within clusters. By leveraging directional alignment in the learned feature space and assigning labels based on class-specific feature subspaces, our method mitigates corrupted supervision without requiring estimation of stochastic noise transition matrices. In addition, FB-NLL is model-independent and integrates seamlessly with existing noise-robust training techniques. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets and noise regimes demonstrate that our framework consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in terms of average accuracy and performance stability.

AI.tldr: FB-NLL提出了一种去中心化聚类的个性化联邦学习框架，通过特征空间的谱结构实现一次性用户分组，并利用特征一致性检测和校正策略处理噪声标签，在异构数据和噪声环境下显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于训练动态（如模型更新轨迹）的PFL方法在低质量数据和噪声标签下表现脆弱，因为被污染的更新会扭曲聚类决策并降低个性化性能。
AI.method: 1) 特征中心框架：利用局部特征空间的协方差谱结构进行一次性用户聚类，基于子空间相似性识别任务一致的用户分组，不依赖迭代训练动态。2) 特征一致性检测与校正：通过特征空间中的方向对齐和类特定特征子空间分配标签，无需估计随机噪声转移矩阵。3) 模型无关设计，可集成现有噪声鲁棒训练技术。
AI.result: 在多种数据集和噪声环境下，FB-NLL在平均准确率和性能稳定性上持续优于最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FB-NLL通过几何感知的聚类和特征一致性校正，有效解决了异构数据和噪声标签下的个性化联邦学习问题，且通信和计算成本显著降低。

title: Task Switching Without Forgetting via Proximal Decoupling
summary: In continual learning, the primary challenge is to learn new information without forgetting old knowledge. A common solution addresses this trade-off through regularization, penalizing changes to parameters critical for previous tasks. In most cases, this regularization term is directly added to the training loss and optimized with standard gradient descent, which blends learning and retention signals into a single update and does not explicitly separate essential parameters from redundant ones. As task sequences grow, this coupling can over-constrain the model, limiting forward transfer and leading to inefficient use of capacity. We propose a different approach that separates task learning from stability enforcement via operator splitting. The learning step focuses on minimizing the current task loss, while a proximal stability step applies a sparse regularizer to prune unnecessary parameters and preserve task-relevant ones. This turns the stability-plasticity into a negotiated update between two complementary operators, rather than a conflicting gradient. We provide theoretical justification for the splitting method on the continual-learning objective, and demonstrate that our proposed solver achieves state-of-the-art results on standard benchmarks, improving both stability and adaptability without the need for replay buffers, Bayesian sampling, or meta-learning components.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于算子分裂的持续学习方法，将任务学习与稳定性强制分离，通过交替执行梯度下降和稀疏正则化步骤来解决稳定性-可塑性困境，无需回放缓冲区、贝叶斯采样或元学习组件，在标准基准上取得了最先进的结果。
AI.motivation: 传统持续学习中的正则化方法将学习信号和保留信号混合在同一个梯度更新中，随着任务序列增长，这种耦合会过度约束模型，限制前向迁移并导致容量利用效率低下。
AI.method: 通过算子分裂将任务学习与稳定性强制分离：学习步骤专注于最小化当前任务损失，近端稳定性步骤应用稀疏正则化器来剪枝不必要的参数并保留任务相关参数，将稳定性-可塑性转化为两个互补算子之间的协商更新。
AI.result: 在标准基准上取得了最先进的结果，同时提高了稳定性和适应性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的求解器无需回放缓冲区、贝叶斯采样或元学习组件即可实现优异性能，为持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性权衡提供了一种新的解决方案。

title: GeoVision-Enabled Digital Twin for Hybrid Autonomous-Teleoperated Medical Responses
summary: Remote medical response systems are increasingly being deployed to support emergency care in disaster-affected and infrastructure-limited environments. Enabled by GeoVision capabilities, this paper presents a Digital Twin architecture for hybrid autonomous-teleoperated medical response systems. The proposed framework integrates perception and adaptive navigation with a Digital Twin, synchronized in real-time, that mirrors system states, environmental dynamics, patient conditions, and mission objectives. Unlike traditional ground control interfaces, the Digital Twin provides remote clinical and operational users with an intuitive, continuously updated virtual representation of the platform and its operational context, enabling enhanced situational awareness and informed decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数字孪生（Digital Twin）的混合自主-远程操作医疗响应系统架构，该系统利用GeoVision能力，在灾后和基础设施受限环境中集成感知、自适应导航与实时同步的数字孪生，为远程临床和操作人员提供直观的虚拟表示，增强态势感知和决策支持。
AI.motivation: 在灾害和基础设施受限环境中，远程医疗响应系统亟需提升态势感知与决策能力，传统地面控制界面存在直观性不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用数字孪生架构，结合GeoVision能力，实现感知、自适应导航与数字孪生的实时同步，镜像系统状态、环境动态、患者状况和任务目标。
AI.result: 数字孪生为远程临床和操作用户提供了直观且持续更新的虚拟表示，增强了态势感知和知情决策能力。
AI.conclusion: 该数字孪生架构可有效提升混合自主-远程操作医疗响应系统在灾后环境中的可用性和决策质量。

title: ConvVitMamba: Efficient Multiscale Convolution, Transformer, and Mamba-Based Sequence modelling for Hyperspectral Image Classification
comment: Pre-print Accepted for Publication in International Journal of Remote Sensing
summary: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification remains challenging due to high spectral dimensionality, redundancy, and limited labeled data. Although convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong performance by exploiting spectral-spatial information and long-range dependencies, they often incur high computational cost and large model size, limiting practical use. To address these limitations, a unified hybrid framework, termed ConvVitMamba, is proposed for efficient HSI classification. The architecture integrates three components: a multiscale convolutional feature extractor to capture local spectral, spatial, and joint patterns; a Vision Transformer based tokenization and encoding stage to model global contextual relationships; and a lightweight Mamba inspired gated sequence mixing module for efficient content-aware refinement without quadratic self-attention. Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is used as preprocessing to reduce redundancy and improve efficiency. Experiments on four benchmark datasets, including Houston and three UAV borne QUH datasets (Pingan, Qingyun, and Tangdaowan), demonstrate that ConvVitMamba consistently outperforms CNN, Transformer, and Mamba based methods while maintaining a favorable balance between accuracy, model size, and inference efficiency. Ablation studies confirm the complementary contributions of all components. The results indicate that the proposed framework provides an effective and efficient solution for HSI classification in diverse scenarios. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/ConvVitMamba

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ConvVitMamba的统一混合框架，集成多尺度卷积特征提取器、Vision Transformer编码和Mamba门控序列混合模块，用于高效高光谱图像分类，在四个基准数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临光谱维度高、冗余大、标记数据有限等挑战，现有CNN和ViT方法虽性能强但计算成本高、模型尺寸大，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出ConvVitMamba混合框架：1）多尺度卷积特征提取器捕获局部光谱、空间及联合模式；2）Vision Transformer标记化与编码阶段建模全局上下文关系；3）轻量级Mamba门控序列混合模块实现高效内容感知精炼，避免二次自注意力。使用PCA预处理降维去冗余。
AI.result: 在Houston和三个UAV机载QUH数据集（Pingan、Qingyun、Tangdaowan）上，ConvVitMamba一致优于CNN、Transformer和Mamba方法，在精度、模型规模和推理效率之间取得良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: ConvVitMamba为多样化的高光谱图像分类场景提供了有效且高效的解决方案，消融实验验证了各组件的互补贡献。

title: Frictionless Love: Associations Between AI Companion Roles and Behavioral Addiction
comment: Accepted at the ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT) 2026
summary: AI companion chatbots increasingly shape how people seek social and emotional connection, sometimes substituting for relationships with romantic partners, friends, teachers, or even therapists. When these systems adopt those metaphorical roles, they are not neutral: such roles structure people's ways of interacting, distribute perceived AI harms and benefits, and may reflect behavioral addiction signs. Yet these role-dependent risks remain poorly understood. We analyze 248,830 posts from seven prominent Reddit communities describing interactions with AI companions. We identify ten recurring metaphorical roles (for example, soulmate, philosopher, and coach) and show that each role supports distinct ways of interacting. We then extract the perceived AI harms and AI benefits associated with these role-specific interactions and link them to behavioral addiction signs, all of which has been inferred from the text in the posts. AI soulmate companions are associated with romance-centered ways of interacting, offering emotional support but also introducing emotional manipulation and distress, culminating in strong attachment. In contrast, AI coach and guardian companions are associated with practical benefits such as personal growth and task support, yet are nonetheless more frequently associated with behavioral addiction signs such as daily life disruptions and damage to offline relationships. These findings show that metaphorical roles are a central ethical design concern for responsible AI companions.

AI.tldr: 通过对Reddit上248,830篇关于AI伴侣的帖子进行分析，识别出十种隐喻性角色（如灵魂伴侣、哲学家、教练等），发现不同角色对应不同的互动方式、感知利益/危害以及行为成瘾迹象，表明隐喻性角色是AI伴侣伦理设计的关键考量。
AI.motivation: AI伴侣聊天机器人日益取代人类关系（伴侣、朋友、老师、治疗师），但不同隐喻角色带来的风险（危害分布、成瘾迹象）尚未被充分理解。
AI.method: 收集Reddit七个知名社区248,830篇帖子，通过文本分析识别十种隐喻角色，提取角色相关的感知AI危害与利益，并关联行为成瘾迹象。
AI.result: 灵魂伴侣类AI带来情感支持但伴随情感操纵和依恋；教练/守护者类AI提供实用利益（个人成长、任务支持）却更频繁关联行为成瘾迹象（日常生活干扰、现实关系损害）。
AI.conclusion: 隐喻角色是AI伴侣负责任设计中的核心伦理考量因素，不同角色蕴含差异化的风险-收益分布。

title: Capability-Aware Heterogeneous Control Barrier Functions for Decentralized Multi-Robot Safe Navigation
summary: Safe navigation for multi-robot systems requires enforcing safety without sacrificing task efficiency under decentralized decision-making. Existing decentralized methods often assume robot homogeneity, making shared safety requirements non-uniformly interpreted across heterogeneous agents with structurally different dynamics, which could lead to avoidance obligations not physically realizable for some robots and thus cause safety violations or deadlock. In this paper, we propose Capability-Aware Heterogeneous Control Barrier Function (CA-HCBF), a decentralized framework for consistent safety enforcement and capability-aware coordination in heterogeneous robot teams. We derive a canonical second-order control-affine representation that unifies holonomic and nonholonomic robots under acceleration-level control via canonical transformation and backstepping, preserving forward invariance of the safe set while avoiding relative-degree mismatch across heterogeneous dynamics. We further introduce a support-function-based directional capability metric that quantifies each robot's ability to follow its motion intent, deriving a pairwise responsibility allocation that distributes the safety burden proportionally to each robot's motion capability. A feasibility-aware clipping mechanism further constrains the allocation to each agent's physically achievable range, mitigating infeasible constraint assignments common in dense decentralized CBF settings. Simulations with up to 30 heterogeneous robots and a physical multi-robot demonstration show improved safety and task efficiency over baselines, validating real-world applicability across robots with distinct kinematic constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向异构机器人团队的去中心化安全导航框架CA-HCBF，通过规范变换统一不同动力学模型，引入能力感知的责任分配机制，在保证安全的同时提升任务效率。
AI.motivation: 现有去中心化安全方法假设机器人同质，共享安全要求在异构机器人上被非一致地解释，导致部分机器人因动力学差异无法物理实现避碰义务，引发安全违反或死锁。
AI.method: 1) 通过规范变换和反步法将完整和非完整机器人统一为二阶控制仿射形式，避免相对阶不匹配；2) 提出基于支撑函数的方向能力度量，量化机器人执行运动意图的能力；3) 推导成对责任分配机制，按运动能力比例分担安全负担；4) 引入可行性感知裁剪机制，约束分配至各机器人物理可达范围。
AI.result: 在多达30个异构机器人的仿真和物理多机器人实验中，相比基线方法改善了安全性和任务效率，验证了在实际多机器人系统中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CA-HCBF框架成功实现了异构机器人团队中一致的安全执行和能力感知的协调，具有实际应用价值。

title: Benign Overfitting in Adversarial Training for Vision Transformers
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2409.19345 by other authors
summary: Despite the remarkable success of Vision Transformers (ViTs) across a wide range of vision tasks, recent studies have revealed that they remain vulnerable to adversarial examples, much like Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). A common empirical defense strategy is adversarial training, yet the theoretical underpinnings of its robustness in ViTs remain largely unexplored. In this work, we present the first theoretical analysis of adversarial training under simplified ViT architectures. We show that, when trained under a signal-to-noise ratio that satisfies a certain condition and within a moderate perturbation budget, adversarial training enables ViTs to achieve nearly zero robust training loss and robust generalization error under certain regimes. Remarkably, this leads to strong generalization even in the presence of overfitting, a phenomenon known as \emph{benign overfitting}, previously only observed in CNNs (with adversarial training). Experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets further validate our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文首次从理论上分析了简化ViT架构下对抗训练的鲁棒性，证明了在满足特定信噪比条件和适度扰动预算下，对抗训练能使ViT实现近乎零的鲁棒训练损失和鲁棒泛化误差，甚至出现良性过拟合现象，并通过实验验证了理论发现。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT在视觉任务上取得了显著成功，但已有研究表明它们与CNN一样容易受到对抗样本攻击。对抗训练是一种常见的防御策略，但其在ViT中的鲁棒性理论基础尚未得到充分探索。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 采用理论分析与实验验证相结合的方法。首先在简化ViT架构下进行对抗训练的泛化界理论推导，分析信噪比条件和扰动预算对鲁棒训练损失和泛化误差的影响；然后通过合成数据和真实数据集实验验证理论发现。
AI.result: 证明了在满足特定信噪比条件且扰动预算适中的情况下，对抗训练能使ViT达到近乎零的鲁棒训练损失和鲁棒泛化误差。即使在过拟合情况下也能实现强泛化（良性过拟合），这一现象此前仅在CNN的对抗训练中被观察到。
AI.conclusion: 本文为ViT对抗训练的鲁棒性提供了首个理论分析框架，揭示了对抗训练在ViT中实现鲁棒泛化的条件，并发现了良性过拟合现象，拓展了对抗训练理论研究的边界。

title: 4th Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi): Challenge Overview
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Workshop Proceeding; Maritime Computer Vision Workshop
summary: The 4th Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi) is organized as part of CVPR 2026. This edition features five benchmark challenges with emphasis on both predictive accuracy and embedded real-time feasibility. This report summarizes the MaCVi 2026 challenge setup, evaluation protocols, datasets, and benchmark tracks, and presents quantitative results, qualitative comparisons, and cross-challenge analyses of emerging method trends. We also include technical reports from top-performing teams to highlight practical design choices and lessons learned across the benchmark suite. Datasets, leaderboards, and challenge resources are available at https://macvi.org/workshop/cvpr26.

AI.tldr: 本文总结了2026年CVPR上第四届MaCVi海事计算机视觉研讨会的五个基准挑战赛设置、评估协议、数据集及结果，并包含优胜团队技术报告。
AI.motivation: 推动海事计算机视觉领域发展，重点关注预测精度与嵌入式实时可行性，通过标准化基准挑战促进方法比较与进步。
AI.method: 设立五个基准挑战，采用统一的评估协议和数据集，对参赛方法进行定量与定性比较，并收集优胜团队的技术报告进行跨挑战趋势分析。
AI.result: 展示了各挑战的定量结果、定性比较和新兴方法趋势的跨挑战分析，总结了优胜团队的设计选择和实践经验。
AI.conclusion: MaCVi 2026通过多挑战设置和嵌入式实时可行性要求，推动了海事计算机视觉方法的实用化发展，资源已公开供后续研究使用。

title: Adaptive MSD-Splitting: Enhancing C4.5 and Random Forests for Skewed Continuous Attributes
summary: The discretization of continuous numerical attributes remains a persistent computational bottleneck in the induction of decision trees, particularly as dataset dimensions scale. Building upon the recently proposed MSD-Splitting technique -- which bins continuous data using the empirical mean and standard deviation to dramatically improve the efficiency and accuracy of the C4.5 algorithm -- we introduce Adaptive MSD-Splitting (AMSD). While standard MSD-Splitting is highly effective for approximately symmetric distributions, its rigid adherence to fixed one-standard-deviation cutoffs can lead to catastrophic information loss in highly skewed data, a common artifact in real-world biomedical and financial datasets. AMSD addresses this by dynamically adjusting the standard deviation multiplier based on feature skewness, narrowing intervals in dense regions to preserve discriminative resolution. Furthermore, we integrate AMSD into ensemble methods, specifically presenting the Random Forest-AMSD (RF-AMSD) framework. Empirical evaluations on the Census Income, Heart Disease, Breast Cancer, and Forest Covertype datasets demonstrate that AMSD yields a 2-4% accuracy improvement over standard MSD-Splitting, while maintaining near-identical O(N) time complexity reductions compared to the O(N log N) exhaustive search. Our Random Forest extension achieves state-of-the-art accuracy at a fraction of standard computational costs, confirming the viability of adaptive statistical binning in large-scale ensemble learning architectures.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应MSD分裂（AMSD）方法，通过基于偏度动态调整标准差乘数来改进连续属性离散化，并将其集成到随机森林中（RF-AMSD），在保持O(N)时间复杂度的同时提升2-4%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 标准MSD-Splitting在近似对称分布上表现良好，但对高度偏斜数据（常见于生物医学和金融数据集）使用固定的一倍标准差截断会导致严重的信息丢失，需要一种自适应方法来处理偏态分布。
AI.method: 提出AMSD方法，根据特征偏度动态调整标准差乘数，在密集区域缩小区间以保持判别分辨率；并将AMSD集成到集成方法中，形成随机森林-AMSD（RF-AMSD）框架。
AI.result: 在Census Income、Heart Disease、Breast Cancer和Forest Covertype数据集上，AMSD相比标准MSD-Splitting提升2-4%的准确率，同时保持几乎相同的O(N)时间复杂度（相比穷举搜索的O(N log N)）。RF-AMSD以极低的计算成本实现了最先进的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 自适应统计分箱在大规模集成学习架构中是可行的，AMSD在效率和精度之间取得了良好的平衡。

title: What Makes a Good AI Review? Concern-Level Diagnostics for AI Peer Review
summary: Evaluating AI-generated reviews by verdict agreement is widely recognized as insufficient, yet current alternatives rarely audit which concerns a system identifies, how it prioritizes them, or whether those priorities align with the review rationale that shaped the final assessment. We propose concern alignment, a diagnostic framework that evaluates AI reviews at the concern level rather than only at the verdict level. The framework's core data structure is the match graph, a bipartite alignment between official and AI-generated concerns annotated with match type, severity, and post-rebuttal treatment. From this artifact we derive an evaluation ladder that moves from binary accuracy to concern detection, verdict-stratified behavior, decision-aware calibration, and rebuttal-aware decomposition. In a pilot study of four public AI review systems evaluated in six configurations, concern-level analysis suggests that detection alone does not determine review quality; calibration is often the binding constraint. Systems detect non-trivial fractions of official concerns yet most mark 25--55% of concerns on accepted papers as decisive, where, under our operationalization, no official concern on accepted papers was treated as a decisive blocker. Identical overall verdict accuracy can conceal reject-heavy behavior versus low-recall profiles, and low full-review false decisive rates can partly reflect concern dilution rather than calibrated prioritization. Most systems do not emit a native accept/reject, and inferring it from review tone is method-sensitive, reinforcing the need for concern-level diagnostics that remain stable across inference choices. The contribution is a reusable evaluation framework for auditing which concerns AI reviewers identify, how they weight them, and whether those priorities align with the review rationale that informed the paper's final assessment.

AI.tldr: 提出关注点对齐(concern alignment)框架，从关注点层面而非裁决层面评估AI评审，通过匹配图、评估阶梯等工具进行细粒度诊断。实验表明，检测能力不等同于评审质量，校准是主要瓶颈，且相同裁决准确率可能掩盖截然不同的行为特征。
AI.motivation: 现有AI评审评估多基于裁决一致性，缺乏对系统识别了哪些关注点、如何排序、以及这些优先级是否与形成最终评审意见的评审逻辑一致性的审计能力。
AI.method: 提出关注点对齐框架，核心数据结构为匹配图（官方关注点与AI关注点的二分图对齐，标注匹配类型、严重性、反驳后处理），并在此基础上构建包含二元准确率、关注点检测、裁决分层行为、决策感知校准和反驳感知分解的评估阶梯。
AI.result: 对四个公开AI评审系统在六种配置下的初步研究表明：检测能力本身不能决定评审质量，校准往往是主要约束。系统能检测非平凡比例的官方关注点，但多数系统将25-55%的被接受论文的关注点标记为决定性，而事实上官方关注点从未如此处理。相同的总体裁决准确率可能掩盖偏重拒稿与低召回率的差异，低全审假决定性率部分源于关注点稀释。多数系统不输出原生接受/拒绝，从评审语气推断裁决的方法敏感。
AI.conclusion: 贡献是一个可复用的评估框架，用于审计AI评审者识别了哪些关注点、如何加权、以及这些优先级是否与形成论文最终评审意见的评审逻辑一致。

title: Weakly-supervised Learning for Physics-informed Neural Motion Planning via Sparse Roadmap
summary: The motion planning problem requires finding a collision-free path between start and goal configurations in high-dimensional, cluttered spaces. Recent learning-based methods offer promising solutions, with self-supervised physics-informed approaches such as Neural Time Fields (NTFields) solving the Eikonal equation to learn value functions without expert demonstrations. However, existing physics-informed methods struggle to scale in complex, multi-room environments, where simply increasing the number of samples cannot resolve local minima or guarantee global consistency. We propose Hierarchical Neural Time Fields (H-NTFields), a weakly-supervised framework that combines weak supervision from sparse roadmaps with physics-informed PDE regularization. The roadmap provides global topological anchors through upper and lower bounds on travel times, while PDE losses enforce local geometric fidelity and obstacle-aware propagation. Experiments on 18 Gibson environments and real robotic platforms show that H-NTFields substantially improves robustness over prior physics-informed methods, while enabling fast amortized inference through a continuous value representation.

AI.tldr: 提出分层神经时间场（H-NTFields），通过稀疏路标的弱监督和物理信息PDE正则化相结合，解决了现有物理信息方法在多房间复杂环境中难以扩展的问题，实现了鲁棒的连续值函数学习与快速推理。
AI.motivation: 现有基于物理信息（如NTFields）的自监督方法在复杂多房间环境中难以扩展，单纯增加采样无法解决局部极小值和全局一致性问题。
AI.method: 提出H-NTFields框架，结合稀疏路标的弱监督（提供全局拓扑锚点和旅行时间上下界）与物理信息PDE正则化（保持局部几何保真度和障碍物感知传播）。
AI.result: 在18个Gibson环境和真实机器人平台上，H-NTFields相比先前的物理信息方法显著提升了鲁棒性，并通过连续值表示实现了快速推理。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督结合物理信息正则化的混合策略能有效克服纯物理信息方法在复杂场景下的局限性，兼顾全局一致性与局部精度。

title: Ultrametric OGP - parametric RDT \emph{symmetric} binary perceptron connection
summary:
In [97,99,100], an fl-RDT framework is introduced to characterize \emph{statistical computational gaps} (SCGs). Studying \emph{symmetric binary perceptrons} (SBPs), [100] obtained an \emph{algorithmic} threshold estimate $α_a\approx α_c^{(7)}\approx 1.6093$ at the 7th lifting level (for $κ=1$ margin), closely approaching $1.58$ local entropy (LE) prediction [18].
  In this paper, we further connect parametric RDT to overlap gap properties (OGPs), another key geometric feature of the solution space. Specifically, for any positive integer $s$, we consider $s$-level ultrametric OGPs ($ult_s$-OGPs) and rigorously upper-bound the associated constraint densities $α_{ult_s}$. To achieve this, we develop an analytical union-bounding program consisting of combinatorial and probabilistic components. By casting the combinatorial part as a convex problem and the probabilistic part as a nested integration, we conduct numerical evaluations and obtain that the tightest bounds at the first two levels, $\barα_{ult_1} \approx 1.6578$ and $\barα_{ult_2} \approx 1.6219$, closely approach the 3rd and 4th lifting level parametric RDT estimates, $α_c^{(3)} \approx 1.6576$ and $α_c^{(4)} \approx 1.6218$. We also observe excellent agreement across other key parameters, including overlap values and the relative sizes of ultrametric clusters.
  Based on these observations, we propose several conjectures linking $ult$-OGP and parametric RDT. Specifically, we conjecture that algorithmic threshold $α_a=\lim_{s\rightarrow\infty} α_{ult_s} = \lim_{s\rightarrow\infty} \barα{ult_s} = \lim_{r\rightarrow\infty} α_{c}^{(r)}$, and $α_{ult_s} \leq α_{c}^{(s+2)}$ (with possible equality for some (maybe even all) $s$). Finally, we discuss the potential existence of a full isomorphism connecting all key parameters of $ult$-OGP and parametric RDT.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对称二元感知器（SBP）中参数化RDT与超度量重叠间隙性质（ult-OGP）之间的深层联系，通过解析联合界方法严格上界化了约束密度α_{ult_s}，发现前两阶的最紧界与参数化RDT的第3、4提升层估计值高度吻合，并提出了关于算法阈值和参数同构性的多个猜想。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通过参数化RDT框架刻画了统计计算间隙（SCG），但该方法的几何本质尚未被充分理解。本文旨在建立参数化RDT与解空间的另一关键几何特征——重叠间隙性质（OGP）之间的严格形式化联系，从而揭示算法阈值的几何起源。
AI.method: 针对任意正整数s，定义s-level超度量OGP（ult_s-OGP），并发展了一套解析联合界程序来上界约束密度α_{ult_s}：组合部分转化为凸优化问题，概率部分简化为嵌套积分。通过数值评估得到前两阶的最紧界限。
AI.result: 获得了ult_1和ult_2的最紧上界分别为约1.6578和1.6219，与参数化RDT第3、4提升层的估计值（约1.6576和1.6218）高度一致；其他关键参数（重叠值、超度量簇相对大小）也表现出极好的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了算法阈值猜想：α_a = lim_{s→∞} α_{ult_s} = lim_{s→∞} \bar{α}_{ult_s} = lim_{r→∞} α_c^{(r)}，以及α_{ult_s} ≤ α_c^{(s+2)}（可能对某些甚至所有s取等）。进一步讨论了ult-OGP与参数化RDT所有关键参数之间可能存在完全同构关系。

title: Synthesis and Deployment of Maximal Robust Control Barrier Functions through Adversarial Reinforcement Learning
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Robust control barrier functions (CBFs) provide a principled mechanism for smooth safety enforcement under worst-case disturbances. However, existing approaches typically rely on explicit, closed-form structure in the dynamics (e.g., control-affine) and uncertainty models. This has led to limited scalability and generality, with most robust CBFs certifying only conservative subsets of the maximal robust safe set. In this paper, we introduce a new robust CBF framework for general nonlinear systems under bounded uncertainty. We first show that the safety value function solving the dynamic programming Isaacs equation is a valid robust discrete-time CBF that enforces safety on the maximal robust safe set. We then adopt the key reinforcement learning (RL) notion of quality function (or Q-function), which removes the need for explicit dynamics by lifting the barrier certificate into state-action space and yields a novel robust Q-CBF constraint for safety filtering. Combined with adversarial RL, this enables the synthesis and deployment of robust Q-CBFs on general nonlinear systems with black-box dynamics and unknown uncertainty structure. We validate the framework on a canonical inverted pendulum benchmark and a 36-D quadruped simulator, achieving substantially less conservative safe sets than barrier-based baselines on the pendulum and reliable safety enforcement even under adversarial uncertainty realizations on the quadruped.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于鲁棒Q-CBF的通用框架，通过将安全值函数与强化学习的Q函数结合，实现了在未知动态和不确定性结构下的一般非线性系统的最大鲁棒安全集认证与安全滤波，并在倒立摆和四足机器人上验证了其低保守性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒控制屏障函数(CBF)方法依赖显式、闭式的动力学结构（如控制仿射）和不确定性模型，导致可扩展性和通用性有限，且通常只能认证最大鲁棒安全集的保守子集。
AI.method: 首先证明求解动态规划Isaacs方程的安全值函数是有效的鲁棒离散时间CBF，可确保最大鲁棒安全集内的安全性；然后引入强化学习中的Q函数，将屏障证书提升到状态-动作空间，消除对显式动力学的依赖，得到鲁棒Q-CBF约束；最后结合对抗性强化学习，在具有黑箱动力学和未知不确定性结构的系统上合成与部署鲁棒Q-CBF。
AI.result: 在倒立摆基准上，该方法获得了比基于屏障的基线方法保守性显著更低的安全集；在36维四足机器人仿真器中，即使在对抗性不确定性实现下也能实现可靠的安全保障。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功将鲁棒CBF推广到一般非线性系统，无需显式动力学和不确定性模型，实现了更通用、保守性更低的安全控制，为复杂系统安全强化学习提供了新途径。

title: Rethinking Reinforcement Fine-Tuning in LVLM: Convergence, Reward Decomposition, and Generalization
summary: Reinforcement fine-tuning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for equipping large vision-language models (LVLMs) with agentic capabilities such as tool use and multi-step reasoning. Despite striking empirical successes, most notably Visual Agentic Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (Visual-ARFT), the theoretical underpinnings of this paradigm remain poorly understood. In particular, two critical questions lack rigorous answers: (i)~how does the composite structure of verifiable rewards (format compliance, answer accuracy, tool executability) affect the convergence of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), and (ii)~why does training on a small set of tool-augmented tasks transfer to out-of-distribution domains? We address these gaps by introducing the \emph{Tool-Augmented Markov Decision Process} (TA-MDP), a formal framework that models multimodal agentic decision-making with bounded-depth tool calls. Within this framework, we establish three main results. First, we prove that GRPO under composite verifiable rewards converges to a first-order stationary point at rate $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ with explicit dependence on the number of reward components and group size (\textbf{Theorem~1}). Second, we derive a \emph{Reward Decomposition Theorem} that bounds the sub-optimality gap between decomposed per-component optimization and joint optimization, providing a precise characterization of when reward decomposition is beneficial (\textbf{Theorem~2}). Third, we establish a PAC-Bayes generalization bound for tool-augmented policies that explains the strong out-of-distribution transfer observed in Visual-ARFT (\textbf{Theorem~3}).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了工具增强马尔可夫决策过程（TA-MDP）框架，从理论上证明了GRPO在组合可验证奖励下的收敛速率、奖励分解定理以及工具增强策略的PAC-Bayes泛化界，为视觉语言模型的强化微调提供了理论基础。
AI.motivation: 尽管RLVR在LVLM的智能体能力（如工具使用和多步推理）上取得了显著经验成功，但其理论基础尚不明确，特别是两个关键问题缺乏严格回答：(i) 组合可验证奖励的结构如何影响GRPO的收敛性；(ii) 为什么在少量工具增强任务上训练能迁移到分布外领域。
AI.method: 本文引入了工具增强马尔可夫决策过程（TA-MDP）框架，形式化建模了具有有界深度工具调用的多模态智能体决策过程。在该框架下，作者建立了三个主要理论结果：定理1证明GRPO在组合可验证奖励下以O(1/√T)的速率收敛到一阶驻点；定理2给出奖励分解定理，界定了逐分量优化与联合优化之间的次优性差距；定理3建立了工具增强策略的PAC-Bayes泛化界。
AI.result: 定理1：GRPO在组合可验证奖励下以O(1/√T)速率收敛到一阶驻点，显式依赖于奖励组件数量和分组大小。定理2：奖励分解定理界定了逐分量优化与联合优化之间的次优性差距，精确刻画了奖励分解何时有益。定理3：PAC-Bayes泛化界解释了Visual-ARFT中观察到的强分布外迁移现象。
AI.conclusion: 通过TA-MDP框架，本文为RLVR范式提供了严格的理论基础，不仅解释了Visual-ARFT等方法的经验成功，还为未来设计更有效的视觉语言模型智能体微调方法提供了理论指导。

title: Learning Versatile Humanoid Manipulation with Touch Dreaming
summary: Humanoid robots promise general-purpose assistance, yet real-world humanoid loco-manipulation remains challenging because it requires whole-body stability, dexterous hands, and contact-aware perception under frequent contact changes. In this work, we study dexterous, contact-rich humanoid loco-manipulation. We first develop an RL-based whole-body controller that provides stable lower-body and torso execution during complex manipulation. Built on this controller, we develop a whole-body humanoid data collection system that combines VR-based teleoperation with human-to-humanoid motion mapping, enabling efficient collection of real-world demonstrations. We then propose Humanoid Transformer with Touch Dreaming (HTD), a multimodal encoder--decoder Transformer that models touch as a core modality alongside multi-view vision and proprioception. HTD is trained in a single stage with behavioral cloning augmented by touch dreaming: in addition to predicting action chunks, the policy predicts future hand-joint forces and future tactile latents, encouraging the shared Transformer trunk to learn contact-aware representations for dexterous interaction. Across five contact-rich tasks, Insert-T, Book Organization, Towel Folding, Cat Litter Scooping, and Tea Serving, HTD achieves a 90.9% relative improvement in average success rate over the stronger baseline. Ablation results further show that latent-space tactile prediction is more effective than raw tactile prediction, yielding a 30% relative gain in success rate. These results demonstrate that combining robust whole-body execution, scalable humanoid data collection, and predictive touch-centered learning enables versatile, high-dexterity humanoid manipulation in the real world. Project webpage: humanoid-touch-dream.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合全身控制、VR遥操作数据采集和触觉预测的多模态Transformer（HTD），在五个真实世界的接触密集型人形机器人操作任务上取得了90.9%的成功率相对提升。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的人形机器人全身操作面临全身稳定性、灵巧手操作以及接触感知三大挑战，现有方法难以在频繁接触变化下实现灵巧、接触丰富的全身操作。
AI.method: 1) 基于RL的全身控制器（提供稳定下身与躯干执行）；2) VR遥操作+人体到人形运动映射的数据采集系统；3) 多模态Transformer（HTD），以触觉为核心模态，结合多视角视觉和本体感知，采用行为克隆训练，并引入触觉梦境（touch dreaming）——同时预测未来手部关节力和触觉潜在表示。
AI.result: 在Insert-T、Book Organization、Towel Folding、Cat Litter Scooping、Tea Serving五项接触密集任务上，HTD相比强基线平均成功率提升90.9%；潜在空间触觉预测比原始触觉预测成功率提升30%。
AI.conclusion: 结合鲁棒的全身控制、可扩展的人形数据采集以及以触觉为中心的预测学习方法，能够实现真实世界中高灵巧度的人形机器人操作。

title: ChipCraftBrain: Validation-First RTL Generation via Multi-Agent Orchestration
summary:
Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise for generating Register-Transfer Level (RTL) code from natural language specifications, but single-shot generation achieves only 60-65% functional correctness on standard benchmarks. Multi-agent approaches such as MAGE reach 95.9% on VerilogEval yet remain untested on harder industrial benchmarks such as NVIDIA's CVDP, lack synthesis awareness, and incur high API costs.
  We present ChipCraftBrain, a framework combining symbolic-neural reasoning with adaptive multi-agent orchestration for automated RTL generation. Four innovations drive the system: (1) adaptive orchestration over six specialized agents via a PPO policy over a 168-dim state (an alternative world-model MPC planner is also evaluated); (2) a hybrid symbolic-neural architecture that solves K-map and truth-table problems algorithmically while specialized agents handle waveform timing and general RTL; (3) knowledge-augmented generation from a 321-pattern base plus 971 open-source reference implementations with focus-aware retrieval; and (4) hierarchical specification decomposition into dependency-ordered sub-modules with interface synchronization.
  On VerilogEval-Human, ChipCraftBrain achieves 97.2% mean pass@1 (range 96.15-98.72% across 7 runs, best 154/156), on par with ChipAgents (97.4%, self-reported) and ahead of MAGE (95.9%). On a 302-problem non-agentic subset of CVDP spanning five task categories, we reach 94.7% mean pass@1 (286/302, averaged over 3 runs), a 36-60 percentage-point lift per category over the published single-shot baseline; we additionally lead three of four categories shared with NVIDIA's ACE-RTL despite using roughly 30x fewer per-problem attempts. A RISC-V SoC case study demonstrates hierarchical decomposition generating 8/8 lint-passing modules (689 LOC) validated on FPGA, where monolithic generation fails entirely.

AI.tldr: 提出ChipCraftBrain框架，结合符号-神经推理与自适应多智能体编排实现RTL自动生成，在VerilogEval-Human上达97.2% pass@1，在CVDP上达94.7%，并通过RISC-V SoC案例验证了层次化分解的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM单次生成RTL代码的功能正确率仅60-65%；多智能体方法如MAGE虽达95.9%但未在工业级基准CVDP上测试，缺乏综合感知且API成本高。
AI.method: (1) 基于PPO策略（含替代MPC规划器）的六智能体自适应编排，状态维度168；(2) 混合符号-神经架构：算法求解K-map/真值表，智能体处理波形时序与通用RTL；(3) 321模式库+971开源参考的知识增强生成；(4) 层次化规范分解为依赖排序子模块并同步接口。
AI.result: VerilogEval-Human: 97.2% pass@1（7次运行96.15-98.72%，最佳154/156）；CVDP 302问题子集: 94.7% pass@1（286/302），每类别比单发基线提升36-60个百分点；RISC-V SoC案例：层次化分解生成8/8通过lint的模块（689行），FPGA验证通过，单体生成完全失败。
AI.conclusion: ChipCraftBrain通过自适应编排与混合推理显著提升RTL生成正确率，在工业级基准上取得大幅领先，层次化分解策略有效解决复杂SoC设计问题。

title: XRZero-G0: Pushing the Frontier of Dexterous Robotic Manipulation with Interfaces, Quality and Ratios
summary: The acquisition of high-quality, action-aligned demonstration data remains a fundamental bottleneck in scaling foundation models for dexterous robot manipulation. Although robot-free human demonstrations (e.g., the UMI paradigm) offer a scalable alternative to traditional teleoperation, current systems are constrained by sub-optimal hardware ergonomics, open-loop workflows, and a lack of systematic data-mixing strategies. To address these limitations, we present XRZero-G0, a hardware-software co-designed system for embodied data collection and policy learning. The system features an ergonomic, virtual reality interface equipped with a top-view camera and dual specialized grippers to directly improve collection efficiency. To ensure dataset reliability, we propose a closed-loop collection, inspection, training, and evaluation pipeline for non-proprioceptive data. This workflow achieves an 85% data validity rate and establishes a transparent mechanism for quality control. Furthermore, we investigate the empirical scaling behaviors and optimal mixing ratios of robot-free data. Extensive experiments indicate that combining a minimal volume of real-robot data with large-scale robot-free data (e.g., a 10:1 ratio) achieves performance comparable to exclusively real-robot datasets, while reducing acquisition costs by a factor of twenty. Utilizing XRZero-G0, we construct a 2,000-hour robot-free dataset that enables zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer to a target physical robot, demonstrating a highly scalable methodology for generalized real-world manipulation.Our project repository: https://github.com/X-Square-Robot/XRZero-G0

AI.tldr: XRZero-G0是一个硬件-软件协同设计的灵巧机器人操作数据采集与策略学习系统，通过VR界面、双专用夹爪和闭环数据管道解决了机器人无监督演示数据采集中的硬件工效学差、缺乏数据混合策略等瓶颈。实验表明以10:1比例混合大规模机器人无监督数据与少量真机数据，在采集成本降低20倍的情况下达到了与纯真机数据集相当的性能，并构建了2000小时数据集实现零样本跨本体迁移。
AI.motivation: 解决当前灵巧机器人操作中高质量、对齐动作的演示数据获取瓶颈。现有机器人无监督演示系统（如UMI范式）受限于硬件工效学差、开环工作流以及缺乏系统性数据混合策略。
AI.method: 硬件-软件协同设计的系统：1) 配备顶视摄像头和双专用夹爪的人体工学VR界面；2) 针对非本体感知数据的闭环采集-检查-训练-评估管道；3) 研究机器人无监督数据与真机数据的最优混合比例。
AI.result: 数据有效率达85%；10:1的机器人无监督数据与真机数据混合比达到与纯真机数据集相当的性能，采集成本降低20倍；构建了2000小时机器人无监督数据集实现零样本跨本体迁移。
AI.conclusion: XRZero-G0证明了通过硬件-软件协同设计和数据混合策略，大规模机器人无监督数据可以有效替代高成本的纯真机数据，为通用真实世界操作提供高度可扩展的方法论。

title: On two ways to use determinantal point processes for Monte Carlo integration
summary: The standard Monte Carlo estimator $\widehat{I}_N^{\mathrm{MC}}$ of $\int fdω$ relies on independent samples from $ω$ and has variance of order $1/N$. Replacing the samples with a determinantal point process (DPP), a repulsive distribution, makes the estimator consistent, with variance rates that depend on how the DPP is adapted to $f$ and $ω$. We examine two existing DPP-based estimators: one by Bardenet & Hardy (2020) with a rate of $\mathcal{O}(N^{-(1+1/d)})$ for smooth $f$, but relying on a fixed DPP. The other, by Ermakov & Zolotukhin (1960), is unbiased with rate of order $1/N$, like Monte Carlo, but its DPP is tailored to $f$. We revisit these estimators, generalize them to continuous settings, and provide sampling algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用行列式点过程（DPP）替代独立同分布样本进行蒙特卡洛积分估计的方法。分析了两种现有DPP估计器：Bardenet & Hardy (2020) 的固定DPP估计器对光滑函数达到 O(N^{-(1+1/d)}) 的方差率，以及Ermakov & Zolotukhin (1960) 的适应性DPP无偏估计器达到1/N的方差率。本文将这两种方法推广到连续设定并提供了采样算法。
AI.motivation: 标准蒙特卡洛方法方差收敛速度为 O(1/N)，通过引入具有排斥性的行列式点过程采样替代独立采样，有望获得更快的方差收敛速度。已有两种DPP估计器但各自存在局限，需要系统性地回顾、推广并提供可行的采样算法。
AI.method: 本文对两种DPP估计器进行了理论回顾和推广：1) Bardenet & Hardy (2020) 方法使用固定DPP（与函数f无关），对光滑函数达到 O(N^{-(1+1/d)}) 方差率；2) Ermakov & Zolotukhin (1960) 方法使用适应性DPP（根据f定制），达到无偏且方差率为 O(1/N)。本文将这两种方法推广到连续设定，并设计了对应的采样算法。
AI.result: 两种DPP估计器的方差收敛率分别为：固定DPP方法对光滑函数达到 O(N^{-(1+1/d)})，优于标准MC的O(1/N)；适应性DPP方法达到 O(1/N)，与标准MC同阶但为无偏估计。
AI.conclusion: 行列式点过程能够提升蒙特卡洛积分的估计效率，其中固定DPP在高维光滑函数场景下优势减弱，而适应性DPP保持无偏性但方差率与标准MC相同。将两者推广到连续设定并给出采样算法是本文的核心贡献。

title: Biomedical systems biology workflow orchestration and execution with PoSyMed
summary: The rapid growth of scientific software has created practical barriers for bioinformatics research. Although powerful statistical, artificial intelligence (AI)-based methods are now widely available, their effective use is often hindered by fragmented distribution, inconsistent documentation, complex dependencies, and difficult-to-reproduce execution environments. As a result, reusing published tools and workflow adaptation to own date remains technically demanding and time-intensive, even for experienced users. Here, we present PoSyMed, an open and modular platform for the controlled integration, composition, and execution of bioinformatics tools and workflows. PoSyMed combines a backend-centered platform architecture with formal tool descriptions, controlled container-based build and execution processes, persistent workflow state, and a dialogue-based user interface. Large language models (LLM) are integrated not as autonomous decision-makers, but as human-computer interface with bounded semantic assistants that help identify tools, propose workflow steps, and support parameterization within a typed, validated, and human-supervised execution environment. PoSyMed is designed to improve reproducibility, traceability, and transparency in practical biomedical analysis within one platform. We describe the system architecture and evaluate its behavior across representative biological software scenarios with respect to workflow support, interaction design, and platform extensibility. PoSyMed is publicly available at https://apps.cosy.bio/posymed.

AI.tldr: PoSyMed是一个开源模块化平台，通过后端架构、容器化执行、形式化工具描述、持久化工作流状态和对话式用户界面，结合受限的大语言模型辅助，解决生物信息学工具复用、工作流适配和可重复性中的碎片化、文档不一致和依赖复杂等障碍。
AI.motivation: 生物信息学研究面临科学软件快速增长带来的实践障碍：工具分发碎片化、文档不一致、依赖复杂、执行环境难以复现，导致已发表工具的复用和工作流适配即使对有经验的用户也技术难度高且耗时。
AI.method: 采用后端中心化架构，结合形式化工具描述、基于容器的受控构建与执行过程、持久化工作流状态以及对话式用户界面；将大语言模型作为有界语义助手集成，辅助工具识别、工作流步骤建议和参数化，而非自主决策者，所有操作在类型化、经过验证且人工监督的环境中执行。
AI.result: 在代表性生物软件场景中评估了工作流支持、交互设计和平台可扩展性，PoSyMed可在https://apps.cosy.bio/posymed公开获取。
AI.conclusion: PoSyMed旨在通过统一平台提升实际生物医学分析的可重复性、可追溯性和透明性。

title: RMGS-SLAM: Real-time Multi-sensor Gaussian Splatting SLAM
comment: The manuscript has been improved, with refined content and updated and corrected experimental results
summary: Achieving real-time Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) based on 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) in large-scale real-world environments remains challenging, as existing methods still struggle to jointly achieve low-latency pose estimation, continuous 3D Gaussian reconstruction, and long-term global consistency. In this paper, we present a tightly coupled LiDAR-Inertial-Visual 3DGS-based SLAM framework for real-time pose estimation and photorealistic mapping in large-scale real-world scenes. The system executes state estimation and 3D Gaussian primitive initialization in parallel with global Gaussian optimization, enabling continuous dense mapping. To improve Gaussian initialization quality and accelerate optimization convergence, we introduce a cascaded strategy that combines feed-forward predictions with geometric priors derived from voxel-based principal component analysis. To enhance global consistency, we perform loop closure directly on the optimized global Gaussian map by estimating loop constraints through Gaussian-based Generalized Iterative Closest Point registration, followed by pose-graph optimization. We also collect challenging large-scale looped outdoor sequences with hardware-synchronized LiDAR-camera-IMU and ground-truth trajectories for realistic evaluation. Extensive experiments on both public datasets and our dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a state of the art among real-time efficiency, localization accuracy, and rendering quality across diverse real-world scenes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种紧耦合的LiDAR-惯性-视觉3D高斯泼溅SLAM框架，实现了大规模真实场景中的实时位姿估计和逼真地图构建，通过级联初始化策略和基于高斯地图的回环检测，在效率、定位精度和渲染质量上达到最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3D高斯泼溅的实时SLAM方法在大规模真实环境中难以同时实现低延迟位姿估计、连续3D高斯重建和长期全局一致性。
AI.method: 采用LiDAR-惯性-视觉紧耦合架构，并行执行状态估计与3D高斯全局优化；引入基于体素主成分分析的几何先验与级联策略加速高斯初始化；通过高斯地图上的广义迭代最近点配准进行回环检测与位姿图优化。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和自采数据集上，该方法在实时性、定位精度和渲染质量方面均达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种能够同时实现实时位姿估计与高质量地图构建的3DGS-SLAM框架，验证了多传感器紧耦合与高斯级联初始化在大规模场景中的有效性。

title: Planning in entropy-regularized Markov decision processes and games
summary: We propose SmoothCruiser, a new planning algorithm for estimating the value function in entropy-regularized Markov decision processes and two-player games, given a generative model of the environment. SmoothCruiser makes use of the smoothness of the Bellman operator promoted by the regularization to achieve problem-independent sample complexity of order O~(1/epsilon^4) for a desired accuracy epsilon, whereas for non-regularized settings there are no known algorithms with guaranteed polynomial sample complexity in the worst case.

AI.tldr: SmoothCruiser是一种利用熵正则化带来的平滑性来估计值函数的新规划算法，在生成模型下实现了O~(1/ε⁴)的问题无关样本复杂度，而正则化缺失时最坏情况下不存在已知的多项式样本复杂度保证算法。
AI.motivation: 在熵正则化的马尔可夫决策过程和二人博弈中，现有算法在非正则化设置下最坏情况无法保证多项式样本复杂度，作者希望利用正则化带来的Bellman算子平滑性来实现问题无关的样本复杂度保证。
AI.method: 提出SmoothCruiser算法，利用熵正则化带来的Bellman算子光滑性进行值函数估计，在给定生成模型的环境下进行规划。
AI.result: 对于目标精度ε，达到O~(1/ε⁴)的问题无关样本复杂度，而非正则化设置下最坏情况没有已知的多项式复杂度保证算法。
AI.conclusion: 熵正则化可以有效改善规划算法的样本复杂度，SmoothCruiser在理论上提供了问题无关的复杂度保证，填补了正则化MDP和博弈中高效规划算法的空白。

title: DINO-Explorer: Active Underwater Discovery via Ego-Motion Compensated Semantic Predictive Coding
summary: Marine ecosystem degradation necessitates continuous, scientifically selective underwater monitoring. However, most autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) operate as passive data loggers, capturing exhaustive video for offline review and frequently missing transient events of high scientific value. Transitioning to active perception requires a causal, online signal that highlights significant phenomena while suppressing maneuver-induced visual changes. We propose DINO-Explorer, a novelty-aware perception framework driven by a continuous semantic surprise signal. Operating within the latent space of a frozen DINOv3 foundation model, it leverages a lightweight, action-conditioned recurrent predictor to anticipate short-horizon semantic evolution. An efference-copy-inspired module utilizes globally pooled optical flow to discount self-induced visual changes without suppressing genuine environmental novelty. We evaluate this signal on the downstream task of asynchronous event triage under variant telemetry constraints. Results demonstrate that DINO-Explorer provides a robust, bandwidth-efficient attention mechanism. At a fixed operating point, the system retains 78.8% of post-discovery human-reviewer consensus events with a 56.8% trigger confirmation rate, effectively surfacing mission-relevant phenomena. Crucially, ego-motion conditioning suppresses 45.5% of false positives relative to an uncompensated surprise signal baseline. In a replay-side Pareto ablation study, DINO-Explorer robustly dominates the validated peak F1 versus telemetry bandwidth frontier, reducing telemetry bandwidth by 48.2% at the selected operating point while maintaining a 62.2% peak F1 score, successfully concentrating data transmission around human-verified novelty events.

AI.tldr: 提出DINO-Explorer，一种基于连续语义惊喜信号的新颖感知框架，利用冻结的DINOv3基础模型和动作条件循环预测器，通过仿效副本模块抑制自运动引起的视觉变化，实现高效的水下异常事件在线筛选与带宽节约。
AI.motivation: 海洋生态系统退化需要持续的科学选择性地水下监测，但当前AUV多作为被动数据记录器，捕获大量视频供离线分析，常遗漏高科学价值的瞬时事件。向主动感知过渡需要一种因果的在线信号，能突出重要现象同时抑制机动引起的视觉变化。
AI.method: 1) 在冻结的DINOv3基础模型潜空间内操作；2) 使用轻量级动作条件循环预测器预测短时语义演化；3) 仿效副本模块利用全局池化的光流来抵消自诱导视觉变化而不抑制真正的环境新奇性。
AI.result: 1) 固定工作点保留78.8%的人工评审共识事件，触发确认率56.8%；2) 自运动调节相较于无补偿基线抑制了45.5%的假阳性；3) 选定工作点减少48.2%遥测带宽，保持62.2%的峰值F1分数。
AI.conclusion: DINO-Explorer提供了一种鲁棒且带宽高效的注意力机制，能有效聚焦于人工验证的新奇事件，减少数据传输量，实现从被动数据记录向主动感知的过渡。

title: PREF-XAI: Preference-Based Personalized Rule Explanations of Black-Box Machine Learning Models
summary: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) has predominantly focused on generating model-centric explanations that approximate the behavior of black-box models. However, such explanations often overlook a fundamental aspect of interpretability: different users require different explanations depending on their goals, preferences, and cognitive constraints. Although recent work has explored user-centric and personalized explanations, most existing approaches rely on heuristic adaptations or implicit user modeling, lacking a principled framework for representing and learning individual preferences. In this paper, we consider Preference-Based Explainable Artificial Intelligence (PREF-XAI), a novel perspective that reframes explanation as a preference-driven decision problem. Within PREF-XAI, explanations are not treated as fixed outputs, but as alternatives to be evaluated and selected according to user-specific criteria. In the PREF-XAI perspective, here we propose a methodology that combines rule-based explanations with formal preference learning. User preferences are elicited through a ranking of a small set of candidate explanations and modeled via an additive utility function inferred using robust ordinal regression. Experimental results on real-world datasets show that PREF-XAI can accurately reconstruct user preferences from limited feedback, identify highly relevant explanations, and discover novel explanatory rules not initially considered by the user. Beyond the proposed methodology, this work establishes a connection between XAI and preference learning, opening new directions for interactive and adaptive explanation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出偏好驱动可解释人工智能（PREF-XAI）框架，将解释重构为基于用户偏好的决策问题，结合规则解释与偏好学习（稳健序回归），从少量用户反馈中学习个体偏好并生成个性化解释。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法主要生成模型中心的解释，忽略了不同用户因目标、偏好和认知约束不同而需要不同解释这一基本问题；现有用户中心或个性化方法缺乏建模和学习的理论框架。
AI.method: 提出PREF-XAI框架：将解释视为偏好驱动的选择问题，采用规则解释与形式偏好学习相结合的方法，通过用户对少量候选解释的排序进行偏好引导，利用稳健序回归推断加性效用函数来建模用户偏好。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，PREF-XAI能够从有限的用户反馈中准确重建用户偏好，识别高度相关的解释，并发现用户初始未考虑的新颖解释规则。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了XAI与偏好学习之间的联系，为构建交互式和自适应的可解释系统开辟了新方向。

title: E2E-Fly: An Integrated Training-to-Deployment System for End-to-End Quadrotor Autonomy
summary: Training and transferring learning-based policies for quadrotors from simulation to reality remains challenging due to inefficient visual rendering, physical modeling inaccuracies, unmodeled sensor discrepancies, and the absence of a unified platform integrating differentiable physics learning into end-to-end training. While recent work has demonstrated various end-to-end quadrotor control tasks, few systems provide a systematic, zero-shot transfer pipeline, hindering reproducibility and real-world deployment. To bridge this gap, we introduce E2E-Fly, an integrated framework featuring an agile quadrotor platform coupled with a full-stack training, validation, and deployment workflow. The training framework incorporates a high-performance simulator with support for differentiable physics learning and reinforcement learning, alongside structured reward design tailored to common quadrotor tasks. We further introduce a two-stage validation strategy using sim-to-sim transfer and hardware-in-the-loop testing, and deploy policies onto two physical quadrotor platforms via a dedicated low-level control interface and a comprehensive sim-to-real alignment methodology, encompassing system identification, domain randomization, latency compensation, and noise modeling. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to systematically unify differentiable physical learning with training, validation, and real-world deployment for quadrotors. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework for training six end-to-end control tasks and deploy them in the real world.

AI.tldr: 本文提出E2E-Fly，一个集成了可微物理学习、强化学习、仿真验证和真实世界部署的统一框架，首次系统性地将可微物理学习与四旋翼飞行器的端到端训练、验证和部署全流程整合，并在六个控制任务上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有四旋翼飞行器从仿真到现实的策略迁移面临视觉渲染低效、物理建模不精确、传感器差异未建模以及缺乏统一的可微物理学习与端到端训练集成平台等问题，且缺乏系统性、零样本迁移的流水线，阻碍了可复现性和实际部署。
AI.method: 提出E2E-Fly框架，包含：(1) 高性能仿真器，支持可微物理学习和强化学习；(2) 针对常见四旋翼任务的结构化奖励设计；(3) 两阶段验证策略，包括sim-to-sim迁移和硬件在环测试；(4) 全面的sim-to-real对齐方法，涵盖系统辨识、域随机化、延迟补偿和噪声建模；(5) 专用低层控制接口，支持在两种物理四旋翼平台上部署策略。
AI.result: 在六个端到端控制任务上训练策略并成功部署到真实世界，证明了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: E2E-Fly是首个系统性统一可微物理学习与四旋翼飞行器训练、验证和真实部署的框架，填补了仿真到现实迁移的空白，提高了可复现性和实际部署可行性。

title: Frequency-Forcing: From Scaling-as-Time to Soft Frequency Guidance
summary: While standard flow-matching models transport noise to data uniformly, incorporating an explicit generation order - specifically, establishing coarse, low-frequency structure before fine detail - has proven highly effective for synthesizing natural images. Two recent works offer distinct paradigms for this. K-Flow imposes a hard frequency constraint by reinterpreting a frequency scaling variable as flow time, running the trajectory inside a transformed amplitude space. Latent Forcing provides a soft ordering mechanism by coupling the pixel flow with an auxiliary semantic latent flow via asynchronous time schedules, leaving the pixel interpolation path itself untouched. Viewed from the angle of improving pixel generation, we observe that forcing - guiding generation with an earlier-maturing auxiliary stream - offers a highly compatible route to scale-ordered generation without rewriting the core flow coordinate. Building on this, we propose Frequency-Forcing, which realizes K-Flow's frequency ordering through Latent Forcing's soft mechanism: a standard pixel flow is guided by an auxiliary low-frequency stream that matures earlier in time. Unlike Latent Forcing, whose scratchpad relies on a heavy pretrained encoder (e.g., DINO), our frequency scratchpad is derived from the data itself via a lightweight learnable wavelet packet transform. We term this a self-forcing signal, which avoids external dependencies while learning a basis better adapted to data statistics than the fixed bases used in hard frequency flows. On ImageNet-256, Frequency-Forcing consistently improves FID over strong pixel- and latent-space baselines, and naturally composes with a semantic stream to yield further gains. This illustrates that forcing-based scale ordering is a versatile, path-preserving alternative to hard frequency flows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Frequency-Forcing方法，通过轻量级可学习小波包变换生成的自引导信号，以软约束方式实现频率排序的流匹配生成，在ImageNet-256上优于强基线。
AI.motivation: 标准流匹配模型均匀传输噪声到数据，而显式建立从粗（低频）到细（高频）的生成顺序对合成自然图像非常有效。现有K-Flow（硬频率约束）和Latent Forcing（软排序机制）两种范式各有优劣，作者希望结合两者的优势，实现一种路径保持的、无需外部依赖的频率排序生成方法。
AI.method: 提出Frequency-Forcing方法：采用标准像素流作为主生成流，通过轻量级可学习小波包变换从数据自身提取低频辅助流，该辅助流在时间上更早成熟，从而引导主流实现从粗到细的生成顺序。这是一种"自引导"（self-forcing）信号，无需预训练编码器（如DINO），且学习的基比固定基（如K-Flow）更适应数据统计特性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-256上，Frequency-Forcing一致地提升了FID指标，优于强像素空间和潜空间基线，并能自然地与语义流结合获得进一步增益。
AI.conclusion: 基于引导的尺度排序是一种通用且路径保持的替代方案，相较于硬频率流更具灵活性。

title: Tree Learning: A Multi-Skill Continual Learning Framework for Humanoid Robots
summary: As reinforcement learning for humanoid robots evolves from single-task to multi-skill paradigms, efficiently expanding new skills while avoiding catastrophic forgetting has become a key challenge in embodied intelligence. Existing approaches either rely on complex topology adjustments in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models or require training extremely large-scale models, making lightweight deployment difficult. To address this, we propose Tree Learning, a multi-skill continual learning framework for humanoid robots. The framework adopts a root-branch hierarchical parameter inheritance mechanism, providing motion priors for branch skills through parameter reuse to fundamentally prevent catastrophic forgetting. A multi-modal feedforward adaptation mechanism combining phase modulation and interpolation is designed to support both periodic and aperiodic motions. A task-level reward shaping strategy is also proposed to accelerate skill convergence. Unity-based simulation experiments show that, in contrast to simultaneous multi-task training, Tree Learning achieves higher rewards across various representative locomotion skills while maintaining a 100% skill retention rate, enabling seamless multi-skill switching and real-time interactive control. We further validate the performance and generalization capability of Tree Learning on two distinct Unity-simulated tasks: a Super Mario-inspired interactive scenario and autonomous navigation in a classical Chinese garden environment.

AI.tldr: 提出Tree Learning框架，一种面向人形机器人的多技能持续学习框架，通过根-分支层次参数继承机制、多模态前馈适应机制和任务级奖励塑形策略，在Unity仿真中实现100%技能保留率与无缝多技能切换。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人强化学习从单任务向多技能范式演进时，高效扩展新技能并避免灾难性遗忘成为具身智能的关键挑战；现有方法依赖MoE的复杂拓扑调整或训练超大模型，难以轻量部署。
AI.method: 提出Tree Learning框架：(1) 根-分支层次参数继承机制，通过参数重用提供运动先验，从根本上防止灾难性遗忘；(2) 结合相位调制与插值的多模态前馈适应机制，支持周期性和非周期性运动；(3) 任务级奖励塑形策略加速技能收敛。
