AI.result: 在Unity仿真中，与同时多任务训练相比，Tree Learning在多种代表性 locomotion 技能上获得更高奖励，保持100%技能保留率，实现无缝多技能切换和实时交互控制；在超级马里奥互动场景和中国古典园林自主导航任务中进一步验证了性能与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Tree Learning框架有效解决了人形机器人多技能持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，实现了轻量化、高技能保留率的无缝多技能切换与实时交互控制。

title: Budgeted Online Influence Maximization
comment: 37th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2020), 28 pages
summary: We introduce a new budgeted framework for online influence maximization, considering the total cost of an advertising campaign instead of the common cardinality constraint on a chosen influencer set. Our approach better models the real-world setting where the cost of influencers varies and advertisers want to find the best value for their overall social advertising budget. We propose an algorithm assuming an independent cascade diffusion model and edge level semi-bandit feedback, and provide both theoretical and experimental results. Our analysis is also valid for the cardinality constraint setting and improves the state of the art regret bound in this case.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预算约束的在线影响力最大化框架，考虑广告活动的总成本而非传统的基数约束，并设计了在独立级联扩散模型和边级半臂反馈下的算法，理论上改进了现有最优遗憾界，实验验证有效。
AI.motivation: 传统在线影响力最大化问题通常假设选择固定数量的 influencers（基数约束），但在现实广告投放中，不同 influencers 的成本各异，广告主需要在预算约束下最大化影响力。现有研究忽略成本差异，无法有效建模实际广告预算分配问题。
AI.method: 提出预算约束框架替代基数约束；在独立级联扩散模型和边级半臂反馈（edge-level semi-bandit feedback）下设计在线学习算法；同时适用于基数约束场景并改进其遗憾界。
AI.result: 理论上证明了算法在预算约束下的遗憾界，并在基数约束场景下改进了现有最优遗憾界；实验验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 预算约束框架更贴合现实广告场景，所提算法在理论和实验上均表现优越，且对传统基数约束场景也有贡献。

title: Behavioral Transfer in AI Agents: Evidence and Privacy Implications
summary: AI agents powered by large language models are increasingly acting on behalf of humans in social and economic environments. Prior research has focused on their task performance and effects on human outcomes, but less is known about the relationship between agents and the specific individuals who deploy them. We ask whether agents systematically reflect the behavioral characteristics of their human owners, functioning as behavioral extensions rather than producing generic outputs. We study this question using 10,659 matched human-agent pairs from Moltbook, a social media platform where each autonomous agent is publicly linked to its owner's Twitter/X account. By comparing agents' posts on Moltbook with their owners' Twitter/X activity across features spanning topics, values, affect, and linguistic style, we find systematic transfer between agents and their specific owners. This transfer persists among agents without explicit configuration, and pairs that align on one behavioral dimension tend to align on others. These patterns are consistent with transfer emerging through accumulated interaction between owners (or owners' computer environments) and their agents in everyday use. We further show that agents with stronger behavioral transfer are more likely to disclose owner-related personal information in public discourse, suggesting that the same owner-specific context that drives behavioral transfer may also create privacy risk during ordinary use. Taken together, our results indicate that AI agents do not simply generate content, but reflect owner-related context in ways that can propagate human behavioral heterogeneity into digital environments, with implications for privacy, platform design, and the governance of agentic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Moltbook平台上10,659对匹配的人类-智能体对，研究发现由大语言模型驱动的AI智能体并非产生通用输出，而是系统地反映其人类所有者的行为特征（主题、价值观、情感和语言风格），且行为迁移越强的智能体越容易泄露所有者隐私信息。
AI.motivation: 现有研究关注AI智能体的任务表现和对人类结果的影响，但较少探究智能体与其特定部署者之间的行为关系——智能体是否仅仅产生通用输出，还是会成为所有者的行为延伸。
AI.method: 从Moltbook平台收集10,659对匹配的人类所有者（Twitter/X账号）与AI智能体（Moltbook帖子），跨主题、价值观、情感和语言风格四个维度比较所有者的Twitter/X活动和智能体的Moltbook帖子之间的行为特征迁移。
AI.result: 智能体与其所有者之间存在系统性的行为特征迁移；这种迁移在未显式配置的智能体中仍然存在；在一个行为维度上对齐的配对其他维度也倾向于对齐；行为迁移越强的智能体越容易在公共对话中披露所有者相关的个人信息。
AI.conclusion: AI智能体并非简单地生成内容，而是反映所有者相关的情境信息，将人类行为异质性传播到数字环境中，这对隐私保护、平台设计以及智能体系统的治理具有重要启示。

title: FastGrasp: Learning-based Whole-body Control method for Fast Dexterous Grasping with Mobile Manipulators
summary: Fast grasping is critical for mobile robots in logistics, manufacturing, and service applications. Existing methods face fundamental challenges in impact stabilization under high-speed motion, real-time whole-body coordination, and generalization across diverse objects and scenarios, limited by fixed bases, simple grippers, or slow tactile response capabilities. We propose \textbf{FastGrasp}, a learning-based framework that integrates grasp guidance, whole-body control, and tactile feedback for mobile fast grasping. Our two-stage reinforcement learning strategy first generates diverse grasp candidates via conditional variational autoencoder conditioned on object point clouds, then executes coordinated movements of mobile base, arm, and hand guided by optimal grasp selection. Tactile sensing enables real-time grasp adjustments to handle impact effects and object variations. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior grasping performance in both simulation and real-world scenarios, achieving robust manipulation across diverse object geometries through effective sim-to-real transfer.

AI.tldr: 提出了FastGrasp框架，通过两阶段强化学习策略结合触觉反馈，实现了移动机器人在高速运动下的快速抓取。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在高速运动下的冲击稳定、实时全身协调以及对多样化物体和场景的泛化能力存在根本性挑战，受限于固定基座、简单夹爪或缓慢的触觉响应能力。
AI.method: 采用两阶段强化学习策略：第一阶段通过条件变分自编码器以物体点云为条件生成多样抓取候选；第二阶段通过最优抓取选择引导移动基座、机械臂和手的协调运动。触觉传感实现实时抓取调整以应对冲击效应和物体变化。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实场景中均实现了优越的抓取性能，通过有效的sim-to-real迁移，在多样化物体几何形状上实现了鲁棒操作。
AI.conclusion: FastGrasp框架有效解决了移动机器人高速运动下的抓取难题，验证了触觉反馈在快速抓取中的关键作用，具备良好的跨场景泛化能力。

title: OVAL: Open-Vocabulary Augmented Memory Model for Lifelong Object Goal Navigation
summary: Object Goal Navigation (ObjectNav) refers to an agent navigating to an object in an unseen environment, which is an ability often required in the accomplishment of complex tasks. While existing methods demonstrate proficiency in isolated single object navigation, their limitations emerge in the restricted applicability of lifelong memory representations, which ultimately hinders effective navigation toward continual targets over extended periods. To address this problem, we propose OVAL, a novel lifelong open-vocabulary memory framework, which enables efficient and precise execution of long-term navigation in semantically open tasks. Within this framework, we introduce memory descriptors to facilitate structured management of the memory model. Additionally, we propose a novel probability-based exploration strategy, utilizing a multi-value frontier scoring to enhance lifelong exploration efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and robustness of the proposed system.

AI.tldr: OVAL提出了一种面向终身开放词汇目标导航的记忆框架，通过结构化记忆描述符和基于概率的多值前沿探索策略，实现了在未知环境中对连续目标的高效长时导航。
AI.motivation: 现有目标导航方法在处理长期、连续目标的终身导航任务时，其记忆表征的适用性受限，难以支持长时间内对连续目标的高效导航。
AI.method: 提出OVAL终身开放词汇记忆框架，包括：1) 记忆描述符（memory descriptors）用于结构化记忆管理；2) 基于概率的多值前沿评分探索策略，提升终身探索效率。
AI.result: 大量实验证明了所提系统的高效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: OVAL框架通过结构化的记忆管理和高效的探索策略，有效解决了长期目标导航中记忆表征适用性受限的问题，实现了语义开放任务下的精准、高效长时导航。

title: From Top-1 to Top-K: A Reproducibility Study and Benchmarking of Counterfactual Explanations for Recommender Systems
summary: Counterfactual explanations (CEs) provide an intuitive way to understand recommender systems by identifying minimal modifications to user-item interactions that alter recommendation outcomes. Existing CE methods for recommender systems, however, have been evaluated under heterogeneous protocols, using different datasets, recommenders, metrics, and even explanation formats, which hampers reproducibility and fair comparison. Our paper systematically reproduces, re-implement, and re-evaluate eleven state-of-the-art CE methods for recommender systems, covering both native explainers (e.g., LIME-RS, SHAP, PRINCE, ACCENT, LXR, GREASE) and specific graph-based explainers originally proposed for GNNs. Here, a unified benchmarking framework is proposed to assess explainers along three dimensions: explanation format (implicit vs. explicit), evaluation level (item-level vs. list-level), and perturbation scope (user interaction vectors vs. user-item interaction graphs). Our evaluation protocol includes effectiveness, sparsity, and computational complexity metrics, and extends existing item-level assessments to top-K list-level explanations. Through extensive experiments on three real-world datasets and six representative recommender models, we analyze how well previously reported strengths of CE methods generalize across diverse setups. We observe that the trade-off between effectiveness and sparsity depends strongly on the specific method and evaluation setting, particularly under the explicit format; in addition, explainer performance remains largely consistent across item level and list level evaluations, and several graph-based explainers exhibit notable scalability limitations on large recommender graphs. Our results refine and challenge earlier conclusions about the robustness and practicality of CE generation methods in recommender systems: https://github.com/L2R-UET/CFExpRec.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地复现、重新实现并重新评估了11种面向推荐系统的反事实解释方法，构建了统一的基准测试框架，在三个维度（解释格式、评估级别、扰动范围）上评估了这些方法，发现有效性与稀疏性之间的权衡强烈依赖于具体方法和评估设置，且多个基于图的解释器在大规模推荐图上存在可扩展性限制，挑战了以往关于反事实解释方法鲁棒性和实用性的结论。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统反事实解释方法在异构协议下进行评估，使用不同的数据集、推荐器、指标甚至解释格式，阻碍了可复现性和公平比较。
AI.method: 提出统一基准框架，从三个维度（隐式vs显式解释格式、项目级vs列表级评估、用户交互向量vs用户-项目交互图扰动范围）评估11种CE方法，涵盖多种指标（有效性、稀疏性、计算复杂度）。
AI.result: 有效性与稀疏性的权衡强烈依赖于具体方法和评估设置（尤其在显式格式下）；解释器性能在项目级和列表级评估上大体一致；多个基于图的解释器在大规模推荐图上表现出显著的可扩展性限制。
AI.conclusion: 本文结果修正并挑战了以往关于推荐系统中反事实解释方法鲁棒性和实用性的结论。

title: Learning When Not to Decide: A Framework for Overcoming Factual Presumptuousness in AI Adjudication
summary: A well-known limitation of AI systems is presumptuousness: the tendency of AI systems to provide confident answers when information may be lacking. This challenge is particularly acute in legal applications, where a core task for attorneys, judges, and administrators is to determine whether evidence is sufficient to reach a conclusion. We study this problem in the important setting of unemployment insurance adjudication, which has seen rapid integration of AI systems and where the question of additional fact-finding poses the most significant bottleneck for a system that affects millions of applicants annually. First, through a collaboration with the Colorado Department of Labor and Employment, we secure rare access to official training materials and guidance to design a novel benchmark that systematically varies in information completeness. Second, we evaluate four leading AI platforms and show that standard RAG-based approaches achieve an average of only 15% accuracy when information is insufficient. Third, advanced prompting methods improve accuracy on inconclusive cases but over-correct, withholding decisions even on clear cases. Fourth, we introduce a structured framework requiring explicit identification of missing information before any determination (SPEC, Structured Prompting for Evidence Checklists). SPEC achieves 89% overall accuracy, while appropriately deferring when evidence is insufficient -- demonstrating that presumptuousness in legal AI is systematic but addressable, and that doing so is a necessary step towards systems that reliably support, rather than supplant, human judgment wherever decisions must await sufficient evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文研究法律AI系统的"臆断性"问题——即在信息不足时仍给出自信回答的倾向。通过与科罗拉多州劳工部合作，在失业保险裁决场景下构建信息完整性可变的基准，评估了四种主流AI平台，并提出结构化提示框架（SPEC），在信息不充分时适当延迟判断，实现了89%的总体准确率。
AI.motivation: AI系统存在"臆断性"问题，即在信息不充分时仍给出自信回答。这一问题在法律应用中尤为严重，因为法律决策的核心是判断证据是否充分。失业保险裁决系统每年影响数百万申请人，且已快速整合AI，但额外事实调查问题构成了最大瓶颈。
AI.method: 1) 与科罗拉多州劳工部合作获取官方培训材料和指南，构建信息完整性系统性变化的基准；2) 评估四种主流AI平台；3) 测试高级提示方法；4) 提出SPEC框架（Structured Prompting for Evidence Checklists），要求在进行任何裁决前明确识别缺失信息。
AI.result: 1) 标准RAG方法在信息不足时平均仅15%准确率；2) 高级提示方法改善了不确定案件准确率，但过度纠正导致在清晰案件上也延迟决策；3) SPEC框架实现89%总体准确率，同时能在证据不足时适当延迟判断。
AI.conclusion: 法律AI中的臆断性是系统性的但可解决的。结构化地识别缺失信息是构建可靠支持而非取代人类判断系统的必要步骤，尤其是在决策必须等待充分证据的场景中。

title: Artificial Intelligence for Modeling and Simulation of Mixed Automated and Human Traffic
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) are now operating on public roads, which makes their testing and validation more critical than ever. Simulation offers a safe and controlled environment for evaluating AV performance in varied conditions. However, existing simulation tools mainly focus on graphical realism and rely on simple rule-based models and therefore fail to accurately represent the complexity of driving behaviors and interactions. Artificial intelligence (AI) has shown strong potential to address these limitations; however, despite the rapid progress across AI methodologies, a comprehensive survey of their application to mixed autonomy traffic simulation remains lacking. Existing surveys either focus on simulation tools without examining the AI methods behind them, or cover ego-centric decision-making without addressing the broader challenge of modeling surrounding traffic. Moreover, they do not offer a unified taxonomy of AI methods covering individual behavior modeling to full scene simulation. To address these gaps, this survey provides a structured review and synthesis of AI methods for modeling AV and human driving behavior in mixed autonomy traffic simulation. We introduce a taxonomy that organizes methods into three families: agent-level behavior models, environment-level simulation methods, and cognitive and physics-informed methods. The survey analyzes how existing simulation platforms fall short of the needs of mixed autonomy research and outlines directions to narrow this gap. It also provides a chronological overview of AI methods and reviews evaluation protocols and metrics, simulation tools, and datasets. By covering both traffic engineering and computer science perspectives, we aim to bridge the gap between these two communities.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了用于混合自主交通仿真中自动驾驶车辆与人类驾驶行为建模的AI方法，提出了包含智能体级行为模型、环境级仿真方法和认知与物理信息方法三大类别的统一分类法，并分析了现有仿真平台的不足及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有仿真工具主要关注图形逼真度且依赖简单规则模型，无法准确表征驾驶行为的复杂性和交互；同时已有综述要么侧重于仿真工具而不考察背后的AI方法，要么仅关注自我为中心的决策而未涉及周围交通建模的广泛挑战，且缺乏涵盖从个体行为建模到完整场景仿真的统一AI方法分类法。
AI.method: 采用结构化综述方法，提出将AI方法分为三大类别的统一分类法：智能体级行为模型（个体驾驶行为建模）、环境级仿真方法（完整场景仿真）、认知与物理信息方法（融合认知科学和物理约束）；从交通工程和计算机科学双重视角进行分析，并梳理了AI方法的时间演进脉络、评估协议与指标、仿真工具和数据集。
AI.result: 建立了涵盖个体行为建模到完整场景仿真的AI方法统一分类体系；分析了现有仿真平台在混合自主研究中的不足；提供了AI方法的时间线梳理及评估指标、工具和数据集的系统综述。
AI.conclusion: 该综述弥合了交通工程与计算机科学两个社区之间的差距，为混合自主交通仿真中AI方法的应用提供了系统性参考，并指出了未来需要填补的研究空白方向。

title: Disentangling Damage from Operational Variability: A Label-Free Self-Supervised Representation Learning Framework for Output-Only Structural Damage Identification
summary: Damage identification is a core task in structural health monitoring. In practice, however, its reliability is often compromised by confounding non-damage effects, such as variations in excitation and environmental conditions, which can induce changes comparable to or larger than those caused by structural damage. To address this challenge, this study proposes a self-supervised label-free disentangled representation learning framework for robust vibration-based structural damage identification. The proposed framework employs an autoencoder with two latent representations to learn directly from raw vibration acceleration signals. A self-supervised invariance regularization, implemented via Variance-Invariance-Covariance Regularization (VICReg), is imposed on one latent representation using baseline data where structural damage is assumed constant but operational and environmental conditions vary. In addition, a frequency-domain constraint is introduced to enforce agreement between the power spectral density reconstructed from the latent representation and that computed from the corresponding input time series. Together, these mechanisms promote disentanglement, enabling the learned representation to be sensitive to damage-related characteristics while remaining invariant to nuisance variability. The framework is trained in a fully end-to-end and label-free manner, requiring no prior information on damage, excitation, or environmental conditions, making it well-suited for real-world applications. Its effectiveness is validated on two distinct real-world vibration datasets, including a bridge and a gearbox. The results demonstrate robustness to operational variability, strong generalization capability, and good performance in both damage detection and quantification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督无标签解耦表示学习框架，通过自编码器结合VICReg正则化和频域约束，从原始振动加速度信号中学习对损伤敏感但对操作和环境变化鲁棒的表示，在桥梁和齿轮箱数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统损伤识别方法易受激励变化和环境条件等非损伤因素的干扰，这些因素引起的变化可能与损伤相当甚至更大，导致识别可靠性不足。
AI.method: 采用双潜空间自编码器结构，对其中一个潜表示施加基于VICReg的自监督不变性正则化（使用基线数据），同时引入频域约束强制重构信号的功率谱密度与输入一致，实现损伤相关特征与 nuisance 变量的解耦。框架端到端训练，无需标签或先验信息。
AI.result: 在两个真实世界振动数据集（桥梁和齿轮箱）上，该方法展现出对操作变异的鲁棒性、强泛化能力，并在损伤检测和量化任务中均取得良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自监督解耦框架有效提升了振动基结构损伤识别在实际应用中的可靠性，无需标签数据即可实现对损伤敏感、对 nuisance 因素不变的表示学习。

title: Depression Risk Assessment in Social Media via Large Language Models
summary: Depression is one of the most prevalent and debilitating mental health conditions worldwide, frequently underdiagnosed and undertreated. The proliferation of social media platforms provides a rich source of naturalistic linguistic signals for the automated monitoring of psychological well-being. In this work, we propose a system based on Large Language Models (LLMs) for depression risk assessment in Reddit posts, through multi-label classification of eight depression-associated emotions and the computation of a weighted severity index. The method is evaluated in a zero-shot setting on the annotated DepressionEmo dataset (~6,000 posts) and applied in-the-wild to 469,692 comments collected from four subreddits over the period 2024-2025. Our best model, gemma3:27b, achieves micro-F1 = 0.75 and macro-F1 = 0.70, results competitive with purpose-built fine-tuned models (BART: micro-F1 = 0.80, macro-F1 = 0.76). The in-the-wild analysis reveals consistent and temporally stable risk profiles across communities, with marked differences between r/depression and r/anxiety. Our findings demonstrate the feasibility of a cost-effective, scalable approach for large-scale psychological monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于大语言模型的抑郁症风险评估系统，通过多标签情感分类和加权严重性指数分析Reddit帖子，零样本设置下达到微F1=0.75/宏F1=0.70，与微调模型性能相当，并在近47万条真实评论中验证了其跨社区的稳定风险画像。
AI.motivation: 抑郁症在全球范围内普遍存在且常被漏诊和低估治疗，社交平台提供的自然语言信号为自动化心理健康监测提供了机会，因此需要开发可扩展、低成本的评估方法。
AI.method: 基于大语言模型对Reddit帖子进行八种抑郁相关情绪的多标签分类，并计算加权严重性指数；在DepressionEmo数据集（约6000条）上进行零样本评估，并在2024-2025年四个子版块的469,692条评论中进行真实环境应用。
AI.result: 最佳模型gemma3:27b在零样本设置下取得微F1=0.75和宏F1=0.70，与微调BART模型（微F1=0.80/宏F1=0.76）竞争力相当；真实环境分析显示各社区风险画像一致且时间上稳定，r/depression与r/anxiety之间存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了基于LLM的零样本方法在大规模心理监测中的可行性和成本效益，为自动化心理健康筛查提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: Evolving the Complete Muscle: Efficient Morphology-Control Co-design for Musculoskeletal Locomotion
summary: Musculoskeletal robots offer intrinsic compliance and flexibility, providing a promising paradigm for versatile locomotion. However, existing research typically relies on models with fixed muscle physiological parameters. This static physical setting fails to accommodate the diverse dynamic demands of complex tasks, inherently limiting the robot's performance upper bound. In this work, we focus on the morphology and control co-design of musculoskeletal systems. Unlike previous studies that optimize single physiological attributes such as stiffness, we introduce a Complete Musculoskeletal Morphological Evolution Space that simultaneously evolves muscle strength, velocity, and stiffness. To overcome the exponential expansion of the exploration space caused by this comprehensive evolution, we propose Spectral Design Evolution (SDE), a high-efficiency co-optimization framework. By integrating a bilateral symmetry prior with Principal Component Analysis (PCA), SDE projects complex muscle parameters onto a low-dimensional spectral manifold, enabling efficient morphological exploration. Evaluated on the MyoSuite framework across four tasks (Walk, Stair, Hilly, and Rough terrains), our method demonstrates superior learning efficiency and locomotion stability compared to fixed-morphology and standard evolutionary baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SDE的高效协同优化框架，通过将肌肉强度、速度和刚度同时纳入形态进化空间，并利用双边对称先验和PCA降维，解决了肌肉骨骼机器人固定形态参数无法适应复杂动态任务的问题，在多种地形任务上实现了更优的学习效率和运动稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有肌肉骨骼机器人研究依赖固定肌肉生理参数的模型，这种静态物理设置无法适应复杂任务的多变动态需求，限制了机器人的性能上限。因此，需要探索形态与控制的协同设计以突破这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出Complete Musculoskeletal Morphological Evolution Space，同时进化肌肉强度、速度和刚度三个属性；开发Spectral Design Evolution (SDE)框架，利用双边对称先验结合PCA将高维肌肉参数投影到低维谱流形上，实现高效形态探索。
AI.result: 在MyoSuite框架的Walk、Stair、Hilly、Rough四种地形任务上，SDE方法相比固定形态和标准进化基线方法，在學習效率和运动稳定性方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: SDE框架通过高效的形态-控制协同优化，有效拓展了肌肉骨骼机器人的性能边界，为未来自适应机器人系统的设计提供了新思路。

title: GGD-SLAM: Monocular 3DGS SLAM Powered by Generalizable Motion Model for Dynamic Environments
summary: Visual SLAM algorithms achieve significant improvements through the exploration of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) representations, particularly in generating high-fidelity dense maps. However, they depend on a static environment assumption and experience significant performance degradation in dynamic environments. This paper presents GGD-SLAM, a framework that employs a generalizable motion model to address the challenges of localization and dense mapping in dynamic environments - without predefined semantic annotations or depth input. Specifically, the proposed system employs a First-In-First-Out (FIFO) queue to manage incoming frames, facilitating dynamic semantic feature extraction through a sequential attention mechanism. This is integrated with a dynamic feature enhancer to separate static and dynamic components. Additionally, to minimize dynamic distractors' impact on the static components, we devise a method to fill occluded areas via static information sampling and design a distractor-adaptive Structure Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) loss tailored for dynamic environments, significantly enhancing the system's resilience. Experiments conducted on real-world dynamic datasets demonstrate that the proposed system achieves state-of-the-art performance in camera pose estimation and dense reconstruction in dynamic scenes.

AI.tldr: GGD-SLAM提出了一种通用运动模型，通过FIFO队列、时序注意力机制和动态特征增强器分离动静成分，无需预定义语义标注或深度输入，在动态场景下实现SOTA的相机位姿估计和稠密重建性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3DGS的视觉SLAM算法在静态环境假设下表现优异，但在动态场景中性能严重下降，亟需一种无需语义先验和深度输入即可处理动态环境的方法。
AI.method: 1) 使用FIFO队列管理输入帧，通过时序注意力机制提取动态语义特征；2) 设计动态特征增强器分离静态与动态成分；3) 通过静态信息采样填充遮挡区域；4) 设计自适应干扰物的SSIM损失函数增强系统鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在真实世界动态数据集上，GGD-SLAM在相机位姿估计和稠密重建任务中均达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种无需预定义语义标注或深度输入的通用运动模型框架，有效解决了动态环境下的定位与稠密建图难题。

title: An Efficient Black-Box Reduction from Online Learning to Multicalibration, and a New Route to $Φ$-Regret Minimization
summary:
We give a Gordon-Greenwald-Marks (GGM) style black-box reduction from online learning to online multicalibration. Concretely, we show that to achieve high-dimensional multicalibration with respect to a class of functions H, it suffices to combine any no-regret learner over H with an expected variational inequality (EVI) solver. We also prove a converse statement showing that efficient multicalibration implies efficient EVI solving, highlighting how EVIs in multicalibration mirror the role of fixed points in the GGM result for $Φ$-regret.
  This first set of results resolves the main open question in Garg, Jung, Reingold, and Roth (SODA '24), showing that oracle-efficient online multicalibration with $\sqrt{T}$-type guarantees is possible in full generality. Furthermore, our GGM-style reduction unifies the analyses of existing online multicalibration algorithms, enables new algorithms for challenging environments with delayed observations or censored outcomes, and yields the first efficient black-box reduction between online learning and multiclass omniprediction.
  Our second main result is a fine-grained reduction from high-dimensional online multicalibration to (contextual) $Φ$-regret minimization. Together with our first result, this establishes a new route from external regret to Phi-regret that bypasses sophisticated fixed-point or semi-separation machinery, dramatically simplifies a result of Daskalakis, Farina, Fishelson, Pipis, and Schneider (STOC '25) while improving rates, and yields new algorithms that are robust to richer deviation classes, such as those belonging to any reproducing kernel Hilbert space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种GGM风格的黑盒归约，将在线学习问题归约为在线多校准问题，证明了在线多校准可实现√T类型保证，并建立了从外部遗憾到Φ-遗憾的新路径，统一并改进了现有算法。
AI.motivation: 解决Garg等人提出的主要开放问题，即证明在全一般性条件下，具有√T类型保证的预言机高效在线多校准是可能的；同时统一现有在线多校准算法的分析，并建立在线学习与多类全知预测之间的高效黑盒归约。
AI.method: 采用GGM风格的黑盒归约方法：将任意无遗憾学习器与期望变分不等式求解器结合，实现高维多校准；进一步通过细粒度归约将高维在线多校准问题归约为上下文Φ-遗憾最小化问题。
AI.result: 解决了在线多校预言机高效性的主要开放问题；统一了现有在线多校准算法的分析；支持延迟观测或审查结果等挑战性环境的新算法；首次建立在线学习与多类全知预测之间的高效黑盒归约；简化了Daskalakis等人的结果并改进速率；产生了对更丰富偏离类（如再生核希尔伯特空间）鲁棒的新算法。
AI.conclusion: 在线多校准与在线学习之间存在深层联系，通过GGM风格归约可实现预言机高效的多校准算法，且该归约框架为连接外部遗憾与Φ-遗憾提供了绕过复杂不动点或半分离机制的简洁新路径。

title: VULCAN: Vision-Language-Model Enhanced Multi-Agent Cooperative Navigation for Indoor Fire-Disaster Response
summary: Indoor fire disasters pose severe challenges to autonomous search and rescue due to dense smoke, high temperatures, and dynamically evolving indoor environments. In such time-critical scenarios, multi-agent cooperative navigation is particularly useful, as it enables faster and broader exploration than single-agent approaches. However, existing multi-agent navigation systems are primarily vision-based and designed for benign indoor settings, leading to significant performance degradation under fire-driven dynamic conditions. In this paper, we present VULCAN, a multi-agent cooperative navigation framework based on multi-modal perception and vision-language models (VLMs), tailored for indoor fire disaster response. We extend the Habitat-Matterport3D benchmark by simulating physically realistic fire scenarios, including smoke diffusion, thermal hazards, and sensor degradation. We evaluate representative multi-agent cooperative navigation baselines under both normal and fire-driven environments. Our results reveal critical failure modes of existing methods in fire scenarios and underscore the necessity of robust perception and hazard-aware planning for reliable multi-agent search and rescue.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VULCAN，一个基于多模态感知和视觉语言模型的多智能体协同导航框架，专为室内火灾搜救场景设计，并通过扩展Habitat-Matterport3D基准测试包含物理逼真的火灾模拟，揭示了现有方法在火灾环境中的关键失效模式。
AI.motivation: 室内火灾搜救场景中，浓烟、高温和动态变化的环境给自主导航带来严峻挑战，而现有基于视觉的多智能体导航系统主要针对正常室内环境设计，在火灾动态条件下性能显著下降，亟需能够应对火灾场景的鲁棒导航框架。
AI.method: VULCAN采用多模态感知与视觉语言模型(VLM)构建多智能体协同导航框架，并扩展Habitat-Matterport3D基准测试，加入烟雾扩散、热危害和传感器退化等物理逼真的火灾仿真场景，以评估多智能体导航方法在火灾环境中的表现。
AI.result: 在正常和火灾驱动环境下评估了多种代表性多智能体协同导航基线方法，揭示了现有方法在火灾场景中的关键失效模式，验证了鲁棒感知和危害感知规划对于可靠的多智能体搜救的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 现有视觉导航方法在火灾动态条件下存在严重性能退化，VULCAN通过多模态感知和VLM技术为室内火灾搜救提供了更可靠的导航方案，凸显了面向灾害场景的鲁棒感知与规划的重要性。

title: Multi-modal panoramic 3D outdoor datasets for place categorization
comment: This is the authors' manuscript. The final published article was presented at IROS 2026, and it is available at https://doi.org/10.1109/IROS.2016.7759669
summary: We present two multi-modal panoramic 3D outdoor (MPO) datasets for semantic place categorization with six categories: forest, coast, residential area, urban area and indoor/outdoor parking lot. The first dataset consists of 650 static panoramic scans of dense (9,000,000 points) 3D color and reflectance point clouds obtained using a FARO laser scanner with synchronized color images. The second dataset consists of 34,200 real-time panoramic scans of sparse (70,000 points) 3D reflectance point clouds obtained using a Velodyne laser scanner while driving a car. The datasets were obtained in the city of Fukuoka, Japan and are publicly available in [1], [2]. In addition, we compare several approaches for semantic place categorization with best results of 96.42% (dense) and 89.67% (sparse).

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了两个用于语义地点分类的多模态全景3D室外（MPO）数据集，涵盖森林、海岸、住宅区、城市区域及室内/室外停车场六个类别。数据集分别包含650个密集点云扫描（FARO激光扫描仪，900万点）和34,200个稀疏点云扫描（Velodyne激光扫描仪，7万点），均在日本福冈市采集并公开。实验表明，语义地点分类的最佳准确率在密集点云上达到96.42%，稀疏点云上达到89.67%。
AI.motivation: 现有3D室外语义地点分类数据集匮乏，缺乏多模态、多密度级别的全景3D扫描数据，难以支撑自动驾驶和机器人导航中的场景理解研究。
AI.method: 构建两个MPO数据集：1) FARO激光扫描仪获取的密集（900万点）彩色+反射率点云；2) Velodyne激光扫描仪获取的稀疏（7万点）反射率点云。采用多种语义分类方法进行基准测试。
AI.result: 密集点云最佳分类准确率96.42%，稀疏点云最佳分类准确率89.67%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MPO数据集为室外语义地点分类提供了有效基准，不同密度点云下的分类性能差异可为实际系统设计提供参考。

title: Detecting Hallucinations in SpeechLLMs at Inference Time Using Attention Maps
summary: Hallucinations in Speech Large Language Models (SpeechLLMs) pose significant risks, yet existing detection methods typically rely on gold-standard outputs that are costly or impractical to obtain. Moreover, hallucination detection methods developed for text-based LLMs do not directly capture audio-specific signals. We investigate four attention-derived metrics: AUDIORATIO, AUDIOCONSISTENCY, AUDIOENTROPY, and TEXTENTROPY, designed to capture pathological attention patterns associated with hallucination, and train lightweight logistic regression classifiers on these features for efficient inference-time detection. Across automatic speech recognition and speech-to-text translation tasks, evaluations on Qwen-2-Audio and Voxtral-3B show that our approach outperforms uncertainty-based and prior attention-based baselines on in-domain data, achieving improvements of up to +0.23 PR-AUC, and generalises to out-of-domain ASR settings. We further find that strong performance can be achieved with approximately 100 attention heads, improving out-of-domain generalisation compared to using all heads. While effectiveness is model-dependent and task-specific training is required, our results demonstrate that attention patterns provide a valuable tool for hallucination detection in SpeechLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力模式的SpeechLLM幻觉检测方法，通过AUDIORATIO、AUDIOCONSISTENCY、AUDIOENTROPY和TEXTENTROPY四个注意力衍生指标，结合轻量级逻辑回归分类器，在ASR和ST任务上优于现有基线，且仅需约100个注意力头即可在域外泛化上取得更好效果。
AI.motivation: SpeechLLM中的幻觉问题存在显著风险，但现有检测方法依赖昂贵的黄金标准输出，且文本LLM的检测方法无法捕获音频特有信号，亟需高效且无需额外标注的音频专用检测方案。
AI.method: 提取四个注意力衍生特征（AUDIORATIO、AUDIOCONSISTENCY、AUDIOENTROPY、TEXTENTROPY），用于刻画与幻觉相关的病态注意力模式；在此基础上训练轻量级逻辑回归分类器，在推理时进行高效幻觉检测。
AI.result: 在Qwen-2-Audio和Voxtral-3B上，针对ASR和ST任务，域内数据PR-AUC最高提升+0.23，优于不确定性基线和已有注意力基线；域外ASR设置下具备泛化能力；约100个注意力头即可实现强性能，且域外泛化优于使用全部注意力头。
AI.conclusion: 注意力模式是SpeechLLM幻觉检测的有效工具，但效果依赖于模型和任务，需要任务特定的训练。

title: Actuation space reduction to facilitate insightful shape matching in a novel reconfigurable tendon driven continuum manipulator
summary: In tendon driven continuum manipulators (TDCMs), reconfiguring the tendon routing enables tailored spatial deformation of the backbone. This work presents a design in which tendons can be rerouted either prior to or after actuation by actively rotating the individual spacer disks. Each disk rotation thus adds a degree of freedom to the actuation space, complicating the mapping from a desired backbone curve to the corresponding actuator inputs. However, when the backbone shape is projected into an intermediate space defined by curvature and torsion (C-T), patterns emerge that highlight which disks are most influential in achieving a global shape. This insight enables a simplified, sequential shape-matching strategy: first, the proximal and intermediate disks are rotated to approximate the global shape; then, the distal disks are adjusted to fine-tune the end-effector position with minimal impact on the overall shape. The proposed actuation framework offers a model-free alternative to conventional control approaches, bypassing the complexities of modeling reconfigurable TDCMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过主动旋转间隔盘来重新配置肌腱路径的连续体机械臂驱动框架，利用曲率-扭转中间空间简化形状匹配，实现模型无关的序贯控制策略。
AI.motivation: 肌腱驱动连续体机械臂中，重新配置肌腱路径可实现骨架的定制化空间变形，但旋转间隔盘增加了驱动空间的自由度，使得从期望骨架曲线到驱动器输入的映射变得复杂。
AI.method: 将骨架形状投影到由曲率和扭转定义的中间空间，识别出对全局形状影响最大的圆盘；提出序贯形状匹配策略：先旋转近端和中间圆盘近似全局形状，再调整远端圆盘微调末端执行器位置。
AI.result: 该方法提供了一种模型无关的替代方案，避开了对可重构连续体机械臂进行建模的复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 通过曲率-扭转空间分析不同圆盘的影响力，使复杂的多自由度驱动问题简化为序贯控制，为可重构肌腱驱动连续体机械臂的控制提供了实用的无模型框架。

title: Structure-guided molecular design with contrastive 3D protein-ligand learning
summary: Structure-based drug discovery faces the dual challenge of accurately capturing 3D protein-ligand interactions while navigating ultra-large chemical spaces to identify synthetically accessible candidates. In this work, we present a unified framework that addresses these challenges by combining contrastive 3D structure encoding with autoregressive molecular generation conditioned on commercial compound spaces. First, we introduce an SE(3)-equivariant transformer that encodes ligand and pocket structures into a shared embedding space via contrastive learning, achieving competitive results in zero-shot virtual screening. Second, we integrate these embeddings into a multimodal Chemical Language Model (MCLM). The model generates target-specific molecules conditioned on either pocket or ligand structures, with a learned dataset token that steers the output toward targeted chemical spaces, yielding candidates with favorable predicted binding properties across diverse targets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一框架，结合对比3D结构编码与自回归分子生成，在商业化合物空间中进行基于结构的药物设计，实现零样本虚拟筛选和靶标特异性分子生成。
AI.motivation: 基于结构的药物发现面临双重挑战：精确捕捉3D蛋白质-配体相互作用，以及在超大型化学空间中识别可合成的候选分子。现有方法难以同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 1) 使用SE(3)-等变transformer通过对比学习将配体和口袋结构编码到共享嵌入空间（零样本虚拟筛选）；2) 将嵌入集成到多模态化学语言模型(MCLM)中，结合条件自回归分子生成，通过可学习的数据集令牌将输出导向目标化学空间。
AI.result: 在零样本虚拟筛选中取得竞争性结果；生成的分子在多个不同靶标上具有有利的预测结合性质。
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架有效融合了3D结构编码与条件分子生成，能够生成靶标特异性且可商业获取的候选分子，为基于结构的药物设计提供了新范式。

title: Reliability-Guided Depth Fusion for Glare-Resilient Navigation Costmaps
summary: Specular glare on reflective floors and glass surfaces frequently corrupts RGB-D depth measurements, producing holes and spikes that accumulate as persistent phantom obstacles in occupancy-grid costmaps. This paper proposes a glare-resilient costmap construction method based on explicit depth-reliability modeling. A lightweight Depth Reliability Map (DRM) estimator predicts per-pixel measurement trustworthiness under specular interference, and a Reliability-Guided Fusion (RGF) mechanism uses this signal to modulate occupancy updates before corrupted measurements are accumulated into the map. Experiments on a real mobile robotic platform equipped with an Intel RealSense D435 and a Jetson Orin Nano show that the proposed method substantially reduces false obstacle insertion and improves free-space preservation under real reflective-floor and glass-surface conditions, while introducing only modest computational overhead. These results indicate that treating glare as a measurement-reliability problem provides a practical and lightweight solution for improving costmap correctness and navigation robustness in safety-critical indoor environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于显式深度可靠性建模的抗镜面反射代价地图构建方法，通过轻量级深度可靠性图（DRM）估计器和可靠性引导融合（RGF）机制，有效减少反射地板和玻璃表面造成的虚假障碍物，提升占用栅格代价地图的准确性，并在实际机器人平台上验证了低计算开销下的有效性。
AI.motivation: 反射地板和玻璃表面产生的镜面眩光会严重破坏RGB-D深度测量数据，导致代价地图中出现空洞和尖刺等持久性虚假障碍物，影响室内机器人的导航安全性。
AI.method: 提出深度可靠性图（DRM）估计器，逐像素预测镜面干扰下的测量可信度；设计可靠性引导融合（RGF）机制，利用该置信度信号在将测量值累加到代价地图前调制占用更新，从而抑制被污染数据的累积。
AI.result: 在配备Intel RealSense D435和Jetson Orin Nano的真实移动机器人平台上，该方法在真实反射地板和玻璃表面条件下显著减少了虚假障碍物的插入，提升了自由空间保持能力，且计算开销适中。
AI.conclusion: 将镜面眩光视为测量可靠性问题，提供了一种实用且轻量级的解决方案，能有效提升安全关键型室内环境中代价地图的正确性和导航鲁棒性。

title: Separating Geometry from Probability in the Analysis of Generalization
summary: The goal of machine learning is to find models that minimize prediction error on data that has not yet been seen. Its operational paradigm assumes access to a dataset $S$ and articulates a scheme for evaluating how well a given model performs on an arbitrary sample. The sample can be $S$ (in which case we speak of ``in-sample'' performance) or some entirely new $S'$ (in which case we speak of ``out-of-sample'' performance). Traditional analysis of generalization assumes that both in- and out-of-sample data are i.i.d.\ draws from an infinite population. However, these probabilistic assumptions cannot be verified even in principle. This paper presents an alternative view of generalization through the lens of sensitivity analysis of solutions of optimization problems to perturbations in the problem data. Under this framework, generalization bounds are obtained by purely deterministic means and take the form of variational principles that relate in-sample and out-of-sample evaluations through an error term that quantifies how close out-of-sample data are to in-sample data. Statistical assumptions can then be used \textit{ex post} to characterize the situations when this error term is small (either on average or with high probability).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于敏感性分析的泛化理论新框架，通过确定性变分原理建立样本内与样本外评估之间的联系，统计假设仅作为事后分析工具。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习泛化分析依赖独立同分布（i.i.d.）假设，但这些概率假设在原则上无法验证。作者希望构建一个无需先验概率假设的泛化分析框架。
AI.method: 将泛化问题重新表述为优化问题解的敏感性分析，通过确定性手段推导出变分原理形式的泛化界，其中误差项量化了样本外数据与样本内数据的接近程度。统计假设事后用于分析误差项何时较小。
AI.result: 得到了纯确定性推导的泛化界，其形式为联系样本内与样本外评估的变分原理，误差项衡量了数据分布之间的偏离程度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将统计假设从泛化分析的必要前提降级为可选的事后分析工具，为理解泛化提供了更基础的确定性视角。

title: FeaXDrive: Feasibility-aware Trajectory-Centric Diffusion Planning for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end diffusion planning has shown strong potential for autonomous driving, but the physical feasibility of generated trajectories remains insufficiently addressed. In particular, generated trajectories may exhibit local geometric irregularities, violate trajectory-level kinematic constraints, or deviate from the drivable area, indicating that the commonly used noise-centric formulation in diffusion planning is not yet well aligned with the trajectory space where feasibility is more naturally characterized. To address this issue, we propose FeaXDrive, a feasibility-aware trajectory-centric diffusion planning method for end-to-end autonomous driving. The core idea is to treat the clean trajectory as the unified object for feasibility-aware modeling throughout the diffusion process. Built on this trajectory-centric formulation, FeaXDrive integrates adaptive curvature-constrained training to improve intrinsic geometric and kinematic feasibility, drivable-area guidance within reverse diffusion sampling to enhance consistency with the drivable area, and feasibility-aware GRPO post-training to further improve planning performance while balancing trajectory-space feasibility. Experiments on the NAVSIM benchmark show that FeaXDrive achieves strong closed-loop planning performance while substantially improving trajectory-space feasibility. These findings highlight the importance of explicitly modeling trajectory-space feasibility in end-to-end diffusion planning and provide a step toward more reliable and physically grounded autonomous driving planners.

AI.tldr: FeaXDrive 提出了一种以轨迹为中心的可行性感知扩散规划方法，通过自适应曲率约束训练、可行驶区域引导和GRPO后训练，显著提升了端到端自动驾驶中生成轨迹的几何、运动学和可行驶区域可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端扩散规划方法生成的轨迹存在局部几何不规则、违反运动学约束、偏离可行驶区域等问题，其噪声中心化的范式与轨迹空间的可行性表征不匹配。
AI.method: 提出FeaXDrive方法，核心是以干净轨迹为统一对象进行可行性感知建模：(1) 自适应曲率约束训练提升几何与运动学可行性；(2) 逆扩散采样中的可行驶区域引导增强与可行区域的一致性；(3) 可行性感知GRPO后训练平衡规划性能与轨迹可行性。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM基准上，FeaXDrive在实现强闭环规划性能的同时，显著提升了轨迹空间的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 明确建模轨迹空间可行性对端到端扩散规划至关重要，为更可靠、物理合理的自动驾驶规划器迈出了重要一步。

title: Contextual Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Reef Monitoring
comment: To be published in IEEE OCEANS 2026 (Sanya) conference proceedings
summary: Although autonomous underwater vehicles promise the capability of marine ecosystem monitoring, their deployment is fundamentally limited by the difficulty of controlling vehicles under highly uncertain and non-stationary underwater dynamics. To address these challenges, we employ a data-driven reinforcement learning approach to compensate for unknown dynamics and task variations.Traditional single-task reinforcement learning has a tendency to overfit the training environment, thus, limit the long-term usefulness of the learnt policy. Hence, we propose to use a contextual multi-task reinforcement learning paradigm instead, allowing us to learn controllers that can be reused for various tasks, e.g., detecting oysters in one reef and detecting corals in another. We evaluate whether contextual multi-task reinforcement learning can efficiently learn robust and generalisable control policies for autonomous underwater reef monitoring. We train a single context-dependent policy that is able to solve multiple related monitoring tasks in a simulated reef environment in HoloOcean. In our experiments, we empirically evaluate the contextual policies regarding sample-efficiency, zero-shot generalisation to unseen tasks, and robustness to varying water currents. By utilising multi-task reinforcement learning, we aim to improve the training effectiveness, as well as the reusability of learnt policies to take a step towards more sustainable procedures in autonomous reef monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用上下文多任务强化学习范式训练自主水下航行器，使其能够在高度不确定和非平稳的水下动力学环境中学习可复用的控制策略，用于多种海洋礁监测任务（如检测牡蛎或珊瑚），并在HoloOcean模拟器中验证了策略在样本效率、零样本泛化和对水流变化的鲁棒性方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 自主水下航行器在海洋生态系统监测中潜力巨大，但其部署受到水下动力学高度不确定性和非平稳性的制约。传统单任务强化学习容易过拟合训练环境，限制了学得策略的长期可用性，因此需要更高效、可复用的控制方法。
AI.method: 采用上下文多任务强化学习范式，训练一个依赖于上下文（任务条件）的统一策略，使其能够同时解决多个相关的礁监测任务（如检测不同目标）。在HoloOcean模拟器中构建仿真礁环境进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 实验评估了上下文策略在样本效率、对未见任务的零样本泛化能力以及对不同水流变化的鲁棒性方面的表现，验证了多任务强化学习相较于传统单任务方法的优势。
AI.conclusion: 上下文多任务强化学习能够有效提升训练效率和策略的可复用性，为自主水下礁监测走向更可持续的部署方式迈进了重要一步。

title: Calibrating Scientific Foundation Models with Inference-Time Stochastic Attention
summary: Transformer-based scientific foundation models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings, but current architectures give deterministic outputs and provide limited support for calibrated predictive uncertainty. We propose Stochastic Attention, a lightweight inference-time modification that randomizes attention by replacing softmax weights with normalized multinomial samples controlled by a single concentration parameter, and produces predictive ensembles without retraining. To set this parameter, we introduce a calibration objective that matches the stochastic attention output with the target, yielding an efficient univariate post-hoc tuning problem. We evaluate this mechanism on two scientific foundation models for weather and timeseries forecasting along with an additional regression task. Across benchmarks against uncertainty-aware baselines, we find that Stochastic Attention achieves the strongest native calibration and the sharpest prediction intervals at comparable coverage, while requiring only minutes of post-hoc tuning versus days of retraining for competitive baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出Stochastic Attention，一种轻量级推理时修改方法，通过用归一化多项分布样本替换softmax权重来随机化注意力机制，无需重新训练即可生成预测集成，并在天气和时间序列预测任务上实现最优校准和最窄预测区间。
AI.motivation: 基于Transformer的科学基础模型在高风险场景中部署时，确定性输出无法提供校准的预测不确定性，而现有不确定性方法需要大量重新训练成本。
AI.method: Stochastic Attention：用归一化多项分布样本替换softmax权重，由单一浓度参数控制；通过校准目标函数匹配随机注意力输出与目标，实现高效的单变量事后调参。
AI.result: 在天气和时间序列预测基准上，Stochastic Attention在多个不确定性感知基线中实现最强原生校准和最窄预测区间，且覆盖相当；事后调参仅需数分钟，而竞争基线需要数天重新训练。
AI.conclusion: Stochastic Attention是一种高效、轻量的后处理不确定性校准方法，能在不重新训练的情况下显著提升科学基础模型的概率预测质量。

title: Revisiting RaBitQ and TurboQuant: A Symmetric Comparison of Methods, Theory, and Experiments
summary: This technical note revisits the relationship between RaBitQ and TurboQuant under a unified comparison framework. We compare the two methods in terms of methodology, theoretical guarantees, and empirical performance, using a reproducible, transparent, and symmetric setup. Our results show that, despite the claimed advantage of TurboQuant, TurboQuant does not provide a consistent improvement over RaBitQ in directly comparable settings; in many tested configurations, it performs worse than RaBitQ. We further find that several reported runtime and recall results in the TurboQuant paper could not be reproduced from the released implementation under the stated configuration. Overall, this note clarifies the shared structure and genuine differences between the two lines of work, while documenting reproducibility issues in the experimental results reported by the TurboQuant paper.

AI.tldr: 本文在统一比较框架下重新审视了RaBitQ与TurboQuant两种方法。结果表明，TurboQuant在直接可比的设置中并未一致优于RaBitQ，反而在许多配置下表现更差。此外，TurboQuant论文中的部分运行时间和召回率结果无法从其公开实现中复现。
AI.motivation: 针对TurboQuant声称优于RaBitQ的结论，作者认为需要在一个可复现、透明且对称的统一框架下重新评估两种方法的真实性能差异，以澄清两者之间的真实关系。
AI.method: 构建统一比较框架，在方法论、理论保证和实证性能三个维度上对RaBitQ和TurboQuant进行对称对比；使用可复现的设置，并基于TurboQuant公开的实现代码复现其论文中的实验结果。
AI.result: TurboQuant在直接可比设置中未一致优于RaBitQ，多数配置下反而更差；TurboQuant论文中部分实验结果无法从公开代码复现。
AI.conclusion: 本文澄清了RaBitQ与TurboQuant之间的共享结构和真实差异，同时指出了TurboQuant论文存在可复现性问题。

title: Evaluating LLM-Generated Obfuscated XSS Payloads for Machine Learning-Based Detection
summary: Cross-site scripting (XSS) remains a persistent web security vulnerability, especially because obfuscation can change the surface form of a malicious payload while preserving its behavior. These transformations make it difficult for traditional and machine learning-based detection systems to reliably identify attacks. Existing approaches for generating obfuscated payloads often emphasize syntactic diversity, but they do not always ensure that the generated samples remain behaviorally valid. This paper presents a structured pipeline for generating and evaluating obfuscated XSS payloads using large language models (LLMs). The pipeline combines deterministic transformation techniques with LLM-based generation and uses a browser- based runtime evaluation procedure to compare payload behavior in a controlled execution environment. This allows generated samples to be assessed through observable runtime behavior rather than syntactic similarity alone. In the evaluation, an untuned baseline language model achieves a runtime behavior match rate of 0.15, while fine-tuning on behavior-preserving source-target obfuscation pairs improves the match rate to 0.22. Although this represents a measurable improvement, the results show that current LLMs still struggle to generate obfuscations that preserve observed runtime behavior. A downstream classifier evaluation further shows that adding generated payloads does not improve detection performance in this setting, although behavior- filtered generated samples can be incorporated without materially degrading performance. Overall, the study demonstrates both the promise and the limits of applying generative models to adversarial security data generation and emphasizes the importance of runtime behavior checks in improving the quality of generated data for downstream detection systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用大语言模型（LLM）生成和评估混淆XSS攻击载荷的结构化流程，结合确定性与生成式变换方法，并通过浏览器运行时行为验证来确保载荷的行为有效性。实验表明，微调后行为匹配率从0.15提升至0.22，但当前LLM仍难以生成行为保持的混淆变体，且生成数据未能提升下游检测器性能。
AI.motivation: 现有XSS检测系统易被混淆技术绕过，而现有混淆载荷生成方法多聚焦于语法多样性，缺乏对生成样本行为有效性的保障，导致生成的对抗样本对下游检测系统帮助有限。
AI.method: 提出一个结合确定性变换与LLM生成的混淆XSS载荷生成流程，并在受控浏览器环境中通过运行时行为匹配评估（而非仅语法相似性）验证载荷有效性。对基础LLM进行行为保持的源-目标混淆对微调，并与未微调模型进行对比。
AI.result: 未微调基线模型运行时行为匹配率为0.15，微调后提升至0.22；生成载荷加入下游分类器训练未提升检测性能，但经行为过滤后的样本可引入而不显著降低性能。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在生成行为保持的混淆XSS载荷方面虽有改进但仍有局限，运行时行为验证是提升生成数据质量的关键；展示了生成式模型在对抗性安全数据生成中的潜力与边界。

title: Machine Learning-Based Real-Time Detection of Compensatory Trunk Movements Using Trunk-Wrist Inertial Measurement Units
comment: This manuscript has been submitted to IEEE Transactions on Neural Systems and Rehabilitation Engineering for possible publication. This version is a preprint and has not undergone peer review
summary: Compensatory trunk movements (CTMs) are commonly observed after stroke and can lead to maladaptive movement patterns, limiting targeted training of affected structures. Objective, continuous detection of CTMs during therapy and activities of daily living remains challenging due to the typically complex measurements setups required, as well as limited applicability for real-time use. This study investigates whether a two-inertial measurement unit configuration enables reliable, real-time CTM detection using machine learning. Data were collected from ten able-bodied participants performing activities of daily living under simulated impairment conditions (elbow brace restricting flexion-extension, resistance band inducing flexor-synergy-like patterns), with synchronized optical motion capture (OMC) and manually annotated video recordings serving as reference. A systematic location-reduction analysis using OMC identified wrist and trunk kinematics as a minimal yet sufficient set of anatomical sensing locations. Using an extreme gradient boosting classifier (XGBoost) evaluated with leave-one-subject-out cross-validation, our two-IMU model achieved strong discriminative performance (macro-F1 = 0.80 +/- 0.07, MCC = 0.73 +/- 0.08; ROC-AUC > 0.93), with performance comparable to an OMC-based model and prediction timing suitable for real-time applications. Explainability analysis revealed dominant contributions from trunk dynamics and wrist-trunk interaction features. In preliminary evaluation using recordings from four participants with neurological conditions, the model retained good discriminative capability (ROC-AUC ~ 0.78), but showed reduced and variable threshold-dependent performance, highlighting challenges in clinical generalization. These results support sparse wearable sensing as a viable pathway toward scalable, real-time monitoring of CTMs during therapy and daily living.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出基于两个惯性测量单元（IMU）的配置，结合XGBoost分类器，实现对脑卒中后代偿性躯干运动（CTM）的实时、可靠检测。在十名健康受试者模拟损伤条件下的实验中，该模型达到了与光学运动捕捉系统相当的判别性能（宏F1=0.80，MCC=0.73），可解释性分析表明躯干动力学和腕-躯干交互特征是主要贡献因素。在神经系统疾病患者的初步评估中模型保持了一定判别能力（ROC-AUC≈0.78），但存在阈值依赖性性能下降，提示临床泛化仍面临挑战。
AI.motivation: 脑卒中后患者常出现代偿性躯干运动，导致异常运动模式并限制受影响结构的针对性训练。现有客观、连续的CTM检测方法通常需要复杂的测量设置，且实时应用受限，因此亟需一种简洁、可扩展的实时监测方案。
AI.method: 使用十名健康受试者在模拟损伤条件（肘部支具限制屈伸、阻力带诱导屈肌协同模式）下执行日常生活活动；同步采集光学运动捕捉（OMC）数据和手动标注视频作为参考；通过系统位置缩减分析确定腕部和躯干为最小传感位置；采用XGBoost分类器，以留一受试者交叉验证进行评估；对四名神经系统疾病患者进行初步临床评估。
AI.result: 双IMU模型实现了强判别性能：宏F1=0.80±0.07，MCC=0.73±0.08，ROC-AUC>0.93，与OMC模型性能相当；预测时序满足实时应用要求。可解释性分析显示躯干动力学和腕-躯干交互特征贡献最大。临床初步评估中ROC-AUC≈0.78，但阈值依赖性能下降且变异性增大。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏可穿戴传感（双IMU配置）是实现CTM可扩展实时监测的可行路径，但临床泛化性仍需进一步改进。

title: When Graph Structure Becomes a Liability: A Critical Re-Evaluation of Graph Neural Networks for Bitcoin Fraud Detection under Temporal Distribution Shift
summary: The consensus that GCN, GraphSAGE, GAT, and EvolveGCN outperform feature-only baselines on the Elliptic Bitcoin Dataset is widely cited but has not been rigorously stress-tested under a leakage-free evaluation protocol. We perform a seed-matched inductive-versus-transductive comparison and find that this consensus does not hold. Under a strictly inductive protocol, Random Forest on raw features achieves F1 = 0.821 and outperforms all evaluated GNNs, while GraphSAGE reaches F1 = 0.689 +/- 0.017. A paired controlled experiment reveals a 39.5-point F1 gap attributable to training-time exposure to test-period adjacency. Additionally, edge-shuffle ablations show that randomly wired graphs outperform the real transaction graph, indicating that the dataset's topology can be misleading under temporal distribution shift. Hybrid models combining GNN embeddings with raw features provide only marginal gains and remain substantially below feature-only baselines. We release code, checkpoints, and a strict-inductive protocol to enable reproducible, leakage-free evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文对Elliptic比特币数据集上GNN优于特征基线模型的共识进行了严格复现，发现该共识在无泄漏的归纳评估协议下不成立。随机森林在原始特征上F1=0.821，优于所有GNN模型；GraphSAGE仅达F1=0.689。训练时接触测试期邻接信息导致39.5个F1点的性能差距，且随机图结构优于真实交易图。
AI.motivation: 现有文献广泛引用GCN、GraphSAGE、GAT等GNN模型在Elliptic比特币数据集上优于特征基线模型的结论，但该结论未在严格的无泄漏评估协议下进行压力测试，可能存在评估偏差。
AI.method: 采用种子匹配的归纳式与直推式对比实验、配对控制实验（控制训练期邻接信息暴露）、边置换消融实验，以及混合模型实验，系统检验GNN在无泄漏协议下的表现。
AI.result: 归纳协议下随机森林(F1=0.821)优于所有GNN；GraphSAGE仅F1=0.689±0.017。训练期暴露测试期邻接造成39.5 F1点差距。随机图结构优于真实交易图，说明拓扑在时间分布偏移下具有误导性。混合模型仅带来边际提升，仍低于特征基线。
AI.conclusion: Elliptic比特币数据集上GNN优于特征基线的共识在严格归纳评估下不成立，数据集拓扑在时间分布偏移下具有误导性，必须采用无泄漏的严格归纳协议进行可靠评估。
